1.1: Asœke kœdœ ɨ'ɨrɨ aata Yisu Kristu, ata Davidi á tshe dœ ndje ata Abrayamo.
1.2: Abrayamo zu Izaka, Izaka zu Yakobo, Yakobo zu Yuda œdœ aayanœ.
1.3: Yuda zu Perese œdœ Zara, ayi endje kœdœ lima Tamare. Perese zu Eserone, Eserone zu Arame.
1.4: Arame zu Aminadabe, Aminadabe zu Nashone, Nashone zu Salma.
1.5: Salma zu Boaz, Rahabe kœdœ lima ayinœ. Boaz zu Obede, Luta kœdœ lima ayinœ. Obede zu Yese.
1.6: Yese zu gbozugo Davidi, yé Davidi zu Salomo tœ yashe á tshe dœ lima awo Uri.
1.7: Salomo zu Robowame, Robowame zu Abiya, Abiya zu Asafe.
1.8: Asafe zu Yozafate, Yozafate zu Yorame, Yorame kœdœ ata Oziase.
1.9: Oziase zu Yotame, Yotame zu Akaze, Akaze zu Ezekiase.
1.10: Ezekiase zu Manase, Manase zu Amɔ, Amɔ zu Yoziase.
1.11: Yoziase zu Yekonia œdœ aayanœ dœ lɔndɔ á endje ko lima azu Israyele gu tœnœ ga tshakudu kanga ɓa lœ Babilone.
1.12: Manda kœko lima azu Israyele gu tœnœ ga tshakudu kanga ɓa lœ Babilone, Yekonia zu Shaletiele, yé Shaletiele zu Zorobabele.
1.13: Zorobabele zu Abiwude, Abiwude zu Eliyakimi, yé Eliyakimi zu Azore.
1.14: Azore zu Shadɔke, Shadɔke zu Akimi, yé Akimi zu Eliwude.
1.15: Eliwude zu Eleazare, Eleazare zu Matane, yé Matane zu Yakobo.
1.16: Yakobo zu Yozefu akɔ Mareya ayi Yisu, á endje sœ kœ'e she Kristu.
1.17: Ataa, kœto kpœtœ Abrayamo œrrr ga tœ Davidi, uwu aatazu sœ ndjokpa dœ vana. Kœto kpœtœ Davidi œrrr ga tœ lɔndɔ á endje ko lima azu Israyele gu tœnœ ga tshakudu kanga ɓa lœ Babilone, uwu aatazu sœ ndje ndjokpa dœ vana; yé kœto kpœtœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ œrrr ga tœ kœzu Kristu, uwu aatazu sœ ndje ndjokpa dœ vana. Kœzu Yisu Kristu (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 2.1-7)
1.18: Ndœ budu kœzu Yisu Kristu sœ atake: Ayinœ dœ Mareya kœdœ lima koje nœ Yozefu. Kashe utshunœ adœke endje ngbɔtœ endje awa bale ga tœ œsœnœ, tshe gbɔ nguzu lœ awa gbɔgbɔ nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ.
1.19: Koje nœ ye dœ Yozefu kœdœ lima uzu á tshe sœ ndjii, yé tshe yiyi lima kœmɨtshelœ ye ngbɨ fœ azu nene. Tshe yi lima kœkatœ ye tɨ lœ ubunœ.
1.20: Ɓata á tshe sœ lima kœgbe atake, anga andjelu nœ Gbozu wuta ga tœ ye lœ ulu œ pa fœ she adœke: «Yozefu, ata Davidi, awa zaza ɓœ kœza Mareya tœ awo zœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, nguzunœ á sœ lœ ye asœmœ to lœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ.
1.21: Tshe zu bala gbolo yakoshe yé ɓœ ta ɨ'ɨrɨ ye Yisu; gbambanœ nene, tshe she bala azu nœ ye lœ ekperœ nœ endje.»
1.22: Œneke kɔ mbœrœtœ endje ataa mbœrœ o'onœ á Gbozu pa lima lœ awa nœ ayi kœgbara o'o kœmbœrœtœ endje:
1.23: «Ɔkpɔ yawuru œ gbɔ nguzu yé œ zu gbolo yakoshe yé endje ta ɨ'ɨrɨ ye Emanwele.» Ádá ɨ'ɨrɨ Emanwele kœdœ «Ndjaba awa bale dœ azœ.»
1.24: Lɔkɔ á Yozefu jo, tshe mbœrœtœ ye ɓata á andjelu nœ Gbozu mɨ lima ndɨ nœ fœ she, yé œ za Mareya tœ awonœ.
1.25: Kashe tshe ngbɔngbɔpa gbarœ olo bale dœ she nene œrrr ga tœ kœzu gbolo yakoshe nœ ye ga pa ɔshɔ, yé á Yozefu ta ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu ga pa ye.

2.1: Endje zu Yisu ɓa lœ Beteleme, ɓa lœ ogo Yuda dœ lɔndɔ á Erode dœ́ lima gbozugo. Manda kœzu she, agbangba kœwusœ ádá angerepe to lima ɓa tœ osho á ɔlɔ œ wuta tœnœ yé œ na. Endje yi lima kumu endje ga lœ Yerusaleme,
2.2: yé á yu adœke: «Gbozugo nœ Ayuda á endje zu she ngɔngɔ sœ kpœta a? 'A wu angerepe nœ ye œ wuta ɓa tœ osho á ɔlɔ œ wuta tœnœ, yé á 'a na kœgote ga utshu ye.»
2.3: Lɔkɔ á gbozugo Erode djindœ upunœ ataa, tshelœ ɔkɔrɔ ye œdœ œnœ azu ogo Yerusaleme djigi tshanga ye.
2.4: Tshe vwa osho ndœ agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba œdœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa, yé œ yu endje tœ osho á endje li kœzu Masiya tœnœ.
2.5: Endje gi fœ she adœke: «Ɓa lœ Beteleme, ɓa lœ ogo Yuda. Gbambanœ nene, œneke á ayi kœgbara o'o su dœke:
2.6: “Œɓœ Beteleme, lœ ogo Yuda, ɓœ sœsœ adja teasho ugurutœ tshalakpɨ á sœ lœ ogo Yuda nene; gbambanœ nene, gbozunœ á tshe te bala utshu azu nœ mœ, azu Israyele, œ to ɓa ndœ zœ.”»
2.7: Dœ tœnœ ataa, Erode vwa osho ndœ agbangba kœwusœ ádá angerepe lœ ubunœ yé œ yu endje tœ kœwusœ adja lɔkɔnœ á angerepe wuta lima dœ tœnœ.
2.8: Manda nœ, tshe vwa endje ga lœ Beteleme dœ kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E na œ yu osho pa upu nœ gbolo asœmœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ; yé œdœ 'e kœgbɔ she, 'e pandœ nœ fœ mœ adœke œmœ ndje, mœ na kœgote ga utshu ye.»
2.9: Manda kœdji o'o á gbozugonœ pa fœ endje, endje tetœ awa dœ kœro endje. Ngbewo, endje wu angerepe á endje wu má utshunœ ɓa tœ osho á ɔlɔ œ wuta tœnœ kœna utshu endje, œrrr œ ka ɓa pa osho á gbolonœ sœ lima tœnœ.
2.10: Endje sœ lima dœ egerœ yanga manda kœwu tœnœ.
2.11: Endje li ga lœ anda yé œ wu kpengbe gbolo dœ ayinœ, Mareya. Endje gote ga utshu ye yé œ donga she. Endje kɔrɔ gbarœ nœ endje yé œ ko makabo fœ she: Ɔrœ, zuwa yombo œdœ kada mire.
2.12: Manda nœ, Ndjaba pa fœ endje lœ ulu adœke endje kwakwatœ endje ga ndœ Erode nene. Ataa, endje za anga angbɨ awa á gu dœ tœnœ ga lœ ogo nœ endje. Kœkpa dœ Yisu ga lœ Ezipito
2.13: Lɔkɔ á agbangba kœwusœ ádá angerepenœ asœmœ gu daye, anga andjelu nœ Gbozu bale wuta ga ndœ Yozefu lœ ulu yé œ pa fœ she adœke: «Aafo, œ za kpengbe gbolo dœ ayinœ yé œ kpa dœ endje ga lœ Ezipito. Sœ ɓa zœ œrrr œdœ mœ kœpa fœ ɓœ adœke ɓœ gu yekane. Gbambanœ nene, Erode œ para gbolonœ mbœrœ kœwo she.»
2.14: Ataa, Yozefu kœalafo, kœza kpengbe gbolonœ œdœ ayinœ potœ ye lœ butshɔ yé á kpa ga lœ Ezipito.
2.15: Tshe sœ ɓa zœ œrrr ga tœ kuzu Erode. Œ sœ ataa, mbœrœ á œneke á Gbozu pandœ nœ lœ awa nœ ayi kœgbara o'o kœmbœrœtœ endje. Tshe pandœ nœ adœke: «Mœ e gbolo nœ mœ adœke tshe wuta lœ Ezipito ye.» Kœwo aaya agbolo
2.16: Lɔkɔ á Erode wusœ nœ adœke agbangba kœwusœ ádá angerepe fara œne, ókó za lima she tɔpanœ kpuru. Tshe za o'o adœke endje wo agbolo yakoshe á ungu endje sœ ga tshakudu ungu bisha lakpɨ Beteleme œdœ lakpɨ á sœ dje ɨndɨrɨnœ para kɔkɔ. Ungunœ á tshe ka ga panœ asœmœ sœ lindœ œneke á agbangba kœwusœ ádá angerepenœ za lima fœ she.
2.17: Kɔkɔ asœmœ mbœrœtœ endje ɓata á ayi kœgbara o'o Yilimiya pa lima adœke:
2.18: «Endje dji tshama á sœ kœwuta tœnœ ɓa lœ ogo Rama, ɨkɨ œdœ egerœ dɨtshelœma. Rashele dá sœ kœkɨ agbolo nœ ye, tshe yiyindœ nœ adœke endje u œne nene, mbœrœ agbolo nœ ye tshu kɔ ye.» Ayozefu fatœ endje kœgu ga lœ ogo Israyele
2.19: Manda kuzu Erode, anga andjelu nœ Gbozu bale wuta ga tœ Yozefu lœ ulu ɓa lœ Ezipito.
2.20: Tshe pa fœ she adœke: «Aalafo œ za gbolo œdœ ayinœ potœ zœ yé œ kwatœ zœ ga lœ ogo Israyele. Gbambanœ nene, endjeneke á endje sœ lima kœpara awa kœwo gbolonœ tshu ye.»
2.21: Yozefu áalafo, œ za gbolonœ dœ pe ayinœ potœ ye, yé á endje gu ga lœ ogo Israyele.
2.22: Kashe kœdjindœ nœ adœke Arkelawose dá te gbozugo Yuda manda abanœ dœ Erode, awa kœgu ga zœ za she. Ndjaba yisœ osho fœ she lœ ulu á tshe gitœ ye á gu ga lœ ogo Galilayi.
2.23: Tshe na œ sœ ɓa lœ ongbo á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Nazarete. Œ sœ ataa yeka á o'o á aayi kœgbara o'o pa lima kœmbœrœtœ endje. Endje pa lima adœke: «Endje e she bala uzu Nazarete.»

3.1: Dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, Yowane ayi kœza batisimu wuta lima œ sœ kœyisœ œrœ ɓa lœ kpagagasho nœ ogo Yuda adœke:
3.2: «'E fatshalɔsu 'e, gbambanœ nene, Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo ndo ye!»
3.3: Yowane kœdœ uzu á ayi kœgbara o'o Isaya pa lima tœ ye lɔkɔnœ á tshe pa adœke: «Anga uzu sœ kœta rawa ɓa lœ kpagagasho adœke: 'E guma ala awa Gbozu, 'e yɔrɔ ala awa ye ndjii!»
3.4: Yowane verœ lima lœba á endje mbœrœ dœ usu shamo, yé œ i lima uwu tshapa lœba á endje mbœrœ dœ ɔkɔ agea ga lœ nguku ye; tshe zɨ lima ayila yé œ la adja ojoro awaterœ.
3.5: Azu tshalakpɨ Yerusaleme dœ azu ogo Yuda kɔ œdœ pe azu ogo kɔ á sœ mashenga dœ ungu Yɔrdane, na lima ga ndœ ye.
3.6: Endje sœ lima kœpandœ ekperœ nœ endje, yé Yowane sœ lima kœza batisimu fœ endje ɓa la Yɔrdane.
3.7: Yowane wu adœke Afarisayi œdœ Asadukayi ndjoro sœ kœna lima ga tœ œsœ batisimu nœ ye, tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «Ukpulu ekpe ayakoro! Uzu ɗe dá yisœ nœ fœ 'e adœke 'e kpa awa kœwa ngbanga nœ Ndjaba á ndo kœna tœnœ a?
3.8: 'E mbœrœ œrœ á sœ kœma adœke adja 'e fatshalɔsu 'e ye,
3.9: yé 'e papa mbœrœ 'e dœ tœ 'e nene adœke: “Abrayamo kœdœ ata azœ.” Gbambanœ nene, mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e adœke, Ndjaba li kœfa badja asœke tœ aata Abrayamo!
3.10: Gonda sœ yindjindjinœ mbœrœ kœvwa dœ ɔyɔ tɔtœ œshenœ kɔ ye, ɔyɔ kɔ á elenœ kœgaga nene, endje de yé œ ko va ga tœ owo.
3.11: Œmœ, mœ sœ kœza batisimu fœ 'e dœ ungu mbœrœ kœma adœke 'e yapa ɔtshɔ 'e ye. Kashe tsheneke á tshe na manda mœ, tshe za bala batisimu fœ 'e dœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ œdœ dœ owo. Tshe ropa mœ dœ gbɔgbɔ ye, mœ lili kœka ga utshu ye dœ pe kœzu uwu œrada nœ ye nene.
3.12: Tshe za tshekara kœpe dœ tshelœ indji ngwarœ ga tshaabrœ ye, yé tshe mea indji ngwarœ mbœrœ kœkurutshelœ nœ dœ oforo. Tshe gumasœ indji ngwarœ ga la kogba, yé œ ko oforonœ va ga tœ owo neke á ru nene.» Batisimu nœ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 1.9-11; Luk 3.21-22)
3.13: Anga ɔlɔ bale, Yisu to ɓa lœ Galilayi yé œ ro ɓa ndœ Yowane ɓa langu Yɔrdane, tshe na ndoo dœ Yowane mbœrœ adœke tshe za batisimu fœ œne.
3.14: Yowane yi lima ndœ kœvwaratœ ye, yé á pa adœke: «Œmœ dá li má adœke ɓœ za batisimu fœ mœ, yé ɓœ kpa na ga ndœ mœ adœke mœ za batisimu fœ ɓœ a!»
3.15: Kashe Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Yindœ nœ adœke œ mbœrœtœ ye ngɔngɔnœ asœke ataa. Gbambanœ nene, mara á li adœke a mbœrœ œrœ á sœ ndjii dœmœ.» Yé Yowane kœyindœ nœ ye.
3.16: Manda kœgbɔ batisimu nœ Yisu, tshe wuta langu. Kolœ pe dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, tshalafo kɔrɔ ga pa ye, tshe wu Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba œ jerœ ga pa ye ɓata mbepa.
3.17: Yé tshama to ɓa lafo œ pa adœke: «Tsheneke asœke kœdœ Gbolo nœ mœ á mœ yindœ ye waa, mœ za yanga nœ mœ kɔ ga ndœ ye.»

4.1: Manda nœ, Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba to Yisu na tœnœ ga lœ kpagagasho mbœrœ adœke djaboro wu lɔsu ye.
4.2: Manda kœmbœrœ ɔlɔ zazu bisha œdœ butshɔ zazu bisha ndœ kœyotshelœma, Yisu sœ lima dœ ogo.
4.3: Djaboro, ayi kœwu lɔsu, na ndoo dœ she yé œ pa adœke: «Œdœ ɓœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba, pa fœ badja asœke œ fatœ ye tœ mapa.»
4.4: Kashe Yisu gi adœke: «Endje sú ɓa la Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Uzu œ sœ dœ soro kolœ mbœrœ mapa nene, kashe dœ o'o kɔ á wuta lœ ama Ndjaba.”»
4.5: Dœ tœnœ ataa, djaboro na dœ she œrrr ɓa lœ Yerusaleme á dœ ongbo á sœ yerœ, œ za she tɔ ɓa pa kumu Tepelo,
4.6: á œ pa fœ she adœke: «Œdœ ɓœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba, i dœ tœ zœ tshirɨ ga atɨ. Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ɓa la buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Ndjaba œ za awa o'o fœ aandjelu nœ ye mbœrœ ɓœ, endje za ɓœ ga atɨ dœ kane endje mbœrœ á ɓœ kœzaza ada zœ tɔ badja nene.”»
4.7: Yé Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Endje su ndje ɓa la Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Wuwu lɔsu Gbozu Ndjaba nœ zœ nene.”»
4.8: Djaboro kpa ɔ dœ she œrrr ɓa tœ leta kumu ɨngɨrɨ kaga œ ma ogo gbozu tshapashɔ djigi dœ ɔtshɔrœ, ndje dœ mokɔnœ fœ she,
4.9: yé á pa fœ she adœke: «Mœ ko œrœnœ asœke kɔ fœ ɓœ œdœ ɓœ kœgote ga utshu mœ mbœrœ kœdonga mœ.»
4.10: Yé Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Gitœ zœ ga zœ, Satana! Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ɓa la buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Donga Gbozu Ndjaba nœ zœ, yé œ za avwala kolœ fœ she tshebabale.”»
4.11: Ndara tœ asœke, djaboro kœkatœ ye yé. Aandjelu kœgitœ endje ndoo dœ she, yé á kœtetœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ she. Yisu tetœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ ye ɓa lœ Galilayi (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 1.14-15; Luk 4.14-15)
4.12: Lɔkɔ á Yisu dji adœke endje za Yowane ayi kœza batisimu ga lœ kánga, tshe kwatœ ye ga lœ Galilayi.
4.13: Tshe katœ Nazarete tɨ, œ na kœsœ ɓa lœ Kaparnawumu, ongbo á sœ tœ mangu egerœ ungu adanga nœ Galilayi, ɓa lœ ogo Zabulone œdœ pe ɓa lœ Nefetali.
4.14: Œ sœ lima ataa mbœrœ adœke o'o á ayi kœgbara o'o Isaya pa tœnœ, kœmbœrœtœ endje. Tshe pa o'onœ adœke:
4.15: «Ogo Zabulone œdœ Nefetali, á sœ tœ awa kœro ga la egerœ ungu adanga, ɓa kele ungu Yɔrdane, ogo Galilayi á angbɨ azu sœ lœnœ asœmœ!
4.16: Azunœ á endje sœ lœ ubu osho asœmœ, wu egerœ ɨngbɨsho! Mbœrœ endjeneke á endje sœ lœ ubu osho nœ kuzu, ɨngbɨsho wuta ga pa endje!»
4.17: Pe dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, Yisu tetœ kœyisœ œrœ adœke: «'E yapa ɔtshɔ 'e, gbambanœ nene, Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo ndo ye!» Yisu e ali ayambarœ nœ ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 1.16-20; Luk 5.1-11)
4.18: Ɔlɔ bale, Yisu sœ lima kœna tœ mangu egerœ ungu adanga nœ Galilayi, yé œ wu aayazu bisha, Shimu á anga ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Petro œdœ ayanœ dœ Andere á endje dœ lima aayi kœpara ageatshalangu. Endje sœ lima kœvwi gbanda ɓa la egerœ ungu adanga.
4.19: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «'E na manda mœ, mœ fa 'e tœ aayi kœpara azu.»
4.20: Pe kpœtœ œsœnœ, endje ka lima tœ gbanda nœ endje tɨ yé œ na manda ye.
4.21: Tshe na lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ, œ kpa wu anga aayazu bisha, Ayakobo dœ ayanœ dœ Yowane, endje kœdœ agbolo nœ Zebedayi. Endje sœ lima lœ agba nœ endje awa bale dœ aba endje dœ Zebedayi, yé œ sœ lima tœ kœguma gbanda nœ endje. Yisu e endje.
4.22: Pe kpœtœ œsœnœ, endje katœ agba œdœ aba endje tɨ, yé œ na manda ye. Yisu yisœ œrœ yé œ she azu
4.23: Yisu ro djelœ ogo Galilayi djigi; tshe sœ lima kœyisœ œrœ ɓa lœ Sinagoga para. Tshe sœ lima kœmɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ ogo gbozu yé œ sœ lima kœshe azu lœ koɓa œdœ lœ gbakɨndɨ nœ endje kɔ.
4.24: Upu nœ ye za lima ogo Siri djigi, yé endje sœ lima kœna dœ azu á endje sœ lima dœ tshelœ aka koɓa kɔ fœ she, azu á endje sœ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa endje, dœ azu á endje sœ dœ koɓa ɔkɔ œdœ endjeneke á ada endje tshu. Yé Yisu she lima endje ye.
4.25: Ukpulu azu ndjoro na lima manda ye: Endje to lima ɓa lœ Galilayi, ɓa lœ ogonœ á endje e ɨ'ɨrɨnœ adœke tshalakpɨ ndjokpa asœmœ, dœ azu Yerusaleme ndje dœ ogo Yuda, œdœ endjeneke ɓa lœ ogo á sœ ɓa kele ungu Yɔrdane.

5.1: Lɔkɔ á Yisu wu ukpulu azu asœmœ, tshe ɔ ga pa kaga yé œ sœ ga atɨ. Ayambarœ nœ ye na ga ɨndɨrɨ ye,
5.2: yé á tshe tetœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ endje adœke: Adja yanga (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 6.20-23)
5.3: «Yanga nœ azu á endje sœ dœ lɔsu nœ oyo, gbambanœ nene, Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo kœdœ œnœ endje!
5.4: Yanga nœ azu á endje sœ tœ ɨkɨ, gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba œ turu ngola endje!
5.5: Yanga nœ azu á endje sœ dœ lɔsu zɨtɨ, gbambanœ nene, endje gbɔ bala ogonœ á Ndjaba pa tœnœ!
5.6: Yanga nœ azu á endje sœ dœ adja ogo kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœ ndjii, gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba œ to gbɔgbɔ kœmbœrœ tœnœ fœ endje!
5.7: Yanga nœ azu á endje wu oyo anga endje, gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba œ wu oyo endje!
5.8: Yanga nœ azu á lɔsu endje sœ yerœ, gbambanœ nene, endje wu bala Ndjaba!
5.9: Yanga nœ azu á endje sœ kœmbœrœ adœke kœsœ gee sœ ugurutœ azu, gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba œ e endje agbolo nœ ye!
5.10: Yanga nœ endjeneke á endje sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ endje mbœrœ œneke á sœ ndjii; gbambanœ nene, Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo sœ mbœrœ endje!
5.11: Yanga nœ 'e œ kœsœ adœke azu gu 'e, œ mbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ 'e yé œ pa tshelœ áká ekpe o'o kɔ ga tœ 'e mbœrœ upu nœ mœ.
5.12: 'E mɔtœ 'e yé œ sœ dœ egerœ yanga; gbambanœ nene, œrœ tshangbanœ sœ kœkate 'e tœ egerœnœ ɓa lafo. Kolœ dœ maranœ ataa, endje mbœrœ ndje lima œrœ kanga fœ aayi kœgbara o'o á endje sœ lima utshu 'e.» Ɨngbɨrɨ œdœ Ɨngbɨsho (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 9.50; Luk 14.34-35; 8.16; 11.33)
5.13: «E'e kœdœ ɨngbɨrɨ tshapashɔ. Kashe œ kœsœ adœke kœnga ɨngbɨrɨ ka lœnœ ye, endje kpa gi ga lœnœ koto o? Endje kpa li kœmbœrœ tœnœ dœ akwa bale nene. Endje za va e ga ushu, yé azu œ na pa nœ dœ ada endje.
5.14: «E'e kœdœ ɨngbɨsho tshapashɔ. Ongbo á sœ ɓa pa kaga, œ li kœzatœ ye yiwa tœnœ nene.
5.15: Endje tata owo ga tœ miinda mbœrœ kœza ga tshakudu losú nene. Kashe endje za ɓa pa gbarœ kœza miinda ga panœ yekane á kœtshi pa azu kɔ á endje sœ lœ anda.
5.16: Awa bale ndje, œ li adœke ɨngbɨsho nœ 'e tshi ɓa utshu azu mbœrœ adœke endje wu ɔtshɔrœ á 'e sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ, yeka á kœdonga Aba 'e á tshe sœ ɓa lafo.» Kœyisœrœ tœ upu nœ awa akwa
5.17: «'E gbegbe adœke mœ na kœwo awa akwa œdœ aayi kœgbara o'o nene. Mœ nana kœwo tœnœ œ wo nene, kashe mœ na adœke œneke á endje pa kœmbœrœtœ endje.
5.18: Mœ mɨndœ nœ fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke: Ɓata œndœ tshalafo dœ pe tshapashɔ sœpe kœdɨ tœnœ, tshakanea a'eara uwu mbeti œneke á endje sú ala buku nœ awa akwa œ 'ɨ nene œrrr ga tœ adœke œrœ kɔ mbœrœtœ ye yekane.
5.19: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, œdœ uzu kœvwaratœ ye kœlɨsœ anga awa o'o teasho lœ awa akwanœ asœke yé á sœ kœyisœ nœ fœ anga azu adœke endje mbœrœ ndje awa bale, uzunœ asœmœ œ dœ bala aya uzu ɓa lœ Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo. Kashe uzu á tshe lɨsœ awa akwanœ yé á yisœ nœ fœ anga azu adœke endje lɨsœ nœ, uzunœ asœmœ œ dœ bala egerœ uzu ɓa lœ Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo.
5.20: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke, œdœ 'e kœsœsœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœ ndjii kœropa œnœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ Afarisayi nene, 'e li kœli ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo nene.» Kœyisœrœ tœ upu nœ ókó (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 11.25; Luk 12.57-59)
5.21: «'E dji adœke endje pa lima fœ aata azœ adœke: “Ɓœ wo uzu nene. Uzu kɔ á tshe wo yanganœ, œ li adœke endje na dœ she ga utshu aayi kœwa ngbanga.”»
5.22: Yé œmœ, mœ mɨndœ nœ fœ 'e adœke: «Uzu kɔ á tshe kœsœ dœ ókó ga tœ ayanœ, œ li adœke endje na dœ she ɓa utshu aayi kœwa ngbanga. Uzu á tshe kœgu ayanœ adœke: “Wusœrœ wu”, œ li adœke endje na dœ she ɓa lœ anda kœwa ngbanga nœ azu nœ Ndjaba . Uzu á tshe kœgu ayanœ adœke: “Iyi sœ lœ kumu zœ!” Œ li adœke endje vwi she ga lœ lifelo.»
5.23: Œdœ ɓœ kœna kœkatœ makabo nœ zœ ga pa ndaba fœ Ndjaba, á ɓœ gbetshelœ zœ ɓa zœ adœke aya zœ sœ dœ o'o ga tœ zœ,
5.24: katœ makabo nœ zœ tɨ kpœtœmœ, ɓa utshu ndabanœ yé œ na utshunœ œ guma tshagurutœ zœ dœ aya zœ, yeka á kœna kœkatœ makabonœ fœ Ndjaba.
5.25: «Œdœ ɓœ kœsœ dœ upu dœ yanga zœ, pa avwara katsha adœke ɓœ djitœ zœ dœ she damba á 'e sœpe tœ ala awa. Œdœ ɓœ kœmbœmbœrœ ataa nene, tshe za ɓœ ga utshu ayi kœwa ngbanga, ayi kœwa ngbanga œ za ɓœ fœ aprusu, yé aprusunœ œ za ɓœ vwi ga lœ kánga.
5.26: Mœ mɨndœ nœ fœ ɓœ dœ adjapu adœke, œdœ endje kœvwi ɓœ ga lœ kánga, œrrr ɓœ ko ngendja á endje dɨ fœ ɓœ para kɔkɔ yekane á wuta.» Kœyisœrœ tœ upu nœ kœpara awo uzu
5.27: «'E dji o'o á endje pa lima adœke: “Ɓœ para awo uzu nene.”
5.28: Yé œmœ, mœ mɨndœ nœ fœ 'e adœke: uzu kɔ á tshe kœsœ kœtondœ awo yanganœ dœ ala nœ kœyindœsho, tshe para she ye dœmœ.
5.29: Yé œdœ ɓœ kœsœ kœli ga lœ ekperœ mangba ala zœ á sœ ga tœ kuni zœ, œ li adœke ɓœ vwata œ za vwi'i lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ tœ zœ. Gbambanœ nene, œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ mbœrœ ɓœ adœke anga œrœ kote zœ bale ndɨ, tœ œsœnœ adœke endje za undu zœ djigi vwi ga lœ lifelo.
5.30: Œdœ ɓœ kœsœ kœli ga lœ ekperœ mangba kuni zœ, œ li adœke ɓœ de œ za vwi'i lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ tœ zœ. Gbambanœ nene, œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ mbœrœ ɓœ adœke anga tshakala kane zœ bale ndɨ, tœ œsœnœ adœke endje za undu zœ djigi vwi ga lœ lifelo.» Kœyisœrœ tœ upu nœ kœkurutshelœ totœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 19.9; Mar 10.11-12; Luk 16.18)
5.31: «Endje kpa pa lima adœke: “Œdœ uzu kœkatœ awonœ tɨ, œ li adœke tshe za mbeti kœkurutshelœ totœ fœ she.”
5.32: Yé œmœ, mœ mɨndœ nœ fœ 'e adœke: Uzu kɔ á tshe katœ awonœ tɨ mbœrœ á tshe mbœrœ angba budu tshakane ye nene, tshe vwa yashenœ asœmœ ndœ kœmbœrœ angba budu. Yé uzu kɔ á tshe to yashe á akɔnœ katœ ye tɨ, tshe mbœrœ ndje angba budu dœ yashenœ asœmœ.» Kœyisœrœ tœ upu nœ kœwa ɨgɨ
5.33: «'E kpa dji o'o á endje pa lima fœ aata azœ. Endje pa lima adœke: “Wawa ɨgɨ zœ ndœ wala nene, kashe mbœrœ œrœ á ɓœ wa ɨgɨ zœ ɓa utshu Gbozu Ndjaba tœ upunœ.”
5.34: Yé œmœ, mœ pa fœ 'e adœke 'e wawa ɨgɨ 'e bale nene. 'E wawa dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ tshalafo nene; gbambanœ nene, œtœnœ kœdœ ngande tshagbozu nœ Ndjaba.
5.35: 'E wawa ɨgɨ 'e dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ɔshɔ nene; gbambanœ nene, œtœnœ kœdœ osho kœsœ á Ndjaba œ ko ada ye ga tœnœ. 'E wawa ɨgɨ 'e dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Yerusaleme nene; gbambanœ nene, œtœnœ kœdœ ongbo nœ egerœ Gbozugo.
5.36: Adja wawa ɨgɨ zœ bale dœ kumu zœ nene; gbambanœ nene, ɓœ li kœmbœrœ adœke anga sukumu zœ bale wuta tœ imbinœ too tœ ubunœ nene.
5.37: Pa kolœnœ “Œ̃” œ kœdœ “Œ̃”, yé “œ̃œ̃” œ kœdœ “œ̃œ̃”. Œneke kɔ á ɓœ kpa ko ga pa nœ asœmœ, œ to ɓa ndœ Satana.» Kœyisœrœ tœ upu nœ kœgi ekperœ mangba ekperœ (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 6.29-30)
5.38: «'E dji œneke á endje pa lima adœke: “Uzu kœsu ala zœ, ɓœ su ndje ala ye; yé uzu kœkɔ iji zœ, ɓœ kɔ ndje iji ye.”
5.39: Yé œmœ, mœ pa fœ 'e adœke 'e gigi ekperœ fœ uzu á tshe mbœrœ ekperœ fœ 'e nene. Œdœ uzu kœda baga zœ ga tœ kuni, fa œnœ gele fœ she yé tshe kpa da ndje.
5.40: Œdœ uzu kœtɔ meza pa zœ fœ ayi kœwa ngbanga adœke œne za lœba okoro nœ zœ tœ zœ ye, ka ndje tœ yɔgbɔdɔ lœba nœ zœ tɨ fœ she yé tshe za ndje.
5.41: Œdœ uzu kœza ɓœ dœ ɔgbɔ adœke ɓœ za gbarœ œ gi dœ œne mangba uwu ada kutu bale, za gbarœnœ œ gi dœ she mangba uwu ada kutu bisha.
5.42: To œrœ fœ uzu á tshe esho ndœ œrœ tœ zœ. Œdœ uzu kœ'esho ndœ kuɗa ɓa ndœ zœ, vwavwaratœ zœ tœ kœza fœ she nene.» Kœsœ dœ kœyindœsho ga ndœ ayingba (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 6.27-28,32-36)
5.43: «'E dji œneke á endje pa lima adœke: “Yindœ yanga zœ yé œ yiangba yingba zœ.”
5.44: Yé œmœ, mœ pa fœ 'e adœke 'e yindœ ayingba 'e, yé œ za avwala fœ Ndjaba mbœrœ endjeneke á endje sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ 'e,
5.45: yeka á 'e kœwuta agbolo nœ Aba 'e á tshe sœ ɓa lafo. Gbambanœ nene, tshe sœ kœmbœrœ adœke ɔlɔ nœ ye tɔ ga pa aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ dœ aayi kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ. Tshe sœ kœmbœrœ ndje adœke yavuru ni ga pa azu á endje sœ ndjii dœ azu á endje sœsœ ndjii nene.
5.46: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ 'e kœyi kolœ ndœ azu á endje yindœ 'e, œrœ tshangbanœ á 'e gbɔ kœdœ gaɗe? Aayi kœko ngendja lapo mbœmbœrœ ndje dœ tœ endje atamœ nene a?
5.47: Œdœ 'e kœsœ kœbala kolœ aaya 'e, 'e gbe adœke 'e mbœrœ egerœ œrœ a? Azu á endje wuwusœ Ndjaba nene mbœmbœrœ ndje atamœ nene a?
5.48: Ataa, Aba 'e ɓa lafo sœ yerœ, e'e ndje 'e sœ ɓata she.»

6.1: «Ala 'e gbɔ tœ mara á 'e sœ kœmbœrœ dœ akwa nœ Ndjaba tœ ala azu kane. 'E mbœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ á Ndjaba yindœ nœ kolœ adœke azu wu 'e nene. Œdœ 'e kœmbœrœ ataa, 'e gbɔ œrœ tshangba nœ ɓa ndœ Aba 'e á tshe sœ ɓa lafo asœmœ nene.
6.2: Ataa, lɔkɔ á ɓœ kœto œrœ fœ ayi oyo, ɓiɓi dœ itshi adœke ala azu kɔ sœ ga tœ zœ nene, ɓata á awulapatshɔ œ mbœrœ ɓa lœ Sinagoga œdœ ɓa tœ ala awa. Endje sœ kœmbœrœ ataa adœke azu donga œne. Mœ mɨndœ nœ dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke: Endje gbɔ œrœ tshangba œnœ endje ye.
6.3: Kashe œɓœ, œdœ ɓœ kœto œrœ fœ ayi oyo, mbœmbœrœ adœke gele zœ wusœ œneke á kuni zœ mbœrœ nene.
6.4: Ataa, œ li adœke œrœnœ á ɓœ to asœmœ sœpe lœ ubunœ. Yé Aba zœ á tshe wu œrœ á mbœrœtœ endje lœ ubunœ, œ gi œrœ tshangbanœ fœ ɓœ.» Kœyisœrœ tœ upu nœ kœza avwala (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 11.2-4)
6.5: «Œdœ 'e kœsœ kœza avwala fœ Ndjaba, 'e sœsœ ɓata awulapatshɔ nene. Endje yindœ nœ adœke œne li ɓa lœ Sinagoga too œne wuta ɓa lœ shangbeda awa, œ ka dœ ada œne yeka á kœza avwala adœke azu kɔ kœwu œne. Mœ pa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke: Endje gbɔ œrœ tshangba œnœ endje ye.
6.6: Kashe œɓœ, œdœ ɓœ kœyindœ kœza avwala, li ga lœ gbɔshɔ nœ zœ œ tshu manda ga tœnœ, yé œ za avwala fœ Aba zœ á tshe sœ ɓa zœ ɓa tœ osho á sœ lœ ubunœ. Yé Aba zœ á tshe wusœ œrœ kɔ á sœ lœ ubunœ, œ gi œrœ tshangba nœ fœ ɓœ.»
6.7: «Œdœ 'e kœsœ kœza avwala, 'e papa o'o œrrr ɓata azu á endje wuwusœ Ndjaba nene œ pa. Endje sœ kœgbe adœke œdœ œne kœpa o'o œrrr dá Ndjaba œ dji œne dœ ɔtshɔnœ.
6.8: 'E mbœmbœrœ ɓata endje nene; gbambanœ nene, Aba 'e wusœ œneke á 'e sœ dœ ogonœ utshunœ adœke 'e yu she tœnœ.
6.9: 'E wu mara á li adœke 'e za dœ avwala: “Aba 'a á ɓœ sœ ɓa lafo, kaka azu kɔ wusœ nœ adœke ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ sœ yerœ.
6.10: Kaka Ogo gbozu nœ zœ na, kaka gbetshelœ nœ zœ mbœrœtœ endje ɓa pa ɔshɔ ɓata á mbœrœtœ endje ɓa lafo.
6.11: To rœgo á li adœke 'a zɨ kpesheke fœ 'a.
6.12: Djerœndœ ekperœ nœ 'a, ɓata 'a djerœ ndje ndœ ekperœ nœ endjeneke á endje mbœrœ fœ 'a.
6.13: Yé kakatœ 'a tɨ adœke 'a li ga lœ kœwu lɔsu nene, kashe vwara 'a lœ ekperœ. [Gbambanœ nene, œɓœ kœdœ Gbozu, á ɓœ sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ œdœ mokɔ waa dœ waa. Ame.]”
6.14: «Yé œdœ 'e kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ azu, Aba 'e á tshe sœ ɓa lafo œ djerœ ndje ndœ ekperœ nœ 'e.
6.15: Kashe œdœ 'e kœdjedjerœndœ ekperœ nœ azu nene, Aba 'e œ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ 'e á 'e mbœrœ bale nene.» Kœyisœrœ tœ upu nœ kœyotshelœma
6.16: «Lɔkɔ á 'e kœsœ kœyotshelœma 'e, 'e sœsœ dœ oyo ɓata á awulapatshɔ œ mbœrœ nene. Endje sœ kœndɨ tshatshu endje dœ mara adœke azu kɔ wusœ nœ adœke œne sœ kœyotshelœma œne. Mœ mɨndœ nœ fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke: Endje gbɔ œrœ tshangba œnœ endje ye.
6.17: Kashe œɓœ, œdœ ɓœ kœsœ kœyotshelœma zœ, djutɔ tshatshu zœ, yé œ da kada,
6.18: mbœrœ azu kœwuwusœ nœ adœke ɓœ sœ kœyotshelœma zœ nene. Kashe kolœ Aba zœ á tshe sœ ɓa zœ lœ ubunœ, œshe dá wusœ nœ. Œdœ ɓœ kœmbœrœ ataa, Aba zœ á tshe wu œrœ á sœ lœ ubunœ asœmœ, œ to œrœ tshangbanœ fœ ɓœ.» Kœyisœrœ tœ upu nœ kœgbɔrœ ɓa lafo (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 12.33-34)
6.19: «'E ngbɔngbɔɓa kœgbɔrœ tshapashɔ asœke nene. Gbambanœ nene, ɓa zœ akɔkɔ œ zɨ, ngbandji œ ndɨ kotenœ yé aayi angba œ kavwa manda œ zɨangba nœ ye.
6.20: Kashe 'e ngbɔɓa kœgbɔrœ ɓa lafo. Gbambanœ nene, ɓa zœ œdœ akɔkɔ œ zɨ nene, œdœ ngbandji œ ndɨ nene, yé aayi angba gugu ndje tœ kœkavwa manda á kœzɨ angbanœ nene.
6.21: Gbambanœ nene, osho á kœgbɔrœ nœ zœ sœ tœnœ, lɔsu zœ œ sœ ndje kpœtœmœ.» Miinda nœ undu uzu (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 11.34-36)
6.22: «Ala uzu kœdœ miinda nœ undu ye. Œdœ ala zœ kœsœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, undu zœ djigi œ sœ lœ ɨngbɨsho.
6.23: Kashe œdœ ala zœ kœsœ dœ koɓa, undu zœ djigi œ sœ lœ ubu osho. Ataa, œdœ ɨngbɨsho á sœ lœ zœ kœdœ ubu osho, ubu oshonœ asœmœ kpa sœ narɨ!» Ndjaba too ngendja (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 16.13; 12.22-23)
6.24: «Uzu bale lili kœmbœrœ akwa fœ agbozu bisha nene. Gbambanœ nene, œdœ tshe kœyiangba anga bale, tshe yindœ udu anga. Tshe kœzatœ ye fœ anga bale, tshe tɨtœ ye tœ udu anga. 'E lili kœmbœrœ akwa fœ Ndjaba yé œ kpa za ndje tœ 'e fœ ngendja nene.» A za lɔsu azœ djigi fœ Ndjaba (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 12.22-31)
6.25: «'E wu ádánœ á mœ mɨndœ nœ fœ 'e adœke: 'E zaza lɔsu 'e ga lafo tœ upu nœ kœzɨrœ œdœ kœndjorœ á 'e gbe dœ tœnœ mbœrœ soro 'e nene, too kœgbe dœ lœba á 'e yindœ kœverœ ga tœ kote 'e nene. Soro uzu roropa kœzɨrœ nene a? Yé undu uzu roropa lœba nene a?
6.26: 'E tondœ ayanu kane. Endje lulu ngwarœ nene, œ kɔkɔ ndje œrœ nene yé œ gugu dœ kogba kœgumasœ rœgo ga lœnœ nene, kashe Aba 'e á tshe sœ ɓa lafo sœ kœto kœzɨrœ fœ endje. 'E roropa endje nene a?
6.27: Œɗe ugurutœ 'e, lœ kœgbetshelœ ye, dá li kœza anga olo bale ga pa olo soro ye a?
6.28: «Yé mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœ kœza lɔsu 'e ga lafo tœ upu nœ lœba a? 'E wu mara á ndɔkɔ leyɔ œ wuta dœ tœnœ ɓa lœ kɨndɨ kane: Œ sœ kœmbœrœ akwa nene, œ sœ ndje kœsu lœba nene.
6.29: Kashe mœ pa fœ 'e adœke, Salomo á tshe dœ́ lima ayi kœgbɔrœ waa, veverœ lima lœba bale ɓata anga ndɔkɔ leyɔnœ asœke nene.
6.30: Ndjaba dá verœ lœba kpesheke ga tœ gusu á sœ lœ kɨndɨ yé ɓa mbatsha owo œ ju. Œdœ Ndjaba kœmbœrœ ataa ga tœ a'eara ɔyɔ, tshe lili kœko lœba fœ 'e kœropa nœ nene a? E'e kœdœ azu á kœyindœrœ nœ 'e sœ teasho!
6.31: 'E zaza lɔsu 'e ga lafo tœ kœyutœ 'e nene adœke: “'A zɨ gaɗe? 'A ndjo gaɗe? 'A verœ lœba gaɗe?”
6.32: Azu á endje wuwusœ Ndjaba nene dá para œrœnœ asœmœ kɔ. Kashe Aba 'e á tshe sœ ɓa lafo wusœ nœ adœke 'e gbe dœ tœnœ kɔ.
6.33: 'E para utshunœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba, œdœ œrœ á sœ ndjii ɓa utshu Ndjaba, yé udu œrœ kɔkɔ, Ndjaba œ to fœ 'e.
6.34: Ataa, 'e zaza lɔsu 'e ga lafo tœ upu nœ œrœ á mbœrœtœ endje ɓa mbatsha nene. Tshambatsha sœ ndje dœ upu nœ ye. Olo bale dœ bale sœ dœ o'o nœ ye.»

7.1: «'E wawa ngbanga pa uzu bale nene, mbœrœ á Ndjaba kœwawa ndje ngbanga pa 'e nene.
7.2: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba œ wa ngbanga pa 'e ɓata á 'e wa ga pa anga 'e. Adja mara œrœ á 'e li dœ anga 'e dá tshe li ndje dœ 'e.
7.3: Mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ sœ kœtondœ oforo ebe á sœ lœ ala aya zœ yé á gbegbe dœ maɓaya á sœ lœ ala zœ nene a?
7.4: Koto á ɓœ pa fœ aya zœ adœke: “Kaka mœ tshakavwa oforo ebe á sœ lœ ala zœ”, andaa maɓaya sœ lœ œnœ zœ a?
7.5: Wulapatshɔ, tshakavwa maɓaya á sœ lœ ala zœ asœmœ utshunœ œ wu osho ngbɨ yeka á kœtshakavwa oforo ebe á sœ lœ ala aya zœ.
7.6: «'E toto œrœ neke á sœ yerœ fœ ayavoro nene. Œdœ 'e kœmbœrœ ataa, endje fatshelœtœ endje tœ 'e œ lo 'e. 'E koko agbɔ œrœ tshelœ ɨgɨ nœ 'e va fœ akɔso nene kparawa adœke endje kœzurutshelœ nœ nene.» 'E kœyɔndœ œrœ, endje to fœ 'e ye (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 11.9-13)
7.7: «'E kœyɔndœ œrœ, endje to fœ 'e ye; 'e kœpara œrœ, 'e gbɔ ye; 'e kœnge manda, endje kɔrɔ fœ 'e ye.
7.8: Gbambanœ nene, uzu kɔ á tshe yɔndœ œrœ, endje to fœ she; tsheneke á tshe para œrœ, tshe gbɔ; yé tsheneke á tshe nge manda, endje kɔrɔ fœ she.
7.9: Œɗe ugurutœ 'e dá za badja fœ gbolo nœ ye œdœ tshe kœyɔndœ kœzɨrœ a?
7.10: Too œdœ tshe kœyu she ndœ ageatshalangu, tshe za yakoro fœ she a?
7.11: Ataa, œdœ 'e á 'e dœ akpe azu, 'e wusœ kœto ɔtshɔrœ fœ agbolo nœ 'e, yekane Aba 'e á tshe sœ ɓa lafo kœtoto ɔtshɔrœ fœ endjeneke á endje yɔndœ nœ ɓa ndœ ye nene a?
7.12: «'E mbœrœ fœ anga 'e ɓata œneke á 'e yindœ nœ adœke endje mbœrœ fœ 'e. Asœ kœdœ œneke á awa akwa œdœ aayi kœgbara o'o nœ Ndjaba yisœ nœ.» Awa bisha (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 13.23-24)
7.13: «'E li tœ aya manda. Gbambanœ nene, manda kœro ga ndœ kuzu sœ tœ egerœnœ, awa kœ li ga zœ sœ ndje ngbɨ yé azu á endje ro tœnœ lœ ndjoro.
7.14: Kashe manda nœ soro á ka nene sœ teasho, awa á ro ga zœ mi dœ gusu yé azu kœro tœnœ mɨmɨ.» Aayi kœgbara o'o nœ wala (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 12.33; Luk 6.43-44)
7.15: «'E sœ dœ gbɔdjela tœ aayi kœgbara o'o nœ wala. Gbambanœ nene, endje sœ kœna ga ndœ 'e ɓata apata kashe lɔsu endje sœ ɓata lɔsu amuru á endje wo osho.
7.16: 'E wusœ endje mbœrœ akwa tshelœ endje. Gbambanœ nene, endje kɔkɔ ɔtshɔ leyɔ ɓa tœ ekpe ɔyɔ nene, endje kɔkɔ ndje ele fige ɓa tœ batima nene.
7.17: Ɔtshɔ ɔyɔ kɔ sœ kœzu ɔtshɔ elenœ, yé ɔyɔ á sœ dœ koɓa sœ kœzu ndje elenœ tœ ekpenœ.
7.18: Ɔtshɔ ɔyɔ lili kœzu elenœ tœ ekpenœ nene, yeka ɔyɔ á sœ dœ koɓa œ zu ndje ɔtshɔ elenœ nene.
7.19: Ɔyɔ kɔ á elenœ kœgaga nene, endje de yé œ ko va ga tœ owo.
7.20: Ataa, 'e wusœ aayi kœgbara o'o nœ wala mbœrœ akwa tshelœ endje.» Kœwusœ adja ayambarœ (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 6.46; 13.25-27)
7.21: «Œ dœ́dœ́ uzu kɔ á tshe e mœ adœke: “Gbozu, Gbozu”, dá li ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo nene, kashe kolœ endjeneke á endje sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á Aba mœ á tshe sœ ɓa lafo yindœ nœ, dá li ga zœ.
7.22: Dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, azu ndjoro œ pa bala adœke: “Gbozu, Gbozu”, 'a gbara lima o'o dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ; 'a gɔrɔ lima ekpe ɨshirɨ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ; 'a mbœrœ lima afá ndjoro dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ!
7.23: Yé mœ pa bala ngbɨ fœ endje adœke: “Mœ wuwusœ 'e bale nene, e'e dœ́ aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ, 'e gitœ 'e tœ ala mœ!”» Anda bisha (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 6.47-49)
7.24: Yisu kpa pa adœke: «Uzu kɔ á tshe kœdji o'o á mœ totœ kœpa tœnœ asœke yé á za ga tœ akwa, tshe sœ ɓata uzu nœ kœwusœrœ á tshe mɔ anda nœ ye ga pa badja.
7.25: Yavuru ni, ungu sú yé egerœ yugu na œ za kpɨkpɨkpɨ, kashe andanœ tete nene. Gbambanœ nene, endje mɔ lima kiti andanœ ga pa badja.
7.26: Kashe uzu kɔ á tshe kœdji o'o á mœ totœ kœpa tœnœ asœke yé á kœzaza ga tœ akwa nene, tshe sœ ɓata ayi ɨndɨ á tshe mɔ anda nœ ye ga pa mindu.
7.27: Yavuru ni, ungu sú, egerœ yugu na œ za andanœ yé œ kavwa 'uru ga atɨ.» Tshagbozu nœ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 1.22; Luk 4.32)
7.28: Lɔkɔ á Yisu yi lima sœ œrœnœ á ka, azu kɔ ka lima tœ ama ndje tɨ ɔsɔ tœ mara kœyisœrœ nœ ye.
7.29: Gbambanœ nene, tshe yiyi lima sœ œrœ ɓata aayi kœyisœ awa akwa nœ endje nene, kashe tshe yi lima sœ nœ ɓata uzu á tshe sœ dœ tshagbozu.

8.1: Yisu sœ lima kœtara kaga gu tœnœ yé ukpulu azu sœ kœna manda ye.
8.2: Yé anga ayi boroma bale gitœ ye ndoo dœ she œ gote ga utshu ye, œ pa adœke: «Gbozu, œdœ ɓœ kœyindœ nœ, ɓœ mbœrœ adœke mœ wuta yerœ.»
8.3: Yisu yi kane ye, œ goro she yé œ pa adœke: «Mœ yindœ nœ adœke ɓœ wuta yerœ ye.» Petœ œsœnœ, tshe wuta yerœ lœ boroma nœ ye.
8.4: Yé Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Mesho! Papandœ nœ fœ uzu bale nene. Kashe gu œ matœ zœ fœ nganga Ndjaba yé œ to tokóró ɓata á Moyize pa lima ndœ nœ, mbœrœ kœma fœ azu kɔ adœke ɓœ wuta yerœ ye.» Yisu she ayi akwa nœ gbozu tshapa aturugu (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 7.1-10; Yow 4.43-54)
8.5: Lɔkɔ á Yisu sœ lima kœli ga lœ Kaparnawumu, anga gbozu tshapa aturugu tshelœ Roma na ndoo dœ she œ kɨ fœ she
8.6: adœke: «Gbozu, ayi akwa nœ mœ lo ɓa sœnda, ada ye tshu tshakudu ye yé tshe sœ kœwu oyo tɔpanœ kpuru.»
8.7: Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «A gu dœ́ mœ she she.»
8.8: Kashe gbozu tshapa aturugunœ gi adœke: «Gbozu, mœ sœsœ ɓata azu á ɓœ li anda nœ endje nene. Œdœ ɓœ kœyindœ nœ, pa kolœ o'o bale, ayi akwa nœ mœ œ she ye.
8.9: Gbambanœ nene, œmœ ndje, mœ sœ dœ agbozu tshapa mœ yé mœ dœ́ ndje gbozu tshapa aturugu. Œdœ mœ kœpa fœ anga bale adœke: “Na”, ngbewo tshe na. Œdœ mœ kpa kœpa fœ anga adœke: “Na ga mœ”, ngbewo tshe na ga ndœ mœ. Yé œdœ mœ kœpa fœ anga ayi akwa nœ mœ adœke “mbœrœ œneke”, ngbewo tshe mbœrœ.»
8.10: Lɔkɔ á yisu dji o'o á gbozu tshapa aturugu sœmœ pa, tshe katœ ama ye tɨ ɔsɔ œ pa fœ azu á endje sœ lima kœna manda ye adœke: «Mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, mœ gbɔgbɔ anga mara kœyindœrœ asœke ndœ anga uzu bale lœ Israyele nene.
8.11: Mœ sœ kœpa ndje fœ 'e adœke, azu ndjoro œ to ɓa tœ osho á ɔlɔ œ wuta tœnœ œdœ ɓa tœ osho á ɔlɔ œ li tœnœ, yé œ gbɔ osho kœsœ ɓa pa ndaba ɓa lœ Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo awa bale dœ Abrayamo, dœ Izaka œdœ pe Yakobo.
8.12: Kashe endjeneke á li ma lima adœke endje kœli ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba, endje vwi endje ga lœ ubu osho ɓa shu. Yé ɓa zœ, endje kɨ œ zɨ tshelœ daji endje.»
8.13: Yé Yisu kœpa fœ gbozu tshapa aturugunœ adœke: «Gu ga ndœ zœ, Ndjaba mbœrœ œneke á ɓœ yɔndœ nœ liaka kœyindœrœ nœ zœ ye.» Yé kolœ dœ ada ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, ayi akwa nœ gbozu tshapa aturugu she ye. Yisu she aayi koɓa ndjoro (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 1.29-34; Luk 4.38-41)
8.14: Manda nœ, Yisu na ɓa lœ anda nœ Petro, œ gbɔ ayi mbeyanœ, tshe lo ga atɨ dœ koɓa biwa.
8.15: Tshe za kane ye, yé koɓa biwanœ katœ ye yé. Ayi mbeya Petro áafo œ tetœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ Yisu.
8.16: Dœ lɔndɔ á ɔlɔ li, endje na dœ azu ndjoro á ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ pa endje fœ Yisu. Tshe gɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa azunœ asœmœ dœ o'o ama ye, yé œ she ndje anga aayi koɓa kɔ.
8.17: Tshe mbœrœ lima ataa mbœrœ o'onœ á Isaya ayi kœgbara o'o nœ Ndjaba pa lima kœmbœrœtœ endje. Tshe pa lima adœke: «Œshe dá ko gbakɨndɨ nœ azœ yé á ko koɓa nœ azœ ga pa ye.» Azu á endje gbe kœna manda Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 9.57-62)
8.18: Lɔkɔ á Yisu wu ukpulu azu á endje ndɨvwɨrɨ lima she, tshe za o'o fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke œne zu ɓa ɨtshi egerœ ungu adanga.
8.19: Anga ayi kœyisœ awa akwa gitœ ye ndoo œ pa fœ she adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, mœ na manda zœ tœ osho kɔ á ɓœ na tœnœ.»
8.20: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Angbangewo sœ dœ anda nœ endje ɓa lœ ɔshɔ, yé ayanu sœ ndje dœ koma endje ɓa lafo, kashe Gbolo nœ uzu gugu dœ osho kœlo tœnœ nene.»
8.21: Anga yambarœ nœ Yisu bale pa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, za awa fœ mœ, mœ na œ shi aba mœ utshunœ yekane.»
8.22: Yé Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Na manda mœ, yé œ katœ akuzu endje shi akuzu nœ endje.» Yisu rá yugu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 4.35-41; Luk 8.22-25)
8.23: Yisu ɔ ga lœ agba yé ayambarœ nœ ye ro awa bale dœ she.
8.24: Ngbangi atake, ndavuru yugu za gu tœnœ kpɨkpɨkpɨ pa egerœ ungu adanga, lokonœ na yé ungu yi lima kœtu ga lœ agba. Kashe Yisu lo lima œnœ ye yé.
8.25: Ayambarœ gitœ endje ndoo dœ she, á jo she lœ olo dœ kœpa dœ ɔgbɔ adœke: «Gbozu, she azœ kane! A tshu ke a!»
8.26: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœ dœ awaa? Kœyindœrœ nœ 'e sœ teasho! Yé tshe kœaafo á kœra yugu œdœ egerœ ungu adanganœ, osho kœyi tá.»
8.27: Azu kɔkɔ kɨtœ œsœnœ yé œ sœ lima kœpa adœke: «Uzunœ asœke kœdœ ɗe? Tshe sœ kœpa o'o fœ yugu œdœ fœ ungu yé œ sœ kœdji o'o ama ye!» Yisu she azu bisha á ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ pa endje (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 5.1-20; Luk 8.26-39)
8.28: Lɔkɔ á Yisu yi kumu ye ɓa atshi egerœ ungu adanga, ɓa lœ ogo nœ Agadaraye, azu bisha á ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ pa endje to ɓa pa udu yé œ na gu tœnœ ga ndœ ye. Endje nga lima waa dœ mara adœke uzu bale œ li kœsɔ dœ awanœ asœmœ nene.
8.29: Endje tetœ kœta rawa adœke: «Yisu Gbolo nœ Ndjaba, ɓœ yindœ kœmbœrœ œrœ gaɗe tœ 'a a? Ɓœ na ɓa ke kœgaga kumu 'a a? Olo nœ 'a lili damba nene.»
8.30: Andaa egerœ ukpulu akɔso sœ lima kœpara kœzɨrœ ndoo kpœmœ.
8.31: Aekpe ɨshirɨnœ dɨ tshelœma endje fœ Yisu adœke: «Œdœ ɓœ kœyindœ kœgɔrɔ 'a, vwa 'a, 'a li ga lœ ukpulu akɔso asœ.»
8.32: Yé Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E na zœ!» Endje wuta lœ azu asœmœ yé œ na œ li ga lœ akɔso. Ngbewo akɔso sœmœ ndjoro to ɓa pa kaga 'uru 'uru 'uru dœ ɔrɔ tra tœnœ œrrr ga la egerœ ungu adanga, yé œ nduru kɔ ye.
8.33: Azu á endje sœ lima kœgbɔndœ akɔsonœ kpa ye. Endje kpagu ɓa lœ ongbo œ mɨndœ œrœ kɔ á mbœrœtœ endje ga tœ azu sœmœ bisha á ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ pa endje fœ azu.
8.34: Yé azu tshelœ ongbonœ para kɔkɔ wuta kœgbɔtœ endje dœ Yisu. Lɔkɔ á endje wu she, endje kɨ fœ she adœke tshe gitœ ye lœ ogo nœ œne ye.

9.1: Yisu ɔ ga lœ agba, œ zu egerœ ungu adanga yé œ gu ga lœ ongbo nœ ye.
9.2: Endje za anga uzu á ada ye tshu, á tshe lo ga pa kelekpa, na tœnœ fœ she. Lɔkɔ á Yisu wu kœyindœrœ nœ azunœ asœmœ, tshe pa fœ uzunœ á ada ye tshu adœke: «Sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ, gbolo nœ mœ! Mœ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ zœ ye!»
9.3: Kœdji atamœ, anga aayi kœyisœ awa akwa tetœ kœpa ugurutœ endje dœ tœ endje adœke: «Uzu asœke sœ kœgu œsœ Ndjaba!»
9.4: Kashe Yisu wu lima sœ gbetshelœ nœ endje yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœ dœ ekpe gbetshelœ tœ lɔsu 'e ata a?
9.5: Œdœ mœ kœpa adœke: “Mœ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ zœ”, too mœ kœpa ndje adœke: “Aalafo œ na ana”, o'o neketa dá dœ ɔgbɔ o'o a?
9.6: Kashe mœ yindœ nœ adœke 'e wusœ nœ adœke: Gbolo nœ uzu sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ pa ɔshɔ tœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœ.» Manda nœ, tshe kœpa fœ uzu á ada ye tshu asœmœ adœke: «Aalafo, za kelekpa nœ zœ yé œ gu ga ndœ zœ!»
9.7: Uzunœ asœmœ kœalafo á kœgu ga lœ anda nœ ye.
9.8: Lɔkɔ á ukpulu azu wu ataa, awa litœ endje yé endje tetœ kœdonga Ndjaba tœ mara gbɔgbɔ neke á tshe to fœ azu. Yisu e Matie (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 2.13-17; Luk 5.27-32)
9.9: Yisu katœ tshakpœmœ tɨ yé œ tetœ kœro tœnœ, ngbewo œ wu anga uzu a ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Matie á tshe sœ ga atɨ ɓa lœ anda kœko ngendja lapo. Tshe pa fœ she adœke: «Na manda mœ!» Matie áalafo yé œ na manda ye.
9.10: Manda nœ, Yisu sœ lima kœzɨrœ ɓa sœnda nœ Matie. Aayi kœko ngendja lapo ndjoro dœ pe azu kœmbœrœ ekperœ sœ lima kœzɨ œrœ awa bale dœ she œdœ ayambarœ nœ ye.
9.11: Afarisayi wu lima ataa œ yu ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á ayi kœyisœrœ nœ 'e œ zɨ œrœ tœ œsœnœ bale dœ aayi kœko ngendja lapo œdœ dœ azu kœmbœrœ ekperœ a?»
9.12: Yisu dji endje yé œ pa adœke: «Uzu á tshelœ ɔkɔ ye sœ yerœ gbegbe dœ monganga nene, kashe aayi koɓa dá gbe dœ she.
9.13: 'E gu œ para ádá o'o á endje sú ɓa la buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “'E sœ dœ lɔsu nœ kœwu oyo ga ndœ azu, œtœnœ dá mœ yindœ nœ, kashe tokóró nene.” Gbambanœ nene, mœ nana mbœrœ kœ'e azu neke á endje sœ ndjii nene, kashe mœ na mbœrœ aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ.» Yisu tœ upu nœ kœyotshelœma (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 2.18-22; Luk 5.33-39)
9.14: Ayambarœ nœ Yowane ayi kœza batisimu na ga ndœ Yisu yé œ yu she adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á a'a œdœ Afarisayi, 'a sœ kœyotshelœma 'a kpala kpala yekane á ayambarœ nœ zœ mbœmbœrœ ataa nene a?»
9.15: Yé Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «'E gbe adœke azu á endje e endje ndœ angbo totœ œ sœ dœ oyo dœ lɔkɔ á ayi kœto yashe sœ kpœtœ œsœnœ bale dœ endje a? Œ̃ œ̃ nene! Kashe manda nœ œrrr, lɔkɔ á endje kœza she tshakane endje dá endje yotshelœma endje.
9.16: «Yé Yisu kpa kœpa fœ endje adœke uzu bale zaza tafo lœba œ pi ga pa ongboronœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, tafo ndœma lœbanœ œ suru tshelœ ongboronœ, yé ogoronœ œ kpa sœ dœ egerœnœ.
9.17: Endje susu tafo ipi ga lœ ongboro anga nene. Atamœ nene, tshelœ anga œ 'u, ipinœ œ tu, yé anganœ œ ndɨ ye. Kashe endje sú tafo ipi ga lœ tafo anga, atamœ œrœ bale œ ndɨ nene.» Anga yawuru yuda œdœ anga yashe koɓa indji (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 5.21-43; Luk 8.40-56)
9.18: Lɔkɔ á Yisu sœ kœpa o'onœ asœmœ fœ endje ataa, anga gbozu nœ Ayuda yikumu ye œ gote ga utshu ye, yé œ pa adœke: «Yawuru nœ mœ tshu ngɔngɔnœ asœke, kashe na œ to kane zœ ga pa ye yé tshe sœ dœ soro.»
9.19: Yisu áalafo yé endje te manda ye, œshe dœ pe ayambarœ nœ ye.
9.20: Andaa anga yashe bale á tshe sœ lima kœwu oyo dœ koɓa indji manda ungu ndjokpa dœ bisha, na djagamanda Yisu œ goro ama lœba ye.
9.21: Tshe sœ lima kœpa ɓa lœ ye adœke: «Œdœ mœ kœgoro kolœ ama lœba nœ ye, mœ she ye.»
9.22: Kashe Yisu fatœ ye œ wu she yé á pa adœke: «Sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ yawuru nœ mœ! Kœyindœrœ nœ zœ she ɓœ ye.» Yé kolœ dœ ada ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, yashenœ she lœ koɓa nœ ye yé.
9.23: Yisu wuta ɓa lœ anda nœ gbozunœ asœmœ. Lɔkɔ á tshe wu aayi kœ'uru ngbake œdœ ukpulu azu á endje sœ kœta rawa,
9.24: tshe pa adœke: «'E wuta ga shu, gbambanœ nene, yawurunœ asœke tshutshu nene. Tshe sœ tœ olo.» Kashe endje sœ lima kœmɔ she.
9.25: Lɔkɔ á endje gɔrɔ ukpulu azunœ ga ushu, Yisu li ɓa tœ osho á gbolonœ sœ tœnœ, œ za kane ye yé tshe áalafo.
9.26: Yé o'onœ za tshelœ ogo djigi. Yisu she aayibula bisha
9.27: Lɔndɔ á Yisu katœ tshakpœtœmœ tɨ á sœ kœro tœnœ, anga aayibula bisha te manda ye dœ rawa adœke: «Wu oyo 'a, Gbolo nœ Davidi!»
9.28: Lɔkɔ á Yisu wuta ɓa lœ anda, aayibulanœ bisha na ndoo dœ she yé tshe yu endje adœke: «Adja 'e yindœ nœ adœke mœ mbœrœ ala 'e œ kɔrɔ a?» Endje gi fœ she adœke: «Œ̃, Gbozu.»
9.29: Yisu to kane ye ga pa ala endje yé œ pa adœke: «Kaka œ mbœrœtœ ye fœ 'e liaka kœyindœrœ nœ 'e.»
9.30: Yé ala endje kɔrɔ. Á Yisu kœpa fœ endje dœ ɔgbɔ adœke: «'E dji mœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, 'e papandœ nœ fœ uzu bale nene!»
9.31: Kashe endje wuta, œ pandœ o'o nœ Yisu lœ ogonœ djigi. Yisu she uzu bale á tshe papa o'o nene (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 11.14-15)
9.32: Lɔkɔ á endje yi lima ndœ kœwuta tœnœ, endje na dœ anga uzu á tshe papa o'o nene fœ she. Tshe sœ lima dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa ye.
9.33: Yé Yisu gɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨnœ pa ye, á tshe tetœ kœpa o'o. Ukpulu azu kɨ lima tœ œsœnœ, œ pa adœke: «'A wuwu ɓalima mara anga œrœ atake bale lœ Israyele nene!»
9.34: Kashe Afarisayi pa lima adœke: «Gbozu tshapa aekpe ɨshirɨ dá to gbɔgbɔ kœgɔrɔ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ fœ she asœmœ!» Yisu wu oyo ukpulu azu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 6.6b,34; Luk 10.2)
9.35: Yisu na lima dje lœ ongbo œdœ dje lakpɨ kɔ, tshe sœ lima kœyisœ œrœ ɓa lœ Sinagoga nœ endje. Tshe sœ lima kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba yé œ sœ lima kœshe azu lœ aka koɓa kɔ œdœ lœ gbakɨndɨ kɔ.
9.36: Kœwu ukpulu azu, tshe sœ lima dœ oyo tœ lɔsu ye. Gbambanœ nene, endje mɔ lima lœ gbetshelœ nœ endje yé œ gugu lima dœ gbɔgbɔ nene ɓata apata á aayi kœgbɔndœ endje gugu nene.
9.37: Yé tshe kœpa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Leyɔ doro ndjoro lœ kɨndɨ, kashe aayi akwa ngbangba nene.
9.38: Ataa, 'e kɨ fœ ayengɔ kɨndɨnœ adœke tshe kpa vwa anga aayi akwa mbœrœ kœkɔ tœnœ.»

10.1: Yisu e ayambarœ nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bisha asœmœ, œ to gbɔgbɔ kœgɔrɔ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ fœ endje adœke endje kœgɔrɔ dœ endje yé œ she azu lœ aka koɓa kɔ dœ lœ gbakɨndɨ kɔ.
10.2: Ɨ'ɨrɨ aayi avwanœ ndjokpa dœ bisha dœke: Utshunœ kœdœ Shimu á anga ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Petro œdœ ayanœ dœ Andere. Ajake dœ Yowane á endje kœdœ agbolo nœ Zebedayi,
10.3: Filipo œdœ Bartelemi, dœ Toma, dœ Matie ayi kœko ngendja lapo, dœ Jake gbolo nœ Alefe, dœ Tade,
10.4: dœ Shimu uzu kanana, dœ Yudasi Isikariote, œshe á tshe ka Yisu. Yisu vwa aayi avwa nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bisha (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 6.7-13; Luk 9.1-6)
10.5: Yisu vwa aayi avwanœ ndjokpa dœ bisha dœ kœza 'o fœ endje adœke: «'E nana œ li ga lœ ogo nœ angbɨ azu nene, 'e lili ndje ga lœ ongbo nœ azu Samariya nene.
10.6: Kashe 'e na ga ndœ apata á endje djingili awa á endje dœ́ azu Israyele.
10.7: Tœ awa na tœnœ, 'e mɨndœ o'o adœke: “Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo ndo ye!”
10.8: 'E she aayi koɓa, 'e mbœrœ adœke akuzu kpa kwatœ endje ga lœ soro, 'e mbœrœ adœke aayi boroma wuta yerœ, 'e gɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ. Ɓata á 'e gbɔgbɔ lœ awa nœ ngendja nene, 'e toto ndje lœ awa nœ kœ'esho ndœ ngendja nene.
10.9: Adja 'e zaza ɔrœ too anga langere ngendja bale ga lœ uwu tœ 'e nene,
10.10: too ngbade kœna dœ ana nene. 'E koko lœba okoro bisha nene, œdœ œrada, œdœ tshɔngbɔlɔ potœ 'e nene. Gbambanœ nene, ayi akwa li kœgbɔ œrœ tshangba akwa nœ ye.
10.11: «Lɔkɔ á 'e kœwuta ga lakpɨ too ga lœ anga ongbo, 'e para uzu neke á tshe li kœza osho kœsœ fœ 'e dœ ɔtshɔnœ, yé œ sœ kpœndœ ye kpœtœmœ œrrr ga tœ kœkatœ tshalakpɨnœ asœmœ tɨ.
10.12: Lɔkɔ á 'e kœli ga lœ anda nœ uzu, 'e pa adœke: “Kœsœ gee sœ dœ 'e.”
10.13: Œdœ azu tshasœndanœ kœza osho kœsœ fœ 'e, kœsœ gee nœ 'e œ sœ dœ endje. Kashe œdœ endje kœzaza osho kœsœ fœ 'e nene, 'e gi kœsœ gee nœ 'e pa endje ye.
10.14: Yé œdœ azu anga tshalakpɨ bale too anga tshasœnda bale kœvwaratœ endje tœ kœza osho kœsœ fœ 'e, too tœ kœdji o'o ama 'e ye, 'e katœ tshakpœtœmœ tɨ, yé œ gɔrɔ trusha tshada 'e tɨ kpœtœmœ.
10.15: Mœ sœ kœpa dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke, dœ lɔkɔnœ á Ndjaba œ wa ngbanga pa azu, azu ogonœ asœmœ œ gbɔ djofele kœropa œnœ azu Sodomo dœ Gomora. Œrœ kanga á sœ kœna tœnœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 13.9-13; Luk 21.12-17)
10.16: «'E wu! Mœ sœ kœvwa 'e ɓata apata ɓa ugurutœ amuru. 'E sœ dœ gbɔdjela ɓata ayakoro yé œ sœ dœ ɔmɔ lɔsu ɓata ambepa.
10.17: Ala 'e gbɔ tœ azu. Gbambanœ nene, endje ko 'e na tœnœ ga utshu aayi kœwa ngbanga nœ azu nœ Ndjaba yé œ sɔ 'e dœ ndjapa ɓa lœ Sinagoga nœ endje.
10.18: Endje ko ndje 'e bala tɔ ɓa utshu agboro agbozu œdœ pe agbozugo mbœrœ á 'e kœdœ azu nœ mœ. Ataa, œ za awa fœ 'e adœke 'e pa o'o tœ upu nœ mœ fœ endje, azunœ œdœ endje á endje dœ́dœ́ Ayuda nene asœmœ.
10.19: Lɔkɔ á endje kœto 'e na tœnœ ɓa tœ osho kœwa ngbanga, 'e tɔtɔ lɔsu 'e tœ mara á 'e gi dœ o'o nene. Gbambanœ nene, dœ ada ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, endje to o'o á li adœke 'e pa fœ 'e.
10.20: Œ dœ́dœ́ 'e dá pa o'onœ nene, kashe Ɨshirɨ nœ Aba 'e œ pa o'o lœ 'e.
10.21: «Ayazu œ va ɔtɔ ayanœ adœke endje wo she, yé aba kœzu uzu œ mbœrœ ndje ataa fœ gbolo nœ ye; agbolo œ yiangba aayi kœzu endje yé œ ko endje adœke endje wo endje ye.
10.22: Azu para kɔkɔ œ yiangba 'e mbœrœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ kashe uzu á tshe shi gbɨ œrrr ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ, Ndjaba œ she she.
10.23: Œdœ endje kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ 'e ɓa lœ anga ongbo bale, 'e kpa ga lœ anga angbɨnœ. Mœ pa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, Gbolo nœ uzu œ na, damba 'e nana dje lœ ongbo Israyele kɔkɔ nene.
10.24: «Yambarœ bale roropa ayi kœyisœrœ fœ she nene, yé ayi akwa roro ndje pa gbozu nœ ye nene.
10.25: Kashe yambarœ œ sœ dœ yanga œdœ endje kœwu she ɓata ayi kœyisœrœ nœ ye, yé ayi akwa œ sœ ndje dœ yanga œdœ endje kœwu she ɓata gbozu nœ ye. Œdœ azu kœna œrrr á e ayengɔ anda Belezebula , ɨ'ɨrɨ gaɗe dá endje e ga tœ azu tshasœnda nœ ye a?» Uzu á endje li kœkpawa ye (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 12.1-27)
10.26: «Awa uzu bale zaza 'e nene. Œrœ neke kɔ á zatœ endje yiwa tœnœ œ matœ endje ngbɨ ga shu, yé œneke kɔ á sœ lœ ubunœ, azu œ wusœ nœ kɔ.
10.27: O'o á mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e lœ ubunœ asœmœ, 'e pa tshandœnœ dœ ɔlɔ, yé angba o'o á endje sœ kœpa ga lœ utu 'e, 'e pandœ nœ ngbɨ ga shu.
10.28: 'E kpakpa awa azu á endje wo undu uzu kashe á endje lili kœwo ɨshirɨ uzu nene; 'e kpa awa Ndjaba á tshe li kœwo undu uzu œdœ ɨshirɨ ye ɓa lœ lifelo.
10.29: Endje kaka a'eara ayanu bisha ndœ kœgbɔ langere ngendja bale nene a? Andaa, anga bale ugurutœ endje œ te ga tœ ɔshɔ nene œdœ Aba 'e kœyiyindœ nœ nene.
10.30: Kashe e'e, œdœ sukumu 'e, Ndjaba dɨ kɔ.
10.31: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'e sœsœ dœ awa nene, gbambanœ nene, 'e ropa a'eara ayanu ye.» Kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ Yisu utshu azu (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 12.8-9)
10.32: «Uzu kɔ á tshe yindœ nœ ɓa tœ ala azu adœke œne kœdœ yambarœ nœ mœ, mœ yi ndje ndœ ye ɓa utshu Aba mœ á tshe sœ ɓa lafo adœke œshe kœdœ uzu nœ mœ.
10.33: Kashe tsheneke á tshe 'ea mœ ɓa utshu azu, mœ 'ea ndje she ɓa utshu Aba mœ á tshe sœ ɓa lafo.» Kœsœ gee nene kashe ɨngɨrɨ yakamba (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 12.51-53; 14.26-27)
10.34: «'E gbegbe adœke mœ na mbœrœ kœza kœsœ gee ɓa pa ɔshɔ nene. Mœ nana mbœrœ kœza kœsœ gee nene, kashe mœ na dœ ɨngɨrɨ yakamba.
10.35: Adjapu, mœ na kœkurutshelœ gbolo yakoshe dœ abanœ, yawuru dœ ayinœ, yashe dœ yinɨnœ dœ yashe.
10.36: Uzu dœ uzu œ sœ dœ ayingba ye lœ anda nœ ye.
10.37: Uzu á tshe yindœ abanœ too ayinœ kœropa mœ, tshe lili kœdœ uzu nœ mœ nene. Uzu á tshe kœyindœ gbolo yakoshe too gbolo yawuru nœ ye kœropa mœ, tshe lili kœdœ uzu nœ mœ nene.
10.38: Uzu á tshe kœza kurushi nœ ye yé á na manda mœ nene, tshe lili kœdœ uzu nœ mœ nene.
10.39: Uzu á tshe kœyindœ kœgbɔndœ soro ye, œ yiwatœ ye yé. Kashe tsheneke á tshe kœyindœ kœtshu mbœrœ mœ, tshe sœ dœ soro.» Kœgi tshangba œrœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 9.41)
10.40: «Uzu neke á tshe kœza osho kœsœ fœ 'e, dá tshe za ndje fœ mœ ye. Uzu neke á tshe kœza osho kœsœ fœ mœ, dá tshe za ndje fœ tsheneke á tshe vwa mœ.
10.41: Uzu á tshe kœza osho kœsœ fœ anga ayi kœgbara o'o nœ Ndjaba mbœrœ á tshe kœdœ ayi kœgbara o'o asœmœ, tshe gbɔ œrœ tshangbanœ ɓata á Ndjaba sœ kœto fœ ayi kœgbara o'o. Yé tsheneke á tshe za osho kœsœ fœ uzu á tshe sœ ndjii mbœrœ á tshe kœdœ uzu ndjii utshu Ndjaba, tshe gbɔ ndje œrœ tshangbanœ ɓata uzu á tshe sœ ndjii.
10.42: Mœ mɨndœ nœ dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke, uzu kɔ á tshe su ungu kœndjoondjo, œdœ œ kœdœ yashi zɨtɨ ungu tshebabale fœ anga aya gbolo lœ agbolonœ asœke mbœrœ á tshe dœ́ yambarœ nœ mœ, Ndjaba œ to œrœ tshangbanœ fœ she.»

11.1: Lɔndɔ á Yisu za o'o fœ ayambarœ nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bisha á ka, tshe katœ tshakpœtœmœ tɨ œ ro kœyisœ œrœ œdœ kœmɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Ndjaba dje lœ ongbo nœ endje.
11.2: Andaa, Yowane ayi kœza batisimu sœ lœ kánga, yé tshe djindœ o'o akwa á Kristu sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ, ngbewo á vwa anga ayambarœ nœ ye
11.3: kœyu Yisu adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ tsheneke á tshe sœ kœna tœnœ a, too 'a kate anga angbɨ uzu?»
11.4: Yé Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «'E gu œ pandœ œneke á 'e dji yé á wu fœ Yowane adœke:
11.5: Aayibula tetœ kœwu osho, aayi gbada na ana, aayi boroma wuta yerœ, aayi bitu dji o'o, akuzu kwatœ endje ga lœ soro, yé endje mɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o fœ aayi oyo.
11.6: Yanga nœ uzu á tshe kakatœ kœyindœrœ nœ ye ga ndœ mœ nene!»
11.7: Lɔndɔ á ayambarœ nœ Yowane gu da ye, Yisu tetœ kœpandœ Yowane fœ ukpulu azu adœke: «Œrœ gaɗe dá 'e na kœwu tœnœ ɓa lœ kpagagasho a? A'eara ɔyɔ á yugu sœ kœmea tœnœ a? Œ̃ œ̃ nene.
11.8: Yé œrœ gaɗe dá 'e na kœwu tœnœ a? 'E na kœwu anga uzu á tshe verœ ɔtshɔ lœba a? Œ̃ œ̃ nene, azu á endje verœ ɔtshɔ lœba sœ ɓa lœ anda nœ agbozugo.
11.9: Yé ataa, œrœ gaɗe dá 'e na kœwu tœnœ a? 'E na kœwu ayi kœgbara o'o a? Œ̃, mœ mɨndœ nœ dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke tshe ropa ayi kœgbara o'o ye.
11.10: Gbambanœ nene, Yowane ayi kœza batisimu kœdœ uzu á endje sú o'o tœ upu nœ ye ɓa la buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Mœ vwa ayi avwa nœ mœ utshu zœ mbœrœ kœguma ala awa zœ.”
11.11: Mœ mɨndœ nœ dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke, ugurutœ azu tshapashɔnœ asœke kɔ, anga uzu bale á tshe ropa Yowane ayi kœza batisimu gugu nene. Andaa, tsheneke á tshe sœ teasho ɓa lœ Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo ropa ye yé.
11.12: Kœto tœ lɔkɔ á Yowane ayi kœza batisimu wuta kœyisœ œrœ œrrr ga tœ kpesheke, Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo to toro kœgerœ tœnœ. Aayi gbɔgbɔ dá sœ kœpara awa nœ kœgbɔtœ nœ.
11.13: Aayi kœgbara o'o kɔ œdœ awa akwa, gbara o'o œrrr ga tœ Yowane.
11.14: Yé œdœ 'e kœyindœ kœwusœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, Yowane kœdœ Eliya á endje pa lima ndœ kœna she.
11.15: Kaka uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ utu, tshe dji!
11.16: «Mœ li azu nœ tshakpesheke dœ azu ɗe? Endje liili dœ agbolo á endje ka ɓa la wutu kœka œrœ yé á sœ kœpa o'o ugurutœ endje adœke:
11.17: “'A 'uru ngbake fœ 'e, kashe 'e vivi ipi nene! 'A ɓi itshi kuzu fœ 'e, kashe 'e kɨkɨ nene.”
11.18: Gbambanœ nene, Yowane ayi kœza batisimu na yé œ vwaratœ ye tœ kœzɨ œrœ œdœ kœndjo ipi, endje pa adœke: “Tshe sœ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa ye!”
11.19: Gbolo nœ uzu na œ sœ kœzɨ œrœ yé œ sœ kœndjo ipi, endje sœ kœpa adœke: “'E wu makœzɨrœ, mœndjondjo. Anganœ kœdœ kolœ aayi kœko ngendja lapo œdœ azu kœmbœrœ ekperœ!” Kashe kœwusœtœ nœ Ndjaba sœ kœmatœ ye ndjii lœ awa akwa nœ ye.» Kœgbagbara osho tœ upu nœ ongbo Galilayi (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 10.13-15)
11.20: Yé Yisu tetœ kœgbagbara azu tshelœ ongbo á tshe mbœrœ lima afá ndjoro lœnœ; gbambanœ nene, endje yayapa lima ɔtshɔ endje nene. Tshe pa fœ endje adœke:
11.21: «Oyo nœ zœ, Koraze! Oyo nœ zœ Betesayida! Gbambanœ nene, œdœ afá á mbœrœtœ endje ɓa ndœ 'e kœmbœrœ má tœ endje ɓa lœ Tire œdœ ɓa lœ Sidona, azu ɓa zœ œ verœ má sake, yé œ dja má tshelœ kumu endje dœ vorowo mbœrœ kœma adœke œne fatshalɔsu œne ye.
11.22: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e adœke dœ lɔkɔ kœwa ngbanga, mœ wa o'o tœ ɔgbɔnœ ga tœ 'e kœropa œnœ azu Tire œdœ Sidona.
11.23: Yé e'e dœ azu Kaparnawumu, 'e gbe adœke 'e ɔ œrrr ga lafo zœ a? 'E jerœ bala œrrr ɓa lœ ogo nœ akuzu. Gbambanœ nene, œdœ afá á mbœrœtœ endje ɓa ndœ 'e, kœmbœrœ má lima tœ endje ɓa lœ Sodomo ataa, ongbonœ asœmœ œ sœ má œrrr ga tœ kpesheke.
11.24: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e adœke dœ lɔkɔ kœwa ngbanga, mœ wa o'o nœ 'e tœ ɔgbɔnœ kœropa œnœ azu ogo Sodomo.» 'E na ga ndœ Yisu œ yatœ 'e (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 10.21-22)
11.25: Dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, Yisu pa dœ ɔgbɔ adœke: «Uu Aba, Gbozu nœ tshalafo dœ tshapashɔ, mœ gi mershe fœ ɓœ mbœrœ á ɓœ má ngbɨ fœ azu á endje wuwusœ œrœ nene adjapu á ɓœ za yiwa tœnœ tœ azu kœwusœtœ œdœ agbangba kœwusœrœ.
11.26: Aba, œɓœ dá yindœ nœ adœke œ mbœrœtœ ye ataa.
11.27: «Aba mœ ko œrœ kɔ fœ mœ. Uzu bale wuwusœ Gbolo nene, kolœ Aba dá wusœ ye. Uzu bale wuwusœ Aba nene, kolœ Gbolo dá wusœ ye, œdœ tsheneke á Gbolo yindœ kœma Aba fœ she tako.
11.28: «E'e dœ azu kɔ á 'e mɔ dœ kœko ogboro gbarœ, 'e na ga ndœ mœ, mœ ko gbarœnœ lœ kumu 'e dœ́ 'e yatœ 'e.
11.29: 'E za ngbongbo awa bale dœ mœ, yé œ li ga lœ lakɔrɔ nœ mœ; gbambanœ nene, mœ dœ́dœ́ ayi gbɔkumu nene kashe mœ dœ́ ayi ɔmɔ lɔsu. Ataa, 'e li kœyatœ 'e dœ tœ 'e.
11.30: Ngbongbo nœ mœ gbɔgbɔ nene, yé gbarœnœ á a za dœ 'e œ lɨ 'e nene.»

12.1: Manda nœ teasho atake, Yisu ro lima tɔ lœ kɨndɨ ble dœ anga lɔkɔ sabata. Ogo li lima tœ ayambarœ nœ ye yé endje tetœ kœverœ ele blenœ asœmœ á sœ kœzɨ tœnœ.
12.2: Lɔkɔ á Afarisayi wu ataa, endje pa fœ Yisu adœke: «Wu, ayambarœ nœ zœ sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á awa akwa vwaratœ ye tœnœ dœ olo sabata!»
12.3: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «'E dɨdɨ œneke á Davidi mbœrœ lima anga ɔlɔ bale á ogo mi lima she dœ azu nœ ye á tshe na lima tœ awanœ dœ endje nene a?
12.4: Tshe li, œshe œdœ azu nœ ye ɓa lœ anda Ndjaba, yé endje zɨ mapa á endje to dœ tokóró fœ Ndjaba; mapa má œdœ she œdœ azu nœ ye, endje lili má kœzɨ tœnœ nene, kashe á sœ kolœ mbœrœ anganga Ndjaba kutɨ endje.
12.5: Too 'e dɨdɨ ndje ɓa la buku awa akwa nene adœke dœ lɔkɔ sabata, ata anganga Ndjaba sœ kœmbœrœ akwa lœ Tepelo gbaa, endje sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kpi tœ awa akwa, kashe Ndjaba sœsœ kœwu lœ ala ye ɓata ekperœ nene.
12.6: Andaa mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke, œrœ á 'e wu asœke, œ ropa Tepelo ye.
12.7: Œdœ 'e kœwu má sœ ádá o'o á endje sú ala buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Mœ yindœ nœ adœke, 'e wu oyo anga 'e kashe tokóró nene;” 'e wawa ngbanga pa azu á endje mbœmbœrœ œrœ bale nene.
12.8: Gbambanœ nene, Gbolo nœ uzu kœdœ ayengɔ lɔkɔ sabata.» Yisu she uzu á kane ye tshu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 3.1-6; Luk 6.6-11)
12.9: Yisu katœ tshakpœtœmœ tɨ, œ na œ li ga lœ Sinagoga nœ endje.
12.10: Anga uzu bale á kane ye tshu sœ lima kpœtœmœ. Afarisayi yu lima Yisu dœ o'o adœke: «Awa akwa nœ azœ sœ kœyindœ nœ adœke endje she uzu dœ lɔkɔ sabata a?» Endje yu lima she ataa mbœrœ á kœgbɔ awa kœtɔ meza pa ye.
12.11: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Œdœ anga uzu ugurutœ 'e kœsœ dœ pata nœ ye tshebabale, á tshe te ga lœ kudu dœ lɔkɔ sabata, tshe lili kœza she ga ushu nene a?
12.12: Uzu ropa pata! Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, awa akwa nœ azœ za awa fœ azœ ndœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ dœ lɔkɔ sabata.»
12.13: Yé Yisu kœpa fœ uzunœ á kane ye tshu adœke: «Yɔrɔ tshelœ kane zœ.» Tshe yɔrɔ tshelœ kane ye, yé œ gumatœ ye ɓata anga tshakalanœ.
12.14: Afarisayi gu œ vwarandœ o'o ugurutœ endje tœ kœpara awa ndœ kœwo Yisu. Ayi akwa á Ndjaba ke she
12.15: Lɔndɔ á Yisu djindœ o'onœ asœmœ, tshe gitœ ye kpœtœmœ, yé azu ndjoro na manda ye. Tshe she aayi koɓa kɔ,
12.16: kashe œ pa fœ endje dœ ɔgbɔ adœke endje papa o'o tœ upu nœ œne fœ uzu bale nene.
12.17: Tshe mbœrœ lima ataa adœke o'o á Ndjaba pa dœ awa nœ ayi kœgbara o'o Isaya kœmbœrœ tœ endje.
12.18: Tshe pa lima adœke: «Wu ayi akwa nœ mœ á mœ ke she dœke, mœ yindœ ye waa yé mœ sœ dœ yanga mbœrœ she. Mœ vwa Ɨshirɨ nœ mœ kœjerœ ga pa ye, yé tshe yisœ ɔtshɔ awa fœ azu tshapashɔ kɔ.
12.19: Tshe bœrœtœ ye dœ uzu bale nene, yé œ ta ndje rawa nene; endje dji she kœpa o'o tœ ala awa nene.
12.20: Tshe kavwa tshelœ wara á lu nene, yé tshe ru miinda á ndoo kœru tœnœ nene, œrrr ga tœ adœke œneke á sœ ndjii ropa œrœ kɔ yekane.
12.21: Yé azu kɔ á endje wuwusœ mœ nene œ ko lɔsu endje ga pa ye.» Yisu œdœ Belezebula (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 3.22-30; Luk 11.14-23)
12.22: Endje na dœ anga uzu bale á ala ye bu yé á tshe papa o'o nene fœ Yisu. Tshe sœ lima dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa ye. Yisu she uzunœ dœ mara adœke tshe tetœ kœpa o'o dœ pe kœwu osho.
12.23: Ukpulu azu á endje sœ lima kpœtœmœ, kɨtœ œsœnœ yé œ sœ lima kœpa adœke: «Uzunœ asœke kœdœ ata Davidi nene a?»
12.24: Lɔkɔ á Afarisayi dji endje kœpa o'o ataa, endje pa ngbɨ adœke: «Belezebula gbozu nœ ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ pa ye. Œshe dá za gbɔgbɔ fœ she tœ kœgɔrɔ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa azu asœmœ!»
12.25: Kashe yisu wu lima sœ gbetshelœ nœ endje, yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Ogo gbozu kɔ á azu tshelœnœ kœsœ kœnga koshe ugurutœ endje, tshelœ ogonœ asœmœ œ ndɨ ye. Œdœ azu tshelœ ongbo bale too lœ bɨngɨ bale kœsœ kœnga koshe ugurutœ endje, tshelœ ongbonœ too bɨngɨnœ œ ndɨ ye.
12.26: Œdœ Satana kœsœ kœgɔrɔ œneke á dœ́ œnœ Satana, asœmœ dá tshe sœ kœnga koshe ga tœ ye dœ tœ ye. Ataa, Ogo gbozu nœ ye œ sœpe koto o?
12.27: 'E sœ kœpa adœke Belezebula dá to gbɔgbɔ fœ mœ yeka á mœ sœ kœgɔrɔ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ. Yé azu nœ 'e gɔrɔ ndje ekpe ɨshirɨ dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ ɗe? Ataa, azu nœ 'e dœ tœ endje œ yisœ nœ adœke 'e te dœ o'o ye.
12.28: Kashe œdœ mœ kœsœ kœgɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ dœ Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba, dá œ sœ kœma adœke Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba wuta ga ndœ 'e ye.
12.29: «Too ndje, œdœ uzu kœyindœ kœli kœko œrœ dœ ɔgbɔ ɓa lœ anda nœ uzu nœ gbɔgbɔ; œ li adœke tshe i she vwagbagba ga tœnœ utshunœ yeka á kœli kœko œrœ nœ ye.
12.30: Uzu á tshe sœsœ awa bale dœ mœ nene, œshe kœdœ yingba mœ. Yé tsheneke á tshe sœsœ kœtɨ kane mœ adœke 'a ngboɓa azu nene, sœ kœndjɔtshelœ endje.
12.31: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e adœke, Ndjaba œ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ azu kɔ œdœ pe kœgu œsœ Ndjaba á endje sœ kœgu tœnœ. Kashe tsheneke á tshe kœsœ kœgu œsœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ, Ndjaba œ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ ye nene.
12.32: Uzu á tshe pa ekpe o'o dœ upu nœ Gbolo nœ uzu, Ndjaba œ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ ye kashe œdœ tshe kœpa ekpe o'o goro œsœ́ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ, Ndjaba œ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ ye bale nene œdœ lœ soro ye pa ɔshɔ œdœ manda kuzu ye.» Endje wusœ ɔyɔ mbœrœ elenœ (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 6.43-45)
12.33: «Œdœ ɔyɔ kœdœ ɔtshɔ ɔyɔ, elenœ œ sœ ndje dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Yé œdœ ɔyɔ kœdœ ɔyɔ á sœ dœ koɓa, elenœ œ sœ ndje dœ koɓa. Gbambanœ nene, endje wusœ ɔyɔ mbœrœ elenœ.
12.34: Ukpulu ekpe ayakoro! Ɓata 'e kœdœ aekpe azu asœke, mara gaɗe dá 'e li kœpa ɔtshɔ o'o a? Gbambanœ nene, o'o á wuta lœ ama uzu to ɓa tœ lɔsu ye.
12.35: Ɔtshɔ uzu sœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ á sœ kœto lœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye; yé ekpe uzu sœ kœmbœrœ ndje ekperœ á sœ kœto lœ ekpe lɔsu nœ ye.
12.36: Mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e adœke, dœ lɔkɔ kœwa ngbanga, Ndjaba œ yu azu tœ o'o á endje pa lima ngbɨlɨngbɨlɨ asœmœ kɔ.
12.37: Gbambanœ nene, kolœ lindœ o'o á wuta lœ ama zœ dá ɓœ te dœ o'o too ɓœ te ndje dœ o'o nene.» Ayuda yindœ kœwu ambárá afá (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 8.11-12; Luk 11.29-32)
12.38: Yé anga aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ anga Afarisayi pa fœ Yisu adœke: «Gbozu, 'a yindœ nœ adœke ɓœ ma anga ambárá afá bale fœ 'a kane.»
12.39: Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Azu nœ tshakpesheke, endje kœdœ aekpe azu yé œ zazatœ endje fœ Ndjaba nene; endje yindœ nœ adœke œne wu anga ambárá afá bale. Kashe endje wu œrœ bale nene, kolœ ambárá afá á Ndjaba ma lœ awa nœ ayi kœgbara o'o nœ ye dœ Yona asœmœ.
12.40: Gbambanœ nene, ɓata á Yona mbœrœ ɔlɔ votɔ œdœ butshɔ votɔ ɓa lœ egerœ ageatshalangu, awa bale Gbolo nœ uzu œ mbœrœ ndje ɔlɔ votɔ dœ butshɔ votɔ lœ ɔshɔ.
12.41: Dœ lɔkɔ kœwa ngbanga nœ azu pa ɔshɔ, azu Ninive œ áalafo œ wa o'o ga pa azu nœ tshakpesheke asœke. Gbambanœ nene, azu Ninive fa lima tshalɔsu endje lɔkɔ á endje dji Yona kœmɨndœ o'o ama Ndjaba. Kashe uzunœ á tshe sœ kpœke asœke ropa Yona ye!
12.42: Dœ lɔkɔ kœwa bala ngbanga, gbozugo yashe tshapa ogo Saba œ wa o'o ga pa 'e. Gbambanœ nene, tshe to ɓa tœ ndɔngɔlɔ tshakala ogo pa ɔshɔ á sœ lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ, á na kœdji o'o kœwusœtœ nœ Salomo. Kashe uzunœ á tshe sœ kpœke asœke ropa Salomo ye!» Kœkwa ekpe ɨshirɨ ga lœ uzu (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 11.24-26)
12.43: «Œdœ ekpe ɨshirɨ kœgitœ ye pa uzu, tshe sœ kœkɔrɔ na tœnœ djezœ lœ kpagagasho mbœrœ kœpara osho kœsœ tœnœ. Œdœ tshe kœgbɔgbɔ osho kœsœ tœnœ nene,
12.44: tshe sœ kœpa adœke: “Mœ kwatœ mœ ga lœ anda nœ mœ á mœ wuta lœ nœ.” Kashe lɔkɔ á tshe kœkwatœ ye yé á wu adœke uzu gugu lœ andanœ nene, endje ngbɔ tshelœnœ œ guma œrœ tshelœnœ dœ awanœ,
12.45: tshe na œ e anga angbɨ aekpe ɨshirɨ mindu dœ bisha (7) á endje sœ tœ ekpenœ kœrosœ ye. Tshe gu dœ endje awa bale œ li ga sœndanœ yé œ gumatœ endje kpœtœmœ. Ataa, oyo á uzunœ asœmœ œ kpa wu œ ropa œneke má utshunœ. Œ sœ ndje awa bale ataa mbœrœ aekpe azu nœ tshakpesheke.» Adja ayi Yisu œdœ pe adja aayanœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 3.31-35; Luk 8.19-21)
12.46: Lɔndɔ á Yisu sœpe lima kœpa o'o fœ ukpulu azu atake, ayinœ œdœ pe aayanœ yi kumu endje. Endje ka lima ɓa ushu yé œ sœ kœpara awa kœpa o'o dœ she.
12.47: Yé anga uzu bale kœpa fœ Yisu adœke: «Ayi zœ œdœ aaya ka ɓa ushu œ yindœ kœpa o'o dœ ɓœ.»
12.48: Yisu kœgi fœ uzunœ asœmœ adœke: «Œɗe dá dœ ayi mœ a? Œɗe dá dœ aaya mœ a?»
12.49: Yé tshe yisœ ayambarœ nœ ye dœ kane ye, œ pa adœke: «'E Wu ayi mœ œdœ aaya mœ, endje dá sœ atɨ asœke.
12.50: Gbambanœ nene, uzu á tshe sœ kœmbœrœ œneke á Aba mœ á tshe sœ ɓa lafo yindœ nœ, œshe kœdœ aya mœ, yingɔ mœ too ayi mœ.»

13.1: Dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, Yisu wuta lœ anda œ na kœsœ ga atɨ ɓa tœ mangu egerœ ungu adanga.
13.2: Ukpulu azu ngbɔtœ endje dje ɨndɨrɨ ye á tshe ɔ ga lœ egerœ agba yé á sœ ga atɨ. Ukpulu azunœ ka lima ɓa tœ mangunœ.
13.3: Tshe sœ lima kœpa o'o ndjoro lœ ndœma toro, yé œ pa lima fœ endje adœke: «Ɔlɔ bale, anga uzu na lima ga lœ kɨndɨ nœ ye mbœrœ kœlu indji ngwarœ.
13.4: Ɓata á tshe sœ lima kœlu indji ngwarœnœ, anganœ yo ga tœ ama awa, ayanu wu œ de ye.
13.5: Anganœ yo lima ga lœ oporo badja ɓa tœ osho á ɔshɔ sœsœ ndjoro tœnœ nene. Indji ngwarœnœ ko lima katsha mbœrœ embe ɔshɔnœ lili lima nene.
13.6: Lɔkɔ á ɔlɔ tɔ dœ ɔgbɔ, ungbu ngwarœnœ kɔkɔ œ ɔrɔ ye; gbambanœ nene, œshenœ lili waa ga lœ ɔshɔ nene.
13.7: Anga indji ngwarœnœ yo ga lœ ɔyɔ ishi. Ɔyɔ ishinœ gboro yé œ napa ungbu ngwarœnœ, awa kœgerœ tœnœ gugu nene.
13.8: Kashe anga indji ngwarœ kpa yo ga lœ ɔtshɔ ɔshɔ, yé œ zu ɔtshɔ elenœ: Bale le kama, anganœ le zazu votɔ (60) yé anganœ le ndje zazu bale dœ ndjokpa (30).»
13.9: Yé Yisu kœpa adœke: «Œdœ 'e kœsœ dœ utu, kaka 'e dji!» Mbœrœ gaɗe á Yisu sœ kœyisœ œrœ lœ ndœma toro a? (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 4.10-12; Luk 8.9-10)
13.10: Ayambarœ gitœ endje ndoo dœ she, œ yu she adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ sœ kœpa o'o lœ ndœma toro a?»
13.11: Tshe gi fœ endje adœke: «Tœ e'e, 'e li œnœ 'e kœwusœ o'o nœ ádá Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo á zatœ endje yiwa tœnœ ye, kashe anga azu, endje lili kœwusœ nœ nene.
13.12: Gbambanœ nene, uzu á tshe sœ dœ œrœ, endje kpa ko anganœ ga pa nœ yé œ ngba tœ ye waa. Kashe tsheneke á tshe kœgugu dœ œrœ nene, endje kpa ko œneke teasho á tshe sœ dœ tœnœ, tœ ye yé.
13.13: 'E wu ádánœ á mœ sœ kœpa o'o fœ endje lœ ndœma toro mbœrœ endje sœ kœwu œrœ kashe endje sœsœ kœwu tœnœ nene, yé endje sœ kœdji o'o kashe endje sœsœ kœdji tœnœ œdœ kœdji tshelœ katanœ kpœrœ nene.
13.14: Atamœ, œ mbœrœtœ ye lindœ kœgbara o'o nœ Isaya, á tshe pa adœke: “'E dji o'o waa kashe 'e dji tshelœ katanœ nene, 'e wu œrœ waa kashe 'e wu nene.
13.15: Gbambanœ nene, lɔsu azu asœke wuta dœ ɔgbɔnœ adœke; endje be utu endje ga tœnœ, endje be ala endje ga tœnœ mbœrœ á ala endje wuwu osho nene, mbœrœ á utu endje djidji o'o nene, mbœrœ á lɔsu endje zaza ádánœ kpœrœ nene yé ataa endje kpa kwa ga ndœ mœ nene mbœrœ á mœ kœshe endje.”
13.16: «Tœ e'e nœ 'e, 'e sœ œnœ 'e dœ yanga gbambanœ nene, ala 'e sœ kœwu osho zœ, yé utu 'e sœ kœdji o'o zœ.
13.17: Mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ dœ adjapu adœke, aayi kœgbara o'o ndjoro œdœ azu á endje sœ ndjii gbe ndœ kœwu œneke á 'e sœ kœwu tœnœ, kashe endje wuwu nene. Endje gbe ndje kœdji œneke á 'e sœ kœdji tœnœ, kashe endje djidji nene.» Ádá ndœma toro nœ ayi kœlu ngwarœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 4.13-20; Luk 8.11-15)
13.18: «E'e, 'e dji ádá ndœma toro nœ ayi kœlu ngwarœnœ kane.
13.19: Azu á endje pandœ ogo gbozu fœ endje yé á endje sœsœ kœdji tshelœ katanœ nene, endje lœ ɓata ama awa á indji ngwarœ yo ga tœnœ: Satana na œ kakara œneke á endje lu ga tœ lɔsu endje ye.
13.20: Anga azu sœ ɓata ɔshɔ lœ oporo badja á indji ngwarœ yo ga lœnœ: Endje sœ kœdji o'o yé œ sœ kœyindœ nœ katsha dœ yanga.
13.21: Kashe œshe endje gugu nene. Endje yindœ nœ kolœ kwata œndœ nœ œ dɨ nene, lɔkɔ á endje kœtetœ kœwu oyo too endje kœsœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ endje lœ kumu o'o ama Ndjaba, endje ka ngbɨrɨ lœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje nene.
13.22: Anga endje sœ ɓata indji ngwarœ á yo ɓa ugurutœ ɔyɔ ishi. Endje dji o'o ama Ndjaba kashe ogo œrœ tshapashɔ œdœ yanga kœgbɔ œrœ ndjoro á sœ kœfara azu, œ na pa o'onœ yé œ zuzu elenœ nene.
13.23: Anga azu sœ ɓata indji ngwarœ a yo ga lœ ɔtshɔ ɔshɔ. Endje sœ kœdji o'o ama Ndjaba yé œ sœ kœdji tshelœ katanœ. Ataa, endje sœ kœzu elenœ: Anganœ kama bale (100), anganœ zazu votɔ yé anganœ ndje zazu bale dœ ndjokpa.» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ ekpe gusu
13.24: Yisu kpa pa anga angbɨ ndœma toro fœ endje adœke: «Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo sœ ɓata anga uzu bale á tshe lu ɔtshɔ ngwarœ ga lœ kɨndɨ nœ ye.
13.25: Dœ anga butshɔ bale, dœ lɔndɔ á azu lo lima, anga yingba ye bale na, œ lu ekpe gusu ɓa uguru ble yé œ gu daye.
13.26: Lɔkɔ á blenœ gerœ lima yé á tetœ kœle tœnœ, ekpe gusunœ wuta ndje.
13.27: Aayi akwa nœ ayengɔ kɨndɨnœ na œ pandœ nœ fœ she adœke: “Gbozu, ɓœ lu lima ɔtshɔ ngwarœ ga lœ kɨndɨ nœ zœ, yé ekpe gusunœ kpa to kpœta a?”
13.28: Tshe gi fœ endje adœke: “Anga yingba bale dá mbœrœ œrœnœ asœmœ.” Yé aayi akwanœ kœyu she adœke: “Ɓœ yindœ nœ adœke, 'a na œ su ekpe gusunœ ye a?”
13.29: Tshe gi adœke: “Œ̃ œ̃ nene. Gbambanœ nene, œdœ 'e kœsœ kœsu tœnœ, œ mbœrœ adœke 'e ngbɔɓa dœ blenœ œ su va 'e.
13.30: 'E katœ nœ œ gerœ awa bale œrrr ga tœ kœgbɔ tœnœ, yé dœ lɔkɔ kœkɔ tœnœ, mœ pa bala fœ aayi kœkɔ ngwarœ adœke: 'E su ekpe gusunœ utshunœ œ i agbanœ dœ agbanœ mbœrœ kœko va ga tœ owo. Manda nœ, 'e ko ble gu tœnœ ga la kogba nœ mœ.”» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ ele mutarde (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 4.30-32; Luk 13.18-19)
13.31: Yisu kpa pandœ anga ndœma toro fœ endje adœke: «Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo sœ ɓata ele ɔyɔ á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ mutarde á uzu œ za á lu ga lœ kɨndɨ nœ ye.
13.32: Œtœnœ kœdœ leyɔ á sœ teasho lœ indji ngwarœ kɔ, kashe œ kœgerœ, œ ropa kako dɔngɔ kɔ lœ kɨndɨ yé œ fa egerœ ɔyɔ á ayanu sœ kœna kœmɔ koma endje ga lœ ganeanœ.» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ ɔyɔ kœsuku mapa (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 13.20-21)
13.33: Yisu kpa pa anga angbɨ ndœma toro fœ endje adœke: «Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo sœ ɓata ɔyɔ kœsuku mapa á anga yashe bale za, á djanga dœ kilo zuwa ble votɔ œrrr adœke zuwa blenœ suku.» Ádá á Yisu sœ kœpa o'o lœ ndœma toro dœke (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 4.33-34)
13.34: Yisu pa o'onœ kɔ asœmœ fœ ukpulu azu lœ ndœma toro. Tshe sœ lima kœpa o'o fœ endje kolœ lœ ndœma toro.
13.35: Tshe mbœrœ lima ataa mbœrœ á o'o á ayi kœgbara o'o gbara lima kœmbœrœtœ endje. Tshe gbara lima adœke: «Mœ pa bala o'o lœ ndœma toro, mœ mɨndœ œrœ á zatœ ye yiwa tœnœ kœto ɓa tœ ali kœmbœrœ tshapashɔ.» Yisu mɨndœ ádá ndœma toro nœ ekpe gusu
13.36: Manda nœ, Yisu katœ ukpulu azunœ œ gu ga sœnda. Ayambarœ nœ ye na ndoo dœ she, yé œ yu she adœke: «Mɨndœ ádá ndœma toro nœ ekpe gusu á sœ ɓa lœ kɨndɨ fœ 'a kane.»
13.37: Yisu gi fœ endje atake: «Uzu á tshe lu ɔtshɔ indji ngwarœ, œshe kœdœ Gbolo nœ uzu.
13.38: Kɨndɨ kœdœ tshapashɔ. Ɔtshɔ indji ngwarœ sœ kœma azu neke á endje zatœ endje ga tshakudu ogo gbozu. Ekpe gusu sœ kœma azu neke á endje sœ kœza awa ekperœ.
13.39: Yingba á tshe lu ekpe gusu kœdœ djaboro. Kœgbɔ ngwarœ kœdœ kœka tshapashɔ; yé aayi kœkɔ ngwarœnœ kœdœ aandjelu.
13.40: Awa bale mara á endje ngbɔɓa ekpe gusu ndœ kœsho tœnœ ɓa tœ ala owo, œ sœ ndje awa bale dœ lɔkɔ nœ kœka tshapashɔ.
13.41: Gbolo nœ uzu œ vwa aandjelu nœ ye, endje gi azu kɔ á endje sœ kœfa gbetshelœ nœ anga endje tœ kœyindœrœ œdœ pe azu á endje sœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ, ga ushu lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba.
13.42: Tshe ko endje va ga la owo; ɓa zœ endje kɨ dœ ngola endje ye yé œ zɨ tshelœ daji endje gbagbara gbagbara.
13.43: Kashe endjeneke á endje zatœ endje fœ Ndjaba, endje tshi ɓata ɨshirɨ ɔlɔ ɓa lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Aba endje. Kaka uzu á tshe sœ dœ utu, tshe dji!» Ayi kœgbɔrœ œdœ ɔgbɔ œrœ tshelœgɨ
13.44: «Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo sœ ɓata ɔtshɔrœ nœ ngendja á zatœ endje yiwa tœnœ ɓa lœ kɨndɨ á uzu gbɔ yé á kpa za tshandœnœ yiwa tœnœ. Tshe sœ dœ yanga kœrosœ nœ, œ gu œ ka œrœ nœ ye kɔ á tshe sœ dœ tœnœ yé á kwatœ ye á yɔ kɨndɨnœ asœmœ.»
13.45: «Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo sœ ɓata ayi kœka œrœ á tshe sœ kœpara ɔgbɔ œrœ tshelœgɨ.
13.46: Lɔkɔ á tshe kœgbɔ œrœnœ á œsœnœ lɨ, tshe ka œrœ kɔ á tshe sœ dœ tœnœ yé œ yɔ dœ ɔgbɔ œrœ tshelœgɨnœ asœmœ ye.» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ gbánda
13.47: «Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo kpa sœ ɓata gbánda á endje vwi ga la egerœ ungu adanga yé á sœ kœko tshelœ aka ageatshalangu kɔ.
13.48: Lɔndɔ á kœsu kperœ, aayi kœpara ageatshalangu œ gbota ga tœ mangu, manda nœ endje sœ ga atɨ mbœrœ kœko ageatshalangunœ lœnœ. Endje ko ɔtshɔ endje ga lœ kingi yé œ ko endjeneke á endje lili nene va e.
13.49: Bala kœka ndje tshapashɔ œ sœ ndje kolœ ataa: aandjelu œ na bala kœkurutshelœ aayi katshalɔsu dœ aayi ɔtshɔ azu
13.50: mbœrœ kœko endje va ga la owo. Ɓa zœ dá azu ndjoro œ kɨ yé á zɨ tshelœ daji endje gbagbara gbagbara.» Tafo kœgbɔrœ œdœ pe ongboronœ
13.51: Yisu yu endje adœke: «'E wusœ ádá o'onœ asœmœ kɔ yé a?» Endje gi adœke: «Œ̃.»
13.52: Yé tshe kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Dœ tœnœ ataa, ayi kœyisœ awa akwa kɔ á tshe te yambarœ nœ Ogo gbozu nœ tshalafo, tshe sœ ɓata anga ayengɔ œrœ á tshe gbɔ tafo œrœ œdœ pe ongboro œrœ lœ kœgbɔrœ nœ ye.» Azu Nazarete gugu dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu nene (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 6.1-6; Luk 4.16-30)
13.53: Lɔndɔ á Yisu pa o'o lœ ndœma toronœ asœmœ á ka, tshe katœ tshakpœtœmœ tɨ,
13.54: yé œ gu ga lakpɨ nœ ye. Tshe tetœ kœyisœ œrœ neke á sœ ndjii ɓa lœ Sinagoga nœ endje yé azu kɔ á endje sœ lima kpœtœmœ, kɨ lima tœ œsœnœ. Endje pa lima adœke: «Tshe gbɔ kœwusœtœ œdœ pe gbɔgbɔ nœ kœmbœrœ dœ afánœ asœke kpœta a?
13.55: Œ dœ́dœ́ gbolo nœ ayi kœguma maɓaya dœke nene a? Ayinœ dœ́dœ́ Mareya nene a? Jake, Yozefu, Shimu œdœ pe Yuda kœdœ aaya nœ nene a?
13.56: Yé ayingɔnœ kɔ sœsœ ɓa ugurutœ azœ nene a? Tshe gbɔ gbɔgbɔnœ asœke kɔ kpœta a?»
13.57: Yé œrœnœ asœmœ mbœrœ lima adœke endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye nene. Á Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Endje lɨsœ ayi kœgbara o'o tœ osho kɔ, kashe ɓa lakpɨ nœ ye œdœ ɓa lœ bɨngɨ nœ ye, endje lɨsœ ye nene.»
13.58: Yisu mbœmbœrœ afá ɓa zœ ndjoro nene kolœ mangba kœtshapu kœyindœrœ nœ endje.

14.1: Dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, Erode á tshe dœ́ lima gbozu tshapa ogo Galilayi, djindœ œneke kɔ á Yisu mbœrœ
14.2: yé œ pa fœ aayi akwa nœ ye adœke: «Yowane ayi kœza batisimu dœmœ! Œshe dá she lœ akuzu asœmœ! Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa á tshe sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ ndœ kœfarœ asœmœ.»
14.3: Andaa, Erode za lima awa adœke endje za Yowane œ i she dœ djingiri, yé œ vwi she ga lœ anda kánga mangba Erodiade, awo ayanœ dœ Filipo.
14.4: Gbambanœ nene, Yowane sœ lima kœpa fœ Erode adœke: «Œ lili adœke ɓœ za Erodiade tœ awo zœ nene!»
14.5: Erode yi lima ndœ kœwo Yowane kashe awa Ayuda dá sœ lima kœza she. Gbambanœ nene, endje kɔ, endje wu lima Yowane ɓata ayi kœgbara o'o tako.
14.6: Ataa, dœ lɔkɔ angbo olo kœzu Erode, yawuru nœ Erodiade vitœ ye ɓa utshu azu á endje na ndœ angbonœ. Tshe za lima yanga fœ Erode tɔpanœ kpuru,
14.7: yé Erode dara ama ye adœke œne to œrœ kɔ á tshe yu œne tœnœ fœ she ye.
14.8: Tshe dji upu á ayinœ mɨ fœ she yé œ yɔsho ndœ œrœ ɓa ndœ Erode adœke: «Za kumu Yowane ayi kœza batisimu ga lœ saani fœ mœ!»
14.9: Oyo za gbozugo. Kashe kolœ mangba kœdarama ye á tshe dara ɓa utshu azu nœ ye á tshe e endje, tshe za awa adœke endje za tœnœ fœ she.
14.10: Tshe vwa anga uzu bale adœke tshe na œ wa kumu Yowane ayi kœza batisimu ɓa lœ anda kánga.
14.11: Endje za kumu ye ga lœ saani gutœnœ, œ za fœ ovoro yawurunœ yé á tshe za fœ ayinœ.
14.12: Ayambarœ nœ Yowane na œ za lima oko ye á shi. Manda nœ, endje na lima œ pandœ œneke á mbœrœtœ endje asœmœ fœ Yisu. Yisu to kœzɨrœ fœ azu kutu mindu (5.000) (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 6.30-44; Luk 9.10-17; Yow 6.1-14)
14.13: Lɔkɔ á Yisu dji o'onœ asœmœ, tshe katœ tshakpœtœmœ tɨ yé œ ɔ ga lœ egerœ agba mbœrœ kœro ga tœ osho á azu gugu tœnœ nene. Kashe ukpulu azu lakpɨ djezœ dji œsœnœ yé œ na manda ye.
14.14: Lɔkɔ á Yisu wuta lœ egerœ agba, tshe wu ukpulu azu ndjoro, œ sœ dœ oyo tœ lɔsu ye mbœrœ endje yé œ tetœ kœshe agbakɨndɨ nœ endje.
14.15: Dœ lɔndɔ á ɔlɔ te lima tœ kœdɨ tœnœ, ayambarœ nœ Yisu na ndoo dœ she œ pa adœke: «Ɔlɔ dɨ ye yé oshonœ asœke azu gugu tœnœ nene; gi ukpulu azunœ asœke dœ́ endje gu ga lakpɨ œ yɔ kœzɨrœ nœ endje.»
14.16: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Ádánœ adœke endje gu, gugu nene. 'E to kœzɨrœ fœ endje dœ tœ 'e!»
14.17: Kashe endje pa fœ she adœke: «'A sœ kolœnœ kpœke dœ mapa mindu œdœ dœ ageatshalangu bisha.»
14.18: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E ko rotœnœ fœ mœ ga mœ.»
14.19: Manda nœ, tshe pa fœ ukpulu azunœ adœke endje sœ ga atɨ ga pa gusu. Tshe ko mapa sœmœ mindu dœ ageatshalangu bisha œ tɨ ala ye ga lafo, yé œ donga Ndjaba. Tshe kavwa tshelœ mapa œ ko fœ ayambarœ nœ ye, á endje kurutshelœnœ tœ ukpulu azunœ.
14.20: Uzu dœ uzu zɨ œrrr kpœtœ ama ogo nœ ye. Ayambarœ ko udunœ á sœpe kperœ kperœ dœ kingi ndjokpa dœ bisha.
14.21: Tœ kœdɨ ayashe dœ pe agbolo nene, azu á endje zɨ lima œrœnœ, sœ ga pa œrœ nœ́ ayakoshe kutu mindu (5.000). Yisu na pa egerœ ungu adanga (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 6.45-52; Yow 6.15-21)
14.22: Manda nœ atake, Yisu pa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke endje ɔ ga lœ egerœ agba dœ́ œ zu ga ɨtshi egerœ ungu adanga utshu œne. Andaa, tshe sœpe œnœ ye lima kœgi ukpulu azunœ ga manda endje.
14.23: Yé manda kœgi ukpulu azunœ asœmœ ga manda endje, tshe ɔ ɓa pa kaga mbœrœ kœza avwala. Lɔkɔ á ɔlɔ dɨ, tshe sœpe lima ɓa zœ kutɨ ye;
14.24: egerœ agba wuta lima lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ tœ ɔshɔ ye. Loko sœ lima kœyakpa egerœ agbanœ; gbambanœ nene, yugu sœ lima kœza gu tœnœ dja ga utshunœ.
14.25: Dœ ɔgbɔ butshɔ, Yisu na pa ɔkɔ ungu dœ ada ye ga ndœ ayambarœ nœ ye.
14.26: Lɔkɔ á endje wu lima she kœna pa ɔkɔ ungu atake, awa za endje yé endje pa adœke: «Asœke kœdœ ngandoro!» Yé endje ve rawa dœ awa kɔ.
14.27: Kashe ngbewo, Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ, œmœ dœmœ! Awa zaza 'e nene!»
14.28: Yé á Petro kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, œ kœdœ adja œɓœ dœmœ, za awa adœke mœ na pa ɔkɔ ungu ga ndœ zœ.»
14.29: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Na ga mœ zœ!» Petro kœjerœ lœ egerœ agba yé œ kœtetœ kœna pa ɔkɔ ungu na tœnœ ga ndœ Yisu.
14.30: Kashe lɔndɔ á tshe wu adœke yugu rosœ nœ ye, awa za she, tshe tetœ kœnduru tœnœ ga la ungu yé œ ta rawa adœke: «Gbozu, she mœ kane!»
14.31: Ngbewo Yisu kœyi kane ye á kœtepa ye, yé á kœpa fœ she adœke: «Uzu á tshe sœ dœ kœyindœrœ teasho! Mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ sœ kœshara upu a?»
14.32: Endje ɔ bibisha ga lœ egerœ agba yé yugu katœ nœ ye.
14.33: Ayambarœ á endje sœ lima ɓa lœ egerœ agba, gote dœ matshukuda endje ga utshu Yisu yé œ pa adœke: «Adja œɓœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba!» Yisu she aayi koɓa ɓa lœ ogo Genazarete (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 6.53-56)
14.34: Manda kœzu ungunœ, endje wuta ga lœ ogo Genazarete.
14.35: Azu oshonœ asœmœ wu lima sœ Yisu ye, œ pandœ kœyikumu ye fœ azu dje lœ ogonœ kɔ, yé á endje ko aayi koɓa kɔ natœnœ fœ she.
14.36: Endje sœ lima kœdɨtshelœma endje fœ she adœke tshe katœ amba ama yɔgbɔdɔ lœba nœ ye fœ endje dœ́ endje goro. Yé endjeneke kɔ á endje sœ lima kœgoro tœnœ, she lima lœ koɓa nœ endje ye.

15.1: Afarisayi œdœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa to ɓa lœ Yerusaleme œ na ga ndœ Yisu, yé œ yu she adœke:
15.2: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á ayambarœ nœ zœ sœsœ kœmbœrœtœ endje liaka o'o ama agbozu Ikrizia nene a? Gbambanœ nene, endje sœsœ kœdjutɔ kane endje utshu kœzɨrœ nene.»
15.3: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Ka e'e a, mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e zaza awa o'o nœ Ndjaba ga tœ akwa nene yé á sœ kœmbœrœtœ 'e lindœ o'o ama alata 'e a?
15.4: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba pa adœke: “Lɨ œsœ aba zœ dœ ayi zœ.” Tshe pa ndje adœke: “Tsheneke á tshe kœgu œsœ abanœ too œsœ ayinœ, tshe li kœgbɔ djofele nœ kuzu.”
15.5: Kashe e'e, 'e sœ kœpa adœke uzu kœpa fœ abanœ too fœ ayinœ adœke: “Œrœ á mœ yi má ndœ kœto tœnœ fœ ɓœ kœdœ makabo á mœ gumasœ nœ fœ Ndjaba”,
15.6: uzunœ asœmœ œ lɨsœ abanœ too ayinœ nene. Œtœnœ ataa á 'e za o'o ama Ndjaba vwi'i, yé á ga kolœ ndœ kœmbœrœ œrœ lindœ o'o ama aata 'e.
15.7: Wulapatshɔ! Ayi kœgbara o'o Isaya gbara lima o'o dœ ɔtshɔnœ tœ upu nœ 'e lɔkɔ á tshe pa adœke:
15.8: “Azu asœ sœ kœlɨsœ mœ kolœ lœ ama endje, kashe lɔsu endje sœ zara tœ mœ.
15.9: Kœdonga osho nœ endje sœ gbambanœ, gbambanœ nene, œrœ á endje sœ kœyisœ nœ kœdœ kolœ o'o á to lœ ama azu.”» Œrœ á fa uzu tœ ayi uburu (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 7.14-23)
15.10: Manda nœ, Yisu e ukpulu azu yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: «'E dji yé œ wusœ œneke dœ ɔtshɔnœ kane:
15.11: Œ dœ́dœ́ œrœ á li ga lœ ama uzu dá fa she tœ ayi uburu nene. Kashe œneke á wuta lœ ama ye dá fa she tœ ayi uburu.»
15.12: Ayambarœ nœ Yisu kœgitœ endje ga ndœ ye, yé á kœyu she adœke: «Ɓœ wusœ nœ adœke o'o zœ za ókó ga tœ lɔsu Afarisayi i?»
15.13: Tshe gi adœke: «Ɔyɔ kɔ á dœ́dœ́ Aba mœ á tshe sœ ɓa lafo dá lu nene, endje sú ye.
15.14: 'E katœ endje ye: Endje kœdœ aayibula á endje sœ kœyisœ awa fœ aayibula anga endje. Andaa œdœ ayibula kœsœ kœyisœ awa fœ anga ayibula, endje yo kɔkɔ bibisha ga lœ kudu.»
15.15: Petro za o'o œ pa fœ she adœke: «Mɨndœ ádá o'o nœ asœmœ fœ a'a kane.»
15.16: Yisu kœgi adœke: «E'e ndje, 'e gugu damba dœ kœwusœrœ nene a?
15.17: 'E wuwusœ nœ adœke œrœ kɔ á li ga lœ ama uzu sœ kœli ga lœ ye, yé manda nœ á tshe nu ga lœ gbakoto nene a?
15.18: Kashe œneke á wuta ɓa lœ ama uzu to ɓa lɔsu, yé œtœnœ dá fa she tœ ayi uburu.
15.19: Gbambanœ nene, gbetshelœ nœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ to ɓa tœ lɔsu uzu, gbetshelœ ɓata: Kœwo azu, kœpara awo azu, kœmbœrœ angba budu, kœzɨ angba, kœpa ekpe o'o tœ upu nœ uzu dœ pe kœgu osho.
15.20: Œrœ á fa uzu tœ ayi uburu dœ mœ! Kashe utshu kœzɨ œrœ á ɓœ kœdjudjutɔ kane zœ nene, œ fa ɓœ tœ ayi uburu nene.» Kœyindœrœ nœ yashe Kanana (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 7.24-30)
15.21: Manda nœ, Yisu áalafo lakpɨnœ asœmœ, œ gitœ ye ga lœ ogo Tire dœ pe Sidona.
15.22: Anga yashe Kanana bale á tshe sœ lima kœsœ kpœtœmœ na, yé œ tetœ kœtarawa adœke: «Wu oyo mœ, Gbozu, Gbolo nœ Davidi! Ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ kœndanga yawuru nœ mœ tɔpanœ kpuru.»
15.23: Kashe Yisu gigi o'o bale fœ she nene. Ayambarœ nœ ye na á kɨ ga tœ ye adœke: «Gɔrɔ she ye, mbœrœ tshe sœ kœna manda azœ dœ rawa.»
15.24: Yisu kœgi adœke: «Endje vwa mœ kolœ fœ agbolo Israyele á endje sœ ɓata apata á endje yiwa.»
15.25: Kashe yashenœ asœmœ na œ gote ga utshu ye, yé œ pa adœke: «Gbozu, tɨ kane mœ ga lafo!»
15.26: Yisu gi adœke: «Œ sœsœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ kœko kɨzɨrœ nœ agbolo mbœrœ kœko tœnœ va fœ ayavoro nene.»
15.27: Yashenœ gi adœke: «Adjapu Gbozu, kashe ayavoro zɨ ndœma kœzɨrœ á yo tœ ama gbozu nœ endje ga tshakudu ndaba kɨzɨrœ.»
15.28: Yé Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Yashe, kœyindœrœ nœ zœ gerœ waa! Œ mbœrœtœ endje fœ ɓœ ɓata á ɓœ yindœ nœ.» Yé ngbewo, yawuru nœ ye kœshe pe dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ ye. Yisu she azu ɨndɨrɨ egerœ ungu adanga (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 7.31)
15.29: Yisu wuta lœ ogonœ asœmœ yé œ ro ga tœ mangu egerœ ungu adanga lœ Galilayi. Tshe ɔ ga pa kaga yé œ sœ ga atɨ.
15.30: Azu ndjoro na ga ndœ ye. Endje na dœ azu á ada endje ndɨ, dœ aayibula, dœ aayi vwɨrɨtɨ, dœ aayi bitu, dœ pe anga aayi koɓa ndjoro. Endje katœ endje ga utshu Yisu, yé á tshe she endje.
15.31: Azu katœ ama endje tɨ ɔsɔ lɔkɔ á endje wu aayi bitu kœpa o'o; dœ azu á endje ndɨ, kœshe tœnœ; dœ azu á ada endje ndɨ, kœna ana; dœ pe azu á ala endje bu, á tetœ kœwu osho. Yé á azu kɔ donga mokɔ nœ Ndjaba nœ Israyele. Yisu to kœzɨrœ fœ azu kutu vana (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 8.1-10)
15.32: Yisu e ayambarœ nœ ye, œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Oyo azunœ asœ ka mœ waa, gbambanœ nene, endje mbœrœ olo votɔ dœ mœ, yé endje gugu dœ kœzɨrœ nene. Mœ yiyindœ kœgi endje dœ ogo nene: Ete nene, endje mbombo tœ ala awa ye.»
15.33: Ayambarœ pa fœ she adœke: «A gbɔ má rœgo lœ kpagagashonœ asœke kpœta yeka á kœto fœ endje á endje kœzɨ, á kœle endje a?»
15.34: Yisu yu endje adœke: «'E sœ dœ mapa koto o?» Endje gi fœ she adœke: «Mindu dœ bisha dœ pe a'eara ageatshalangu teasho.»
15.35: Yé á tshe kœpa fœ ukpulu azunœ asœmœ adœke endje lœ ga tœ ɔshɔ.
15.36: Tshe ko mapa mindu dœ bisha dœ pe ageatshalangunœ œ donga Ndjaba, œ ko fœ ayambarœ, yé á ayambarœ kœkurutshelœ nœ tœ ukpulu azunœ.
15.37: Uzu dœ uzu zɨ œrrr œ le she kpœtœ ama ogo nœ ye. Ayambarœ rɔ ama udu rœgo á sœpe ga lœ kingi mindu dœ bisha (7).
15.38: Andaa, azu á endje zɨ lima œrœnœ sœ ayakoshe kutu vana, endje dɨdɨ ayashe dœ agbolo nene.
15.39: Manda kœgi azu gangba endje, Yisu ɔ ga lœ egerœ agba yé œ ro ga lœ ogo Magadane.

16.1: Afarisayi dœ Asadukayi na ga ndœ Yisu œ tetœ kœgɨ uku ga tœ awa ye. Endje yu she adœke tshe ma anga ambárá afá tœ kœma adœke œ to ɓa lafo.
16.2: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Dœ adɨla, 'e sœ kœpa adœke: “Yavuru œ ni nene, mbœrœ tshalafo sœ tshee.”
16.3: Yé pe dœ amazɨ tuu, 'e sœ kœpa adœke: “Kpesheke yavuru œ ni zœ, mbœrœ tshalafo bu shoshosho.” Ataa 'e wusœ kœpandœ mara á tshalafo sœ dœ tœnœ ye, kashe 'e lili kœpandœ ambárá nœ œrœ nœ tshakpesheke asœ nene.
