1.20: Yisu e endje, endje katœ aba endje dœ Zebedayi dœ pe ayi akwa nœ endje tɨ lœ agba, yé œ na manda ye. Yisu gɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 8.14-17; Luk 4.31-41)
1.21: Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye na lima ga lœ ongbo Kaparnawumu. Dœ lɔkɔ sabata, tshe li ga lœ Sinagoga œ tetœ kœyisœ œrœ.
1.22: Azu á endje sœ lima kœdji she kɨtœ mara Kœyisœrœ nœ ye, mbœrœ tshe sœsœ lima kœyisœ œrœnœ ɓata aayi kœyisœ awa akwa nene kashe ɓata uzu á tshe sœ dœ tshagbozu.
1.23: Trale anga uzu á tshe sœ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa ye sœ ndje lima lœ Sinagoganœ, á tshe yi ama ye lœ rawa adœke:
1.24: «Yisu uzu Nazarete, ɓœ yindœ kœmbœrœ gaɗe tœ 'a? Ɓœ na mbœrœ kœwo 'a? Mœ wusœ zœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, œɓœ kœdœ œyerœ uzu á Ndjaba vwa she.»
1.25: Yisu ra ekpe ɨshirɨ sœmœ adœke: «Sœ koko! Gitœ zœ pa uzunœ asœke!»
1.26: Pe kpœtœ œsœnœ, ekpe ɨshirɨnœ yaka uzunœ, œ ve ɔgbɔ rawa œ gitœ ye pa ye.
1.27: Œ za lima awa fœ azu kɔkɔ yé endje tetœ kœyutœ endje adœke: «Asœ kœdœ gaɗe? Tshe yisœ tafo œrœ dœ tshagbozu! Tshe pa o'o fœ ekpe ɨshirɨ yé ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ kœmbœrœtœ ye lindœ nœ.»
1.28: Pe manda nœ asœmœ, ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu za lima tshalakpɨ ogo Galilayi djigi. Yisu she anga azu ndjoro (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 8.14-17; Luk 4.38-41)
1.29: Dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, endje wuta lima lœ Sinagoganœ, œ gu ga sœnda nœ Shimu œdœ Andere awa bale dœ Jake dœ pe Yowane.
1.30: Kœwuta Yisu atake, azu pa lima fœ she adœke ayimbeya Shimu lo ga pa kelekpa dœ koɓa biwa.
1.31: Yisu gitœ ye ndo dœ she, œ za kane ye, œ tɨ she ga lafo, koɓa biwa nœ ye ka ngbewo. Yé yashe sœmœ tetœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ endje.
1.32: Dœ adɨla manda kœli ɔlɔ, azu na lima dœ ayi koɓa kɔ dœ pe endje á endje lœ ndje lima dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa endje fœ Yisu.
1.33: Azu tshalakpɨ ogonœ ngbɔɓa tœ endje kɔ ɓa lœ manda andanœ á Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye sœ lima tœnœ.
1.34: Yisu she lima azu ndjoro á endje sœ dœ mara koɓa dœ koɓa, œ gɔrɔ ndje lima ekpe ɨshirɨ ndjoro pa azu. Tshe rá lima ekpe ɨshirɨ adœke endje ɨɨ ama endje bale nene, endje pupu o'o teasho nene kolœ mbœrœ á endje wu lima sœ ye dœ Yisu dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Yisu ɓa lakpɨ ogo Galilayi (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 4.23; Luk 8.42-44)
1.35: Pe dœ amazɨ utshu nœ kœwuta ɔlɔ, Yisu katœ Kaparnawumu tɨ œ na kœsœ ga tœ osho á sœ zɨtɨ ɓa lœ kpagagasho. Ɓa zœ, tshe tetœ kœ'e tshalafo.
1.36: Shimu dœ anga anganœ na kœpara she.
1.37: Kœgbɔ she kpɔ atake, endje pa fœ she adœke: «Azu kɔkɔ lœ kœpara ɓœ.»
1.38: Yisu gi o'o fœ endje adœke: «A na ga tœ anga angbɨ osho, ga lœ ongbo á sœ mashenga dœ œneke adœke mœ yi ndje sœ Ɔtshɔ O'o ɓa zœ kane. Mbœrœ mœ na mbœrœ tœnœ.»
1.39: Yé tshe ro lima djelœ ogo Galilayi djigi; œ yi lima sœ œrœ ɓa lœ Sinagoga nœ endje, œ gɔro ndje lima ekpe ɨshirɨ pa azu. Yisu she uzu koɓa boroma (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 8.1-4; Luk 5.12-16)
1.40: Ɔlɔ bale, anga ayi boroma na ga ndœ Yisu, œ gote ga utshu ye, œ kɨ fœ she adœke: «Œdœ ɓœ kœyindœ kœshe mœ, ɓœ she mœ lœ koɓanœ asœke.»
1.41: Yisu wu oyo ye, œ yi kane ye, œ goro she á pa fœ she adœke: «Mœ yindœ nœ adœke ɓœ she!»
1.42: Kolœ tœ farapu boroma yiwa yé tshe she.
1.43: Yisu gi she toro kœgu ga ndœ ye, œ pa fœ she dœ ɔgbɔ adœke:
1.44: «Dji mœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ! Papandœ œrœ á mbœrœtœ endje fœ ɓœ fœ uzu bale nene, kashe gu œ matœ zœ fœ nganga Ndjaba, œ to tokóró tœ zœ lindœ œneke á Moyize pa lima ndœ nœ mbœrœ kœma fœ azu kɔ adœke ɓœ she lœ koɓa ye.»
1.45: Atamœ gbaa, uzu sœmœ gu œ mɨ tshelœ o'onœ ngele ngele djezœ tɔpanœ kpuru adœke azu kɔkɔ wusœ nœ. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Yisu kpa lili lima kœwuta ngbɨɨ ga tœ ala azu ndœ akwa nene. Ataa Yisu gi lima tœ ye kœsœ ga tœ osho á azu ngbangba tœnœ nene gbaa, azu lœ lima kœto tœ osho dœ osho kœna ga ndœ ye.

2.1: Manda anga olo, Yisu kwatœ ye ga lœ Kaparnawumu yé azu dji adœke tshe sœ ɓa sœnda.
2.2: Azu ngbɔtœ endje ndjoro ɓa sœnda tɔ ga lœ talamanda œrrr yaba yaba tɔ ɓa shu. Anga ɔngɔrɔ osho sœsœpe nene yé á tshe ka yeka á sœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ endje.
2.3: Anga azu vana za uzu ada ye tshu tshakudu ye œ na dœ she fœ Yisu.
2.4: Kolœ mbœrœ kœngba azu, endje lili kœwuta dœ she ɓa tshatshu Yisu nene. Endje ɔ, œ kɔrɔ ogoro ɓa pa anda kpœtœ osho á Yisu ká tœnœ yeka á yi uzunœ á ada ye tshu asœmœ dœ kondja nœ ye kɔ tara tœnœ ndjii ga tshatshu ye.
2.5: Yisu wu kœyindœrœ nœ endje, œ pa fœ uzunœ á ada ye tshu adœke: «Gbolo nœ mœ, mœ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ zœ ye.»
2.6: Anga aayi kœyisœ awa akwanœ á ndje lœ ga atɨ tœ œsœnœ tetœ kœgbetshelœ endje adœke:
2.7: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á uzunœ asœke œ pa mara o'o ata a? Asœke kœdœ kœgu œsœ́ Ndjaba nene a? Œɗe dá li tœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœ a; œ dœ́dœ́ Ndjaba kutɨ ye nene a?»
2.8: Yisu wu lima sœ gbetshelœ nœ endje kpa, á yu endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e gbe o'o tœ lɔsu 'e ataa a?
2.9: Kœpa fœ uzu adœke: “Mœ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ zœ ye”, too ndje kœpa adœke: “Aalafo, œ za kondja nœ zœ yé œ na ana”, o'o neketa dá ga a?
2.10: Mœ pa o'onœ asœke mbœrœ 'e kœwusœ nœ adœke kpœpa ɔshɔ asœke kɔ, Gbolo nœ uzu dá sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ mbœrœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœ». Yé á tshe kœpa fœ uzunœ á ada ye tshu adœke:
2.11: «Mœ pa fœ ɓœ, áalafo œ za kondja nœ zœ yé œ gu ga ndœ zœ!»
2.12: Gbɨkɨvwɨgbɨ, ayi koɓanœ aalafo, œ za kondja nœ ye, œ wuta ngarrr dœ ala azu kɔkɔ á endje sœ lima tœ œsœnœ. Œ te egerœ o'o lœma azu kɔ yé uvuru endje kpa lœ nœ. Endje donga Ndjaba, œ pa adœke: «A wuwu ɓa lima anga neke bale nene!» Yisu e Levi (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 9.9-13; Luk 5.27-32)
2.13: Yisu fatœ ye kœgu jerœ ngbɔlɔɔ tœ mangu Galilayi. Azu ndjoro na ga ndœ ye á tshe ka á sœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ endje.
2.14: Kœsœ kœdɨrœ ataa, Yisu wu anga uzu bale, ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Levi, gbolo nœ Alefe á tshe sœ ga atɨ ɓa tœ osho kœyɔ lapo. Yisu vwi o'o fœ she adœke: «Na manda mœ.» Levi áafo yé œ na manda ye.
2.15: Manda nœ, Yisu sœ kœzɨrœ ɓa sœnda nœ Levi. Azu kœko ngendja lapo ndjoro, dœ pe aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ sœ lima kœzɨ œrœnœ dœ she awa bale œdœ pe ayambarœ nœ ye, mbœrœ ɨlɨ azu á ndje sœ lima kœna manda ye kœdœ kolœ mara azunœ asœmœ.
2.16: Yé aayi kœyisœ awa akwa nœ Afarisayi wu Yisu kœzɨ œrœ awa bale dœ ayi kœko ngendja lapo dœ pe azu kœmbœrœ ekperœ, á yu ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á tshe zɨ œrœ kpœtœ œsœnœ bale dœ azu kœko ngendja lapo œdœ pe aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ a?»
2.17: Yisu dji ataa, œ gi o'o fœ endje adœke: «Azu neke á tshelœ akɔ endje sœ yerœ, endje mbœrœ ogo monganga nene kolœ ayi koɓa dá gbe ndœ kœna kœwu she. Mœ na kœ'e osho fœ azu á endje sœ ndjii nene, mœ na mbœrœ azu kœmbœrœ ekperœ.» Azu yu Yisu tœ upu kœyotshelœma (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 9.14-17; Luk 5.33-39)
2.18: Dœ anga ɔlɔ bale, ayambarœ nœ Yowane ayi kœza batisimu dœ pe endje nœ Afarisayi lœ lima kœyotshelœma endje mbœrœ Ndjaba yeka azu na kœyu Yisu adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á ayambarœ nœ Yowane ayi kœza batisimu dœ endje nœ Afarisayi œ yotshelœma endje mbœrœ Ndjaba yeka á endje nœ zœ vwara má tœ endje kœmbœrœ awa bale a?»
2.19: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Œdœ uzu kœto yashe á kœ'e anganœ ndœ angbonœ, endje yotshelœma endje ye a? Bale nene! Ɓata akɔ yashe sœ kpœtœ œsœnœ dœ endje, endje yotshelœma endje nene.
2.20: Kashe lɔkɔ á endje kœza akɔ yashenœ ugurutœ anganœ, ɔlɔnœ á endje yotshelœma dœmœ.
2.21: «Uzu zaza tafo lœba œ pi ga pa ongboro lœba nene. Œdœ tshe kœmbœrœ ataa, tafo ndœma lœbanœ œ suru tshelœ ongboronœ, yé ogoronœ œ kpa gerœ kœropa ongboro ogoronœ má utshunœ.
2.22: Awa bale, uzu susu tafo ipi va va va ga lœ ongboro anga nene. Ete nene œ kœsœ adœke ipinœ yuuyu, tshelœ anga œ kpa kiri kiri; á kœde, ipinœ œ tu kpa ga lœ ɔshɔ. Ipi dœ anga kɔkɔ œ ro ye, a wusœ nœ adœke tafo ipi li dœ tafo anga.» Yisu kœdœ ayengɔ lɔkɔ sabata (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 12.1-8; Luk 6.1-5)
2.23: Dœ anga lɔkɔ sabata bale, Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye ro tɔ lœ kɨndɨ ble. Ayambarœ nœ ye yopa kœsɔ ogboro kumu ble na tœnœ ɨndɨrɨ ala awa.
2.24: Yé Afarisayi yu she adœke: «Wu œneke kane, mbœrœ gaɗe á ayambarœ nœ zœ œ mbœrœ œrœ neke á lili adœke azu mbœrœ dœ olo sabata nene a?»
2.25: Yisu gi o'o fœ endje adœke: «'E dɨdɨ damba la mbeti dœ ádá œrœ á Davidi mbœrœ lima, dœ ɔlɔnœ á ogo li tœ ye dœ azu nœ ye á endje gugu dœ kœzɨrœ nene a?
2.26: Tshe li ɓa lœ anda nœ Ndjaba, á zɨ rœgo á endje ko fœ Ndjaba dœ lɔkɔ nœ Abiatare á li kolœnœ adœke egerœ nganga Ndjaba kœzɨ, á Davidi zɨ yeka á kpa to ndje udunœ fœ azu nœ ye.»
2.27: Yisu kpa pa fœ endje adœke: «Ndjaba mbœrœ lɔkɔ sabata mbœrœ uzu, tshe mbœmbœrœ uzu mbœrœ lɔkɔ sabata nene.
2.28: 'E wu ádánœ á sœ adœke Gbolo nœ uzu kœdœ ayengɔ lɔkɔ sabata.»

3.1: Ɔlɔ bale, Yisu kpa li ga lœ Sinagoga, œ gbɔ anga uzu á kane ye tshu.
3.2: Azu á ndje lœ lima tœ œsœnœ, mesho lima lœ ala endje kœwu too Yisu œ she uzunœ asœmœ dœ lɔkɔ sabata, yeka á œne kœgbɔ awa kœtɔ meza pa ye.
3.3: Yé Yisu pa fœ uzunœ á kane ye tshu adœke: «Aalafo, œ na œ ka kpœgurunœ.»
3.4: Tshe yu azunœ adœke: «Lɔkɔ sabata yindœ nœ adœke azu mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ too ekperœ? Lɔkɔ sabata yindœ kœshe uzu too kœkatœ ye adœke tshe tshu?» Endje ngbɔ kɔkɔ œ lœ ko ko ko.
3.5: Yisu shokɔ endje vwirrr, tshelœ ye voro tœ endje kɔ kɔ kɔ. Tshe sœ lima dœ adja oyo tœ lɔsu ye tœ kœwu ɔgbɔ lɔsu nœ endje, yé œ pa fœ ayi koɓanœ adœke: «Yɔrɔ tshelœ kane zœ!» Tshe yɔrɔ tshelœnœ yé tœ farapu, kane ye gumatœ ye ngbewo.
3.6: Afarisayi wuta kɔ lœ anda ngbɔtœ, œ ngbɔtœ endje pe kpœtœmœ dœ azu nœ Erode kœvwarandœ o'o tœ kœpara awa ndœ kœwo she dœ Yisu. Azu ndjoro na ga ndœ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 4.25; 12.15-16; Luk 6.17-19)
3.7: Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye áalafo œ gitœ endje kœna ga tœ mangu Galilayi. Azu ndjoro lœ ogo Galilayi na manda ye. Anga endje to lœ ogo Yuda,
3.8: dœ Yerusaleme, ɓa lœ ogo Idume, œdœ ogonœ á sœ ɓa atshi Yɔrdane, dœ ogonœ á sœ mashenga dœ tshalakpɨ Tire dœ Sidona. Azu na lima ndjoro ga ndœ Yisu mbœrœ endje dji lima o'o tœ upu œneke kɔ á tshe sœ lima kœmbœrœ tœnœ.
3.9: Yé Yisu pa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke endje gumasœ aya agba bale ndœ ana mbœrœ adœke azu kœpoporo œne nene.
3.10: Gbambanœ nene, tshe she lima azu tɔpanœ kpuru yeka á endjeneke á endje lœpe dœ koɓa sœ kœgbugburutshelœtœ endje adœke œne goro she yeka á kœshe.
3.11: Œdœ ndje endjeneke á ndje sœ lima dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ, endje kœwu she, endje sœ lima kœyo ga tœ koda ye dœ kœve rawa adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba.»
3.12: Yisu rá endje adœke endje papandœ nœ fœ uzu bale nene. Yisu ke aayi avwa nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bisha (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 10.1-4; Luk 6.12-16)
3.13: Manda nœ Yisu ɔ ga pa kaga, œ e azu neke á tshe yindœ endje kœna ga ndœ ye.
3.14: Tshe ke endje ndjokpa dœ bisha yé œ fa endje tœ «ayi avwa» nœ ye. Tshe ke endje kœsœ awa bale dœ she, tœ kœvwa endje ndœ kœyisœ œrœ,
3.15: œdœ ndje pe kœza gbɔgbɔ kœgɔrɔ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa azu fœ endje.
3.16: Ɨ'ɨrɨ aayi avwanœ ndjokpa dœ bisha kœdœ: Shimu (á Yisu za anga ɨ'ɨrɨ ye ga panœ adœke Petro),
3.17: Jake œdœ ayanœ dœ Yowane (endje bisha kœdœ agbolo nœ Zebedayi, Yisu tá ɨ'ɨrɨ endje adœke Boaneregese, ádánœ adœke, agbolo nœ kœsɔ yavuru),
3.18: dœ Andere, Filipo, Bartelemi, Matie, Toma, Jake tshenœ Alefe, Tade, Shimu uzu Kanana,
3.19: dœ Yudasi Isikariote, œshe dá ka lima Yisu. Yisu œdœ Belezebula (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 12.22-32; Luk 11.14-23; 12.10)
3.20: Yisu gu ga sœnda yé azu ndjoro kpa ngbɔtœ endje dji she. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, tshe gbɔgbɔ awa kœzɨrœ teasho œdœ ndje ayambarœ nœ ye nene.
3.21: Aayanœ dji ataa œ ngbɔtœ endje, œ na manda ye ndœ kœto she mbœrœ endje gbe adœke: «Kumu ye djingili ye.»
3.22: Aayi kœyisœ awa akwa á endje to ɓa lœ Yerusaleme pa fœ endje adœke: «Belezebula gbozu nœ ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ pa ye. Œshe dá za gbɔgbɔ fœ she tœ kœgɔrɔ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa azu asœmœ.»
3.23: Yisu e endje, œ pa fœ endje lœ gbaguru adœke: «Kotoo á Satana œ gɔrɔ undu ye dœ tœ ye a?
3.24: Œ kœsœ adœke azu lœ ogo bale kœndjɔtshelœtœ endje, ogonœ œ kpa dœ ogo nene.
3.25: Œdœ azu lœ mazungu kœsœ dœ o'o lœ oporo tœ endje, mazungunœ œ sœpe nene.
3.26: Œ kœsœ adœke Satana sœ kœnga koshe dœ azu nœ ye too œ kœsœ ndje adœke azu nœ ye kurutshelœtœ endje, gbɔgbɔ ye œ ka, yé œndœ ye œ dɨ nene.
3.27: «Uzu á tshe kœyindœ kœli kœzɨ angba œrœ nœ ayi gbɔgbɔ, œ li adœke tshe i she vwagbagba ga tœnœ dœ uwu yeka á kœko œrœ nœ ye.
3.28: Mœ pa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke Ndjaba œ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ azu kɔkɔ dœ pe o'o ama endje á ndje pa.
3.29: Kashe uzu neke á tshe kœpa ekpe o'o goro œsœ́ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ, Ndjaba œ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ ye teasho nene mbœrœ tshe mbœrœ ekperœ.»
3.30: Yisu mɨ lima ndœ nœ fœ endje ataa, mbœrœ endje pa lima adœke: «Ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ pa ye.» Ayi Yisu dœ aaya nœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 12.46-50; Luk 8.19-21)
3.31: Dœ anga ɔlɔ bale, ayi Yisu dœ pe aayanœ na, œ sœpe ɓa shu œ vwa uzu kœ'e she fœ endje.
3.32: Azu ndjoro á ndje lœ atɨ kœdji she pa fœ she adœke: «Oro osho kane! Ayi zœ dœ aaya zœ sœ kœpara ɓœ ɓa shu.»
3.33: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Œɗe kœdœ ayi mœ a? Œɗe kœdœ aya mœ a?»
3.34: Tshe shokɔ endje á ndje lœ ga atɨ kœdji she karrr, œ pa fœ endje adœke: «'E wu ayi mœ œdœ aaya mœ; endje dá lœ atɨ asœke.
3.35: Uzu neke á tshe mbœrœ œneke kɔ á Ndjaba yindœ nœ, uzunœ kœdœ aya mœ, yingɔ mœ œdœ ndje pe ayi mœ.»

4.1: Yisu kpa kwatœ ye ndœ kœyisœ œrœ ɓa tœ mangu Galilayi. Azu ndjoro ngbɔtœ endje tœ kœdji she. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, tshe na œ ɔ ga lœ agba á sœ ga atɨ yeka azu ka yaba yaba ga tœ ɔshɔ tœ makaga ungunœ á lœ tœ kœdji she.
4.2: Tshe yi lima sœ œrœ ndjoro fœ endje lœ ndœma toro. Lœ kœyisœrœ nœ ye, tshe pa adœke:
4.3: «E dji mœ dœ ɔshɔnœ! Anga uzu bale na lima ndœ kœlu ngwarœ ga lœ kɨndɨ nœ ye.
4.4: Ɓata á tshe sœ kœlu ngwarœ natœnœ, anga indjinœ yo ga ɨndɨrɨ ama awa, ayanu wu œ de.
4.5: Anga indjinœ yo ga lœ oporo badja. Œ ko gbaa, kashe œ totoro kœgerœ tœnœ mbœrœ adœke ɔshɔ mimi tœ oshonœ nene.
4.6: Ɓata ɔlɔ tɔ vwege vwege, œ ɔrɔ mbœrœ awa adœke eshenœ li ɔshɔ gugu nene.
4.7: Anga indjinœ yo ga lœ ishi. Ishinœ gerœ œ ropa ɔtshɔ ngwarœnœ yé awa adœke œ le gugu nene.
4.8: Anganœ yo ga lœ ɔtshɔ ɔshɔ. Œ ko, œ gerœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Œ zu tshelœtœ endje, œ le zazu bale dœ ndjokpa (30), anganœ le zazu votɔ (60), anganœ kama bale (100).»
4.9: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ utu kœdji dœ o'o, kaka tshe dji.» Mbœrœ gaɗe á Yisu œ yisœ œrœ lœ ndœma toro a? (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 13.10-17; Luk 8.9-10)
4.10: Ɔlɔnœ á Yisu gi lima tœ ye tœ azu á sœ kutɨ ye, endje á ndje sœ lima kœna manda ye dœ pe ayambarœ nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bisha gitœ endje ga ɨndɨrɨ ye tœ kœyu she tœ ádá ndœma toronœ á tshe pa má asœmœ.
4.11: Yé tshe gi o'o fœ endje adœke: «Mbœrœ e'e, Ndjaba yisœ ádá o'o Ogo gbozu nœ ye á zatœ endje yiwa tœnœ fœ 'e yé, kashe anga azu á ndje lœ ɓa shu, endje dji o'o kɔ kolœ ɓata ndœma toro gbambanœ,
4.12: mbœrœ adœke endje li kœtondœ œrœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ kashe endje wu nene, yé endje li kœdji o'o dœ ɔtshɔnœ kashe endje za tshelœ katanœ kporo nene, ete nene endje fa má tshalɔsu endje yé Ndjaba œ yindœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ endje.» Yisu pandœ ádá ndœma toro nœ ayi kœlu ngwarœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 13.18-23; Luk 8.11-15)
4.13: Manda nœ, tshe kpa kœyu endje adœke: «E djidji tshelœ kata ndœma toronœ asœke nene a? Atamœ 'e wu má sœ ádá anga udunœ koto o?
4.14: Ayi kœlu ngwarœ nœ asœmœ kœdœ ayi kœyisœ O'o ama Ndjaba fœ azu.
4.15: Anga azu lœ ɓata ama awa. O'o ama Ndjaba na ga ndœ endje ɓata indji ngwarœ á yo ga tœ ala awa. Endje kœdji O'o ama Ndjaba, Satana na œ kakara tœ lɔsu endje.
4.16: Anga azu lœ ndje ɓata indji ngwarœ œneke á yo ga lœ djeere badja. Ɔlɔ á endje kœdji O'o ama Ndjaba, endje yindœ nœ katsha dœ yanga,
4.17: kashe œndœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje œ dɨ nene mbœrœ eshe endje lili ɔshɔ nene. Endje lili kœla banga mbœrœ O'o ama Ndjaba nene œdœ o'o kœna ga ndœ endje yeka á endje ka ngbɨrɨ lœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje nene.
4.18: Anga azu lœ ɓata indji ngwarœ œneke á yo ga lœ ishi. Endje dji O'o ama Ndjaba dœ ɔtshɔnœ,
4.19: kashe oyo tshapashɔnœ asœke, yanga kœgbɔrœ á sœ kœfara azu, dœ pe tshelœ áká gbetshelœ kɔkɔ á zuzu tœ lɔsu endje. Tœnœ kɔ dá ndɨ tshelœ O'o ama Ndjaba. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, awa adœke endje mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ gugu nene.
4.20: Anganœ yo ga lœ ɔtshɔ ɔshɔ. Ɔtshɔ ɔshɔnœ kœdœ azu neke á ndje dji O'o ama Ndjaba á gbɔndœ nœ ga tœ lɔsu endje, á matœ endje dœ ɔtshɔ akwa manda kœdji o'onœ. Endje kœdœ ngwarœ neke á gerœ berea berea, œ le zazu bale dœ ndjokpa (30), anganœ zazu votɔ (60), yé anganœ ndje kama bale (100).» O'o tœ upu nœ miinda (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 8.16-18)
4.21: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Uzu kœta owo ga tœ miinda, tshe za ga tshakudu lɔsú too ɓa tshakudu kelekpa a? Endje za miinda ɓa pa gbarœ kœza miinda ga panœ, œ sœsœ atamœ nene a?
4.22: Kolœnœ ataa, o'o á zatœ endje yiwa tœnœ, œ matœ endje ngbɨɨ dœ eshenœ kɔkɔ.
4.23: Uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ utu nœ kœdji dœ o'o, kaka tshe dji!»
4.24: Yisu kpa mɨndœ nœ fœ endje adœke: «'E gbe dœ o'onœ á 'e dji asœke. Kolœ awa bale ɓata á 'e sœ kœzatœ 'e fœ azu, awa bale Ndjaba œ to ɔtshɔrœ fœ 'e tɔpanœ kpɔlirɔ.
4.25: Gbambanœ nene, œshe á tshe kœsœ dœ œrœ ndjoro, endje za anganœ ga pa nœ; tsheneke á tshe kœgugu dœ œrœ nene, endje ko œneke teasho á sœpe tshakane ye.» O'o mbœrœ ngwarœ á gerœ kutɨ ye
4.26: Yisu kpa pa adœke: «Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba sœ ɓata uzu lu ngwarœ ga lœ ɔshɔ.
4.27: Uzu á tshe lu ngwarœ lo olo dœ butshɔ œ na ana dœ ɔlɔ. Ɔlɔ kœwuta ngwarœ dœ pe kœgerœ tœnœ, ayi kœlu ngwarœnœ wuwusœ nœ bale nene.
4.28: Ɔshɔ mbœrœ kotoo á ngwarœ œ gere a? Utshunœ kɔ, ungbu ngwarœnœ œ wuta yekane á manda nœ elenœ œ u. Tœ votɔnœ á kakonœ œ vuru lœ kumunœ yeka á tetœ kœgerœ tœnœ.
4.29: Ɔlɔ á elenœ kœgbɔ yeka á azu œ na kœwa tœnœ, kœvere too kœkɔ tœnœ mbœrœ olonœ li ye.» O'o mbœrœ ele mutarde (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 13.31-32; Luk 13.18-19)
4.30: Yisu kpa yu osho adœke: «Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba sœ koto o? Ndœma toro gaɗe dá li dœ tœnœ adœke a kœdji a?
4.31: Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba sœ ɓata ele mutarde. Œ kœdœ kœlu tœnœ, elenœ sœ teasho ga tshakudu leyɔ kɔ pa ɔshɔ.
4.32: Manda kœlu tœnœ œ kœko, œ zutshelœtœ ye. Œ gerœ tœ ɨngɨrɨnœ kœropa kako dɔngɔ para kɔkɔ lœ kɨndɨ. Ganeanœ œ gboro tœ ɔtshɔnœ kœli adœke ayanu mbœrœ koma endje ga tshakudunœ.»
4.33: Yisu yisœ œrœ fœ azu lœ ndœma toro ndjoro ɓata œneke mbœrœ adœke endje kœdji ádá o'onœ á œne sœ tœ kœpa fœ endje.
4.34: Tshe sœ lima kpalakpala kœpa o'o ko dœ ndœma toro kashe endje kœsœ kolœnœ dœ ayambarœ nœ ye yeka á tshe gbara ala o'onœ ngbɨɨ fœ endje. Yisu rá yugu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 8.23-27; Luk 8.22-25)
4.35: Kolœ dœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, dœ ɔgbɔ kɨdala, Yisu pa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke œne zu ga atshi egerœ ungu adanga.
4.36: Ataa endje ka lima tœ azu tɨ, œ za Yisu dœ agba neke á tshe sœ lima lœnœ yé anga angbɨ agba lœ lima ɨndɨrɨ nœ.
4.37: Ɓata á endje sœ lima kœzu ungu, ndavuru yugu za gu tœnœ kpɨkpɨkpɨ. Loko na, yakpa ungu tu yé œ ɔ dœ agba tshé tshé tshé, agba yindœ kœnduru tœnœ.
4.38: Yisu sœ ɓa tœ budu agba, œ za kumu ye ga pa tɨkumu, œ lo ye. Ayambarœ nœ ye jo she œ pa fœ she adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, á tshu ke a! Ɓœ gbe kotoo dœ œrœ á mbœrœ dœ kumu azœ asœke a?»
4.39: Yisu jo lœ olo, œ gbagbara yugu, œ pa fœ ungu adœke: «Tuturu nene! Sœ koko!» Tshelœ yugu wa ngbewo yé osho yi tá.
4.40: Yisu yu ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe awa sœ tœ 'e ata a? 'E gugu dœ kœyindœrœ nene a?»
4.41: Uvuru endje i lima gara yeka endje sœ lima kœvwi o'o ugurutœ endje adœke: «Tsheneke kœdœ ɗe yeka á ungu dœ pe yugu kɔ œ dji she atake a?»

5.1: Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye zu ga tshi Galilayi ɓa tœ ogo nœ Ageresaye.
5.2: Kœjerœ kolœ ga atɨ lœ agba atake, anga yakoshe á tshe sœ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa ye to ɓa pa udu akuzu, œ na para tshatshu ye.
5.3: Tshe sœ lima kœsœ sheko ɓa pa udu akuzu yé uzu bale pa ashɔ á tshe li tœ kœi she ga tœnœ gugu nene. Œdœ ndje dœ djingiri gbaa, œ mbœrœ œrœ bale tœ ye nene.
5.4: Mbœrœ kpala kpala endje i lima ada ye dœ uwu aza, œ i kane ye dœ djingiri, kashe tshe sœ kœsɔtshelœ nœ kɔ. Ayi gbɔgbɔ á tshe li tœ kœza she para adœke tshe kœmɔ too gugu bale nene.
5.5: Butshɔ dœ ɔlɔ kɔ, tshe sœ lima kœsœ waa ɓa pa udu akuzu œdœ pe ɓa pa kaga kœta rawa œdœ kœgbi kotœ ye dœ badja.
5.6: Ɓata á tshe wu Yisu lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ, tshe kpa dœ ɔrɔ œ gote ga utshu ye.
5.7: Œ ve rawa dœ ɔgbɔ adœke: «Yisu Gbolo nœ Ndjaba ɓa lafo, ɓœ yindœ kœmbœrœ gaɗe tœ mœ a? Mœ kɨ fœ ɓœ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Ndjaba adœke ɓœ gágága kumu mœ nene!»
5.8: Tshe kɨ lima ataa mbœrœ Yisu pa lima fœ she adœke: «Ekpe ɨshirɨ, wuta lœ uzunœ asœke!»
5.9: Yé Yisu yu she adœke: «Ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ kœdœ ɗe?» Tshe gi fœ she adœke: «Ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ kœdœ Kœngba, gbambanœ nene 'a sœ azu ndjoro.»
5.10: Tshe kɨ dœ ɔgbɔ, œ pa fœ Yisu adœke tshe vwavwa œne ga lœ angbɨ ogo nene.
5.11: Egerœ ukpulu akɔso lœ lima kœzɨrœ tœ ada kaga.
5.12: Atamœ ekpe ɨshirɨnœ kɨ fœ Yisu adœke: «Vwa 'a dœ́ 'a na œ li ga lœ akɔso.»
5.13: Yisu za awa fœ endje yé endje wuta lœ uzunœ, œ kpa œ li ga lœ ukpulu akɔso. Endje lœ lima kutu bisha (2.000) á to ɓa pa kaga yeka á tara uru uru gu ga la ngu, á nduru kɔkɔ.
5.14: Aayi kœgbɔndœ akɔsonœ kpagu lima dœ ɔrɔ ndœ kœpandœ œsœ œrœ á mbœrœtœ endje fœ azu lœ kɨndɨ wuta tœnœ kpaa ga lakpɨ, yé azu ndjoro na lima ndœ kœwu œrœnœ á wuta asœmœ.
5.15: Endje na ndoo dœ Yisu á wu yakoshenœ á tshe sœ lima dœ aekpe ɨshirɨ ndjoro pa ye asœmœ. Tshe sœ kpakparakpa dœ budu ye ga atɨ, œ verœ lœba ga tœ ye á sœ ko ko ko. Awa za azu kɔ.
5.16: Azu á ndje wu lima œrœ á mbœrœ fœ uzunœ á ekpe ɨshirɨnœ sœ lima pa ye œdœ pe tœ upu nœ akɔsonœ asœmœ, mɨndœ œsœnœ fœ anga endje.
5.17: Endje kɨ ga tœ Yisu adœke tshe gitœ ye lœ ogo nœ œne ye.
5.18: Kœgu Yisu ndœ kœɔ ga lœ agba, uzu ekpe ɨshirɨ sœmœ kɨ ga tœ ye adœke œdœ tshe kœyindœ nœ œne gu dœ she awa bale.
5.19: Kashe Yisu yiyindœ nœ nene á pa fœ she adœke: «Gu ga ndœ ayo zœ, œ pandœ œneke á Gbozu Ndjaba wu oyo zœ á mbœrœ fœ ɓœ.»
5.20: Yakoshenœ gu lima œ tetœ kœmɨndœ œneke kɔ á Yisu mbœrœ fœ she tara tœnœ ngbɔlɔɔ lœ ogo á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Tshalakpɨ Ndjokpa. Œ fa o'o gooo na tœnœ lœ ama azu kɔ yi kumu anda yi budu nœ. Yisu shé yawuru nœ Jaeruse dœ pe yashe koɓa indji (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 9.18-26; Luk 8.40-56)
5.21: Yisu kpa zu ungu dœ agba. Kœwuta she ɓa atshinœ ataa, azu ngbɔtœ endje ndjoro dji she ɓa tœ makaga ungunœ.
5.22: Anga gbozu tshapa Sinagoga á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Jaeruse na, œ wu Yisu, œ gote ga utshu ye,
5.23: á kɨ ga tœ ye adœke: «Yawuru nœ mœ ndo dœ kuzu. Wu oyo mœ dœ́ œ to kane zœ ga pa ye, tshe she œ sœ dœ soro.»
5.24: Yisu yindœ nœ, œ gu tœ awa bale dœ she. Azu ndjoro te manda ye œ sœ kœgoro she na tœnœ.
5.25: Anga yashe bale dœ koɓa indji sœ ndje lima ugurutœ azunœ. Tshe lo lima dœ koɓa indjinœ ungu ndjokpa dœ bisha,
5.26: tshe wu oyo kœkɔrɔ tœ awa azu kœshe she yé œ ndɨ ngendja nœ ye kɔkɔ gbambanœ. Koɓanœ kpa oma dœ ɔgbɔnœ, ga pa nœ dœmœ tshelœ akɔ ye kakara nene.
5.27: Tshe dji ndœ œsœ Yisu, œ na ga lœ oporo tœ azu. Œ gba dœ ɔgɔ ye œrrr á goro lœba nœ ye.
5.28: Mbœrœ tshe gbe lima adœke: «Œdœ mœ kœgoro kolœ lœba nœ ye, koɓa nœ mœ œ ka.»
5.29: Petœ œsœnœ koɓa indji nœ ye voro kpa yé tshe wusœ nœ adœke œne she ye.
5.30: Trale Yisu wu lima adœke anga gbɔgbɔ wuta lœ œne. Á fatœ ye karrr á yu osho adœke: «Œɗe dá turutœ lœba mœ a?»
5.31: Ayambarœ nœ ye gi o'o fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ wuwu azu ndjoro á ndje sœ kœro dara ɓœ asœke nene yeka á yu 'a adœke œɗe dá turutœ lœba nœ zœ a?»
5.32: Ataa gbaa, Yisu para osho djitœ ye tshakpata kœwu uzu á tshe mbœrœ œrœ asœmœ.
5.33: Yashe koɓanœ de gbara gbara gbara dœ awa mbœrœ á tshe wusœ œrœ á mbœrœtœ endje fœ she. Tshe na œ te ga utshu Yisu œ pandœ adja o'o kɔ fœ she.
5.34: Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Gbolo nœ mœ, kœyindœrœ nœ zœ she ɓœ ye; gu dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Koɓa nœ zœ ka ye.»
5.35: Damba o'o sœpe lœma Yisu, azu to ɓa sœnda nœ gbozu Jaeruse, œ pa fœ she adœke: «Gbolo yawuru nœ zœ tshu ye. Ádá kœndanga ayi kœyisœrœ kœdœ gaɗe?»
5.36: Kashe Yisu gbegbe dœ o'onœ asœmœ nene, œ pa fœ Jaeruse adœke: «Awa zaza ɓœ nene, sœ kolœ dœ kœyindœrœ.»
5.37: Tshe pakata udu azu kɔ kœna dœ she, œ za awa kolœ fœ Petro, dœ Jake œdœ pe ayanœ dœ Yowane.
5.38: Kœwuta endje ɓa sœnda nœ Jaeruse, Yisu wu ɨgbɨ, œ dji tshama azu ndjoro kœkɨ dœ rawa dœ ɔgbɔnœ.
5.39: Tshe li ga sœndanœ, œ yu endje adœke: «Ádá ɨkɨ dœ rawa nœ 'e kœdœ gaɗe? Gbolonœ tshutshu nene, tshe sœ tœ olo.»
5.40: Endje tetœ kœmɔ she. Tshe gɔrɔ endje kɔ ga ushu, œ sœpe kolœ dœ aba gbolo, dœ ayinœ œdœ pe dœ ayambarœ nœ ye votɔ. Endje li ɓa tœ osho á oko gbolonœ sœ tœnœ.
5.41: Tshe to kane ye ga pa gbolonœ, œ e she adœke: «Talita kumi!» (Ádánœ adœke: «Yawuru, mœ pa fœ ɓœ adœke ɓœ áalafo!»)
5.42: Trale gbolo áafo œ tetœ ana (gbolo nœ ungu ndjokpa dœ bisha). Azu wu atamœ, œ te o'o gooo lœ ama endje natœnœ djezœ.
5.43: Kashe Yisu kɔ endje dœ ɔgbɔ adœke endje papandœ nœ fœ uzu bale nene. Tshe pa fœ endje adœke endje para kœzɨrœ fœ she.

6.1: Yisu katœ oshonœ asœmœ tɨ œ gu ga lakpɨ á tshe gerœ lœnœ yé ayambarœ nœ ye na manda ye.
6.2: Dœ lɔkɔ sabata, tshe tetœ kœyisœ œrœ ɓa lœ Sinagoga. Œ za awa fœ azu ndjoro á ndje sœ kœdji she, yé endje yu osho adœke: «Asœke kpa to kpœta a? Tshe kpa gbɔ kœwusœrœ œneke ɓa ndœ ɗe? Tshe gbɔ awa afá neke ɓata ma a?
6.3: Œ dœ́dœ́ she kœdœ ayi kœguma maɓaya nene a, gbolo nœ Mareya, aya Jake, dœ Joze, dœ Shimu œdœ ndje Yuda nene a? Ayingɔnœ lœlœ kpœ ndœ azœ kpœke nene a?» Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, endje vwara lima tœ endje tœ kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye.
6.4: Yeka á Yisu gi o'o fœ endje adœke: «Endje lɨsœ́ ayi kœgbara o'o tœ osho kɔ. Kolœ ɓa sœnda nœ ye, ugurutœ ayanœ dœ ayingɔnœ, lœ mara ye dá endje lɨlɨsœ́ ye nene.»
6.5: Yisu lili lima kœmbœrœ afá lœ Nazarete nene. Kolœ gbadjagara anga azu á ndje sœ dœ koɓa dá tshe to kane ye ga pa endje á endje she kɔ lœ koɓa nœ endje.
6.6: Yé ɔgbɔ lɔsu nœ endje za lima awa fœ Yisu waa. Yisu vwa ayambarœ nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bisha (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 9.35; 10.1-15; Luk 9.1-6) Manda nœ, Yisu na kœyisœrœ djelœ ogo kɔ á lœ dje ɨndɨrɨ tœ endje.
6.7: Tshe e ayambarœ nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bisha, œ tetœ kœvwa endje bisha dœ bisha, œ za gbɔgbɔ kœropa ekpe ɨshirɨ fœ endje.
6.8: Œ za o'o fœ endje adœke: «'E zaza œrœ potœ 'e lœ ananœ nene, 'e za kolœ tshɔngbɔlɔ bale. Œdœ rœgo, œdœ ngbade too ngendja, 'e zaza œrœ bale ga lœ uwu tœ 'e nene.
6.9: 'E verœ œrada nœ 'e ga tœ ada 'e kashe 'e koko lœba bisha nene.»
6.10: Tshe kpa pa fœ endje adœke: «Œ kœsœ adœke 'e wuta ɓa lakpɨ ogo bale, 'e lo kolœ lœ anda á ndje yisœ nœ fœ 'e œrrr ga tœ ɔlɔ á 'e katœ tshakpœtœmœ tɨ.
6.11: Á œ kœsœ ndje adœke anga azu tshalakpɨ bale kœvwaratœ endje tœ kœza osho kœsœ fœ 'e too tœ kœdji o'o ama 'e; 'e katœ tshalakpɨnœ tɨ. Tœ kœma fœ endje adœke endje mbœrœ ekperœ, 'e gɔrɔ trusha tshada 'e tɨ kpœtœmœ.»
6.12: Ayambarœ nœ ye na kœyisœrœ fœ azu adœke: «'E fatshalɔsu 'e.»
6.13: Endje gɔrɔ lima ekpe ɨshirɨ ndjoro pa azu, yé œ tá kada ga tœ aayi koɓa ndjoro á she endje. Kuzu Yowane ayi kœza batisimu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 14.1-12; Luk 9.7-9)
6.14: Dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, gbozugo Erode dji o'o dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu mbœrœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye za osho kɔ. Endje gbe lima tœ ye adœke: «Yowane ayi kœza batisimu dá wuta lœ akuzu, ádánœ á tshe sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ tœ kœfa œrœ dœmœ.»
6.15: Anga endje adœke: «Eliya dœmœ.» Yé ɨlɨ udu endje pa œnœ endje adœke: «Tshe kœdœ ayi kœgbara o'o ama Ndjaba ɓata ongboro anga endje á ndje gbara lima utshunœ.»
6.16: Erode dji o'onœ ataa œ pa ngbewo adœke: «Adja Yowane ayi kœza batisimu á mœ wa lima ɨgɨ ye dá wuta lœ akuzu asœmœ.»
6.17: Erode vwa lima aturugu nœ ye adœke endje za she œ i she dœ djingiri, yé œ vwi she ga lœ kánga mbœrœ upu nœ Erodiade, awo ayanœ dœ Filipo á tshe to lima she.
6.18: Gbambanœ nene, Yowane pa lima fœ Erode adœke: «Œ lili dœ ɓœ adœke ɓœ ka ga tœ awo aya zœ nene.»
6.19: Mbœrœ o'onœ asœke, Erodiade za lima ókó Yowane ga lœ ye, œ yi lima ndœ kœwo she kashe awa gugu damba lima tœ ye nene.
6.20: Gbambanœ nene, Erode sœ lima kœlɨsœ Yowane mbœrœ tshe wu lima sœnœ adœke tshe kœdœ uzu á tshe sœ ndjii œdœ yerœ, yé tshe sœ lima kœgbɔndœ ye. Dœ lɔndɔ á Erode kœsœ lima kœdji Yowane, tshe wuwu lima sœ œrœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ nene. Ataa atamœ ndje gbaa, tshe sœ lima dœ ogo kœdji she.
6.21: Andaa anga olo bale, awa kɔrɔ fœ Erodiade dœ lɔkɔ angbo kœzu Erode. Erode e angbo kœgbe dœ olo kœzu she. Tshe e agbozu kumu akwa nœ ye dœ pe endje nœ tshapa aturugu œdœ ndje pe agbozu tshapa ogo Galilayi á kœkurutshelœ yanga nœ ye dœ endje.
6.22: Yawuru nœ Erodiade li ɓa sœnda, œ vitœ ye yé œ ga tœ Erode dœ azu á tshe e endje ndœ angbonœ tɔpanœ kpuru. Á gbozugo Erode pa fœ yawuru sœmœ adœke: «Yɔndœ œrœ kɔ á ɓœ yindœ nœ, dœ mœ za fœ ɓœ.»
6.23: Erode wa ɨgɨ ye dœ ɔshɔ adœke: «Œrœ neke kɔ á ɓœ e osho ndœ nœ, mœ ko fœ ɓœ. Œdœ ɓœ kœgbe ndje dœ tshakala ogo á mœ sœ pa nœ, mœ wa fœ ɓœ.»
6.24: Yawuru wuta œ yu ayinœ adœke: «Œrœ gaɗe dá mœ kœ'e osho ndœ nœ a?» Ayinœ gi fœ she adœke: «E osho ndœ kumu Yowane, ayi kœza batisimu.»
6.25: Yawuru gbɔgbɔtœ ye wuta tœnœ ga tshatshu gbozugo Erode, œ pa fœ she adœke: «Mœ yindœ nœ adœke ɓœ za kumu Yowane, ayi kœza batisimu ga lœ kalango ngɔngɔ asœke fœ mœ.»
6.26: Œ za lima oyo tœ lɔsu Erode tœ kœdji ata. Yé awa kœfa o'o gugu lima nene mbœrœ á tshe wa lima ɨgɨ ye utshu azu kɔ á tshe e lima endje ndœ angbo nœ ye.
6.27: Pe kpœtœmœ, tshe vwa anga turugu adœke tshe na œ gu dœ kumu Yowane fœ œne. Turugunœ na ɓa lœ kánga, œ wa ɨgɨ Yowane,
6.28: œ za kumu ye ga lœ kalango, œ gu dœ tœnœ fœ yawurunœ á tshe za fœ ayinœ.
6.29: Ayambarœ nœ Yowane dji o'onœ atamœ, œ na œ za oko ye á shi ɓa lœ udu. Yisu to rœgo fœ azu kutu mindu (5.000) (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 14.13-21; Luk 9.10-17; Yow 6.1-14)
6.30: Aayi avwanœ fatœ endje gu ga ndœ Yisu, œ pandœ œneke kɔ á ndje mbœrœ lœ ana kœyisœrœ nœ endje kɔ fœ she.
6.31: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «'E nɔtœ 'e ngerrr ga mabunœ œ yatœ 'e teasho kane.» Mbœrœ azu lœ lima kœdaratœ endje tɔpanœ kpuru, anga ndje kœna anga ndje kœgu á awa adœke Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye yi anga œrœ hiaru ga lœ ama endje gugu nene.
6.32: Endje ɔ ga lœ agba, œ gitœ endje ga tœ osho á azu gugu lima tœnœ nene.
6.33: Azu ndjoro wu endje kœna tœnœ atamœ, œ vwanga endje dœ ada endje yé á wuta ɓa tœ oshonœ á endje sœ kœna ga tœnœ.
6.34: Kœjerœ Yisu lœ agba atake, tshe wu azu ndjoro, œ za oyo fœ she tœ lɔsu ye mbœrœ endje sœ ɓata apata neke á ayengɔ endje gugu nene, á tshe tetœ kœyisœ œrœ ndjoro fœ endje.
6.35: Ɓata ɔlɔ ro ye, ayambarœ nœ ye gitœ endje ndoo dœ she, œ pa fœ she adœke: «Orosho, asœ kœdœ tshelœ kpagagasho, ɔlɔ ro yé a lœpe kpœke.
6.36: Pandœ nœ fœ azunœ ndjoro asœke adœke endje wuta ga lakpɨ too ga lœ kɨndɨ ɨndɨrɨ tœ azœ œ para kœzɨrœ.»
6.37: Yé Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «'E para rœgo dœ tœ 'e á kœto fœ endje.» Endje pa fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ yindœ nœ adœke a na œ yɔ mapa ndœ denari kama bisha yekane á kœto fœ endje a?»
6.38: Á Yisu kœyu endje adœke: «'E sœ dœ mapa kotoo? 'E na dœ́ wu kane.» Endje na œ dɨ, œ pa fœ she adœke: «A sœ dœ mapa mindu dœ ageatshalangu bisha.»
6.39: Yisu pa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «'E pa fœ endje adœke endje kputœ endje ga atɨ ga pa gusu.»
6.40: Endje lœ ga atɨ œ kputœ endje ga tœnœ kama bale (100), anga endje zazu bisha dœ ndjokpa (50).
6.41: Yisu ko mapa sœmœ mindu dœ pe ageatshalangu bisha asœmœ, œ me sho ga lafo œ kɨ fœ Ndjaba. Tshe kavwa tshelœ mapanœ, œ ko fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke endje kurutshelœnœ tœ azunœ. Tshe kuru ndje tshelœ ageatshalangunœ bisha asœmœ tœ azu kɔkɔ.
6.42: Azu kɔkɔ zɨ yé uvu endje sú.
6.43: Ayambarœnœ ngbɔɓa udu rœgonœ á sœpe lima manda endje ga lœ kingi ndjokpa dœ bisha.
6.44: Ayakoshe á ndje zɨ lima œrœnœ lœ kutu mindu (5.000). Yisu na pa ungu dœ ada ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 14.22-33; Yow 6.16-21)
6.45: Hara manda nœ, Yisu vwa ayambarœ nœ ye kpa kœɔ ga lœ agba kœzu utshunœ á kœkate she ɓa ɨtshi ungu ɓa tœ awa tshalakpɨ Betesayida; œ gi udu azu kɔ ga tœ ogo endje.
6.46: Manda kœkatœ endje tɨ, tshe ɔ ga pa kaga ndœ kœkɨ fœ Ndjaba.
6.47: Kœwuta ga tœ adɨla, agba lœ lima ɓa uguru ungu, yé Yisu sœ kutɨ ye ɓa tœ ama ɔshɔ.
6.48: Tshe wu lima adœke kœi kayi li lima tœ ayambarœ nœ ye mbœrœ yugu to ɓa utshu endje á sœ kœgi endje ga manda nœ. Lœ gurutsha, Yisu na pa ungu dœ ada ye gu tœnœ ga ndœ endje, yé á yindœ kœro endje voro.
6.49: Kœwu she kœna pa ungunœ ataa, endje gbe adœke anga ngandoro azu dœmœ á yi ama endje lœ rawa.
6.50: Manda nœ, endje wu she kporo yé awa litœ endje. Trale, Yisu vwa o'o fœ endje adœke: «Lɔsu 'e sœ zɨtɨ; awa mbœmbœrœ 'e nene. Œmœ kœsœ!»
6.51: Tshe gitœ ye ndo dœ endje, œ ɔ ga lœ agbanœ yé yugu ka ngbewo. Œ za lima awa fœ endje tɔpanœ kpuru,
6.52: mbœrœ adœke endje wuwusœ tshelœ kata œrœ á tshe mbœrœ adœke mapa gu kpɔɔ nene, mbœrœ ɔgbɔ lɔsu nœ endje. Yisu shé ayi koɓa ɓa lœ Genazarete (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 14.34-36)
6.53: Manda kœzu ungunœ, endje du agba ga tœ mangu, œ wuta ga lakpɨ ogo Genazarete.
6.54: Kœjerœ endje kolœ lœ agba ataa, azu gbɔ Yisu kpɔ,
6.55: œ za ɔrɔ kpatœnœ ndœ kœrɔ ayi koɓa lakpɨ para, œ ko endje dœ kelekpa kpagu tœnœ ga tœ osho á Yisu sœ lima tœnœ.
6.56: Osho kɔ á Yisu sœ lima kœna tœnœ, œdœ lœ aya ogo too lœ egerœ ogo too ndje ga ɨndɨrɨnœ; endje sœ lima kœko ayi koɓa ga tœ ala awa, kœkɨ fœ Yisu adœke tshe za awa fœ endje adœke ndje goro amba ama lœba ye. Yé, endje para kɔkɔ á ndje goro lima lœba ye, endje she.

7.1: Ɔlɔ bale, Afarisayi dœ pe anga aayi kœyisœ awa akwa á ndje to ɓa lœ Yerusaleme ngbɔtœ endje dji Yisu.
7.2: Endje wu anga ayambarœ nœ Yisu kœzɨ œrœ dœ uburu, œ yindœ kœpa adœke endje djudjutɔ kane endje nene.
7.3: Ádánœ adœke, Afarisayi dœ pe udu Ayuda kɔ zɨzɨ œrœ utshu kœdjutɔ kane endje kpaa ɓa tœ dingini endje nene. Œtœnœ kœdœ o'o á endje gbɔ manda aata endje.
7.4: Œdœ endje kœto ɓa lœ zando á kœgu, utshu kœzɨrœ, œ li adœke endje djutɔ kane endje yeka. Endje lœpe ndje kœgbɔndœ ata o'o aata endje ndjoro ɓata: mara kœdjutɔ tshelœ yashi dœ pe lɔsú, œdœ ndje gbarœ á ndje mbœrœ dœ wola kowo.
7.5: Ádánœ ataa á Afarisayi dœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwanœ yu Yisu adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á ayambarœ nœ zœ za o'o ama aata ndje tɨ yé á zɨ œrœ dœ uburu tœ kane endje ma a?»
7.6: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Isaya gbara lima o'o dœ ádá 'e adœke 'e kœdœ awulapatshɔ, á su liya la Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Azunœ asœke donga mœ kolœ lœ ama endje gbambanœ, kashe ɓa tœ lɔsu endje, endje yiyindœ mœ nene.
7.7: Endje wu oyo kœdonga mœ gbambanœ mbœrœ endje sœ kœyisœ adja œrœ á to ɓa ndœ azu.”»
7.8: Yé Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «'E za awa o'o nœ Ndjaba vwi'i, œ ga kolœ kœpa o'o á to ɓa lœ ama azuzu.»
7.9: Yé tshe kpa pa adœke: «'E katœ kœlɨsœ awa o'o nœ Ndjaba kolœ mbœrœ kœyɔrɔndœ o'o á to ɓa lœ ama 'e dœ tœ 'e.
7.10: Gbambanœ nene, Moyize pa lima adœke: “Kpa awa aba zœ dœ ayi zœ,” ndje adœke: “Uzu á tshe kœgu œsœ abanœ dœ ayinœ, endje wo she ye.”
7.11: Kashe ɓa ndœ 'e, œ kœsœ adœke uzu pa fœ abanœ dœ ayinœ adœke: “Œrœ á mœ yi má ndœ kœza fœ 'e kœdœ korba , mœ gbɔndœ nœ fœ Ndjaba”,
7.12: 'e kpa zaza awa fœ she kœmbœrœ œrœ bale fœ abanœ dœ ayinœ nene.
7.13: Ataa, 'e sœ kœgbatshelœ o'o ama Ndjaba mbœrœ o'o ama aata 'e á 'e lœ tœ kœyisœ nœ. Awa bale ndje dœ anga œrœ ndjoro a 'e lœpe kœmbœrœ tœnœ.» Œrœ á ndɨ lɔsu uzu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 15.10-20)
7.14: Yisu kpa e azu ndjoro á pa fœ endje adœke: «E'e kɔ 'e dji mœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ yé 'e wusœ nœ adœke,
7.15: œ dœ́dœ́ œrœ á to ɓa shu á li ga lœ uzu dá ma she tœ ayi uburu nene kashe œneke kɔ á to ɓa tœ lɔsu uzu á wuta dá ma she tœ ayi uburu. [
7.16: Uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ utu ndœ kœdji o'o, tshe dji.]»
7.17: Yisu katœ azunœ tɨ œ li ga sœnda. Ayambarœ nœ ye tetœ kœyutœ endje ugurutœ endje tœ ádá o'o á tshe wuta má kœpa tœnœ asœmœ.
7.18: Tshe gi o'o fœ endje adœke: «E'e ndje, 'e gugu dœ kœwusœrœ ndœ kœdji dœ tshelœ kata o'onœ asœke nene a? 'E wuwusœ nœ damba nene adœke œrœ kɔ á to ɓa shu á li ga lœ uzu fafa uzu tœ ayi uburu nene na a?
7.19: Œneke á to ɓa shu lili ga lɔsu uzu nene, œ li ga lœ uvu yé manda nœ œ wuta lœ ɔkɔ ye ga ushu.» Tshe yi lima ndœ kœma adœke kœzɨrœ bale á dœ uburu gugu nene.
7.20: Yisu kpa pa adœke: «O'o á sœ ɓa lœ uzu, œ kœwuta ga ushu dá ma uzunœ tœ ayi uburu.
7.21: Mbœrœ adœke tshelœ uzu kœdœ tshalɔsu ye, osho á gbetshelœ kɔ œ wuta tœ kœmbœrœ dœ œrœ ɓata ngbɨndɨrœ, kœzɨ angba, kœwo azu,
7.22: kœpara awo azu too akɔ azu, kœsœ dœ ogo œrœ nœ anga azœ, ókó, kœfara osho, djingili, úkú, kœgu osho, kœzatœ osho, œdœ ndje pe kœmbœrœ ɔgbɔrœ.
7.23: Ambárá œrœnœ asœke kɔkɔ kœwuta lœ uzu yeka á ma she tœ ayi uburu.» Yashe gene sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 15.21-28)
7.24: Yisu áalafo lakpɨnœ asœmœ œ gitœ ye ga lœ ogo á sœ ndoo dœ tshalakpɨ Tire. Tshe li ga sœnda anga anda bale mbœrœ tshe yindœ nœ adœke uzu bale wusœ nœ adœke œne sœ kpœtœmœ nene.
7.25: Ataa, anga yashe bale á gbolo nœ ye sœ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa ye, djindœ ye œ na kœgote ga utshu ye.
7.26: Yashe sœmœ dœ́dœ́ yuda nene, tshe kœdœ uzu tshalakpɨ Fenisi ɓa lœ ogo Siri. Tshe kɨ fœ Yisu adœke tshe gɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa yawuru nœ œne.
7.27: Kashe Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Kaka damba adœke agbolo zɨ œrœ uvu ndje su yekane, mbœrœ œ sœsœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ nene kœkakara kœzɨrœ nœ agbolo á kœko va fœ ayavoro.»
7.28: Yashe sœmœ gi fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, œdœ adja o'o. Kashe ayavoro zɨ œrœ á yo tœ ama agbolo ga tshakudu ndaba.»
7.29: Yé Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Mbœrœ o'o á ɓœ pa asœke, gu dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Ekpe ɨshirɨnœ gitœ ye pa gbolo nœ zœ ye.»
7.30: Kœgu she kœwuta ɓa sœnda nœ ye atake, tshe wu adœke gbolo nœ ye má lo ga pa kelekpa, yé ekpe ɨshirɨ gi ɓa mámá tœ ye pa ye yé. Yisu she ayi bitu
7.31: Yisu wuta lœ ogonœ á sœ ndoo dœ Tire, œ vwanga tɔ lœ Sidona kœgu ndœ mangu Galilayi ɓa uguru ogo á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Tshalakpɨ Ndjokpa.
7.32: Endje na ga ndœ ye dœ anga uzu bale á utu ye be yé á tshe sœsœ kœpa o'o nene. Endje kɨ ga tœ ye adœke tshe to kane ye ga pa ye.
7.33: Yisu gi she zara tœ azunœ, œ yi yakɔne ye ga lœ utu ye, œ tu ngusha œ goro dœ tima ye.
7.34: Manda nœ, tshe mesho ga lafo, œ wu faa œ pa adœke: «Efata!» Œ yindœ kœpa adœke: «Kɔrɔ!»
7.35: Kolœ tœ farapu, utu ye bibisha kɔrɔ ngbɨɨ yé tshe pa o'o tœ ɔtshɔnœ.
7.36: Yisu kɔ endje adœke endje mɨmɨndœ nœ fœ uzu bale nene. Atamœ gbaa, endje mɨ tshelœ o'onœ ngele ngele ngele natœnœ djezœ.
7.37: Œ za awa tœ azu kɔ á endje pa adœke: «Œneke kɔ á tshe sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ! Tshe sœ kœkɔrɔ ogoro utu ayi bitu, œ sœ kœmbœrœ adœke endjeneke á ndje papa o'o nene, pa o'o.»

8.1: Dœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, azu kpa ngbɔtœ endje lima dji Yisu. Kœwu adœke kœzɨrœ gugu mbœrœ endje nene, tshe e ayambarœ nœ ye œ pa fœ endje adœke:
8.2: «Oyo azunœ asœke ká mœ waa, mbœrœ a lo dœ endje olo votɔ yé endje gugu dœ kœzɨrœ nene.
8.3: Œdœ mœ kœgi endje ga ndœ endje dœ ogo ataa, endje mbombo tœ ala awa mbœrœ anga endje ugurunœ to lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ waa.»
8.4: Ayambarœ nœ ye gi fœ she adœke: «A gbɔ má rœgo lœ kpagagashonœ asœke kpœta yekane á kœto fœ endje á endje kœzɨ á kœle endje a?»
8.5: Yisu yu endje adœke: «'E sœ dœ mapa kotoo?» Endje gi fœ she adœke: «Mindu dœ bisha.»
8.6: Yisu fatœ ye œ pa fœ azunœ ndjoro asœmœ adœke endje lœ ga atɨ ga tœ ɔshɔ. Tshe ko mapanœ mindu dœ bisha (7) asœmœ, œ donga Ndjaba, œ kavwa tshelœ nœ, œ ko fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke endje kurutshelœ nœ tœ azunœ.
8.7: Endje lœ ndje dœ a'eara ageatshalangu. Yisu donga Ndjaba ndje mbœrœ a'eara ageatshalangu sœmœ, œ pa fœ endje adœke endje kurutshelœ nœ tœ azunœ.
8.8: Azu para kɔkɔ zɨ, œ le ndje œ le. Ayambarœ rɔ ama udu rœgo á sœpe ga lœ kingi mindu dœ bisha.
8.9: Azu sœ lima tœ œsœnœ kutu vana. Yisu pa fœ endje adœke uzu dœ uzu gu ga ndœ ye.
8.10: Trale manda nœ, Yisu ɔ ga lœ agba dœ ayambarœ nœ ye tœ kœgu ga lœ ogo Dalmanuta. Afarisayi e osho ndœ ambárá (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 12.38-39; 16.1-4; Luk 11.16-29; 12.54-56)
8.11: Afarisayi na ga ndœ Yisu œ tetœ kœpu lœma endje dœ she mbœrœ kœwu lɔsu ye. Endje yu she adœke tshe yisœ anga ambárá œrœ tœ kœma adœke gbɔgbɔ ye to ɓa lafo.
8.12: Yisu wu faa dœ oyo tœ lɔsu ye œ pa adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe azu nœ tshakpesheke œ e osho ndœ ambárá! Mœ pa dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke Ndjaba œ yisœ ambárá bale fœ 'e dœ azu oshonœ asœke nene.»
8.13: Tshe kwatœ ye œ katœ endje tɨ, œ ɔ ga lœ agba tœ kœzu ga ɨtshi ungu. Aya kœwusœrœ nœ ayambarœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 16.5-12; Luk 12.1)
8.14: Ayambarœ nœ Yisu djerœndœ kœko kœzɨrœ, œ sœ kolœ dœ mapa bale lœ agba.
8.15: Yisu mɨ upu fœ endje adœke: «Ala 'e gbɔ dœ ɔyɔ kœsuku mapa nœ Afarisayi dœ pe ndje œnœ azu nœ Erode kane.»
8.16: Ayambarœnœ pa o'o ugurutœ endje adœke: «Tshe sœ kœpa atamœ mbœrœ a gugu dœ mapa nene a!»
8.17: Œ mbœrœ adœke Yisu wu lima sœ nœ á yu endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e yutœ 'e ugurutœ 'e adœke 'e gugu dœ mapa nene a? Damba œrrr kpesheke 'e wuwusœ œrœ nene a? Ala 'e kɔkɔrɔ damba nene a?
8.18: 'E lœ dœ ala yeka á wuwu dœ œrœ nene a? Œ lœ dœ utu yeka á djidji dœ o'o nene a? Œndœ œrœ kɔ á mœ mbœrœ djerœ 'e ye a?
8.19: Ɔlɔnœ á mœ kavwa lima tshelœ mapa mindu kœto fœ azu kutu mindu (5.000), kingi kotoo á sú dœ udunœ á sœ pe liya a?» Endje gi fœ she: «Ndjokpa dœ bisha.»
8.20: Yisu kpa yu adœke: «Ɔlɔnœ á mœ kavwa lima tshelœ mapa mindu dœ bisha (7) ndœ kœto fœ azu kutu vana, kingi kotoo á su dœ udunœ á sœpe liya a?» Endje gi fœ she: «Kingi mindu dœ bisha (7).»
8.21: Yeka á Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Damba 'e wuwusœ œrœ nene a?» Yisu shé ayibula
8.22: Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye wuta ɓa lœ Betesayida. Ɓa zœ endje na dœ anga uzu á ala ye bu, œ kɨ fœ she adœke tshe goro she.
8.23: Yisu za kane ye, œ wuta dœ she lakpɨnœ. Tshe tu ngusha ga la ye, œ to kane ye ga pa ye á yu she adœke: «Ɓœ wu gaɗe?»
8.24: Ayibula gi fœ she adœke: «Mœ sœ kœwu azu, mœ wu endje ɓata ɔyɔ á sœ tœ ana.»
8.25: Yisu kpa goro ala ye, ngbewo tshe she œ te kœwu œrœ kɔ tœ ɔtshɔnœ.
8.26: Yé Yisu za awa fœ she kœgu ga ndœ ye kashe ngbɔlɔɔ lakpɨ nene. Petro gbara ngbewo adœke Yisu kœdœ Masiya (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 16.13-20; Luk 9.18-21)
8.27: Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye na ga lœ a'eara ogo á sœ dji ɨndɨrɨ Sezaré, ogo gbozu Filipo. Tshe yu endje tœ awa adœke: «Azu sœ kœpa má adœke œmœ kœdœ ɗe?»
8.28: Endje gi fœ she adœke: «Azu pa adœke œɓœ kœdœ Yowane, ayi kœza batisimu, anga endje adœke œɓœ kœdœ Eliya; anga udu endje pa œnœ endje adœke œɓœ kœdœ ongboro anga ayi kœgbara o'o.»
8.29: Atamœ sœmœ, 'e gbe má œnœ 'e adœke œmœ kœdœ má œnœ mœ uzu ɗe? A Petro gi fœ she adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ Masiya.»
8.30: Yisu va tshelœ utu endje lœ ubunœ adœke endje papandœ nœ fœ uzu bale nene. Yisu gbara o'o kuzu dœ pe kœshe nœ ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 16.21-28; Luk 9.22-27)
8.31: Manda nœ, Yisu tetœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Gbolo nœ uzu œ wu oyo waa. Agbɔ Ayuda, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba ndje dœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œ yindœ ye nene, endje wo she yeka manda olo votɔ á tshe she lœ akuzu.»
8.32: Tshe sœ lima kœpa o'onœ o'ara o'ara yeka á Petro dji ata á e she ga ɨndɨrɨnœ á kɔ she adœke tshe katœ kœpa o'o atamœ ye.
8.33: Yisu fatœ ye œ tondœ ayambarœ nœ ye, œ ngá fœ Petro adœke: «Gitœ zœ tœ mœ, Satana! Gbetshelœ nœ zœ lili dœ œnœ Ndjaba bale nene, kashe œnœ azuzu.» Kœna manda Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 16.24-28; Luk 9.23-27)
8.34: Manda nœ kɔ, Yisu e azu para dœ pe ayambarœ nœ ye œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Uzu kœyindœ kœna manda mœ, œ li adœke tshe vwaratœ ye tœ undu ye dœ tœ ye, œ za kurushi nœ ye yeka á kœna manda mœ.
8.35: Gbambanœ nene, uzu kɔ á tshe sœ dœ ogo kœsœ dœ soro œ tshu ye; kashe tsheneke á tshe tshu mbœrœ mœ œdœ ndje mbœrœ Ɔtshɔ O'o, œshe dá sœ dœ soro.
8.36: Œdœ uzu kœgbɔ œrœ tshapashɔ sœke kɔkɔ, œ sœ dœ she kotoo ɓata á soro ye ndɨ a?
8.37: Œrœ gaɗe dá tshe yapa dœ soro ye asœmœ a?
8.38: Œdœ uzu kœmbœrœ tshula mbœrœ mœ dœ pe mbœrœ o'o nœ mœ ɓa utshu azu nœ tshakpesheke á endje dœ́ aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ yé á zazatœ endje fœ Ndjaba nene, Gbolo nœ uzu œ mbœrœ tshula ye ndje dœ ɔlɔ á tshe kwatœ ye lœ mokɔ nœ Abanœ awa bale dœ ayerœ andjelu.»

9.1: Yisu kpa mɨndœ nœ fœ endje adœke: «Mœ pa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke anga azunœ asœke œ tshu nene utshu kœwu Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba kœna dœ gbɔgbɔ.» Yisu fatœ ye dœ ala ayambarœ nœ ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 17.1-13; Luk 9.28-36)
9.2: Manda butshɔ mindu dœ bale, Yisu za Petro, Jake œdœ pe Yowane œ ɔ dœ endje ga pa egerœ kaga. Ɓa zœ, tshe fatœ ye dœ ala endje.
9.3: Lœba nœ ye wuta tœ imbinœ urrr, uzu bale pa ɔshɔ á tshe li kœdjutɔ lœba ye adœke œ guru atamœ gugu nene.
9.4: Eliya œdœ Moyize wuta ga utshu endje, œ ka á sœ kœpa tshama endje dœ Yisu.
9.5: Petro pa fœ Yisu adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, œ ga waa adœke a lœpe kpœke! A mɔ anda tande votɔ: Bale fœ ɓœ, bale fœ Moyize yé udunœ bale ndje fœ Eliya.»
9.6: Kashe tshe wuwu lima sœ o'o á tshe sœ kœpa tœnœ nene, awa li lima tœ ye dœ anganœ kɔkɔ asœmœ.
9.7: Ondoro jerœ ga pa endje. Ko pe lœ ondoronœ, tshama uzu wu adœke: «Tsheneke kœdœ Gbolo nœ mœ á mœ yindœ ye waa; 'e dji she.»
9.8: Pe kpœtœmœ, ayambarœ nœ ye mesho djikpata tœ endje, œ wuwu uzu bale nene kolœ Yisu kutɨ ye ga ndœ endje.
9.9: Ɓata endje sœ lima kœjerœ kaga, Yisu pa fœ endje adœke endje papandœ œrœ kɔ á endje wu fœ uzu bale nene, œrrr Gbolo nœ uzu kœshe bala lœ akuzu yeka á endje kœmɨndœ nœ.
9.10: Endje gbɔndœ o'onœ ga lɔsu endje, kashe endje tetœ kœyutœ endje adœke: «Ádá o'o nœ kœshe lœ akuzu kœdœ gaɗe ma a?»
9.11: Yé ayambarœ nœ ye yu she: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á aayi kœyisœ awa akwa pa lima adœke Eliya œ na utshunœ yekane a?»
9.12: Yisu gi o'o fœ endje adœke: «Adjapu, Eliya œ na utshunœ mbœrœ kœguma œrœ kɔkɔ. Ka mbœrœ gaɗe á o'o ama Ndjaba pa liya adœke Gbolo nœ uzu œ wu oyo yé azu œ mbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ she a?
9.13: Mœ pa fœ 'e adœke, Eliya na, yé azu mbœrœ fœ she œneke kɔ á endje yi lima ndœ nœ kœli dœ œneke á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba tœ upu nœ ye.» Yisu shé gbolo á tshe sœ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 17.14-21; Luk 9.37-43)
9.14: Ɔlɔnœ á Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye votɔ gu ga ndœ udu endje, endje wu azu ndjoro djanga aayi kœyisœ awa akwa á ndje ngbɔtœ endje ga tœnœ yeka á lœ kœshara o'o ugurutœ endje.
9.15: Azunœ wu Yisu, lɔsu endje tshi perea yé endje kpa kœbala she.
9.16: Yisu yu endje adœke: «O'o gaɗe da 'e lœ kœsharatœ 'e dœ ayambarœnœ lœ kumu nœ a?»
9.17: Anga uzu bale lœ ugurutœ azunœ gi o'o fœ she adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, mœ na dœ gbolo yakoshe nœ mœ fœ ɓœ. Tshe sœ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa ye á mbœrœ adœke tshe papa o'o nene.
9.18: Tœ osho kɔ á ekpe ɨshirɨnœ œ za gbolonœ, tshe za she vesho, furutsha œ wuta putu putu lœ ama ye, tshe zɨ tshelœ daji ye ngara ngara yeka á gbɔ kwa kwa kwa ga tœnœ. Mœ yu ayambarœ nœ zœ adœke endje gɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨnœ pa ye yeka á endje lili kœgɔrɔ she nene asœmœ.»
9.19: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «E'e! 'E sœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Ndjaba nene a? A lœpe dœ 'e kpœke manda olo koto o? 'E yindœ nœ adœke mœ ru lɔsu mœ mbœrœ 'e manda olo koto o? 'E na dœ gbolonœ fœ mœ.»
9.20: Á endje za she na tœnœ fœ she. Ekpe ɨshirɨnœ wu Yisu œ tetœ kœyaka gbolonœ tœ ɔgbɔnœ. Gbolonœ te ga atɨ, œ vwɨrɨtœ ye nguru nguru lœ ɔshɔ dœ furutsha lœ ama ye putu putu putu.
9.21: Yisu yu abanœ adœke: «Ekpe ɨshirɨnœ mbœrœtœ ye manda ungu koto o?» Abanœ gi fœ she adœke: «Pe lœ gbolo ye.
9.22: Ekpe ɨshirɨnœ sœ kœgeta she kpala kpala ga tawo, ga langu adœke tshe tshu ye. Kashe wu oyo 'a, œ mbœrœ œneke á li dœ ɓœ.»
9.23: Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Á kœli dœ mœ a? Œrœ kɔ li kœmbœrœtœ endje fœ uzu tsheneke á tshe kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Ndjaba.»
9.24: Pe kpœtœmœ, aba gbolonœ sá rawa adœke: «Mœ sœ dœ kœyindœrœnœ ataa, mbœrœ adœke mœ katœ sharapu!»
9.25: Yisu wu azu kœna ndjoro ga ndœ endje œ nga fœ ekpe ɨshirɨ adœke: «Œɓœ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ á ɓœ mbœrœ adœke gbolo asœke papa o'o nene, œ djidji o'o nene, mœ vwa ɓœ: Wuta lœ ye, yé kpa kwakwatœ zœ ndœ ye nene!»
9.26: Ekpe ɨshirɨnœ ve rawa, œ gaga gbolo dœ ɔgbɔnœ á wuta. Gbolo yɔrɔtshelœtœ ye œ wuta ɓata uzu á tshe tshutshu. Ukpulu azu á ndje sœ lima tœ œsœnœ pa adœke: «Tshe tshu ye.»
9.27: Kashe Yisu za kane ye, œ tɨ she ga lafo yé tshe ka dœ ada ye.
9.28: Yisu li ga sœnda yé ayambarœ nœ ye yu she adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe yekane 'a lili má œnœ 'a kœgɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨnœ sœmœ nene a?»
9.29: Yé Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Kolœ avwala dá li tœ kœgɔrɔ dœ mara ekpe ɨshirɨnœ asœke.» Yisu kpa pa o'o kuzu œdœ kœshe nœ ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 17.22-23; Luk 9.43-45)
9.30: Endje áalafo œ sɔ tɔ lœ ogo Galilayi yé Yisu yiyi lima ndœ nœ adœke azu wusœ nœ nene.
9.31: Mbœrœ tshe sœ lima kœyisœ œrœ fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Endje ka Gbolo nœ uzu fœ azu adœke ndje wo she yé manda olo votɔ tshe she.»
9.32: Ayambarœnœ djidji lima tshelœ kata o'onœ nene, yé endje sœ lima dœ awa kœyu she. Œɗe dá dœ egerœ uzu a? (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 18.1-5; Luk 9.46-48)
9.33: Endje wuta ɓa lœ Kaparnawumu, œ li ga sœnda. Yisu yu ayambarœ nœ ye: «O'o gaɗe da 'e sœ lima kœvwarandœ nœ na tœnœ tœ ala awa a?»
9.34: Kashe endje lœ ko ko ko, mbœrœ tœ awa, endje sœ lima kœvwarandœ upu adœke œɗe dá dœ egerœ uzu ugurutœ œne kɔ a?
9.35: Yisu sœ ga atɨ, œ e ayambarœ nœ ye kɔkɔ ndjokpa dœ bisha yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Uzu kœyindœ kœsœ utshunœ, œ li adœke tshe sœ tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ. Yé ga panœ, tshe dœ ayi akwa nœ anganœ.»
9.36: Tshe za anga gbolo bale, œ za she tɔ ga ugurutœ endje, œ yi kane ye lœ okoro ye; œ pa fœ endje adœke:
9.37: «Uzu á tshe kœza osho kœsœ fœ aya gbolo mbœrœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ, tshe za osho kœsœ fœ adja undu mœ. Yé œshe á tshe kœza osho kœsœ fœ mœ, tshe zaza oshonœ fœ mœ nene, kashe tshe za ndje fœ œshe á tshe vwa mœ.» Kœsœ awa bale dœ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 9.49-50)
9.38: Yowane pa fœ Yisu adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, 'a wu anga uzu bale kœgɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa uzu dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ yé 'a kɔ she mbœrœ tshe sœsœ kœsœ dœ azœ awa bale nene.»
9.39: Kashe Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «'E kɔkɔ she nene! Gbambanœ nene, uzu lili kœmbœrœ afá lœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ yé manda nœ œ pa ekpe o'o dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ nene.
9.40: Mbœrœ uzu á tshe kœyiyiangba azœ nene, tshe kœdœ uzu nœ azœ.
9.41: Yé uzu kɔ á tshe su ungu kœndjoondjo fœ 'e mbœrœ 'e kœdœ azu nœ Kristu, mœ pa fœ 'e adœke; tshe gbɔ adja œrœ tshangbanœ.» Œrœ á yi azu ga lœ ekperœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 18.6-9; Luk 17.1-2)
9.42: «Uzu kɔ á tshe mbœrœ adœke aya gbolo á tshe kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ li ga lœ ekperœ, œ li adœke endje du egerœ badja ga lœ ɨgɨ ye, œ na dœ́ œ geta she ga la egerœ ungu.
9.43: Œ kœsœ adœke kane zœ za ɓœ vwi ga lœ ekperœ, œ li adœke ɓœ ta ye. Œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke ɓœ li ga lœ soro dœ kane zœ bale tœ œsœnœ adœke ɓœ li ga lœ kudu owo dœ kane zœ bibisha. [
9.44: Ɓa zœ, “angɔzu kœzɨ kote azu tshutshu nene, yé owo ruru nene.”]
9.45: Œdœ ada zœ kœsœ kœyi ɓœ ga lœ ekperœ, vwa ye. Œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ fœ ɓœ kœli ga lœ soro dœ ada zœ bale tœ œsœnœ adœke ɓœ sœpe dœ tœnœ bibisha œ li ga lœ kudu owo. [
9.46: Ɓa zœ, “angɔzu kœzɨ kote azu tshutshu nene, yé owo ruru nene.”]
9.47: Œdœ ala zœ kœsœ kœyi ɓœ ga lœ ekperœ, tshagavwa ye. Œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ fœ ɓœ kœli ga lœ soro dœ tshakala ala zœ bale tœ œsœnœ adœke ɓœ wu oyo dœ tœnœ bibisha lœ kudu owo.
9.48: Ɓa zœ, angɔzu á ndje zɨ ɔkɔ azu tshutshu nene yé owo ruru ɓa lima nene.
9.49: Gbambanœ nene, endje yamba uzu kɔ dœ owo ɓata á endje yamba ndje dɔngɔ kɔ dœ ɨngbɨrɨ.
9.50: «Ɨngbɨrɨ kœdœ ɔtshɔrœ kashe œ kœtshɔtshɔ nene, œ kpa dœ ɨngbɨrɨ nene. Á œ kœsœ adœke ɔtshɔ ɨngbɨrɨ ka lœnœ, endje gi ga lœ nœ koto o? Kaka adœke 'e lœ dœ ɨngbɨrɨ lœ ɔkɔ 'e, œ sœ gee ugurutœ 'e dœ anga 'e.»

10.1: Yisu gitœ ye kœro ga lœ ogo yuda ɓa kele ungu Yɔrdane. Ɓa zœ, azu ndjoro kpa dji she á tshe sœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ endje ɓata á tshe sœ ɓa lima kœmbœrœ tœnœ.
10.2: Anga Afarisayi na ga ndœ ye dœ gbetshelœ nœ kœyu tshelœ ye, yeka á endje yu adœke: «Œ li dœ yakoshe kœvwaratœ ye tœ awonœ a?»
10.3: Yisu yu endje adœke: «O'o gaɗe dá Moyize pa lima fœ 'e a?»
10.4: Endje gi adœke: «Moyize za awa nœ kœkatœ ayashe tɨ. Utshu nœ kœkatœ ye, ɓœ su mbeti nœ kœvwaratœ zœ tœ ye.»
10.5: Tshe kpa pa fœ endje adœke: «Moyize za lima awa o'onœ asœmœ fœ 'e mbœrœ ɔgbɔ lɔsu nœ 'e.
10.6: Kashe utshu nœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kɔ pa ɔshɔ asœke, Ndjaba mbœrœ lima yakoshe dœ yashe.
10.7: Ádánœ á yakoshe œ katœ abanœ dœ ayinœ tɨ, á ngbɔtœ ye ga tœ œsœnœ dœ awonœ,
10.8: yeka á endje bisha œ wuta uzu bale. Endje kpa sœsœ azu bisha nene kashe uzu bale.
10.9: Ataa, œneke á Ndjaba ngbɔɓa ga tœnœ, uzu œ ndjɔ tshelœnœ nene.»
10.10: Kœwuta endje ɓa sœnda, ayambarœ nœ ye kpa yu she tœ o'onœ má asœmœ.
10.11: Á tshe kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Uzu kɔ á tshe katœ awonœ tɨ á kpa to anga angbɨ yashe, tshe mbœrœ angba budu ga tœ ayendɔ nœ ye.
10.12: Œ kœsœ ndje adœke yashe kœkatœ akɔnœ á kpa kœi anga angbɨ yakoshe, tshe sœ kœmbœrœ angba budu.» Yisu to kane ye ga pa agbolo (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 19.13-15; Luk 18.15-17)
10.13: Azu na dœ agbolo fœ Yisu adœke tshe to kane ye ga pa endje yeka ayambarœ nœ ye sœ lima kœgeta endje.
10.14: Kœwu atamœ, œ za ókó fœ Yisu yé tshe pa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «'E katœ agbolo endje na ga ndœ mœ, 'e kɔkɔ endje nene mbœrœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba sœ mbœrœ azu á ndje lœ ɓata endje.
10.15: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, œdœ uzu kœza osho kœsœ mbœrœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba ɓata gbolo nene, tshe li ga zœ nene.»
10.16: Á Yisu djendœ endje ga tœ ɨgɨ ye á to kane ye ga pa endje. Ayi kœgbɔrœ waa na ga ndœ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 19.16-30; Luk 18.18-30)
10.17: Ɓata Yisu sœ lima kœro tœ awa, anga uzu kpa œ gote ga tshakudu ye, œ yu she adœke: «Ɔtshɔ ayi kœyisœrœ, œ li adœke mœ mbœrœ gaɗe á kœgbɔ soro neke á kaka nene a?»
10.18: Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ e mœ ɔtshɔ uzu a? Ɔtshɔ uzu bale gugu nene kolœ Ndjaba tshebabale kutɨ ye.
10.19: Ɓœ wusœ awa o'o adœke: “Wowo uzu nene, papara awo uzu nene, zɨzɨ angba nene, wawa o'o dœ wala ga pa uzu nene, mbœmbœrœ ngbɨndɨrœ fœ uzu nene, lɨsœ aba zœ dœ ayi zœ.”»
10.20: Uzunœ gi fœ she adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, mœ sœ kœmbœrœtœ mœ lindœ nœ kɔ pe tœ gbolo mœ.»
10.21: Yisu shokɔ she, yé dœ ala nœ ayo, œ pa fœ she adœke: «Œ sœpe œrœ bale, gu œ ka œrœ nœ zœ para kɔkɔ, œ kurutshelœ ngendjanœ kɔkɔ tœ aayi oyo á kœgbɔ kœgbɔrœ ɓa lafo. Manda nœ, fatœ zœ œ na manda mœ.»
10.22: Manda o'onœ asœmœ, tshe sœ ko ko ko yé œ gu dœ oyo tœ ye, mbœrœ tshe sœ lima dœ œrœ waa.
10.23: Yisu mesho djitœ ye œ pa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Œ sœ tœ ɔgbɔnœ bala tœ aayi kœgbɔrœ tœ kœli ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba!»
10.24: O'onœ ndjingɨvwɨ ayambarœ nœ ye. Yé Yisu kœpa pa fœ endje adœke: «Agbolo nœ mœ, Kœli ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba gbɔɔgbɔ.
10.25: Œ gbɔɔgbɔ adœke agea ɓata shamo li tɔ lœ ogoro ɨmbɨlɨ. Kashe œ kpa gbɔ kœrosœ nœ tœ ayi kœgbɔrœ adœke tshe li ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba.»
10.26: Uvuru endje i gara lœ nœ, á endje tetœ kœyutœ endje ugurutœ endje adœke: «Atamœ, uzu ɗe dá li kœshe tœnœ a?»
10.27: Yisu tondœ endje, œ pa adœke: «Ɓa tœ azu, œ li nene; kashe tœ Ndjaba, œrœ kɔ œ li ye. Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba li kœmbœrœ œrœ kɔkɔ.»
10.28: Yé Petro pa fœ she adœke: «Wu kane, a katœ œrœ nœ 'a tɨ kɔ, á na manda zœ.»
10.29: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Mœ pa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, œ kœsœ adœke uzu katœ anda nœ ye, dœ ndje aayanœ, ayingɔnœ, ayinœ, abanœ, agbolo nœ ye, kɨndɨ nœ ye tɨ mbœrœ upu nœ mœ ndje dœ pe mbœrœ upu Ɔtshɔ O'o,
10.30: dœ oshonœ asœke, tshe gbɔ anga anda, aya, ayingɔ, ayi, agbolo, kɨndɨ œdœ ndje œrœ kanga; yeka dœ oshonœ á na manda nœ, á tshe gbɔ soro neke á ka nene.
10.31: Azu ndjoro á ndje sœ utshunœ, endje sœ bala tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ, yé endje nœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ œ te bala azunœ tshatshu nœ.» Yisu pa votɔ o'o kuzu dœ pe kœshe nœ ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 20.17-19; Luk 18.31-34)
10.32: Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye sœ lima tœ awa kœɔ gu tœnœ ga lœ Yerusaleme. Yisu te lima utshu endje, yé awa li lima tœ azunœ á ndje lœ lima kœna manda ye, lɔsu endje sœ lima ga lafo. Yisu kpa ko ayambarœ nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bisha ga ɨndɨrɨ tœ ye, á tetœ kœpa o'o tœ upu œrœ a yindœ kœmbœrœtœ ye fœ endje atake:
10.33: «'E wu, a ɔ kɔ ɓa lœ Yerusaleme. Endje ka Gbolo nœ uzu fœ agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba ndje dœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa. Endje wa agbɔ ngbanga ga pa ye adœke endje wo she, yé œ za she fœ angbɨɨ azu.
10.34: Endje mɔ she, œ tu ngusha ga tœ ye, œ sɔ she dœ ndjapa, œ wo she, yeka manda olo votɔ á tshe she lœ akuzu.» Kœyɔndœrœ nœ Ajake dœ Yowane (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 20.20-28; Luk 22.25-27)
10.35: Ajake dœ Yowane, agbolo nœ Zebedayi, na ga ndœ Yisu, œ yu she adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, 'a yindœ nœ adœke ɓœ mbœrœ œrœ neke á a yu ɓœ tœnœ fœ 'a.»
10.36: Á Yisu kœyu endje adœke: «Œrœ gaɗe dá 'e yindœ nœ adœke mœ mbœrœ fœ 'e a?»
10.37: Endje gi fœ she adœke: «Œ kœsœ adœke ɓœ sœ kœsœ lœ mokɔ nœ zœ, za awa fœ 'a kœsœ ga ɨndɨrɨ tœ zœ, anga uzu bale ga pa kuni zœ, yé anga ga pa gele.»
10.38: Á Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E wuwusœ œrœnœ a 'e esho ndœ nœ asœke nene. Adja 'e li kœndjo yashi kanganœ á mœ ndjo bala ye a? 'E li ndje kœgbɔ batisimunœ á mœ gbɔ bala ye a?»
10.39: Yé endje gi fœ she adœke: «A li dœ tœnœ ye.» A Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Kpœtœpu, 'e ndjo yashi kanganœ á mœ ndjo ye, yé 'e gbɔ batisimu á mœ gbɔ ye.
10.40: Kashe tœ kœza awa fœ uzu kœsœ ga atɨ ga pa kuni mœ too ga pa gele mœ, asœmœ wuwu mœ nene. Mbœrœ tœnœ kœdœ osho á sœ fœ endjeneke má Ndjaba guma fœ endje.»
10.41: Udu ayambarœnœ ndjokpa dji o'onœ atamœ œ tetœ kœso ókó ga tœ Ajake dœ Yowane.
10.42: Yisu e endje para kɔkɔ œ pa fœ endje adœke: «'E wusœ nœ adœke agbozugo yindœ nœ adœke azu lœpe kolœ tshakudu tshagbozu nœ endje. Yé agboro azu yi ndje ndœ kœma kolœ gbɔgbɔ endje ga pa aaya azu.
10.43: Œneke sœsœ kœmbœrœtœ endje lœ guru tœ 'e nene. Kashe, œ kœsœ adœke uzu gbe kœsœ tœ egerœ uzu ugurutœ 'e, œ li adœke tshe fatœ ye tœ ayi akwa nœ 'e.
10.44: Œ kœsœ adœke anga uzu ugurutœ 'e yindœ kœsœ utshunœ, œ li adœke tshe dœ kanga nœ 'e para kɔkɔ.
10.45: Mbœrœ Gbolo nœ uzu nana adœke azu mbœrœ akwa fœ she nene, kashe tshe na tœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ azu dœ pe ndje kœzatœ ye fœ kuzu mbœrœ kœshe ukpu azu.» Yisu shé Bartime, ayibula (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 20.29-34; Luk 18.35-43)
10.46: Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye wuta ɓa lœ Yeriko. Ɓata á endje sœ kœwuta awa bale dœ azu ndjoro, anga ayibula á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Bartime, gbolo nœ Time, sœ lima ɨndɨrɨ awa tœ kœyɔndœ œrœ.
10.47: Tœ kœdji adœke Yisu uzu Nazarete dœke, tshe tetœ kœ'e osho: «Yisu, Gbolo nœ Davidi, wu oyo mœ!»
10.48: Azu ndjoro rá she adœke tshe sœ koko, á tshe kpa tá tshandœ rawanœ dœ ɔgbɔnœ adœke: «Gbolo nœ Davidi, wu oyo mœ!»
10.49: Yisu ka yé œ pa adœke: «'E e she fœ mœ.» Endje e ayibula sœmœ œ pa fœ she adœke: «Indji zœ ga waa, áalafo, tshe sœ kœ'e ɓœ.»
10.50: Tshe za yɔgbɔdɔ lœba nœ ye vwi ga atɨ, œ su gbuu á na ga ndœ Yisu.
10.51: Yisu yu she adœke: «Ɓœ yindœ nœ adœke mœ mbœrœ gaɗe fœ ɓœ a?» Ayibula gi fœ she adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, kolœnœ adœke mœ kpa wu osho.»
10.52: Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Gu zœ, kœyindœrœ nœ zœ she ɓœ ye.» Trale tshe wu osho œ te ndje tœ kœna manda Yisu.

11.1: Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye ndo dœ Yerusaleme, ndo dœ tshalakpɨ Betefaje œdœ Betani, gu ndœ kaga ɔyɔ Olive. Tshe vwa anga ayambarœ nœ ye bisha adœke:
11.2: «'E na ɓa lakpɨ á sœ ɓa utshu 'e ɓa 'e asœmœ. 'E kœwuta ɓa zœ, 'e wu aya ane á endje du she kpœtœmœ, á uzu bale ɔɔ damba ga pa ye nene. 'E vwara she œ gu dœ she ga mœ.
11.3: Œdœ uzu kœyu 'e adœke: “Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e mbœrœ œrœ ata a?” E gi o'o fœ she adœke: “Gbozu da gbe dœ she yé tshe gi kane ye tœ ye fœ 'e katsha.”»
11.4: Endje ro œ gbɔ aya ane á endje du she ɓa shu ɓa lœ bɨngɨ ndo dœ manda ga ɨndɨrɨ ala awa á endje vwara she.
11.5: Anga azunœ á endje lœ lima lœ bɨngɨnœ pa fœ endje adœke: «Œrœ gaɗe dá 'e mbœrœ ataa a? Mbœrœ gaɗe a 'e sœ kœvwara aya anenœ a?»
11.6: Endje gi o'o kolœ ɓata á Yisu mɨ má ndœ nœ fœ ndje, yé endje za awa fœ endje kœgu dœ she.
11.7: Endje gu dœ aya ane sœmœ fœ Yisu, œ gbara ala lœba nœ endje ga pa ye yeka á Yisu ɔ á sœ ga pa nœ.
11.8: Azu ndjoro saka ndje lœba nœ endje ga tœ ala awa, anga endje ko kako ɔyɔ á ndje de ɓa lœ kɨndɨ.
11.9: Azu neke á ndje lœ lima utshunœ dœ pe endjeneke á endje lœ manda ye lœ lima kœpa adœke: «Ozana! Ndjaba gbɔndœ tsheneke á tshe na dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye!
11.10: Ndjaba gbɔndœ akwa gbozunœ á na asœke, Ogo gbozu nœ aba azœ dœ Davidi! Ozana fœ Ndjaba ɓa lafo!»
11.11: Yisu li lima ga lœ Yerusaleme, yé œ na ga lœ anda Tepelo. Manda kœwu osho kɔkɔ ɨndɨrɨ tœ ye, tshe wuta awa bale dœ ayambarœ nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bisha tœ kœgu ga lœ Betani mbœrœ ɔlɔ ro ye. Yisu darandœ ɔyɔ fige (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 21.18-19)
11.12: Osho kɔrɔ lima pa nœ, lɔkɔ adœke endje wuta ga lœ Betani, ogo mi Yisu.
11.13: Tshe wu ɔyɔ fige lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ dœ kakonœ tœnœ, œ na kœpara tshelœnœ adœke œne gbɔ ete anga elenœ zœ. Kœndo she dœ tœnœ, tshe wu kolœ kakonœ mbœrœ œ dœ́dœ́ lima olo kœle figenœ nene.
11.14: Yisu darandœ ɔyɔ figenœ á pa adœke: «Adja uzu kpa zɨ ele zœ nene.» Yé ayambarœ nœ ye dji lima o'o nœ ye. Yisu gɔrɔ ayi kœka œrœ lœ Tepelo (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 21.10-17; Luk 19.45-48; Yow 2.13-16)
11.15: Manda nœ endje na ga lœ Yerusaleme. Yisu li ga lœ Tepelo œ tetœ kœgɔrɔ azu á ndje sœ lima kœka œrœ nœ endje dœ pe endjeneke á ndje sœ lima kœyɔ œrœ kpaa ga ushu. Tshe ɨvwɨ ndaba nœ azu kœyapa ngendja, œ geta ngande nœ ayi kœka ambepa.
11.16: Yisu vwaratœ ye adœke, uzu bale vwavwanga dœ gbarœ nœ ye to sœnda Tepelonœ nene.
11.17: Yé tshe tetœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ endje adœke: «'E wuwusœ nœ nene a? Endje sú ɓa la Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Anda nœ mœ kœdœ anda kœza avwala mbœrœ azu lœ ogo kɔkɔ.” Kashe 'e fa tœ wutu nœ aayi angba!»
11.18: Agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjabanœ dœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwanœ dji ataa, œ tetœ kœpara awa tœ kœwo she. Kashe endje sœ lima kœkpa awa ye mbœrœ kœyisœrœ nœ ye gbɔ lima osho tœ lɔsu azu ndjoro.
11.19: Dœ kɨdala, Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye wuta lakpɨnœ ye. Kœyindœrœ œdœ avwala (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 21.20-22)
11.20: Kpa kœvwanga endje dœ tshamazɨ, endje wu adœke ɔyɔ fige ɔrɔ kpa ga tœ eshenœ.
11.21: Œndœ o'onœ libi te lœ Petro, tshe pa fœ Yisu adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, wu kane, ɔyɔ figenœ á ɓœ dara libi ndœ nœ ɔrɔ ye.»
11.22: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «'E sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Ndjaba.
11.23: Mœ sœ kœpa dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke œ kœsœ adœke uzu pa fœ kaganœ asœke adœke: “Gitœ zœ kpœke yé œ te ga la kota”, á tshe kœsœsœ dœ sharapu tœ lɔsu ye nene, á sœ dœ kœyindœrœ adœke o'onœ á œne pa œ mbœrœtœ endje ye, œ mbœrœtœ endje fœ she tako.
11.24: Ádánœ á mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke: Œneke kɔ á 'e e osho ndœ nœ lœ avwala ɓa ndœ Ndjaba, 'e yindœ nœ adœke 'e gbɔ kɔ, Ndjaba œ to fœ 'e.
11.25: Œ kœsœ adœke 'e ka kœza avwala fœ Ndjaba, á 'e kœsœ dœ o'o tœ lɔsu 'e ga tœ anga uzu, 'e djerœndœ nœ yeka á Aba 'e á tshe sœ ɓa lafo kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ 'e. [
11.26: Kashe œdœ 'e kœsœsœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ anga 'e nene, Aba 'e á tshe sœ ɓa lafo œ djerœ ndje ndœ ekperœ á 'e mbœrœ nene.]» Tshagbozu nœ Yisu to kpœta? (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 21.23-27; Luk 20.1-8)
11.27: Endje kpa kwa ga lœ Yerusaleme, yé dœ lɔndɔ á Yisu sœ kœro ga lœ Tepelo, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba, aayi kœyisœ awa akwa dœ pe agbɔ Ayuda na ga ndœ ye,
11.28: á yu she adœke: «Ɓœ gbɔ awa kœmbœrœ akwa nœ zœ asœke kpœta a? Uzu ɗe ndje dá za awa kœmbœrœ akwa ataa fœ ɓœ a?»
11.29: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Mœ yindœ kœyu 'e dœ o'o bale, œ kœsœ adœke 'e gi o'o fœ mœ gbá yekane á mœ kœyisœ osho á mœ gbɔ awa kœmbœrœ dœ œrœnœ asœ kɔ fœ 'e.
11.30: Œɗe dá vwa lima Yowane kœza batisimu fœ azu a? Œ dœ lima Ndjaba too azu? 'E gi o'o fœ mœ.»
11.31: Yé endje tetœ kœfa o'o ugurutœ ndje adœke: «Œ kœsœ adœke a gi fœ she atake: “Ndjaba dá vwa lima she”, tshe yu azœ adœke mbœrœ gaɗe a yiyi lima ndœ o'o ama ye nene a?
11.32: Œ kpa kœsœ adœke a gi adœke: “Azu dá vwa lima she”, œ li ndje nene.» Gbambanœ nene, endje sœ lima kœkpa awa azu mbœrœ azu kɔ wu lima sœnœ adœke Yowane kœdœ lima adja ayi kœgbara o'o ama Ndjaba kpœtœpu.
11.33: Yeka á endje gi fœ Yisu adœke: «A wuwusœ nœ nene.» Á Yisu kœgi fœ endje ndje adœke: «Œmœ ndje awa bale, mœ yi ndje sœ uzu á tshe za awa nœ kœmbœrœ œrœnœ asœke kɔ fœ 'e nene.»

12.1: Yisu kpa tetœ kœpa o'o fœ endje lœ ndœma toro adœke: «Anga uzu bale djo lima kɨndɨ nœ ye, œ shi ada vinu. Tshe tɔ gbadjadja dji tœnœ tshakpata, œ dji kudu mbœrœ kœpu dœ ele vinunœ; œ mɔ ɨngɨrɨ anda gbara ga lafo á kœsœ tshakudunœ yeka á kœmesho pa vinunœ. Manda nœ, tshe guma o'o ugurutœ ye dœ azu kœmbœrœ akwa kɨndɨnœ, œ na ana.
12.2: Ɔlɔ kœkɔ ele vinunœ li, yé tshe vwa anga ayi akwa nœ ye fœ endjeneke á endje lœ ɓa lœ kɨndɨnœ adœke endje vwa œsœ œnœ œne ele vinunœ fœ œne.
12.3: Endje za she œ ɓi she kɔrɔnɔ kɔrɔnɔ, œ gi she tshakane ye gbambanœ.
12.4: Tshe kpa vwa anga angbɨ ayi akwa fœ endje, endje ɓi ɔkɔrɔ tsheneke mœ, œ gu she ga panœ.
12.5: Tshe vwa votɔ uzu fœ endje, yé endje wo tsheneke mœ. Ayengɔ kɨndɨ kpa vwa anga azu ndjoro, endje ɓi anga aayi avwanœ á tshe vwa endje asœmœ, œ wo anga endje œ wo.
12.6: Ayengɔ kɨndɨnœ sœpe dœ uzu tshebabale, kolœ gbolo nœ ye á tshe yindœ ye waa. Tshe vwa she fœ endje tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ dœ gbetshelœ adœke: “Endje kpa ndara ete awa gbolo nœ mœ ye.”
12.7: Ɔlɔ á endje wu gbolo nœ ye kœna ga ndœ endje, endje guma o'o lœ oporo tœ endje adœke: “'E wu, gbolonœ á tshe sœpe dœ kɨndɨnœ manda aba nœ dœke. A wo she yeka á kɨndɨnœ kœte œnœ azœ!”
12.8: Endje za she œ wo she, œ za oko ye vwi zara ga ushu lœ kɨndɨnœ.
12.9: «Ata ayengɔ kɨndɨnœ œ mbœrœ gaɗe? Tshe na œ wo aayi akwa kɨndɨnœ kɔkɔ yé œ kpa za akwanœ fœ anga angbɨ aayi akwa.
12.10: Damba 'e dɨdɨ o'onœ asœke ala buku nœ Ndjaba nene a? Endje su adœke: “Badja á ayi kœmɔ anda za vwi'i, œtœnœ dá wuta badja á anda œ shi mbœrœ tœnœ.
12.11: Gbozu Ndjaba dá mbœrœ akwa nœ asœmœ: Yé a wu, œ ga tœ ala azœ waa!”»
12.12: Agbozu ayuda para awa tœ kœza she ga lœ kánga manda o'o ama ye asœmœ mbœrœ endje wu lima sœnœ adœke tshe pa o'onœ tœ œne. Yé kœwu adœke azu ngba lima waa, endje ka lima tœ ye, á guda ye. Kœyɔ lapo nœ Sezare (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 22.15-22; Luk 20.20-26)
12.13: Manda nœ, endje vwa anga Afarisayi dœ pe azu nœ Erode fœ Yisu, mbœrœ á endje kœgbɔ she manda ndœma ye.
12.14: Endje na œ yu she adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, 'a wusœ nœ adœke ɓœ sœ kœpa okporo o'o, ɓœ sœsœ ndje kœkatœ zœ tɨ fœ uzu adœke tshe li ga lœ zœ dœ ekpe o'o nene. Ɓœ kpakpa awa uzu nene, œ wuwu ndje tshatshu uzu nene, kashe ɓœ sœ kœyisœ adja awa Ndjaba. Yé pa fœ 'a kane, œ li adœke azu yɔ lapo nœ Sezare a? A yɔ too a yɔ nene?»
12.15: Ɓata Yisu wu lima sœ gbetshelœ nœ endje, tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e yu tshelœma mœ a? 'E na dœ anga ngendjanœ gamœ dœ a wu kane»
12.16: Endje na dœ anganœ bale. Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Tshatshu uzunœ asœke dœ pe ɨ'ɨrɨ ye á ndje su asœke kœdœ œnœ ɗe?» Endje gi fœ she adœke: «Œnœ Sezare.»
12.17: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «'E gi œrœ nœ Sezare fœ Sezare, œnœ Ndjaba kœdœ œnœ Ndjaba.» Endje ka tshikɨngɨ mbœrœ o'onœ á tshe gi fœ endje. Asadukayi yu Yisu tœ upu nœ kœshe lœ akuzu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 22.23-33; Luk 20.27-38)
12.18: Anga Asadukayi na ga ndœ Yisu. Endje pa œnœ endje adœke kœshe lœ akuzu gugu nene. Á yu lima Yisu atake:
12.19: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, Moyize su liya mbeti fœ 'a adœke: Œdœ uzu kœsœ dœ ayanœ á tshe kœto yashe á endje kœzuzu gbolo dœ she nene, á tshe kœtshu, œ li adœke tshe to koya manda ayanœ mbœrœ á tshe kœzu gbolo lœ œsœ ayanœ á tshe tshu asœmœ.
12.20: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, anga ayazu mindu dœ bisha (7) lœ ayizu bale. Eyanœ za yashe, œ zuzu uzu dœ she nene yé œ tshu ye.
12.21: Bishanœ to yashenœ manda ye, œ zuzu uzu dœ she nene, œ tshu ndje ye. Votɔnœ awa bale.
12.22: Ugurutœ endje mindu dœ bisha á ndje to yashe sœmœ, anga bale zuzu gbolo dœ she nene. Yé manda nœ kɔ, yashenœ za awa œ tshu ndje ye.
12.23: Ataa, dœ olo nœ kœshe lœ akuzu, yashenœ œ dœ awo ɗe, mbœrœ endje mindu dœ bisha kɔ to lima she tœ awo endje yema a!»
12.24: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Koto á œndœ tœ 'e œ ro 'e ata a? Ádánœ kœdœ adœke 'e wuwusœ buku nœ Ndjaba dœ pe gbɔgbɔ ye nene.
12.25: Ɔlɔ kœshe lœ akuzu, azu œ totœ endje nene kashe endje lœ ɓata aandjelu ɓa lafo.
12.26: Á kœdœ tœ o'o nœ kœshe lœ akuzu, 'e dɨdɨ ala mbeti nœ Moyize tœ o'o á Ndjaba pa lima fœ she ala owo á sœ lima kœtshi lœ ɔyɔ nene a? Ndjaba pa lima fœ Moyize adœke: “Œmœ kœdœ Ndjaba nœ Abrayamo, Ndjaba nœ Izaka œdœ Ndjaba nœ Yakobo.”
12.27: Tshe dœ́dœ́ Ndjaba nœ akuzu nene, tshe kœdœ Ndjaba nœ azu á ndje sœ dœ soro. 'E lœ adja lœ djingili.» Upu gaɗe da ropa anganœ kɔkɔ a? (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 22.34-40; Luk 10.25-28; Luk 20.39-40)
12.28: Anga ayi kœyisœ awa akwa dji endje kœvwarandœ o'onœ ataa, œ wu adœke Yisu gi adja o'o fœ Asadukayinœ. Á gitœ ye ndoo dœ Yisu á yu she adœke: «Awa o'o gaɗe dá ropa anganœ lœ awa akwa a?»
12.29: Yisu gi adœke: «Alinœ kœdœ: Azu Israyele, 'e dji kane, Gbozu, Ndjaba nœ azœ sœ tshebabale.
12.30: Yindœ Gbozu Ndjaba nœ zœ dœ lɔsu zœ bale, dœ ɨshirɨ zœ kɔ, dœ gbetshelœ nœ zœ kɔ dœ pe gbɔgbɔ zœ kɔ.
12.31: Bisha awa o'o dœke: Yindœ yanga zœ ɓata ɓœ yindœtœ zœ dœ tœ zœ. Anga upu á ro œneke bisha gugu nene.»
12.32: Ayi kœyisœ awa akwa pa fœ she adœke: «Adjapu, ayi kœyisœrœ, ɓœ pa okporo o'o, Ndjaba sœ tshebabale yé anga ɓata she gugu nene.
12.33: Yé kœyindœ ye dœ lɔsu zœ bale, dœ kœwusœrœ nœ zœ kɔ, dœ gbɔgbɔ zœ kɔ œdœ ndje kœyindœ yanga zœ ɓata á ɓœ yindœtœ zœ dœ tœ zœ, ropa kœsho agea pa wopa fœ Ndjaba œdœ tokóró kɔ.»
12.34: Yisu wu adœke tshe gi o'o tœ uzu nœ kœwusœrœ, œ pa fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ ndo tœ kœte uzu Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba.» Anga uzu bale á tshe kpa yu she dœ o'o gugu nene. Masiya œdœ Davidi (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 22.41-46; Luk 20.41-44)
12.35: Ɔlɔnœ á Yisu sœ lima tœ kœyisœ œrœ ɓa lœ Tepelo, tshe yu adœke: «Œ mbœrœ kotoo á aayi kœyisœ awa akwa pa adœke Masiya kœdœ gbolo nœ Davidi a?
12.36: Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ mbœrœ akwa lœ Davidi, yé tshe pa tœ ye dœ tœ ye adœke: “Gbozu Ndjaba mɨndœ nœ fœ Gbozu nœ mœ adœke: Sœ ga atɨ ga pa kuni mœ œrrr mœ kœko ayingba zœ gatshakudu ada zœ yekane.”
12.37: Davidi dœ tœ ye e she Gbozu yé mbœrœ gaɗe á tshe kpa fa gbolo nœ ye a?» Azu ndjoro sœ lima kœdji she dœ yanga. Yisu pa o'o dœ ádá aayi kœyisœ awa akwa (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 23.1-12; Luk 20.45-47)
12.38: Lœ kœyisœ œrœ nœ ye, tshe pa lima adœke: «Ala 'e gbɔ dœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa kane: Endje yindœ kœyisœtœ endje kœro dœ yɔgbɔdɔ lœba tœ ala azu yeka á 'e kœbala endje lœ ukpulu azu.
12.39: Endje yindœ kœsœ lœ ngande á sœ ɓa utshunœ lœ sinagoga œdœ pe kœsœ ɓa tœ œsœ agboro azu lœ angbo.
12.40: Endje u ayashe koya œ ko œrœ tœ endje kɔ, endje yindœ kœ'e osho œrrr fœ Ndjaba yeka azu kœgbe adœke œne dá dœ ɔtshɔ azu. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Ndjaba œ wa bala ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ endje.» Tokóró nœ yashe koya (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 21.1-4)
12.41: Yisu sœ ga atɨ ɓa sœnda Tepelo, ga ɨndɨrɨ gbarœ tokóró á sœ kœwu mara kœto œrœ nœ azu fœ Ndjaba. Ayi kœgbɔ ukpulu œrœ sœ lima kœto egerœ ngendja.
12.42: Atamœ yeka anga yashe koya á tshe dœ ayi oyo á akɔnœ tshu, na ndje á ko kolœ aya ngendja œnœ ye bibisha va ga lœ gbarœ tokórónœ.
12.43: Yé Yisu e ayambarœ nœ ye, œ pa fœ endje: «Mœ pa fœ 'e dœ okporo o'o adœke yashe koya nœ asœke to œnœ ye kœropa azu kɔ.
12.44: Gbambanœ nene, azu kɔ ko ngendja neke á sœsœ dœ akwa ɓa ndœ endje nene, kashe œshe, tshe ko œneke kɔ á tshe sœ dœ tœnœ, á sœ má adœke tshe zɨ dœ œrœ nœ ye.»

13.1: Lɔndɔ á Yisu sœ lima kœwuta sœnda Tepelonœ, anga ayambarœ nœ ye pa fœ she adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, wu kane! Wu ogboro badjanœ asœ, wu egerœ zamɨtɨ andanœ asœ!»
13.2: Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ wu egerœ andanœ asœmœ? Anga badjanœ bale œ ka pe lafo nene, endje ndɨ tshelœnœ para ye.»
13.3: Yisu na kœsœ ga atɨ ɓa pa kaga ɔyɔ Olive kpœ tshatshu Tepelo. Petro, Jake, Yowane œdœ Andere á endje sœ lima kpœsœnœ dœ she yu she adœke:
13.4: «Pa fœ 'a kane. Dœ ɔlɔ gaɗe dá œrœnœ asœmœ œ mbœrœ má tœ endje a? Yé œrœ gaɗe dá ma má adœke olonœ tɔ ye a?» Koshe œdœ oyo œ na (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 10.17-22; Mat 24.4-14; Luk 12.11-12; Luk 21.8-19)
13.5: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Ala 'e gbɔ, uzu bale fafara 'e nene.
13.6: Azu ndjoro œ na bala dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ, yé œ pa adœke: “Œmœ kœdœ Masiya.” Endje fara azu ndjoro.
13.7: Ɔlɔ á 'e kœsœ kœwu koshe lakpɨ too kœdji o'o nœ koshe zara, awa zaza 'e nene. Œ li adœke œrœ ataa mbœrœtœ endje utshunœ, kashe œ dœ́dœ́ damba kœka tshapashɔnœ dœmœ nene.
13.8: Azu tshelœ ogo bale œ tetœ koshe dœ azu tshelœ anga ogo, yé anga ogo gbozu œ nga ndje koshe dœ anga ogo gbozu. Ɔshɔ œ turutœ ye lœ ogo kɔ, yé egerœ ogo œ za osho djigi. Œ sœ ngbewo ɓata oyo á yashe œ wu utshu kœzu gbolo nœ ye.»
13.9: «Kashe ala 'e gbɔ pa undu 'e kane. Endje tɔ bala meza pa 'e, endje ɓi bala 'e kɔ lœ Sinagoga, endje yu ama 'e dœ ala agbozugo dœ pe ndje agboro agbozu mbœrœ mœ, yé 'e pa bala o'o mbœrœ upu nœ mœ fœ endje.
13.10: Mbœrœ œ sœ adœke Ɔtshɔ O'o wuta ga ndœ azu kɔ lœ ogo utshunœ adœke ndɔngɔlɔ osho œ ka.
13.11: Á kœsœ adœke endje ko 'e na tœnœ ga tœ osho kœwa ngbanga, 'e tɔtɔ lɔsu 'e tœ o'o á 'e pa nene. Dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, 'e pa o'o neke á wuta lœ gbetshelœ nœ 'e. Mbœrœ o'onœ toto lœ 'e dœ tœ 'e nene, kashe Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba dá to o'onœ fœ 'e.
13.12: Uzu œ va atɔ ayanœ ndœ kuzu, aba gbolo œ za gbolo nœ ye adœke endje wo she ye. Agbolo œ gbɔ upu dœ aayi kœzu endje yé œ mbœrœ adœke endje wo endje ye.
13.13: Azu kɔ œ yiangba 'e mbœrœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ. Kashe uzu neke á tshe ru lɔsu ye œrrr kpa ga tœ kœka oshonœ, tshe gbɔ soro.» Ɔlɔ kœwu œrœ kanga (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 24.15-25; Luk 21.20-24; 17.23; Luk 21.8)
13.14: «Uzu á tshe kœdɨ mbeti nœ asœke, tshe gbe dœ tœnœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ kane: Á kœsœ adœke 'e wu ekpe Ayi kœndɨ œrœ ɓa tœ osho á li dœ she kœsœ tœnœ nene, œ li adœke azu ogo Yuda kpa œ kotœ endje yiwa tœnœ ɓa pa kaga.
13.15: Tsheneke á tshe kœsœ bala ɓa pa anda, tshe kpa jerœ ga atɨ tœ kœrɔ gbarœ nœ ye ɓa sœnda yeka á kœkpa dœ tœnœ nene.
13.16: Tsheneke á tshe kœsœ bala ɓa lœ kɨndɨ, tshe kpa fatœ ye ndœ kœgu ɓa lakpɨ ndœ kœza lœba nœ ye nene!
13.17: Egerœ oyo mbœrœ ayashe á ndje lœ bala dœ nguzu œdœ endjeneke á ndje sœ kœko ɔngɔ ga lœ ama agbolo dœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ.
13.18: 'E kɨ fœ Ndjaba adœke œ mbœmbœrœtœ endje dœ olo kpengba ɨzɨ nene.
13.19: Mbœrœ dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, azu œ wu bala œrœ kanga œneke á endje wuwu anganœ bale nene kœtotœ ali kœmbœrœ tshapashɔ, dœ lɔkɔ á Ndjaba mbœrœ tshalafo dœ pe tshaatɨ œrrr ga tœ kpesheke nœ asœke, yé mara neke kpa mbœrœtœ endje nene.
13.20: Œdœ Gbozu kœgbe má lima tœ kœgi átá olonœ nene, uzu bale œ sœpe má dœ soro nene, kashe mbœrœ endjeneke á tshe ke endje dá tshe gi átá olonœ ga utshunœ.
13.21: «A kœsœ adœke uzu pa fœ 'e adœke: “'E wu, Masiya dœke! 'E wu, tshe sœ ɓa e!” 'E yiyindœ nœ fœ she nene.
13.22: Gbambanœ nene, azu á ndje pa adœke œne kœdœ Masiya dœ pe aayi kœgbara o'o nœ wala œ wuta bala ndjoro. Endje mbœrœ afá dœ pe ambárá œrœ ndjoro tœ kœgbɔ awa kœbɨlɨ dœ endjeneke á Ndjaba ke endje.
13.23: Kashe 'e, ala 'e gbɔ kane! Mœ pandœ nœ kɔ fœ 'e utshunœ ye.» Kœna Gbolo nœ uzu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 24.29-31; Luk 21.25-28)
13.24: «Manda olo kœwu œrœ kanganœ asœmœ, osho œ bu yé ɔlɔ œ tɔ nene,
13.25: angerepe œ yo ga atɨ œdœ œrœ nœ gbɔgbɔ kɔ ɓa lafo œ turutœ ye.
13.26: Yeka á 'e wu Gbolo nœ uzu kœna lœ ondoro dœ gbɔgbɔ djigi œdœ lœ mokɔ.
13.27: Tshe vwa bala aandjelu nœ ye tœ osho kɔ pa ɔshɔ dœ tshalafo ndœ kœngbɔɓa bala endjeneke á Ndjaba ke endje.» Ɔyɔ fige yisœ œrœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 24.32-36; Luk 21.29-33)
13.28: «'E gbɔ œrœ lœ kœyisœ œrœ á ɔyɔ fige œ yisœ nœ kane. Ɔlɔnœ á 'e kœwu kako ɔyɔ fige á sœ kœyo tœ ganeanœ kɔ, á tafonœ kœwuta, 'e wusœ nœ adœke olo kœlu ngwarœ ndo ye.
13.29: Œ sœ ndje atamœ fœ 'e, ɔlɔ á 'e kœwu ndje œrœ ata kœmbœrœtœ endje, 'e wusœ nœ adœke Gbolo nœ uzu ndoo ye, tshe sœ lœ manda 'e.
13.30: Mœ sœ kœpa adjapu fœ 'e, azu nœ tshakpesheke, endje ro kɔ nene á œrœnœ œ mbœrœtœ endje.
13.31: Tshalafo dœ tshapa ɔshɔ œ ro, yé o'o ama mœ œ ro nene.» 'E lolo nene (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 24.42; Mat 25.13-15; Luk 12.36-38; 19.12-13)
13.32: Kashe ɔlɔnœ, uzu bale œ wusœ nœ nene, œdœ andjelu ɓa lafo, œdœ Gbolo nœ uzu, endje wuwusœ nœ nene, kolœ Aba bale dá wusœ nœ.
13.33: «Ala 'e gbɔ, yé 'e lolo nene mbœrœ 'e wuwusœ olonœ nene.
13.34: Œ sœ ɓata anga uzu na ana, á katœ manda gbagba nœ ye tɨ fœ aayi kœgbɔndœ nœ. Á pa fœ endje adœke endje ko ala endje tœnœ.
13.35: 'E ko ala 'e tœnœ mbœrœ 'e wuwusœ ɔlɔ kœgu ayengɔ anda nene, dœ akɨdala, dœ abutshɔ, lœ ɨkɨ kɔngato too dœ tshamazɨ,
13.36: mbœrœ tshe wuwuta ngbangi œ gbɔ 'e yé 'e sœ tœ olo nene.
13.37: O'o á mœ pa fœ 'e, mœ sœ kœpa fœ azu kɔ: 'e lolo nene.»

14.1: Œ sepe lima olo bisha tœ angbo nœ Pake œdœ pe ndje œnœ mapa neke á susuku nene yeka agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba œdœ ndje aayi kœyisœ awa akwa para lima awa adœke œne za Yisu ndœ kœwo she.
14.2: Endje pa ugurutœ endje adœke: «A zaza she lœ lɔndɔ angbonœ nene mbœrœ azu œ vwaratœ endje ye.» Anga yashe bale su ungu yombo ga lœ kumu Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.6-13; Luk 7.36-38; Yow 12.1-8)
14.3: Yisu sœ lima lœ Betani ɓa sœnda nœ ayi boroma Shimu kœzɨ œrœ, anga yashe bale na dœ ungu yombo nœ ye lœ anga á endje mbœrœ dœ badja albatre. Yombonœ asœmœ dœ adja narde á amanœ gbɔ dœ panœ. Tshe kavwa ama anganœ á su yombonœ ga lœ kumu Yisu.
14.4: Anga azunœ á ndje lœ lima tœ œsœnœ oma dœ ókó á pa lœ ugurutœ endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á tshe ndɨ ungu yombo nœ ye atamœ a?
14.5: Endje za má yombonœ asœmœ, œ za yɔ œrœ œ gbɔ denari kœropa kama votɔ á kœkurutshelœ nœ tœ ayi oyo!» Tshelœ endje ɔɔrɔ gboo ga tœ yashenœ asœmœ.
14.6: Yé Yisu pa adœke: «'E katœ ye yé, mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e suku dœ she a? Tshe mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ ga tœ mœ.
14.7: Ayi oyo, 'e lœ dœ endje ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ yé ɔlɔnœ á lɔsu 'e kœyindœ nœ, 'e mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ fœ endje zœ. Kashe œmœ, a lœlœpe dœ 'e waa nene.
14.8: Œrœ á sœ má adœke tshe mbœrœ dá tshe mbœrœ asœmœ: Tshe sú ungu yombo ga tœ mœ utshu nœ kœshi mœ.
14.9: Mœ sœ kœpa dœ okporo o'o fœ 'e adœke, osho kɔ á endje pandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o, endje gbe dœ œrœ á yashe sœke mbœrœ asœ.» Yudasi za Yisu yɔ œrœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.14-16; Luk 22.3-6)
14.10: Yudasi Isikariote, anga bale lœ ayambarœ nœ Yisu ndjokpa dœ bisha, na ga ndœ agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba kœza Yisu yɔ œrœ.
14.11: Kœdji o'onœ ataa, endje sœ dœ yanga œ dɨ mbulu kœko ngendja fœ she. Yudasi te lima tœ kœmirœtshelœ ye ndœ olo ga ɗe dá œne kœza she fœ endje. Ayambarœ nœ Yisu guma rœgo angbo Pake (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.17-19; Luk 22.7-13)
14.12: Dœ olo angbo nœ mapa á susuku nene, á endje wo lima aya apata pa angbo Pakenœ. Yeka ayambarœ nœ Yisu yu she adœke: «Ɓœ yindœ nœ adœke a na ɓata á kœguma kœzɨrœ Pakenœ fœ ɓœ a?»
14.13: A tshe vwa anga ayambarœ nœ ye bisha adœke: «'E na ɓa lœ egerœ ongbo, 'e gbɔtœ 'e dœ anga yakoshe á tshe za lɔsú ungu ga lœ kumu ye. 'E te mangba ye
14.14: yé osho á tshe li ga tœnœ, 'e pa fœ ayengɔnœ adœke: “Ayi kœyisœrœ yu adœke: Osho á mœ zɨ Pakenœ dœ ayambarœ nœ mœ sœ kpœta a?”
14.15: Tshe yisœ anga gbɔshɔ œneke á sœ tœ egerœnœ ɓa lafo dœ œrœ neke á li lœnœ kɔkɔ, yeka á 'e kœguma kœzɨrœnœ ɓa zœ fœ azœ.»
14.16: Ayambarœ ro ɓa lœ ongbo, œ gbɔ œneke kɔ á tshe pa má tœnœ fœ endje asœmœ, yé á endje guma kœzɨrœ Pakenœ kpœtœmœ. Anga yambarœ nœ Yisu œ ka she (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.20-25; Luk 22.14; Yow 13.21-30)
14.17: Dœ akɨdala, tshe yikumu ye dœ ayambarœ nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bisha.
14.18: Ɔlɔ á endje sœ pa kœzɨrœ, Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Mœ sœ kœpa dœ okporo o'o fœ 'e adœke, anga uzu bale ugurutœ 'e á tshe sœ kœzɨ œrœ dœ mœ kpœtœ œsœnœ œ ka mœ.»
14.19: Kœdji o'o ataa, œ za oyo tœ lɔsu endje, yé endje tetœ kœyu she uzu dœ uzu adœke: «Œdœ mœ a?»
14.20: Tshe gi fœ endje adœke: «Œdœ anga yanga 'e ugurutœ 'e ndjokpa dœ bisha, á 'a sœ kœngbɔ kane a lœ gbarœ kœzɨrœ dœ she bale asœmœ.
14.21: Gbambanœ nene, Gbolo nœ uzu œ tshu ɓata á endje sú lima ala buku nœ Ndjaba tœ upu nœ ye. Kashe oyo nœ uzu á tshe ka Gbolo nœ uzu fœ angbɨ azu! Œ sœ má dœ ɔtshɔnœ mbœrœ uzunœ adœke adja endje zuzu she nene.» Undu œdœ indji Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.26-29; Luk 22.15-20; 1Ko 11.23-26)
14.22: Ɔlɔ á ndje sœtœ kœzɨ œrœ, Yisu za mapa œ donga Ndjaba, œ kavwa tshelœnœ, œ ko fœ ayambarœ nœ ye, yé œ pa adœke: «'E ko, asœ kœdœ undu mœ.»
14.23: Manda nœ, tshe za ndje yashi, yé manda kœdonga Ndjaba, tshe za fœ endje, á endje kɔ ndjo.
14.24: Yé á tshe mɨndœ nœ fœ endje adœke: «Asœ kœdœ indji mœ, indji á guma ayo ugurutœ Ndjaba dœ azu, á tu mbœrœ azu kɔ.
14.25: Mœ sœ kœpa dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke, mœ kpa ndjo vinu nene œrrr lɔkɔnœ á mœ ndjo bala tafonœ ɓa lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba.»
14.26: Manda kœdonga Ndjaba dœ itshi, endje wuta ndœ kœɔ ga pa kaga ɔyɔ Olive. Yisu gbara fœ Petro adœke tshe 'ea œne (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.30-35; Luk 22.33-34; Yow 13.37-38)
14.27: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «E'e kɔ 'e katœ mœ tɨ ye, mbœrœ endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Mœ wo bala ayi kœgbɔndœ apata yé apatanœ œ ndjɔtshelœtœ endje kpa ye.”
14.28: Kashe manda kœshe mœ lœ kuzu, mœ na bala utshu 'e ga lœ Galilayi.»
14.29: Petro pa fœ she adœke: «Ataa azu kɔ kœkatœ zœ tɨ, mœ katœ zœ tɨ nene.»
14.30: Á Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Mœ pa fœ ɓœ dœ adjapu adœke, dœ abutshɔnœ asœke, utshu nœ bisha ɨkɨ kɔngato, ɓœ pa adœke ɓœ wuwusœ mœ nene awa votɔ.»
14.31: A Petro kpa pa fœ she adœke: «Œ kœli adœke a tshu dœ ɓœ, mœ pa bale nene adœke mœ wuwusœ zœ nene.» Yé udu ayambarœnœ pa ndje awa bale. Yisu ɓa lœ Getesemane (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.36-46; Luk 22.40-46)
14.32: Manda nœ, Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye wuta ɓa lœ anga osho bale á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Getesemane á tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «'E lœ ga atɨ kpœke mœ na kœkɨ fœ Ndjaba kane.»
14.33: Tshe za Petro, Jake œdœ Yowane po tœ ye. Œ tetœ kœza oyo fœ she yé awa li she gɔrɔ.
14.34: Á tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «Lɔsu mœ sœ tshé tshé dœ oyo adœke mœ tshu ye. 'E lœpe kpœke kashe 'e lolo nene.»
14.35: Tshe gitœ ye tœ endje teasho ga utshunœ, œ gote ga lœ ɔshɔ, œ kɨ fœ Ndjaba adœke awa œrœnœ á yindœ kœmbœrœtœ endje, gitœ endje tœ œne.
14.36: Tshe pa adœke: «Aba mœ, ɓœ li kœmbœrœ œrœ kɔ, gi yashi kanganœ asœke utshu mœ. Mbœmbœrœ œneke á mœ yindœ nœ nene kashe mbœrœ œneke á li dœ gbetshelœ nœ zœ.»
14.37: Tshe fatœ ye, œ gu ga ndœ endje, œ gbɔ endje lœ olo. Tshe e Petro œ yu she adœke: «Shimu, ɓœ lo lo a! Ɓœ sœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ tœ kœsœ uburu tœ ala zœ manda ada ɔlɔ bale nene a?
14.38: 'E lolo nene, yé œ kɨ fœ Ndjaba adœke Satana fafara 'e nene. Ɨshirɨ uzu gbe dœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ yeka á undu ye gugu dœ gbɔgbɔ nene.»
