14.39: Manda nœ, tshe kpa kwatœ ye tœ bishanœ kœkɨ fœ Ndjaba kolœ dœ o'onœ á tshe pa má utshunœ asœmœ.
14.40: Tshe kpa gu ga ndœ ayambarœnœ, œ gbɔ endje kolœ lœ olo, ndara olonœ na lima pa endje, awa endje gi lima o'o fœ she gugu nene.
14.41: Tshe kwa tœ votɔnœ, œ pa fœ endje adœke: «'E sœpe kœlo tœnœ œdœ pe kœyatœ 'e a? Ɔlɔnœ to ye! 'E wu kane, endje na kœza Gbolo nœ uzu gatshakane ayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ.
14.42: E áalafo, a na! Ayi kumu mœ má na ye!» Kœza Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.47-56; Luk 22.47-53; Yow 18.2-11)
14.43: Lɔndɔ á Yisu sœpe kœpa o'o kolœnœ atake, Yudasi, anga ayambarœ lœ andjokpa dœ bisha yi kumu ye. Tshe na awa bale dœ azu ndjoro dœ ɨngɨrɨ yakamba œdœ pe ndɨndɨ ɔyɔ tshakane endje. Agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba, aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ agbɔ Ayuda dá vwa lima endje.
14.44: Yudasi á tshe za Yisu yɔ œrœ pa lima tshelœ o'o dœ endje adœke: «Uzu á mœ kœuru tshelœ utu ye, œshe dœmœ. 'E za she, yé ala 'e gbɔ yeka á 'e kœgu dœ she.»
14.45: Trale Yudasi wuta, œ na ndo dœ she á pa fœ she adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ!» Ngbewo á uru tshelœ utu ye.
14.46: Azunœ tepa Yisu, á za she.
14.47: Yeka anga yanga endje á tshe sœ lima kpœtœmœ gbota ɨngɨrɨ yakamba nœ ye á de anga ayi akwa nœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba, á wa utu ye ndja.
14.48: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «'E na dœ ɨngɨrɨ yakamba dœ pe ndje ndɨndɨ ɔyɔ tshakane 'e ndœ mœ ɓata œmœ kœdœ ayi angba a?
14.49: Ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ, mœ sœ lima lœguru tœ 'e, mœ yi ndje lima œsœ œrœ lœ Tepelo, yé 'e zaza mœ lima nene. Kashe œneke kɔ wuta mbœrœ adœke o'o ala buku nœ Ndjaba kœmbœrœtœ ye.»
14.50: Ayambarœnœ kɔ katœ ye tɨ, yé œ kpa kpɨrɨ.
14.51: Anga gbolo yakoshe bale na lima manda ye, tshe i lima akpa ayi lœba ga tœ ɨgɨ ye. Endje za she.
14.52: A tshe katœ akpa ayi lœbanœ tɨ, á djɔ dœ ɔrɔ kpendro. Yisu ɓa utshu aayi kœwa ngbanga (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.57-68; Luk 22.54-55,63-71; Yow 18.12-18)
14.53: Endje za Yisu gutœnœ ɓa utshu egerœ nganga Ndjaba. Agbɔ ayudanœ ndje dœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwanœ dœ pe agbozu nœ anganga Ndjabanœ kɔ ngbɔtœ endje gasœnœ.
14.54: Petro sœ lima kœna manda Yisu yima yima lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ œrrr ɓa uguru gbagba anda nœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba, yé á sœ lima ga ɨndɨrɨ owo awa bale dœ ayi akwa nœ gbozu nœ anganga Ndjaba.
14.55: Agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ agboro aayi kœwa ngbanga, sœ kœpara lima awa adœke œne gbɔ anga uzu á tshe kœpa anga tshenea o'o goro œsœ Yisu, á œne kœgbɔ awa kœwo she. Yé endje gbɔgbɔ œnœ endje lima uzu bale nene.
14.56: Mbœrœ ɨlɨ azunœ sœ lima kœko o'o ga pa ye, kashe ama endje sœsœ lima bale nene.
14.57: Anga endje áalafo, œ za ɓishu ga pa ye adœke:
14.58: «A dji lima she adœke: “Œmœ, mœ ndɨ bala tshelœ anda Tepelonœ á azu mbœrœ dœ kane endje ye, yeka manda olo votɔ á mœ kpa mɔ anga tafonœ œneke á azu œ li kœmbœrœ dœ kane endje nene.”»
14.59: Ata atamœ gbaa, o'o ama endje sœsœ lima ndje awa bale nene.
14.60: Yé á egerœ nganga Ndjaba áafo gbara lœ ugurutœ azu á endje ngbɔtœ endje asœmœ, á yu Yisu adœke: «Ɓœ ɨɨ ama zœ ndœ o'o œneke kɔ á azu œ ko ga pa zœ asœke nene a?»
14.61: Yé Yisu sœ œrœ nœ ye ko ko ko, œ ɨɨ ama ye bale nene. Egerœ nganga Ndjabanœ kpa yu she adœke: «Ɓœ kœdœ Masiya, Gbolo nœ Ndjaba á azu œ donga she a?»
14.62: Yisu gi adœke: «Œ̃, œmœ kœdœ she. Yé 'e wu bala Gbolo nœ uzu kœsœ ga atɨ ga pa kuni Ndjaba á tshe sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ kɔ, yé 'e wu ndje bala she kœjerœ lœ ondoro ɓa lafo.»
14.63: Kœdji ataa, egerœ nganga Ndjaba oma dœ ókó, œ suru tshelœ lœba tœ ye, yé á pa adœke: «Ádá kpa kœdji atimu tœ azœ gugu nene!
14.64: 'E dji she kœpa ngbɨndɨ o'o goro œsœ Ndjaba a! 'E gbe má œnœ 'e dœ tœnœ kotoo?» Yé ngbɨɨ endje wa ga tœ ye adœke: «Tshe li dœ kuzu!»
14.65: Anga endje ugurunœ tetœ kœtu ngusha ga tœ ye, kœgwa ala ye dœ lœba, kœdu she, á lœ kœyu she adœke: «Pandœ uzunœ á tshe du ɓœ!» Yé aayi akwanœ tshu ga paye á sœ kœda ala ye. Petro 'ea Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.69-75; Luk 22.56-62; Yow 18.17,25-27)
14.66: Ɓata á Petro sœpe lima ɓa atɨ ɓa lœ gbagba, anga yashe akwa nœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba yi kumu ye.
14.67: Tshe wu Petro ɓa ɨndɨrɨ owo, á tondœ ye œrrr, á yu she adœke: «Œɓœ ndje, ɓœ kœdœ lima anga uzu nœ Yisu, uzu Nazarete.»
14.68: Petro vusœ nœ á pa adœke: «Mœ wuwusœ ye nene yé mœ sœ ndje gene nœ o'onœ á ɓœ sœ kœpa tœnœ.» Tshe áafo œ wuta œ ká ɓa tœ manda gbagbanœ.
14.69: Yashe sœmœ wu she œ tetœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ azu á ndje lœ lima kpœtœmœ adœke: «Uzunœ á tshe sœ ɓa e, kœdœ anga azunœ asœmœ.»
14.70: Petro kpa vusœ nœ. Manda nœ teasho, azu á ndje lœ lima kpœtœmœ kpa yu Petro adœke: «Adjapu, ɓœ kœdœ anga uzunœ mbœrœ ɓœ kœdœ uzu tshelœ Galilayi.»
14.71: Petro tetœ kœdarama ye dœ pe kœwa ɨgɨ ye adœke: «Mœ wuwusœ yakoshenœ a 'e pa tœ ye asœmœ nene.»
14.72: Ngbewo, á kɔngato kpa kɨ tœ bishanœ. Yé Petro gbe tshelœ ye ndœ o'onœ á Yisu pa lima fœ she adœke: «Utshunœ adœke kɔngato kɨ awa bisha ɓœ pa wa ɓœ wuwusœ mœ nene awa votɔ.» Tshe wuta dœ ɔgbɔ ga ushu, yeka a kɨ.

15.1: Dœ tshamazɨ tuu, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba vwarandœ o'o dœ agbɔ Ayuda, aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ pe aayi kœwa ngbanga para kɔkɔ. Endje i Yisu ga tœnœ, œ na dœ she fœ Pilato.
15.2: Pilato yu she adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ gbozugo nœ Ayuda a?» Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Œɓœ dá pa ataa.»
15.3: Agboro agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba pa wala ga pa ye tɔpanœ kpuru.
15.4: Pilato kpa yu she: «Ɓœ ɨ ama zœ nene a? Dji o'o á endje pa ga pa zœ asœke.»
15.5: Kashe Yisu gigi o'o bale nene, yé uvuru Pilato kpa ye.
15.6: Lɔkɔ angbo Pake lœ ngbugu bale dœ bale kɔ, Pilato sœ lima kœkatœ ayi kánga bale, tsheneke á endje kœyɔndœ ye.
15.7: Yé tsheneke á endje e she Barabase sœ lima lœ kánga dœ anga azu á endje nga koshe œrrr á wo uzu.
15.8: Azu ndjoro na ga ndœ Pilato, œ tetœ kœyu she adœke tshe kpa mbœrœ anga œrœnœ á tshe mbœrœ ɓalima fœ œne asœmœ.
15.9: Pilato gi fœ endje adœke: «'E yindœ nœ adœke mœ za awa fœ gbozu nœ Ayuda dœ́ tshe gu da ye a?»
15.10: Mbœrœ tshe wu lima sœnœ adœke agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjabanœ mbœrœ úkú ga tœ Yisu yeka á na dœ she fœ œne asœmœ.
15.11: Agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjabanœ bɨlɨ azu ndjoro kœyu Pilato adœke endje za awa fœ Barabase adœke tshe gu da ye.
15.12: Pilato kpa yu endje adœke: «Mœ mbœrœ gaɗe dœ uzu á 'e e she adœke gbozugo nœ Ayuda a?»
15.13: Endje ta rawa kɔkɔ adœke: «Wo she ɓa pa kurushi!»
15.14: Pilato gi fœ endje adœke: «Œrœ gaɗe dá tshe mbœrœ a?» Endje kpa ve rawa tœ ɔgbɔnœ adœke: «Wo she ɓa pa kurushi!»
15.15: Pilato vwara Barabase tœ kœza yanga fœ azu, œ za Yisu adœke endje ɓi she dœ ndjapa, œ za she ga tshakane endje adœke endje wo she ɓa pa kurushi. Aturugu mɔ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 27.27-31; Yow 19.2-3)
15.16: Aturugu li dœ Yisu ga lœ gbagba anda nœ gbozugonœ, œ e tœ endje para kɔkɔ.
15.17: Endje verœ yɔgbɔdɔ odoro lœba ga tœ ye, œ verœ kpoto ishi ga tœ kumu ye.
15.18: Manda nœ, endje tetœ kœmɔ she adœke: «Abala, gbozugo nœ Ayuda!»
15.19: Endje sɔ kumu ye dœ adja wara, œ tu ngusha ga tœ ye, yé œ ká kœgote dœ pe kœtra kumu endje ga atɨ ga tshatshu ye.
15.20: Manda kœmɔ she, endje sɔ lima odoro lœbanœ á endje verœ ga tœ ye yeka á kpa verœ adja lœba nœ ye ga tœ ye, á to she wuta tœnœ ndœ kœwo she. Kœɓi Yisu ga pa kurushi (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 27.33-44; Luk 23.36-43; Yow 19.16-24)
15.21: Anga uzu bale, ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Shimu, uzu tshalakpɨ Sirene, aba kœzu Alekezandre dœ pe Rufusi, to lima ɓa lœ kɨndɨ á sœ kœgu dœ awanœ asœmœ. Aturugu za she dœ ɔgbɔ á pa adœke tshe za átá kurushinœ tœ Yisu.
15.22: Endje to Yisu natœnœ ɓa tœ osho á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Gologota, ádánœ adœke: «Osho gbayashi kɔrɔ.»
15.23: Endje sú vinu á ndje ngbɔɓa dœ shundɔɗɔ ɔyɔ, œ za fœ Yisu adœke tshe ndjo kashe tshe vwaratœ ye tœ kœndjo tœnœ.
15.24: Endje kuru she ga pa kurushi, œ ta wuka pa lœba nœ ye tœ kœwu adœke uzu dœ uzu œ gbɔ œneketa.
15.25: Endje ɓi she ga pa kurushi lima dœ ada ɔlɔ mindu dœ vana.
15.26: Endje su ádá kœwo she lima ga pa tsheporo ɔyɔ adœke: «Gbozugo nœ Ayuda».
15.27: Endje kpa kuru anga aayi angba bisha ga pa kurushi ga ɨndɨrɨ tœ ye, anga ga pa kuni, anga ga pa gele ye. [
15.28: Ataa, œ mbœrœtœ endje dœ mara á endje sú lima ala mbeti adœke: «Endje dɨ lima she ga ugurutœ aayi angba.»]
15.29: Azu á ndje sœ lima kœvwanga tœ awa tɔ kpœtœmœ sœ kœgu she, kœvwi kumu endje kœpa pe adœke: «Ha, ɓœ pa lima adœke ɓœ ndɨ tshelœ egerœ zamɨtɨ anda Tepelo á kpa mɔ tshandœnœ manda olo votɔ,
15.30: ɓœ she tœ zœ dœ tœ zœ œ jerœ pa kurushinœ ga atɨ nene a?»
15.31: Awa bale, agboro agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjabanœ dœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwanœ mɔ tœ endje ugurutœ endje á pa adœke: «Tshe she lima anga azu, tshe sheshe tœ ye dœ tœ ye nene a!
15.32: Masiya, Gbozu nœ Israyele, tshe jerœ pa kurushinœ yeka á a kœwu á kœyindœ nœ.» Ayi angba á endje kuru ndje endje lima dœ she ga pa kurushi fa ndje tœ endje kpœtœtœ kœgu she. Kuzu Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 27.45-56; Luk 23.44-49; Yow 19.28-30)
15.33: Dœ kakpi ɔlɔ, osho wu kporokoto pa ɔshɔ djigi œrrr ga tœ ada ɔlɔ votɔ manda kakpi ɔlɔ.
15.34: Kœwuta ga tœ ada ɔlɔ nœ asœmœ, Yisu tá ɔgbɔ rawa adœke: «Eloyi, Eloyii, lema sabakatani?» Œ yindœ kœpa adœke: «Ndjaba nœ mœ, Ndjaba nœ mœ, mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ katœ mœ tɨ a?»
15.35: Anga azu á endje lœ lima kpœtœmœ pa adœke: «'E dji kane, tshe sœ tœ kœ'e Eliya!»
15.36: Anga uzu kpa œ nduru ndɔhɔrɔ gala ikpi vinu á vwele ga tœ kumu wara yeka á yi ga tœ ama ye adœke tshe ndjo dœ kœpa pa adœke: «'E kaka a wu Eliyanœ á tshe na tœ kœza she ga atɨ pa kurushinœ.»
15.37: Kashe Yisu ta ɔgbɔ rawa trale dœ kœtshu she.
15.38: Yé egerœ lœba á endje du ɓa sœnda Tepelo suru tshelœtœ ye bisha kœto ɓa lafo kpa ga atɨ.
15.39: Gbozu tshapa aturugu á tshe sœ lima ɓa utshu ye wu mara kuzu á Yisu tshu, á pa adœke: «Adja uzu asœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba.»
15.40: Anga ayashe ka lima zara á lœ kœtondœ osho, ugurutœ endje Mareya uzu Magadala, dœ Mareya ayi aya Jake œdœ Joze, dœ pe Salome.
15.41: Endje sœ lima kœna manda ye tœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ she lɔkɔ á tshe sœ lima ɓa lœ Galilayi. Anga azu ndjoro á endje ɔ lima dœ she ga lœ Yerusaleme lœ ndje lima kpœtœmœ. Kœshi Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 27.57-61; Luk 23.50-56; Yow 19.38-42)
15.42: -43 Dœ adɨla, ɓata tœnœ kœdœ lɔkɔ sabata, Yozefu uzu tshelœ Arimateyo na ga ndœ Pilato. Tshe kœdœ lima ndje anga uzu ugurutœ agboro ayi kœwa ngbanganœ, á tshe sœ ndje lima dœ gbetshelœ nœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba. Tshe ru tœ lɔsu ye á na kœyu she á kœza oko Yisu á kœshi.
15.44: Œ za awa fœ Pilato kœdji adœke Yisu tshu. Tshe e gbozu tshapa aturugunœ á yu she adœke Yisu tshu ata œndœ nœ dɨ ye a?
15.45: Manda kœdji gbozu tshapa aturugunœ, tshe za awa fœ Yozefu kœza oko Yisu.
15.46: Yozefu yɔ lœba kuzu, œ ɨ she tœ kurushi, œ vwele she dœ lœba akuzunœ, á za she ga lœ udu tshelœ badja bale á tshe yɔ. Yé á vwɨrɨ egerœ tame ga pa ogoro kudunœ.
15.47: Mareya uzu Magadala dœ Mareya ayi Joze ká lima kœwu osho á endje za oko Yisu ga tœnœ.

16.1: Olo sabata ro ye, Mareya uzu Magadala dœ Mareya ayi Yakobo dœ Salome yɔ yombo kœna kœdja dœ oko Yisu.
16.2: Pe dœ amazɨ tuu dœ ɔlɔ yenga, á sœ adœke ɔlɔ mbœrœ œsœ kœwuta tœnœ á endje ro ga pa udu.
16.3: Endje sœ lima kœpulœma endje natœnœ adœke: «Œɗe dá vwɨrɨ tame tœ manda udunœ fœ azœ a?»
16.4: Kœmesho ataa, endje wu adœke endje vwɨrɨ ɓamama egerœ tamenœ pa udu ga ɨndɨrɨ nœ.
16.5: Kœli ga lœ udu, endje wu anga gbolo yakoshe, tshe sœ ga pa kuni endje á verœ yɔgbɔdɔ lœba tœ imbinœ, awa za endje.
16.6: Kashe tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «Awa zaza 'e nene. 'E sœ kœpara Yisu uzu Nazarete á endje kuru kpœke she ga pa kurushi. Tshe shé ye, tshe sœsœpe kpœke nene. 'E wu uwu oshonœ á endje shi she tœnœ.
16.7: Yé 'e gu œ pandœ nœ fœ ayambarœ nœ ye œdœ pe Petro adœke: “Tshe ro utshu 'e ga lœ Galilayi da ye, 'e wu she ɓa zœ ɓata á tshe pa lima fœ 'e.”»
16.8: Endje wuta katsha lœ udunœ, œ za ɔrɔ kpagu tœnœ yé uvuru endje yu. Endje papa o'o fœ uzu bale nene mbœrœ awa li lima tœ endje ye. Yisu matœ ye manda kuzu ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 28.9-10; Yow 20.11-18)
16.9: Yisu she dœ amazɨ nœ ali olo lœ pɔsɔ, œ matœ ye utshu nœ fœ Mareya uzu Magadala á tshe gɔrɔ lima ekpe ɨshirɨ mindu dœ bisha (7) pa ye.
16.10: Tshe gu œ pandœ nœ fœ azu á tshe sœ lima sœnda bale dœ ɨkɨ œdœ ngola lœ ala endje dœ she.
16.11: Kashe, kœdji adœke Yisu sœ dœ soro yé œne wu she dœ ala œne tako, endje yiyi lima ndœ nœ ga tœ ye nene.
16.12: Mangba nœ, tshe matœ ye fœ anga anga endje bisha lœguru tœ endje á ndje sœ lima kœro ga lœ anga ogonœ.
16.13: Anga endje asœmœ gu œ kpa pandœ nœ fœ endje. Ata gbaa, endje yiyi lima ndœ nœ nene. Yisu matœ ye fœ ayambarœ nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bale (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 28.16-20; Luk 24.36-40; Yow 20.19-23; Akw 1.6-8)
16.14: Manda nœ kɔ, Yisu kpa matœ ye fœ ayambarœ nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bale, ɔlɔ á endje sœ lima awa bale pa ndaba tœ kœzɨ œrœ. Yé tshe bala endje mbœrœ upu sharapu œdœ pe ɔgbɔ lɔsu nœ endje, mbœrœ adœke endje yiyi lima ndœ kœyindœ o'o ama azu á endje pa lima adœke œne wu she dœ soro nene.
16.15: Tshe za o'o fœ endje adœke: «'E na djelœ ogo kɔ, œ pandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o fœ azu kɔ.
16.16: Uzu á tshe kœyindœ nœ, yé á kœgbɔ batisimu, tshe gbɔ soro. Kashe uzu tsheneke á tshe kœyiyindœ nœ nene, Ndjaba œ wa bala ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ ye.
16.17: Azu neke á endje kœyindœ nœ, endje mbœrœ mara œrœ nœ asœke: Endje gɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ, endje pa tafo o'o ama ogo,
16.18: á kœsœ adœke endje tepa ayakoro too adœke endje ndjo ekpe ɔyɔ, œrœ bale œ mbœrœ tœ endje nene. Endje to kane endje ga pa ayi koɓa, yé endje she.» Yisu ɔ ga lafo (Wu ɓa tœ Luk 24.50-53; Akw 1.9-11)
16.19: Manda kœza o'o fœ endje, Gbozu Yisu ɔ ga lafo, yé á sœ ga atɨ ga pa kuni Ndjaba.
16.20: Ayambarœnœ na lima kœpandœ o'onœ tœ osho kɔ. Gbozu Yisu mbœrœ lima akwa dœ endje awa bale. Tshe yi lima œsœ mara œrœ kɔ á li adœke endje kœmbœrœ yeka á kœma adœke o'onœ á endje pa kœdœ okporo o'o.

1.1: Gbozu Teofile, azu ndjoro tetœ kœsu mbeti tœ œrœ á mbœrœ lima tœ endje ugurutœ azœ.
1.2: Endje pandœ œrœnœ ɓata á endje dji lœ ama endjeneke á endje dœ atimu, á endje wu dœ ala endje lima pe tœ alinœ, yé á wuta aayi kœyisœ o'o ama Ndjaba.
1.3: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, œmœ ndje, mœ yu osho dœ ɔtshɔnœ tœ œneke kɔ á mbœrœ lima tœ endje kœto ɓa tœ adanœ. Yé gbozu Teofile, mœ wu dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke mœ su œtœnœ ngbɨ fœ ɓœ liaka mara á mbœrœ lima tœ endje bale dœ bale dœ awanœ.
1.4: Mœ sœ kœmbœrœ ataa, mbœrœ á ɓœ kœwusœ nœ adœke œneke kɔ á endje yi lima sœ nœ fœ ɓœ kœdœ adja o'o. Andjelu pandœ upu kœzu Yowane, ayi kœza batisimu
1.5: Lɔkɔ á Erode dœ lima gbozugo Yuda, anga nganga Ndjaba bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Zakariya sœ lima zœ. Tshe sœ lœ uwu anganga Ndjaba nœ Abiya. Awonœ kœdœ lima anga uzu bale lœ aata Aro, ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Elisabete.
1.6: Endje bibisha kœdœ lima azu á endje sœ ndjii ɓa utshu Ndjaba, yé endje sœ lima kœmbœrœtœ endje lindœ awa akwa œdœ lindœ awa o'o nœ Gbozu dœ ɔtshɔnœ.
1.7: Kashe endje gugu lima dœ gbolo nene, mbœrœ Elisabete kœdœ lima yashe mara. Ga pa nœ dœmœ, ungu endje bibisha ro lima sœ nœ ye.
1.8: Dœ anga ɔlɔ bale, Zakariya na kœmbœrœ akwa nœ anganga Ndjaba mbœrœ tœnœ kœdœ lima lɔkɔ nœ uwu anganga Ndjaba á tshe sœ lœ nœ.
1.9: Lindœ mara nœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ anganga Ndjaba, endje yu lima kadangba yeka á ke she adœke tshe li ga lœ œyerœ osho nœ Gbozu ndœ kœsho yombo ɓa zœ.
1.10: Lɔkɔ nœ kœsho yombonœ, azu ndjoro sœ lima ɓa shu ndœ kœza avwala.
1.11: Tshokombele, anga andjelu nœ Gbozu wuta ga tœ ye, œ ka ga tœ kuni ndaba á endje sho yombo panœ.
1.12: Lɔkɔ á Zakariya wu she, uvuru ye i gara yé awa litœ ye kpakpakpa.
1.13: Kashe andjelu pa fœ she adœke: «Zakariya, sœsœ dœ awa nene mbœrœ Ndjaba dji avwala nœ zœ ye. Awo zœ dœ Elisabete œ zu bala gbolo yakoshe fœ ɓœ, ɓœ ta ɨ'ɨrɨ ye adœke Yowane.
1.14: Upu nœ ye œ za egerœ yanga fœ ɓœ, yé azu ndjoro œ sœ dœ yanga tœ kœzu she.
1.15: Gbambanœ nene, tshe dœ bala egerœ uzu tœ ala Gbozu. Tshe ndjo bala vinu œdœ anga ipi á mbœrœ osho nene, yé Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ œ su bala she pe ɓa lœ ayinœ.
1.16: Tshe mbœrœ bala adœke azu Israyele ndjoro fatœ endje gu tœnœ ga ndœ Gbozu, Ndjaba nœ endje.
1.17: Tshe na ɓata ayi avwa nœ Ndjaba dœ ɨshirɨ œdœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Eliya, mbœrœ kœgi ayo ga ugurutœ agbolo dœ aaba endje œdœ pe kœyisœ œrœ fœ azu gbɔkumu adœke endje sœ dœ kœwusœtœ nœ azu á endje sœ ndjii, mbœrœ kœguma azu á endje li fœ Gbozu.»
1.18: Zakariya yu andjelu adœke: «Mœ wusœ nœ kotoo? Mbœrœ œmœ kœdœ yagbozu yé awo mœ fa yawaza ye.»
1.19: Andjelu gi fœ she adœke: «Œmœ kœdœ andjelu Gabriyele, mœ sœ kœka ɓa utshu Ndjaba mbœrœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ ye. Œshe dá vwa mœ mbœrœ adœke mœ pa fœ ɓœ dœ œ mɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'onœ asœ fœ ɓœ ndje.
1.20: Kashe ɓata á ɓœ yiyindœ nœ adœke o'o ama mœ sœ kœmbœrœtœ endje dali dœ olo á mœ gbe dœ tœnœ nene asœmœ, ɓœ fa tɔndu yé ɓœ kpa pa o'o nene œrrr ga tœ olo adœke œneke kɔ á mœ pandœ nœ fœ ɓœ, mbœrœtœ endje.»
1.21: Dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, azu sœ lima kœkate Zakariya, yé œ sœ kœyutœ endje tœ ádá á œndœ ye sœ lima kœdɨ tœnœ ɓa lœ œyerœ oshonœ ɓa zœ.
1.22: Kashe lɔkɔ á tshe wuta lima, tshe lili lima kœpa o'o ga tœ azu á endje ngbɔtœ endje asœmœ nene. Azunœ wusœ nœ lima adœke tshe wu œrœ lœ ulu ɓa tœ œyerœ oshonœ ɓa zœ. Tshe sœ lima kœma œrœ fœ endje kolœ lœ tɔndunœ.
1.23: Lɔkɔ á akwa nœ Zakariya ɓa lœ Tepelo ka lima ndœ olonœ asœmœ, tshe gu ga ndœ ye.
1.24: Manda nœ teasho atake, awonœ dœ Elisabete gbɔ nguzu, yé œ zatœ ye yiwa tœnœ manda yapu mindu. Tshe sœ lima kœpa adœke:
1.25: «'E wu egerœ œrœ á Gbozu mbœrœ fœ mœ asœ! Ngɔngɔ asœke, tshe fa ala ye ndœ mœ á yindœ kœgi mœ lœ œneke á sœ lima kœza tshula fœ mœ tœ ala azu.» Andjelu pandœ upu kœzu Yisu
1.26: Manda yapu mindu dœ bale, Ndjaba vwa andjelu Gabriyele ɓa lœ anga ongbo Galilayi bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ kœdœ Nazarete.
1.27: Tshe vwa she ɓa ndœ anga yawuru bale á tshe yindœ kœtotœ ye dœ anga yakoshe bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Yozefu, uzu tshelœ bɨngɨ nœ Davidi. Ɨ'ɨrɨ yawurunœ kœdœ lima Mareya.
1.28: Andjelu li ga ndœ ye œ pa fœ she adœke: «Sœ dœ yanga! Gbozu Ndjaba ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu ga ndœ zœ. Tshe sœ awa bale dœ ɓœ.»
1.29: Kumu Mareya kpa tatalikiri tœ o'onœ asœmœ ye. Tshe te lima tœ kœyutœ ye tœ ádá abalanœ asœmœ.
1.30: Andjelu kpa kœpa fœ she adœke: «Mareya, sœsœ dœ awa nene mbœrœ Ndjaba ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu ga ndœ zœ.
1.31: Lœ ondonœ asœke, ɓœ gbɔ nguzu, yé ɓœ zu bala gbolo yakoshe, œ ta ɨ'ɨrɨ ye adœke Yisu.
1.32: Tshe dœ bala egerœ uzu, yé Ndjaba á tshe ropa œrœ kɔ œ e she adœke tshe kœdœ Gbolo nœ œne. Gbozu Ndjaba œ za she bala tœ gbozugo manda atanœ dœ Davidi.
1.33: Tshe dœ gbozu tshapa azu Israyele waa dœ waa, yé akwa tshagbozu nœ ye œ ka nene.»
1.34: Mareya yu andjelu adœke: «Ka ɓata á mœ wuwu damba sœ yakoshe nene asœ, œ mbœrœtœ endje kotoo?»
1.35: Andjelu gi fœ she adœke: «Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ œ jerœ bala ga pa zœ, yé gbɔgbɔ nœ Ndjaba á tshe ropa œrœ kɔ œ tshu ɓœ ngbɨlɨ ɓata tshaagujara. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, gbolo á ɓœ zu she œ sœ yerœ yé endje e she adœke Gbolo nœ Ndjaba.
1.36: Wu ka, ayo zœ dœ Elisabete á endje e she yashe mara asœmœ, tshe gbɔ nguzu lœ yawaza tœ ye. Yé ngɔngɔ asœke, nguzunœ mbœrœ yapu mindu dœ bale.
1.37: Gbambanœ nene, œrœ á ropa Ndjaba gugu nene.»
1.38: Yé Mareya gi fœ she adœke: «Œmœ kœdœ ayi akwa nœ Gbozu; kaka adœke œneke kɔ á ɓœ pandœ nœ, mbœrœtœ endje ga tœ mœ.» Yé andjelu gitœ ye tœ ye ye. Mareya na kœtitœ Elisabete
1.39: Lœ olo manda nœ, Mareya áalafo œ gbɔgbɔtœ ye na tœnœ ga lœ anga ongbo bale á sœ ɓa pa kaga lœ ogo Yuda.
1.40: Tshe wuta ɓa zœ œ li ga lœ anda nœ Zakariya, yé œ bala Elisabete.
1.41: Lɔkɔ á Elisabete dji abala nœ Mareya, gbolo turu ɓa lœ ye, yé Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ su she kperœ.
1.42: Tshe ta ɔgbɔ rawa yé œ pa adœke: «Ndjaba to kane ye ga pa zœ kœropa ayashe kɔ œdœ pe ga pa gbolo á tshe sœ lœ zœ!
1.43: Œmœ kœdœ œɗe adœke ayi Gbozu nœ mœ na kœtitœ mœ a?
1.44: Gbambanœ nene, lɔkɔ á mœ dji abala nœ zœ, gbolo turu ɓa lœ mœ dœ yanga.
1.45: Œɓœ kœdœ uzu nœ yanga mbœrœ á ɓœ dji o'o á Gbozu Ndjaba pa fœ ɓœ, yé á yindœ nœ adœke œ mbœrœtœ ye.» Itshi nœ Mareya
1.46: Dœ tœnœ ataa, Mareya kœpa adœke: «Mœ sœ kœdonga Gbozu Ndjaba dœ lɔsu mœ bale,
1.47: yé lɔsu mœ su dœ yanga mangba Ndjaba á tshe dœ ayi kœshe mœ,
1.48: mbœrœ á tshe gbe dœ mœ dœ amba ayi akwa nœ ye. Ádánœ ataa, kœto kpesheke œdœ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ, azu œ e mœ yashe nœ yanga,
1.49: mbœrœ Ndjaba nœ gbɔgbɔ kɔ mbœrœ egerœ œrœ fœ mœ. Œshe kœdœ Ndjaba á tshe sœ yerœ.
1.50: Ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ, tshe sœ kœwu oyo endjeneke á endje sœ kœkpawa ye.
1.51: Tshe ma gbɔgbɔ kane yakoshe nœ ye, yé œ ndjɔ tshelœ azu á endje sœ dœ lɔsu nœ kœzatœ endje.
1.52: Tshe ko agbozugo ga atɨ pa ngande tshagbozu nœ endje, yé œ tɨ endjeneke á endje gugu dœ ádá nene, ga lafo.
1.53: Tshe to œrœ ndjoro fœ endjeneke á endje sœ dœ ogo, yé œ gi azu á endje sœ dœ œrœ ndjoro tshakane endje gbambanœ.
1.54: Tshe tɨ kane agbolo Israyele á endje dœ ayi akwa nœ ye ga lafo, kœli dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ga ndœ endje.
1.55: Tshe mbœrœ ga ndœ Abrayamo œdœ alɨvunœ waa dœ waa ɓata á tshe za lima uvu fœ aata azœ.»
1.56: Mareya mbœrœ lima ga pa œrœ nœ́ yapu votɔ ɓa ndœ Elisabete yeka á gu ga ndœ ye. Kœzu Yowane, ayi kœza batisimu
1.57: Olo kœzu nœ Elisabete li lima, yé tshe zu gbolo yakoshe ga pa ɔshɔ.
1.58: Amashenga nœ ye œdœ pe ayonœ djindœ nœ adœke Gbozu Ndjaba má ɔtshɔ lɔsu ga ndœ ye, yé œ sœ lima dœ yanga awa bale dœ she.
1.59: Kœwuta ga tœ olo mindu dœ votɔ manda kœzunœ, endje na kœwa gbolonœ tœ gaza, yé œ yi lima ndœ kœta ɨ'ɨrɨ abanœ dœ Zakariya ga pa ye.
1.60: Kashe ayinœ za o'o, œ pa adœke: «Œ̃ œ̃ nene, ɨ'ɨrɨ ye œ dœ Yowane.»
1.61: Endje pa fœ she adœke: «Anga uzu bale lœ bɨngɨ nœ zœ gugu dœ ɨ'ɨrɨnœ asœmœ nene.»
1.62: Yé endje yi kane endje ga tœ aba gbolo, mbœrœ kœwusœ ɨ'ɨrɨ á tshe gbe ma œnœ ye kœta ga tœ gbolonœ.
1.63: Zakariya e osho ndœ œrœ á endje sú mbeti ga pa nœ, yé œ su adœke: «Ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Yowane.» Azu kɔ kɨ lima tœ œsœnœ.
1.64: Pe tœ œsœnœ, Zakariya kpa tetœ kœpa o'o ye: Tshe tetœ kœdonga Ndjaba dœ ɔgbɔ tshama ye.
1.65: Awa litœ amashenga nœ ye kpakpakpa, yé azu kɔ pa kaga lœ ogo Yuda tetœ kœpandœ œrœnœ á mbœrœtœ endje asœmœ.
1.66: Endjeneke kɔ á endje dji lima o'onœ, endje gbɔndœ nœ ga tœ lɔsu endje yé œ tetœ kœyutœ endje adœke: «Gbolo asœke œ te bala œɗe?» Gbɔgbɔ nœ Gbozu Ndjaba sœ lima adja dœ she awa bale. Itshi nœ Zakariya
1.67: Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ su Zakariya, aba aya gbolonœ kperœ yé tshe tetœ kœgbara o'o ama Ndjaba adœke:
1.68: «A donga Gbozu, Ndjaba nœ azu Israyele, mbœrœ tshe gbe dœ azu nœ ye, yé á gi endje lœ kanga.
1.69: Tshe vwa anga ayi kœshe azu á tshe sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ, fœ azœ ugurutœ aata ayi akwa nœ ye dœ Davidi.
1.70: Tshe mbœrœ œneke á tshe pa lima ndœ nœ katshatsha, lœ ama ayerœ aayi kœgbara o'o nœ ye adœke,
1.71: œne ko azœ tshakane ayingba azœ œdœ tshakane endjeneke kɔ á endje sœ kœyiangba azœ.
1.72: Tshe ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu ga ndœ aata azœ, yé œ djedjerœndœ œyerœ madu nœ ye nene.
1.73: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba za lima uvu fœ ata azœ dœ Abrayamo adœke,
1.74: œne gi azœ tshakane ayingba azœ ye, á kœza awa fœ azœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ ye dœ awa nene,
1.75: adœke a wuta ayerœ azu, œ sœ ndjii utshu œne, ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ lœ soro azœ.»
1.76: Á Zakariya kœpa adœke: «Yé œɓœ, gbolo nœ mœ, ɓœ dœ bala ayi kœgbara o'o nœ Ndjaba á tshe ropa œrœ kɔ. Gbambanœ nene, ɓœ na utshu Gbozu mbœrœ kœguma awa ye.
1.77: Yé ɓœ yisœ nœ fœ azu nœ ye adœke, tshe sœ kœna kœshe endje, lœ awa nœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ endje.
1.78: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba nœ azœ sœ dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu, tshe sœ dœ lɔsu kœwu oyo waa. Tshe vwa ɨshirɨ ɔlɔ á to ɓa lafo ga pa azœ ɓata œneke á wuta dœ tshamazɨ.
1.79: Ɨshirɨ ɔlɔnœ œ tɔ ga pa endjeneke kɔ á endje sœ lœ ubu osho œdœ endjeneke á endje sœ kœkpa awa kuzu, mbœrœ kœyisœ awa nœ kœsœ gee fœ azœ.»
1.80: Gbolonœ sœ lima kœgerœ tœnœ yé Ndjaba za lima gbɔgbɔ fœ she, tshe sœ lima kœsœ ɓa lœ kpagagasho œrrr ga tœ lɔkɔ kœwuta she ga tœ ala azu Israyele.

2.1: Dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, Sezare Oguste á tshe dœ egerœ gbozugo Roma, za o'o fœ azu tshelœ ogo nœ ye kɔ adœke endje ro kœsu ɨ'ɨrɨ endje gala buku.
2.2: Ali kœsu ɨ'ɨrɨ azu gala bukunœ asœmœ dœmœ. Kiriniyuse dá dœ lima gbozu tshapa ogo Siri dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ.
2.3: Uzu dœ uzu kɔ gu lima ga lœ adja ongbo nœ ye mbœrœ adœke endje sú ɨ'ɨrɨ ye gala buku.
2.4: Yozefu to ndje ɓa lœ Nazarete, ongbo tshelœ ogo Galilayi, yeka á ro ga lœ Beteleme ɓa lœ ogo Yuda, ongbo á endje zu lima Davidi lœnœ. Gbambanœ nene, Davidi kœdœ lima ata Yozefu.
2.5: Tshe na lima ɓa zœ dœ awonœ dœ Mareya á tshe sœ lima dœ nguzu, mbœrœ adœke endje sú ɨ'ɨrɨ endje gala buku.
2.6: Dœ lɔkɔ á endje sœ lima ɓa lœ Beteleme, olo adœke tshe zu, li lima ye.
2.7: Tshe zu eya nœ ye tœ gbolo yakoshe, œ vwele she dœ lœba yé á za she ga pa gbarœ kœzɨrœ nœ agea, mbœrœ osho gugu lima mbœrœ endje ɓa tœ osho kœsœ á sœ mbœrœ agene nene. Andjelu wuta ga tœ aayi kœgbɔndœ ayarœ
2.8: Aayi kœgbɔndœ ayarœ á endje sœ ɓa lœ kɨndɨ yé á sœ kœsœ ɨndɨrɨ ukpulu ayarœ nœ endje dœ butshɔ, sœ ndje lima lakpɨnœ asœmœ zœ.
2.9: Anga andjelu nœ Gbozu Ndjaba bale wuta ga tœ endje, mokɔ nœ Gbozu za endje djigi, yé awa litœ endje kpakpakpa.
2.10: Kashe andjelu pa fœ endje adœke: «'E sœsœ dœ awa nene, mbœrœ mœ na kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o fœ 'e; o'o neke á za yanga kœropanœ fœ azu kɔ.
2.11: Dœ butshɔ asœke, ɓa lœ ongbo nœ Davidi, endje zu ayi kœshe azu; á tshe kœdœ Kristu , Gbozu nœ azœ.
2.12: Yé ambárá œrœ á 'e wusœ ye mbœrœ tœnœ dœke: 'e gbɔ anga aya gbolo á endje vwele she dœ lœba, yé á za she ga lœ gbarœ kœzɨrœ nœ agea.»
2.13: Tshokombele, anga aandjelu ndjoro to ɓa lafo œ ngbɔtœ endje ga tœ œsœnœ dœ she, yé á tetœ kœdonga Ndjaba adœke:
2.14: «Mokɔ nœ Ndjaba matœ ye ɓa lafo! Yé kœsœ gee sœ dœ azu á endje yindœ ye ɓa pa ɔshɔ.» Aayi kœgbɔndœ ayarœ na ga lœ Beteleme
2.15: Lɔkɔ á aandjelu fatœ endje kœɔ ga lafo, ayi kœgbɔndœ ayarœ pa œnœ endje adœke: «A na œrrr ɓa lœ Beteleme, œ wu œrœ á wuta ɓa zœ kane; œneke á Gbozu Ndjaba yisœ nœ fœ azœ asœmœ.»
2.16: Endje gbɔgbɔ lima tœ endje rotœnœ ga zœ yé œ gbɔ Mareya, Yozefu œdœ pe aya gbolo á ndje za she ga lœ gbarœ kœzɨrœ nœ agea.
2.17: Lɔkɔ á endje wu lima she, endje tetœ kœpandœ o'o á andjelu pa fœ endje tœ upu nœ gbolonœ fœ Amareya dœ Yozefu.
2.18: Yé azu para á endje lœ lima kœdji œneke á aayi kœgbɔndœ ayarœnœ sœ kœpandœ nœ asœmœ, kɨtœ œsœnœ.
2.19: Andaa Mareya sœ lima kœgbɔndœ o'onœ kɔ ga lɔsu ye, yé œ sœ kœpara ádánœ.
2.20: Manda nœ, aayi kœgbɔndœ ayarœnœ fatœ endje kœgu gangba endje dœ kœdonga Ndjaba œdœ dœ kœza mokɔ fœ she tœ œneke kɔ á endje wu yé á dji. Gbambanœ nene, œrœnœ kɔ mbœrœtœ endje ɓata á andjelu pandœ nœ. Endje ta ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu ga pa gbolonœ
2.21: Manda olo mindu dœ votɔ, olo kœwa gbolo tœ gaza li lima ye. Endje ta ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu ga pa ye. Œtœnœ kœdœ ɨ'ɨrɨ á andjelu ma lima utshunœ adœke ayinœ gbɔ nguzu. Endje na dœ Yisu ga lœ Tepelo
2.22: Lɔkɔ á olo kœdjutɔ kote Amareya dœ Yozefu yeka á endje kœfa ayerœ azu tœ ala Ndjaba, lindœ awa akwa nœ Moyize li lima, endje to Yisu na tœnœ ga lœ Tepelo ɓa lœ Yerusaleme mbœrœ kœma she fœ Gbozu.
2.23: Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ɓala Buku nœ awa akwa nœ Gbozu adœke: «Ali gbolo yakoshe kɔ á endje zu she utshunœ, endje za she fœ Gbozu Ndjaba.»
2.24: Œ li ndje adœke Amareya dœ Yozefu za ndje tokóró dœ akalambonga bisha too dœ ambepa bisha, ɓata á awa akwa nœ Gbozu pa ndje tœnœ.
2.25: Dá asœmœ, anga uzu á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Shimeyo, sœ lima ɓa lœ Yerusaleme. Œshe kœdœ lima uzu á tshe sœ ndjii dœ pe kœlɨsœ Ndjaba. Tshe sœ lima kœkate tsheneke á tshe na mbœrœ kœgi agbolo Israyele lœ oyo. Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ sœ lima dœ she,
2.26: yé œ ma fœ she adœke tshe wu Masiya á Gbozu Ndjaba œ vwa she, utshunœ adœke tshe tshu.
2.27: Ɨshirɨ to Shimeyo na tœnœ ga lœ Tepelo. Lɔkɔ á agbozu nœ Yisu na dœ she ga lœ Tepelo kœmbœrœ liaka œneke á endje sú ɓa la buku nœ awa akwa tœ upu nœ ye,
2.28: Shimeyo za she ga tshaabrœ ye, yé œ tetœ kœdonga Ndjaba adœke:
2.29: «Ngɔngɔ asœke Gbozu, kaka adœke ayi akwa nœ zœ, ro dœ kœsœ gee ɓata á ɓœ pa lima ndœ nœ.
2.30: Gbambanœ nene, mœ wu ayi kœshe á ɓœ vwa she dœ adja ala mœ ye.
2.31: Ɓœ guma ayi kœshenœ asœmœ mbœrœ azu kɔ.
2.32: Tshe sœ ɓata ɔlɔ á tɔ ga pa angbɨ azu, yé tshe dœ mokɔ mbœrœ azu Israyele á endje dœ́ agbolo nœ zœ.» Kœgbara o'o nœ Shimeyo
2.33: Aba Yisu œdœ ayinœ katœ ama endje tɨ ɔsɔ tœ œneke á Shimeyo sœ lima kœpa tœnœ tœ upu nœ ye.
2.34: Shimeyo to kane ye ga pa endje yé œ pa fœ Mareya, ayi Yisu adœke: «Ndjaba ke gbolo asœ mbœrœ lœ awa nœ ye, azu ndjoro lœ Israyele œ yo too œ she. Tshe dœ bala ambárá nœ Ndjaba kashe azu œ vwaratœ endje tœ ye.
2.35: Tshe ma gbetshelœ nœ azu á zatœ endje yiwa tœnœ ɓa lɔsu endje ngbɨ ga ushu. Yé tœ ɓœ dœ Mareya, oyo nœ zœ œ sœ bala ɓata endje sú ɓœ peara dœ ɨngɨrɨ yakamba.» Ana, yashe kœgbara o'o
2.36: Anga yashe kœgbara o'o bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Ana, sœ lima zœ. Œshe kœdœ yawuru nœ Fanuwele, uzu tshelœ mara nœ Azere. Tshe wuta lima ɔgbɔ yawaza ye. Tshe i lima akɔnœ pe lœ yawuru tœ ye, yé endje mbœrœ ungu mindu dœ bisha (7) yeka á yakoshenœ tshu.
2.37: Manda nœ, tshe sœpe lima tœ yashe koya yé œ sœ dœ ungu zazu vana dœ vana (84) . Tshe gigi lima tœ ye lœ Tepelo nene. Kashe butshɔ dœ ɔlɔ, tshe sœ lima kœmbœrœ akwa fœ Ndjaba lœ awa nœ kœyotshelœma ye œdœ pe kœza avwala.
2.38: Tshe yi kumu ye pe dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, yé œ tetœ kœdonga Ndjaba dœ kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ gbolonœ fœ endjeneke á endje sœ lima kœkate adœke Ndjaba she Yerusaleme. Kœgu ga lœ Nazarete
2.39: Lɔkɔ á Ayozefu dœ Mareya mbœrœ lima œneke kɔ á awa akwa nœ Gbozu sœ kœyɔndœ nœ, endje gu lima ndœ ogo Galilayi, ɓa lœ Nazarete á dœ ongbo nœ endje.
2.40: Gbolonœ sœ lima kœgerœ tœnœ dœ undu ye œdœ dœ kœwusœtœ, yé kane Ndjaba sœ lima pa ye. Dœ ungu ndjokpa dœ bisha, Yisu li ga lœ Tepelo
2.41: Ungu bale dœ bale, agbozu nœ Yisu sœ lima kœro ga lœ Yerusaleme ndœ angbo Pake.
2.42: Lɔkɔ á Yisu sœ lima dœ ungu ndjokpa dœ bisha, endje na dœ she ga lœ Tepelo ɓata á mbœrœ ɓalima tœ ye lœ mara nœ endje.
2.43: Lɔkɔ á angbonœ ka lima, Ayozefu dœ Mareya fatœ endje kœgu tœnœ, kashe Yisu sœ lima pe lœ Yerusaleme yé agbozu nœ ye wuwu she nene.
2.44: Endje gbe lima adœke Yisu te manda azu á œne sœ kœgu tœ awanœ dœ endje asœmœ. Endje lo olo bale lœ ana yé osho kɔrɔ, endje tetœ kœpara she lœ ugurutœ ayo endje œdœ pe lœ ugurutœ anga endje.
2.45: Kashe endje gbɔgbɔ lima she nene. Endje kwa ga lœ Yerusaleme kœpara she.
2.46: Endje totœ kœpara she œrrr manda olo votɔ á gbɔ lima she ɓa lœ Tepelo. Tshe sœ ga atɨ ɓa ugurutœ aayi kœyisœrœ œ sœ kœdji endje, dœ kœyu endje dœ o'o.
2.47: Azu kɔ á endje sœ lima kœdji she, ka lima tœ ama endje tɨ ɔsɔ tœ kœwusœrœ nœ ye dœ pe o'o á tshe sœ kœgi tœnœ.
2.48: Lɔkɔ á agbozu nœ ye wu she, endje i gbɔndjuru yé ayinœ pa fœ she adœke: «Gbolo nœ mœ, mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ mbœrœ mara œrœ ata fœ 'a? A'a dœ aba zœ, 'a para ɓœ dœ awa.»
2.49: Tshe gi fœ endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e para mœ a? 'E wuwusœ nœ nene adœke œ li adœke mœ sœ ɓa lœ anda nœ Aba mœ a?»
2.50: Kashe agbozu nœ ye djidji lima tshelœ kata œneke á tshe pa fœ endje nene.
2.51: Yisu gu awa bale dœ endje ga lœ Nazarete; tshe sœ lima kœmbœrœtœ ye lindœ o'o endje. Ayinœ gbɔndœ œrœ á mbœrœtœ endje asœmœ kɔ ga tœ lɔsu ye.
2.52: Yisu sœ lima kœgerœ tœnœ dœ undu ye œdœ lœ kœwusœtœ, yé œ sœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ á sœ kœza yanga fœ Ndjaba œdœ pe fœ azu.

3.1: Lɔkɔ á Tibere, egerœ gbozu tshapa ogo Roma mbœrœ lima ungu ndjokpa dœ mindu tœ akwa, anga agbozugo sœ ndje lima kœmbœrœ akwa tshagudɨ ye. Agbozugonœ kœdœ lima Pose Pilato á tshe sœ lima pa ogo Yuda, Erode pa ogo Galilayi, ayanœ dœ Filipo sœ lima pa ogo Eturi œdœ Trakonitide, yé Lisaniase sœ lima pa ogo Abilene.
3.2: Yé Ana œdœ Kayifa kœdœ lima agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba. Dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, Ndjaba pa o'o fœ Yowane, gbolo nœ Zakariya ɓa lœ kpagagasho.
3.3: Yowane tetœ kœna djelœ ogo kɔ á sœ ɨndɨrɨ ungu Yɔrdane, yé œ sœ kœmɨndœ o'o fœ azu adœke: «'E fatshalɔsu 'e dœ́ œ gbɔ batisimu yeka á Ndjaba kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ 'e kɔ.»
3.4: Ɓata Isaya, anga ayi kœgbara o'o su lima ala mbeti nœ ye adœke: «Anga uzu sœ kœta rawa ɓa lœ kpagagasho adœke: 'E guma ala awa Gbozu, 'e yɔrɔ ala awa ye ndjii.
3.5: 'E be kudu kɔ, kaga dœ koto kɔ œ fa akpala osho. 'E yɔrɔ ala awa á sœ tœ dengɔngɔnœ. 'E guma awa á sœ dœ kudu adœke œ sœ kpaa.
3.6: Yé azu kɔ œ wu kœshe nœ Ndjaba.»
3.7: Ukpulu azu na lima ga ndœ Yowane adœke tshe za batisimu fœ œne. Tshe sœ lima kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Ukpulu ekpe ayakoro! Uzu ɗe dá yisœ nœ fœ 'e adœke 'e kpa awa ókó nœ Ndjaba á ndo kœna tœnœ a?
3.8: 'E mbœrœ œrœ á sœ kœma adœke 'e fatshalɔsu 'e ye, yé 'e papa mbœrœ 'e dœ tœ 'e nene adœke: “Abrayamo kœdœ ata azœ” Gbambanœ nene, mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e adœke, Ndjaba li kœfa badja asœke tœ aata Abrayamo.
3.9: Gonda sœ yindjindjinœ mbœrœ kœvwa dœ ɔyɔ tɔtœ œshenœ kɔ ye. Ɔyɔ kɔ á elenœ kœgaga nene, endje de yé œ ko va ga tœ owo.»
3.10: Azu sœ lima kœyu Yowane adœke: «Ataa, œrœ gaɗe dá 'a kœmbœrœ a?»
3.11: Tshe gi lima fœ endje adœke: «Uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ lœba okoro bisha, tshe za anganœ bale fœ tsheneke á tshe gugu dœ tœnœ nene. Yé uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ kœzɨrœ, tshe mbœrœ ndje awa bale.»
3.12: Aayi kœko ngendja lapo na ndje lima adœke Yowane za batisimu fœ œne, yé œ yu she adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, œrœ gaɗe dá 'a kœmbœrœ a?»
3.13: Tshe gi fœ endje adœke: «'E kaka laponœ fœ azu kœrosœ amanœ á endje za fœ 'e nene.»
3.14: Aturugu yu ndje lima she awa bale adœke: «Ka 'a, œrœ gaɗe dá 'a kœmbœrœ a?» Tshe gi fœ endje adœke: «'E koko ngendja tshaabrœ azu dœ ɔgbɔ nene; 'e papa ndje o'o dœ wala ga pa uzu nene. Kashe 'e gbe kolœ dœ ngendja tshangba akwa nœ 'e.»
3.15: Azu sœ lima kœkate Masiya, uzu dœ uzu sœ lima kœgbe adœke Yowane kœdœ ete she.
3.16: Yé Yowane pa fœ endje kɔ adœke: «Œmœ, mœ sœ kœza batisimu fœ 'e dœ ungu; kashe tsheneke á tshe na manda mœ, tshe ropa mœ dœ gbɔgbɔ ye; mœ lili kœka ga utshu ye dœ pe kœzu uwu œrœda nœ ye nene. Œshe, tshe za bala batisimu lœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ œdœ dœ owo fœ 'e.
3.17: Tshe za gbarœ kœpe dœ tshelœ indji ngwarœ ga tshaabrœ ye. Manda kœpe tœnœ, tshe gumasœ indji ngwarœnœ gala kogba nœ ye, yé œ ko oforonœ va ga tœ owo neke á ru nene.»
3.18: Ataa, Yowane mɨ lima anga angbɨ upu ndjoro fœ endje, yé œ yisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o fœ azu.
3.19: Dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, Yowane gbagbara Erode á tshe dœ́ gbozugo Galilayi mbœrœ á tshe to lima Erodiade, awo ayanœ œdœ pe anga ngbɨndɨrœ ndjoro á tshe mbœrœ lima.
3.20: Yé ga pa upu á tshe mbœrœ kɔ, tshe kpa za Yowane ga lœ kánga. Yowane za batisimu fœ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 3.13-17; Mar 1.9-11)
3.21: Manda kœza batisimu fœ azu kɔ, Yowane za ndje batisimu fœ Yisu. Dœ lɔkɔ á Yisu sœ lima kœza avwala fœ Ndjaba, tshalafo kɔrɔ ngbɨ.
3.22: Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ jerœ ga pa ye ɓata mbepa, yé tshama to ɓa lafo œ pa adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ mœ á mœ yindœ zœ waa; mbœrœ ɓœ, mœ sœ dœ yanga.» Aata Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 1.1-16)
3.23: Yisu sœ lima dœ ungu ga pa œrœ nœ́ zazu bale dœ ndjokpa (30) yeka á tetœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ ye. Azu gbe lima adœke œshe kœdœ gbolo nœ Yozefu á tshe dœ́ Yozefu dœ gbolo nœ Eliya,
3.24: yé Eliya kœdœ gbolo nœ Mata, Mata kœdœ gbolo nœ Levi, Levi kœdœ gbolo nœ Meleki, Meleki kœdœ gbolo nœ Yanayi, yé Yanayi kœdœ gbolo nœ Yozefu.
3.25: Yozefu kœdœ gbolo nœ Matatiase, Matatiase kœdœ gbolo nœ Amose, Amose kœdœ gbolo nœ Nawume, Nawume kœdœ gbolo nœ Eseli, yé Eseli kœdœ gbolo nœ Nagayi.
3.26: Nagayi kœdœ gbolo nœ Maate, Maate kœdœ gbolo nœ Matatiase, Matatiase kœdœ gbolo nœ Semeyine, Semeyine kœdœ gbolo nœ Yoseke, yé Yoseke kœdœ gbolo nœ Yoda.
3.27: Yoda kœdœ gbolo nœ Yonane, Yonane kœdœ gbolo nœ Resa, Resa kœdœ gbolo nœ Zorobabele, Zorobabele kœdœ gbolo nœ Salatiyele, yé Salatiyele kœdœ gbolo nœ Neri.
3.28: Neri kœdœ gbolo nœ Meleki, Meleki kœdœ gbolo nœ Adi, Adi kœdœ gbolo nœ Kosame, Kosame kœdœ gbolo nœ Elemadame, yé Elemadame kœdœ gbolo nœ Ere.
3.29: Ere kœdœ gbolo nœ Yisu, Yisu kœdœ gbolo nœ Eliezere, Eliezere kœdœ gbolo nœ Yorime, Yorime kœdœ gbolo nœ Mata, yé Mata kœdœ gbolo nœ Levi.
3.30: Levi kœdœ gbolo nœ Shimeyo, Shimeyo kœdœ gbolo nœ Yuda, Yuda kœdœ gbolo nœ Yozefu, Yozefu kœdœ gbolo nœ Yoname, yé Yoname kœdœ gbolo nœ Eliyakimi.
3.31: Eliyakimi kœdœ gbolo nœ Meleya, Meleya kœdœ gbolo nœ Mena, Mena kœdœ gbolo nœ Matata, Matata kœdœ gbolo nœ Nata, yé Nata kœdœ gbolo nœ Davidi.
3.32: Davidi kœdœ gbolo nœ Yese, Yese kœdœ gbolo nœ Obede, Obede kœdœ gbolo nœ Boaz, Boaz kœdœ gbolo nœ Sala, yé Sala kœdœ gbolo nœ Nashone.
3.33: Nashone kœdœ gbolo nœ Aminadabe, Aminadabe kœdœ gbolo nœ Adimine, Adimine kœdœ gbolo nœ Arni, Arni kœdœ gbolo nœ Eserone, Eserone kœdœ gbolo nœ Perese, yé Perese kœdœ gbolo nœ Yuda.
3.34: Yuda kœdœ gbolo nœ Yakobo, Yakobo kœdœ gbolo nœ Izaka, Izaka kœdœ gbolo nœ Abrayamo, Abrayamo kœdœ gbolo nœ Tera, yé Tera kœdœ gbolo nœ Nahore.
3.35: Nahore kœdœ gbolo nœ Seruge, Seruge kœdœ gbolo nœ Rewu, Rewu kœdœ gbolo nœ Pelege, Pelege kœdœ gbolo nœ Ebere, yé Ebere kœdœ gbolo nœ Shela.
3.36: Shela kœdœ gbolo nœ Kenane, Kenane kœdœ gbolo nœ Arpakesade, Arpakesade kœdœ gbolo nœ Seme, Seme kœdœ gbolo nœ Nowa, yé Nowa kœdœ gbolo nœ Lameke.
3.37: Lameke kœdœ gbolo nœ Matusaleme, Matusaleme kœdœ gbolo nœ Enoke, Enoke kœdœ gbolo nœ Yerede, Yerede kœdœ gbolo nœ Malaleyele, yé Malaleyele kœdœ gbolo nœ Kenane.
3.38: Kenane kœdœ gbolo nœ Enoke, Enoke kœdœ gbolo nœ Sete, Sete kœdœ gbolo nœ Adamo, yé Adamo kœdœ gbolo nœ Ndjaba.

4.1: Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ su lima Yisu kperœ lɔkɔ á tshe to ɓa langu Yɔrdane á gu; yé Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba to she na tœnœ ga lœ kpagagasho.
4.2: Tshe lo lima ɓa zœ olo zazu bisha, yé á djaboro na kœwu lɔsu ye. Tshe zɨzɨ lima œrœ lœ olonœ asœmœ nene, yé manda nœ ogo litœ ye kpakpakpa ye.
4.3: Djaboro pa fœ she adœke: «Œdœ ɓœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba, pa fœ badja asœke œ fatœ ye tœ mapa.»
4.4: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Endje su ɓala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Uzu œ sœ dœ soro kolœ mbœrœ mapa nene.”»
4.5: Djaboro 'ɔ dœ she œrrr ɓa tœ anga osho á sœ ɓa lawutsha, œ yisœ Ogo gbozu nœ tshapashɔ djigi fœ she.
4.6: Yé œ pa fœ she adœke: «Mœ ko ogonœ asœke dœ gbɔgbɔnœ œdœ œrœ tshelœnœ kɔ fœ ɓœ. Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba za lima fœ mœ; mœ li kœza fœ uzu neke á mœ yindœ ye.
4.7: Œdœ ɓœ kœgote ga utshu mœ, œrœnœ kɔ œ te œnœ zœ ye.»
4.8: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Buku nœ Ndjaba pa adœke: “Ɓœ gote ga utshu Gbozu Ndjaba nœ zœ, yé ɓœ donga kolœ she tshebabale.”»
4.9: Djaboro kpa na dœ she ɓa lakpɨ Yerusaleme œ za she ɓa pa kumu Tepelo, yé á pa fœ she adœke: «Œdœ ɓœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba, to ɓa ke œ ɨ tshirɨ ga atɨ.
4.10: Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ɓala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Ndjaba œ za awa fœ aandjelu nœ ye adœke endje gbɔndœ zœ.”
4.11: Yé ga pa nœ: “Endje za ɓœ dœ kane endje ga atɨ mbœrœ á ɓœ kœzaza ada zœ tɔ badja nene.”»
4.12: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Endje sú ɓa la Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Papara awa kœwu lɔsu Gbozu Ndjaba nœ zœ nene.”»
4.13: Manda kœwu lɔsu Yisu dœ aka mara afara kɔ, djaboro gitœ ye tœ ye kœkate œrrr ga tœ anga olo á tshe za. Yisu tetœ kœmbœrœ ali akwa nœ ye ɓa lœ Galilayi (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 4.12-17; Mar 1.14-15)
4.14: Yisu su dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ, œ kwatœ ye ga lœ Galilayi yé ɨ'ɨrɨ ye za lima osho djigi.
4.15: Tshe sœ lima kœyisœ œrœ ɓa lœ Sinagoga nœ endje, yé azu kɔ sœ kœpandœ œsœ mokɔ nœ ye. Azu Nazarete yiyi lima ndœ kœyisœrœ nœ Yisu nene (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 13.54-58; Mar 6.1-6)
4.16: Yisu na ga lœ Nazarete, tshalakpɨ á tshe gerœ lœnœ. Dœ lɔkɔ sabata, tshe li ga lœ Sinagoga lindœ mara ye. Tshe áalafo ndœ kœdɨ o'o ama Ndjaba.
4.17: Endje za buku á ayi kœgbara o'o Isaya su, fœ she. Tshe gbara ala bukunœ ga tœ osho á endje sú adœke:
4.18: «Ɨshirɨ nœ Gbozu sœ pa mœ mbœrœ á tshe ke mœ adœke mœ yisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o fœ ayi oyo. Tshe vwa mœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ aayi kánga adœke endje wuta lœ kánga nœ endje ye, yé fœ aayibula adœke endje kpa wu osho. Tshe vwa mœ adœke mœ ko azu á endje sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ endje ga ushu,
4.19: yé mœ pandœ nœ fœ azu adœke, ungu á Gbozu yindœ kœma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye li ye.»
4.20: Manda kœdɨ bukunœ, Yisu dje ga tœnœ œ gi fœ ayi akwa tshelœ Sinagoga, yé œ sœ ga atɨ. Azu kɔ á endje sœ lima sœndanœ, ko ala endje djɔrrr ga tœ ye.
4.21: Yé tshe tetœ kœpa fœ endje adœke: «O'onœ á 'e dji la bukunœ kpesheke asœ, œ mbœrœtœ endje ye.»
4.22: Azu kɔ sœ lima kœpa ɔtshɔ o'o tœ upu nœ Yisu. Endje katœ ama endje tɨ ɔsɔ tœ ɔtshɔ o'o á tshe sœ lima kœpa tœnœ, yé œ tetœ kœyutœ endje adœke: «Œ dœ́dœ́ gbolo nœ Yozefu dœke nene a?»
4.23: Yisu mɨndœ nœ fœ endje adœke: «Mœ wu adja sœ nœ adœke 'e pa ndœma toro asœ fœ mœ: “Monganga, shetœ zœ dœ tœ zœ.” 'E kpa pa ndje fœ mœ adœke: “'A wusœ neke kɔ á ɓœ mbœrœ lima ɓa lœ Kaparnawumu ye. Mbœrœ ndje tshetœ œrœnœ asœmœ ɓa lœ ongbo nœ zœ dœ tœ zœ ɓa ke.”»
4.24: Yé tshe kpa pa adœke: «Mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, endje yiyindœ ayi kœgbara o'o ɓa lakpɨ á endje zu she tœnœ nene.
4.25: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, ayashe koya do lima panœ ɓa lœ Israyele lɔkɔ á Eliya sœ lima kœgbara o'o ye. Dœ lɔkɔ nœ asœmœ ndje, yavuru nini lima nene œrrr manda ungu votɔ dœ yapu mindu dœ bale, yé egerœ ogo za lima tshapa ɔshɔ djigi.
4.26: Andaa, Ndjaba vwavwa lima Eliya fœ anga bale lœ ugurutœ endje nene. Kashe tshe vwa she kolœ ɓa ndœ anga yashe koya ɓa lœ Sarepeta, ɓa lœ ogo Sidona.
4.27: Aayi boroma sœ lima ndjoro lœ ogo Israyele lɔkɔ á Elisa dœ lima ayi kœgbara o'o. Andaa anga bale sheshe lima nene, kashe kolœ Namane á tshe kœdœ uzu ogo Siri dá she.»
4.28: Kœdji lima o'onœ asœmœ ataa, azu kɔ á endje sœ ɓa lœ Sinagoga, suku dœ ókó tɔpanœ kpuru.
4.29: Endje áalafo ndœ Yisu œ gi she wuta tœnœ ga shu lœ ongbo, yé œ to she na tœnœ ɓa tœ leta kumu koto á endje mbœrœ ongbo nœ endje ga panœ mbœrœ á kœgeta she ga atɨ.
4.30: Kashe tshe ro tɔ ugurutœ endje, yé œ pu œsœ awa tœ ye. Yisu gɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 7.28-29; Mar 1.21-28)
4.31: Yisu na ga lœ Kaparnawumu, ongbo tshelœ ogo Galilayi, yé œ sœ lima kœyisœ œrœ fœ azu kɔ dœ lɔkɔ sabata.
4.32: Azu kɨ lima tœ mara kœyisœrœ nœ ye waa, mbœrœ tshe sœ lima kœpa o'o ɓata uzu á tshe sœ dœ tshagbozu.
4.33: Anga uzu á tshe sœ lima dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa ye sœ ndje lima lœ Sinagoganœ. Tshe ta rawa dœ ɔgbɔ tshama ye adœke:
4.34: «Ha! Yisu uzu Nazarete, ɓœ yindœ kœmbœrœ gaɗe tœ 'a? Ɓœ na mbœrœ kœwo 'a? Mœ wusœ zœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ: Œɓœ kœdœ œyerœ uzu á Ndjaba vwa she.»
4.35: Yisu ra ekpe ɨshirɨ sœmœ adœke: «Sœ koko yé œ wuta lœ uzunœ asœke!» Pe kpœtœ œsœnœ, ekpe ɨshirɨnœ za she vesho ga ugurutœ azu yé œ wuta lœ ye, kashe œ mbœmbœrœ ekperœ tœ ye nene.
4.36: Azu kɔ kɨ lima tœ œsœnœ yé œ tetœ kœyutœ endje adœke: «Asœ kœdœ mara o'o gaɗe? Tshe pa o'o dœ tshagbozu œdœ pe dœ gbɔgbɔ fœ ekpe ɨshirɨ, yé ekpe ɨshirɨ wuta ye.»
4.37: Yé ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu za osho djigi lœ tshakala ogonœ asœmœ. Yisu she aayi koɓa ndjoro (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 8.14-17; Mar 1.29-34)
4.38: Yisu wuta lima lœ Sinagoga, œ na ɓa sœnda nœ Shimu. Ayi mbeya Shimu sœ lima dœ ɔgbɔ koɓa biwa, yé endje kɨ fœ Yisu adœke tshe she she.
4.39: Yisu gitœ ye ndo dœ she, œ pa o'o dœ ɔgbɔ yé koɓa biwanœ katœ ye yé! Pe kpœtœ œsœnœ, tshe áalafo œ tetœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ endje.
4.40: Dœ kɨdala, azu na lima dœ mara koɓa nœ endje ngbangbangba fœ Yisu. Tshe to kane ye ga pa endje bale dœ bale, yé endje she ye.
4.41: Ekpe ɨshirɨ wuta ndje lima lœ azu ndjoro dœ kœta rawa adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba!» Kashe Yisu ra lima aekpe ɨshirɨnœ adœke endje pupu o'o bale nene. Gbambanœ nene, endje wusœ nœ adœke Yisu kœdœ Masiya. Yisu yisœ œrœ djelœ Sinagoga (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 1.35-39; Mat 4.23)
4.42: Lɔkɔ á osho kɔrɔ, Yisu wuta lœ ongbonœ asœmœ œ na ga lœ kpagagasho. Azu ndjoro na lima kœpara she. Lɔkɔ á endje gbɔ she, endje yiyindœ nœ adœke tshe gitœ ye tœ œne nene.
4.43: Kashe Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Œ li adœke mœ mɨ ndje ndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ ogo Gbozu Ndjaba ɓa lœ anga angbɨ ongbo. Gbambanœ nene, mbœrœ tœnœ dá Ndjaba vwa mœ.»
4.44: Yé tshe yi lima sœ œrœ djelœ Sinagoga lœ ogo Yuda.

5.1: Dœ anga ɔlɔ bale, Yisu sœ lima kœyisœ œrœ ɨndɨrɨ mangu Genazarete , yé azu ndjoro ndɨvwɨrɨ she mbœrœ kœdji o'o ama Ndjaba.
5.2: Tshe wu agba bisha ɓa tœ mangunœ, kashe ayi kœpara ageatshalangu jerœ œ sœ kœdjutɔ gbanda nœ endje.
5.3: Yisu 'ɔ ga lœ anga agbanœ bale á dœ́ œnœ Shimu, yé œ pa fœ she adœke tshe katœ mangunœ œ gi agbanœ teasho ga uguru ungu. Tshe sœ ga atɨ ga lœ agba yé œ tetœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ ukpulu azu.
5.4: Lɔkɔ á tshe yisœ œrœnœ á ka ye, tshe pa fœ Shimu adœke: «Gi agbanœ ɓa tœ œsœ dili ungu, yé 'e vwi gbanda nœ 'e mbœrœ kœko ageatshalangu.»
5.5: Shimu gi fœ she adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, 'a wu oyo dœ butshɔ 'owara, 'a gbɔgbɔ œrœ bale nene. Kashe ɓata á ɓœ pa fœ mœ ye, mœ vwi gbandanœ ye.»
5.6: Endje vwi gbanda œ ko lima ageatshalangu ndjoro, yé tshelœ gbanda nœ endje te lima tœ kœsuru tœnœ.
5.7: Endje wu ata, œ gavwa anga anga endje á endje sœ ɓa lœ anga angbɨ agba adœke, endje na dœ́ œne gbota gbandanœ dœ endje. Endje na, yé œ ko ageatshalangu œrrr kperœ dœ agba bibisha. Ama agba sœ pe lima teasho adœke œ nduru dœ endje.
5.8: Lɔkɔ á Shimu Petro wu ata, tshe gote dœ matshukuda ye ga utshu Yisu yé œ pa adœke: «Gbozu, gitœ zœ tœ mœ lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ, mbœrœ œmœ kœdœ ayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ.»
5.9: Awa za lima Shimu dœ anganœ kɔ á endje na dœ endje, tœ kœwu ageatshalangu ndjoro á endje vwi endje.
5.10: Awa za ndje lima Ajake dœ Yowane, agbolo nœ Zebedayi á endje dœ lima aanga Shimu. Kashe Yisu pa fœ Shimu adœke: «Sœsœ dœ awa nene. Kœto kpesheke, ɓœ kpa dœ ayi kœpara ageatshalangu nene kashe ɓœ te ayi kœpara azu.»
5.11: Endje gi agba nœ endje kɔ ga tœ mangu, œ katœ œrœ kɔ yé œ te manda ye. Yisu she ayi boroma (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 8.1-4; Mar 1.40-45)
5.12: Ɔlɔ bale, Yisu sœ lima ɓa lœ anga ongbo bale á anga ayi boroma sœ lœnœ. Lɔkɔ á tshe wu lima Yisu, tshe na œ gote ga utshu ye, œ kɨ fœ she adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, œdœ ɓœ kœyindœ nœ, ɓœ she mœ adœke mœ wuta yerœ.»
5.13: Yisu yi kane ye, œ goro she yé á pa fœ she adœke: «Mœ yindœ nœ adœke ɓœ she ye.» Pe tœ œsœnœ, koɓa boromanœ kœkatœ uzunœ asœmœ ye.
5.14: Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Papandœ nœ fœ uzu bale nene, kashe gu œ matœ zœ fœ nganga Ndjaba, yé œ to tokóró ɓata á Moyize pa lima ndœ nœ mbœrœ kœma fœ azu adœke ɓœ she lœ koɓa ye.»
5.15: Endje sœ lima kœpa o'o tœ œrœ á Yisu sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ djezœ ngbangbangba. Azu ndjoro sœ lima kœngbɔtœ endje mbœrœ kœdji she, yé œ sœ ndje kœshe lœ koɓa nœ endje.
5.16: Kashe Yisu gitœ ye ugurutœ azu, œ na ga lœ kpagagasho mbœrœ kœza avwala. Yisu she uzu á ada ye tshu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 9.1-8; Mar 2.1-12)
5.17: Dœ anga olo bale, Yisu sœ kœyisœ œrœ atake, Afarisayi œdœ agbozu kœyisœ awa akwa sœ lima zœ. Endje to lima dje lakpɨ ogo Galilayi, lakpɨ ogo Yuda œdœ ndje lœ ongbo Yerusaleme. Gbɔgbɔ nœ Gbozu Ndjaba sœ lima dœ Yisu, yé tshe sœ kœshe aayi koɓa.
5.18: Yé azu za anga uzu á ada ye tshu ga pa kondja, œ na dœ she. Endje sœ lima kœpara awa adœke œne li dœ she ga sœnda œ za she ɓa utshu Yisu.
5.19: Kashe ɓata á azu ngba lima tɔpanœ kpuru, awa adœke endje li dœ she gugu nene. Endje ɔ, œ kɔrɔ ogoro ɓa pa anda yé œ yi she dœ kondjanœ ɓa ugurutœ azu, ndjii kpœtshu Yisu.
5.20: Lɔkɔ á Yisu wu kœyindœrœ nœ endje, tshe pa fœ ayi koɓanœ adœke: «Mœ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ zœ ye.»
5.21: Aayi kœyisœ awa akwa dœ Afarisayi te lima tœ kœgbetshelœ endje adœke: «Tsheneke kœdœ uzu ɗe á sœ kœgu œsœ́ Ndjaba ataa? Œɗe dá li tœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ uzu a? Œ dœ́dœ́ Ndjaba kutɨ ye nene a?»
5.22: Kashe Yisu wu lima sœ gbetshelœ nœ endje kɔ, yé œ yu endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e gbe o'o tœ lɔsu 'e atake a?
5.23: Kœpa fœ uzunœ adœke: “Mœ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ zœ” too kœpa adœke: “Aalafo œ na ana”, o'o neketa dá dœ́ ɔgbɔ o'o a?
5.24: Kashe mœ pa o'onœ asœke mbœrœ á 'e kœwusœ nœ adœke kpœ pa ɔshɔ asœ, Gbolo nœ uzu dá sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ mbœrœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœ.» Yé tshe kœpa fœ uzu á ada ye tshu adœke: «Mœ pa fœ ɓœ, alafo œ za kondja nœ zœ yé œ gu ga sœnda nœ zœ.»
5.25: Pe kpœtœ œsœnœ, uzunœ áalafo dœ ala azu kɔ, œ za gbarœ á tshe lo ga panœ, yé œ gu ga sœnda nœ ye dœ kœdonga mokɔ nœ Ndjaba.
5.26: Uvuru azu kɔ kpa lima lœ nœ, endje donga Ndjaba yé awa ko endje kɔ, á endje pa adœke: «A wu kpesheke œrœ á a wuwu ɓa lima nene.» Yisu e Levi (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 9.9-13; Mar 2.13-17)
5.27: Manda nœ, Yisu wuta yé œ wu anga ayi kœko ngendja lapo bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Levi, tshe sœ ɓa lœ anda kœko ngendja lapo. Tshe pa fœ she adœke: «Na manda mœ.»
5.28: Levi katœ œrœ nœ ye kɔ, œ áafo yé œ na manda ye.
5.29: Manda nœ, Levi mbœrœ egerœ angbo ɓa sœnda nœ ye fœ Yisu. Azu kœko ngendja lapo ndjoro, dœ pe anga azu sœ lima kœzɨ œrœ dœ endje awa bale.
5.30: Afarisayi dœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa te lima tœ kœpulœma endje, yé œ yu ayambarœ nœ Yisu adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœ kœzɨ œrœ yé á sœ kœndjo œrœ awa bale dœ aayi kœko ngendja lapo œdœ pe aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ a?»
5.31: Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Œ dœ́dœ́ azu á tshelœ ɔkɔ endje sœ yerœ dá gbe kœna kœwu monganga nene, kashe kolœ aayi koɓa dá gbe ndœ kœna kœwu she.
5.32: Mœ nana kœ'e azu á endje sœ ndjii nene, kashe mœ na mbœrœ azu kœmbœrœ ekperœ adœke endje fatshalɔsu endje.» Azu yu Yisu tœ upu nœ kœyotshelœma (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 9.14-15; Mar 2.18-20)
5.33: Anga azu yu lima Yisu adœke: «Ayambarœ nœ Yowane ayi kœza batisimu œdœ pe endje nœ Afarisayi sœ lima kœyotshelœma endje mbœrœ kœza avwala fœ Ndjaba. Kashe mbœrœ gaɗe á ayambarœ nœ zœ sœ kœzɨ œrœ, á sœ kœndjo œrœ a?»
5.34: Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Œdœ endje kœ'e azu ndœ angbo totœ, yé uzu á tshe to yashenœ sœpe damba tœ œsœnœ dœ endje, 'e li kœpa fœ azunœ asœmœ adœke endje yotshelœma endje ye a? Œ̃ œ̃ nene.
5.35: Kashe lɔkɔ á endje kœza akɔ yashenœ ugurutœ anganœ, dá ɔlɔnœ á endje yotshelœma endje dœmœ.»
5.36: Yisu kpa pa anga ndœma toro bale fœ endje adœke: «Uzu bale zaza ndœma tafo lœba œ pi ga pa ongboro lœba nene. Œdœ tshe kœmbœrœ ataa, tshe ndɨ tafo lœbanœ, yé ndœma tafo lœba lili dœ ongboro lœbanœ nene.
5.37: Uzu bale susu tafo ipi á sœ kœyu damba vavava ga lœ ongboro anga nene. Atamœ nene, tshelœ anga œ 'u dœ katsha tafo ipinœ á sœ kœyu vavava asœmœ: Tshelœ anga œ ndɨ yé ipi œ tu kpa ga lœ ɔshɔ.
5.38: Kashe œ li adœke endje sú tafo ipi ga lœ tafo anga.
5.39: Yé uzu bale á tshe yindœ kœndjo tafo ipi manda ongboro ipi gugu nene. Gbambanœ nene, endje pa walaka adœke: “Ongboro ipi dá tshɔ kœropa tafonœ.”»

6.1: Dœ anga ɔlɔ sabata bale, Yisu sœ lima kœro tɔ lœ kɨndɨ ble awa bale dœ ayambarœ nœ ye. Yé ayambarœnœ sœ lima kœverœ indji blenœ, œ sœ kœkɔrɔnɔ dœ kane endje yé á sœ kœzɨ indjinœ.
6.2: Anga Afarisayi yu endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœ kœmbœrœ œneke á awa akwa pakata nœ dœ olo sabata a?»
6.3: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «'E dɨdɨ œneke á Davidi mbœrœ anga ɔlɔ bale á ogo mi lima she dœ azu nœ ye á tshe na tœ awa dœ endje nene a?
6.4: Tshe li dœ endje ɓa lœ anda nœ Ndjaba, yé œ zɨ mapa á endje to dœ tokóró fœ Ndjaba. Tshe zɨ yé œ to anganœ fœ azu á endje na tœ awa nœ dœ she, mapa á sœ má kolœ mbœrœ anganga Ndjaba.»
6.5: Yisu kpa gi fœ endje adœke: «Gbolo nœ uzu kœdœ ayengɔ lɔkɔ sabata.» Yisu she uzu á kane ye tshu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 12.9-14; Mar 3.1-6)
6.6: Œ kpa wuta ga tœ anga lɔkɔ sabata bale, Yisu li ga lœ Sinagoga œ tetœ kœyi lima sœ œrœ. Anga uzu bale á kuni ye tshu, sœ lima kpœtœmœ.
6.7: Aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ pe Afarisayi mesho lima lœ ala endje kœwu too Yisu œ she uzunœ asœmœ dœ lɔkɔ sabata, yeka á œne kœgbɔ awa kœtɔ meza pa ye.
6.8: Kashe tshe wu lima sœ gbetshelœ nœ endje, yé œ pa fœ uzunœ á kane ye tshu asœmœ adœke: «Aalafo, œ na œ ka ɓa ugurunœ.» Uzunœ áalafo œ na œ ka ɓa zœ.
6.9: Manda nœ, Yisu yu endje adœke: «Œrœ gaɗe dá awa akwa nœ azœ yindœ nœ adœke a mbœrœ kolœ dœ lɔkɔ sabatanœ a? Œ yindœ nœ adœke a mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ too a mbœrœ ekperœ a? Kœshe uzu too kœwo she a?»
6.10: Tshe tondœ endje kɔ, yé œ pa fœ uzu koɓanœ adœke: «Yɔrɔ tshelœ kane zœ!» Tshe yɔrɔ tshelœ kane ye, yé kane ye gumatœ ye.
6.11: Tshelœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ Afarisayi sœ gboo dœ ókó, yé endje tetœ kœvwarandœ o'o ugurutœ endje tœ œrœ neke á endje mbœrœ ga tœ Yisu. Yisu ke aayi avwa nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bisha (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 5.1; 10.1-4; Mar 3.13-19)
6.12: Lœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, Yisu ɔ ga pa kaga mbœrœ kœza avwala, yé œ donga Ndjaba butshɔ 'owara.
6.13: Lɔkɔ á osho kɔrɔ, tshe e ayambarœ nœ ye œ rɔtshelœ endje ndjokpa dœ bisha, yé á ta ɨ'ɨrɨ «aayi avwa» ga pa endje.
6.14: Ɨ'ɨrɨ aayi avwanœ ndjokpa dœ bisha dœke: Shimu á Yisu za ndje ɨ'ɨrɨ Petro ga pa ye œdœ ayanœ dœ Andere, Jake œdœ Yowane, Filipo œdœ Bartelemi,
6.15: Matie œdœ Toma, Jake gbolo nœ Alefe œdœ Shimu á tshe sœ ndje lima ugurutœ azu á endje sœ kœpara adœke ogo nœ œne gbɔ lipanda,
6.16: Yudasi, gbolo nœ Jake œdœ Yudasi Isikariote á tshe ka lima Yisu. Azu ndjoro na ga ndœ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 4.24-25; Mar 3.7-11)
6.17: Yisu to dœ endje ɓa pa kaga, yé œ jerœ œ ka ga tœ osho á sœ kpaa. Dá asœmœ, ayambarœ nœ ye œdœ azu ndjoro: Azu tshelœ ogo Yuda kɔ, azu tshalakpɨ Yerusaleme, azu tshalakpɨ Tire œdœ pe Sidona sœ lima kpœtœmœ.
6.18: Endje na lima kœdji Yisu œdœ kœpara awa kœshe lœ koɓa nœ endje. Endjeneke á endje sœ lima dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ, she lima ye.
6.19: Uzu kɔ sœ lima kœpara awa kœgoro she mbœrœ gbɔgbɔ sœ lima kœwuta lœ ye, yé á sœ kœshe azu kɔ. Kœyisœrœ tœ upu nœ ayi yanga œdœ ayi oyo (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 5.1-12)
6.20: Yisu tondœ ayambarœ nœ ye œ pa adœke: «Yanga nœ 'e á 'e dœ́ aayi oyo, gbambanœ nene, Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba sœ mbœrœ 'e!
6.21: Yanga nœ 'e á 'e sœ dœ ogo ngɔngɔnœ asœke, gbambanœ nene, 'e gbɔ kœzɨrœ ndjoro! Yanga nœ 'e á 'e sœ tœ ɨkɨ ngɔngɔnœ asœke, gbambanœ nene, 'e mɔtœ 'e zœ!
6.22: «Œdœ azu kœyiangba 'e, á kœgɔrɔ 'e, á kœgu 'e yé á sœ kœpa tœ ekperœ nœ 'e mbœrœ a 'e yindœ Gbolo nœ uzu, 'e sœ dœ yanga.
6.23: Lɔkɔ á œrœ nœ asœmœ kœmbœrœtœ endje, 'e sœ dœ yanga œ i ga lafo dœ yanga mbœrœ egerœ œrœ sœ kœkate 'e ɓa lafo. Ataa dá aata endje sœ kœmbœrœ lima œrœ kanga fœ aayi kœgbara o'o.
6.24: Kashe oyo nœ 'e dœ́ aayi kœgbɔrœ, gbambanœ nene, 'e gbɔ œrœ tshangba œnœ 'e ye!
6.25: Oyo nœ 'e á 'e sœ dœ œrœ ndjoro ngɔngɔnœ asœke, gbambanœ nene, ogo œ mi 'e zœ! Oyo nœ 'e á 'e sœ kœmɔtœ 'e ngɔngɔnœ asœke, gbambanœ nene, 'e sœ lœ oyo, yé 'e kɨ bala zœ!
6.26: Oyo nœ 'e œdœ azu kœsœ kœpatœ ɔtshɔrœ nœ 'e, gbambanœ nene, œtœnœ kœdœ mara á aata endje mbœrœ lima ga tœ aayi kœgbara o'o nœ wala!» Yisu yisœ œrœ pa kœyindœsho ga ndœ ayingba (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 5.39-47)
6.27: «Kashe mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e á 'e sœ kœdji mœ asœke, adœke: 'E yindœ ayingba 'e œ mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ fœ endjeneke á endje sœ kœyiangba 'e.
6.28: 'E kɨ fœ Ndjaba tshe to kane ye ga pa endjeneke á endje sœ kœdarandœ 'e, yé œ za avwala fœ she mbœrœ endjeneke á endje sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ 'e.
6.29: Œdœ uzu kœda baga zœ, fa tshakalanœ fœ she dœ́ tshe da ndje. Œdœ uzu kœza yɔgbɔdɔ lœba nœ zœ, katœ lœba okoro nœ zœ tɨ fœ she tshe za ndje.
6.30: To œrœ fœ uzu neke kɔ á tshe esho ndœ œrœ tœ zœ. Yé œdœ uzu kœza œrœ nœ zœ, yuyu she adœke tshe gi fœ ɓœ nene.
6.31: 'E mbœrœ fœ anga 'e adja ɓata œneke á 'e yindœ nœ adœke endje mbœrœ fœ 'e.
6.32: «Œdœ 'e kœyi kolœ ndœ endjeneke á endje yindœ 'e, œrœ tshangbanœ á 'e gbɔ kœdœ gaɗe? Awa bale ndje, aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ yiyi ndje ndœ endjeneke á endje lœ kœyindœ endje!
6.33: Yé œdœ 'e kœsœ kolœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ fœ endjeneke á endje mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ fœ 'e, œrœ tshangbanœ á 'e gbɔ kœdœ gaɗe? Aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ sœ ndje kœmbœrœ atamœ.
6.34: Œdœ 'e kœsœ kœdaka kuɗa kolœ fœ endjeneke á 'e sœ kœgbe kœgbɔ anga œrœ ɓa ndœ endje, œrœ tshangbanœ á 'e gbɔ kœdœ gaɗe? Ayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ sœ ndje kœdaka kuɗa fœ ayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ yeka á endje gi tshangbanœ awa bale fœ endje.
6.35: Kashe 'e yindœ azu neke á endje yiangba 'e, œ mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ fœ endje. Œdœ 'e kœdaka œrœ tœ kuɗa fœ endje, 'e sœsœ dœ gbetshelœ adœke endje gi fœ 'e nene. Dœ tœnœ ataa, 'e gbɔ œrœ tshangbanœ dœ egerœnœ, yé 'e te agbolo nœ Ndjaba á tshe ropa œrœ kɔ. Gbambanœ nene, mbœrœ tshe sœ kœmbœrœ ndje ɔtshɔrœ fœ endjeneke á endje sœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ fœ she, œdœ pe fœ aayi katshalɔsu.
6.36: 'E sœ dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu ga tœ azu ɓata á Aba 'e sœ dœ tœnœ.» 'E wawa o'o ga pa azu nene (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 7.1-5)
6.37: «'E wawa o'o ga pa uzu bale nene, yeka á Ndjaba kœwa ndje bala o'o ga pa 'e nene. 'E wawa agbɔ ngbanga ga pa anga 'e nene, yeka á Ndjaba kœwawa ndje agbɔ ngbanga bala ga pa 'e nene. 'E wu oyo anga 'e yeka á Ndjaba kœwu ndje bala oyo 'e.
6.38: 'E to œrœ fœ anga 'e, yeka á Ndjaba kœto ndje œrœ fœ 'e: Gbambanœ nene, tshe to œrœ ga lœ ngbade lœba nœ 'e ndjoro, tshe nduru yé œ yeme œtœnœ adœke œ su kperœ. Ndjaba œ to œrœ fœ 'e kolœ lindœ œneke á 'e sœ kœto tœnœ fœ anga 'e.»
6.39: Yisu kpa pa dœ ndœma toro fœ endje adœke: «'E wu anga ayibula kœyisœ awa fœ yanganœ dœ ayibula ye a? Œdœ tshe kœto she ataa, endje yo kɔ bibisha ga lœ kudu nene a?
6.40: Yambarœ roropa ayi kœyisœrœ fœ she nene. Kashe yambarœ kɔ á tshe wusœ œrœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, tshe wuta ndje ɓata ayi kœyisœrœ nœ ye.
6.41: Mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ sœ kœtondœ oforo ebe á sœ lœ ala aya zœ, yé á gbegbe ndœ maɓaya á sœ lœ ala zœ nene a?
6.42: Ɓœ sœ kœpa fœ aya zœ adœke: “Aya mœ, kaka mœ tshakavwa oforo ebe á sœ lœ ala zœ”, œɓœ á ɓœ sœsœ kœwu maɓaya á sœ lœ ala zœ nene, ɓœ pa má ata kotoo? Wulapatshɔ, tshakavwa maɓaya á sœ lœ ala zœ utshunœ œ wu osho ngbɨ, yeka á kœtshakavwa oforo ebe á sœ lœ ala aya zœ.» Kœwusœ ɔyɔ mbœrœ elenœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 12.33-35; 7.16-20)
6.43: «Ɔtshɔ ɔyɔ zuzu ekpe leyɔ nene, yeka á dœ ɔyɔ á sœ dœ koɓa kœzu ɔtshɔ leyɔ nene.
6.44: Endje wusœ ɔyɔ dœ ɔyɔ mangba elenœ. Endje kɔkɔ ele fige ɓa tœ batima nene. Endje kɔkɔ ndje lekpɔ ɓa lœ nduku akpala nene.
6.45: Ɔtshɔ uzu sœ kœma ɔtshɔrœ á sœ ɓa lɔsu ye, yé ekpe uzu sœ kœma ekperœ á sœ ndje ɓa lɔsu ye. Gbambanœ nene, o'o kɔ á wuta lœ ama uzu, œ to ɓa lɔsu ye á su kperœ dœ tœnœ.» Anda bisha (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 7.24-27)
6.46: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœ kœ'e mœ adœke: “Gbozu, Gbozu”, yé á sœsœ kœmbœrœ neke á mœ sœ kœpa tœnœ fœ 'e nene a?
6.47: Uzu kɔ á tshe na ga ndœ mœ, á tshe dji o'o ama mœ yé á za ga tœ akwa, tshe li dœ ɗe? Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke:
6.48: Tshe li dœ uzu á tshe mɔ anda: Tshe dji kudu kiti anda ngbɨɨ œ gbɔ badja, yeka á ko briki ga lœ œporonœ. Lɔkɔ á ungu su, œ tara kpɔɔ ga tœ ada andanœ, kashe andanœ kakavwa lima nene, mbœrœ endje mɔ lima kiti andanœ ngbɨrɨ.
6.49: Kashe tsheneke á tshe dji o'o ama mœ yé á zaza ga tœ akwa nene, tshe sœ ɓata uzu á tshe djidji kudu kiti anda nœ ye á wuta ga pa badja nene, á mɔ ga pa ɔshɔ gbambanœ. Lɔkɔ á ungu su ga tœ ada andanœ, œ kavwa yé tshelœnœ ndjɔ djigi ye.»

7.1: Lɔkɔ á Yisu pa o'o nœ ye kɔ fœ azu á endje sœ lima kœdji she, tshe na ga lœ Kaparnawumu.
7.2: Anga gbozu tshapa aturugu tshelœ Roma sœ lima dœ anga kanga nœ ye bale á tshe yindœ ye tɔpanœ kpuru. Kanganœ asœmœ sœ lima dœ koɓa, ndoo dœ kuzu.
7.3: Lɔkɔ á gbozu tshapa aturugunœ dji upu nœ Yisu, tshe vwa anga agbɔ agbozu Ikrizia adœke endje na œ kɨ fœ she dœ́ tshe na œ she kanga nœ œne.
7.4: Endje wuta ɓa ndœ Yisu, yé œ kɨ fœ she kpœpanœ kpœpanœ adœke: «Uzunœ á tshe vwa 'a kœdœ ɔtshɔ uzu, œ li adœke ɓœ mbœrœ œrœ á tshe pa tœnœ, fœ she.
7.5: Gbambanœ nene, tshe yindœ ogo nœ azœ yé œshe dá mɔ Sinagoga fœ azœ.»
7.6: Yé Yisu gu tœ awanœ bale dœ endje. Lɔkɔ á tshe wuta lima ndoo dœ anda, gbozu tshapa aturugu vwa anganœ mbœrœ kœpa fœ Yisu adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, wuwu oyo tœ zœ nene, mbœrœ mœ sœsœ ndjii adœke ɓœ kœli ga lœ anda nœ mœ nene.
7.7: Mbœrœ tœnœ ndje ataa á mœ wa adœke, mœ na dœ tœ mœ œrrr ga ndœ zœ nene; kashe pa kolœ o'o bale dœ́ kanga nœ mœ á mœ yindœ ye waa, she.
7.8: Œmœ ndje, mœ sœ dœ agbozu tshapa mœ á mœ sœ kœdji endje, yé dœ aturugu á endje sœ tshakudu mœ. Œdœ mœ kœpa fœ anga bale adœke: “Na”, ngbewo tshe na da ye. Œdœ mœ kpa kœpa ndje fœ anga adœke: “Na ga mœ”, ngbewo tshe na ye. Yé œdœ mœ kœpa ndje fœ kanga nœ mœ adœke: “Mbœrœ œrœnœ asœ”, ngbewo tshe mbœrœ ye.»
7.9: Lɔkɔ á Yisu dji o'onœ asœmœ, tshe sœ dœ yanga ga ndœ ye. Tshe fatœ ye ga ndœ ukpulu azu á endje sœ lima kœna manda ye, yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e adœke, œdœ ndje ɓa ugurutœ azu Israyelenœ gbaa, mœ gbɔgbɔ mara kœyindœrœ sœke nene.»
7.10: Lɔkɔ á azunœ á gbozu tshapa aturugu vwa endje, gu ɓa sœnda nœ gbozu tshapa aturugunœ ɓa zœ, endje gbɔ ayi akwanœ tshe sœ dœ ɔtshɔ ɔkɔ ye. Yisu she anga ovoro gbolo yakoshe lœ kuzu
7.11: Manda nœ, Yisu ro ga lœ anga ongbo bale á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Nayine. Ayambarœ nœ ye œdœ pe ukpulu azu ndjoro sœ lima kœna tœ awanœ bale dœ she.
7.12: Lɔkɔ á endje wuta lima ndoo tœ kœli ga lœ ongbonœ atake, endje gbɔtœ endje dœ ukpulu azu ndjoro á endje sœ lima kœna ndœ kœshi kuzu: Œ dœ lima gbolo yakoshe tshebabale nœ anga yashe koya. Azu tshelœ ongbonœ ndjoro na lima tœ awa bale dœ yashenœ.
7.13: Lɔkɔ á Gbozu wu yashenœ asœmœ, oyo ye ká she yé tshe pa fœ she adœke: «Kpa kɨkɨ nene.»
7.14: Yisu gitœ ye ga utshunœ œ goro ngbongbo kuzunœ. Azu á endje za lima ngbongbonœ ka, yé Yisu pa adœke: «Ovoro gbolo yakoshe, mœ pa fœ ɓœ, jo ye!»
7.15: Ngbewo kuzunœ sœ ga atɨ, œ tetœ kœpa o'o. Yé Yisu za she fœ ayinœ.
7.16: Awa li lima tœ azu para kɔkɔ, yé endje te lima tœ kœdonga Ndjaba adœke: «Egerœ ayi kœgbara o'o wuta ga lœ ugurutœ azœ!» Yé œ kpa pa ndje adœke: «Ndjaba na kœshe azu nœ ye!»
7.17: Yé o'o tœ́ upu nœ œrœnœ á Yisu mbœrœ asœmœ za tshelœ lœ ogo Yuda œdœ tshalakpɨ kɔ á sœ ɨndɨrɨnœ ndjengene. Yowane ayi kœza batisimu vwa azu ɓa ndœ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 11.2-19)
7.18: Ayambarœ nœ Yowane pandœ akwa kɔ á Yisu mbœrœ asœmœ fœ she. Tshe e anga endje bisha ugurutœ endje,
7.19: yé œ vwa endje fœ Gbozu Yisu kœyu she adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ Masiya á tshe sœ kœna tœnœ a, too 'a kate anga angbɨ uzu?»
7.20: Lɔkɔ á endje wuta ɓa ndœ Yisu, endje pa fœ she adœke: «Yowane ayi kœza batisimu vwa 'a ɓa ndœ zœ mbœrœ kœyu ɓœ adœke: “Œɓœ kœdœ Masiya á tshe sœ kœna tœnœ a, too 'a kate anga angbɨ uzu?”»
7.21: Kolœ dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, Yisu she azu ndjoro lœ koɓa nœ endje, lœ kœndɨ nœ endje. Tshe gɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa endje yé œ she ndje aayibula.
7.22: Manda nœ, tshe gi lima fœ azu á Yowane vwa endje adœke: «'E gu œ pandœ neke á 'e wu dœ ala 'e yé á dji dœ utu 'e, fœ she. 'E pandœ nœ adœke: “Aayibula tetœ kœwu osho, azu á ada endje tshu tetœ kœna ana, aayi boroma she, aayi bitu tetœ kœdji o'o, akuzu kwatœ endje ga lœ soro, yé endje pandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o fœ aayi oyo.
7.23: Yanga nœ uzu á tshe kakatœ kœyindœrœ nœ ye ga ndœ mœ nene.”»
7.24: Lɔkɔ á aayi avwa nœ Yowane gu lima da ye, Yisu tetœ kœpa tœ upu nœ Yowane fœ ukpulu azu asœmœ adœke: «Œrœ gaɗe dá 'e na kœwu tœnœ ɓa lœ kpagagasho a? 'E na kœwu mulu á yugu sœ kœmea tœnœ kpangi kpangi a? Œ̃ œ̃ nene.
7.25: Yé ata œrœ gaɗe dá 'e na lima kœwu tœnœ a? 'E na kœwu uzu á tshe verœ ɔtshɔ lœba a? Œ̃ œ̃ nene. Gbambanœ nene, azu á endje sœ kœverœ ɔtshɔ lœba, yé á sœ dœ œrœ waa, endje sœ ɓa lœ anda nœ agbozugo.
7.26: Ata 'e na lima ndœ kœwu gaɗe? 'E na kœwu anga ayi kœgbara o'o a? Œ̃, kashe mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e adœke tshe rosœ ayi kœgbara o'o ye.
7.27: Gbambanœ nene, Yowane kœdœ uzu á endje pa o'o tœ upu nœ ye ɓa la buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Mœ vwa ayi avwa nœ mœ utshu zœ mbœrœ kœguma ala awa zœ.”»
7.28: Yé Yisu kpa pa adœke: «Mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e adœke lœ ugurutœ azu tshapashɔ asœ kɔ, uzu bale á tshe ropa Yowane gugu nene. Kashe aya uzu ɓa lœ ogo Gbozu nœ Ndjaba ropa ye ye.»
7.29: «Azu para kɔkɔ dœ pe aayi kœko ngendja lapo á endje dji o'o má Yowane pa, wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba sœ ndjii yé œ gbɔ lima batisimu nœ Yowane.
7.30: Kashe Afarisayi œdœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa vwaratœ endje kœyindœ œrœ á Ndjaba yindœ kœmbœrœ fœ endje, yé œ tshapu kœgbɔ batisimu nœ Yowane ye.»
7.31: Yisu kpa pa adœke: «Mœ li mara azu nœ asœ dœ azu ɗe? Endje li dœ azu ɗe?
7.32: Endje liili dœ agbolo á endje sœ ɓa ushu, yé á sœ kœ'etœ endje lœ tœ endje adœke: “'A 'uru ngbake fœ 'e, kashe 'e vivi ipi nene! 'A ɓi itshi kuzu fœ 'e, kashe 'e kɨkɨ nene!”
7.33: Gbambanœ nene, Yowane ayi kœza batisimu na, œ vwaratœ ye tœ kœzɨ mapa œdœ kœndjo ipi, 'e pa adœke: “Tshe sœ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa ye!”
7.34: Gbolo nœ uzu na œ sœ kœzɨ mapa dœ kœndjo ipi, 'e pa adœke: “'E wu uzunœ asœ, tshe gbe kolœ dœ kœzɨrœ œdœ kœndjorœ, yé anganœ kœdœ aayi kœko ngendja lapo œdœ pe azu kœmbœrœ ekperœ.”
7.35: Kashe kœwusœtœ nœ Ndjaba matœ ye ndjii lœ awa nœ azu kɔ á endje yindœ nœ.» Yisu ɓa sœnda nœ anga Farisayi bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Shimu
7.36: Anga Farisayi bale vwa osho fœ Yisu adœke tshe na kœzɨ œrœ ɓa ndœ œne. Yisu li ga sœnda nœ Farisayinœ asœmœ, yé œ sœ ga ɨndɨrɨ ndaba kœzɨrœ.
7.37: Kashe anga yashe bale á akwa tshelœ ye gaga nene sœ lima lœ ongbonœ asœmœ. Lɔkɔ á tshe dji adœke Yisu sœ kœzɨ œrœ ɓa ndœ Farisayi, tshe za yombo kperœ dœ anga albatre yé œ na dœ tœnœ.
7.38: Tshe ka djagamanda Yisu, œ gote ndoo dœ ada ye. Tshe sœ lima tœ ɨkɨ, yé ngola ye sara œ gba lima tshapa ada Yisu. Tshe turu dœ sukumu ye, œ ndjoro tshapanœ dœ ama ye, yé manda nœ á su lima yombo kpɔɔ kpɔɔ ga panœ.
7.39: Lɔkɔ á Farisayinœ á tshe vwa osho ndœ Yisu asœmœ wu atamœ, tshe pa ɓa lœ ye dœ tœ ye adœke: «Œdœ uzunœ asœ kœdœ má adja ayi kœgbara o'o, tshe wu ma sœ nœ adœke yashenœ á tshe goro œne asœmœ, œshe kœdœ ayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ.»
7.40: Yisu za o'o yé œ pa fœ Farisayinœ asœmœ adœke: «Shimu, mœ sœ dœ anga o'o kœpa tœnœ fœ ɓœ.» Shimu gi fœ she adœke: «Pa 'onœ zœ, Ayi kœyisœrœ!»
7.41: Yé Yisu kœpa adœke: «Azu bisha sœ lima dœ kuɗa nœ anga uzu bale. Anga bale daka lima egerœ ngendja, yé anga yanganœ daka œnœ ye teasho .
7.42: Ɓata á endje bibisha lili lima kœgi kuɗanœ nene, ayengɔ kuɗanœ wu oyo endje yé œ katœnœ ye. Lœ ugurutœ endje bisha asœmœ, uzu ɗe dá yindœ ayengɔ ngendjanœ asœmœ kœropa nœ a?»
7.43: Shimu gi fœ she adœke: «Mœ wu adœke uzu á kuɗa sœ lima dœ egerœnœ lœ kumu ye dá yindœ ye tɔpanœ kpuru.» Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ gi adja o'o.»
7.44: Manda nœ, tshe fatœ ye ga ndœ yashenœ yé œ pa fœ Shimu adœke: «Ɓœ wu yashenœ asœ? Mœ li ɓa sœnda nœ zœ yé ɓœ susu ungu fœ mœ adœke mœ djutɔ dœ ada mœ nene, kashe tshe djutɔ ada mœ dœ ngola ye, yé œ turu dœ sukumu ye.
7.45: Ɓœ nana œ uru tshelœ utu mœ nene, kashe tshe kakatœ kœndjoro tshapa ada mœ tœ kœli mœ á mœ li gamœ asœ nene.
7.46: Ɓœ djadja tshapa kumu mœ dœ kada nene, kashe tshe su yombo kpɔɔ ga pa ada mœ.
7.47: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ ɓœ adœke: Ndjaba djerœndœ ekperœ nœ ye para mbœrœ egerœ kœyindœsho á tshe ma. Kashe tsheneke á endje djerœndœ ekperœ nœ ye teasho, tshe ma ndje kœyindœsho teasho.»
7.48: Yé Yisu kœpa fœ yashenœ adœke: «Mœ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ zœ para ye.»
7.49: Azu á endje sœ ɨndɨrɨ ndaba kœzɨrœ bale dœ she, te lima tœ kœyutœ endje lœ tœ endje dœ tœ endje adœke: «Uzunœ asœ kœdœ ma œnœ ye ɗe yeka á li ndœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ azu a?»
7.50: Kashe Yisu kœpa fœ yashenœ adœke: «Kœyindœrœ nœ zœ she ɓœ ye. Gu dœ kœsœ gee.»

8.1: Manda nœ, Yisu na lima djelœ ongbo œdœ dje lakpɨ mbœrœ kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o tœ upu nœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba. Ayambarœ nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bisha na lima awa bale dœ she,
8.2: œdœ ndje ayashe á tshe gɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa endje, dœ anga endje á tshe she endje lœ koɓa: Mareya á endje e she uzu Magadala á Yisu gɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ mindu dœ bisha (7) pa ye,
8.3: dœ Jane, awo Suza á tshe dœ egerœ uzu tshelœ buro nœ Erode, dœ Suzana œdœ pe anga endje ndjoro á endje sœ lima kœto œrœ nœ endje fœ she dœ ayambarœ nœ ye. Ndœma toro nœ ayi kœlu ngwarœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 13.1-9; Mar 4.1-9)
8.4: Azu ndjoro to lima djelœ ongbo dœ ongbo œ na kœngbɔtœ endje dœ Yisu. Yé tshe pa dœ ndœma toro adœke:
8.5: «Anga uzu na lima ndœ kœlu ngwarœ ga lœ kɨndɨ nœ ye. Lɔkɔ á tshe sœ lima kœlu ngwarœnœ rotœnœ, anga indjinœ yo ga ɨndɨrɨ ama awa, azu na panœ yé ayanu de ye.
8.6: Anga indjinœ yo ga lœ oporo badja. Œ ko ye, kashe œ ɔrɔ lima mbœrœ eshenœ gbɔgbɔ lima ungu lœ ɔshɔ nene.
8.7: Anganœ yo ga lœ ishi. Œ gerœ lima dœ tœnœ awa bale yé œ vwele ɔtshɔ ngwarœnœ, awa adœke œ gerœ gugu nene.
8.8: Kashe anganœ yo ga lœ ɔtshɔ ɔshɔ. Œ gerœ yé œ le kpo'oro kpo'oro. Kumunœ bale dœ bale sœ lima dœ indjinœ kama bale (100) tœnœ.» Yé Yisu kpa pa adœke: «Uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ utu nœ kœdji o'o, tshe dji!» Mbœrœ gaɗe á Yisu sœ kœyisœ œrœ dœ ndœma toro a? (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 13.10-13; Mar 4.10-12)
8.9: Ayambarœ nœ ye yu she lima tœ ádá ndœma toronœ asœmœ.
8.10: Tshe gi fœ endje adœke: «Mbœrœ 'e, 'e wusœ ádá o'o nœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba á zatœ endje yiwa tœnœ ye; kashe mbœrœ anga endje, endje dji kolœnœ ɓata ndœma toro. Ataa, “endje li kœtondœ œrœ, kashe endje wu nene; endje li kœdji o'o, kashe endje dji tshelœ katanœ nene.”» Yisu pandœ ádá ndœma toro nœ ayi kœlu ngwarœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 13.18-23; Mar 4.13-20)
8.11: Yisu mɨndœ nœ fœ endje adœke: «'E dji ádá ndœma toronœ asœmœ: Ngwarœnœ asœmœ, kœdœ o'o ama Ndjaba.
8.12: Anga azu lœ ɓata ama awa á indji ngwarœ te ga tœnœ. Endje kœdji O'o ama Ndjaba, Djaboro na œ kakara tœ lɔsu endje kparawa adœke endje sœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ nene yé á Ndjaba kœsheshe ndje endje nene.
8.13: Anga endje sœ ɓata ɔshɔ badja. Endje dji o'o dœ ɔtshɔnœ yé œ yindœ nœ dœ yanga, kashe eshenœ lili ɔshɔ nene. Endje yindœ nœ kolœ kwatake œndœ nœ œ dɨ nene, yé lɔkɔ á endje kœli ga lœ ɔgbɔ o'o, endje ka ngbɨrɨ lœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje nene.
8.14: Indji ngwarœ neke á yo ga ugurutœ ɔyɔ ishi sœ kœma endjeneke á endje sœ kœdji o'o tœ ɔtshɔnœ, kashe gbetshelœ, ogo kœgbɔ œrœ ndjoro œdœ pe yanga á sœ kœfara azu lœ soro ndɨ tshelœ o'o ama Ndjaba kɔ tœ endje ye, awa adœke leyɔnœ gbɔ, gugu nene.
8.15: Anga endje sœ ɓata indji ngwarœ á yo ga lœ ɔtshɔ ɔshɔ. Endje sœ kœdji o'o, œ sœ kœgbɔndœ nœ ga lɔsu endje dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Endje shi gbɨ lœ nœ yé œ sœ kœzu ɔtshɔ leyɔ.» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ miinda (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 4.21-25)
8.16: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Uzu tata owo ga tœ miinda mbœrœ kœza lɔsú tshu ga pa nœ too mbœrœ kœza ɓa tshakudu kelekpa nene. Kashe endje za gbara ɓa pa anga œrœ ɓa lafo mbœrœ adœke azu kɔ á endje li ga sœnda, kœmesho ngbɨ tœ ɨshirɨnœ.
8.17: Gbambanœ nene, œrœ kɔ á zatœ endje yiwa tœnœ, œ matœ endje ga shu yé ugurutœ œrœ kɔ á sœ kœmbœrœtœ endje lœ ubunœ, endje wusœ nœ yé œ ma ga shu ngbɨ.
8.18: 'E sœ dœ gbɔdjela tœ mara á 'e sœ kœdji dœ o'o. Gbambanœ nene, uzu á tshe sœ dœ œrœ ndjoro, endje to anganœ ga panœ fœ she. Kashe tsheneke á tshe gugu dœ œrœ nene, endje gbɔtœ œneke teasho á tshe sœ kœza gbetshelœ nœ ye ga panœ asœmœ tœ ye yé.» Ayi Yisu dœ aayanœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 12.46-50; Mar 3.31-35)
8.19: Ayi Yisu dœ aayanœ na lima manda ye, kashe awa adœke endje wuta ɓa zœ gugu lima nene mangba ukpu azu.
8.20: Endje pandœ nœ fœ she adœke: «Ayi zœ dœ pe aaya zœ ka ɓa shu; endje gbe kœwu ɓœ.»
8.21: Kashe Yisu gi fœ azu kɔkɔ adœke: «Ayi mœ dœ pe aaya mœ kœdœ endjeneke á endje sœ kœdji o'o ama Ndjaba, yé á sœ kœza tœnœ ga tœ akwa.» Yisu rá yugu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 8.18,23-27; Mar 4.35-41)
8.22: Anga ɔlɔ bale, Yisu ɔ ga lœ agba dœ ayambarœ nœ ye. Tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «A zu ga atshi egerœ ungu adanga.» Yé endje tetœ kœzu tœnœ.
8.23: Lɔkɔ á endje sœ lima kœzu ungunœ, Yisu lo ye. Trale, ndavuru yugu za gu tœnœ kpɨkpɨkpɨ ga pa ungu. Ungu tu lima ga lœ agba œ ɔ dœ tœnœ tshé tshé tshé, yé agbanœ yindœ kœnduru dœ endje.
8.24: Ayambarœ gitœ endje ndoo dœ Yisu œ jo she lœ olonœ, yé á pa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, Gbozu, a tshu ke a!» Yisu jo lœ olo œ ra yugu œdœ pe loko á sœ kœyakpa ungunœ asœmœ, yé yugu ka, osho yi tá.
8.25: Yisu yu ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Kœyindœrœ nœ 'e sœ kpœta a?» Kashe awa li lima tœ endje kpa kpa kpa, uvuru endje i gara yé endje tetœ kœyutœ endje lœ ugurutœ endje adœke: «Uzunœ asœke kœdœ ɗe? Tshe sœ kœpa o'o fœ yugu dœ ungu, yé œ sœ kœmbœrœtœ endje lindœ nœ!» Yisu she uzu á ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ pa ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 8.28-34; Mar 5.1-20)
8.26: Endje zu ga atshi œ wuta ga lœ ogo nœ Ageresaye á za tshatshu ye tɔtœnœ dœ Galilayi.
8.27: Lɔkɔ á Yisu jerœ lœ agbanœ ga tœ ɔshɔ, anga uzu tshelœ ongbonœ bale to ɓa zœ, œ na para tshatshu ye. Uzunœ asœmœ sœ lima dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa ye. Tshe veverœ lœba œ lolo lima ɓa sœnda nene œndœnœ dɨ ye. Kashe tshe lo lima kolœ ɓa pa udu.
8.28: Lɔkɔ á tshe wu Yisu, tshe ve rawa œ te ga tœ ada ye, yé œ kɨ dœ ɔgbɔ fœ she adœke: «Yisu, Gbolo nœ Ndjaba á tshe ropa œrœ kɔ, ɓœ yindœ kœmbœrœ œrœ gaɗe tœ mœ a? Mœ kɨ fœ ɓœ, gágága kumu mœ nene!»
8.29: Gbambanœ nene, Yisu pa lima fœ ekpe ɨshirɨ adœke tshe gitœ ye pa ye. Ekpe ɨshirɨnœ sœ lima kœndanga she kpœpanœ kpœpanœ, endje sœ lima kœi kane ye dœ ada ye dœ djingiri, kashe tshe sœ lima kœsɔ tshelœ nœ, yé ekpe ɨshirɨnœ sœ lima kœza she natœnœ ga lœ kpagagasho.
8.30: Yisu yu she adœke: «Ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ kœdœ ɗe?» Tshe gi fœ she adœke: «Ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ kœdœ ndjoro.» Gbambanœ nene, aekpe ɨshirɨ ndjoro dá sœ lima pa ye.
8.31: Yé aekpe ɨshirɨnœ asœmœ sœ lima kœdɨtshelœma endje fœ Yisu adœke tshe koko œne va ga lœ kudu owo nene.
8.32: Dá asœmœ, egerœ ukpulu akɔso sœ lima kœzɨ œrœ ɓa pa kaga. Aekpe ɨshirɨ asœmœ dɨ lima tshelœma endje adœke Yisu za awa fœ œne dœ́ œne na œ li ga lœ akɔso. Dœ tœnœ ataa, Yisu za awa fœ endje.
8.33: Aekpe ɨshirɨnœ wuta lœ uzu asœmœ, œ kpa yé œ li gɔrrr ga lœ akɔso. Akɔso sœmœ ndjoro to ɓa pa kaga 'uru 'uru 'uru dœ ɔrɔ tra tœnœ œrrr ga la egerœ ungu adanga, yé œ nduru kɔkɔ ye.
8.34: Lɔkɔ á aayi kœgbɔndœ akɔsonœ wu œrœ á mbœrœtœ endje ataa, endje kpagu kœmɨndœ nœ fœ azu ɓa lœ ongbo, œdœ ndje fœ anga endje á endje sœ lœ kɨndɨ.
8.35: Azu wuta lima mbœrœ kœwu œrœ á mbœrœtœ endje asœmœ. Endje na ndoo dœ Yisu yé œ gbɔ lima uzunœ á aekpe ɨshirɨ gitœ endje pa ye asœmœ, tshe verœ lœba ga tœ ye, yé œ sœ dœ ɔkɔ ye dœ ɔtshɔnœ ɓa tœ ada Yisu. Awa li lima tœ endje ye.
8.36: Endjeneke á endje wu lima œrœ á mbœrœtœ endje kɔ asœmœ, endje mɨndœ mara á uzunœ á ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ lima pa ye, she dœ tœnœ.
8.37: Yé azu kɔ lœ ogo Geresaye pa fœ Yisu adœke tshe gitœ ye lœ ogo nœ œne ye. Gbambanœ nene, endje sœ lima dœ awa waa ye. Yé Yisu ɔ ga lœ agba œ gu da ye.
8.38: Uzu á aekpe ɨshirɨ wuta lœ ye asœmœ, yu Yisu adœke œne na dœ she awa bale. Kashe tshe vwaratœ ye, yé œ pa fœ she adœke:
8.39: «Gu ga sœnda nœ zœ yé œ mɨndœ œneke kɔ á Ndjaba mbœrœ fœ ɓœ.» Tshe gu yé œ tetœ kœmɨndœ œrœ á Yisu mbœrœ fœ she djelœ ongbo kɔ. Yisu she yawuru nœ Jaeruse dœ pe anga yashe (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 9.18-26; Mar 5.21-43)
8.40: Lɔkɔ á Yisu kwatœ ye lima ga tœ makaga egerœ ungu adanganœ, azu ndjoro na para tshatshu ye mbœrœ endje para kɔkɔ sœ lima kœkate she.
8.41: Anga uzu á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Jaeruse, œshe kœdœ gbozu tshapa Sinagoga. Tshe na lima œ gote ga tshu Yisu, yé œ kɨ fœ she adœke tshe na ɓa ndœ œne.
8.42: Gbambanœ nene, tshe sœ lima dœ yawuru nœ ye tshebabale á tshe sœ lima dœ ungu ndjokpa dœ bisha. Yawurunœ sœ lima ndoo dœ kuzu. Lɔkɔ á Yisu sœ lima kœna ga zœ, azu ndjoro sœ lima kœpoporo she.
8.43: Anga yashe bale á tshe mbœrœ ungu ndjokpa dœ bisha dœ koɓa indji, sœ lima kpœtœmœ. Tshe ndɨ ngendja nœ ye kɔ á tshe sœ dœ tœnœ dje ndœ amonganga, kashe uzu bale á tshe li lima kœshe she gugu nene.
8.44: Tshe gitœ ye ndoo ɓa ngba Yisu yé œ goro ama lœba ye. Pe kpœtœ œsœnœ, indji katœ kœi tœ ye yé.
8.45: Yisu yu adœke: «Uzu ɗe dá turutœ mœ a?» Azu kɔ vusœ nœ, yé Petro pa adœke: «Gbozu, azu ndjoro kpa dji ɓœ, yé œ sœ kœturutœ zœ tœ osho kɔ.»
8.46: Kashe Yisu pa adœke: «Anga uzu turutœ mœ, mbœrœ mœ wu adœke anga gbɔgbɔ wuta lœ ɔkɔ mœ.»
8.47: Yashe koɓanœ wusœ nœ adœke Yisu wusœ œne ye. Tshe na dœ kœgugu tœnœ œ te ga tshu Yisu, yé œ pandœ ádá á tshe turutœ ye dœ mara á tshe she ngbewo lœ koɓa nœ ye, ɓa utshu azu kɔ.
8.48: Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Yawuru nœ mœ, kœyindœrœ nœ zœ she ɓœ ye. Gu dœ kœsœ gee.»
8.49: Yisu sœpe damba kœpa o'o lœ ama ye ataa, anga ayi avwa to ɓa sœnda nœ gbozu tshapa Sinagoga yé œ pa fœ she adœke: «Yawuru nœ zœ tshu ye. Ndandanga ayi kœyisœrœ nene.»
8.50: Kashe Yisu dji o'onœ asœmœ yé œ pa fœ Jaeruse adœke: «Awa zaza ɓœ nene, sœ kolœ dœ kœyindœrœ, yé tshe she ye.»
8.51: Lɔkɔ á Yisu wuta ɓa sœnda ɓa zœ, tshe zaza lima awa kœli ga sœnda dœ she fœ uzu bale nene, kashe kolœ Petro, Yowane, Jake œdœ pe aba gbolo dœ ayi gbolonœ asœmœ dá tshe za awa fœ endje.
8.52: Azu kɔ sœ lima kœkɨ tœnœ yé œ sœ kœdɨtshelœma endje. Yisu pa adœke: «'E kɨkɨ nene. Tshe tshutshu nene, kashe tshe sœ tœ olo.»
8.53: Endje sœ lima kœmɔ she mbœrœ endje wu lima sœ nœ adœke tshe tshu ye.
8.54: Andaa, Yisu tepa kane ye, yé œ pa dœ ɔgbɔ adœke: «Gbolo nœ mœ, áalafo!»
8.55: Ɨshirɨ ye kwa ga lœ nœ yé trale tshe kœalafo. Yisu pa fœ endje adœke endje to kœzɨrœ fœ she.
8.56: Agbozu nœ ye sœ lima kœkɨtœ œsœnœ, kashe Yisu pa fœ endje adœke endje papandœ œrœ á mbœrœtœ endje asœmœ fœ uzu bale nene.

9.1: Yisu ngbɔɓa andjokpa dœ bishanœ á to gbɔgbɔ œdœ kœlɨsœtœ fœ endje mbœrœ kœgɔrɔ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ œdœ pe kœshe koɓa.
9.2: Tshe vwa endje kœyisœ upu nœ akwa tshagbozu nœ Ndjaba œdœ pe kœshe aayi koɓa.
9.3: Yé tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «'E zaza œrœ bale potœ 'e lœ ananœ nene: Œdœ tshɔngbɔlɔ, œdœ ngbade, œdœ kœzɨrœ, œdœ ngendja; uzu bale nana dœ lœba bisha nene.
9.4: Osho kɔ á endje kœza osho kœsœ fœ 'e tœnœ, 'e lo kolœ lœ andanœ asœmœ œrrr ga tœ olo á 'e katœ tshakpœtœmœ tɨ.
9.5: Osho kɔ á azu kœvwaratœ endje tœ 'e tœnœ, 'e katœnœ tɨ, yé œ gɔrɔ trusha tshada 'e ga atɨ kpœtœmœ ndœ kœma fœ endje adœke endje mbœrœ ekperœ.»
9.6: Ayambarœ i tɔ tœ awa, œ na kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o dje lakpɨ bale dœ bale, œ sœ ndje kœshe aayi koɓa. Erode sœ dœ gbetshelœ tœ upu nœ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 14.1-2; Mar 6.14-16)
9.7: Erode, gbozugo tshapa ogo Galilayi, dji lima ndœ œneke kɔ á mbœrœtœ endje asœmœ. Kashe tshe wuwu lima sœ œrœ á tshe mbœrœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, anga azu sœ lima kœpa adœke: «Yowane ayi kœza batisimu dá she lœ akuzu asœmœ.»
9.8: Anga endje sœ lima kœpa adœke: «Eliya dá wuta asœmœ.» Anga endje kpa sœ lima kœpa ndje adœke: «Anga ayi kœgbara o'o bale ugurutœ aayi kœgbara o'o liya utshunœ, dá she lœ akuzu asœmœ.»
9.9: Kashe Erode pa ngbɨ adœke: «Mœ wa lima ɨgɨ Yowane ayi kœza batisimu ye. Tsheneketa dá mœ kpa sœ kœdjindœ ye kœpa mara o'onœ asœmœ kɔ a?» Yé tshe tetœ kœpara awa adœke œne wu Yisu. Yisu to kœzɨrœ fœ azu kutu mindu (5.000) (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 14.13-21; Mar 6.30-44; Yow 6.1-14)
9.10: Ayi avwa gu ga ndœ Yisu œ pandœ œneke kɔ á endje mbœrœ fœ she. Yisu to endje, yé œ gitœ ye dœ endje ga ɨndɨrɨ anga ongbo á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Betesayida.
9.11: Kashe azu ndjoro djindœ o'onœ, yé œ na manda ye. Yisu za osho kœsœ fœ endje, yé œ tetœ kœpa lima o'o fœ endje tœ upu nœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba. Tshe she ndje lima aayi koɓa á endje yindœ kœshe tœnœ.
9.12: Dœ lɔkɔ á ɔlɔ tetœ kœdɨ tœnœ, ayambarœ ndjokpa dœ bisha gitœ endje ndoo dœ she, œ pa fœ she adœke: «Za awa fœ ukpulu azunœ asœke, endje gu œ lo ɓa lakpɨ œdœ ɓa lœ kɨndɨ nœ endje yeka á kœgbɔ osho kœlo tœnœ dœ pe kœzɨrœ. Gbambanœ nene, a sœ ɓa ke ɓa lœ kpagagasho.»
9.13: Kashe Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «'E to kœzɨrœ fœ endje dœ tœ 'e!» Yé ayambarœ gi fœ she adœke: «A sœ kolœ dœ mapa mindu œdœ ageatshalangu bisha gbambanœ. Ɓœ sœ ete kœyindœ nœ adœke 'a na dœ́ œ yɔ kœzɨrœ fœ azunœ asœ kɔ a?»
9.14: Ayambarœnœ papa ataa gbambanœ nene, ayakoshe sœ lima ga pa œrœ nœ́ kutu mindu (5.000). Yisu pa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «'E pa fœ endje adœke endje sœ ga atɨ, azu zazu bisha dœ ndjokpa (50) lœ ukpulu azu bale dœ bale.»
9.15: Endje mbœrœtœ endje lindœ nœ, yé œ guma adœke azunœ kɔ sœ ga atɨ.
9.16: Yisu ko mapa mindu œdœ pe ageatshalangu bisha asœmœ, œ mesho ga lafo, yé œ tetœ kœza avwala pa nœ fœ Ndjaba. Tshe kurutshelœnœ yé œ ko fœ ayambarœ adœke endje kurutshelœnœ tœ ukpulu azunœ.
9.17: Azu para kɔkɔ zɨ lima, yé uvu ndje sú. Ayambarœnœ ngbɔɓa lima udu kœzɨrœnœ á sœpe manda endje, ga lœ kingi ndjokpa dœ bisha. Petro pandœ nœ ngbɨɨ adœke Yisu kœdœ Masiya (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 16.13-19; Mar 8.27-29)
9.18: Dœ anga ɔlɔ bale, Yisu sœ lima kœza avwala kutɨ ye, yé ayambarœ nœ ye na œ gbɔ she. Tshe yu endje lima adœke: «Azu sœ kœpa má adœke œmœ kœdœ ɗe?»
9.19: Endje gi adœke: «Azu sœ kœpa adœke œɓœ kœdœ Yowane ayi kœza batisimu; anga endje adœke ɓœ kœdœ Eliya; anga endje kpa sœ ndje kœpa adœke, œɓœ kœdœ anga ayi kœgbara o'o bale ugurutœ aayi kœgbara o'o liya á she lœ akuzu asœmœ.»
9.20: Yisu yu endje adœke: «'E gbe má œnœ 'e adœke œmœ kœdœ ɗe?» Petro gi fœ she adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ Masiya á Ndjaba vwa she.» Yisu pandœ upu nœ kuzu œdœ pe kœshe nœ ye lœ akuzu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 16.20-28; Mar 8.30–9.1)
9.21: Yisu va tshelœ utu endje adœke endje papandœ nœ fœ uzu bale nene.
9.22: Tshe kpa pa adœke: «Œ li adœke Gbolo nœ uzu wu oyo waa yekane. Agbozu Ikrizia, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba œdœ ndje aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œ vwaratœ endje tœ ye. Endje wo she, yé tshe she lœ akuzu manda olo votɔ.»
9.23: Manda nœ, tshe pa fœ azu kɔ adœke: «Œdœ uzu kœyindœ kœna manda mœ, œ li adœke tshe vwaratœ undu ye dœ tœ ye, œ za kurushi nœ ye ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ yeka á kœna manda mœ.
9.24: Gbambanœ nene, uzu á tshe sœ dœ ogo kœsœ dœ soro, tshe tshu; kashe tsheneke á tshe tshu mbœrœ mœ, œ sœ dœ soro.
9.25: Yé œ kœsœ adœke uzu gbɔ œrœ kɔ á sœ pa ɔshɔ kashe á tshe kœgbɔgbɔ soro á ka nene, œrœ gaɗe dá tshe gbɔ manda kœgbɔ œrœ tshapashɔnœ a?
9.26: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ uzu kœmbœrœ tshula mœ œdœ pe ndje o'o nœ mœ, œmœ Gbolo nœ uzu, mœ mbœrœ ndje tshula ye lɔkɔ á mœ kwa bala tœ mœ lœ mokɔ nœ mœ, dœ œnœ Aba œdœ œnœ ayerœ aandjelu.
9.27: Adja mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke, lœ ugurutœ azu á endje sœ kpœke asœ, anga endje œ tshu utshu kœwu Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba nene.» Mokɔ nœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 17.1-8; Mar 9.2-8)
9.28: Olo mindu dœ votɔ manda kœpa o'onœ asœmœ, Yisu za Petro, Yowane œdœ pe Jake potœ ye, yé œ ɔ dœ endje ga pa kaga mbœrœ kœza avwala.
9.29: Lɔkɔ á tshe sœ lima kœza avwala, tshatshu ye yapatœ ye, yé lœba ye kpa wuta dœ œmbinœ rurrr.
9.30: Trale, azu bisha sœ lima kœpa tshama endje dœ she. Azunœ asœmœ kœdœ Amoyize dœ Eliya.
