9.31: Endje wuta lima dœ mokɔ nœ Ndjaba, yé œ sœ lima kœpa o'o tœ mara á akwa nœ Yisu œ ka lœ awa nœ kuzu ye ɓa lœ Yerusaleme.
9.32: Petro œdœ anganœ á endje na tœ awanœ dœ endje lo lima kpakpakpa ye. Kashe lɔkɔ á endje jo lima, endje wu mokɔ nœ Yisu œdœ pe azu bisha á endje ka kpœtœ œsœnœ dœ she.
9.33: Dœ lɔndɔ á azunœ asœmœ kuru lima tshelœtœ endje dœ Yisu, Petro pa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke a sœ kpœke. A mɔ gbanda votɔ: Anganœ bale mbœrœ ɓœ, anganœ bale mbœrœ Moyize, yé anganœ bale mbœrœ Eliya.» Tshe wuwu lima sœ o'o á tshe sœ lima kœpa tœnœ nene.
9.34: Lɔkɔ á tshe sœ lima kœpa o'o atake, ondoro jerœ kpɨlɨ ga pa endje. Kœwu adœke ondoronœ jerœ ga pa endje ataa, awa za ayambarœ.
9.35: Tshama kœpa o'o lœ ondoronœ adœke: «Tsheneke kœdœ Gbolo nœ mœ, œshe dá mœ ke she. 'E dji she.»
9.36: Manda tshamanœ kœpa o'o, Yisu sœ lima pe kolœ kutɨ ye. Ayambarœ sœ lima kokoko, yé endje papandœ œneke á endje wu lima fœ uzu bale nene dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ. Yisu gɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa anga gbolo (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 17.14-18; Mar 9.14-27)
9.37: Olo manda nœ, endje to lima ɓa pa kaga œ sœ kœgu tœnœ, azu ndjoro na para tshatshu Yisu.
9.38: Yé anga uzu bale ɓa ugurutœ ukpulu azunœ tetœ kœta rawa adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, mœ kɨ fœ ɓœ adœke ɓœ tondœ gbolo yakoshe nœ mœ kane, mbœrœ œshe kœdœ gbolo yakoshe nœ mœ tshebabale dœ mœ.
9.39: Ɨshirɨ sœ kœza she trale dœ kœta rawa kpala kpala. Ɨshirɨnœ sœ kœyaka she, tshe dɔtœ ye ndeɔr ndeɔr ndeɔr, yé furutsha ama ye oma putu putu. Ɨshirɨnœ mbœrœ tœ ye le'ere le'ere yeka á gitœ ye pa ye, kashe katsha nene.
9.40: Mœ kɨ fœ ayambarœ nœ zœ adœke endje gɔrɔ she, kashe endje lili nene.»
9.41: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «E'e dœ aekpe azu, 'e sœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ nene! Mœ kpa sœpe dœ 'e awa bale manda olo kotoo yeka á kœru lɔsu mœ tœ ɔtshɔ 'e? Manda nœ, tshe pa fœ yakoshenœ adœke: Na dœ gbolo nœ zœ gamœ!»
9.42: Lɔndɔ á gbolonœ na ndoo dœ Yisu, ekpe ɨshirɨnœ za she vesho ga tœ ɔshɔ yé, tshe dɔ tœ ye ndeɔr ndeɔr. Kashe Yisu nga dœ ɨshirɨnœ adœke tshe wuta, yé á tshe wuta lœ gbolonœ yeka á tshe gi she fœ abanœ.
9.43: Yé azu kɔ katœ ama endje tɨ ɔsɔ tœ kœwu egerœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ndjaba. Yisu kpa pa bisha o'o tœ upu nœ kuzu ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 17.22-23; Mar 9.30-32) Ɓata á azu kɔ sœ lima kœkɨtœ œsœ́ œneke kɔ á Yisu mbœrœ, tshe pa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke:
9.44: «'E dji œneke á mœ yindœ kœpa tœnœ fœ 'e asœke dœ ɔtshɔnœ kane: Endje ka Gbolo nœ uzu ga tshakane azu.»
9.45: Kashe ayambarœ nœ ye djidji tshelœ kata ndœma toronœ asœmœ nene. Ádánœ mamatœ endje ngbɨ nene mbœrœ á endje kœdjidji tshelœ katanœ nene. Yé endje kpa awa kœyu Yisu tœ ádánœ ye. Œɗe dá dœ egerœ uzu lœ ugurutœ ayambarœ a? (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 18.1-5; Mar 9.33-37)
9.46: Ayambarœ te lima tœ kœgbugburu tshelœ o'o mbœrœ kœwusœ tsheneke á tshe dœ egerœ uzu lœ ugurutœ endje.
9.47: Yisu wu lima sœ gbetshelœ nœ endje kɔ, œ za anga aya gbolo ga ɨndɨrɨ tœ ye,
9.48: yé á pa fœ endje adœke: «Uzu kɔ á tshe za osho kœsœ fœ gbolo asœke dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ, dá tshe za osho kœsœ fœ mœ. Yé uzu á tshe za osho kœsœ fœ mœ, za ndje osho kœsœ fœ tsheneke á tshe vwa mœ. Gbambanœ nene, uzu á tshe sœ teasho lœ ugurutœ 'e kɔ, œshe dá dœ egerœ uzu.» Uzu á tshe kœyiyiangba 'e nene, œshe kœdœ uzu nœ 'e (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 9.38-41)
9.49: Yowane pa fœ Yisu adœke: «Gbozu, 'a wu anga uzu bale, tshe sœ kœgɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ, yé 'a para awa kœkɔ she mbœrœ tshe sœsœ awa bale dœ azœ nene.»
9.50: Kashe Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «'E kɔkɔ she nene, mbœrœ tsheneke á tshe kœyiyiangba 'e nene, œshe kœdœ uzu nœ 'e.» Anga azu Samariya tshapu kœza osho kœsœ fœ Yisu
9.51: Lɔkɔ á olo kœ'ɔ Yisu ga lafo ndo lima, tshe wu dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke œne ro ga lœ Yerusaleme.
9.52: Tshe vwa aayi avwa utshu ye. Endje tetœ awa, œ na œ li ga lakpɨ Samariya mbœrœ kœguma osho kœsœ fœ she.
9.53: Kashe azu tshalakpɨnœ zaza osho kœsœ fœ she nene, mbœrœ tshe sœ kœna ga lœ Yerusaleme.
9.54: Kœwu ataa, ayambarœ nœ ye, Jake œdœ Yowane pa adœke: «Gbozu, ɓœ yindœ nœ adœke 'a pa fœ yavuru ɓa lafo, œ sɔ œ ko azunœ asœmœ dœ́ endje ju trulu ye a?»
9.55: Kashe Yisu fatœ ye ga ndœ endje, yé œ gbagbara endje.
9.56: Yé endje na ga lœ anga angbɨ tshalakpɨ. O'o tœ upu nœ azu á endje yindœ kœna manda Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 8.19-22)
9.57: Lɔkɔ á endje sœ lima kœna tœ ala awa, anga uzu pa fœ Yisu adœke: «Mœ na manda zœ tœ osho kɔ á ɓœ na tœnœ.»
9.58: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Angbangewo sœ dœ ogoro endje yé ayanu sœ ndje dœ koma endje. Kashe Gbolo nœ uzu gugu dœ osho kœlo tœnœ nene.»
9.59: Tshe pa fœ anga uzunœ adœke: «Na manda mœ.» Uzunœ asœmœ gi fœ she adœke: «Za awa fœ mœ dœ́ mœ na œ shi aba mœ utshunœ yekane.»
9.60: Kashe Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Katœ akuzu dœ́ endje shi akuzu nœ endje. Tœ ɓœ nœ zœ, na kœmɨndœ upu nœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba.»
9.61: Anga uzu kpa pa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, mœ yindœ kœna mangba zœ, kashe za awa fœ mœ dœ́ mœ na œ pu dœ azu tshelœ bɨngɨ nœ mœ utshunœ yekane.»
9.62: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Uzu á tshe kœza ngapo mbœrœ kœdjo kɨndɨ yé á sœ kœmesho ga ngba ye, tshe lili kœmbœrœ akwa mbœrœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba nene.»

10.1: Manda nœ, Gbozu ke anga ayambarœ zazu votɔ dœ ndjokpa dœ bisha, yé œ vwa endje bisha bisha utshu ye dje lœ ongbo œdœ pe dje lakpɨ á tshe yindœ kœna lœ nœ dœ tœ ye.
10.2: Tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «Leyɔ doro ndjoro ɓa lœ kɨndɨ, kashe ayi kœkɔ tœnœ ngbangba nene. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'e kɨ fœ ayengɔ leyɔnœ adœke tshe vwa anga aayi akwa mbœrœ kœkɔ tœnœ.
10.3: 'E na zœ! Mœ sœ kœvwa 'e ɓata apata ɓa ugurutœ amuru.
10.4: Œdœ ngendja, œdœ ngbade, œdœ œrada, 'e zaza œrœ bale nene. 'E kaka tœ ala awa waa mbœrœ kœgo o'o dœ azu nene.
10.5: Lɔkɔ á 'e kœli ɓa sœnda nœ uzu, 'e pa utshunœ adœke: “Kœsœ gee sœ sœndanœ asœke.”
10.6: Œdœ uzu nœ kœsœ gee kœsœ sœndanœ, kœsœ gee nœ 'e œ sœ pa ye. Á kœsœsœ atamœ nene, kœsœ geenœ œ kwa ga ndœ 'e.
10.7: 'E sœ ɓa sœndanœ asœmœ, 'e zɨ œrœ dœ́ œ ndjo œrœ á endje to fœ 'e. Gbambanœ nene, œ li adœke ayi akwa gbɔ œrœ tshangba akwa nœ ye. 'E lolo lœ anda bale dœ bale na tœnœ nene.
10.8: «Œdœ 'e kœwuta ga lœ ongbo yé á endje kœza osho kœsœ fœ 'e tœnœ, 'e zɨ œneke á endje to fœ 'e.
10.9: 'E she aayi koɓa á endje sœ kpœtœmœ, yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: “Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba wuta œrrr ga ndœ 'e ye.”
10.10: Kashe lœ ongbo á 'e kœli ga lœ nœ yé á endje kœzaza osho kœsœ fœ 'e nene, 'e wuta ga tœ ala awa dœ́ œ pa adœke:
10.11: “'A gɔrɔ trusha tshelœ ongbo nœ 'e á tɔpe tshada 'a ga atɨ fœ 'e. Andaa 'e wusœ nœ adœke, Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba wuta ga ndœ 'e ye.”
10.12: Mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e adœke: Dœ lɔkɔ kœwa ngbanga pa azu, ngbanga nœ azu tshelœ ongbonœ asœmœ œ sœ dœ ɔgbɔnœ kœropa œnœ azu Sodomo.» Ongbo á gugu dœ kœyindœrœ nene (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 11.20-24)
10.13: «Oyo nœ 'e, azu tshalakpɨ Koraze! Oyo nœ 'e, azu tshalakpɨ Betesayida! Gbambanœ nene, œdœ afá á mœ mbœrœ ɓa ndœ 'e kœmbœrœ má tœ endje ɓa lakpɨ Tire œdœ ɓa lakpɨ Sidona, azu tsha ɓa zœ œ verœ má sake yé œ sœ ga lœ vorowo, mbœrœ kœma adœke œne fatshalɔsu œne ye.
10.14: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, dœ olo kœwa ngbanga, endje wa o'o nœ azu Tire œdœ azu Sidona tœ ɔgbɔnœ ɓata œnœ 'e nene.
10.15: Yé e'e dœ azu Kaparnawumu, 'e gbe adœke 'e 'ɔ œrrr ga lafo zœ a? 'E jerœ bala œrrr ɓa lœ ogo nœ akuzu.»
10.16: Yisu kpa pa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Uzu á tshe dji o'o ama 'e; dá tshe dji ndje o'o ama mœ ye. Yé tsheneke á tshe kœyiyindœ o'o ama 'e nene, dá tshe yiyi ndje ndœ o'o ama mœ nene. Dœ tœnœ ataa tshe yiyi ndje ndœ tsheneke á tshe vwa mœ nene.» Kœgu ayambarœ zazu votɔ dœ ndjokpa dœ bisha
10.17: Ayambarœ zazu votɔ dœ ndjokpa dœ bisha gu lima dœ yanga, yé œ pa adœke: «Gbozu, aekpe ɨshirɨ mbœrœtœ endje lindœ o'o ama 'a dœ lɔkɔ á 'a pu o'o fœ endje dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ.»
10.18: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Mœ wu lima Satana, tshe to ɓa lafo, œ te ga atɨ ɓata kœyerœwa yavuru.
10.19: 'E dji mœ kane! Mœ za awa fœ 'e adœke 'e zuru ayakoro œdœ akpalakongo dœ ada 'e, yé gbɔgbɔ 'e ropa œnœ yingba 'e. Ekperœ bale œ mbœrœtœ 'e nene.
10.20: Ataa atamœ gbaa, 'e sœsœ dœ yanga mbœrœ á aekpe ɨshirɨ mbœrœtœ endje lindœ o'o ama 'e nene, kashe 'e sœ dœ yanga mbœrœ á Ndjaba su ɨ'ɨrɨ 'e ga la buku nœ ye ɓa lafo.» Yisu sœ dœ yanga (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 11.25-27; 13.16-17)
10.21: Pe kpœtœ œsœnœ, Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ za yanga fœ Yisu yé tshe pa adœke: «Aba, œɓœ kœdœ Gbozu nœ tshalafo œdœ tshapashɔ! Mœ donga ɓœ mbœrœ ɓœ ma œneke á ɓœ za yiwa tœnœ tœ azu á endje sœ dœ kœwusœtœ dœ pe azu á endje sœ dœ kœwusœrœ, yé á yisœ nœ fœ a'eara azu. Adjapu Aba, œbœ dá yindœ nœ adœke œ mbœrœtœ ye atamœ asœmœ.
10.22: Aba mœ katœ œrœ kɔ fœ mœ. Uzu œ wusœ ádá Gbolo nene, kashe kolœ Aba dá wusœ nœ; uzu bale œ wusœ ádá Aba nene, kashe kolœ Gbolo dá wusœ nœ œdœ pe endjeneke á Gbolo yindœ kœyisœ ye fœ endje.»
10.23: Manda nœ, Yisu fatœ ye ga ndœ ayambarœ nœ ye œ pa fœ endje dœ kutɨ endje adœke: «Yanga nœ azu á endje sœ kœwu œneke á 'e sœ kœwu tœnœ.
10.24: Gbambanœ nene, mœ pa ngbɨ fœ 'e adœke aayi kœgbara o'o œdœ agbozugo ndjoro gbe kœwu œneke á 'e sœ kœwu tœnœ, kashe endje wuwu nene. Endje gbe lima kœdji œneke á 'e dji, kashe endje djidji lima nene.» Kœyindœsho kœdœ awa soro á ka nene (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 22.34-40; Mar 12.28-31)
10.25: Anga ayi kœyisœ awa akwa bale áalafo lima mbœrœ kœwu lɔsu Yisu, yé á yu she adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, œrœ gaɗe dá mœ kœmbœrœ yeka á kœgbɔ soro neke á ka nene a?»
10.26: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «O'o gaɗe dá endje sú ɓa la buku nœ awa akwa a? Ɓœ dɨ ma œnœ zœ kotoo?»
10.27: Uzunœ gi fœ she adœke: «Œ li adœke ɓœ yindœ Gbozu Ndjaba nœ zœ dœ lɔsu zœ bale, dœ ɨshirɨ zœ djigi, dœ gbɔgbɔ zœ œdœ pe dœ gbetshelœ nœ zœ kɔ. Œ li ndje adœke ɓœ yindœ yanga zœ ɓata á ɓœ yindœtœ zœ dœ tœ zœ.»
10.28: Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ gi o'onœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Mbœrœ atamœ yeka á kœgbɔ soro neke á ka nene.» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ uzu Samariya
10.29: Kashe ayi kœyisœ awa akwanœ yi lima ndœ kœma adœke œne tete dœ o'o nene, œ yu Yisu adœke: «Yé ataa, œɗe dá dœ yanga mœ a?»
10.30: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Anga uzu bale to lima ɓa lœ Yerusaleme œ sœ kœro ga lœ Yeriko, yé œ wuta ga tœ ayi angba. Endje verœ lœba tœ ye, œ ko œrœ kɔ tœ ye, yé œ ɓi she ndoo dœ kuzu yeka á katœ ye dœ kœro endje.
10.31: Manda nœ teasho, anga nganga Ndjaba bale sœ lima kœro dœ awanœ asœmœ. Lɔkɔ á tshe wu uzunœ asœmœ, tshe sha pa ye, yé œ ro zara da ye.
10.32: Manda nœ, anga Levi wuta ndje ga tœ oshonœ asœmœ. Lɔkɔ á tshe wu uzunœ asœmœ, tshe sha pa ye, yé œ ro zara da ye.
10.33: Kashe anga uzu Samariya bale á tshe sœ lima kœna gene, wuta ga tœ uzunœ asœmœ. Lɔkɔ á tshe wu she, oyo ye ka she.
10.34: Tshe gitœ ye ndoo dœ she, œ djutɔ uku tœ ye, yé œ ta kada œdœ vinu ga la nœ. Manda nœ, tshe za she ga pa mbarata nœ ye, œ na dœ she ga tœ anda nœ agene, yé á gbɔndœ ye.
10.35: Osho kɔrɔ pa nœ, tshe ko langere ngendja bisha fœ ayengɔ kœgbɔndœ anda nœ agenenœ, yé œ pa fœ she adœke: “Gbɔndœ uzunœ asœke. Œdœ ɓœ kœndɨ anga angbɨ ngendja pa ye kœropa nœ, mœ gi fœ ɓœ lɔkɔ á mœ kœgu tɔ kpœke.”»
10.36: Yé Yisu kpa yu ayi kœyisœ awa akwanœ adœke: «Ɓa tœ zœ nœ zœ, œɗe lœ ugurutœ azunœ asœmœ votɔ dá matœ ye adœke œshe kœdœ yanga uzu á ayi angba ɓi she a?»
10.37: Ayi kœyisœ awa akwanœ gi adœke: «Tsheneke á tshe wu oyo ye, yé á gbɔndœ ye asœmœ.» Ngbewo Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gu zœ, yé œ mbœrœ ndje atamœ.» Yisu na ɓa ndœ Amarata dœ Mareya
10.38: Lɔkɔ á Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye sœ lima tœ awa, tshe wuta ga lœ anga tshalakpɨ bale, yé anga yashe bale lakpɨnœ á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Marta, za osho kœsœ fœ she ɓa sœnda nœ ye.
10.39: Tshe sœ lima dœ anga yingɔnœ á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Mareya. Tshe sœ lima ga atɨ ɓa tœ ada Yisu, yé á sœ kœdji o'o á tshe sœ lima kœpa tœnœ.
10.40: Marta sœ lima dœ akwa ngbangbangba á ropa ye. Tshe na ndoo dœ Yisu œ pa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, mara á yingɔ mœ ka kolœ tœ mœ tɨ kutɨ mœ kœmbœrœ akwa kɔ asœke, sœsœ kœmbœrœ œrœ bale ɓa ndœ zœ nene a? Pa fœ she tshe na, œ tɨ kane mœ ga lafo.»
10.41: Gbozu Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Marta, Marta, mœ wu adœke lɔsu zœ sœ ga lafo yé ɓœ sœ kœdɔtœ zœ mbœrœ œrœ ndjoro.
10.42: Kashe wusœ nœ adœke kolœ œrœ tshebabale dá sœ dœ ádá kœrosœ nœ. Œtœnœ dá Mareya ke œnœ ye asœmœ, uzu bale œ kakara tœ ye nene.»

11.1: Dœ anga ɔlɔ bale, Yisu sœ lima kœza avwala fœ Ndjaba ɓa tœ anga osho bale. Lɔkɔ á tshe za avwalanœ á ka, anga yambarœ nœ ye bale pa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, yisœ mara kœza avwala fœ 'a ɓata á Yowane yi lima sœ nœ fœ ayambarœ nœ ye.»
11.2: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Lɔkɔ á 'e kœsœ kœza avwala, 'e pa adœke: “Aba, œ li adœke azu kɔ lɨsœ œyerœ ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ kaka adœke Ogo gbozu nœ zœ jerœ.
11.3: To rœgo á li adœke 'a zɨ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ fœ 'a.
11.4: Djerœndœ ekperœ nœ 'a, gbambanœ nene a'a ndje, 'a sœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ anga azu á endje sœ kœmbœrœ fœ 'a. Yé gbɔndœ 'a adœke 'a lili ga lœ ekperœ nene.”»
11.5: Yisu kpa pa fœ endje adœke: «Œ kœdœ adœke anga uzu bale lœ ugurutœ 'e kœsœ dœ yanganœ yé á na ga ndœ ye dœ ɔgbɔ butshɔ mbœrœ kœpa fœ she adœke: “Yanga mœ, daka mapa votɔ fœ mœ.
11.6: Gbambanœ nene, anga yanga mœ bale á tshe sœ kœna gene yi kumu ye ga ndœ mœ ngɔngɔ asœke, yé mœ gugu dœ œrœ kœto fœ she bale nene.”
11.7: Yé á kœsœ adœke yanganœ á tshe lo ɓa sœnda gi fœ she adœke: “Katœ mœ, ndandanga mœ nene mbœrœ mœ tshu manda nœ mœ ga tœnœ ye. A'a dœ agbolo nœ mœ á sœ tœ olo; mœ áalafo ndœ kœza mapa fœ ɓœ nene.”
11.8: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke: Ataa œdœ tshe kœáalafo ndœ kœko mapa fœ she mbœrœ á tshe dœ́ yanganœ nene, tshe áalafo yé œ to œneke kɔ á yanganœ gbe dœ tœnœ fœ she mbœrœ á yanganœ shi ngbɨrɨ dœ kœ'e she kpœ pa nœ kpœ pa nœ.
11.9: «Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke: 'e kœyɔndœ œrœ, endje to fœ 'e. 'E kœpara œrœ, 'e gbɔ ye. 'E kœnge manda, endje kɔrɔ fœ 'e.
11.10: Gbambanœ nene, uzu kɔ á tshe yɔndœ œrœ, endje to fœ she; tsheneke á tshe para œrœ, tshe gbɔ; yé tsheneke á tshe nge manda, endje kɔrɔ fœ she ye.
11.11: Aba gbolo neketa ugurutœ 'e dá yindœ nœ adœke œne za yakoro fœ gbolo nœ œne tœ œsœ́ ageatshalangu á tshe yɔndœ nœ a?
11.12: Too œdœ tshe kœyɔndœ oporo ngato, tshe za kpalakongo fœ she a?
11.13: Ataa, œdœ e'e á 'e dœ́ aekpe azu, 'e kœwusœ kœto ɔtshɔrœ fœ agbolo nœ 'e, Aba azœ á tshe sœ ɓa lafo œ vwaratœ ye tœ kœto Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ fœ endjeneke á endje yɔndœ nœ ye a?» Yisu mbœmbœrœ akwa dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Satana nene (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 12.22-30; Mar 3.22-27)
11.14: Anga uzu bale sœ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa ye. Ekpe ɨshirɨnœ asœmœ mbœrœ adœke uzunœ papa o'o nene. Lɔkɔ á Yisu gɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨnœ pa ye, ngbewo tshe tetœ kœpa o'o yé azu ndjoro kɨ lima tœ œsœnœ waa.
11.15: Kashe anga azu pa lima adœke: «Tshe sœ kœgɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨnœ dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Belezebula á tshe dœ gbozu tshapa aekpe ɨshirɨ.»
11.16: Anga endje yi lima ndœ kœwu lɔsu ye, yé œ pa fœ she adœke tshe mbœrœ anga afá bale á sœ kœma adœke gbɔgbɔ nœ ye to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba.
11.17: Kashe Yisu wu lima sœ gbetshelœ nœ endje, œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Œdœ azu lakpɨ ogo bale kœsœ kœnga koshe ugurutœ endje, tshalakpɨnœ œ ndɨ, yé anda œ yo para kɔkɔ ga atɨ.
11.18: Œdœ Satana kœsœ kœnga koshe ga tœ ye dœ tœ ye, Ogo gbozu nœ ye œ shi pa ɔshɔ koto o? Gbambanœ nene, 'e sœ kœpa adœke mœ sœ kœgɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Belezebula.
11.19: Yé ataa œdœ mœ kœsœ kœgɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Belezebula, azu nœ 'e sœ ndje kœgɔrɔ endje dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ ɗe? 'E kœpa ataa, azu nœ 'e œ wa bala ngbanga ga pa 'e dœ tœ endje.
11.20: Kashe œdœ mœ kœsœ kœgɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa azu dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ndjaba, dá œ sœ kœma adœke Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba wuta ga ndœ 'e ye.
11.21: «Lɔkɔ á uzu gbɔgbɔ kœza œrœ koshe á sœ kœgbɔndœ anda nœ ye, œrœ bale œ turutœ œrœ nœ ye nene.
11.22: Kashe œdœ anga angbɨ uzu á tshe ropa ye dœ gbɔgbɔ kœyi kumu ye á gɔrɔ she, tshe gbɔtœ œrœ koshe nœ ye á tshe za lɔsu ye ga pa nœ asœmœ ye. Tshe kurutshelœ œrœ kɔ á tshe ko tœ ye.
11.23: «Uzu á tshe sœsœ awa bale dœ mœ nene, œshe kœdœ yingba mœ. Yé tsheneke á tshe sœsœ kœtɨ kane mœ adœke 'a ngbɔɓa azu nene, sœ kœndjɔtshelœ endje.» Kœkwa ekpe ɨshirɨ ga pa uzu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 12.43-45)
11.24: «Lɔkɔ á ekpe ɨshirɨ kœgitœ ye pa uzu, tshe na djezœ lœ kpagagasho mbœrœ kœpara osho kœsœ tœnœ. Œdœ tshe kœgbɔgbɔ osho kœsœ tœnœ nene, tshe pa ɓa lœ ye adœke: “Mœ kwatœ mœ ga lœ anda nœ mœ á mœ wuta lœ nœ.”
11.25: Tshe kwatœ ye yé œ wu adœke endje ngbɔ tshasœnda, œ guma œrœ tshelœnœ dœ awanœ.
11.26: Kœwu ataa, tshe na œ e anga aekpe ɨshirɨnœ mindu dœ bisha (7) á endje ropa ye, endje gu œ li ga sœndanœ, yé œ sœ kpœtœmœ. Mara kœsœ uzunœ asœmœ kpa sœ tœ ekpenœ kœrosœ œneke utshunœ.» Adja yanga
11.27: Lɔkɔ á Yisu pa o'onœ asœmœ á ka, anga yashe á tshe sœ lima ɓa uguru ukpulu azu, pa fœ she adœke: «Yanga nœ yashe á tshe gbɔ nguzu zœ á zu ɓœ, yé á gbɔndœ zœ dœ ɔngɔ.»
11.28: Kashe Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Azu á endje sœ kœdji o'o ama Ndjaba yé á sœ kœza ga tœ akwa, endje asœmœ dá sœ dœ yanga kœropanœ.» Ambárá afá nœ Gbolo nœ uzu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 12.38-42)
11.29: Ɓata á azu ndjoro sœ lima kœngbɔtœ endje ga ɨndɨrɨ Yisu, tshe tetœ kœpa o'o fœ endje adœke: «Azu nœ tshakpesheke asœ kœdœ aekpe azu. Endje yindœ nœ adœke œne wu anga ambárá afá bale á sœ kœma adœke mœ to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba. Kashe endje wu bale nene, kolœ ambárá œneke á Ndjaba ma lœ awa nœ Yona.
11.30: Gbambanœ nene, ɓata á azu Ninive wu lima ambárá lœ awa nœ Yona, Gbolo nœ uzu œ dœ ambárá mbœrœ azu nœ tshakpesheke.
11.31: Dœ lɔkɔ kœwa ngbanga, gbozu yashe tshapa ogo ɓa lœ Sudi, œ tɔ meza pa azu nœ tshakpesheke. Gbambanœ nene, tshe to ɓa lœ ndɔngɔlɔ tshakala ogo pa ɔshɔ á na kœdji o'o á sú dœ kœwusœtœ nœ Salomo. Kashe anga uzu á tshe sœ ɓa ke, tshe ropa Salomo ye.
11.32: Dœ lɔkɔ kœwa ngbanga, azu tshalakpɨ Ninive œ tɔ meza pa azu nœ tshakpesheke. Gbambanœ nene, azu Ninive fatshalɔsu endje lɔkɔ á Yona yisœ o'o ama Ndjaba fœ endje. Kashe anga uzu á tshe sœ ɓa ke, tshe ropa Yona ye.» O'o tœ upu nœ miinda (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 5.15; 6.22-23; Mar 4.21; Luk 8.16)
11.33: «Uzu bale tata owo ga tœ miinda mbœrœ kœza yiwa tœnœ too kœza ga tshakudu lɔsu nene; kashe tshe za ga pa gbarœ á endje za miinda ga pa nœ mbœrœ adœke azu kɔ á endje li ga sœnda, mesho ngbɨ tœnœ.
11.34: Miinda nœ undu zœ kœdœ ala zœ. Œdœ ala zœ kœsœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, undu zœ djigi œ sœ ndje lœ ɨngbɨsho. Kashe œdœ ala zœ kœsœ dœ koɓa, undu zœ ndje œ sœ lœ ubu osho.
11.35: Ataa, sœ dœ gbɔdjela adœke miinda á sœ ɓa ndœ zœ, œ dœ ubu osho nene.
11.36: Œdœ undu zœ djigi kœsœ tœ ɨngbɨsho yé anga osho bale kœsœsœ lœ ubu osho nene, undu zœ œ sœ lœ ɨngbɨsho ɓata ɨshirɨ miinda á tshi ga tœ zœ.» Yisu gbagbara Afarisayi œdœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 23.4-36)
11.37: Lɔkɔ á Yisu pa o'o á ka, anga Farisayi bale e she adœke tshe na dœ́ œ zɨ œrœ ɓa ndœ œne. Yisu na œ li ga sœnda nœ ye, yé œ sœ ga ɨndɨrɨ ndaba kœzɨrœ.
11.38: Kœwu lima adœke Yisu djudjutɔ kane ye ɓata awa akwa pa tœnœ utshu kœzɨrœ nene, Farisayinœ kɨtœ œsœnœ.
11.39: Yé Gbozu kœpa fœ she adœke: «E'e dœ Afarisayi, 'e sœ kœdjutɔ kolœ tshapa yashi œdœ tshapa saani, kashe lɔsu 'e sú dœ ogo kœzɨ angba œdœ pe dœ ókó.
11.40: E'e kœdœ agbakɨndɨ! Ndjaba á tshe mbœrœ tshapa œrœ, œ dœ́dœ́ she dá mbœrœ ndje tshœlœnœ nene a?
11.41: 'E ko œrœ á sœ ɓa lœ yashi œdœ œneke ɓa lœ saane nœ 'e, tœ makabo fœ aayi oyo. Yé atamœ, œrœ kɔ á 'e mbœrœ, œ sœ yerœ.
11.42: «Kashe oyo nœ 'e dœ́ Afarisayi! Mbœrœ 'e sœ kœto bale lœ ndjokpa lœ kako dɔngɔ ɓata tshalumba, dimbili œdœ tshelœ aka dɔngɔ kɔ, fœ Ndjaba. Kashe 'e sœ kœdjerœndœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœ ndjii œdœ pe kœyindœ Ndjaba. Œrœ á li adœke 'e mbœrœ dœmœ, kashe 'e kaka ndje tœ asœmœ nene.
11.43: «Oyo nœ 'e dœ Afarisayi! Mbœrœ ɓa lœ Sinagoga, 'e yindœ kœsœ kolœ ɓa utshunœ ɓa tœ osho agboro azu, yé œ sœ kœyi kolœ ndœ nœ adœke azu bala 'e ɓa tœ œsœ́ angbɔtœ.
11.44: Oyo nœ 'e! Mbœrœ 'e sœ ɓata tshapa udu á anga œrœ bale sœsœ pa nœ nene, yé á azu wuwusœ nœ nene á sœ kœna tɔpanœ.»
11.45: Yé kœdji o'onœ ataa, anga ayi kœyisœ awa akwa nœ Ayuda bale pa fœ Yisu adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, o'onœ á ɓœ pa asœmœ, ɓœ sœ kœgu ndje 'a!»
11.46: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Oyo nœ 'e ndje dœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa nœ Ayuda! Mbœrœ 'e sœ kœko ogboro kongba ga pa kumu azu, kashe 'e tuturutœ anganœ dœ yɔkɔne 'e bale nene tœ kœtɨ kane endje.
11.47: Oyo nœ 'e! Mbœrœ 'e sœ kœguma tshapa udu aayi kœgbara o'o á endje tshu, andaa aata 'e dá wo lima endje.
11.48: Ataa, 'e sœ kœma adœke 'e yindœ œrœ á aata 'e mbœrœ lima ye. Gbambanœ nene, endje wo lima aayi kœgbara o'o yé á 'e sœ kœguma tshapa udu endje.
11.49: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa dá Ndjaba lœ kœwusœtœ nœ ye, pa adœke: “Mœ vwa bala aayi kœgbara o'o œdœ aayi avwa fœ endje; endje wo anga endje, yé œ mbœrœ œrœ kanga ga tœ anga endje.”
11.50: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Ndjaba œ za djofele fœ azu nœ tshakpesheke mangba kuzu nœ aayi kœgbara o'o kɔ á endje wo lima endje, kœto ɓa tœ ali kœmbœrœ tshapashɔ,
11.51: Kœto kpœtœ kuzu Abele œrrr ga tœ œnœ Zakariya á endje wo lima she ɓa uguru ndaba tokóró œdœ œyerœ osho. Adjapu, mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ ngbɨ fœ 'e adœke, azu nœ tshakpesheke œ gbɔ djofele tshaangbanœ.
11.52: «Oyo nœ 'e dœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa nœ ayuda! Mbœrœ 'e za herela nœ kœwusœrœ: E'e dœ tœ 'e 'e lili ga zœ nene, yé 'e sœ kœpakata endjeneke á endje yindœ kœli tœnœ.»
11.53: Lɔkɔ á Yisu wuta lœ andanœ asœmœ, ayi kœyisœ awa akwa nœ ayuda dœ pe Afarisayi, sœ dœ ókó yé œ te lima tœ kœyu she tœ mara tshelœ áká o'o kɔ.
11.54: Endje sœ lima dœ gbetshelœ nœ kœgɨ uku ga tœ awa ye yeka á kœgbɔ she lœ o'o ye.

12.1: Dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, azu ngbɔtœ endje kofokofo ga tœnœ dœ mara adœke endje zurutœ endje. Yisu pa utshunœ fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «'E gbɔndœtœ 'e tœ ɔyɔ kœsuku mapa nœ Afarisayi, œ yindœ kœpa adœke œrœ wulapatshɔ nœ endje.
12.2: Gbambanœ nene, œneke kɔ á zatœ endje yiwa tœnœ œdœ pe œneke kɔ á patœ endje lœ ubunœ, œ wuta.
12.3: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, o'o kɔ á 'e pa lœ ubunœ, azu kɔ œ dji ngbɨ dœ ɔlɔ. Yé o'o kɔ á 'e pa ga lœ utu anga uzu ɓa lœ gbɔshɔ, œ wuta ga shu ga pa anda ye.» Kœza lɔsu ga tœ Ndjaba (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 10.28-31)
12.4: «Mœ sœ kœpandœ nœ fœ 'e dœ anga mœ adœke: 'e kpakpa awa azu á endje wo ɔkɔ nene, mbœrœ endje kpa mbœrœ œrœ bale manda nœ nene.
12.5: Mœ sœ kœyisœ uzu á li adœke 'e kpa awa ye fœ 'e: 'e kpa awa Ndjaba á tshe sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ kœvwi 'e ga lœ kudu owo manda kuzu 'e. Mœ pa fœ 'e adœke œshe dá 'e kœkpa awa ye.
12.6: Endje kaka a'eara ayanu mindu dœ ama ngendja teasho nene a? Kashe Ndjaba djedjerœndœ anga bale lœ ugurutœ endje nene.
12.7: Œdœ ndje sukumu 'e, Ndjaba dɨ kɔ. Awa mbœmbœrœ 'e nene, gbambanœ nene, œsœ 'e lɨ kœropa a'eara ayanu.» Kœvwaratœsho too kœyindœ Yisu Kristu
12.8: «Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e atake: Tsheneke á tshe matœ ye ngbɨ ɓa utshu azu adœke œne kœdœ uzu nœ mœ, Gbolo nœ uzu œ ma ndje she ngbɨ ɓa utshu aandjelu nœ Ndjaba adœke œshe kœdœ uzu nœ œne.
12.9: Kashe tsheneke á tshe vwaratœ ye tœ mœ ɓa utshu azu kɔ; œmœ dœ Gbolo nœ uzu, mœ vwara ndje tœ mœ tœ ye ɓa utshu aandjelu nœ Ndjaba kɔ, adœke mœ wuwusœ ye nene.
12.10: Yé ekpe o'o á uzu kɔ œ pa tœ upu nœ Gbolo nœ uzu, Ndjaba œ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ ye. Kashe tsheneke á tshe kœgusœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ, Ndjaba œ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ ye nene.
12.11: Dœ lɔkɔ á endje kœto 'e na tœnœ ɓa utshu Sinagoga too ɓa utshu aayi kœwa ngbanga too ɓa utshu agbozu nœ Lita, 'e tɔtɔ lɔsu 'e tœ mara á 'e gi dœ o'o fœ endje nene.
12.12: Gbambanœ nene, Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ œ yisœ o'o á li adœke 'e pa kolœ pe dœ ada ɔlɔnœ asœmœ fœ 'e.» Ndœma toro nœ ayi ɨndɨ
12.13: Anga uzu ɓa ugurutœ ukpulu azu pa fœ Yisu adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, pandœ nœ fœ aya mœ dœ́ tshe kurutshelœ œrœ á aba 'a katœ nœ tɨ fœ 'a, tœ mœ dœ she.»
12.14: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Œɗe dá za mœ tœ ayi kœwa ngbanga too tœ ayi kœkurutshelœ œrœ nœ 'e a?»
12.15: Manda nœ, tshe pa fœ endje kɔ adœke: «Ala 'e gbɔ kane! 'E sœsœ dœ egerœ lɔsu mbœrœ kœgbɔ œrœ tshapashɔ asœke nene. Gbambanœ nene, soro nœ uzu sœsœ mbœrœ œrœ nœ ye nene, œdœ tshe kœdœ ndje ayi kœgbɔrœ gbaa.»
12.16: Yé manda nœ, Yisu pa anga ndœma Toro bale fœ endje adœke: «Anga ayi kœgbɔrœ bale sœ lima dœ egerœ kɨndɨ nœ ye á tshe sœ lima kœgbɔ rœgo lœ nœ waa.
12.17: Tshe sœ lima kœgbe tshelœ ye yé œ sœ kœyutœ ye adœke: “Œrœ gaɗe dá mœ kœmbœrœ a? Mœ gugu dœ osho kœngbɔɓa rœgo nœ mœ kɔ ga tœnœ nene.”
12.18: Tshe kpa pa adœke: “Œrœ á mœ mbœrœ dœke: Mœ ndɨ tshelœ kogba nœ mœ, yé œ mɔ anga yɔngɔngɔnœ á li adœke mœ ngbɔɓa ble œdœ anga œrœ nœ mœ kɔ ga lœ nœ.
12.19: Manda nœ, mœ kpa pa tœ upu nœ mœ dœ tœ mœ adœke: Mœ sœ dœ œrœ waa mangba ungu ndjoro. Œ li adœke mœ yatœ mœ, mœ zɨ œrœ, mœ ndjo œrœ yé œ sœ dœ yanga.”
12.20: Kashe Ndjaba pa fœ she adœke: “Ɨndɨ, dœ butshɔ asœke ɓœ sœ dœ soro nene. Yé œrœnœ á ɓœ ngbɔɓa tsho tsho tsho ga tœnœ asœke œ dœ œnœ ɗe?”»
12.21: Yisu kpa pa adœke: «Asœ kœdœ œneke á wuta ga tœ uzu á tshe ngbɔɓa œrœ tshapashɔ kolœ mbœrœ she dœ tœ ye, kashe á dœ́dœ́ ayi kœgbɔrœ ɓa utshu Ndjaba nene.» A za lɔsu azœ djigi fœ Ndjaba (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 6.25-34)
12.22: Manda nœ, Yisu pa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «'E wu ádánœ á mœ pa fœ 'e adœke: 'e zaza lɔsu 'e ga lafo tœ upu nœ kœzɨrœ á 'e gbe dœ tœnœ mbœrœ soro, too tœ upu nœ lœba á 'e gbe dœ tœnœ mbœrœ ɔkɔ 'e nene.
12.23: Gbambanœ nene, soro nœ uzu ropa kœzɨrœ, yé undu uzu ropa lœba ye.
12.24: 'E tondœ adiigbaga: endje lulu ngwarœ nene yé œ kɔkɔ ndje ngwarœ ɓa lœ kɨndɨ nene. Endje gugu dœ kudu too dœ kogba kœngbɔɓa rœgo nœ endje ga lœnœ nene, kashe Ndjaba sœ kœto rœgo fœ endje. E'e, œsœ 'e lɨ kœropa ayanu.
12.25: Œɗe lœ ugurutœ 'e dá li kœza anga olo soro nœ ye ga panœ lœ awa nœ gbetshelœ á tshe sœ dœ tœnœ a?
12.26: Œdœ 'e kœsœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ kœmbœrœ aya œrœ nene, mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e za lɔsu 'e ga lafo tœ udu œrœ a?
12.27: 'E tondœ mara á ndɔkɔ leyɔ sœ kœgboro dœ tœnœ ɓa lœ kɨndɨ. Œ sœsœ kœmbœrœ akwa nene, yé œ susu ndje lœba nene. Kashe mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke, ataa Salomo á tshe dœ ayi kœgbɔrœ gbaa, tshe gbɔgbɔ lima lœba á ga ɓata anga ndɔkɔ leyɔnœ asœmœ bale nene.
12.28: Œdœ Ndjaba kœverœ lœba ga tœ oforo á sœ lœ kɨndɨ kpesheke asœ, yé ɓa mbatsha á endje li ndœ kœko va ga tœ owo; kœropa nœ kɔ, œnœ 'e dœ́ azu á 'e sœ dœ kœyindœrœ teasho, Ndjaba œ mbœrœ œrœ fœ 'e.
12.29: «'E zaza lɔsu 'e ga lafo tœ upu nœ œrœ gaɗe dá 'e zɨ too á 'e ndjo nene.
12.30: Azu tshapashɔnœ asœke á endje wuwusœ Ndjaba nene dá sœ kœpara œrœnœ asœmœ kɔ. Kashe e'e, 'e sœ dœ anga Aba 'e bale á tshe wusœ nœ adœke 'e gbe dœ tœnœ.
12.31: 'E para utshunœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba; yé udu œrœ kɔkɔ, Ndjaba œ to fœ 'e manda nœ.» Kœgbɔ œrœ ndjoro ɓa lafo (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 6.19-21)
12.32: «Aya ukpulu apata nœ mœ, 'e sœsœ dœ awa nene. Gbambanœ nene, Aba 'e sœ dœ yanga kœza ogo tshagbozu nœ ye fœ 'e.
12.33: 'E ka œrœ nœ 'e yé œ ko ngendjanœ tœ makabo fœ ayi oyo. 'E su ngbade ngendja á li kœndɨ tœnœ bale nene, 'e gbɔndœ œrœ ndjoro ɓa lafo, mbœrœ ɓa zœ, aayi angba œ zɨ angbanœ nene, akɔkɔ œ zɨ nene.
12.34: Gbambanœ nene, osho á kœgbɔrœ nœ 'e sœ tœnœ, lɔsu 'e sœ ndje kpœtœmœ.» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ kœkotœsho ga lœ vola (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 24.43-44)
12.35: «'E verœ lœba akwa, œ kotœ 'e ga lœ vola, yé œ gbɔndœ miinda nœ 'e adœke œ ruru nene.
12.36: 'E sœ ɓata aayi akwa á endje sœ kœkate gbozu nœ endje adœke lɔkɔ á tshe kœto ɓa tœ œsœ ngbɔtœ totœ á gu, yé á nge manda yeka œne kœkɔrɔ fœ she.
12.37: Yanga nœ aayi akwa á gbozu nœ endje kœgu, á gbɔ endje dœ óvóró ala endje. Mœ sœ kœpa dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke: Tshe verœ lœba akwa, œ pa fœ endje adœke endje sœ ga atɨ mbœrœ kœzɨ œrœ, yé tshe ko rœgo na tœnœ fœ endje.
12.38: Œdœ tshe kœkwatœ ye dœ midi nœ butshɔ too ndje lœ ɨkɨ kɔngato, yé á tshe kœgbɔ aayi akwanœ dœ óvóró ala ndje, endje sœ dœ yanga waa.
12.39: «'E wusœ œneke dœ ɔtshɔnœ: Œdœ ayengɔ anda kœwusœ ada ɔlɔ á ayi angba œ na dœ tœnœ, tshe katœ ye adœke tshe kavwa manda anda nœ ye nene.
12.40: E'e ndje, œ kotœ 'e ga lœ vola! Gbambanœ nene, Gbolo nœ uzu œ na dœ ada ɔlɔ neke á 'e wuwusœ nœ nene.» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ ɔtshɔ ayi akwa dœ ekpe ayi akwa (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 24.45-51)
12.41: Yé Petro yu adœke: «Gbozu, ɓœ sœ kœpa ndœma Toronœ asœmœ kolœ fœ 'a too fœ azu kɔ?»
12.42: Gbozu gi fœ she adœke: «Atamœ œɗe dá dœ kapeta á tshe yɔrɔtœ ye yé á sœ dœ kœwusœrœ adœke gbozu za she ga pa aayi akwa nœ ye mbœrœ kœkurutshelœ rœgo tœ endje dœ lɔkɔnœ á li a?
12.43: Yanga nœ ayi akwa neke á gbozu nœ ye kœgu á gbɔ she lœ ama akwanœ.
12.44: Adjapu, mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ ngbɨ fœ 'e adœke gbozu œ za she tœ kapeta tshapa œrœ nœ ye kɔ.
12.45: Kashe œdœ ayi akwanœ kœpa adœke: “Gbozu nœ mœ œ gu katsha nene”, yé á tetœ kœɓi udu anga ayi akwanœ: Agbolo yakoshe œdœ ayawuru; œdœ tshe kœzɨ œrœ yé á ndjo œrœ á mbœrœ she,
12.46: gbozu nœ ayi akwanœ asœmœ œ gu dœ olo œdœ pe dœ ada ɔlɔ á tshe wuwusœ nœ nene, tshe ɓi ayi akwanœ œ gɔrɔ she yé œ mbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ she ɓata á endje mbœrœ ga tœ endjeneke á endje sœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ nene.
12.47: «Ayi akwa á tshe wusœ œrœ á gbozu nœ ye sœ kœyindœ nœ yé á tshapu kœgumatœ ye yindjindjinœ, tshe sɔ she dœ ndjapa awa ndjoro.
12.48: Kashe ayi akwa á tshe kœwuwusœ œrœ á gbozu nœ ye yindœ nœ nene, yé á mbœrœ ataa, gbozunœ œ sɔ she dœ ndjapa awa ndjoro nene. Uzu á endje kœto œrœ fœ she ndjoro, endje yu she tœ œrœ ndjoro. Yé tsheneke á endje ko œrœ fœ she ropa nœ, endje kpa yu she tœ œrœ kœropa nœ.» Yisu na mbœrœ gaɗe? (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 10.34-36)
12.49: Yisu pa adœke: «Mœ na kœyi owo ga pa ɔshɔnœ asœ, yé ogo nœ mœ adœke owonœ tetœ kœtshi tœnœ ye.
12.50: Mœ yindœ kœgbɔ batisimu, yé œ li adœke mœ wu oyo œrrr ga tœnœ adœke œ mbœrœtœ endje.
12.51: 'E gbe adœke mœ na kœza kœsœ gee ɓa pa ɔshɔnœ asœke a? Œ̃ œ̃ nene, mœ pa fœ 'e adœke mbœrœ upu nœ mœ azu œ li ga lœ kœkurutshelœtœsho.
12.52: Ngɔngɔnœ asœke, azu mindu á endje sœ sœnda bale, endje kurutshelœtœ endje: Azu votɔ œ yindœ anga endje bisha nene, yé azu bisha œ yi ndje ndœ anga endje votɔ nene.
12.53: Aba œ yindœ gbolo yakoshe nœ ye nene, yé gbolo yakoshe œ yi ndje ndœ abanœ nene. Ayi gbolo œ yindœ yawuru nœ ye nene, yé yawuru œ yi ndje ndœ ayinœ nene. Yinɨ yashe œ yindœ awo gbolo yakoshe nene, yé awo gbolo nœ ye dœ yakoshe œ yi ndje ndœ yinɨnœ dœ yashe nene.» Kœwusœ ambárá œrœ nœ tshakpesheke
12.54: Yisu pa ndje lima fœ ukpulu azu adœke: «Œdœ 'e kœwu ondoro á za tɨtɨtɨ ɓa tœ osho á ɔlɔ œ li tœnœ, atamœ 'e pa kolœnœ adœke: “Yavuru œ ni zœ”, ngbewo œ mbœrœ adja tœ ye ata ye.
12.55: Yé œdœ 'e kœwu yugu kœto ɓa lœ sudi kœza gu tœnœ, yé á 'e pa adœke: “osho œ owo zœ”, ngbewo œ mbœrœ adja tœ ye ata ye.
12.56: E'e dœ awulapatshɔ, 'e li kœwusœ ambárá œrœ tshapa ɔshɔ œdœ œnœ tshalafo, kashe mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e wuwusœ ádá œrœ nœ tshakpesheke á sœ kœmbœrœtœ ye asœke nene a?» 'E guma tshagurutœ 'e utshu kœwa ngbanga (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 5.25-26)
12.57: Yisu kpa pa adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e wawa ngbanga dœ tœ 'e tœ œneke á sœ ndjii nene a?
12.58: Œdœ ɓœ kœsœ kœna dœ uzu á ɓœ sœ dœ o'o dœ she ga utshu ayi kœwa ngbanga, mbœrœ adœke 'e guma o'onœ lœ ugurutœ 'e dœ she tœ ala awa. Ɓœ mbœrœ atamœ kpa awa adœke ayi kœwa ngbanganœ kœzaza ɓœ ga tshakane aprusu nene, yé aprusunœ kœvwivwi ɓœ ga lœ kánga nene.
12.59: Mœ sœ kœpandœ nœ fœ ɓœ adœke, ɓœ wuta lœ kánga nene œrrr ga tœ kœgi ngendja kɔ ye kane.»

13.1: Dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, anga azu na ga ndœ Yisu ndœ kœpandœ upu nœ azu Galilayi á Pilato wo lima endje lɔkɔ á endje sœ kœza tokóró fœ Ndjaba.
13.2: Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «'E gbe adœke azu Galilayinœ asœmœ kœdœ aekpe azu á endje ropa udu azu Galilayi kɔ dœ ekperœ yekane á tshu kuzunœ asœmœ a?
13.3: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke, wala dœmœ. Kashe œdœ 'e kœfafatshalɔsu 'e nene, e'e para 'e tshu ndje ɓata endje.
13.4: Yé azu ndjokpa dœ mindu dœ amanœ votɔ lœ Yerusaleme á endje tshu lima lɔkɔ á egerœ anda ɓa lœ Silowe kavwa, 'e gbe adœke ekperœ nœ endje ropa œnœ azu para lœ Yerusaleme ye a?
13.5: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke, wala dœmœ. Kashe œdœ 'e kœfafatshalɔsu 'e nene, e'e para 'e tshu ndje ɓata endje.» Ndœma Toro tœ upu nœ ɔyɔ fige á tshapu kœle tœnœ
13.6: Yé Yisu kœpa Ndœma Toro asœke fœ endje adœke: «Anga uzu bale lu lima ɔyɔ fige ga lœ kɨndɨ nœ ye. Anga ɔlɔ bale, tshe na ndœ kœkɔ ele figenœ, kashe tshe gbɔgbɔ nene.
13.7: Yé tshe pa fœ ayi akwa tshelœ kɨndɨ nœ ye adœke: “wu kane, ungu votɔ kɔ, mœ sœ kœna ndœ kœkɔ ele fige asœ yé mœ sœsœ kœgbɔ tœnœ nene. De ga atɨ ye. Œ sœ kœndɨ ɔshɔ gbambanœ.”
13.8: Kashe ayi akwa kɨndɨnœ gi fœ she adœke: “Gbozu, kpa katœnœ dœ ungunœ asœke kane; mœ dji kudu dji adanœ, œ va oforo ga zœ.
13.9: Anganœ nene ungu manda nœ, œ le zœ. Á œ kœsœsœ ataa nene, ɓœ kœde ga atɨ.”» Yisu she anga yashe bale dœ ɔlɔ sabata
13.10: Dœ anga ɔlɔ sabata bale, Yisu sœ lima kœyisœ œrœ ɓa lœ Sinagoga.
13.11: Anga yashe bale sœ lima dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ á lu she manda ungu ndjokpa dœ mindu dœ amanœ votɔ, tshe lu vwerele, yé tshe lili ndœ kœyɔrɔ tshelœtœ ye ndjii nene.
13.12: Kœwu she ataa, Yisu e she œ pa fœ she adœke: «Yashe, ɓœ she ye, koɓa nœ zœ ka ye.»
13.13: Tshe to kane ye ga pa ye; trale atake, yashe kœka ndjii yé œ kœtetœ kœdonga Ndjaba.
13.14: Kashe gbozu tshapa Sinagoga wu lima tœ ekpenœ mbœrœ á Yisu she uzu dœ ɔlɔ sabata, yé œ pa fœ ukpulu azunœ adœke: «A sœ dœ olo mindu dœ bale nœ kœmbœrœ akwa; 'e na lœ olonœ asœmœ á endje kœshe 'e, kashe dœ ɔlɔ sabata nene.»
13.15: Gbozu kœgi fœ she adœke: «E'e kœdœ aayi tshelœma, 'e sœsœ kœkɔrɔ angombe too ambarata nœ 'e dœ ɔlɔ sabata adœke endje na ndœ kœndjo ungu nene a?
13.16: Yé yashe asœ, ata Abrayamo á Satana i ɓa lima she ga tœnœ manda ungu ndjokpa dœ mindu dœ amanœ votɔ, œ lili má adœke mœ vwara she dœ ɔlɔ sabata nene a?»
13.17: Manda o'onœ asœ, ayingba ye gbɔ tshula kashe ukpulu azu para sœ lima dœ yanga nœ ɔtshɔ akwa á Yisu sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ. Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ a'eara ele mutarde œdœ ɔyɔ kœsuku mapa (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 13.31-33; Mar 4.30-32)
13.18: Yisu kœpa adœke: «Œrœ gaɗe dá li dœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba? Mœ li dœ œrœ gaɗe?
13.19: Œ lili dœ a'eara ele mutarde á uzu œ ko angwanœ ndœ kœlu ga lœ kɨndɨ nœ ye. Œ ko, œ gerœ ɓata ɔyɔ á ayanu œ mbœrœ koma endje ga lœ ganeanœ.»
13.20: Yisu kpa pa adœke: «Œrœ gaɗe dá mœ li dœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba ma a?
13.21: Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba lili dœ ɔyɔ kœsuku mapa á yashe œ to ga ndœ zuwa ndjoro lœ egerœ gbarœ adœke œ suku.» Œɗe dá li ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba a? (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 7.13-14,21-23)
13.22: Yisu ro lima tɔ lœ ongbo dœpe lakpɨ kœyisœ œrœ fœ azu tœ awa ndœ kœro ga lœ Yerusaleme.
13.23: Anga uzu kœyu she adœke: «Gbozu, azu á endje she bala, endje ngba zœ a?» Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke:
13.24: «'E pa avwara ndœ kœli tœ manda neke á sœ teasho. Gbambanœ nene, mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke azu ndjoro œ para bala awa ndœ kœli tœnœ, kashe endje li nene.
13.25: «Lɔkɔ á ayengɔ anda kœalafo á tshu manda nœ ye ga tœnœ, e'e, 'e sœ ɓa shu, 'e tetœ kœnge manda yé œ pa adœke: “Gbozu, kɔrɔ manda fœ 'a.” Kashe tshe gi fœ 'e adœke: “Mœ wuwusœ osho á 'e to tœnœ nene!”
13.26: Yé, 'e pa fœ she adœke: “A zɨ lima œrœ yé œ ndjo lima œrœ kpœsœnœ bale dœ ɓœ, ɓœ yisœ œrœ dje lœ ongbo nœ 'a.”
13.27: Kashe tshe kpa pa fœ 'e adœke: “Mœ wuwusœ osho á 'e totœnœ nene, 'e gitœ 'e ɨndɨrɨ mœ ga zœ, e'e para dá sœ lima kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœsœ ndjii nene.”
13.28: «Dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, 'e tetœ ɨkɨ dœpe kœzɨ tshelœ da iji 'e, lɔkɔ á 'e kœwu Abrayamo, Izaka, Yakobo œdœ pe aayi kœgbara o'o para á endje sœ ɓa lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba; yé e'e, endje ko 'e va ga shu.
13.29: Azu ndjoro œ to ɓa tœ osho á ɔlɔ œ wuta tœnœ œdœ ɓa tœ osho á ɔlɔ œ li tœnœ, ɓa tœ nɔrœ dœ pe ɓa tœ sudi, yeka á na kœgbɔ osho ɓa lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba.
13.30: «Yé ataa, azu á endje sœ tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ kpesheke, endje te azu nœ kœsœ utshunœ, yé anga azu á endje sœ lima utshunœ, œ te azu nœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ.» Yisu kɨ tœ upu nœ Yerusaleme (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 23.37-39)
13.31: Kolœ dœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, anga azu Farisayi na ga ndœ Yisu, œ pa fœ she adœke: «Gitœ zœ kpœke, œ na ga tœ anga osho, mbœrœ Erode yindœ kœwo ɓœ.»
13.32: Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «'E na œ pa fœ uzunœ á tshe sœ ɓata rawo kœko angato asœmœ adœke, mœ sœ kœgɔrɔ ekpe ɨshirɨ dœ pe kœshe ayi koɓa kpesheke dœ ɓa mbatsha, tœ votɔ olonœ dá akwa nœ mœ ka ye.
13.33: Kashe œ li adœke mœ áalafo ndœ awa ana nœ mœ kpesheke, ɓa mbatsha œdœ pe ɓambiya, mbœrœ œ lili adœke ayi kœgbara o'o tshu ɓa shu nene, kashe ɓa lœ Yerusaleme.
13.34: «Yerusaleme, Yerusaleme, œɓœ á ɓœ sœ kœwo aayi kœgbara o'o yé á sœ kœve endjeneke á Ndjaba sœ kœvwa endje fœ 'e dœ badja! Awa ndjoro, mœ yi lima ndœ kœngbɔɓa azu nœ zœ ga tœ œsœnœ bale ɓata á ayi ngato œ ngbɔɓa ayanœ dœ ombo ye ga tshakudu ye, kashe 'e yiyi lima ndœ nœ nene.
13.35: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Ndjaba œ gi ala ye pa tshalakpɨ nœ 'e ye. Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e, 'e kpa wu mœ nene œrrr ga tœ lɔkɔ á 'e pa adœke: “Kaka Ndjaba to kane ye ga pa uzu á tshe na dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu!”»

14.1: Dœ anga ɔlɔ sabata bale, Yisu na lima ɓa sœnda nœ anga gbozu nœ Afarisayi ndœ kœzɨrœ. Azu á endje sœ lima ɓa zœ sœ kœtondœ Yisu dœ kœwusœrœ.
14.2: Anga uzu bale á kotœ ye memerœ dœ koɓa ungu, ka lima ɓa utshu ye.
14.3: Yisu kœyu ayi kœyisœ awa akwa dœpe Afarisayi adœke: «Awa akwa nœ ogo nœ azœ sœ kœza awa fœ uzu adœke tshe she ayikoɓa dœ ɔlɔ sabata a too nene?»
14.4: Kashe endje sœ lima kokoko. Yé Yisu kœtepa ayikoɓanœ asœmœ, œ she she, yé á za awa fœ she.
14.5: Manda nœ, Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Uzu ɗe ugurutœ 'e á gbolo yakoshe nœ ye too ngombe nœ ye kœte ga lœ kudu dœ ɔlɔ sabata, á tshe jerœ katsha ndœ kœza she nene a?»
14.6: Yé endje lili kœgi lima o'o bale ndœ nœ nene. Kœpara osho neke á sœ ɓa tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ
14.7: Yisu wu lima mara á Afarisayi á tshe e endje, sœ ndœ kœpara ɔtshɔ osho yeka á sœ lima kœsœ ga tœnœ, yé á pa lœ ndœma toro fœ endje para kɔkɔ adœke:
14.8: «Œdœ uzu kœ'e ɓœ ndœ angbo nœ totœ, nana œ sœ ɓa utshunœ nene. Mbœrœ anganœ, endje e ndje uzu á œsœ ye lɨ kœropa zœ.
14.9: Yé á kœsœ adœke tshe na manda nœ, á ayi angbonœ pa fœ ɓœ adœke: “Katœ osho tɨ fœ she.” Ataa dœ tshula tœ ala zœ kɔ, ɓœ na œ sœ ɓa tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ.
14.10: Kashe, endje kœ'e ɓœ ɓa tœ œsœ angbo, na œ sœ ɓa tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ. Yeka á ayi angbonœ kœna, á kœpa fœ ɓœ adœke: “Yanga mœ, aalafo œ na œ sœ ɓa utshunœ.” Ataa dá œsœ zœ œ lɨ tœ ala endjeneke á 'e sœ dœ endje pa ndaba kœzɨrœ bale.
14.11: Gbambanœ nene, uzu kɔ á tshe zatœ ye dœ tœ ye ga lafo, endje ku she ga atɨ, yé tsheneke á tshe zatœ ye ga atɨ, endje tɨ she ga lafo.»
14.12: Manda nœ, Yisu kœpa fœ uzu á tshe e she adœke: «Œdœ ɓœ kpa kœsœ dœ angbo, e e anga zœ, aaya zœ, aayo zœ, amashenga nœ zœ á endje dœ aayi kœgbɔrœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, endje e ndje ɓœ ndœ œnœ endje, yé œ gi œrœ nœ zœ asœmœ kɔ fœ ɓœ ye.
14.13: Kashe œdœ ɔlɔ á ɓœ kœsœ dœ angbo, e aayi oyo, agbakɨndɨ azu, aayi gbada œdœ pe aayibula ndœ nœ.
14.14: Ataa ɓœ sœ dœ yanga mbœrœ endje gugu dœ œrœ kœgi fœ ɓœ nene, kolœ Ndjaba dá gi fœ ɓœ lɔkɔ á tshe she bala ɔtshɔ azu lœ akuzu.» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ egerœ angbo (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 22.1-10)
14.15: Kœdji o'onœ asœmœ ataa, anga uzu bale á tshe sœ lima ugurutœ azu á endje sœ lima pa ndaba kœzɨrœ yu Yisu adœke: «Yanga nœ uzu á tshe gbɔ osho lœ angbo á Ndjaba œ mbœrœ bala ɓa lœ ogo tshagbozu nœ ye.»
14.16: Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Anga uzu bale yi lima ndœ kœmbœrœ egerœ angbo nœ ye, yé tshe e azu ndjoro.
14.17: Ada ɔlɔ nœ kœzɨrœ li, tshe vwa ayi akwa nœ ye fœ azu á tshe e má endje adœke: “'E na ga mœ, ngɔngɔnœ asœke mœ guma œrœnœ para ye.”
14.18: Kashe endje para, awa bale, endje tetœ kœyɔndœ nœ adœke tshe wu oyo œne. Ali uzunœ pa adœke: “Mœ totœ kœyɔ kɨndɨ bale, yé œ li adœke mœ na kœwu tœnœ, mœ kɨ fœ ɓœ adœke ɓœ wu oyo mœ.”
14.19: Anga pa œnœ ye adœke: “Mœ totœ kœyɔ angombe ndjokpa, yé mœ yindœ kœna kœwu endje œdœ endje kœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ kœmbœrœ akwa, mœ kɨ fœ ɓœ adœke ɓœ wu oyo mœ.”
14.20: Anga kpa pa adœke: “Mœ totœ kœto yashe ngɔngɔnœ asœke; mbœrœ tœnœ ataa mœ na nene.”
14.21: «Ayi akwanœ gu œ pandœ o'onœ kɔ ɓata á endje pa asœmœ fœ gbozu nœ ye. Gbozu anda su dœ ókó yé œ pa fœ ayi akwa nœ ye adœke: “Na katsha ɓa tœ osho kœka œrœ œdœ ɓa tœ ala awa lœ ongbo, œ gu dœ ayi oyo, agbakɨndɨ azu, aayi gbada œdœ aayibula.”
14.22: Manda nœ teasho, ayi akwa gu œ pa adœke: “Gbozu, mœ mbœrœ neke á ɓœ pa ɓama tœnœ ye, kashe osho sœpe.”
14.23: Gbozu kpa pa fœ ayi akwa nœ ye adœke: “Na dœ awa kɨndɨ, œ tovworogbo azu adœke endje li, mbœrœ á anda nœ mœ kœsu dœ azu.
14.24: Gbambanœ nene, mœ pa fœ 'e adœke uzu bale ugurutœ azu á mœ e ɓamama endje utshunœ asœmœ, œ gbɔ osho lœ angbo nœ mœ nene.”» Kœkatœ œrœ kɔ mbœrœ kœna manda Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 10.37-38)
14.25: Ukpulu azu ndjoro sœ lima kœro tœ awanœ dœ Yisu, tshe kœfatœ ye yé á kœyu endje adœke:
14.26: «Œdœ uzu kœyindœ kœna manda mœ, á kœsœpe kœyindœ abanœ, ayinœ, awonœ, agbolo nœ ye, aayanœ, ayingɔnœ œdœ pe soro ye dœ tœ ye kœropa mœ, tshe te yambarœ nœ mœ nene.
14.27: Tsheneke á tshe kœzaza kurushi nœ ye yé á te manda mœ nene, tshe te yambarœ nœ mœ nene.
14.28: «Gbambanœ nene, œdœ uzu kœyindœ kœmɔ egerœ anda, tshe mbœrœ kotoo? Utshunœ tshe sœ ga atɨ, œ mirœ tshelœ ye tœ ama œrœ kɔ á li ndœ kœmɔ dœ andanœ. Manda nœ, tshe wu œdœ ngendja á tshe sœ dœ tœnœ œ li kœka dœ akwanœ.
14.29: Kashe œdœ tshe kœmbœrœ kiti andanœ, á andanœ kœkaka nene, azu kɔ á endje wu, ataa endje tetœ kœmɔ she
14.30: yé œ pa adœke: “Uzu asœ te lima tœ kœmɔ anda, kashe tshe lili kœmbœrœ akwanœ adœke œ ka nene!”
14.31: «Awa bale ndje, œdœ anga gbozugo á tshe sœ dœ aturugu kutu ndjokpa kœyindœ kœnga koshe dœ anga gbozugo á tshe sœ dœ aturugu kutu zazu bale, tshe mbœrœ kotoo? Utshunœ tshe mirœ tshelœ ye, œ tondœ mara á tshe nga dœ koshenœ mbœrœ á kœza yanganœ vesho.
14.32: Œdœ tshe kœwu adœke œne li kœza she vesho nene, ɓata á yanganœ sœpe lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ, tshe vwa azu nœ ye fœ she adœke œne djitœ œne dœ she.»
14.33: Yisu kpa pa adœke: «Awa bale ndje ataa, uzu kɔ ugurutœ 'e á tshe kœkakatœ œrœ nœ ye kɔ á tshe sœ dœ tœnœ nene, tshe li kœdœ yambarœ nœ mœ nene.» Ɨngbɨrɨ neke á nganga nene (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 5.13; Mar 9.50)
14.34: «Ɨngbɨrɨ kœdœ ɔtshɔrœ. Kashe œdœ œ kœnganga nene, endje gi ɔtshɔnœ ga lœnœ kotoo?
14.35: Endje li kœdjanga tshelœnœ dœ ɔshɔ too kœko ɓata oforo á endje lu dœ dɔngɔ ɓa lœ kɨndɨ nene, kashe endje za va e ga shu ye. Kaka uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ utu nœ kœdji dœ o'o, tshe dji.»

15.1: Aayi kœko ngendja lapo dœ pe aayi ngbɨndɨrœ na ga ɨndɨrɨ Yisu ndœ kœdji she.
15.2: Afarisayi dœ pe aayi kœyisœ awa akwa tetœ kœle lœ ma endje adœke: «Uzu asœ sœ kœyindœ aayi ngbɨndɨrœ, yé œ sœ kœzɨ œrœ tœ œsœnœ dœ endje!»
15.3: Yé Yisu pa lœ ndœma toro fœ endje adœke:
15.4: «Œdœ anga uzu bale ugurutœ 'e kœsœ dœ apata nœ ye kama bale (100) yé anga bale kœyiwa, tshe katœ udu endje zazu vana dœ ndjokpa dœ mindu dœ amanœ vana (99) tɨ lœ gusu yé œ na kœpara tsheneke asœmœ œrrr œ gbɔ she yekane nene a?
15.5: Yé lɔkɔ á tshe kœgbɔ she, tshe za she dœ yanga ga pa ɨgɨ ye,
15.6: yé œ gu dœ she ga ndœ ye. Manda nœ, tshe e anganœ dœ amashenga nœ ye ndœ kœpandœma nœ fœ endje adœke: “'E na ga mœ a kurutshelœ yanganœ asœ dœ 'e, mbœrœ mœ gbɔ pata nœ mœ á tshe yiwa kpœke ye!”
15.7: Mœ sœ kœpandœ nœ fœ 'e adœke, yanga ɓa lafo œ sœ bala atamœ, mbœrœ anga ayi ngbɨndɨrœ bale á tshe kœfatshalɔsu ye. Yanganœ œ ropa yanga mbœrœ ɔtshɔ azu zazu vana dœ ndjokpa dœ mindu dœ amanœ vana (99) á endje sœ ndjii yé á gbegbe ndœ kœfatshalɔsu endje nene.» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ ngendja á yiwa
15.8: «Œdœ ndje anga yashe bale kœsœ dœ langere ngendja nœ ye ndjokpa yé á anganœ bale yiwa, tshe ta owo, tshe ngbɔ osho yé œ para œrrr yé œ gbɔ yekane nene a?
15.9: Yé lɔkɔ á tshe kœgbɔ, tshe e anganœ dœ pe amashenga nœ ye ndœ kœpandœ nœ fœ endje adœke: “'E na ga mœ a kurutshelœ yanganœ asœke dœ 'e, langere ngendja nœ mœ á yiwa kpœke, mœ gbɔ ye!”
15.10: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke, aandjelu nœ Ndjaba œ sœ dœ yanga ataa, mbœrœ anga ayi ngbɨndɨrœ bale á tshe kœfatshalɔsu ye.» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ gbolo yakoshe á tshe yiwa
15.11: Yisu kpa pa adœke: «Anga yakoshe bale sœ lima dœ agbolo yakoshe nœ ye bisha.
15.12: Ɨngɨnœ pa fœ abanœ adœke: “Aba, kurutshelœ œrœ á ɓœ sœ dœ tœnœ, œ ko œsœ œnœ mœ fœ mœ.” Yé, abanœ kurutshelœ œrœnœ tœ endje bisha dœ ayanœ.
15.13: Manda olo teasho, ɨngɨ gbolo yakoshenœ ko œnœ ye œrœnœ yɔ œrœ para, yé œ ro ga lœ anga ogo zara. Ɓa zœ, tshe li ga lœ djingili, yé œ ndɨ ngendja nœ ye para.
15.14: «Manda kɨndɨ ngendja nœ ye para kɔkɔ, egerœ ogo li ga lœ ogonœ asœmœ, yé tshe li ga lœ oyo.
15.15: Tshe na œ li akwa ɓa ndœ anga uzu ogonœ asœmœ, uzunœ vwa she ga lœ kɨndɨ nœ ye mbœrœ kœgbɔndœ akɔso.
15.16: Tshe sœ lima dœ ogo kœzɨ leyɔ á akɔsonœ sœ kœzɨ tœnœ, kashe uzu bale toto fœ she nene.
15.17: Tshe tetœ kœgbe tshelœ ye, yé œ pa adœke: “Aayi akwa nœ aba mœ para sœ kœzɨ œrœ ɓata á endje yindœ nœ, kashe ɓa ke, mœ sœ kœtshu dœ ogo!
15.18: Mœ gu ga ndœ aba mœ, yé œ pa fœ she adœke: Aba, mœ mbœrœ lima ekperœ fœ Ndjaba œdœ pe fœ ɓœ.
15.19: Mœ kpa lili ndœ kœsœ tœ gbolo yakoshe nœ zœ nene, kashe fa mœ tœ anga ayi akwa nœ zœ.”
15.20: Yé tshe tetœ awa ndœ kœgu ga ndœ abanœ. Abanœ wu she lima lœ ugunœ, yé oyo ye ka she, á tshe kœkpa dœ ɔrɔ para tshatshu ye œ kœtepa ye dœ kœuru tshelœ utu ye.
15.21: Gbolo yakoshe kœpa fœ she adœke: “Aba, mœ mbœrœ ekperœ fœ Ndjaba œdœ pe fœ ɓœ, mœ kpa lili adœke ɓœ e mœ gbolo yakoshe nœ zœ nene.”
15.22: Kashe abanœ pa fœ ayi akwa nœ ye adœke: “'E na dœ ɔtshɔ lœba ga mœ katsha œ verœ ga tœ ye, œ yi bingi ga tœ yɔkɔne ye œ verœ œrada ga tœ ada ye.
15.23: 'E na dœ́ za ɔtshɔ ovoro ngombe á tshe sœ dœ ojoro, œ wo she. A mbœrœ angbo œ zɨ she.
15.24: Gbambanœ nene, gbolo yakoshe nœ mœ á e wu she asœke, tshu lima yé á kpa kwatœ ye dœ soro asœ, tshe yiwa lima yé á mœ gbɔ she asœ.” Yé endje tetœ kœmbœrœ angbo.
15.25: «Dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, eya gbolo yakoshe nœ ye sœ lima ɓa lœ kɨndɨ. Lɔkɔ á tshe to lima ɓa lœ kɨndɨ kœgu she, ndoo dœ anda atake, tshe dji œsœ itshi dœ pe ipi.
15.26: Tshe kœ'e anga ayi akwa, yé á kœyu she tœ œrœ á sœ kœmbœrœtœ endje ɓa sœnda.
15.27: Ayi akwanœ kœgi fœ she adœke: “Aya zœ dá gu, yeka á aba zœ wo ɔtshɔ ovoro ngombe á tshe sœ dœ ojoro mbœrœ á tshe wu she kœgu tœnœ dœ ɔtshɔ ɔkɔ ye.”
15.28: «Eyanœ dji ataa, œ so ókó, yé œ vwaratœ ye kœli anda ye. Abanœ wuta ndœ kœu she.
15.29: Kashe tshe gi fœ abanœ adœke: “Aba, mœ mbœrœ akwa ɓata kanga fœ ɓœ manda ungu ndjoro, mœ vwavwaratœ mœ tœ anga awa o'o nœ zœ bale nene, kashe ɔlɔ bale á ɓœ za anga ngombe nœ zœ fœ mœ adœke mœ mbœrœ angbo dœ she dœ anga mœ gugu nene.
15.30: Kashe lɔkɔ á gbolo yakoshe nœ zœ asœ gu, œshe á tshe ndɨ œrœ nœ zœ ndœ agugatɨ, ɓœ wo ɔtshɔ ovoro ngombe á tshe sœ dœ ojoro mbœrœ she!”
15.31: Yé abanœ kœpa fœ she adœke: “Gbolo nœ mœ, œɓœ, ɓœ sœ œnœ zœ dœ mœ waa kpœke. Œrœ nœ mœ para kœdœ œnœ zœ.
15.32: Kashe, œ li adœke a mbœrœ angbo œ sœ dœ yanga, mbœrœ aya zœ asœke tshu lima yé á kwatœ ye dœ soro asœke. Tshe yiwa lima yé á mœ gbɔ she asœke.”»

16.1: Manda nœ, Yisu pa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Anga ayi ngendja sœ lima dœ kapeta nœ ye, yé anga azu na œ pandœ nœ fœ she adœke kapetanœ sœ kœndɨ œrœ nœ ye.
16.2: Tshe kœ'e kapeta œ pa fœ she adœke: “O'o gaɗe dá mœ dji dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ ata a? Ma mara á ɓœ mbœrœ akwa dœ ngendja fœ mœ dœ́ mœ wu, mbœrœ ngɔngɔ asœ ɓœ kpa dœ́dœ́ kapeta nœ œrœ nœ mœ nene.”
16.3: «Kapeta kœtetœ kœpu lœ ma ye adœke: “Gbozu nœ mœ yindœ kœza akwa tshakane mœ. Mœ mbœrœ kotoo? Mœ gugu dœ gbɔgbɔ ndœ kœdjo kɨndɨ nene. Mœ sœ dœ tshula kœyɔndœ œrœ.
16.4: Mœ wusœ œrœ á mœ mbœrœ ye! Mœ tetœ kœyindœ azu á endje kœyindœ mœ kœna ga ndœ endje ɔlɔ á akwa kapeta nœ mœ kœka.”
16.5: Tshe e uzu dœ uzu á tshe sœ lima dœ kuɗa nœ gbozu nœ ye, yé œ yu tsheneke á tshe na utshunœ adœke: “Kuɗa nœ gbozu sœ lima lœ kumu zœ kotoo?”
16.6: Uzunœ kœgi fœ she adœke: “Ngbongolo kada kama bale (100).” Kapeta kœpa fœ she adœke: “Za mbeti kuɗa nœ zœ, sœ ga atɨ œ su adœke: Ngbongolo kada zazu bisha dœ ndjokpa.”
16.7: Tshe kpa yu anga adœke: “Ɓœ sœ dœ kuɗanœ kotoo?” Uzunœ gi fœ she adœke: “Sake nœ indji ble kama bale (100).” Kapeta kœpa fœ she adœke: “Za mbeti kuɗa nœ zœ, yé œ su adœke: Zazu vana.”
16.8: Gbozu donga ekpe kapetanœ mbœrœ á tshe mbœrœ akwa nœ ye dœ kœwusœrœ, yé œ pa adœke: “Azu á endje sœ kœgbe dœ kœgbɔ œrœ nœ tshapashɔ asœke sœ hara hara lœ kœmbœrœ ayo ugurutœ endje dœ anga endje kœropa endjeneke á endje dœ́ azu nœ ɨngbɨsho.”»
16.9: Yisu kpa pa adœke: «'E mbœrœ ayo dœ azu lœ awa nœ kœgbɔrœ nœ tshapashɔnœ asœke á sœ kœfara osho mbœrœ á 'e kœgugu dœ tœnœ nene, yeka á Ndjaba kœza osho kœsœ nœ waa dœ waa fœ 'e.
16.10: «Uzu á tshe kœzatœ ye ndjii lœ aya akwa, tshe za ndje tœ ye ndjii lœ egerœ akwa. Yé tsheneke á tshe dœ ayi wala lœ aya akwa, tshe dœ ndje ayi wala lœ egerœ akwa.
16.11: Œdœ 'e kœsœsœ kœzatœ 'e ndjii lœ mara kœmbœrœ akwa dœ ngendja á dœ œrœ afara nene, œɗe dá to adja ɔtshɔrœ fœ 'e a?
16.12: Yé œdœ 'e kœmbœmbœrœtœ 'e ndjii lœ kœza œrœ nœ anga azu ga tœ akwa nene, œɗe dá to œrœ neke á sœ mbœrœ 'e fœ 'e a?
16.13: «Ayi akwa bale lili kœmbœrœ akwa fœ agbozu bisha nene. Gbambanœ nene, œdœ tshe kœsœ kœyindœ anga bale, tshe yiangba anga; too œdœ tshe kœzatœ ye ga ndœ tsheneke utshunœ, tshe vwaratœ ye tœ anga. 'E lili adœke 'e mbœrœ akwa fœ Ndjaba dœ kœdœ akanga nœ ngendja nene.» Awa akwa œdœ ogo Gbozu nœ Ndjaba (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 11.12-13; 5.31-32; Mar 10.11-12)
16.14: Afarisayi á endje yindœ ngendja waa, dji lima o'onœ ataa yé œ tetœ kœmɔ Yisu.
16.15: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «E'e, 'e sœ kœmatœ 'e ɓata azu á endje sœ ndjii tœ ala azu, kashe Ndjaba wu lɔsu 'e ye. Gbambanœ nene, œneke á azu sœ kœza dœ ádá waa, Ndjaba wu tœ ekpenœ.
16.16: «Œndœ buku nœ awa akwa nœ Moyize œdœ buku á aayi kœgbara o'o su lima, dɨ œrrr ga tœ kœna Yowane ayi kœza batisimu. Dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, endje sœ lima kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba, yé uzu dœ uzu sœ kœpa lima avwara ndœ kœli ga zœ.
16.17: Andaa tshalafo dœ tshapashɔ œ yiwa ye, kashe endje wa œrœ bale lœ awa akwa nene, œdœ ndje tshakanea a'eara uwu mbeti nene.
16.18: «Yakoshe kɔ á tshe katœ awonœ tɨ yé á to ata anga, tshe mbœrœ angba budu. Tsheneke á tshe to yashe á akɔnœ katœ ye tɨ, tshe sœ kœmbœrœ ndje angba budu.» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ ayi kœgbɔrœ œdœ Lazaro
16.19: «Anga uzu bale kœdœ lima ayi kœgbɔrœ, tshe verœ kolœ ɔtshɔ lœba nœ ngendja. Ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ tshe sœ lima kœzɨ ɔtshɔrœ ɓata uzu sœ dœ angbo.
16.20: Anga ayi oyo á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Lazaro, sœ lima kœlo ɓa pa manda anda nœ ye; tshe sœ lima dœ uku gbadja tœ kotœ ye.
16.21: Tshe sœ lima kœyindœ kœzɨ kutirɨ kœzɨrœ á sœ kœyo ɓa tshakudu ndaba kœzɨrœ nœ ayi kœgbɔrœ sœmœ kashe tshe lili lima nene. Yé ayavoro sœ ndje lima kœna kœla tshala uku gbadja nœ ye.
16.22: «Ayi oyo tshu, yé aandjelu to she na tœnœ ndoo dœ Abrayamo. Ayi kœgbɔ œrœ tshu ndje, yé endje shi she.
16.23: Ayi kœgbɔ œrœ sœ lima kœwu oyo waa ɓa lœ ogo nœ akuzu. Tshe mesho ga lafo atake, œ wu Lazaro á tshe sœ ndoo dœ Abrayamo.
16.24: Tshe kœve rawa adœke: “Aba mœ dœ Abrayamo, wu oyo mœ dœ́ œ vwa Lazaro tshe yi yɔkɔne ye ga la ngu dœ́ œ sa ga pa tima mœ kane, mbœrœ mœ sœ kœwu oyo ɓa la wo ɓa ke waa.”
16.25: Kashe Abrayamo pa fœ she adœke: “Gbolo nœ mœ, wusœ nœ adœke ɓœ gbɔ lima œrœ tshapashɔ lœ soro zœ ndjoro, kashe Lazaro sœ lima dœ oyo kœrosœ nœ. Ngɔngɔ asœke, oyo nœ ye ka ye, andaa œɓœ, ɓœ sœ kœwu oyo.
16.26: Ga pa nœ, egerœ kudu wa mapaka ugurutœ zœ dœ a'a ye. Uzu œ to ɓa ke œ na ga ndœ 'e ɓa zœ nene, uzu œ to ndje ɓa ndœ 'e ɓa zœ œ na ndje ga ndœ 'a nene.”
16.27: «Ayi kœgbɔrœ kœpa adœke: “Mœ sœ kœdɨ tshelœma mœ fœ ɓœ, aba, vwa Lazaro ɓa sœnda nœ aba mœ,
16.28: mbœrœ mœ katœ aaya mœ mindu ɓa zœ. Tshe mɨndœ nœ fœ endje mbœrœ adœke endje kœnana ɓa tœ osho á mœ wu oyo tœnœ ɓa ke asœ nene.”
16.29: Abrayamo kœpa fœ she adœke: “Aaya zœ wusœ buku nœ awa akwa nœ Moyize dœ pe kœmɨ upu nœ aayi kœgbara o'o, yé endje dji œ za ga tœ akwa.”
16.30: Ayi kœgbɔrœnœ kpa pa adœke: “Œ sœsœ ataa nene Abrayamo aba mœ, œdœ uzu kœtshu lima, yé á wuta á na ga ndœ endje, endje fatshalɔsu endje ye.”
16.31: Kashe Abrayamo kpa kœgi fœ she adœke: “Œdœ endje kœdjidji Moyize dœ pe aayi kœgbara o'o nene, œdœ ndje uzu á tshe kœtshu, á she, á na ga ndœ endje, endje yi ndje ndœ o'o ye nene.”»

17.1: Yisu pa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Œrœ á sœ kœyi azu ndœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ sœ zœ. Kashe oyo nœ tsheneke á tshe yi anganœ ga lœ ekperœ!
17.2: Œ li dœ she adœke endje du egerœ badja ga tœ ɨgɨ ye œ vwi she ga la egerœ ungu. Œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ mbœrœ she ata tœ œsœnœ adœke tshe yi anga gbolo bale lœ agbolo asœ ga lœ ekperœ.
17.3: 'E sœ dœ gbɔdjela! «Œdœ aya zœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ fœ ɓœ, gbagbara she. Yé œdœ tshe kœgbetshelœ ye ndœnœ á fatshalɔsu ye, wu oyo ye.
17.4: Œdœ tshe kœmbœrœ ekperœ fœ ɓœ awa mindu dœ bisha (7) lœ ɔlɔ bale, yé á na ndje ga ndœ zœ awa mindu dœ bisha (7) kœpa fœ ɓœ adœke: “Œneke á mœ mbœrœ sœ tœ ekpenœ”, wu kolœ oyo ye.» Kœyindœrœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 17.20)
17.5: Aayi avwa kœpa fœ Gbozu adœke: «Mbœrœ adœke kœyindœrœ nœ 'a gerœ.»
17.6: Gbozu kœgi adœke: «Œdœ adja 'e kœsœ má dœ kœyindœrœ dœ egerœnœ ɓata ele ɔyɔ á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ mutarde, 'e pa má fœ ɔyɔ asœ adœke: “Gitœ zœ kpœke œ na œ tɔ ɓa la kota ɓa e”, yé œ mbœrœtœ ye liaka o'o 'e ye.» Œrœ á li adœke ayi akwa mbœrœ
17.7: «Uzu ɗe ugurutœ 'e á tshe kœsœ dœ ayi akwa nœ ye á tshe djo kɨndɨ too á tshe gbɔndœ ayarœ, yé á ayi akwanœ to ɓa lœ kɨndɨ á gu, á tshe pa fœ she kpuru adœke: “Na katsha œ zɨ œrœ a?”
17.8: Œ̃ œ̃ nene, tshe pa fœ she adœke: “Fa kœzɨrœ fœ mœ, yapa lœba zœ yeka á kœko kœzɨrœ ga pa ndaba fœ mœ. Mœ kœzɨ œrœ á kœndjo œrœ yeka á ɓœ kœzɨ á kœndjo ndje œnœ zœ manda nœ.”
17.9: Gbozu lili kœgi ɔtshɔrœ fœ ayi akwanœ mbœrœ œrœ neke á tshe pa tœnœ fœ she, yé á tshe mbœrœ liakanœ nene a?
17.10: Œ sœ ndje awa bale mbœrœ 'e, œdœ 'e kœmbœrœ neke kɔ á endje pa tœnœ fœ 'e, 'e pa adœke: “A'a kœdœ ayi akwa gbambanœ, 'a mbœrœ kolœ akwa neke á li adœke 'a mbœrœ.”» Yisu she aayi boroma ndjokpa
17.11: Ɓata á Yisu sœ lima kœro ga lœ Yerusaleme, tshe ro tɔ lœ ogo Samariya œdœ Galilayi.
17.12: Ɔlɔ á tshe li lima ga lakpɨ anga ongbo bale, aayi boroma ndjokpa na ndœ kœtogba dœ she. Endje ka lima zara,
17.13: yé œ tetœ kœ'e she dœ ɔgbɔ adœke: «Yisu, ayi kœyisœrœ, wu oyo 'a kane.»
17.14: Yisu wu endje œ pa fœ endje adœke: «'E na œ matœ 'e fœ anganga Ndjaba.» Andaa kœna ga zœ, tœ ala awa, endje she ye.
17.15: Anga bale ugurutœ endje, kœwu adœke œne she ye, á kwatœ ye dœ kœdonga Ndjaba dœ agbɔ tshama ye.
17.16: Tshe gote ga tœ ada Yisu, œ tara kumu ye ga atɨ yé œ za mershe fœ she. Kashe uzunœ asœmœ lima kœdœ uzu Samariya.
17.17: Yé Yisu kœpa adœke: «Ataa œ dœ́dœ́ endje ndjokpa kɔkɔ dá she nene a? Anga endje mindu dœ vana, sœ œnœ endje kpœta a?
17.18: Anga uzu ugurutœ endje gbegbe ndœ kœkwa kœdonga Ndjaba nene, kashe kolœ genenœ asœke!»
17.19: Yé Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Alafo, œ gu zœ. Kœyindœrœ nœ zœ she ɓœ ye.» Akwa tshagbozu nœ Ndjaba (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 24.23-28,37-41)
17.20: Afarisayi kœyu she adœke: «Ɔlɔ gaɗe dá akwa tshagbozu nœ Ndjaba œ na a?» Yisu kœgɨ fœ endje adœke: «Akwa tshagbozu nœ Ndjaba œ na dœ mara adœke uzu wu nene.
17.21: «Endje pandœ nœ adœke: “Wu, tœnœ dá sœ asœ, too œtœnœ dá sœ ɓa e” nene. Gbambanœ nene, akwa tshagbozu nœ Ndjaba sœ ugurutœ 'e zœ.»
17.22: Yé Yisu kœpa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «Osho sœ kœndo tœnœ zœ, osho á 'e sœ dœ ogo nœ kœwu amba anga olo bale ugurutœ olo nœ Gbolo nœ uzu, kashe 'e wu nene.
17.23: Endje tetœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke: “Tshe sœ ɓa 'e”, too “tshe sœ ɓa ke.” Kashe, 'e nana ga zœ nene, 'e kpakpa ndje ɔrɔ ga zœ nene.
17.24: Gbambanœ nene, ɔlɔ á Gbolo nœ uzu œ na, œ sœ ɓata Yavuru á yerœwa ɓa lafo, yé á ɨshirɨnœ œ za osho djigi.
17.25: Kashe utshunœ, œ li adœke tshe wu oyo waa, yé azu nœ ngɔngɔnœ asœke vwaratœ endje tœ ye yekane.
17.26: «Lɔndɔ á olo kœna Gbolo nœ uzu kœli, œrœ œ mbœrœtœ endje ɓata œnœ lɔkɔ nœ Nowa lima.
17.27: Azu sœ lima kœzɨ œrœ dœ kœndjo œrœ, endje sœ lima kœtotœ endje dœ kœko ayawuru nœ endje ndœ totœ œrrr ga tœ olo á Nowa li lima ga lœ egerœ agba, yeka á yavuru ni lima, á ungu su lima pa ɔshɔ kpɔlirɔ, yé á wo endje lima para.
17.28: Œ sœ ndje ɓata œnœ lɔkɔ nœ Lota lima: Azu sœ lima kœzɨ œrœ dœ kœndjo œrœ, endje sœ kœyɔ œrœ dœ kœka œrœ, endje sœ lima kœlu œrœ ga lœ kɨndɨ dœ kœmɔ anda.
17.29: Kashe olo kœwuta lima Lota lœ Sodomo, Ndjaba vwa owo ɓata yavuru, œ to ɓa lafo kœyo ga atɨ dœ pe jiwonœ á dɨ yeee, yeka á wo lima azu para kɔkɔ.
17.30: Œ mbœrœ bala tœ endje ataa lɔkɔ á Gbolo nœ uzu œ ma bala tœ ye.
17.31: «Dœ olonœ asœmœ, uzu á tshe kœsœ ɓa pa kumu anda á œrœ nœ ye sœ ɓa sœnda, tshe kpa gerœ ga atɨ kœza tœnœ nene; œ sœ ndje ataa fœ uzu á tshe kœsœ ɓa lœ kɨndɨ, tshe kpa kwatœ ye ga mangba ye nene.
17.32: 'E gbetshelœ 'e tœ upu nœ awo Lota kane.
17.33: Uzu neke á tshe para awa ndœ kœgbɔndœ soro ye, tshe tshu; kashe tsheneke á tshe gbɔndœ nœ nene dá she.
17.34: Mœ sœ kœpandœ nœ fœ 'e, lœ butshɔnœ asœmœ, ayakoshe bisha œ lopa gbarœ bale: Endje za anga bale, yé anga œ sœpe.
17.35: Ayashe bisha œ sœ kœtɔ œrœ tœ œsœnœ bale: Endje za anga bale, yé anga œ sœpe. [
17.36: Ayakoshe bisha œ sœ kœmbœrœ akwa ɓa lœ kɨndɨ, endje za anga bale yé anga œ sœpe.]»
17.37: Ayambarœ nœ Yisu yu she adœke: «Œrœnœ atamœ œ mbœrœtœ endje kpœta Gbozu?» Yé tshe kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Osho á oko uzu œ sœ tœnœ, dá adivumbala, œ na kœngbɔtœ endje ɓa zœ .»

18.1: Yisu pa ndœma toro asœke mbœrœ kœma fœ endje adœke endje shi gbɨ lœ kœza avwala, endje gbɔgbɔ dɔkɔngɔ nene.
18.2: Tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «Anga ayi kœwa ngbanga á tshe kpakpa awa Ndjaba nene yé á lɨlɨ ndje œsœ uzu bale nene, sœ lima ɓa lœ anga ongbo bale.
18.3: Yé anga yashe koya sœ lima kœna ga ndœ ye ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ kœpa fœ she adœke: “Wa ngbanga ugurutœ mœ dœ ayingba mœ asœke kane.”
18.4: Katshatsha ayi kœwangbanganœ sœ ɓa lima kœvwaratœ ye, yé tshe sœ kœpa dœ tœ ye adœke: “Ataa mœ kœkpakpa awa Ndjaba nene yé á kœlɨlɨsœ azu nene,
18.5: kashe ɓata á yashe koya asœ sœ kœndanga mœ, mœ wa ɔtshɔ ngbanga fœ she mbœrœ á tshe kpa kœkwakwatœ ye ndœ kœtshanga kumu mœ nene.”»
18.6: Yé Gbozu kpa kœpa ga pa nœ adœke: «'E dji o'o á ayi kœwangbanga á tshe sœsœ ndjii nene, sœ kœpa tœnœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ kane!
18.7: Yé dœ mara ataa, Ndjaba œ wa ɔtshɔ ngbanga ga tœ azu á tshe ke endje á endje sœ kœkɨ ga tœ ye butshɔ dœ ɔlɔ nene a? Tshe gbeletœ ye ndœ kœtɨ kane endje ga lafo ye a?
18.8: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e ngbɨ adœke: Tshe wa ɔtshɔ ngbanga fœ endje katsha ye. Kashe lɔkɔ á Gbolo nœ uzu œ kwa bala, tshe gbɔ azu á endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Ndjaba pa ɔshɔ zœ a?» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ Farisayi dœ ayi kœko ngendja lapo
18.9: Tshe kpa pa ndœma toro asœke fœ anga azu á endje sœ kœgbe adœke œne sœ ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba, yé á sœ kœgu œsœ anga endje adœke:
18.10: «Anga azu bisha na lima ga lœ Tepelo ndœ kœza avwala; anga bale kœdœ Farisayi yé anga kœdœ ayi kœko ngendja lapo.
18.11: Farisayinœ ka ga lafo, œ sœ lima kœza avwala tœ upu nœ ye dœ tœ ye adœke: “Uu Ndjaba, mœ sœ kœdonga ɓœ mbœrœ mœ sœsœ ɓata anga azu nene, endje kœdœ aayi angba, aayi djingili, aayi angba budu, mœ sœsœ ndje ɓata ayi kœko ngendja laponœ á tshe sœ ɓa e asœ nene.
18.12: Mœ sœ kœyotshelœma mœ olo bisha lœ pɔsɔ bale, yé œ sœ kœto œrœ bale lœ ndjokpa lœ œrœ nœ mœ kɔ á mœ sœ kœgbɔ tœnœ fœ ɓœ.”
18.13: Ayi kœko ngendja lapo sœ œnœ ye zara; tshe yiyi lima ndœ kœmesho ga lafo nene, kashe tshe sœ kœda okoro ye yé œ sœ lima kœpa adœke: “Uu Ndjaba, wu oyo mœ dœ ekpe uzu á mœ sœ asœke.”
18.14: «Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: “Mœ sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e, ayi kœko ngendja lapo wuta lima ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba lɔkɔ á tshe gu ga ndœ ye, kashe œ dœ́dœ́ Farisayinœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, uzu kɔ á tshe tɨtœ ye dœ tœ ye ga lafo, Ndjaba œ ku she ga atɨ, kashe tsheneke á tshe zatœ ye ga atɨ, Ndjaba œ tɨ she ga lafo.”» Yisu to kane ye ga pa aaya agbolo (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 19.13-15; Mar 10.13-16)
18.15: Azu sœ lima kœna ndje dœ aaya agbolo fœ Yisu mbœrœ adœke tshe to kane ye ga pa endje. Kœwu ataa, ayambarœ sœ lima kœgeta endje.
18.16: Kashe Yisu e agbolo ga ndœ ye, yé á kœpa adœke: «'E katœ agbolo dœ́ endje na ga ndœ mœ! 'E kɔkɔ endje nene, mbœrœ ogo Gbozu Ndjaba sœ mbœrœ azu á endje sœ ɓata endje.
18.17: Mœ sœ kœpa dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke: Uzu neke á tshe yiyindœ ogo Gbozu Ndjaba ɓata gbolo nene, tshe li bala ga zœ nene.» Ayi kœgbɔrœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 19.16-30; Mar 10.17-31)
18.18: Anga gbozu tshapa ayuda bale yu Yisu adœke: «Ɔtshɔ ayi kœyisœrœ, œrœ gaɗe dá mœ kœmbœrœ á kœgbɔ soro á ka nene a?»
18.19: Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ e mœ ɔtshɔ uzu a? Uzu bale sœsœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ nene, kolœ Ndjaba kutɨ ye.
18.20: Ɓœ wusœ awa o'o ye: “Mbœmbœrœ angba budu nene, wowo uzu nene, zɨzɨ angba nene, papa wala ga pa uzu nene, lɨsœ aba zœ dœ pe ayi zœ.”»
18.21: Gbozu tshapa ayudanœ asœmœ kœgi adœke: «Mœ sœ kœmbœrœtœ mœ ɓa lima liakanœ pe lœ gbolo mœ.»
18.22: Yisu kœdji ataa yé á kœpa fœ she adœke: «Œ sœpe œrœ bale á ɓœ mbœmbœrœ nene: Œrœ kɔ á ɓœ sœ dœ tœnœ, ka œ kurutshelœ ngendjanœ tœ aayi oyo. Ataa, ɓœ gbɔ bala kœgbɔrœ ɓa lafo. Manda nœ, na ga mœ yé œ te manda mœ.»
18.23: Lɔkɔ á tshe dji o'onœ asœmœ ataa, oyo za she waa, mbœrœ œshe kœdœ lima ayi kœgbɔrœ.
18.24: Yisu wu adœke tshe sœ lima dœ oyo, œ pa adœke: «Tœ adœke aayi kœgbɔrœ li ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba, œ sœ tœ ɔgbɔnœ.
18.25: Gbambanœ nene, agea á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Shamo li kœli tɔ lœ ogoro ɨmbɨlɨ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, kashe œ kpa gbɔ kœrosœ nœ adœke ayi kœgbɔrœ li ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba.»
18.26: Azu á endje sœ lima kœdji o'onœ asœmœ yu adœke: «Atamœ, œɗe dá li kœshe tœnœ a?»
18.27: Yisu kœgi adœke: «Œrœ á azu lili ndœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ nene, Ndjaba œ mbœrœ ye.»
18.28: Yé Petro pa adœke: «Dji 'a kane. 'A katœ œrœ nœ 'a yé œ te manda zœ.»
18.29: Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Mœ sœ kœpa dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke, uzu kɔ á tshe katœ anda nœ ye, awonœ, ayingɔnœ, abanœ dœ aayanœ too agbolo nœ ye mbœrœ kœzatœ ye ndœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba,
18.30: tshe gbɔ œrœ kœropanœ dœ osho asœke. Yé dœ osho á na manda nœ, tshe gbɔ ndje soro á ka nene.» Yisu kpa pandœ kuzu ye œdœ kœshe nœ ye lœ akuzu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 20.17-19; Mar 10.32-34)
18.31: Yisu ko ayambarœ nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bisha, œ pa fœ endje adœke: «'E dji kane, a sœ kœro ga lœ Yerusaleme, yé ɓa zœ dá o'o para á aayi kœgbara o'o su lima tœ upu nœ Gbolo nœ uzu œ mbœrœtœ endje.
18.32: Endje za she ga tshakane azu á endje wuwusœ Ndjaba nene. Endje mɔ she, endje gu she dœ pe kœtu ngusha ga tœ ye;
18.33: manda kœsɔ she dœ ndjapa, endje wo she. Yé manda olo votɔ, tshe she lœ akuzu.»
18.34: Kashe, ayambarœ wuwu lima sœ œrœ bale lœ nœ nene. Ádá o'onœ za lima tœ endje yiwatœ nœ tœ endje ye. Endje djidji lima tshelœ kata o'onœ á Yisu yi lima ndœ kœpa tœnœ nene. Yisu she ayibula ɓa lœ Yeriko (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 20.29-34; Mar 10.46-52)
18.35: Lɔkɔ á Yisu wuta lima ndoo dœ Yeriko, anga ayibula sœ lima ga atɨ ga tœ ama awa, á sœ kœyɔndœ œrœ.
18.36: Kœdji œsœ azu ndjoro kœro tœ awa, tshe yu lima osho adœke: «Œrœ gaɗe dá sœ kœmbœrœtœ endje asœmœ a?»
18.37: Endje pandœ nœ fœ she adœke: «Yisu, uzu Nazarete dá ro asœmœ.»
18.38: Tshe kœta rawa adœke: «Yisu Gbolo nœ Davidi, wu oyo mœ kane!»
18.39: Azu á endje sœ lima kœna utshunœ, te lima tœ kœgbagbara she adœke tshe sœ koko. Kashe, tshe kpa ta rawa dœ ɔgbɔ adœke: «Gbolo nœ Davidi, wu oyo mœ kane!»
18.40: Yisu ka, yé œ pa adœke endje na dœ she fœ œne. Lɔndɔ á ayibula sœmœ wuta ndoo, Yisu yu she adœke:
18.41: «Œrœ gaɗe dá ɓœ yindœ nœ adœke mœ mbœrœ fœ ɓœ a?» Tshe kœgi adœke: «Gbozu, mœ yindœ kpa kœwu osho.»
18.42: Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Wu osho. Kœyindœrœ nœ zœ she ɓœ ye.»
18.43: Petœ œsœnœ tshe wu osho, yé œ te lima kœna manda Yisu dœ kœdonga Ndjaba. Kœwu tœnœ ataa, azu kɔ tetœ kœdonga Ndjaba.

19.1: Manda kœli Yisu ga lœ Yeriko, tshe ro lima tɔ lœ ongbonœ.
19.2: Anga uzu á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Zakayo, sœ lima ɓa zœ; œshe kœdœ gbozu tshapa aayi kœko ngendja lapo, yé œshe lima kœdœ ayi kœgbɔrœ.
19.3: Tshe sœ lima kœpara awa kœwu Yisu adœke œshe kœdœ œɗe; kashe ɓata á tshe sœ lima tœ ondonœ, awa adœke tshe wu she gugu lima nene mbœrœ azu ro lima sœ nœ ye.
19.4: Tshe kpa utshunœ, œ ɔ ga lœ ɔyɔ á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Sikomore, mbœrœ kœwu Yisu á tshe yi lima ndœ kœro tɔ kpœtœmœ.
19.5: Lɔkɔ á Yisu wuta kpœtœ oshonœ asœmœ, tshe mesho ga lafo yé œ pa fœ she adœke: «Zakayo, jerœ ga atɨ katsha, mbœrœ kpesheke œ li adœke mœ lo ɓa sœnda nœ zœ.»
19.6: Katsha Zakayo kœjerœ ga atɨ katsha yé œ za osho kœsœ fœ she dœ yanga.
19.7: Kœwu tœnœ ataa, azu kɔ te lima tœ kœpulœma endje adœke: «Uzu asœ na kœlo ɓa ndœ ayi ngbɨndɨrœ!»
19.8: Kashe Zakayo na ga tshu Gbozu œ pa adœke: «Wu, Gbozu, mœ kurutshelœ œrœ nœ mœ kpekpeka, œ ko tshakalanœ fœ aayi oyo, yé œdœ mœ kœza lima œrœ nœ anga uzu dœ ɔgbɔ, mœ gi ga manda nœ fœ she awa vana.»
19.9: Yé Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Kpœsheke, ɓœ she dœ azu tshasœnda nœ zœ ye, mbœrœ œɓœ kœdœ ndje anga ata Abrayamo.
19.10: Gbambanœ nene, Gbolo nœ uzu na ndœ kœpara œdœ kœza kœshe fœ azu á endje djingili.» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ ngendja (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 25.14-30)
19.11: Ɓata á azu sœ lima kœdji o'onœ asœmœ, Yisu kpa pa lœ ndœma toro asœ mbœrœ tshe sœ lima ndoo dœ Yerusaleme. Azu sœ lima kœgbe adœke Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba œ matœ ye pe kpœtœ œsœnœ.
19.12: Ataa, Yisu kœpa adœke: «Anga uzu bale lœ mara nœ agbozu á œsœ endje lɨ, yi lima ndœ kœna ga lœ anga angbɨ ogo, mbœrœ azunœ ɓa zœ kœza œne tœ gbozu yekane á œne kœfatœ œne á kœgu á kœdœ gbozu tshapa ogo nœ œne.
19.13: Utshu kœro she, tshe e anga aayi akwa nœ ye ndjokpa œ ko langere ngendja nœ ye ndjokpa fœ uzu dœ uzu yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: “'E kotœ 'e ɓishu dœ ngendjanœ œrrr ga tœ olo á mœ gu.”
19.14: Kashe azu ogo nœ ye sœ lima kœyiangba ye, yé œ vwa anga azu manda ye ndœ kœpa adœke: “'A yiyindœ nœ adœke tshe te gbozu tshapa 'a nene.”
19.15: Andaa manda kœza akwa gbozugonœ fœ she, tshe gu œ e aayi akwa nœ ye á tshe ko lima ngendja fœ endje ndœ kœwusœ ngendja á uzu dœ uzu gbɔ ga pa nœ.
19.16: Uzu á tshe na utshunœ matœ ye œ pa adœke: “Gbozu, mœ gbɔ langere ngendja ndjokpa ga pa œneke á ɓœ ko lima fœ mœ.”
19.17: Tshe kœpa fœ she adœke: “Œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, œɓœ kœdœ ɔtshɔ ayi akwa, ɓata á ɓœ mbœrœtœ zœ lindœ nœ lœ aya akwa atake, mœ za ɓœ tœ gbozu tshapa ongbo ndjokpa.”
19.18: Bisha uzu na yé œ pa adœke: “Gbozu, mœ gbɔ langere ngendja mindu ga pa œneke á ɓœ ko lima fœ mœ.”
19.19: Tshe kœpa ndje fœ she adœke: “Mœ za ɓœ tœ gbozu ga pa ongbo mindu.”
19.20: Anga kpa kœna yé œ kœpa adœke: “Gbozu, wu langere ngendja nœ zœ dœke, mœ guma lima sœ nœ ga lœ lœba.
19.21: Gbambanœ nene, awa zœ za lima mœ waa, mbœrœ ɓœ gbɔɔgbɔ: Ɓœ sœ kœko œrœ á dœ́dœ́ œnœ zœ nene, ɓœ sœ kœkɔ ele ngwarœ neke á dœ́dœ́ ɓœ dá lu nene.”
19.22: Tshe kœpa fœ she adœke: “Ekpe ayi akwa! Kolœ liaka o'o ama zœ, mœ wa ngbanga ga tœ zœ. Ɓœ wu lima sœ nœ adœke œmœ kœdœ uzu á mœ gbɔɔgbɔ, mœ ko œrœ neke á dœ́dœ́ œnœ mœ nene yé œ kɔ ele ngwarœ neke á œ dœ́dœ́ mœ dá lu nene.
19.23: Yé mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ zaza má ngendja nœ mœ ga lœ anda nœ kœgumasœ ngendja nene a? Atamœ á mœ kœgu má, á endje kœgi fœ mœ dœ anga œrœ ga pa nœ nene a?”
19.24: Manda nœ, tshe kœpa fœ azu á endje sœ lima kpœmœ adœke: “'E za langere ngendja nœ ye tshakane ye, yé œ za fœ tsheneke á tshe sœ dœ tœnœ ndjokpa.”
19.25: Endje pa fœ she adœke: “Gbozu, tshe sœ dœ anga langere ngendjanœ ndjokpa zœ!”
19.26: Tshe kœgi adœke: “Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke, uzu kɔ á tshe sœ dœ œrœ, endje kpa to anganœ ga pa nœ fœ she kœrosœ nœ, kashe tsheneke á tshe gugu dœ œrœ nene, endje gbɔtœ œneke teasho á tshe sœ dœ tœnœ tshakane ye.
19.27: Tœ ayingba mœ, azu á endje yiyi lima ndœ nœ adœke mœ dœ gbozu tshapa endje nene, 'e na dœ endje ga mœ dœ́ œ wa ɔngɔrɔ endje kpœtshu mœ.”» Yisu li ga lœ Yerusaleme ɓata gbozugo
19.28: Manda kœpu o'onœ asœmœ ataa, Yisu te utshunœ kœɔ ga lœ Yerusaleme.
19.29: Lɔkɔ á tshe ndo dœ tshalakpɨ Betefaje œdœ Betani, ndoo dœ tshapa kaga á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ kaga ɔyɔ Olive, tshe vwa ayambarœ bisha utshunœ,
19.30: yé œ pa adœke: «'E ro ɓa lakpɨ á sœ ndjii utshu azœ asœke. Kœli 'e tshendja, 'e wu aya ane á endje du she kpœtœmœ yé á uzu bale ɔɔ damba ga pa ye nene, 'e vwara she œ gu dœ she ga mœ.
19.31: Yé œdœ uzu kœyu 'e adœke: “Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e vwara she a?” 'E gi fœ she adœke: “Gbozu dá gbe dœ she.”»
19.32: Aayi avwanœ na, œ wu ndje kolœ œrœnœ ɓata á Gbozu pandœ nœ fœ endje asœmœ.
19.33: Lɔkɔ á endje sœ kœvwara anenœ, ayengɔ ye yu endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e vwara anenœ asœ a?»
19.34: Endje gi adœke: «Gbozu dá gbe dœ she.»
19.35: Endje gu dœ anenœ fœ Yisu, manda nœ endje ko yɔgbɔdɔ lœba nœ endje va ga pa ye, á za Yisu ga pa nœ.
19.36: Lɔkɔ á Yisu sœ ndœ kœro tœnœ, azu sœ lima kœsaka lœba nœ endje ga tœ ala awa.
19.37: Kœndo dœ awa á jerœ ga tœ kaga ɔyɔ Olive, ayambarœ nœ Yisu ndjoro sœ dœ yanga, œ tetœ kœdonga Ndjaba dœ avwara mbœrœ afá á Yisu mbœrœ á endje wu.
19.38: Endje sœ lima kœpa adœke: «Kaka Ndjaba to kane ye ga pa gbozugo á tshe na dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye. Kaka kœsœ gee sœ ɓa lafo yé mokɔ nœ Ndjaba matœ ye ɓa zœ!»
19.39: Kashe anga Afarisayi á endje sœ lima ugurutœ ukpulu azunœ, pa fœ Yisu adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, pa fœ ayambarœ nœ zœ adœke endje sœ koko!»
19.40: Yisu kœgi adœke: «Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke: Œdœ endje kœsœ koko, badja œ ta rawa.» Ɨkɨ nœ Yisu mbœrœ Yerusaleme
19.41: Lɔkɔ á Yisu ndo dœ ongbonœ yé á wu, tshe kɨ mbœrœ tœnœ.
19.42: Tshe pa lima adœke: «Uu Yerusaleme, œdœ ɓœ kœwu má sœ œrœ á na ndœ kœza kœsœ gee fœ ɓœ, œ sœ má dœ ɔtshɔnœ waa. Kashe ngɔngɔnœ asœke, œ zatœ ye yiwa tœnœ tœ ala zœ ye.
19.43: Yé wusœ nœ adœke, bala mbatsha, ayingba zœ œ tɔ gbadjadja nœ endje dji ɓœ djikpata, œ kpakundœ zœ dje tœ osho kɔ.
19.44: Endje ndɨ tshalakpɨ nœ zœ, œ wo ɓœ œdœ agbolo nœ zœ para. Endje katœ anga badja bale tɨ ga pa anganœ nene, mbœrœ ɓœ wuwu lima sœ lɔkɔ á Ndjaba na ndœ kœtɨ kane zœ ga lafo nene.» Yisu gɔrɔ azu lœ Tepelo (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 21.12-17; Mar 11.15-19; Yow 2.13-22)
19.45: Manda nœ, Yisu li ga lœ Tepelo, œ tetœ kœgɔrɔ azu á endje sœ lima kœka œrœ.
19.46: Tshe pa lima fœ endje adœke: «Endje sú ɓa la Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Anda nœ mœ œ dœ bala anda nœ kœza avwala, kashe 'e fa tœ wutu nœ aayi angba.”»
19.47: Yisu sœ lima ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ kœyisœ œrœ ɓa lœ Tepelo. Agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba, aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ ndje pe agbozu tshapa azu sœ lima kœpara awa kœwo she.
19.48: Kashe endje gbɔgbɔ lima awa nene, gbambanœ nene, azu ndjoro za lima lɔsu endje djigi ndœ kœdji kolœ she.

20.1: Anga ɔlɔ bale, Yisu sœ lima kœyisœ œrœ fœ azu ɓa lœ Tepelo, œ sœ lima kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o yé agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba, aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ pe agbozu Ikrizia yi kumu endje.
20.2: Endje yu she adœke: «Pandœ nœ fœ 'a ka, tshagbozu nœ zœ to kpœta a? Œɗe ndje dá za gbɔgbɔ kœmbœrœ tœnœ fœ ɓœ a?»
20.3: Tshe gi fœ endje adœke: «Œmœ ndje, mœ yindœ kœyu 'e dœ anga o'o bale. 'E pandœ nœ fœ mœ ka:
20.4: Batisimu á Yowane sœ lima kœza tœnœ, to ɓa lafo too ɓa ndœ azu?»
20.5: Endje tetœ kœsharatœ endje lœ tœ endje adœke: «Œdœ a kœpa adœke: “Œ to ɓa lafo”, tshe pa adœke: “Mbœrœ gaɗe á a yiyi lima ndœ nœ fœ she nene a?”
20.6: Yé œdœ a kpa kœgi adœke: “Ɓa ndœ azu, azu para œ ve azœ dœ badja yé œ kœwo azœ mbœrœ endje wusœ nœ adœke Yowane kœdœ lima ayi kœgbara o'o.”»
20.7: Yeka á endje kœgi fœ she adœke: «'A wuwusœ uzu á tshe vwa lima she nene.»
20.8: Yé Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Œmœ ndje, mœ pandœ osho á tshagbozu nœ mœ to tœnœ fœ 'e nene.» Ndœma toro tœ upu nœ ekpe aayi kœdjo kɨndɨ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 21.33-46; Mar 12.1-12)
20.9: Manda nœ, Yisu tetœ kœpa ndœma toro fœ azu adœke: «Anga uzu lu lima ɔyɔ vinu ga lœ kɨndɨ nœ ye, œ guma o'o ugurutœ ye dœ anga aayi akwa adœke endje djo tshelœ kɨndɨnœ yeka á œne kœkurutshelœ ele vinunœ dœ endje, yé œ na ana manda olo ndjoro.
20.10: Olo kœkɔ ele vinunœ li, tshe vwa anga ayi akwa nœ ye ɓa ndœ endjeneke á endje sœ ɓa lœ kɨndɨ adœke endje vwa œnœ œne œsœ́ ele ɔyɔnœ fœ œne. Kashe aayi akwa ɓa lœ kɨndɨnœ za she œ ɓi she œrrr, œ gi she tshakane ye gbambanœ.
20.11: Ayengɔ kɨndɨ kpa vwa anga angbɨ ayi akwa, endje kpa za she, œ ɓi she œrrr, œ gu she, yé œ kpa gi she tshakane ye gbambanœ.
20.12: Tshe kpa vwa votɔ anga, endje to uku tœ ye yé œ vwi she ga shu.
20.13: Yekane á ayengɔ kɨndɨnœ kœpa adœke: “Gaɗe dá mœ kœmbœrœ a? Mœ vwa gbolo yakoshe nœ mœ á mœ yindœ ye waa, anganœ endje dji she dœ ɔtshɔnœ.”
20.14: Kashe, kœwu gbolo yakoshe nœ ye kœna tœnœ, aayi kœdjo tshelœ kɨndɨ vinunœ tetœ kœpalœtœ endje adœke: “E wu ayi kœsœpe dœ œrœ manda abanœ dá na asœ; a wo she yeka á kɨndɨnœ kœte œnœ azœ!”
20.15: Endje wuta dœ she lœ kɨndɨnœ ga ushu yé œ wo she. «Ataa, ayengɔ kɨndɨnœ œ mbœrœ œrœ gaɗe tœ endje a?
20.16: Tshe na, œ wo aayi akwanœ para kɔkɔ, yé œ za akwa kɨndɨnœ fœ anga angbɨ aayi akwa.» Lɔkɔ á azu dji o'onœ ataa, endje pa adœke: «Œ̃ œ̃ nene, œ mbœrœtœ endje atamœ nene!»
20.17: Kashe Yisu mesho ga lœ ala endje, œ pa adœke: «O'o ala mbetinœ asœ yindœ kœpa adœ gaɗe: “Badja á aayi kœmɔ anda za vwi'i, œtœnœ dá te sharagunda?”
20.18: Uzu kɔ á tshe te ga pa badjanœ asœmœ, tshe kɔ ngende ngende, yé tsheneke á badjanœ œ te ga pa ye, œ ndɨ tshelœ ye krœna ye.»
20.19: Aayi kœyisœ awa akwa dœ pe agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba para lima awa ndœ kœza she ga lœ kánga dœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, kashe awa azu dá za lima endje. Gbambanœ nene, endje wu lima sœ nœ adœke Yisu pa ndœma toronœ asœmœ fœ œne.
20.20: Yé endje tetœ kœvu Yisu. Endje vwa azu á endje sœ kœmatœ endje adœke endje kœdœ azu á endje sœ ndjii fœ she. Azunœ asœmœ sœ lima kœkate kœdji ekpe o'o lœ ama ye yeka á kœgbɔ awa nœ kœtɔ meza pa ye ɓa ndœ agbozu tshalakpɨ œdœ ɓa ndœ gbozugo.
20.21: Endje yu she dœ o'o atake: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, 'a wusœ nœ adœke o'o á ɓœ sœ kœpa tœnœ yé á sœ kœyisœ nœ sœ dœ awanœ. Ɓœ sœsœ kœtondœ tshatshu azu nene yé ɓœ sœ kœyisœ awa Ndjaba fœ azu lindœ adjapu.
20.22: Pandœ nœ fœ 'a ka, 'a li kœyɔ lapo nœ Sezare ye a, too nene?»
20.23: Yisu wusœ ekpe gbetshelœ nœ endje lima, yé œ pa fœ endje adœke:
20.24: «'E ma anga langere ngendja bale fœ mœ kane. Tshatshu uzu ɗe œdœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ɗe dá endje sú ga alanœ a?» Endje gi adœke: «Œnœ Sezare.»
20.25: Tshe kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Tœnœ dœ mœ! 'E za œrœ nœ Sezare fœ Sezare, œnœ Ndjaba fœ Ndjaba.»
20.26: Endje lili lima kœgbɔ she dœ ekperœ lœ o'onœ á tshe pa ɓa utshu azu kɔ asœmœ nene, kashe endje ka lima tœ ama endje tɨ ɔsɔ tœ o'o á tshe sœ lima kœgi tœnœ, yé œsœ endje yi lima taa. Kœyu o'o nœ Asadukayi tœ upu nœ kœshe lœ akuzu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 22.23-33; Mar 12.18-27)
20.27: Anga Asadukayi na ga ndœ Yisu. Endje dá sœ kœpa adœke kœshe lœ akuzu gugu nene. Endje yu Yisu adœke:
20.28: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, Moyize su lima awa akwa fœ 'a adœke: “Œdœ uzu kœsœ dœ ayanœ á tshe za yashe á kœzuzu gbolo dœ she nene yé á tshu, œ li adœke ayanœ to yashe koyanœ mbœrœ kœmbœrœ angwa fœ ayanœ á tshe tshu asœmœ.”
20.29: Andaa, anga aaya lœ yabo bale sœ lima mindu dœ bisha (7). Eyanœ to yashe, œ zuzu gbolo dœ she nene, yé œ tshu.
20.30: Bishanœ to yashe koyanœ yé œ tshu awa bale,
20.31: manda nœ, votɔnœ kpa to ndje she, œ tshu ye. Ko atamœ sœmœ œrrr endje mindu dœ bisha tshu para, anga bale zuzu gbolo dœ she nene.
20.32: Ɓa tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ, yashenœ tshu ndje ye.
20.33: Yé ataa, yashenœ asœmœ, lɔkɔ á akuzu œ kpa she, tshe dœ awo ɗe, mbœrœ endje mindu dœ bisha kɔ to lima she tœ awo endje yema a!»
20.34: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Ɓa pa ɔshɔ asœ, ayashe dœ ayakoshe œ totœ endje ye.
20.35: Kashe ayakoshe dœ pe ayashe á endje tshu, á Ndjaba wu adœke endje li kœshe lœ akuzu yé á li kœli ga lœ tafo ogo neke á na manda nœ, endje kpa totœ endje nene.
20.36: Endje kpa tshu nene; gbambanœ nene, endje sœ ɓata aandjelu. Endje kœdœ agbolo nœ Ndjaba mbœrœ á endje she lœ akuzu ye.
20.37: Moyize pa lima ngbɨ adœke azu á endje tshu, endje she bala lœ kuzu. Gbambanœ nene, ala mbeti á pa o'o tœ upu nœ ɔyɔ á owo sœ lima kœtshi lœnœ, tshe e lima Gbozu adœke “Ndjaba nœ Abrayamo, Ndjaba nœ Izaka œdœ Ndjaba nœ Yakobo.”
20.38: Ndjaba dœ́dœ́ Ndjaba nœ akuzu nene, kashe Ndjaba nœ asoro. Gbambanœ nene, azu kɔ sœ dœ soro mbœrœ she.»
20.39: Anga aayi kœyisœ awa akwa za o'o œ pa adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, ɓœ pa o'o nœ zœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ.»
20.40: Gbambanœ nene, endje kpa gugu lima dœ awa ndœ kœyu anga o'o nene. Masiya œdœ Davidi (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 22.41-45; Mar 12.35-37)
20.41: Yisu kœyu endje adœke: «Koto yeka á azu sœ kœpa adœke Masiya kœdœ gbolo nœ Davidi a?
20.42: Gbambanœ nene, Davidi dœ tœ ye pa ɓa la buku nœ Itshi nœ Ayuda adœke: “Gbozu Ndjaba pa fœ Gbozu nœ mœ adœke, sœ ga atɨ ga pa kuni mœ œrrr
20.43: adœke mœ fa ayingba zœ ga tshagudɨ ada zœ yekane.”
20.44: Adja Davidi dœ tœ ye sœ kœ'e she Gbozu. Yé dœ mara gaɗe dá Masiya kpa fa gbolo nœ Davidi a?» Yisu yisœ œrœ tœ upu nœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 23.1-36; Mar 12.37-40)
20.45: Yisu kœpa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye tœ ala azu kɔ á endje sœ lima kœdji she adœke:
20.46: «Ala 'e gbɔ dœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa á endje sœ kœro dœ yɔgbɔdɔ lœba tœ endje, á endje sœ kœyindœ nœ adœke azu sœ kœbala œne tœ osho á ukpulu azu sœ tœnœ. Endje yi kolœ ndœ kœsœ ga tœ osho á sœ utshunœ lœ Sinagoga dœ pe osho kœsœ nœ agbozu azu lœ angbo.
20.47: Endje sœ kœbɨlɨ ayashe koya mbœrœ kœyi angwa œrœ tœ endje. Yé œdœ endje kœsœ kœza avwala fœ Ndjaba, œndœ endje œ dɨ œrrr tœ kœma adœke œne kœdœ ɔtshɔ azu. Ndjaba œ wa bala ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ endje.»

21.1: Yisu mesho œ wu aayi kœgbɔrœ á endje sœ lima kœko ngendja nœ endje ga lœ gbarœ makabo ɓa lœ Tepelo.
21.2: Tshe wu ndje anga yashe koya á tshe dœ ayi oyo, kœko ndje a'eara langere ngendja nœ ye bisha ga zœ.
21.3: Yé Yisu kœpa adœke: «Adja mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke, yashe koyanœ asœ á tshe dœ ayi oyo dá ko ngendja nœ ye kœropa azu kɔ.
21.4: Gbambanœ nene, ngendja á endje ko asœ, endje sœsœ dœ œrœ kœmbœrœ dœ tœnœ nene, kashe œshe, tshe ko ngendja nœ ye kɔ á sœ má adœke tshe zɨ dœ œrœ.» Yisu pandœ upu nœ kœndɨ tshelœ Tepelo (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 24.1-2; Mar 13.1-2)
21.5: Anga azu sœ lima kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ Tepelo, yé œ sœ lima kœpa adœke œ ga waa dœ mara á endje mbœrœ dœ ɔtshɔ badja dœ pe œrœ á azu to fœ Ndjaba. Kashe Yisu pa adœke:
21.6: «Lœ olo manda nœ, œrœnœ kɔ á 'e wu asœmœ, anga badja bale á kpa sœpe ga pa anganœ œ gu nene. Endje ndɨ tshelœnœ para kɔkɔ ye.» Oyo œdœ œrœ kanga (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 24.3-8; Mar 13.3-8)
21.7: Yé endje yu she adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, lɔkɔ gaɗe dá œrœnœ asœmœ œ wuta ndje a, ambárá gaɗe dá matœ endje ɔlɔ á œrœnœ œ mbœrœtœ endje a?»
21.8: Yisu gi adœke: «Ala 'e gbɔ, uzu bale fafara 'e nene. Gbambanœ nene, azu ndjoro œ na bala dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ yé œ pa adœke: “Œmœ kœdœ Masiya”, yé lɔkɔnœ li ye! Kashe 'e tete manda endje nene.
21.9: Ɔlɔ á 'e kœsœ kœdji o'o nœ kœtɔ kowo œdœ azu á endje sœ kœoma dœ anga endje, awa zaza 'e nene. Gbambanœ nene, œ li adœke œrœ ataa wuta utshunœ yeka, kashe œ dœ́dœ́ damba kœka tshapashɔnœ ngɔngɔnœ asœ dœmœ nene.»
21.10: Yé tshe kpa pa fœ endje adœke: «Ogo gbozu dœ ogo gbozu œdœ pe ogo dœ ogo œ tɔ kowo lœ tœ endje.
21.11: Ɔshɔ œ turu tœ osho kɔ, yé ekpe koɓa œdœ egerœ ogo œ za osho kɔ. Œrœ á za awa tœ azu œdœ ambárá afá œ matœ endje ɓa lafo.
21.12: «Kashe utshu œrœnœ asœke kɔ, endje ɓi 'e œ mbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ 'e, endje tɔ meza pa 'e ɓa lœ Sinagoga, endje ko 'e va ga lœ anda kánga, endje gbota 'e na tœnœ ɓa utshu agbozugo dœ pe agboro agbozu mangba ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ.
21.13: Mara œrœ ataa œ za awa fœ 'e ndœ kœma o'o tœ upu nœ mœ.
21.14: Atamœ, 'e tɔtɔ lɔsu 'e tœ mara á 'e pa dœ ngbanga nene.
21.15: Gbambanœ nene, mœ to o'o œdœ kœwusœtœ ga lœ 'e dœ mara adœke, anga ayingba 'e bale á tshe li tœ kœshara o'onœ lœ ama 'e too kœvwaratœ ye tœnœ œ gu nene.
21.16: Aaba 'e œdœ aayi 'e, aaya 'e, aayo 'e œdœ anga 'e œ vaɔtɔ 'e, œ wo ndje anga anga 'e ugurutœ 'e.
21.17: Azu kɔ œ yiangba 'e mbœrœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ,
21.18: kashe anga sukumu 'e bale œ yiwa nene.
21.19: 'E shi gbɨ lœ kœyindœrœ nœ 'e yeka á kœgbɔ soro neke á ka nene.» Yisu pandœ upu nœ kœndɨ tshelœ Yerusaleme (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 24.15-21; Mar 13.14-19)
21.20: «Lɔkɔ á 'e kœwu adœke aturugu kpa dji ongbo Yerusaleme djikpata, 'e wusœ nœ adœke olo kœndɨ tshelœ ongbonœ ndo ye.
21.21: Atamœ, azu á endje sœ ɓa lœ ogo Yuda œ kpa ga pa kaga, endjeneke á endje sœ ɓa lœ ongbo Yerusaleme œ wuta ga shu. Azu á endje sœ ɓa lœ kɨndɨ, endje kpa gu ga lœ ongbo nene!
21.22: Gbambanœ nene, ɔlɔnœ asœmœ œ dœ ɔlɔ kœtɔ geda, yekane œneke á endje pa ala Buku nœ Ndjaba kœmbœrœtœ endje.
21.23: Dœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, oyo œ sœ mbœrœ ayashe má endje sœ dœ nguzu dœ pe endjeneke á endje sœ kœza ɔngɔ ga lœ ama agbolo. Gbambanœ nene, azu tshelœ ogonœ asœmœ œ wu egerœ oyo, yé Ndjaba œ ma ókó nœ ye ga tœ azu.
21.24: Anga azu œ tshu kuzu nœ ɨngɨrɨ yakamba, endje ko anga endje gu tœnœ tœ kœfa endje tœ akanga dje lœ angbɨ ogo kɔ. Angbɨ azu œ ndɨ tshalakpɨ Yerusaleme kpakpakpa œrrr adœke olo nœ endje ka yekane.» Kœkwa Gbolo nœ uzu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 24.29-31; Mar 13.24-27)
21.25: «Ambárá œrœ œ matœ endje ɓa la ɔlɔ, ɓa la yapu œdœ ɓa la angerepe. Yé ɓa pa ɔshɔ, azu lœ angbɨ ogo para œ sœ dœ awa, tshama ungu kota dœ lokonœ œ za ndje awa fœ endje.
21.26: Azu œ tshu dœ awa lɔkɔ á endje gbe dœ œrœ á mbœrœ bala tœ endje pa ɔshɔ kɔ, mbœrœ gbɔgbɔ nœ tshalafo œ turu.
21.27: Dœ tœnœ ataa, endje wu Gbolo nœ uzu á tshe kwa lœ ondoro dœ gbɔgbɔ kɔ œdœ lœ mokɔ.
21.28: Lɔkɔ á œrœ ata kœtetœ kœmbœrœtœ nœ, 'e shi gbɨ yé œ kpa sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ mbœrœ olo nœ kœwuta 'e lœ ekperœ ndo ye.»
21.29: Manda nœ, Yisu pa ndœma toro fœ endje adœke: «'E wu ɔyɔ fige asœ dœ pe anga ɔyɔ para:
21.30: Lɔkɔ á 'e kœwu adœke kakonœ tetœ kœtɔ tœnœ, 'e wusœ nœ adœke olo ungu yavuru ndo ye.
21.31: Awa bale ndje, ɔlɔ á 'e kœsœ kœwu œrœ ata kœwuta tœnœ, 'e wusœ nœ adœke Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba ndo ye.
