21.32: Dœ adjapu, mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke azu nœ tshakpesheke œ ka kɔ nene, yeka á œrœ asœke œ mbœrœtœ endje.
21.33: Tshalafo dœ tshapa ɔshɔ œ ro ye, kashe o'o ama mœ œ ro nene.» Kœsœ dœ gbɔdjela
21.34: «Ala 'e gbɔ, 'e ndɨndɨ lɔsu 'e dœ upu nœ kœmbœrœ angbo, dœ kœndjo ipi œrrr adœke œ mbœrœ 'e too mbœrœ oyo nœ tshapashɔ asœ nene, adœke olonœ asœmœ kœwuwuta ga tœ 'e ngbangi
21.35: ɓata úkú dá endje gɨ nene. Gbambanœ nene, œ wuta ga tœ azu tshapashɔ para.
21.36: Kashe ala 'e gbɔ, 'e za avwala ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ mbœrœ á kœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ kœwuta lœ œrœnœ kɔ á na bala, yeka á 'e kœli kœka ga utshu Gbolo nœ uzu.»
21.37: Dœ ɔlɔ, Yisu sœ lima kœyisœ œrœ ɓa lœ Tepelo, kashe dœ butshɔ, tshe na kœlo ɓa pa kaga á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ kaga ɔyɔ Olive.
21.38: Yeka á dœ amazɨ, á azu œ na ga ndœ ye ɓa lœ Tepelo mbœrœ kœdji she.

22.1: Egerœ angbo nœ kœzɨ mapa á susuku nene á endje e ɨ'ɨrɨnœ Pake asœmœ, ndo lima ye.
22.2: Agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe aayi kœyisœ awa akwa sœ lima kœpara awa ndœ kœwo Yisu, kashe endje sœ lima kœkpa awa azu.
22.3: Yé Satana li lima ga tœ lɔsu Yudasi Isikariote, á tshe kœdœ lima bale lœ andjokpa dœ bishanœ asœmœ.
22.4: Tshe na ndœ kœvwarandœ o'o dœ agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe agbozu tshapa aayi kœgbɔndœ Tepelonœ, yé œ pa o'o dœ endje pa mara kœza Yisu yɔ œrœ fœ endje.
22.5: Endje sœ dœ yanga yé œ pa fœ she adœke œne ko ngendja fœ she.
22.6: Yudasi yindœ nœ yé œ tetœ kœpara awa á sœ tœ ɔtshɔnœ mbœrœ kœza she yaa fœ endje adœke azu kœwuwusœ nœ nene. Ayambarœ guma osho kœzɨrœ angbo Pake (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.17-25; Mar 14.12-21; Yow 13.21-30)
22.7: Lɔkɔ angbo nœ mapa á susuku nene ndo, yé œ li adœke endje wo aaya apata á kœzɨ pa angbonœ asœmœ.
22.8: Yisu kœvwa Apetro dœ Yowane adœke: «'E na dœ́ œ fa kœzɨrœ Pakenœ fœ azœ, yeka á a kœzɨ.»
22.9: Yé endje kœyu Yisu adœke: «Ɓœ yindœ nœ adœke 'a na kœfa kœzɨrœnœ ɓata a?»
22.10: Á tshe kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Kœli 'e ga lœ ongbonœ, 'e togba dœ anga yakoshe dœ lɔsú ungu lœ kumu ye. 'E te manda ye gu tœnœ ga tœ anda á tshe li,
22.11: yé 'e pa fœ ayengɔ andanœ adœke: “Ayi kœyisœrœ yu ɓœ adœke osho á œne zɨ kœzɨrœ angbo Pake dœ ayambarœ nœ œne sœ kpœta a?”
22.12: Yé tshe yisœ anga gbɔshɔ ɓa lafo, á endje guma dœ œrœ kɔ lœnœ; 'e fa kœzɨrœ angbonœ kpœtœmœ.»
22.13: Endje na œ gbɔ œrœ kɔ ɓata á tshe pa má tœnœ fœ endje, yé œ fa kœzɨrœ Pakenœ kpœtœmœ. Kœzɨrœ Pake nœ Gbozu dœ ayambarœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.26-30; Mar 14.22-26; 1Ko 11.23-25)
22.14: Lɔndɔ á ada ɔlɔ kœzɨrœ li ye, Yisu sœ ga ɨndɨrɨ ndaba kœzɨrœ awa bale dœ aayi avwa nœ ye.
22.15: Yé tshe kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Adja mœ yindœ kœzɨ Pake asœ dœ 'e utshu kœwu oyo nœ mœ.
22.16: Gbambanœ nene, mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke, mœ kpa zɨ anganœ nene œrrr ga tœ ɔlɔ á mbœrœ bala tœ endje ɓa lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba.»
22.17: Yé tshe za kopo, œ donga Ndjaba yé á pa adœke: «'E za œ su tshelœnœ tœ 'e.
22.18: Gbambanœ nene, mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e ataa: Mœ kpa ndjo vinu nene œrrr ga tœ lɔkɔ á Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba œ ma bala tœ endje.»
22.19: Manda nœ, tshe kœza mapa œ donga Ndjaba, œ kavwa tshelœnœ yé œ kœkurutshelœ nœ tœ endje dœ kœpa adœke: «Asœ kœdœ undu mœ dá mœ to fœ 'e asœ. 'E mbœrœ ataa á kœgbe bala dœ mœ.»
22.20: Kolœnœ ataa, tshe za kopo manda kœzɨrœ, á pa adœke: «Yashi asœ kœdœ tafo ayo lœ indji mœ á tu mbœrœ 'e.»
22.21: Kashe 'e wu kane: Kane uzu á tshe sœ kœza mœ yɔ œrœ, za kœzɨrœ pa ndaba awa bale dœ mœ kpœke.
22.22: Gbambanœ nene, Gbolo nœ uzu œ gu ɓata á Ndjaba pa lima tœnœ. Kashe oyo nœ uzu á tshe za she yɔ œrœ!
22.23: Yé endje tetœ kœyutœ endje lœ tœ endje adœke uzu ɗe ugurutœ endje dá yindœ kœmbœrœ œrœ ataa. Lœ ugurutœ ayambarœ, œɗe dá ropa anganœ a? (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 18.1; Luk 20.25-28; Mar 9.34; 10.42-45)
22.24: Endje tetœ kœgbugburutshelœ o'o lœ tœ endje mbœrœ kœwusœ uzu á tshe ropa anganœ.
22.25: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Agbozugo tshapa angbɨ ogo sœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ endje dœ gbɔgbɔ, yé endjeneke á endje sœ kœgbɔndœ ogo yi ɓalima ndœ nœ adœke azu e œne “ɔtshɔ azu”.
22.26: Tœ 'e, 'e mbœmbœrœ œnœ 'e ata nene, kashe œ li adœke tsheneke ugurutœ 'e á tshe ropa 'e, tshe sœ ɓata rodonga, yé œ li adœke tsheneke á tshe sœ tœ gbozu, tshe sœ ɓata ayi akwa.
22.27: Yé ataa, œɗe dá ropa anganœ a? Uzu neke á tshe sœ pa ndaba too tsheneke á tshe sœ kœko kœzɨrœ fœ azu a? Œ dœ́dœ́ uzu á tshe sœ pa ndaba nene a? Kashe tœ mœ, mœ sœ ugurutœ 'e ɓata uzu kœmbœrœ akwa fœ 'e.
22.28: «E'e kœdœ azu á 'e kaka lima tœ mœ tɨ nene lɔkɔ á mœ li lima ga lœ kœwu lɔsu.
22.29: Yé œmœ, mœ za akwa ogo gbozu fœ 'e ɓata á Aba mœ za ndje lima fœ mœ.
22.30: Ataa, 'e zɨ bala œrœ œ ndjorœ pa ndaba dœ mœ awa bale ɓa lœ Ogo gbozu nœ mœ, yé 'e sœ ndje bala ga pa ngande tshagbozu mbœrœ kœwa ngbanga nœ mara ndjokpa dœ bisha lœ ogo Israyele.» Yisu pa fœ Petro adœke tshe 'ea œne zœ (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.31-35; Mar 14.27-31; Yow 13.36-38)
22.31: Gbozu pa fœ Shimu adœke: «Shimu, Shimu, Satana esho ndœ gbɔgbɔ adœke œne pe tshelœ 'e ɓata á endje pe tshelœ indji ble.
22.32: Kashe œmœ, mœ za avwala tœ upu nœ zœ mbœrœ adœke kœyindœrœ nœ zœ kœ kaka nene. Yé œɓœ, lɔkɔ á ɓœ kœkwatœ zœ, ɓœ to gbɔgbɔ fœ aaya zœ.»
22.33: Petro pa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, œdœ lœ kánga œdœ lœ kuzu, mœ yindœ nœ adœke mœ li, too mœ tshu dœ ɓœ awa bale.»
22.34: Yisu gi adœke: «Mœ sœ kœpa fœ ɓœ ngbɨ, Petro, utshunœ adœke kɔngato kɨ, ɓœ 'ea mœ awa votɔ adœke ɓœ wuwusœ mœ nene.»
22.35: Yé tshe kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Lɔkɔ á mœ vwa lima 'e, œdœ ngendja, œdœ ngbade, œdœ œrœ ada, 'e zaza lima œrœ bale nene. Atamœ 'e sœsœ lima dœ œrœ nene a?» Endje gi adœke: «'A sœ lima dœ œrœ zœ.»
22.36: Tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «Kashe ngɔngɔ asœ, uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ ngendja, tshe za; awa bale ndje mbœrœ uzu á tshe sœ dœ ngbade. Yé tsheneke á tshe gugu dœ ɨngɨrɨ yakamba nene, tshe ka yɔgbɔdɔ lœba nœ ye dœ́ œ yɔ dœ anganœ bale.
22.37: Gbambanœ nene, mœ sœ kœpa ngbɨ fœ 'e, œ li adœke o'o á endje sú ɓala buku nœ Ndjaba mbœrœtœ endje ga tœ mœ liakanœ: Endje dɨ she ga ugurutœ aayi kœmbœrœ ngbɨndɨrœ. Dœ tœnœ ataa, o'o á endje pa lima tœ upu nœ mœ, œ mbœrœtœ endje ye.»
22.38: Endje kœpa adœke: «Gbozu, ɨngɨrɨ yakamba bisha dœke». Tshe kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Œ li ye». Yisu za avwala ɓa pa kaga ɔyɔ Olive (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.36-46; Mar 14.32-42)
22.39: Yisu wuta œ ro ga pa kaga ɔyɔ Olive ɓata á tshe ro ɓa lima, yé ayambarœ nœ ye na manda ye.
22.40: Lɔndɔ á tshe yi kumu ye ɓa zœ, tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «'E za avwala nœ 'e fœ Ndjaba adœke 'e kœlili ga lœ kœbɨlɨ osho nœ Satana nene.»
22.41: Manda nœ, tshe gitœ ye zara tœ endje, œ gote dœ koda ye yé œ tetœ kœza avwala fœ Ndjaba adœke:
22.42: «Aba, œdœ ɓœ kœyindœ nœ, ɓœ mbœrœ adœke yashi oyonœ asœke gitœ ye utshu mœ ye. Mbœmbœrœ œrœ á mœ yindœ nœ nene, kashe mbœrœ œrœ á ɓœ yindœ nœ.» [
22.43: Ataa, anga andjelu to ɓa lafo œ wuta ga ndœ ye mbœrœ kœto gbɔgbɔ fœ she.
22.44: Lɔsu ye su lima dœ oyo, tshe kpa za avwala ga pa nœ ga pa nœ fœ Ndjaba, yé ɨlɨ sara tœ ye tea tea ga tœ ɔshɔ ɓata indji.]
22.45: Manda kœza avwalanœ, Yisu áalafo œ gu ga ndœ ayambarœ nœ ye œ gbɔ endje, endje mɔ œ lo ye.
22.46: Tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «Koto o! 'E lo ye a? 'E áalafo yé œ za avwala fœ Ndjaba adœke 'e lili ga lœ kœwu lɔsu nœ Satana nene.» Kœtepa Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.47-56; Mar 14.43-50; Yow 18.3-11)
22.47: Tshe sœpe damba kœpa o'o trale atake, ukpulu azu kœyi kumu endje. Anga bale ugurutœ andjokpa dœ bishanœ asœmœ á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ lima Yudasi, te utshu endje. Tshe na ndoo dœ Yisu ndœ kœbala she dœ kœuru tshelœ utu ye.
22.48: Kashe Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Yudasi, ɓœ za Gbolo nœ uzu fœ angbɨ azu lœ awa nœ kœuru tshelœ utu ye a?»
22.49: Lɔkɔ á azu á endje ro tœ awanœ dœ Yisu wu lima œrœ á yindœ kœmbœrœtœ endje, endje yu she adœke: «Gbozu, 'a nga koshe dœ endje dœ ɨngɨrɨ yakamba a?»
22.50: Yé anga bale ugurutœ endje gbota ɨngɨrɨ yakamba nœ ye, œ de ayi akwa nœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba, á wa utu ye dja ga pa kuni ndja tœnœ ye.
22.51: Kashe Yisu pa adœke: «'E katœ nœ dœ́ endje mbœrœ œrœ á endje yindœ nœ.» Á za utu ye tɔ ga ngbanœ.
22.52: Manda nœ, Yisu pa fœ azu á endje na lima kœza she, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba, agbozu tshapa azu á endje gbɔndœ Tepelo dœ pe agbozu Ikrizia ayuda adœke: «'E na dœ ɨngɨrɨ yakamba dœ pe ndɨndɨ ɔyɔ ndœ mœ ɓata œmœ kœdœ ayi angba a?
22.53: Ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ á mœ sœ lima dœ 'e lœ Tepelo, 'e tuturutœ mœ nene. Kashe ngɔngɔ asœke kœdœ olo nœ 'e œdœ gbɔgbɔ akwa nœ aayi butshɔ.» Petro 'ea Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.57-58,69-75; Mar 14.53-54,66-72; Yow 18.12-18,25-27)
22.54: Endje za Yisu, œ gu dœ she ɓa lœ anda nœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba. Petro sœ lima kœna manda endje lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ.
22.55: Ɓata á endje ngbɔ lima egerœ owo ga lœ gbagba á ngbɔtœ endje ga ɨndɨrɨnœ, Petro na œ sœ ga ugurutœ endje.
22.56: Anga yashe akwanœ bale wu she kœsœ ga ɨndɨrɨ owonœ, tshe shokɔ she yé œ pa adœke: «Uzu asœ ɓa e sœ ndje lima dœ she awa bale.»
22.57: Kashe Petro 'eatœ ye, œ pa adœke: «Yashe, mœ wuwusœ ye nene.»
22.58: Teasho manda nœ, anga uzu kpa wu she, œ pa adœke: «Œɓœ ndje kœdœ uzu nœ endje.» Petro gi adœke: «Œ̃œ̃, œ dœ́dœ́ mœ nene.»
22.59: Ga pa œrœ nœ́ ada ɔlɔ bale manda nœ, anga uzu kpa shi kɔɗɔɔ dœ o'onœ adœke: «Adja upu, uzu asœ ɓa e sœ lima dœ she awa bale; ga panœ dœmœ, œshe kœdœ uzu Galilayi.»
22.60: Petro kœgi adœke: «Mœ wuwusœ o'o á ɓœ yindœ kœpa tœnœ asœmœ nene.» Petœ œsœnœ á tshe sœ lima pe kœpa o'o lœma ye, trale kɔngato kœkɨ.
22.61: Gbozu fatœ ye œ tondœ Petro, yé Petro kœgbe dœ o'o á Gbozu pa lima fœ she adœke: «Utshunœ adœke kɔngato kɨ, ɓœ 'ea mœ awa votɔ.»
22.62: Petro wuta yé œ tetœ ɨkɨ tshuru tshuru tshuru. Azu gu Yisu œ ɓi she (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.67-68; Mar 14.65)
22.63: Ayakoshe á endje sœ lima kœsœ ɨndɨrɨ Yisu, tetœ kœmɔ she dœ pe kœɓi she.
22.64: Endje i tshatshu ye ga tœnœ dœ lœba á sœ kœyu she adœke: «Ma adœke œɓœ kœdœ ayi kœgbara o'o! Uzu ɗe dá ɓi ɓœ a?»
22.65: Yé endje sœ ndje lima kœgu she dœ ekpe o'o waa. Yisu ɓa utshu egerœ angbɔtœ kœwa ngbanga (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.59-66; Mar 14.55-64; Yow 18.19-24)
22.66: Lɔkɔ á osho kɔrɔ, agbɔ Ayuda, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba œdœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa ngbɔtœ endje ga tœnœ, yé œ na dœ Yisu ɓa tœ egerœ angbɔtœ kœwa ngbanga nœ endje.
22.67: Endje pa fœ she adœke: «Œdœ ɓœ kœdœ Masiya, pandœ nœ fœ 'a.» Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Œdœ mœ kœpandœ nœ fœ 'e, 'e yindœ nœ ga ndœ mœ nene;
22.68: yé œdœ mœ kœyu 'o, 'e gi o'o fœ mœ nene.
22.69: Kashe ngɔngɔ asœ, Gbolo nœ uzu œ sœ ga tœ kuni Ndjaba nœ gbɔgbɔ.»
22.70: Endje para kɔkɔ yu adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba a?» Tshe kœgi fœ endje adœke: «E'e dœ tœ 'e 'e sœ kœpa tœnœ adœke, œmœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ ye.»
22.71: Endje kœpa adœke: «Ádá kœgbe dœ anga timu kpa gugu nene! Gbambanœ nene, azœ dœ tœ azœ a dji o'onœ lœ adja ama ye dœ tœ ye!»

23.1: Azu para á endje sœ lima tœ œsœ egerœ angbɔtœnœ áalafo yé œ na dœ she ɓa utshu Pilato.
23.2: Endje tetœ kœtɔ meza pa ye dœ o'onœ adœke: «'A gbɔ yakoshe asœ, tshe sœ kœdjingili tshelœ kumu azu ogo nœ azœ: Tshe sœ kœpakata azu ndœ kœyɔ lapo nœ Sezare, tshe sœ kœpa adœke œne kœdœ Masiya, œne ndje kœdœ gbozugo.»
23.3: Pilato kœyu she adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ gbozugo nœ Ayudanœ a?» Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Œɓœ dá sœ kœpa ataa.»
23.4: Pilato pa fœ agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe ukpulu azunœ á endje na lima adœke: «Mœ wuwusœ anga o'o á li adœke mœ wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ yakoshe asœ liaka nœ nene.»
23.5: Kashe endje shi kɔɗɔɔ adœke: «Tshe sœ kœdjingili tshelœ kumu azu dœ kœyisœ œrœ adœke azu oma lakpɨ. Tshe tetœ nœ lœ ogo Galilayi, lœ ogo Yuda œrrr á wuta dœ tœnœ ɓa ke asœke.» Endje na dœ Yisu ɓa utshu Erode
23.6: Manda kœdji endje, Pilato kœyu endje adœke: «Yakoshe asœ kœdœ uzu Galilayi a?»
23.7: Yé endje yindœ nœ ngbɨ adœke œshe kœdœ uzu Galilayi. Kœdji adœke Yisu kœdœ uzu ogo á Erode kœdœ gbozunœ, tshe vwa she ga ndœ Erode, mbœrœ lœ olo asœmœ tshe na lima kpœmœ ga lœ Yerusaleme.
23.8: Kœwu Yisu atake, Erode sœ dœ yanga tɔpanœ kpuru. Gbambanœ nene, tshe sœ lima kolœ kœdjindœ œtrœ ye, yé œ sœ dœ ogo kœwu she. Tshe sœ lima kœgbe adœke Yisu œ mbœrœ anga afá dœ ala œne zœ.
23.9: Tshe yu she dœ o'o ga pa nœ ga pa nœ, kashe Yisu gigi 'o bale fœ she nene.
23.10: Agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe aayi kœyisœ awa akwa sœ lima kœtɔ meza pa ye dœ agbɔ.
23.11: Erode dœ pe aturugu nœ ye te lima tœ kœmɔ Yisu, œ sœ lima kœgu œsœ ye. Endje verœ ɔtshɔ lœba á ga waa ga tœ ye, yé œ gi she fœ Pilato.
23.12: Pe dœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, Erode œdœ Pilato á endje sœ lima kœyiangbatœ endje utshunœ, tetœ kœyindœtœ endje ye. Pilato wa ngbanga nœ kuzu ga tœ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 27.15-26; Mar 15.6-15; Yow 18.39–19.16)
23.13: Pilato kpa e agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba, agbozugo dœ pe azu ogo kɔ,
23.14: yé á kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E na dœ yakoshe asœ fœ mœ ɓata uzu á tshe sœ kœdjingili tshelœ kumu azu tœ awa á sœ ndjii, kashe œmœ á mœ yu she utshu 'e, mœ gbɔgbɔ anga œrœ á li adœke mœ wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ ye liakanœ ugurutœ o'o á 'e tɔ meza pa ye ndœnœ nene.
23.15: Gbozu Erode gbɔgbɔ ndje she dœ ekpe 'o nene, yeka á gi she fœ azœ gamœ asœke. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, anga œrœ á tshe mbœrœ á li dœ kuzu gugu bale nene.
23.16: Ataa, mœ sɔ kolœ she dœ ndjapa, œ za awa fœ she ye.» [
23.17: Lɔkɔ angbo nœ Pake bale dœ bale, Pilato sœ ɓalima kœvwara anga uzu bale lœ anda kánga.]
23.18: Endje tetœ kœtarawa para kɔkɔ adœke: «Wo uzunœ asœmœ ye! Œ katœ Barabase fœ 'a!»
23.19: Endje za lima Barabase ga lœ anda kánga mbœrœ anga kœoma dœ o'o á wuta lima lœ ongbo, á tshe wo lima uzu lœ nœ.
23.20: Pilato kpa yu ndje dœ gbetshelœ adœke œne katœ Yisu.
23.21: Kashe endje tara rawa adœke: «Tshe tshu pa kurushi, tshe tshu pa kurushi!»
23.22: Tœ votɔnœ, tshe kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Ekperœ gaɗe á yakoshe asœ mbœrœ a? Mœ gbɔgbɔ anga œrœ bale á tshe mbœrœ á li adœke tshe tshu nene. Mœ yindœ kœɓi kolœ she, yé œ za awa fœ she.»
23.23: Kashe endje sœ kolœ kœta rawa dœ agbɔ adœke tshe tshu pa kurushi, yé rawa nœ endje sœ kolœ kœgerœ tœnœ.
23.24: Yé Pilato kœwa ɓata á endje yɔndœ nœ asœmœ.
23.25: Tshe kœkatœ uzu á tshe za she vwi ga lœ anda kánga mbœrœ kœoma dœ 'o œdœ mbœrœ kœwo uzu, yé á endje sœ lima kœyɔndœ ye. Kashe tshe pa adœke endje mbœrœ dœ Yisu ɓata á endje yindœ nœ. Ɓa tœ awa kurushi (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 27.32-44; Mar 15.21-32; Yow 19.17-27)
23.26: Ɓata á aturugu sœ lima kœna dœ Yisu, endje togba dœ anga uzu bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Shimu, uzu tshalakpɨ Sirene. Tshe to lima ɓa lœ kɨndɨ á sœ kœgu tœnœ yé endje za she dœ ɔgbɔ, œ za kurushinœ ga pa kanga ye adœke tshe za manda Yisu.
23.27: Ukpulu azu yaba yaba sœ lima kœna manda ye. Endje ngbɔ lima dœ anga ayashe á endje sœ lima kœda okoro endje, á sœ lima kœdɨtshelœama endje tœ upu nœ ye.
23.28: Yisu kœfatœ ye ga ndœ endje á kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Ayashe Yerusaleme, 'e kɨkɨ mœ nene! Kashe 'e kɨtœ 'e dœ tœ 'e dœ pe agbolo nœ 'e!
23.29: Gbambanœ nene, lɔkɔnœ ndo á endje pa adœke: “Yanga nœ ayashe mara, dœ endjeneke á endje zuzu damba nene, dœ endjeneke á endje zaza damba ɔngɔ ga lœ ama agbolo nene asœmœ!”
23.30: Azu œ tetœ kœpa fœ kaga adœke: “Te ga pa 'a” yé œ pa fœ koto adœke: “Ko 'a yiwa tœnœ!”
23.31: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ endje kœmbœrœ atake ga tœ tungboyu ɔyɔ, endje mbœrœ kotoo tœ ɔɔrɔ ɔyɔ a?»
23.32: Endje na ndje lima dœ anga aayi ngbɨndɨrœ bisha adœke endje wo endje awa bale dœ Yisu. Endje kuru Yisu ga pa kurushi (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 27.33-34; Mar 15.22-32)
23.33: Kœwuta endje ga tœ osho má endje e tœnœ adœke: «Gbayashi kɔrɔ», endje kuru Yisu ga pa kurushi dœ pe aayi ngbɨndɨrœ asœmœ bisha, anga ga pa kuni anga ga pa gele.
23.34: Yé Yisu pa adœke: «Aba, djerœndœ ekperœ nœ endje gbambanœ nene, endje wuwusœ œrœ á endje sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ nene.» Yé endje ta wuka pa lœba nœ Yisu, œ kurutshelœ nœ tœ endje ye.
23.35: Azu ndjoro ka lima ɓa zœ yé œ sœ kœwu tœnœ. Agbozu ayudanœ tetœ kœmɔ she, œ pa adœke: «Tshe she lima anga azu. Œdœ tshe kœdœ adja Masiya á Ndjaba ke she asœmœ, kaka tshe shetœ ye dœ tœ ye!»
23.36: Aturugu mɔ ndje lima she. Endje na lima ndoo dœ she, œ za ikpi vinu fœ she,
23.37: yé œ pa adœke: «Œdœ ɓœ kœdœ gbozugo nœ Ayuda, shetœ zœ dœ tœ zœ.»
23.38: Endje su ndje lima mbeti á ɓi ga tœ kumu kurushinœ adœke: «Uzunœ asœke kœdœ gbozugo nœ Ayuda.»
23.39: Anga ayi ngbɨndɨrœnœ bale á endje kuru she ga pa kurushi tetœ kœgu she, œ pa adœke: «Œ dœ́dœ́ ɓœ kœdœ Masiya nene a? She tœ zœ dœ tœ zœ œ she ndje a'a!»
23.40: Kashe anga gbagbara she yé œ pa adœke: «Ɓœ kpa awa Ndjaba nene a? Œrœ á endje mbœrœ fœ azœ, œtœnœ dá endje mbœrœ ndje fœ she!
23.41: Tœ azœ, djofelenœ asœ li dœ azœ; gbambanœ nene, œneke á a gbɔ kœdœ œrœ tshangba œneke á a mbœrœ. Kashe œshe, tshe mbœmbœrœ ekperœ teasho nene.»
23.42: Manda nœ, tshe pa fœ Yisu adœke: «Yisu, gbe dœ mœ lɔkɔ á ɓœ kwa bala tœ zœ kœmbœrœ akwa gbozu nœ zœ kane.»
23.43: Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Mœ sœ kœpa fœ ɓœ dœ adjapu adœke, kpesheke, ɓœ sœ dœ mœ awa bale ɓa lœ Paradizo.» Kuzu Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 27.45-56; Mar 15.33-41; Yow 19.28-30)
23.44: Œ na kœwuta ndoo dœ kakpi ɔlɔ, osho bu kporokoto pa ɔshɔ djigi œrrr ga tœ ada ɔlɔ votɔ manda kakpi ɔlɔ,
23.45: ɔlɔ kpa tɔtɔ nene. Yé egerœ lœba á endje du ɓa sœnda Tepelo asœmœ suru tshelœtœ ye bisha.
23.46: Yisu ta rawa dœ ɔgbɔ yé œ pa adœke: «Aba, mœ katœ ɨshirɨ mœ ga tshakane zœ.» Manda kœpa o'onœ asœke, ngbewo tshe tshu ye.
23.47: Kœwu œrœ kɔ á mbœrœ lima tœ endje, gbozu tshapa aturugu Roma donga Ndjaba, œ pa adœke: «Œkporo o'o, yakoshe asœke kœdœ uzu á tshe sœ ndjii.»
23.48: Yé azu ndjoro á endje ngbɔɓa lima tœ endje kpœtœmœ, wu œrœnœ á mbœrœ lima tœ endje asœmœ, yé œ fatœ endje gu tœnœ dœ kœda okoro endje dœ oyo.
23.49: Aayi kœna manda Yisu para kɔkɔ, dœ pe ayashe á endje to lima dœ she ɓa lœ ogo Galilayi, ka lima zara á sœ kœtondœ œrœnœ kɔ á sœ lima kœmbœrœtœ endje asœmœ. Endje shi oko Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 27.57-61; Mar 15.42-47; Yow 19.38-42)
23.50: Anga uzu bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Yozefu, anga ayi kœwa ngbanga nœ Ayuda, tshe kœdœ lima ɔtshɔ uzu, uzu á tshe sœ ndjii.
23.51: Uzu tshalakpɨ Arimateyo, tshe za lima lɔsu ye djigi kœkate dœ lɔkɔ á Ndjaba œ tetœ kœmbœrœ akwa tshagbozu nœ ye. Tshe vwara lima tœ ye tœ ngbanganœ á endje wa ga tœ Yisu dœ pe œrœnœ á endje mbœrœ ga tœ ye asœmœ.
23.52: Tshe na ga ndœ Pilato kœyu she adœke, œne za oko Yisu.
23.53: Yé tshe na œ ɨ oko Yisu tœ kurushi ga atɨ, œ vwele dœ imbi lœba yé œ na kœshi tœnœ ɓa lœ kudu á endje dji lœ badja. Endje shishi lima anga uzu bale ga lœ kudunœ asœmœ nene.
23.54: Tœnœ kœdœ lima olo bale utshu sabata, olo kœguma œrœ yé lɔkɔnœ asœmœ ndo lima ye.
23.55: Ayashe á endje to lima dœ Yisu ɓa lœ ogo Galilayi asœmœ, na lima awa bale dœ Yozefu. Endje na lima kœwu kudunœ yé œ wu mara á endje shi dœ oko Yisu ga lœnœ.
23.56: Manda nœ, endje gu ga manda endje, œ guma kada dœ pe yombo ndœ kœna kœdja ga tœ kote Yisu. Dœ lɔkɔ sabata, endje yatœ endje liaka œneke á awa akwa pa tœnœ.

24.1: Dœ ɔlɔ yenga lœ gurutsha, ayashenœ ro ga pa udu dœ yombonœ á endje guma lima asœmœ.
24.2: Kœwuta endje ɓa zœ, endje gbɔ adœke endje vwɨrɨ egerœ badjanœ tœ ama kudunœ ye.
24.3: Endje li ɓa lœ kudunœ ɓa zœ, kashe endje gbɔgbɔ lima oko Gbozu Yisu nene.
24.4: Uvuru endje i gara, yé trale endje wu azu bisha á endje verœ lœba á tshiitshi, endje ka ndoo dœ endje.
24.5: Awa za endje, endje kœtra kumu endje ga atɨ, yé azu asœmœ kœyu endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœ kœpara uzu á tshe sœ dœ soro ugurutœ akuzu a?
24.6: Tshe sœsœ kpœke nene, kashe tshe she ye. 'E gbe dœ o'o á tshe pa lima fœ 'e lɔkɔ á tshe sœpe lima ɓa lœ Galilayi kane.
24.7: Tshe pa lima adœke: “Œ li adœke endje za Gbolo nœ uzu ga tshakane ekpe azu, endje wo she ɓa pa kurushi, yé manda olo votɔ, tshe she lœ akuzu ye.”»
24.8: Ataa, œndœ o'onœ á Yisu pa lima asœmœ kœte lœ ayashenœ asœmœ,
24.9: endje to ɓa pa udu ɓa zœ, œ gu œ pandœ o'onœ kɔ fœ ayambarœnœ ndjokpa dœ bale asœmœ dœ pe udu endje kɔ.
24.10: Ayashenœ lima kœdœ: Mareya uzu Magadala, Jane œdœ Mareya ayi Jake. Anga angbɨ ayashe á endje ro lima awa bale dœ endje mɨ ndje ndœ nœ fœ aayi avwa.
24.11: Aayi avwanœ gbe lima œne endje adœke o'onœ á endje pa asœmœ kœdœ o'o nœ ayi iyi, yé endje yiyi lima ndœ nœ ga tœ ayashenœ nene.
24.12: Petro áafo, œ kpa ga pa udunœ ɓa zœ, œ tɨ, œ wu kolœ a'eara imbi ndœma lœba. Œ gu ga ndœ ye, yé œ tetœ kœkɨtœ œsœ œrœ á mbœrœ tœ endje asœmœ. Yisu matœ ye fœ azu bisha tœ awa Emawuse (Wu ɓa tœ Mar 16.12-13)
24.13: Kolœ dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, anga azu bisha ugurutœ endje na lima ga lakpɨ Emawuse. Kœto lœ Yerusaleme œrrr ga lœ Emawuse, endje mbœrœ ada ɔlɔ bisha nœ ana.
24.14: Kœna endje, endje tetœ kœpa o'o tœ œrœnœ á mbœrœ lima tœ endje asœmœ na tœnœ.
24.15: Ɓata á endje sœ lima kœkɨtœ œsœnœ dœ pe kœsharatœ endje, Yisu dœ tœ ye te ga ndœ endje, œ tetœ kœna dœ endje tœ awanœ.
24.16: Kashe, ala endje bu lima tœ kœwusœ nœ adœke Yisu dœmœ.
24.17: Yisu kœyu endje adœke: «O'o gaɗe dá 'e sharatœ 'e ugurutœ 'e tœ awa lœ kumu nœ a?» Yé endje kœka tshikɨngɨ dœ oyo.
24.18: Yeka á anga bale ugurutœ endje, á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Kleyopase, kœgi fœ she adœke: «Kolœ œɓœ bale lœ Yerusaleme asœke dá wuwusœ o'o á ro kpœke nene a?»
24.19: Tshe kœyu endje adœke: «O'o gaɗe e?» Endje kœgi fœ she adœke: «O'o nœ Yisu uzu Nazarete. Œshe kœdœ lima ayi kœgbara o'o nœ Ndjaba. Tshe sœ lima dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ kœmbœrœ œrœ dœ pe kœpa o'o utshu Ndjaba œdœ azu.
24.20: Yeka agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ pe agbozu nœ azœ ka she, á kuru she ga pa kurushi, á wo she ye.
24.21: 'A ko lima lɔsu 'a ga pa ye adœke œshe dá Ndjaba vwa she ndœ kœshe azu Israyele. Kashe œ ro kpesheke olo votɔ á œrœnœ mbœrœtœ endje asœmœ.
24.22: 'A wusœ nœ lœ awa nœ anga ayashe ugurutœ 'a á endje za o'onœ ga atɨ yekane á tshanga kumu 'a. Gbambanœ nene, endje kpa lima lœ gurutsha ga pa udunœ ɓa zœ,
24.23: kashe endje gbɔgbɔ oko ye nene. Endje fatœ endje œ gu á pa fœ 'a adœke, aandjelu wuta á pa fœ œne adœke, tshe kpa sœpe dœ soro.
24.24: Anga anga 'a na ɓa pa udunœ ɓa zœ, œ gbɔ œrœnœ kɔ liaka œneke á ayashenœ gu á pandœ nœ fœ 'a asœmœ, kashe anga œrœ bale kœdœ adœke endje wuwu she nene.»
24.25: Yé tshe kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Uu, azu á endje sœsœ dœ kœwusœrœ nene, o'o kɔ á aayi kœgbara o'o pa ɓa lima, 'e yiyindœ nœ katsha nene!
24.26: 'E wuwusœ nœ nene a? Œ li adœke Masiya wu oyo yeka á kœsœ lœ mokɔ nœ ye.»
24.27: Manda nœ, á tetœ kœmɨndœ o'o á endje sú tœ upu nœ ye la buku nœ Ndjaba, kœto tœ Moyize œrrr ga tœ aayi kœgbara o'o.
24.28: Kœndo dœ ogo á endje yi lima ndœ kœna ga lœnœ, Yisu mbœrœ ɓata œnœ sœ kœna œnœ œne lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ.
24.29: Endje kœpa fœ she adœke: «Sœpe dœ 'a mbœrœ ɓa mámá œrrr ɔlɔ dɨ ye, osho bu ndje ye.» Yé tshe kœli ndœ kœlo dœ endje.
24.30: Endje ngbɔtœ endje ɨndɨrɨ ndaba ndœ kœzɨrœ, tshe kœza mapa, kœdonga Ndjaba, kœva tshelœnœ ndœ kœkurutshelœ nœ tœ endje.
24.31: Trale ala endje kœkɔrɔ, á endje kœwusœ nœ adœke œshe dœmœ. Œne kpa mesho atake, tɨtɨvwɨrɨ tshe kœyiwa tœ endje ye.
24.32: Endje kœtetœ kœyutœ endje, anga manda yanganœ adœke: «Ɔlɔ á tshe sœ kœpa o'o dœ azœ tœ awa dœ pe kœmɨndœ o'o ama Ndjaba la buku, œ sœ kœju lɔsu azœ ɓa ta owo a?»
24.33: Pe kpœtœ œsœnœ, endje áafo œ gu ga lœ Yerusaleme, yé á gbɔ ayindœ Yisu ndjokpa dœ bale á endje ngbɔɓa tœ endje dœ pe anga anga endje
24.34: á sœ kœpa lima adœke: «Adjapu, Gbozu she lœ akuzu ye, tshe matœ ye fœ Shimu.»
24.35: Yé ayindœ Yisu bisha asœmœ, kœpandœ o'o á ro tœ awa Emawuse fœ endje, dœ pe mara á endje wusœ Yisu ɔlɔ á tshe va tshelœ mapa. Yisu matœ ye fœ ayambarœ nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bale
24.36: Ɓata á endje sœpe lima damba kœpa o'onœ, trale Yisu wuta ga ugurutœ endje, á kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Kœsœ gee sœ dœ 'e.»
24.37: Uvuru endje i gara dœ awa, mbœrœ endje gbe adœke endje wu ngandoro.
24.38: Yé tshe kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe dá lɔsu 'e sœ ga lafo a? Mbœrœ gaɗe dá 'e sœ dœ ashara ata a?
24.39: 'E wu tshakane mœ dœ ada mœ, œmœ dœmœ. 'E goro mœ dœ́ œ wu, ngandoro sœsœ dœ songba dœ pe ngbabi ɓata á mœ sœ dœ tœnœ asœ nene.»
24.40: Manda o'onœ asœmœ, tshe kœma tshakane ye dœ ada ye fœ endje.
24.41: Ɓata á yanga sœ zœ dœ pe uvuru endje á i gara, endje yiyi lima damba ndœnœ nene, Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E sœ dœ kœzɨrœ tœnœ kpœke zœ a?»
24.42: Endje za anga ndɨndɨ ageatshalangu á endje zoozo fœ she.
24.43: Yé tshe za œ zɨ tœ ala endje.
24.44: Manda nœ, tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «'E wu, ɔlɔ á mœ sœ lima damba dœ 'e, mœ pa lima fœ 'e adœke: O'o á endje sú lima la buku awa akwa nœ Moyize, la buku nœ aayi kœgbara o'o dœ pe la œnœ Itshi, œ mbœrœtœ endje liakanœ.»
24.45: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Yisu kɔrɔ kœwusœrœ nœ endje ndœ kœwusœ ádá buku nœ Ndjaba.
24.46: Tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «Ɓata á o'o ama Ndjaba sœ lima kœpa tœnœ: Endje ndanga Masiya œrrr ga tœ kœwo she, kashe manda olo votɔ tshe she ugurutœ akuzu.
24.47: Œ li adœke, endje mɨndœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye lœ angbɨ ogo kɔ kœto lœ Yerusaleme, mbœrœ adœke azu fatshalɔsu endje á Ndjaba kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ endje.
24.48: Mbœrœ e'e dá dœ atimu nœ œrœnœ kɔ asœmœ.
24.49: Yé œmœ, mœ vwa Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ fœ 'e ɓata á Aba mœ pa lima ndœ nœ. 'E sœ damba lœ Yerusaleme kpœke œrrr ga tœ olo á gbɔgbɔ nœ Ndjaba kœjerœ ga pa 'e yekane.» Yisu ɔ ga lafo
24.50: Manda nœ, Yisu to endje na tœnœ ndoo dœ Betani. Tshe tɨ kane ye ga lafo, á to kane ye kapa endje.
24.51: Lɔndɔ á tshe sœ lima kœto kane ye ga pa endje, tshe katœ endje yé œ ɔ ga lafo.
24.52: Manda kœdonga she, endje gu dœ yanga ga lœ Yerusaleme.
24.53: Ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ endje sœ lima kœna kœdonga Ndjaba ɓa lœ Tepelo.

1.1: Utshunœ adœke Ndjaba mbœrœ tshalafo dœ tshapashɔ, O'o sœ lima zœ. O'o sœ lima awa bale dœ Ndjaba, yé O'o kœdœ lima Ndjaba.
1.2: O'o sœ lima awa bale dœ Ndjaba utshunœ adœke tshe mbœrœ tshalafo dœ tshapashɔ.
1.3: Ndjaba mbœrœ œrœ kɔ dœ awa nœ ye, yé anga œrœ bale mbœmbœrœtœ ye kpi tœ ye nene.
1.4: O'o sœ lima dœ soro, yé soro kœdœ lima ɨngbɨsho nœ azu.
1.5: Yé ɨngbɨsho matœ ye lœ ubu osho kashe ubu osho sœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ tœ kœwo ɨshirɨnœ nene.
1.6: Ndjaba vwa lima anga yakoshe bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Yowane.
1.7: Tshe na lima ɓata timu mbœrœ kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ ɨngbɨsho. Tshe na adœke azu para kɔkɔ sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ɨngbɨshonœ.
1.8: Tshe dœ́dœ́ lima ɨngbɨsho má nene, kashe tshe na lima adœke œne pandœ adja o'o tœ upu nœ ɨngbɨshonœ.
1.9: O'onœ kœdœ lima adja ɨngbɨsho, œneke á na ga pa ɔshɔnœ asœke yé œ tɔ ga ndœ azu para kɔkɔ.
1.10: O'o sœ lima pa tshapashɔnœ asœke. Ndjaba mbœrœ lima tshapashɔnœ asœke dœ awa nœ ye kashe azu tshapashɔ wuwu lima sœ ye nene.
1.11: O'o na lima ga lœ ogo nœ ye dœ tœ ye, kashe azu nœ ye zaza lima osho kœsœ fœ she nene.
1.12: Andaa, mbœrœ azu neke á endje za lima osho kœsœ fœ she, á sœ lima dœ kœyindœrœ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye, tshe za lima awa fœ endje adœke endje te agbolo nœ Ndjaba.
1.13: Endje tete agbolo nœ Ndjaba lœ indji dœ pe lœ mara nœ azu nene, ɓata á yakoshe œ zu gbolo tœ yashe liaka ogo nœ endje nene, kashe Ndjaba dá zu lima endje liaka gbetshelœ nœ ye dœ tœ ye.
1.14: Yé O'o wuta uzu, œ lo ugurutœ azœ. A wu mokɔ nœ ye, yé œtœnœ kœdœ mokɔ á Ndjaba Aba za fœ Gbolo nœ ye tshebale, á tshe sú dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu œdœ adjapu.
1.15: Yowane te lima tœ kœpandœ o'o tœ upu nœ ye, á gbara lima o'o adœke: «'E wu uzu á mœ mɨ lima ndœ o'o tœ upu nœ ye lɔkɔ á mœ pa adœke: “Tshe sœ kœna manda mœ, kashe tshe ropa mœ ye, gbambanœ nene, utshu mœ tshe sœ lima zœ.”»
1.16: Lœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye, tshe to kane ye ga pa azœ para kɔkɔ, yé tshe kpa to anganœ ga pa nœ.
1.17: Ndjaba za lima awa akwa fœ azœ lœ awa nœ Moyize, kashe ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye œdœ pe adja o'o nœ ye na ga ndœ azœ dœ awa nœ Yisu Kristu.
1.18: Adja uzu bale wuwu Ndjaba nene, kashe Gbolo nœ Ndjaba tshebale á tshe kœdœ Ndjaba, yé á sœ awa bale dœ Abanœ, œshe dá yisœ Ndjaba fœ azœ. O'o á Yowane pa tœ upu nœ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 3.1-12; Mar 1.2-8; Luk 3.15-17)
1.19: Yé asœke kœdœ o'o á Yowane pa lima lɔkɔ á agbozu tshapa Ayuda á endje lœ lima lœ Yerusaleme vwa lima anganga Ndjaba œdœ pe alevite ndœ kœyu she adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ uzu ɗe e?»
1.20: Tshe vwavwara lima tœ ye tœ kœgi o'o nene, tshe pa lima o'ara adœke: «Mœ dœ́dœ́ Kristu nene.»
1.21: Á endje kœyu she adœke: «Ataa, ɓœ kœdœ má œɗe e? Œɓœ kœdœ Eliya a?» Á tshe kœgi adœke: «Mœ dœ́dœ́ she nene.» «Œɓœ kœdœ ayi kœgbara o'o a?» Á tshe kœgi adœke: «Œ̃.»
1.22: Endje kœpa fœ she adœke: «Atamœ, œɓœ kœdœ má ɗe e? Mbœrœ œ li adœke 'a gu dœ o'o fœ azu á endje vwa 'a. Ɓœ pa kotoo tœ zœ dœ tœ zœ a?»
1.23: Á tshe gi fœ endje adœke: «Œmœ kœdœ “tshama á sœ kœkɨ ɓa lœ kpagagasho adœke, 'e guma ala awa Gbozu!”» Ɓata ayi kœgbara o'o Isaya pa lima.
1.24: Andaa azu á endje vwa lima endje fœ Yowane kœdœ lima Afarisayi.
1.25: Endje kpa yu she adœke: «Œdœ ɓœ kœdœ́dœ́ Kristu nene, ɓœ dœ́dœ́ Eliya nene, á dœ́dœ́ ndje ayi kœgbara o'o nene, mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ sœ kœza batisimu fœ azu a?»
1.26: Yowane kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Mœ sœ kœza batisimu fœ azu ɓa la ungu. Kashe anga uzu bale sœ ugurutœ 'e á 'e wuwusœ ye nene,
1.27: tshe na manda mœ, yé mœ li kœzu uwu œrada nœ ye nene.»
1.28: Œneke kɔ mbœrœ lima tœ endje ɓa lœ Betani ɓa kele ungu Yɔrdane ɓa tœ osho á Yowane sœ lima kœza batisimu fœ azu tœnœ. Yisu kœdœ Aya Pata nœ Ndjaba
1.29: Osho kɔrɔ pa nœ, Yowane wu Yisu kœna ga ndœ ye á pa adœke: «Wu Aya Pata nœ Ndjaba á tshe gi ekperœ pa azu tshapashɔ.
1.30: Œshe dá mœ pa lima o'o tœ upu nœ ye adœke: “Anga uzu bale œ na manda mœ, kashe tshe ropa mœ ye; gbambanœ nene, utshunœ adœke mœ wuta ga pa ɔshɔ asœ, tshe sœ lima zœ.”
1.31: Œmœ ndje, mœ wuwu lima sœ ye nene, kashe mœ na kœza batisimu ɓa la ungu á kœmbœrœ adœke azu Israyele kœwusœ ye.»
1.32: Yowane kpa pa adœke: «Mœ wu Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ ɓata mbepa á tshe to ɓa lafo á jerœ kœsœ ga pa ye.
1.33: Yé mœ wuwu lima damba sœ ye nene, kashe Ndjaba á tshe vwa mœ ndœ kœza batisimu fœ azu ɓa la ungu dá pa fœ mœ adœke: “Uzu á ɓœ wu Ɨshirɨ kœjerœ kœsœ ga pa ye, œshe dá za batisimu nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ fœ azu.”
1.34: Yé œmœ, mœ wu lima yeka á sœ kœpa tœ upu nœ ye adœke, œshe kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba.» Ali ayambarœ nœ Yisu
1.35: Olo bale manda nœ, Yowane kpa sœ lima kpœtœ oshonœ asœmœ dœ anga ayambarœ nœ ye bisha.
1.36: Lɔkɔ á tshe wu Yisu kœro tœnœ, tshe pa adœke: «Wu Aya Pata nœ Ndjaba.»
1.37: Ayambarœ nœ Yowane dji o'onœ á tshe pa lima asœmœ yé œ na manda Yisu.
1.38: Yisu fatœ ye ngarrr œ wu, endje sœ kœna manda œne, á yu endje adœke: «'E sœ kœpara gaɗe?» Endje gi fœ she adœke: «Rabi, ɓœ sœ kœlo ɓata a?»
1.39: Tshe gi fœ endje adœke: «'E na gamœ yeka á kœwu.» Œ sœ lima ada ɔlɔ vana manda kakpi ɔlɔ. Endje na lima, œ wu osho á tshe sœ lima kœlo tœnœ, yé œ sœ lima kpœtœmœ awa bale dœ she.
1.40: Anga bale ugurutœ abishanœ á endje dji o'o ama Yowane, á na manda Yisu asœmœ kœdœ lima Andere, aya Shimu Petro.
1.41: Tshe na utshunœ œ gbɔ ayanœ dœ Shimu, á pa fœ she adœke: «'A gbɔ Masiya» – Œ yindœ kœpa adœke «Kristu». –
1.42: Tshe to Shimu na ga ndœ Yisu. Á Yisu kœshokɔ she kukuku, á kœpa adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ Shimu, gbolo nœ Yowane. Endje e ɓœ Sefase.» – Œ yindœ kœpa adœke «Petro». Yisu e Afilipo dœ Natanayele
1.43: Osho kɔrɔ pa nœ, Yisu gbe kœkwa ga lœ Galilayi. Tshe gbɔ lima Filipo á pa fœ she adœke: «Na manda mœ!»
1.44: Andaa Filipo kœdœ lima uzu tshalakpɨ Betesayida, osho á endje zu Andere œdœ Petro tœnœ.
1.45: Manda nœ, Filipo na œ gbɔ Natanayele á pa fœ she adœke: «'A gbɔ uzunœ á endje sú o'o lima tœ upu nœ ye ga la awa akwa nœ Moyize œdœ aayi kœgbara o'o: Œshe kœdœ Yisu, gbolo nœ Yozefu uzu tshalakpɨ Nazarete.»
1.46: Á Natanayele kœyu she adœke: «Lœ Nazarete, adja anga ɔtshɔrœ œ wuta zœ a?» Á Filipo kœpa fœ she adœke: «Na gamœ, yé œ wu.»
1.47: Yisu wu Natanayele kœna lima ga ndœ ye, á pa tœ ye adœke: «Tsheneke kœdœ adja uzu Israyele, tshe pa kolœ adja o'o fœ azu.»
1.48: Yeka á Natanayele kœyu she adœke: «Ɓœ wusœ mœ ɓata a?» Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Lɔkɔ á ɓœ sœ ɓa tshakudu ɔyɔ fige, mœ wu ɓœ utshunœ adœke Filipo e ɓœ.»
1.49: Natanayele kœpa fœ she adœke: «Rabi, ɓœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba, ɓœ kœdœ gbozugo nœ azu Israyele.»
1.50: Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ mbœrœ á mœ pa fœ ɓœ adœke mœ wu má ɓœ ɓa tshakudu ɔyɔ fige a? Ɓœ kpa wu ogboro œrœ á ropa œneke.»
1.51: Á Yisu kpa kœpa adœke: «Mœ pa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, 'e wu bala tshalafo kœkɔrɔ tœnœ dœ aandjelu nœ Ndjaba kœɔ kœjerœ pa Gbolo nœ uzu.»

2.1: Olo bisha manda nœ, angbo totœ sœ lima ɓa lapkɨ Kanana lœ ogo Galilayi. Ayi Yisu sœ lima ɓa zœ.
2.2: Yé endje e ndje lima Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye kœna ndœ angbonœ.
2.3: Ɓata vinu ka lima ye, ayi Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Azu kpa gugu dœ vinu nene.»
2.4: Kashe Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Yashe, o'o gaɗe tœ zœ dœ mœ a? Ada ɔlɔ nœ mœ lili damba nene.»
2.5: Ayinœ kœpa fœ azu kœmbœrœ akwa adœke: «'E mbœrœ œneke kɔ á tshe pa tœnœ fœ 'e adœke 'e mbœrœ.»
2.6: Ngarambo mindu dœ bale á endje mbœrœ dœ badja lœ lima kpœtœmœ. Ayuda mbœrœ lima ngarambonœ asœmœ mbœrœ kœdjutɔ dœ kotœ endje utshu kœ'e Ndjaba. Tshelœ ngarambo bale dœ bale li lima litere ndoo dœ kama bale (100).
2.7: Yisu pa fœ ayi akwa adœke: «'E su ungu pete ga lœ ngarambonœ asœke.» Endje su ungu ga lœ nœ yé œ su pete pete.
2.8: Á Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Ngɔngɔ asœke, 'e su, œ na dœ tœnœ fœ ayengɔ angbonœ.» Yé endje sú œ na dœ tœnœ fœ she.
2.9: Tshe dji ɔtshɔ ungunœ á wuta lima vinu. Tshe wuwu lima sœ osho á vinunœ to tœnœ nene, kashe ayi akwanœ á endje sú lima ungunœ, á na dœ tœnœ fœ she dá wu lima sœ nœ. Tshe e ndje yakoshe totœnœ,
2.10: á pa fœ she adœke: «Uzu kɔ te ɓalima tœ kœsu ala vinu fœ azu lœ angbo, yé azu kœndjo œrrr á kœmbœrœ endje yekane á aa su saɓala manda nœ. Kashe ɓœ gbɔndœ ala vinunœ œrrr ga tœ ngɔngɔ asœke a!»
2.11: Ali kœtetœ kœmbœrœ ambárá afá nœ Yisu sœ lima ɓa lakpɨ Kanana, lœ ogo Galilayi. Tshe ma lima mokɔ nœ ye lœ awa kœfa œrœnœ asœke, yé ayambarœ nœ ye sœ lima dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye.
2.12: Manda nœ, tshe jerœ lima ga lœ Kaparnawumu awa bale dœ ayinœ, dœ aayanœ œdœ pe ayambarœ nœ ye. Œndœ endje dɨdɨ lima ɓa zœ nene. Yisu gɔrɔ aayi kœka œrœ lœ anda Tepelo (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 21.12-17; Mar 11.15-17; Luk 19.45-46)
2.13: Ɓata olo angbo pake nœ Ayuda ndo lima ye, Yisu ɔ lima ga lœ Yerusaleme.
2.14: Kœli she ga lœ Tepelonœ atake, tshe gbɔ azu á endje lœ tœ kœka angombe, apata œdœ pe ambepa. Tshe gbɔ ndje lima azu kœyapa ngendja á endje lœ ga ɨndɨrɨ meza nœ endje.
2.15: Kœwu ataa, tshe mbœrœ ndjapa dœ uwu, œ gɔrɔ dœ endje kɔ, œdœ apata œdœ angombe nœ endje. Tshe gɨgɨ tshelœ ngendja nœ aayi kœyapa ngendja, œ ɨvwɨ meza nœ endje.
2.16: Tshe pa fœ aayi kœka ambepa adœke: «'E gitœ 'e dœ œrœ kɔ kpœke, 'e fafa anda nœ Aba mœ ɓata anda kœka œrœ nœ 'e lœnœ nene.»
2.17: Ayambarœ nœ ye kœgbe dœ o'onœ á endje sú ga la Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Uu Ndjaba, ayo á mœ sœ dœ tœnœ ga tœ anda nœ zœ ju mœ ɓata owo.»
2.18: Yé agbozu Ikrizia kœyu she adœke: «Ambárá afá gaɗe dá ɓœ mbœrœ yeka á kœma fœ 'a adœke ɓœ gbɔ awa ndœ kœmbœrœ œrœ atake a?»
2.19: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «'E ndɨ tshelœ anda Tepelo asœke, yé manda olo votɔ mœ kpa mɔ anganœ ga mangba nœ.»
2.20: Agbozu Ayudanœ kpa yu she adœke: «Endje mɔ anda Tepelo asœke manda ngbugu zazu bisha dœ mindu dœ bale (46), yé œɓœ á ɓœ sœ ke, ɓœ li tœ kœmɔ tœnœ manda olo votɔ a?»
2.21: Kashe Yisu pa lima tœ Tepelo nœ undu ye.
2.22: Œrrr manda nœ, dœ lɔkɔ á Ndjaba she lima Yisu lœ akuzu dá ayambarœ gbe dœ o'onœ á tshe pa lima tœnœ ataa. Endje yi lima ndœ o'o á Buku nœ Ndjaba pa œdœ pe o'onœ á tshe pa. Yisu wusœ lɔsu azœ
2.23: Lɔkɔ á Yisu sœ lima lœ Yerusaleme, dœ lɔndɔ angbo pake, azu ndjoro sœ lima dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye mbœrœ ambárá afá ndjoro á tshe sœ lima kœmbœrœ tœnœ.
2.24: Kashe Yisu zaza lima lɔsu ye ga pa endje nene mbœrœ tshe wu lima sœ endje dœ ɔtshɔnœ.
2.25: Ádá adœke endje pa lima o'o fœ she tœ upu nœ azu gugu nene, mbœrœ œshe dœ tœ ye tshe wu lima sœ o'o á sœ tœ lɔsu endje kɔ.

3.1: Anga yakoshe bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Nikodeme, sœ lima ugurutœ Afarisayi, yé œ dœ́ lima anga gbozu tshapa Ayuda.
3.2: Anga butshɔ bale, tshe na ga ndœ Yisu œ pa fœ she adœke: «Rabi, 'a wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba dá vwa ɓœ adœke ɓœ yisœ œrœ fœ 'a mbœrœ uzu œ li kœmbœrœ ambárá afá ɓata á ɓœ mbœrœ asœke œdœ Ndjaba kœsœsœ dœ she awa bale nene.»
3.3: Yé Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Mœ pa fœ ɓœ dœ adjapu adœke, uzu bale œ li kœwu Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba nene œdœ endje kpa kœzuzu she tœ bishanœ nene.»
3.4: Nikodeme kœyu she adœke: «Mara gaɗe dá uzu á tshe gbɔ ye á endje kpa zu she tœ bishanœ a?»
3.5: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Mœ pa fœ ɓœ dœ adjapu adœke, uzu bale lili tœ kœli ga lœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba nene œdœ endje kœzuzu she dœ awa nœ ungu œdœ ndje dœ awa nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ nene.
3.6: Œneke á to lœ undu uzu kœdœ undu uzu; yé œneke á to lœ Ɨshirɨ, kœdœ ɨshirɨ.
3.7: Uvuru zœ kpakpa lœ zœ nene mbœrœ o'onœ á mœ pa fœ ɓœ adœke: “Œ li adœke endje zu 'e lœ awa nœ tshalafo.”
3.8: Yugu sœ kœna tœ osho á yindœ nœ, yé ɓœ sœ kœdji œsœnœ kashe ɓœ wusœ osho á to tœnœ too osho á sœ kœna ga tœnœ nene. Asœke kœdœ mara œrœ á sœ kœmbœrœtœ ye mbœrœ uzu kɔ á endje zu she lœ awa nœ Ɨshirɨ.»
3.9: Á Nikodeme kœpa fœ she adœke: «Mara œrœ atake œ li kœmbœrœtœ ye koto o?»
3.10: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ ayi kœyisœrœ fœ azu Israyele yé ɓœ wuwusœ œrœnœ asœke nene a?
3.11: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ ɓœ dœ adjapu adœke: 'a sœ kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ œrœ á 'a wusœ nœ œdœ pe œneke á 'a wu, kashe 'e wu o'o nœ 'a gbambanœ.
3.12: Œdœ mœ kœpa o'o tœ œrœ á sœ kœmbœrœtœ ye pa ɔshɔ asœke fœ 'e á 'e kœdjidji mœ nene, 'e yi má ndœ o'o ama mœ kotoo œ kœsœ adœke mœ pa o'o tœ œrœ á mbœrœtœ ye ɓa lafo fœ 'e a?
3.13: Gbambanœ nene, uzu bale ɔɔ ɓa lafo nene, kolœ Gbolo nœ uzu á tshe to ɓa lafo á jerœ ga atɨ.
3.14: «Ɓata Moyize i lima anga yakoro á endje mbœrœ she de yarakowo ga tœ ɔyɔ ndœ kœtɨ she ga lafo ɓa lœ kpagagasho, awa bale azu œ za Gbolo nœ uzu œ tɨ she ga lafo,
3.15: yekane uzu kɔ á tshe sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye, tshe gbɔ soro neke á ka nene.
3.16: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba yindœ tshapashɔ waa yeka á vwa Gbolo nœ ye tshebale adœke uzu kɔ á tshe yindœ ye, tshe tshu nene, kashe tshe sœ dœ soro á ka nene.
3.17: Ndjaba vwavwa Gbolo nœ ye ga pa ɔshɔ mbœrœ kœwa ngbanga ga tœ tshapashɔ nene, kashe Ndjaba vwa she adœke tshapashɔ gbɔ kœshe lœ awa nœ ye.
3.18: «Uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye, Ndjaba œ wa ngbanga ga tœ ye nene. Kashe uzu á tshe kœsœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye nene, Ndjaba wa ɓalima o'o ga tœ ye yé mbœrœ á tshe sœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbolo tshebale nœ Ndjaba nene.
3.19: Yé ngbanga kœwa tœnœ dœke: Ɨngbɨsho na ga pa tshapashɔ, kashe azu yindœ ubu osho kœropa ɨngbɨsho, mbœrœ akwa tshelœ endje sœ tœ ekpenœ.
3.20: Atamœ, uzu kɔ á tshe sœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ, yiangba ɨngbɨsho. Tshe na ga ndœ ɨngbɨsho nene kparawa adœke ekperœ nœ œne wuta ngbɨ ga ushu.
3.21: Kashe uzu á tshe te manda adja o'o, sœ kœna ga ndœ ɨngbɨsho adœke endje wu ngbɨ adœke akwa á tshe sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ sœ kœlɨsœ Ndjaba.» Yisu œdœ Yowane
3.22: Manda nœ, Yisu na awa bale dœ ayambarœ nœ ye ga lœ ogo Yuda. Tshe lo lima awa bale dœ endje ɓa zœ yé œ sœ kœza lima batisimu fœ azu.
3.23: Yowane za ndje lima batisimu fœ azu ɓa lakpɨ Eno ndoo dœ Salime mbœrœ ungu lœ lima kpœtœmœ waa. Azu sœ lima kœna ga ndœ ye yé œ sœ kœgbɔ batisimu.
3.24: Andaa, endje zaza lima damba Yowane ga lœ kánga nene.
3.25: Ɔlɔ bale, anga ayambarœ nœ Yowane te lima tœ kœgbugburu tshelœ o'o dœ anga uzu Yuda bale tœ upu nœ kœdjutɔ kote utshu nœ kœ'e Ndjaba.
3.26: Endje na lima ga ndœ Yowane, œ yu lima she adœke: «Rabi, uzu á tshe sœ lima dœ ɓœ ɓa atshi ungu Yɔrdane, œshe á ɓœ pa o'o tœ upu nœ ye asœmœ; wusœ nœ adœke, tshe sœ ndje kœza batisimu fœ azu yé azu kɔ sœ kœna ga ndœ ye.»
3.27: Yowane gi fœ endje adœke: «Uzu gbɔ kolœ œrœ á Ndjaba œ to fœ she.»
3.28: E'e dœ tœ 'e, 'e li kœpandœ nœ adœke 'e dji lima mœ kœpa adœke: «Mœ dœ́dœ́ Kristu nene, kashe Ndjaba vwa mœ kœwuta utshunœ adœke tshe na.»
3.29: Ayi kœto yashe kœdœ akɔ yashe. Kashe yanga ayi kœto yashe œ ka kpœ ɨndɨrɨ ye yeka á dji she. Tshe sœ dœ yanga tœ kœdji tshadɔngɔrɔ ayi kœto yashenœ. Yanganœ asœmœ kœdœ œnœ mœ, yé lɔsu mœ sú ngɔngɔ asœ dœ tœnœ pete.
3.30: Œ li adœke uzunœ asœmœ wuta egerœ uzu, yé mœ sœ œnœ mœ teasho. Uzu á tshe to ɓa lafo
3.31: «Uzu á tshe to ɓa lafo ropa œrœ kɔ. Uzu tshapashɔ kœdœ uzu tshapashɔ yé tshe pa kolœ o'o tshapashɔ. Tsheneke á tshe to ɓa lafo,
3.32: tshe sœ kœpa o'o tœ œrœ á tshe wu yé á dji. Kashe uzu bale yiyindœ œneke á tshe sœ kœmɨndœ nœ nene.
3.33: Uzu á tshe kœyindœ o'o nœ ye, uzunœ asœmœ yi ndje ndœ nœ adœke Ndjaba pa kolœ adja o'o.
3.34: Tsheneke á Ndjaba vwa she pa kolœ o'o nœ Ndjaba mbœrœ Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba sœ lœ ye.
3.35: Ndjaba Aba yindœ Gbolo nœ ye, yé œ za she tœ gbozu tshapa œrœ kɔ.
3.36: Uzu á tshe sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Gbolonœ asœke, tshe gbɔ soro á ka nene. Kashe tsheneke á tshe kœvwaratœ ye tœ kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Gbolonœ, tshe gbɔ soronœ nene, yé ókó nœ Ndjaba œ sœ waa pa ye.»

4.1: Afarisayi dji lima ndœ nœ adœke Yisu sœ lima dœ ayambarœ waa yé œ sœ kœza batisimu fœ azu kœropa Yowane.
4.2: Kashe Yisu dœ tœ ye zaza lima batisimu fœ azu nene, ayambarœ nœ ye dá sœ lima kœza batisimunœ.
4.3: Ɔlɔ á Yisu dji o'onœ á endje sœ lima kœpa tœnœ, tshe katœ ogo Yuda tɨ yé œ gu ga lœ Galilayi.
4.4: Andaa tœ kœgu she ga zœ, œ li lima adœke tshe ro tɔ lœ ogo Samariya.
4.5: Tshe wuta ndoo dœ anga tshalakpɨ Samariya á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Sishare. Sishare sœ ndoo dœ kɨndɨ á Yakobo za lima fœ gbolo nœ ye dœ Yozefu.
4.6: Œtœnœ kœdœ ndje osho á kudu ungu nœ Yakobo sœ tœnœ. Yisu mɔ lœ ana, yé œ sœ ga atɨ ga tœ ama kudu ungunœ. Œ sœ lima ndoo dœ kakpi ɔlɔ.
4.7: Anga yashe Samariya bale na ndœ kœsu ungu á Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Su ungu fœ mœ dœ mœ ndjo.»
4.8: Ayambarœ nœ ye kɔ wuta lima ga lœ ongbo mbœrœ kœpara kœzɨrœ.
4.9: Yashe Samariyanœ kœpa fœ Yisu adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ uzu Yuda, mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ eshondœ ungu kœndjo ɓa ndœ œmœ dœ́ uzu Samariya?» Mbœrœ Ayuda mbœmbœrœ ɓalima ayo dœ Asamariya nene ma!
4.10: Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Œdœ ɓœ kœwu má sœ œrœ á Ndjaba œ to, œdœ pe uzu á tshe esho ndœ ungu kœndjo ndœ zœ asœke; œɓœ dá yu má she ndœ ungu yeka á tshe su má ungu á za soro fœ azu fœ ɓœ.»
4.11: Yashe Samariya kœyu she adœke: «Gbozu, ɓœ sœsœ dœ œrœ kœsu dœ ungu nene, yé kudu ungunœ li waa, ataa ɓœ gbɔ ungu á za soro fœ azu ɓata ma a?
4.12: Ata 'a dœ Yakobo dá za kudu ungunœ asœke fœ 'a. Tshe ndjo ndje lima ungunœ œshe dœ agbolo nœ ye œdœ pe ayarœ nœ ye. Ataa ɓœ gbe adœke ɓœ ropa ye ye a?»
4.13: Yisu gi fœ she adœke: «Uzu kɔ á tshe ndjo ungu asœke, tshe kpa sœ dœ ogo ungu.
4.14: Kashe uzu á tshe ndjo ungu á mœ su fœ she, tshe kpa sœ dœ ogo ungu nene. Gbambanœ nene, ungu á mœ su fœ she œ sœ lœ ye ɓata kumu ungu á za soro á ka nene.»
4.15: Yashe Samariya kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, su ungunœ á ɓœ pa tœnœ asœke fœ mœ, adœke ogo ungu kpa mimi mœ nene yé mœ kpa nana kpœke ndœ kœsu ungu nene.»
4.16: Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Na œ e akɔ zœ dœ́ 'e kwatœ 'e dœ she ɓa ke.»
4.17: Yashe Samariya pa fœ she adœke: «Mœ gugu dœ yakoshe nene.» Á Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Adjapu adœke ɓœ gugu dœ yakoshe nene.
4.18: Gbambanœ nene, ɓœ ɨ ayakoshe mindu yé tsheneke á ɓœ sœ dœ she ngɔngɔ asœke dœ́dœ́ akɔ zœ nene. Ɓœ pa adja o'o.»
4.19: Á yashe kœkɨ paa adœke: «Gbozu, mœ wu adœke œɓœ kœdœ ayi kœgbara o'o.
4.20: Aata 'a donga Ndjaba pa kaga asœke, kashe e'e dœ́ Ayuda, 'e pa adœke osho á li kœdonga Ndjaba tœnœ kœdœ Yerusaleme.»
4.21: Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Yashe, dji mœ kane. Anga ɔlɔ œ tɔ á 'e kpa donga Ndjaba Aba ɓa pa kaga too ɓa lœ Yerusaleme nene.
4.22: E'e dœ́ Asamariya, 'e sœ kœdonga Ndjaba kashe 'e wuwusœ ye nene. Kashe a'a dœ́ Ayuda, 'a sœ kœdonga Ndjaba neke á 'a wusœ ye mbœrœ kœshe wuta lœ awa nœ Ayuda.
4.23: Kashe dœ anga ɔlɔ bale, yé ɔlɔnœ tɔ ye, adja azu kœdonga Ndjaba, endje donga she dœ Ɨshirɨ œdœ pe lœ adjapu. Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba yindœ nœ adœke azu donga œne dœ maranœ asœmœ.
4.24: Ndjaba kœdœ Ɨshirɨ, yé endje á endje yindœ kœdonga she li kœdonga she dœ Ɨshirɨ œdœ pe lœ adjapu.»
4.25: Yashe Samariya kœpa fœ she adœke: «Mœ wusœ nœ adœke Masiya, á tshe kœdœ Kristu, œ na zœ. Ɔlɔ á tshe kœna, tshe mɨndœ œrœ kɔ.»
4.26: Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Œmœ kœdœ she, œmœ á mœ sœ kœpa o'onœ fœ ɓœ asœke.»
4.27: Dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, ayambarœ nœ Yisu yi kumu endje, yé uvuru endje kpa lœ nœ tœ kœwu adœke tshe sœ kœpa o'o dœ yashe. Kashe anga bale yuyu she nene adœke: «Ɓœ sœ kœpara gaɗe e? Too o'o gaɗe dá 'e sœ kœpa dœ she a?»
4.28: Yé yashenœ katœ lɔsú ungu nœ ye tɨ kpœtœmœ, yé á kpagu kœpandœ nœ fœ azu ɓa lakpɨ adœke:
4.29: «'E na dœ́ wu anga yakoshe bale á tshe sœ ɓa e kane, tshe pandœ œrœ kɔkɔ á mœ mbœrœ fœ mœ. Œrrr á tshe dœ ete Kristu a?»
4.30: Ataa, azu wuta lœ ongbo, œ na ga ndœ ye.
4.31: Kolœ kpœtœmœ, ayambarœ nœ ye tetœ kœtovworogbo she adœke tshe zɨ œrœ. Endje pa fœ she adœke: «Rabi, zɨ rœgo kane.»
4.32: Kashe Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Mœ sœ dœ kœzɨrœ á 'e wuwusœ nœ nene.»
4.33: Ayambarœ kœtetœ kœyutœ endje ugurutœ endje adœke: «Ataa anga uzu na dœ kœzɨrœ fœ she a?»
4.34: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Kœzɨrœ nœ mœ dœke: œ li adœke mœ mbœrœ œrœ á ayi kœvwa mœ yindœ nœ, œdœ ndje kœgi akwa á tshe vwa mœ ndœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ.
4.35: E'e, 'e sœ kœpa adœke: “Œ sœpe yapu vana tœ kœkɔ ngwarœ.” Kashe œmœ, mœ pa fœ 'e adœke, 'e wu kɨndɨ dœ ɔtshɔnœ; leyɔ doro ye œ sœ ndoo tœ kœkɔ tœnœ!
4.36: Uzu á tshe kœkɔ, tshe gbɔ ngendja tshangba akwa nœ ye, yé tshe ngbɔɓa leyɔnœ mbœrœ soro á ka nene. Uzu á tshe lu leyɔ ga lœ kɨndɨ dœ pe tsheneke á tshe kɔ, endje sœ dœ yanga awa bale.
4.37: Gbambanœ nene, azu pa anga gbaguru adœke: “Uzu gɨ ngwarœ kashe ayi kœkɔ tœnœ sœ kpi”.
4.38: Mœ vwa 'e ndœ kœkɔ leyɔ tshelœ kɨndɨ á œ dœ́dœ́ 'e dá djo nene. Anga angbɨ azu dá djo kɨndɨnœ yeka á 'e li ga lœ akwanœ manda endje tœ kœkɔ leyɔnœ.»
4.39: Ɨlɨ azu Samariya kpœlœ ongbonœ asœmœ sœ lima dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu mbœrœ o'o á yashenœ pa adœke: «Tshe pandœ œrœ kɔ á mœ mbœrœ, fœ mœ.»
4.40: Ádánœ ataa, lɔkɔ azu Samariya na lima ga ndœ ye, endje kɨ lima ga tœ ye adœke tshe sœpe dœ œne. Yisu mbœrœ lima kpœtœmœ olo bisha.
4.41: Anga azu kpi ndjoro kpa sœ ndje lima dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu mbœrœ o'o á tshe sœ lima kœpa tœnœ dœ tœ ye.
4.42: Endje pa lima fœ yashenœ adœke: «Ngɔngɔ asœ, 'a sœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye kolœ mbœrœ o'o á ɓœ pa fœ 'a nene. 'A sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye mbœrœ 'a dji ndje o'o á tshe pa dœ tœ ye. Yé 'a wusœ nœ adœke œshe kœdœ adja ayi kœshe azu tshapashɔ.» Yisu she gbolo nœ anga gbozu akwa nœ lita (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 8.5-13; Luk 7.1-10)
4.43: Manda kœlo olo bisha kpœtœmœ, Yisu áafo œ na ga lœ Galilayi.
4.44: Tshe pa lima dœ tœ ye adœke: «Azu lɨlɨsœ ayi kœgbara o'o ɓa lœ ogo nœ ye nene.»
4.45: Ɔlɔ á tshe wuta ga lœ Galilayi, azu sœ dœ yanga mbœrœ kœwuta she ga lœ ogo nœ endje; mbœrœ á endje na ndje lima ndœ angbo pake ɓa lœ Yerusaleme, yé œ wu œrœ kɔ á tshe mbœrœ lima.
4.46: Tshe kwa lima tœ ye ga lakpɨ Kanana lœ ogo Galilayi ɓa tœ osho á tshe fa lima ungu tœ vinu. Ɓa zœ, anga gbozu tshapa akwa nœ lita bale lakpɨ Kaparnawumu sœ lima dœ gbolo yakoshe nœ ye á tshe sœ dœ koɓa.
4.47: Ɔlɔ á tshe dji adœke Yisu to ɓa lœ ogo Yuda œ na ga lœ Galilayi, tshe na ga ndœ ye, yé œ kɨ fœ she adœke tshe na œ she gbolo nœ œne á tshe yindœ kœtshu tœnœ.
4.48: Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Œdœ 'e kœdjidji má ndœ ambárá afá œdœ pe ɔtshɔ akwa á azu pandœ nœ gooo asœke nene, 'e sœ má dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ nene.»
4.49: Yé gbozu akwa nœ litanœ pa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, wuta ga ndœ mœ utshunœ adœke gbolo nœ mœ kœtshu.»
4.50: Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke «Gu zœ, gbolo nœ zœ she ye.» Yakoshe kœyindœ o'o á Yisu pa fœ she, yé œ gu da ye.
4.51: Tshe sœ damba tœ awa kœgu she atake, aayi akwa nœ ye kœna para tshatshu ye á kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gbolo nœ zœ she ɓamama ye.»
4.52: Tshe yu endje adœke, gbolo nœ œne she dœ ada ɔlɔ gaɗe e? Endje kœpa fœ she adœke: «Ada ɔlɔ bale manda kakpi ɔlɔ libi dá koɓanœ katœ ye.»
4.53: Aba gbolonœ kœwusœ nœ adœke kolœ dœ ada ɔlɔnœ asœmœ libi dá Yisu pa fœ œne adœke: «Gbolo nœ zœ she ye.» Ataa, œshe dœ pe azu tshasœnda nœ ye kɔ endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu.
4.54: Asœ kœdœ bisha ambárá afá á Yisu mbœrœ lɔkɔ á tshe to ɓa lœ Yuda á kwatœ ye ga lœ ogo Galilayi.

5.1: Manda nœ, anga angbo nœ Ayuda sœ lima ɓa lœ Yerusaleme, yé Yisu na ga tœnœ.
5.2: Andaa ɓa lœ ongbonœ, endje dji lima ungu kœdjutɔ kotœ azu á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ dœ o'o ama Ayuda kœdœ Betezata ndoo dœ manda gbagba nœ apata. Awa kœna ga tœ ungunœ sœ lima mindu,
5.3: yé aayi koɓa ndjoro lo lima lœ ala awanœ asœmœ: Ayibula, azu á tshakala ada endje ndɨ œdœ pe endjeneke á ada endje tshu. [Endje sœ lima kœkate yakpa ungunœ kœturu tœnœ;
5.4: gbambanœ nene, anganœ andjelu sœ lima kœjerœ tœnœ yé œ sœ lima kœturu tœ ungu. Yekane ali ayi koɓa á tshe kœjerœ ga lœ yakpa ungunœ, tshe she lima lœ koɓa nœ ye. Œdœ koɓanœ kœdœ lima koɓa gaɗe gbaa, œ katœ ye .]
5.5: Anga yakoshe bale á tshe lo lima dœ koɓa ngbugu zazu bale dœ ndjokpa dœ mindu dœ amanœ votɔ (38) sœ lima kpœtœmœ.
5.6: Yisu wu she á tshe lo ga atɨ yé kœdji adœke œndœ ye dɨ dœ koɓa tɔpanœ kpuru, tshe kœpa fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ yindœ kœshe tœnœ ye a?»
5.7: Ayi koɓanœ kœgi o'o fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, mœ gugu dœ uzu á tshe kœnduru mœ ga la ngunœ lɔkɔ á yakpa ungunœ œ tetœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ nene. Mœ kœgea œrrr adœke mœ wuta ga zœ atake, anga uzu jerœ ga la nœ utshu mœ ye.»
5.8: Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Aalafo, œ za kondja nœ zœ œ na ana.»
5.9: Trale ayi koɓa kœshe ye. Tshe áafo, œ za kondja nœ ye, yé œ tetœ ana. Andaa œrœnœ asœmœ kɔ mbœrœ lima tœ endje dœ lɔkɔ sabata.
5.10: Ayuda kœpa fœ uzunœ á Yisu she she adœke: «Asœke kœdœ lɔkɔ sabata, œ lili adœke ɓœ za kondja nœ zœ yé œ na ana dœ tœnœ nene.»
5.11: Kashe tshe gi fœ endje adœke: «Uzunœ á tshe she mœ lœ koɓanœ asœke, œshe dá pa fœ mœ adœke mœ za kondja nœ mœ, yé œ na ana.»
5.12: Endje kœyu she adœke: «Yakoshenœ á tshe pa fœ ɓœ adœke ɓœ za kondja nœ zœ, yé œ na ana asœmœ kœdœ œɗe e?»
5.13: Kashe ayikoɓanœ á Yisu she she kpa wuwu lima sœ ye nene mbœrœ tshe wuta lima œnœ ye lœ ukpulu azunœ á endje sœ lima kpœtœmœ ye.
5.14: Œrrr manda nœ, Yisu kœgbɔ she ɓa lœ anda Tepelo á kœpa fœ she adœke: «Wu, ɓœ she ngɔngɔ asœ ye. Kpa mbœmbœrœ ekperœ nene kparawa adœke ɓœ kpa gbɔ anga ɔgbɔ koɓa kœropa œneke nene.»
5.15: Yakoshe kœna, œ kœpandœ nœ fœ Ayuda adœke Yisu dá she œne.
5.16: Kotœ lœ kumunœ, Ayuda para lima awa kœza o'o fœ Yisu mbœrœ á tshe mbœrœ œrœnœ asœmœ dœ lɔkɔ Sabata.
5.17: Kashe Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Aba mœ sœ kœmbœrœ akwa œrrr kpesheke, yé œmœ ndje mœ sœ tœ kœmbœrœ akwa.»
5.18: Manda o'onœ á tshe pa asœmœ, Ayuda para lima awa adœke œne wo she. Œ dœ́dœ́ kolœ mbœrœ á tshe mbœrœ akwa dœ lɔkɔ sabata nene, kashe mbœrœ á tshe pa ndje adœke Ndjaba kœdœ adja Aba œne, á zatœ ye adœke œne li dœ she. Tshagbozu nœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba
5.19: Yisu za o'o yé œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Mœ pa fœ e dœ adjapu adœke, Gbolo nœ Ndjaba lili kœmbœrœ œrœ á to tœ lɔsu ye dœ tœ ye nene, kashe tshe mbœrœ œrœ á tshe wu abanœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ. Gbambanœ nene, œrœ á Aba œ mbœrœ dá Gbolo œ mbœrœ adja tœnœ.
5.20: Mbœrœ Aba yindœ Gbolo, tshe sœ kœyisœ œneke kɔ á tshe mbœrœ fœ she. Tshe kpa yisœ ogboro œrœ kœropa œneke fœ she adœke 'e kœwu, uvuru 'e kpa lœ nœ.
5.21: Ɓata Aba œ she akuzu á za soro fœ endje, awa bale Gbolo œ za soro fœ azu neke á tshe yindœ kœza fœ endje.
5.22: Aba œ wa ngbanga ga tœ uzu bale nene, kashe tshe za Gbolo nœ ye tœ gbozu kœwa ngbanga pa azu,
5.23: adœke azu kɔ lɨsœ Gbolo ɓata á endje lɨ ndje œsœ Abanœ. Uzu á tshe kœlɨlɨsœ Gbolo nene, tshe lɨlɨ ndje œsœ Abanœ á tshe vwa she nene.
5.24: «Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke uzu á tshe dji o'o ama mœ, á tshe kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ tsheneke á tshe vwa mœ asœke, uzunœ sœ dœ soro á ka nene. Mœ wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ ye nene, kashe tshe wuta lœ kuzu, yé tshe sœ dœ soro.
5.25: Mœ pa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, lɔndɔnœ sœ kœna tœnœ, yé œ na ngɔngɔ asœ ye, akuzu œ dji tshama Gbolo nœ Ndjaba. Yé endjeneke á endje dji tshama ye, endje sœ dœ soro.
5.26: Gbambanœ nene, ɓata Aba kœdœ soro dœ tœ ye, awa bale tshe za fœ Gbolo kœdœ soro dœ tœ ye.
5.27: Yé tshe za Gbolo tœ gbozu kœwa ngbanga pa azu mbœrœ œshe kœdœ Gbolo nœ uzu.
5.28: «Adja 'e koko ama 'e tɨ ɔsɔ nene! Gbambanœ nene, anga ɔlɔ sœ kœna tœnœ, á akuzu kɔ á endje sœ lœ koto œ dji tshama ye,
5.29: yeka endjeneke á endje mbœrœ lima ɔtshɔrœ, Ndjaba œ she endje mbœrœ kœgbɔ soro, kashe endjeneke á endje mbœrœ ekperœ, Ndjaba œ she endje adœke Gbolo nœ uzu wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga pa endje.
5.30: «Œmœ, mœ lili kœmbœrœ œrœ á to ɓa lɔsu mœ dœ tœ mœ nene. Mœ wa ngbanga kœli dœ œneke á mœ sœ kœdji tœnœ yé kœwa ngbanga nœ mœ sœ ndjii mbœrœ mœ sœsœ kœpara awa kœmbœrœ œrœ á to ɓa lɔsu mœ nene, kashe œneke á lɔsu ayi kœvwa mœ yindœ nœ.» Œrœ á má adœke Ndjaba vwa Yisu
5.31: «Œdœ mœ kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ mœ dœ tœ mœ, uzu bale á tshe dji mœ gugu nene.
5.32: Kashe œdœ anga angbɨ uzu kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ mœ, mœ wusœ nœ adœke o'onœ á tshe pa tœ upu nœ mœ asœmœ dœ́ adja o'o.
5.33: 'E vwa lima azu fœ Yowane, yé tshe pa lima o'o tœ upu nœ adja o'o.
5.34: Tœ œmœ, mœ sœsœ dœ ogo adœke uzu pa o'o tœ upu nœ mœ nene, kashe mœ sœ kœpa o'o ataa adœke 'e gbɔ kœshe.
5.35: Yowane sœ lima ɓata miinda á endje ta owo ga tœ nœ yé á tshi. 'E yi lima ndœ kœsœ dœ yanga lœ anga osho tœ ɨshirɨ ye.
5.36: Andaa, mœ sœ dœ anga œrœ á pa o'o tœ upu nœ mœ á ropa o'o á Yowane pa. Œtœnœ kœdœ akwa á Aba za fœ mœ adœke mœ mbœrœ. Mœ sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ yé œtœnœ dá sœ kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ mœ adœke Aba vwa mœ.
5.37: «Aba á tshe vwa mœ pa o'o tœ upu nœ mœ dœ tœ ye. Kashe bale 'e djidji tshama ye yé 'e wuwu tshatshu ye nene,
5.38: yé 'e sœsœ kœgbɔndœ o'o ama ye ga tœ lɔsu 'e nene mbœrœ á 'e sœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ayi avwa nœ ye nene.
5.39: 'E sœ kœyamba Buku nœ Ndjaba mbœrœ á 'e gbe kœgbɔ soro á ka nene lœ awanœ: Andaa, œtœnœ dá sœ kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ mœ.
5.40: Yé 'e yiyindœ kœna ga ndœ mœ yeka á kœgbɔ adja soro nene.
5.41: «Mœ gbegbe adœke azu donga mœ nene.
5.42: Kashe mœ wusœ 'e ye. 'E sœsœ dœ kœyindœsho ga ndœ Ndjaba nene.
5.43: Aba mœ dá vwa mœ yé 'e vwaratœ 'e kœza osho kœsœ fœ mœ. Kashe œdœ anga uzu kœna dœ mara nœ ye dœ tœ ye bale, 'e za osho kœsœ fœ she ye.
5.44: 'E yindœ kœdonga kolœ anga 'e, yé á endje kœdonga ndje 'e. Kashe 'e papara awa adœke kolœ Ndjaba kœdonga 'e nene asœke, ataa 'e sœ má dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ koto o?
5.45: Kashe 'e gbegbe adœke mœ va ɔtɔ 'e fœ Aba mœ nene. Kolœ Moyize á 'e ko lima lɔsu 'e ga tœ ye asœmœ, œshe dá va ɔtɔ 'e.
5.46: Œdœ 'e kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Moyize, 'e sœ má ndje dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ mbœrœ tshe sú mbetinœ tœ upu nœ mœ.
5.47: Kashe ɓata 'e yiyindœ o'o á tshe sú nene, 'e yi má ndœ o'o ama mœ koto o?»

6.1: Manda nœ, Yisu zu ga atshi egerœ ungu adanga Galilayi á anga ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ ndje Tiberiade.
6.2: Azu ndjoro sœ lima kœna manda ye mbœrœ á endje wu ambárá afá á tshe sœ lima kœmbœrœ tœnœ lœ kœshe aayi koɓa asœmœ.
6.3: Mbœrœ tœnœ atamœ, Yisu ɔ ga pa kaga yé œ sœ ga atɨ awa bale dœ ayambarœ nœ ye.
6.4: Œ sœ lima ndoo dœ Pake á dœ́ angbo nœ Ayuda.
6.5: Yisu mesho, œ wu azu ndjoro á endje sœ tœ kœna ga ndœ ye. Á kœyu Filipo adœke: «A yɔ kœzɨrœ kpœta yeka á to fœ azunœ asœke á endje kœzɨ a?»
6.6: Tshe yu lima oshonœ ataa tœ kœwu lɔsu Filipo, gbambanœ nene, tshe wu lima sœ œrœ á li adœke tshe mbœrœ ye.
6.7: Filipo kœgi fœ she adœke: «Œdœ a kœyɔ ndje kœzɨrœ mangba denari kama bisha gbaa, œ li adœke uzu dœ uzu gbɔ teasho teasho nene.»
6.8: Yé anga yambarœ bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Andere, aya Shimu Petro kœpa fœ she adœke:
6.9: «Anga ovoro gbolo yakoshe kpœke sœ dœ mapa mindu á endje mbœrœ dœ zuwa orje œdœ pe ageatshalangu bisha kashe œ li mbœrœ azunœ kɔkɔ asœke za a?»
6.10: Yisu kœpa adœke: «'E pa fœ azu adœke endje lœ ga atɨ.» Yé endje kœsœ ga atɨ ga pa gusu á sœ lima yaba yaba kpœtœmœ. Ayakoshe sœ lima ga pa œrœ nœ́ kutu mindu (5.000).
6.11: Yeka á Yisu ko mapanœ, á za avwala fœ Ndjaba, á kurutshelœnœ tœ azu á endje lœ lima kpœtœmœ. Tshe kpa ko ndje ageatshalangunœ, œ mbœrœ ndje awa bale, yé endje zɨ kœli dœ ogo nœ endje.
6.12: Ɓata uvu azu su ye, Yisu pa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «'E ngbɔɓa udu œrœ á sœpe manda endje ga tœnœ adœke anganœ teasho yiyiwa nene.»
6.13: Endje ngbɔɓa ama udu œrœnœ, yé kingi ndjokpa dœ bisha sú dœ ndɨndɨ mapa manda azunœ á endje zɨ lima.
6.14: Azu wu ambárá afá á Yisu mbœrœ asœmœ œ pa adœke: «Adjapu, tsheneke kœdœ adja ayi kœgbara o'o nœ Ndjaba á tshe sœ kœna ga pa ɔshɔ.»
6.15: Ɓata á Yisu wu lima sœ nœ adœke endje yindœ kœna kœza œne tœ ɔgbɔnœ adœke œne te gbozugo, tshe gi lima tœ ye kpœtœmœ, yé œ ɔ dœ kutɨ ye ga pa kaga. Yisu na pa ungu dœ ada ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 14.22-33; Mar 6.45-53)
6.16: Lɔkɔ á osho tetœ kœte mburumburu, ayambarœ nœ ye jerœ ga tœ mangu egerœ ungu adanga,
6.17: endje ɔ lima ga lœ agba bale mbœrœ kœna ga lœ Kaparnawumu, ɓa atshi ungunœ. Osho bu lima ye, yé Yisu yiyi lima damba kumu ye ga ndœ endje nene.
6.18: Egerœ yugu na kpɨkpɨkpɨ, yé loko za tshalangu djigi.
6.19: Ayambarœ i kayi œ vwi endje tœ mangu ga tœ œrœ nœ́ kelometere ndoo dœ mindu too mindu dœ bale, á endje kœwu Yisu kœna pa ungu gutœnœ ga tœ egerœ agba, yé awa litœ endje.
6.20: Á Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Œmœ dœmœ, awa mbœmbœrœ 'e nene!»
6.21: Endje yi lima ndœ nœ adœke tshe ɔ ga lœ egerœ agbanœ, kashe katsha, kumu egerœ agbanœ za ama osho ga tœ mangu á endje gbe lima kœna ga tœnœ. Azu ndjoro para Yisu
6.22: Osho kɔrɔpa nœ, azunœ ndjoro á endje sœpe lima ɓa atshi ungunœ wusœ nœ adœke egerœ agba sœpe bale yé Yisu ɔɔ lima ga lœ egerœ agba awa bale dœ ayambarœ nœ ye nene. Endje zu lima ungunœ dœ kutɨ endje.
6.23: Kashe anga ogboro agba to ɓa lakpɨ Tiberiade, yé œ na ndoo dœ oshonœ á endje zɨ lima mapa tœnœ manda kœza mershe nœ Gbozu Yisu fœ Ndjaba.
6.24: Lɔkɔ á ukpulu azu wu adœke Yisu œdœ ayambarœ nœ ye sœsœ kpœtœmœ nene, endje ɔ ga lœ ogboro agbanœ asœmœ œ ro ga lœ Kaparnawumu mbœrœ kœpara Yisu. Yisu kœdœ kœzɨrœ á za soro
6.25: Endje gbɔ she ɓa atshi ungunœ, yé á yu she adœke: «Rabi, ɓœ wuta kpœke dœ ada ɔlɔ koto o?»
6.26: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Mœ pa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, 'e para awa mœ mbœrœ á 'e zɨ mapa á le 'e, kashe 'e papara mœ mbœrœ á 'e wu ambárá afá á mœ mbœrœ nene.
6.27: Adja 'e mbœmbœrœ akwa mbœrœ kœgbɔ kœzɨrœ á ndɨ nene, kashe 'e mbœrœ akwa mbœrœ kœgbɔ kœzɨrœ á œndœnœ œ dɨ, yé á to soro á ka nene fœ azu. Gbolo nœ uzu dá to kœzɨrœnœ asœmœ fœ 'e mbœrœ œshe dá Aba dœ Ndjaba za she ga pa ngande tshagbozu.»
6.28: Endje kœgi fœ she adœke: «Œ li adœke 'a mbœrœ gaɗe tœ kœmbœrœ akwa á Ndjaba yindœ nœ a?»
6.29: Tshe kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Akwa á Ndjaba yindœ nœ adœke 'e mbœrœ, kœdœ kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ tsheneke á tshe vwa she.»
6.30: Endje kpa kœyu she adœke: «Kashe œɓœ a, ambárá afá gaɗe dá ɓœ mbœrœ yeka á 'a kœwu yekane á kœyindœ o'o ama zœ a? Akwa gaɗe dá ɓœ mbœrœ a?
6.31: Aata 'a zɨ liya mane ɓa lœ kpagagasho ɓata á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: “Tshe to kœzɨrœ á dœ mapa á to ɓa lafo fœ endje.”»
6.32: Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Mœ pa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, œ dœ́dœ́ Moyize dá to mapanœ á to liya ɓa lafo fœ 'e nene, kashe Aba mœ dá sœ kœto adja mapa á to ɓa lafo fœ 'e asœmœ.
6.33: Gbambanœ nene, kœzɨrœ á Ndjaba œ to, kœdœ œneke á to ɓa lafo yé á za soro fœ azu tshapashɔnœ asœke.»
6.34: Azunœ kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, to kolœ kœzɨrœnœ asœmœ sheko fœ 'a.»
6.35: Yé Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Œmœ kœdœ kœzɨrœ á za soro fœ azu. Uzu á tshe kœna ga ndœ mœ, ogo œ mi she bale nene yé uzu á tshe sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ, ogo ungu kpa mi she bale nene.
6.36: Kashe mœ pa fœ 'e adœke: 'E wu mœ tako, yé 'e sœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ nene.
6.37: Azu neke á Aba ko endje fœ mœ, endje na ga ndœ mœ yé uzu á tshe na ga ndœ mœ, mœ za bala she vwi'i nene.
6.38: Gbambanœ nene, mœ toto ɓa lafo œ jerœ tœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á lɔsu mœ yindœ nœ nene, kashe mœ na mbœrœ kœmbœrœ œneke á lɔsu ayi kœvwa mœ yindœ nœ.
6.39: Œrœ á lɔsu ayi kœvwa mœ yindœ nœ adœke mœ mbœrœ dœke: Adja anga uzu bale ugurutœ azu á tshe ko endje fœ mœ yiyiwa nene kashe mœ she endje lœ kuzu dœ ndɔngɔlɔ olo.
6.40: Œrœ á lɔsu Aba mœ yindœ nœ kœdœ adœke, uzu á tshe kœwu gbolo nœ ye, á kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye, tshe gbɔ soro á ka nene, yé mœ she she lœ akuzu dœ ndɔngɔlɔ olo.»
6.41: Tɨ kpœtœmœ, Ayuda kœtetœ kœpulœma endje mbœrœ o'o á Yisu pa adœke: «Œmœ kœdœ kœzɨrœ á to ɓa lafo, yé á jerœ.»
6.42: Endje kœpa adœke: «Œ dœ́dœ́ Yisu dœke na a, gbolo nœ Yozefu a? Á 'a wusœ abanœ dœ ayinœ ndje na a? Kotoo á tshe pa ngɔngɔ asœke adœke œne to ɓa lafo á jerœ a?»
6.43: Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «'E katœ kœpulœma 'e ugurutœ 'e ye na!
6.44: Uzu bale œ li kœna ga ndœ mœ nene œdœ Aba á tshe vwa mœ kœtoto she na tœnœ nene, yekane á mœ kœshe she lœ akuzu dœ ndɔngɔlɔ olo.
6.45: Endje sú ala mbeti nœ aayi kœgbara o'o adœke: “Ndjaba œ yisœ œrœ fœ azu kɔkɔ.” Uzu kɔ á tshe dji Aba, á yindœ œrœ á tshe yisœ nœ, tshe na ga ndœ mœ.
6.46: Œ yindœ kœpa adœke uzu bale wuwu Aba nene, kolœ tsheneke á tshe to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba; œshe dá wu Aba.
6.47: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke uzu tsheneke á tshe kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ, tshe sœ dœ soro á ka nene.
6.48: Œmœ kœdœ kœzɨrœ á za soro fœ azu.
6.49: Aata 'e zɨ liya mane ɓa lœ kpagagasho, yé endje tshu lima ye.
6.50: Asœ kœdœ kœzɨrœ á to ɓa lafo á jerœ adœke, uzu á tshe kœzɨ, tshe tshu bala nene.
6.51: Œmœ kœdœ kœzɨrœ á za soro fœ azu, œ to ɓa lafo á jerœ asœke. Uzu á tshe kœzɨ kœzɨrœnœ asœke, tshe sœ bala dœ soro á ka nene. Kœzɨrœnœ á mœ za fœ she kœdœ songba mœ. Mœ za adœke tshapashɔ gbɔ soro.»
6.52: Kolœ pa o'o asœke, ayuda te lima tœ kœyutœ endje ugurutœ endje dœ ɔgbɔ adœke: «Kotoo á uzunœ asœke pa adœke œne za songba œne fœ azœ yekane á kœzɨ a?»
6.53: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Mœ pa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke œdœ 'e kœzɨzɨ songba Gbolo nœ uzu yé œ ndjo pe indji ye nene, 'e sœ dœ soro lœ 'e nene.
6.54: Uzu tsheneke á tshe zɨ songba mœ, á ndjo ndje indji mœ, sœ dœ soro á ka nene, yé œmœ mœ she she lœ kuzu dœ ndɔngɔlɔ olo.
6.55: Gbambanœ nene, songba mœ kœdœ adja kœzɨrœ, yé indji mœ kœdœ adja kœndjorœ.
6.56: Uzu á tshe zɨ songba mœ á ndjo indji mœ, sœ lœ mœ yé œmœ mœ sœ ndje lœ ye.
6.57: Yé ɓata Aba á tshe vwa mœ sœ dœ soro á mœ sœ dœ soro lœ awa nœ ye, ataa uzu á tshe kœzɨ songba mœ, tshe gbɔ soro lœ awa nœ mœ.
6.58: Asœ kœdœ kœzɨrœ á to ɓa lafo á jerœ. Œ sœsœ ɓata kœzɨrœ á aata 'e zɨ liya nene. Mbœrœ endje zɨ liya kœzɨrœ asœmœ yé endje tshu. Kashe uzu á tshe zɨ kœzɨrœnœ asœke, tshe sœ dœ soro á ka nene.»
6.59: Yisu pa lima o'onœ asœke ɓa lœ Kaparnawumu, lɔkɔ á tshe sœ lima tœ kœyisœ œrœ ɓa lœ Sinagoga. O'o á za soro fœ azu
6.60: Manda kœdji she, ɨlɨ ayambarœ nœ ye tetœ kœpa adœke: «O'onœ asœ gbɔɔgbɔ, adja œɗe dá dji a?»
6.61: Kashe ɓata á Yisu wu lima sœ nœ adœke ayambarœ nœ œne sœ tœ kœpulœma endje, tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á o'onœ asœke ndjingɨvwɨ tshelœ kumu 'e a?
6.62: Œ kœsœ má adœke 'e wu Gbolo nœ uzu kœ ɔ ga tœ osho á tshe to lima tœnœ, œ sœ koto o?
6.63: Ɨshirɨ dá za soro fœ azu. Ɔkɔ lili tœ kœmbœrœ œrœ ataa nene. O'onœ á mœ pa fœ 'e asœke kœdœ Ɨshirɨ œdœ pe soro.
6.64: Kashe kolœ ugurutœ 'e asœke, anga endje á endje yiyindœ o'o ama mœ nene, endje lœ zœ.» Gbambanœ nene, Yisu wu lima sœ endjeneke á endje sœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ nene œdœ pe tsheneke á tshe ka bala she.
6.65: Á tshe kpa kœpa adœke: «Adja ádánœ á mœ pa fœ 'e adœke uzu bale œ na ga ndœ mœ nene œ kœdœ́dœ́ Aba dá za awa fœ she kœna tœnœ nene.»
6.66: Kœto kpœtœmœ, ɨlɨ anga ayambarœ nœ ye gitœ endje manda ye, yé œ katœ kœna tœ awa bale dœ she.
6.67: Á Yisu kœyu ayambarœnœ ndjokpa dœ bisha adœke: «Ka e'e nœ 'e a, 'e gigitœ 'e nœ 'e nene a?»
6.68: Yeka á Shimu Petro kœgi fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, 'a kpa na má ga ndœ uzu ɗe? Œɓœ dá sœ dœ o'onœ á za soro á ka nene.
6.69: 'A sœ dœ kœyindœrœ, yé 'a wusœ nœ adœke œɓœ kœdœ Œyerœ Uzu nœ Ndjaba.»
6.70: Yisu pa fœ endje adœke: «Œmœ dá ke 'e ndjokpa dœ bisha kashe ugurutœ 'e kɔ, anga uzu bale kœdœ djaboro.»
6.71: Tshe sœ lima kœpa tœ Yudasi, gbolo nœ Shimu Isikariote mbœrœ œshe kœdœ lima uzu á tshe ka Yisu. Œshe kœdœ lima anga yambarœ ugurutœ andjokpa dœ bishanœ asœmœ.

7.1: Manda nœ, Yisu sœ lima kœna lœ ogo Galilayi. Tshe yiyi lima ndœ kœna lœ ogo Yuda nene mbœrœ Ayuda sœ lima kœpara awa ndœ kœwo she.
7.2: Andaa angbo nœ ayuda á dœ angbo gbanda tande ndo lima ye.
7.3: Aaya Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gitœ zœ kpœke, yé œ na ga lœ ogo Yuda adœke ayambarœ nœ zœ wu ndje akwa á ɓœ sœ tœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ.
7.4: Uzu mbœmbœrœ œrœ lœ ubunœ nene œdœ tshe kœgbe adœke azu wusœ œne. Ɓata á ɓœ sœ kœmbœrœ akwa atake, matœ zœ dœ tœnœ ga ushu tshapashɔ wusœ nœ.»
7.5: Gbambanœ nene, aayanœ dœ tœ endje sœsœ lima dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye nene.
7.6: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Ɔlɔ nœ mœ tɔtɔ damba nene. Tœ e'e nœ 'e, ɔlɔ kɔ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ.
7.7: Tshapashɔ œ li tœ kœyiangba 'e nene, kashe œmœ, œ yiangba mœ mbœrœ á mœ sœ kœpandœ nœ ngbɨ adœke akwa nœ ye sœ tœ ekpenœ.
7.8: 'E ɔ ndœ angbonœ zœ. Kashe œmœ, mœ ɔ ga zœ nene mbœrœ ɔlɔ nœ mœ tɔtɔ damba nene.»
7.9: Manda kœpa o'onœ ataa, tshe sœpe lima tɨ lœ Galilayi. Yisu na ga tœ angbo gbanda tande
7.10: Lɔkɔ á aayanœ áafo á ro ndœ angbonœ da ye, Yisu áalafo yaa œ na ndje ga zœ dœ mara adœke azu wuwusœ nœ nene.
7.11: Dœ lɔkɔ á ala angbonœ doro, agbozu Ikrizia sœ lima kœpara she yé endje sœ lima kœyu osho adœke: «Tshe sœ kpœta a?»
7.12: Endje ndɨvwɨrɨ lima o'o waa tœ upu nœ ye. Anga azu pa lima adœke: «Uzunœ asœke kœdœ ɔtshɔ uzu.» Yé anga endje pa ndje adœke: «Œ̃ œ̃ nene, œshe kœdœ ayi kœdjingili tshelœ kumu azuzu.»
7.13: Yé uzu bale papa o'o o'ara tœ upu nœ ye nene mbœrœ á endje lœ lima dœ awa agbozu Ikrizia.
7.14: Kœwu adœke tshelœ angbonœ za, Yisu na lima ga lœ anda Tepelo, yé œ tetœ kœyisœ œrœ.
7.15: Uvuru Ayuda kpa lima lœnœ, yé endje pa lima adœke: «Uzunœ asœ dɨdɨ œrœ nene, yé kotoo á tshe sœ dœ kœwusœrœ tshaata a?»
7.16: Yisu kœgi o'o fœ endje adœke: «Œrœnœ á mœ sœ kœyisœ nœ asœke toto ɓa ndœ mœ nene, kashe œ to ɓa ndœ tsheneke á tshe vwa mœ.
7.17: Œdœ uzu kœgbe kœmbœrœ œrœneke á Ndjaba yindœ nœ, tshe wusœ nœ adœke kœyisœrœnœ asœke to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba, too mœ sœ kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ mœ dœ tœ mœ.
7.18: Uzu á tshe sœ kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ ye dœ tœ ye, tshe sœ kœpara awa adœke azu donga œne. Kashe uzu tsheneke á tshe sœ kœpara awa adœke azu donga ayi kœvwa she, tshe kœdœ uzu nœ adja o'o, yé ekperœ gugu lœ ye nene.
7.19: Œ dœ́dœ́ Moyize dá za liya awa akwa fœ 'e nene a? Kashe uzu bale ugurutœ 'e á tshe sœ kœmbœrœtœ ye liakanœ gugu nene. Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœ kœpara awa ndœ kœwo mœ a?»
7.20: Á ukpulu azunœ kœpa fœ she adœke: «Ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ pa zœ a! Œɗe dá sœ kœpara awa ndœ kœwo ɓœ a?»
7.21: Yisu kpa kœza o'o á kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Mœ mbœrœ kolœ akwa bale yé œvuru 'e kɔkɔ kpa lœnœ ataa!
7.22: Moyize za liya o'o fœ 'e adœke 'e wa agbolo yakoshe nœ 'e tœ gaza. Œ dœ́dœ́ Moyize kœdœ ali uzu kœmbœrœ tœnœ nene, kashe œ to liya ɓa ndœ aata 'e, yé 'e sœ kœza ga tœ akwa dœ lɔkɔ Sabata.
7.23: Á 'e kœwu adœke kœwa anga gbolo yakoshe dœ lɔkɔ Sabata kœndɨndɨ awa akwa nœ Moyize nene, mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e so ókó ga tœ mœ mbœrœ á mœ she uzu djigi dœ lɔkɔ sabata a?
7.24: 'E katœ kœwa ngbanga liaka œrœ á 'e wu dœ ala 'e ye, kashe 'e wa ngbanga dœ mara á sœ ndjii kane.» Adja Yisu kœdœ Masiya a?
7.25: Anga azu lœ Yerusaleme sœ lima kœpa adœke: «Œ dœ́dœ́ uzunœ á endje sœ kœpara she á kœwo she dœke nene a?
7.26: 'E wu, œshe dá pa o'o o'ara o'ara á uzu kœpa o'o fœ she gugu nene asœke! Ataa agbozu tshapa azœ wu ete œsœnœ adœke œshe kœdœ Kristu ye na a?
7.27: Andaa a wusœ osho á yakoshenœ asœke to tœnœ ye, kashe Kristu, uzu bale œ wu bala sœ osho á tshe to tœnœ á yi kumu ye nene.»
7.28: Yeka á Yisu á tshe sœ lima kœyisœ œrœ lœ anda Tepelonœ pa adœke: «'E wusœ mœ ye! 'E wu ndje sœ osho á mœ to tœnœ ye! Mœ nana dœ tœ mœ nene. Tsheneke á tshe vwa mœ, tshe kœdœ adja o'o; œshe á 'e wuwusœ ye nene asœmœ.
7.29: Œmœ, mœ wusœ ye mbœrœ á mœ to ɓa ɨndɨrɨ ye, yé œshe dá vwa mœ.»
7.30: Endje para lima awa kœtepa ye kashe uzu bale toto lima kane ye ga tœ ye nene mbœrœ á olo ye lili damba lima nene.
7.31: Azu ndjoro lœ ukpulu azunœ sœ lima dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye. Endje pa lima adœke: «Lɔkɔ á Kristu œ na, tshe mbœrœ ambárá afá kœropa œneke á tsheneke œ mbœrœ asœke ye a?»
7.32: Œneke á ukpulu azu sœ kœpulœma endje tœ upu nœ ye li ga lœ utu Afarisayi. Ataa, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba œdœ Afarisayi vwa lima atshendjerœ nœ endje ndœ kœna kœtepa ye.
7.33: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Mœ sœpe dœ 'e manda olo teasho, yé manda nœ, mœ gu ga ndœ tsheneke á tshe vwa mœ.
7.34: 'E para bala mœ kashe 'e gbɔ mœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, osho á mœ sœ tœnœ, 'e li kœna ɓa zœ nene.»
7.35: Ayuda kœte lima tœ kœyutœ endje ugurutœ endje adœke: «Tshe na má gata yekane á a gbɔ she nene a? Tshe na manda azunœ á endje ndjɔtshelœtœ endje djelœ angbɨ azu a? Tshe na ndœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ angbɨ azunœ a?
7.36: Ádá o'onœ á tshe pa asœke kœdœ gaɗe: 'E para bala mœ, kashe 'e gbɔ mœ nene. Yé osho á mœ sœ tœnœ, 'e li kœna ɓa zœ nene!» Yisu pa o'o tœ upu nœ Ɨshirɨ
7.37: Ndɔngɔlɔ olo kœka angbo kœdœ ɓalima ɨkpɨlɨ olo angbonœ. Dœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, Yisu ka lœ angbonœ œ tetœ kœmɨndœ o'o adœke: «Œdœ uzu kœsœ dœ ogo ungu, kaka tshe na ga ndœ mœ yé œ ndjo.
7.38: Uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ, egerœ ungu á za soro œ tara tœ lɔsu ye, ɓata á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba.»
7.39: Yisu pa lima o'onœ asœ tœ upu nœ Ɨshirɨ á azu á endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye œ gbɔ má. Yé Ndjaba zaza lima damba awa fœ azu kœgbɔ Ɨshirɨnœ nene mbœrœ Ndjaba gigi mokɔ nœ ye fœ she nene.
7.40: Manda kœdji o'onœ asœke, anga azu lœ ukpulu azunœ pa lima adœke: «Adja tsheneke kœdœ ayi kœgbara o'o tako.»
7.41: Anga endje pa lima adœke: «Kristu dœmœ.» Kashe anga udu endje pa ndje lima adœke: «Adja Kristu œ li kœwuta lœ Galilayi a?
7.42: Buku nœ Ndjaba papa adœke tshe wuta bala lœ aata Davidi yé œ sœ ɓa lakpɨ Beteleme ogo obo Davidi nene a?»
7.43: Ataa, azu kuru lima tshelœtœ endje kpœ lœ kumu Yisu.
7.44: Anga endje yi lima ndœ kœtepa ye kashe uzu bale toto lima kane ye ga tœ ye nene. Ɔgbɔ lɔsu nœ agbozu yuda
7.45: Atshendjerœ gu lima ga ndœ agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba œdœ pe Afarisayi á endje pa fœ endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e gugu dœ she nene a?»
7.46: Atshendjerœ kœgi adœke: «Bale anga uzu papa o'o ɓata yakoshe asœmœ nene.»
7.47: Afarisayi kœpa fœ endje adœke: «E'e kɔ, tshe djingili ndje tshelœ kumu 'e a?
7.48: Œdœ ugurutœ agbozu Ikrizia œdœ ugurutœ Afarisayi, anga uzu bale wuta dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye ye a?
7.49: Azunœ ndjoro asœmœ, anga bale á tshe wusœ awa akwa gugu nene. Azu á endje darandœ endje dœmœ!»
7.50: Kashe anga uzu bale ugurutœ Afarisayi á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Nikodeme, œshe á tshe na lima utshunœ ga ndœ Yisu, pa fœ endje adœke:
7.51: «Awa akwa nœ azœ wawa ngbanga ga tœ uzu utshu kœdji she too kœwusœ œrœ á tshe mbœrœ nene.»
7.52: Á endje kœyu she adœke: «Atamœ œɓœ kœdœ uzu Galilayi, œɓœ ndje a? Mirœ tshelœ zœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ yé ɓœ wusœ nœ adœke ayi kœgbara o'o wuwuta bale lœ ogo Galilayi nene.» Yisu œdœ yashe angba budu [
7.53: Manda nœ, uzu dœ uzu gu ga ndœ ye.

8.1: Kashe Yisu ɔ lima ga pa kaga á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ kaga ɔyɔ Olive.
8.2: Ɔlɔ á osho kɔrɔ, Yisu kwatœ ye ga lœ anda Tepelo. Ɓata azu ndjoro na lima ga ndœ ye, tshe sœ ga atɨ, œ tetœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ endje.
8.3: Aayi kœyisœ awa akwa œdœ pe Afarisayi za anga yashe bale na tœnœ fœ Yisu. Endje gbɔ yashenœ asœmœ kœlo dœ yakoshe á tshe dœ́dœ́ akɔnœ nene, yé á za she tɔ ɓa ugurutœ azu.
8.4: Endje kœyu Yisu adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ, 'a ɔ pa yashe asœke endje sœ kœlo dœ yakoshe á tshe dœ́dœ́ akɔnœ nene.
8.5: Ala awa akwa, Moyize za awa fœ 'a adœke 'a ve mara yashe atake dœ badja. Ataa, ɓœ pa œnœ zœ kotoo?»
8.6: Endje yu lima Yisu á kœwu lɔsu ye yeka á kœtɔ meza pa ye. Kashe Yisu djo ga atɨ, œ tetœ kœwa œrœ ga lœ ɔshɔ.
8.7: Ɓata endje yɔrɔ lima pa kœyu she kpala kpala, Yisu áafo œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Uzu á tshe kœmbœmbœrœ ekperœ bale nene, tshe ve yashe asœke dœ badja utshunœ.»
8.8: Tshe kpa djo ga atɨ yé œ sœ kolœ tœ kœwa œrœ ga lœ ɔshɔ.
8.9: Lɔkɔ á endje dji o'o á Yisu pa asœmœ, endje te lima tœ kœgitœ endje bale dœ bale kœto tœ agbozu, yé Yisu sœpe lima kutɨ ye. Ɓata á yashenœ á endje kpa lima dji she sœpe lima kpœtœmœ,
8.10: Yisu áafo yé œ pa fœ she adœke: «Yashe, endje sœ kpœta a? Uzu bale wawa ngbanga ga tœ zœ nene a?»
8.11: Tshe kœgi adœke: «Uzu bale nene, Gbozu.» Á Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Œmœ ndje awa bale, mœ wa ngbanga ga tœ zœ nene. Gu zœ, kashe kpa mbœmbœrœ ekperœ nene.»] Yisu kœdœ ɨngbɨsho nœ tshapashɔ
8.12: Yisu kpa pa fœ endje adœke: «Œmœ kœdœ ɨngbɨsho nœ tshapashɔ. Uzu á tshe na manda mœ, tshe na lœ ubu osho nene, kashe tshe gbɔ ɨngbɨsho á za soro fœ azu.»
8.13: Afarisayi kœpa fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ sœ kœpa o'o tœ zœ dœ tœ zœ, yé o'onœ á ɓœ pa dœ́dœ́ adja o'o nene.»
8.14: Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Œ sœ tako adœke mœ sœ kœpa o'o tœ mœ dœ tœ mœ, kashe o'onœ á mœ sœ kœpa tœ mœ asœmœ kœdœ adja o'o, mbœrœ mœ wusœ osho á mœ to tœnœ œdœ pe osho á mœ sœ kœna ga tœ nœ. Kashe e'e, 'e wuwusœ osho á mœ to tœnœ œdœ pe osho á mœ sœ kœna ga tœnœ nene.
8.15: 'E sœ kœwa o'o adja ɓata azu, kashe œmœ, mœ wa o'o pa uzu bale nene.
8.16: Yé œ kœli adœke mœ wa o'o, mœ wa o'onœ liaka adja o'o mbœrœ mœ sœsœ dœ kutɨ mœ nene: Ayi kœvwa mœ sœ ndje dœ mœ awa bale.
8.17: Endje sú ala awa akwa nœ 'e adœke, œdœ azu bisha kœpa kolœ o'o bale dœ ádá œrœ, o'onœ á endje pa asœmœ kœdœ adja o'o.
8.18: Mœ sœ kœpa o'o tœ mœ dœ tœ mœ, yé Aba á tshe vwa mœ sœ ndje kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ mœ.»
8.19: Endje kpa kœpa fœ she adœke: «Aba zœ sœ kpœta a?» Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «'E wuwusœ mœ nene yé 'e wuwusœ Aba mœ nene. Œdœ 'e kœwu má sœ mœ, 'e wu má ndje sœ Aba mœ ye.»
8.20: Yisu pa lima o'onœ asœke ɔlɔ á tshe sœ lima kœyisœ œrœ ɓa lœ anda Tepelo ɓa tœ osho á endje ko ngendja makabo ga tœnœ. Uzu bale toto lima kane ye ga tœ ye nene mbœrœ olo ye lili lima damba nene. Yisu pandœ upu kœgu she ga ndœ Abanœ
8.21: Yisu kpa pa fœ endje adœke: «Mœ gu da ye, 'e para bala mœ kashe 'e tshu lœ ekperœ nœ 'e. Osho á mœ na ga tœnœ, 'e li kœna ɓa zœ nene.»
8.22: Ayuda kœyu lima tœ endje ugurutœ endje adœke: «Tshe sœ dœ gbetshelœ nœ kœwotœ ye dœ tœ ye a? Mbœrœ á tshe pa adœke: “Osho á mœ na ga tœnœ, 'e li kœna ɓa zœ nene a?”»
8.23: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «E'e kœdœ azu tshaatɨ, œmœ kœdœ uzu tshalafo. 'E kœdœ azu tshapashɔnœ asœke, kashe mœ dœ́dœ́ uzu tshapashɔnœ asœke nene.
8.24: Mbœrœ tœnœ dá mœ pa fœ 'e adœke 'e tshu lœ ekperœ nœ 'e. Gbambanœ nene, œdœ 'e kœyiyindœ nœ adœke œmœ, mœ sœ zœ nene, 'e tshu lœ ekperœ nœ 'e.»
8.25: Endje kœyu Yisu adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ uzu œɗe e?» Yé tshe kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Œmœ kœdœ tsheneke á mœ pa o'o fœ 'e katshatsha utshunœ.
8.26: Mœ sœ dœ o'o ndjoro kœpa œdœ pe kœwa tœ upu nœ 'e. Kashe tsheneke á tshe vwa mœ kœdœ uzu nœ adja o'o yé œneke á mœ dji ɓa ndœ ye, œtœnœ dá mœ sœ kœpa fœ tshapashɔ.»
8.27: Endje wuwu lima sœ nœ nene adœke Yisu sœ lima kœpa o'onœ fœ œne tœ Aba.
8.28: Yisu kpa kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Ɔlɔ á 'e tshi Gbolo nœ uzu ga lafo, 'e wusœ nœ adœke “œmœ, mœ sœ zœ”. 'E wu ndje sœ nœ adœke mœ mbœmbœrœ œrœ bale dœ tœ mœ nene, kashe mœ sœ kœpa o'o á Aba yisœ nœ fœ mœ.
8.29: Tsheneke á tshe vwa mœ sœ awa bale dœ mœ, tshe katœ mœ tɨ kutɨ mœ nene, mbœrœ mœ sœ kœmbœrœ kolœ œrœ á za yanga fœ she.»
8.30: Ɓata á Yisu sœ lima kœpa o'o ataa, azu ndjoro wuta lima dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye. Adja aata Abrayamo
8.31: Yisu pa fœ Ayuda á endje yi lima ndœ o'o ama ye adœke: «Œdœ 'e kœsœpe kœgbɔndœ o'o ama mœ ga tœ lɔsu 'e, 'e kœdœ adja ayambarœ nœ mœ.
8.32: Ataa, 'e wusœ adja o'o tœ upu nœ Ndjaba yé adja o'onœ œ ko 'e lœ kanga ga ushu ye.»
8.33: Endje kœpa fœ she adœke: «Abrayamo kœdœ ata 'a yé 'a dœ́dœ́ ɓalima akanga nœ uzu nene. Kotoo á ɓœ pa adœke 'a wuta lœ kanga ye a?»
8.34: Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Mœ pa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, uzu kɔ á tshe sœ kœsœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ, kœdœ kanga nœ ekperœ.
8.35: Kanga sœsœ waa lœ anda nene, kashe gbolo anda dá sœ waa.
8.36: Œdœ Gbolo kœko 'e ga ushu lœ kanga, 'e wuta adja lœnœ ye.
8.37: Mœ wusœ nœ adœke Abrayamo kœdœ ata 'e. Kashe 'e sœ kœpara awa kœwo mœ mbœrœ á 'e yiyindœ kœdji o'o ama mœ nene.
8.38: Mœ sœ kœpandœ œneke á mœ wu ɓa ndœ Aba mœ, yé 'e sœ kœmbœrœ œneke á aba 'e mɨndœ nœ fœ 'e.»
8.39: Endje kœpa fœ she adœke: «Aba 'a kœdœ Abrayamo.» Yé Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Œdœ 'e kœdœ agbolo nœ Abrayamo, 'e mbœrœ akwa nœ Abrayamo.
8.40: Andaa, 'e sœ ngɔngɔ asœ kœpara awa ndœ kœwo mœ, œmœ á mœ pa adja o'o á mœ dji ɓa ndœ Ndjaba. Abrayamo mbœmbœrœ œrœ á li dœ tœnœ bale nene.
8.41: Kashe 'e, 'e sœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ aba 'e.» Endje kœgi fœ she adœke: «'A dœ́dœ́ agbolo gugatɨ nene, 'a sœ kolœ dœ aba bale á tshe kœdœ Ndjaba.»
8.42: Á Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Œdœ Ndjaba kœdœ má Aba 'e, 'e yi má ndœ mœ ye. Gbambanœ nene, mœ to ɓa ndœ ye yeka á na asœke. Mœ nana dœ tœ mœ nene kashe œshe dá vwa mœ.
8.43: Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœsœ kœdji tshelœ kata o'o nœ mœ nene a? Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e lili kœdji o'o ama mœ nene.
8.44: Aba 'e, œshe kœdœ djaboro yé 'e sœ dœ ogo kœmbœrœ gbetshelœ nœ aba 'e. Tshe kœdœ ayi kœwo azu ɓalima katshatsha. Tshe papa adja o'o nene mbœrœ adja o'o gugu lœ ye nene. Lɔkɔ á tshe kœpa wala, mara kœpa o'o nœ ye dœmœ mbœrœ tshe kœdœ ayi wala œdœ aba wala.
8.45: Kashe œmœ, mœ pa œnœ mœ adja o'o yé mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'e sœsœ kœdji mœ nene.
8.46: Uzu ɗe ugurutœ 'e kɔ dá li kœma adœke mœ mbœrœ ekperœ a? Yé œdœ mœ kœpa adja o'o, mbœrœ ga ɗe á 'e yiyindœ kœdji mœ nene a?
8.47: Uzu tsheneke á tshe kœdœ uzu nœ Ndjaba, tshe dji o'o ama Ndjaba; ɓata 'e dœ́dœ́ azu nœ Ndjaba nene, 'e li kœdji o'o ama mœ nene.» Yisu œdœ Abrayamo
8.48: Ayudanœ gi fœ Yisu adœke: «Œdœ 'a kœpa fœ ɓœ adœke œɓœ kœdœ uzu Samariya yé ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ pa zœ, 'a pa wala dœmœ a?»
8.49: Yisu gi fœ endje adœke: «Mœ sœsœ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ pa mœ nene, kashe mœ sœ kœlɨsœ Aba mœ yeka á 'e vwaratœ 'e kœlɨsœ mœ asœmœ.
8.50: Mœ sœsœ kœpara ndje adœke azu donga mœ nene. Kashe anga uzu sœ zœ á sœ kœmbœrœ adœke azu donga mœ yé œshe dá sœ kœwa o'o.
8.51: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, œdœ uzu kœsœ kœgbɔndœ o'o ama mœ, tshe wu bala kuzu nene.»
8.52: Ayudanœ kœpa fœ she adœke: «Ngɔngɔ asœ, 'a wusœ nœ adœke ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ pa zœ. Abrayamo tshu, aayi kœgbara o'o tshu ndje, yé œɓœ, ɓœ pa adœke: “Uzu á tshe kœgbɔndœ o'o ama zœ, tshe wu bala kuzu nene.”
8.53: Ɓœ gbe adœke ɓœ ropa aba 'a dœ Abrayamo á tshe tshu ye a? Œdœ ndje aayi kœgbara o'o á endje tshu, ataa adja ɓœ sœ kœzatœ zœ ɓata œɗe e?»
8.54: Á Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Œdœ mœ kœsœ má kœdongatœ mœ dœ tœ mœ, kœdongatœsho nœ mœ œ sœ má gbambanœ. Aba mœ dá sœ kœdonga mœ, œshe á 'e sœ kœpa tœ ye adœke: “Tshe kœdœ Ndjaba nœ 'a”,
8.55: andaa 'e wuwusœ ye nene. Œdœ mœ kœpa adœke mœ wuwusœ ye nene, mœ tsha ayi wala ɓata 'e. Kashe mœ wusœ ye yé mœ sœ kœgbɔndœ o'o ama ye.
8.56: Aba 'e dœ Abrayamo sœ lima dœ yanga dœ agbe adœke œne wu olo kœzu dœ mœ. Tshe wu lima olonœ yé œ za lima yanga fœ she.»
8.57: Ayudanœ kœgi fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ wuwuta damba dœ ungu zazu bisha dœ ndjokpa nene, yé ɓœ pa adœke ɓœ wu Abrayamo a?»
8.58: Á Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, utshu adœke endje zu Abrayamo, “mœ sœ zœ.”»
8.59: Ayudanœ kœko badja kœve dœ she, kashe Yisu zatœ ye yiwa tœnœ yé œ wuta lœ anda Tepelo ye.

9.1: Ɔlɔ bale, Yisu sœ kœro tœnœ yé œ wu anga yakoshe bale á endje zu she ala ye bu trale.
9.2: Ayambarœ nœ ye kœyu she adœke: «Rabi, mbœrœ gaɗe á endje zu yakoshe asœke trale ala ye bu a? Ataa, œ to lœ ekperœ nœ ye, too œ to lœ ekperœ nœ aayi kœzu she a?»
9.3: Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Œ toto lœ ekperœ nœ ye too lœ ekperœ nœ aayi kœzu she nene. Kashe œneke wuta ga tœ ye mbœrœ á Ndjaba kœyisœ akwa nœ ye lœ ye.
9.4: Ɓata á osho kɔrɔ, œ li adœke a mbœrœ akwa nœ uzu á tshe vwa mœ. Osho ndo tœ kœbu tœnœ, yé uzu bale kpa li tœ kœmbœrœ akwa nene.
9.5: Ɓata á mœ sœ damba pa tshapashɔ, œmœ kœdœ ɨngbɨsho nœ tshapashɔ.»
9.6: Manda kœpa o'onœ asœke, Yisu kœtu ngusha ga tœ ɔshɔ, á kœmbœrœ kpata dœ tœnœ yé œ kœpi ga pa ala ayibulanœ,
9.7: á kœpa fœ she adœke: «Na œ djutɔ kote zœ ɓa la kudu ungu á endje dji á ta ɨ'ɨrɨnœ Silowe.» – Ádá ɨ'ɨrɨ Silowe kœdœ «Ayi avwa» – Ayibula kœna œ kœdjutɔ kote ye yé kœfatœ ye ndœ kœgu she, tshe kœte lima tœ kœwu osho.
9.8: Amashenga nœ ye œdœ pe azu á endje sœ lima kœwu she kœ'eshondœ œrœ, yu lima tœ endje adœke: «Œ dœ́dœ́ Tsheneke á tshe sœ lima atɨ á sœ kœ'eshondœ œrœ dœke nene a?»
9.9: Anga azu pa lima adœke: «Œshe dœmœ.» Anga endje pa ndje adœke: «Œ̃ œ̃, uzunœ tsha ɓata sheshe.» Kashe ayibulanœ yi lima ndœ nœ adœke: «Adja œmœ dœke.»
9.10: Endje kœyu she adœke: «Ala zœ kɔrɔ kotoo?»
9.11: Tshe kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Yakoshenœ á endje sœ kœ'e ɨ'ɨrɨ ye adœke Yisu dá mbœrœ kpata, á pi ga pa ala mœ yé á pa fœ mœ adœke: “Na dœ́ djutɔ kote zœ ɓa la ungu Silowe.” Mœ na ɓa zœ, yé manda kœdjutɔ kote mœ, ala mœ kɔrɔ ye.»
9.12: Endje kœyu she adœke: «Uzunœ asœmœ sœ kpœta a?» Tshe kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Mœ wuwusœ nœ nene.» Afarisayi yu ayibula
9.13: Anga azu to yakoshe á ala ye bu lima asœmœ natœnœ ga ndœ Afarisayi.
9.14: Andaa Yisu mbœrœ lima kpata á kɔrɔ ala ye dœ tœnœ dœ lɔkɔ sabata.
