9.15: Afarisayi kœyu ndje œnœ endje yakoshe asœmœ tœ kœwusœ mara œrœ á mbœrœ fœ she adœke tshe tetœ kœwu osho. Tshe kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Tshe pi kpata ga pa ala mœ, mœ djutɔ kote mœ yé mœ sœ kœwu osho.»
9.16: Anga Afarisayi pa lima adœke: «Uzunœ asœke dœ́dœ́ uzu nœ Ndjaba nene mbœrœ á tshe mbœrœ œrœ asœ dœ lɔkɔ Sabata.» Anga endje pa ndje adœke: «Ayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ œ gbɔ awa kœmbœrœ mara ambárá afá atake kotoo?» Yé azu kuru lima tshelœtœ endje.
9.17: Afarisayi kpa kœyu ayibula á koɓa nœ ye ka asœmœ adœke: «Yé œɓœ, ɓœ sœ dœ o'o gaɗe tœ upu nœ uzunœ á tshe mbœrœ á ala zœ kɔrɔ asœke a?» Tshe kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Œshe kœdœ ayi kœgbara o'o.»
9.18: Utshunœ adœke agbozu yudanœ e aayi kœzu she ndœ kœdji endje, endje yiyi lima ndœ nœ nene adœke ala yakoshenœ bu lima yeka á ngɔngɔ asœke ala ye kɔrɔ.
9.19: Ayudanœ kœyu aayi kœzu she adœke: «Adja yakoshe asœ kœdœ gbolo yakoshe nœ 'e a? 'E pa adœke ala ye bu trale á 'e zu dœ she a? Ka œ mbœrœ kotoo ngɔngɔ asœ á tshe sœ kœmesho?»
9.20: Ayi kœzu yakoshe sœmœ kœpa adœke «'A wusœ nœ adœke œshe kœdœ gbolo nœ 'a yé ala ye bu trale yekane á 'a zu she dœ tœnœ.
9.21: Kashe 'a wuwusœ œrœ á mbœrœ adœke tshe tetœ kœwu osho ngɔngɔnœ asœke nene. 'A wuwu ndje sœ uzu á tshe kɔrɔ ala ye nene. 'E yu she, tshe dœ́dœ́ gbolo nene, tshe sœ dœ o'o kœpa fœ 'e.»
9.22: Aayi kœzu she pa lima o'o asœmœ ataa mbœrœ endje sœ lima dœ awa agbozu yudanœ. Mbœrœ Ayuda guma lima o'o ugurutœ endje adœke: Uzu kœyindœ nœ adœke Yisu kœdœ Kristu, œ li adœke endje gɔrɔ she ga ushu lœ Sinagoga ye.
9.23: Ádánœ á ayi kœzu ayibula pa lima adœke: «'E yu she, tshe dœ́dœ́ gbolo nene, tshe sœ dœ o'o kœpa fœ 'e.»
9.24: Afarisayi kpa e yakoshe á tshe dœ́ lima ayibula yé œ kpa kœyu she adœke: «Pa adja o'o utshu Ndjaba. 'A wusœ nœ adœke uzu á tshe she ɓœ kœdœ ayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ.»
9.25: Tshe kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Mœ wuwusœ nœ nene œdœ œshe kœdœ ayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ. Kashe œneke á mœ wusœ nœ tshebale kœdœ adœke ala mœ bu lima ye, yé ngɔngɔ asœke mœ sœ kœwu osho.»
9.26: Afarisayi kœyu she adœke: «Œrœ gaɗe dá tshe mbœrœ fœ ɓœ a? Adja gaɗe dá mbœrœ adœke ala zœ kɔrɔ a?»
9.27: Yakoshenœ kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Mœ mɨndœ nœ fœ 'e kashe 'e vwaratœ 'e kœdji mœ ye. 'E kpa yindœ nœ adœke mœ pa bisha o'o gaɗe e? 'E yi ndje má ndœ kœte ayambarœ nœ ye a?»
9.28: Afarisayinœ kœtetœ kœgu she á kœpa fœ she adœke: «Adja œɓœ kœdœ yambarœ nœ ye, yé a'a, 'a kœdœ ayambarœ nœ Moyize.
9.29: 'A wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba pa lima o'o fœ Moyize kashe œshe asœmœ, 'a wuwusœ osho á tshe to tœnœ nene.»
9.30: Yakoshe kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Kœdji œneke á 'e pa asœke, uvuru mœ kpa lœ nœ ye. Gbambanœ nene, 'e pa adœke 'e wuwusœ osho á tshe to tœnœ nene andaa œshe dá kɔrɔ ala mœ!
9.31: A wusœ nœ adœke, Ndjaba gigi o'o ndœ avwala nœ ayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ nene; kashe œdœ uzu kœsœ kœlɨsœ ye, á sœ kœmbœrœ œneke á tshe yindœ nœ, tshe gi o'o ndœ avwala nœ ye.
9.32: Bale endje djidji ɓalima o'o adœke anga uzu kɔrɔ ala uzu á endje zu she trale dœ bula nene.
9.33: Œ kœdœ́dœ́ Ndjaba dá vwa yakoshe asœke nene, tshe mbœrœ má œrœ bale nene.»
9.34: Afarisayi kœpa fœ she adœke: «Œɓœ á kœto tœ kœzu ɓœ œrrr kpesheke ɓœ sœ kolœ ekperœ asœke, œrœ gaɗe dá ɓœ yindœ kœyisœ nœ fœ 'a!» Yé endje kœgɔrɔ she lœ Sinagoga ga ushu. Œɗe kœdœ adja ayibula?
9.35: Yisu dji adœke Afarisayi gɔrɔ yakoshe asœmœ ga ushu, yé œ na œ gbɔ she á yu she adœke: «Adja ɓœ sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Gbolo nœ uzu zœ a?»
9.36: Yakoshe asœmœ kœyu she adœke: «Gbozu, œshe kœdœ œɗe yeka á mœ kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye a?»
9.37: Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ wu she ye, œshe dá sœ kœpa o'o fœ ɓœ asœke.»
9.38: Yakoshe kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, mœ sœ dœ kœyindœrœ.» Yé tshe kœgote ga utshu ye.
9.39: Á Yisu kœpa adœke: «Mœ na ga pa tshapashɔ asœke mbœrœ kœwa ngbanga, adœke aayibula sœ kœwu osho yé azu á endje sœ lima kœwu osho te ayibula.»
9.40: Yekane anga Afarisayi á endje lœ ndje lima tœ œsœnœ, á sœ kœdji o'onœ asœmœ kœyu she adœke: «A'a, ɓœ gbe adœke a'a ndje kœdœ aayibula a?»
9.41: Yé Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Œdœ 'e kœdœ má aayibula, 'e mbœrœ má ekperœ nene. Kashe ɓata ngɔngɔ asœ á 'e sœ kœpa adœke “'a sœ kœwu osho zœ”, ekperœ nœ 'e sœpe.»

10.1: Yisu kpa pa fœ endje adœke: «Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, œdœ uzu kœkatœ kœli ga lœ gbagba nœ apata lœ manda nœ, á kœli tœ anga ogoro kpi, uzu asœmœ kœdœ ayingba too ayi kœndɨ œrœ.
10.2: Kashe uzu tsheneke á tshe li ga lœ gbagba lœ manda nœ, kœdœ ayi kœgbɔndœ apata.
10.3: Tshendjerœ manda sœ kœkɔrɔ manda fœ she yé apata sœ kœdji tshama ye. Apata á endje kœdœ endje nœ ye, tshe sœ kœ'e pata dœ pata dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye yé tshe sœ kœto endje wuta tœnœ ga ushu.
10.4: Lɔkɔ á tshe kœto endje wuta tœnœ kɔ ga ushu, tshe te utshu endje yé apata yɔrɔ manda ye mbœrœ á endje sœ kœdji tshama ye kporo.
10.5: Bale apata œ yɔrɔ manda angbɨ uzu nene. Endje œ kparawa ye mbœrœ endje sœsœ kœdji tshama angbɨ azu kporo nene.»
10.6: Yisu pa lima ndœma toro asœke fœ azu kashe endje djidji lima tshelœ kata o'onœ á tshe gbe kœpa fœ endje nene. Yisu, ɔtshɔ ayi kœgbɔndœ apata
10.7: Yeka á Yisu kœpa adœke: «Mœ pa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, œmœ kœdœ manda gbagba nœ apata.
10.8: Azu kɔ á endje na utshu mœ kœdœ ayingba œdœ aayi kœndɨ œrœ. Kashe apata djidji lima endje nene.
10.9: Œmœ kœdœ manda. Uzu á tshe kœli dœ awa nœ mœ tshe gbɔ bala soro. Tshe li bala, tshe wuta bala yé tshe gbɔ bala kœzɨrœ nœ ye.
10.10: Ayingba sœ kœna kolœ ndœ kœzɨ angba, kœwo œrœ œdœ kœndɨ tœnœ. Œmœ, mœ na adœke azu gbɔ soro yé œ sœ dœ soro á ropa nœ.
10.11: «Œmœ kœdœ ɔtshɔ ayi kœgbɔndœ apata. Ɔtshɔ ayi kœgbɔndœ apata œ zatœ ye fœ kuzu mbœrœ endje.
10.12: Uzu á tshe kœdœ́dœ́ ayi kœgbɔndœ apata nene, tshe mbœrœ akwa ko ndœ ngendja, mbœrœ apata dœ́dœ́ endje nœ ye nene. Ataa œdœ tshe kœwu muru kœna tœnœ, tshe katœ apata tɨ œ kpa ye. Murunœ œ za anga pata yé œ ndjɔ tshelœ udu endje ngbangbangba.
10.13: 'E wu œrœ á mbœrœtœ endje, gbambanœ nene, uzunœ sœ kolœ kœmbœrœ akwa mbœrœ ngendja yé œ sœsœ dœ oyo mbœrœ apata nene.
10.14: Œmœ kœdœ ɔtshɔ ayi kœgbɔndœ apata. Mœ wusœ apata nœ mœ yé endje wu ndje sœ mœ,
10.15: ɓata Aba wusœ mœ á mœ wu sœ ye, mœ sœ kœzatœ mœ fœ kuzu mbœrœ apata nœ mœ.
10.16: Mœ sœ dœ anga apata á endje sœsœ lœ gbagbanœ asœke nene. Mbœrœ endje asœmœ, œ li adœke mœ to ndje endje, endje dji bala tshama mœ yé endje œ wuta ukpulu apata tshebale œdœ ayi kœgbɔndœ endje tshebale.
10.17: «Aba yindœ mœ mbœrœ á mœ sœ kœzatœ mœ fœ kuzu yeka manda nœ á mœ kpa sœ dœ soro.
10.18: Œ sœsœ adœke anga uzu wo mœ nene, kashe œmœ dœ tœ mœ dá zatœ mœ fœ kuzu. Mœ sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ adœke mœ tshu, yé mœ sœ ndje dœ gbɔgbɔ adœke mœ kpa sœ dœ soro. Asœke kœdœ awa o'o á Aba mœ za fœ mœ.»
10.19: Kpœpa kœpa o'o á Yisu pa asœmœ, Ayudanœ kpa kuru lima tshelœtœ endje.
10.20: Yé ɨlɨ endje ugurunœ pa lima adœke: «Ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ pa ye. Tshe sœ dœ iyi yé mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœ kœdji she a?»
10.21: Anga udu endje kœpa adœke: «Œ dœ́dœ́ o'o nœ uzu á tshe sœ dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ dœke nene. Anga ekpe ɨshirɨ mbœrœ ɓalima adœke ayibula wu osho a?» Ayuda vwaratœ endje tœ Yisu
10.22: Œtœnœ kœdœ lima yapu á ɨzɨ œ mi waa, lɔkɔ angbo kœgbe dœ olo á endje za lima avwala pa anda Ndjaba ɓa lœ Yerusaleme.
10.23: Yisu sœ lima kœna œ kœgu ɓa lœ Tepelo ngbɔlɔɔ tshakudu Kɔlɔne andanœ á endje e ɨ'ɨrɨnœ adœke Kɔlɔne nœ Salomo.
10.24: Ayuda kœngbɔɓatœ endje dji Yisu á kœpa fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ sœ tœ kœkate gaɗe tœ kœpa má fœ 'a adœke œɓœ kœdœ Kristu a? Pandœ nœ fœ 'a dœ́ 'a wusœ nœ ngbɨ.»
10.25: Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Mœ pandœ nœ fœ 'e kashe 'e sœsœ kœyindœ o'o ama mœ nene. Akwa á mœ sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Aba mœ dá sœ kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ mœ.
10.26: Kashe 'e sœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ nene mbœrœ á 'e dœ́dœ́ apata nœ mœ nene.
10.27: Apata nœ mœ sœ kœdji tshama mœ, mœ wusœ endje yé endje sœ kœro manda mœ.
10.28: Yé œmœ, mœ sœ kœza soro á ka nene fœ endje. Endje tshu bala bale nene, yé uzu á tshe ko endje tshakane mœ gugu nene.
10.29: Aba mœ á tshe ko endje fœ mœ, tshe ropa azu kɔ. Uzu bale á tshe sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ kœkakara œrœ tshakane Aba gugu nene.
10.30: Œmœ dœ Aba 'a sœ uzu bale.»
10.31: Ayudanœ kpa kœko lima badja adœke œne ve dœ she.
10.32: Kashe Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Œmœ, mœ mbœrœ akwa ndjoro á to ɓa ndœ Aba, yé 'e wu dœ ala 'e. Ataa akwa neketa dá 'e yindœ kœve mœ dœ badja mbœrœ tœnœ a?»
10.33: Ayudanœ kœgi fœ she adœke: «Œ dœ́dœ́ mbœrœ upu nœ ɔshɔ akwa dá 'a yindœ kœve ɓœ dœ badja nene, kashe 'a yindœ kœve ɓœ kolœ mbœrœ á ɓœ sœ kœgu œsœ Ndjaba. Ɓœ kœdœ kolœ uzu yé ɓœ fatœ zœ tœ Ndjaba!»
10.34: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Endje su ala awa akwa nœ 'e adœke: Mœ pa: “E'e kœdœ andjaba.”
10.35: Yé Ndjaba e endjeneke á tshe pa o'o fœ endje ala Buku nœ ye adœke andjaba. Andaa a wusœ nœ adœke œneke á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba œ sœpe waa dœ waa.
10.36: Yé œmœ, Aba ke mœ yé œ vwa mœ ga pa tshapashɔ asœke. 'E pa adœke: “Mœ sœ kœgu œsœ Ndjaba” mbœrœ á mœ pa tœ mœ adœke mœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba a?
10.37: Œdœ mœ kœsœsœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ Aba mœ nene, 'e vwaratœ 'e tœ kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ!
10.38: Ká mœ kœsœ kœmbœrœ akwanœ zœ, á 'e kœsœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ nene gbaa, œ yindœ akwanœ asœke yeka á 'e kœwu sœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke Aba sœ lœ mœ, yé mœ sœ lœ Aba.»
10.39: Trale endje kpa kœpara awa tœ kœtepa ye á tshe kœtɔ tshakane endje ye.
10.40: Yisu kœkwatœ ye ga atshi ungu Yɔrdane ɓa tœ osho á Yowane te lima tœ kœza batisimu fœ azu yé á sœ ɓa zœ.
10.41: Azu ndjoro sœ lima kœna ga ndœ ye yé á sœ lima kœpa adœke: «Yowane mbœmbœrœ lima ambárá afá bale nene. Kashe o'o kɔ á tshe pa lima tœ upu nœ yakoshe asœke, kœdœ lima adja o'o.»
10.42: Yé ɓa zœ, azu ndjoro sœ lima dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu.

11.1: Anga yakoshe bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Lazaro sœ lima dœ koɓa. Tshe sœ lima ɓa lœ Betani, ɓa lakpɨ nœ Amareya dœ yingɔnœ dœ Marta.
11.2: Mareyanœ asœke kœdœ yashenœ á tshe su lima ungu yombo ga pa ada Yisu, á turu dœ sukumu ye. Œshe dá yingɔnœ dœ Lazaro sœ lima dœ koɓa.
11.3: Ayingɔnœ bisha asœke vwa lima uzu mbœrœ kœpandœ nœ fœ Yisu adœke: «Gbozu, yanga zœ á ɓœ yindœ ye sœ dœ koɓa.»
11.4: Yisu djindœ o'onœ, œ pa adœke: «Koɓa nœ Lazaro œ wo she nene, yé œ sœ mbœrœ kœyisœ mokɔ nœ Ndjaba yekane á azu kœza mokɔ fœ Gbolo nœ ye.»
11.5: Andaa Yisu yi lima ndœ Marta dœ yingɔnœ œdœ pe lazaro.
11.6: Yisu dji adœke Lazaro sœ dœ koɓa gbaa, kashe tshe kpa mbœrœ lima olo bisha tœ osho á tshe sœ lima tœnœ.
11.7: Manda nœ, tshe kœpa fœ ayambarœ nœ ye adœke: «A kwatœ azœ, œ gu ga lœ ogo Yuda.»
11.8: Ayambarœnœ kœgi fœ she adœke: «Rabi, ngɔngɔngɔ kpœke, Ayudanœ yi lima ndœ kœve ɓœ dœ badja yé ɓœ kpa sœ kœgbe kœkwatœ zœ ga zœ a?»
11.9: Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Olo bale sœsœ dœ ada ɔlɔ ndjokpa dœ bisha nene a? Œdœ uzu kœna ana dœ ɔlɔ, tshe gbota ada ye nene mbœrœ á tshe sœ kœwu ɨngbɨsho nœ tshapashɔnœ asœke.
11.10: Kashe œ kœsœ adœke uzu sœ kœna ana dœ abutshɔ, tshe gbota ada ye mbœrœ ɨngbɨsho gugu tœ ye nene.»
11.11: Manda kœpa o'onœ asœ, Yisu kpa kœpa adœke: «Yanga azœ dœ Lazaro sœ tœ olo, yé mœ sœ kœna ndœ kœjo she.»
11.12: Ayambarœ kœgi fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, œdœ tshe kœsœ tœ olo, tshe she ye.»
11.13: Yisu yi lima ndœ kœma adœke Lazaro tshu ye, kashe ayambarœ gbe lima adœke Yisu pa o'o tœ adja olo.
11.14: Á Yisu kœpa fœ endje ngbɨ adœke: «Lazaro tshu ye,
11.15: yé mœ sœ dœ yanga mbœrœ 'e gugu lima tœ œsœnœ ɓa zœ nene yeka á 'e kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ. Kashe 'a na ga ɨndɨrɨ ye.»
11.16: Yeka á Toma á endje e ndje she Meya kœpa fœ anga ayambarœnœ adœke: «A ngbɔ kɔ œ na ga zœ dœ́ œ tshu awa bale dœ she.» Yisu kœdœ ayi kœshe azu lœ kuzu
11.17: Lɔkɔ á Yisu wuta, endje pa fœ she adœke endje shi Lazaro œ mbœrœ olo vana.
11.18: Ɓata tshalakpɨ Betani sœ ndoo dœ Beteleme manda ana nœ Kelometere votɔ gbambanœ,
11.19: Ayuda ndjoro na lima ga ɨndɨrɨ Amareya dœ Marta kœu endje manda kuzu yingɔ endje.
11.20: Lɔkɔ á Marta dji adœke Yisu sœ tœ awa, tshe na para tshatshu ye kashe Mareya sœpe lima ɓasœnda.
11.21: Marta kœpa fœ Yisu adœke: «Gbozu, œdœ ɓœ kœsœ má lima kpœke, kuzu œ wo má yingɔ mœ nene.
11.22: Kashe ngɔngɔ nœ asœke ndje, mœ wusœ nœ adœke œneke kɔ á ɓœ eshondœ nœ ga ndœ Ndjaba, tshe to fœ ɓœ.»
11.23: Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Ndjaba œ she yingɔ zœ lœ kuzu zœ.»
11.24: Marta kœgi adœke: «Adjapu, mœ wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba œ she she dœ lɔkɔ nœ kœshe akuzu tœ ndɔngɔlɔ olo.»
11.25: Á Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Œmœ kœdœ Ayi kœshe azu lœ kuzu œdœ pe Ayi kœza soro. Uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ, ngɔngɔ asœke œdœ tshe kœtshu gbaa, tshe kpa sœpe dœ soro.
11.26: Yé uzu kɔ á tshe kœsœ dœ soro, á sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ, tshe tshu bale nene. Ɓœ sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ataa?»
11.27: Marta kœgi adœke: «Adjapu Gbozu, adja mœ yindœ nœ adœke œɓœ kœdœ Kristu, Gbolo nœ Ndjaba á tshe sœ kœna ga pa tshapashɔ.»
11.28: Manda o'onœ asœke, Marta kœaafo, kœna kœ'e Mareya á kœpa fœ she lœ hoyanœ adœke: «Ayi kœyisœrœ sœ kpœke yé œ sœ kœ'e ɓœ.»
11.29: Kœdji kolœnœ ataa, Mareya kœaafo gbara, á kœna ga ndœ Yisu.
11.30: Yisu lili lima damba ga lakpɨnœ nene, tshe sœpe lima ɓa tœ oshonœ á Marta gbɔ she tœnœ.
11.31: Ayudanœ sœ lima sœnda dœ Mareya yé œ sœ lima kœpara awa kœu she. Gba, endje kœwu she kœaafo kœwuta ga ushu yé endje kœte manda ye. Endje gbe lima adœke tshe sœ kœro ete kœkɨ tœnœ ɓa pa udu.
11.32: Lɔkɔ á Mareya wuta ɓa tœ osho á Yisu sœ lima tœnœ, á wu she; tshe te lima ga tœ ada ye á pa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, œdœ ɓœ kœsœ má lima kpœke, kuzu œ wo má yingɔ mœ nene.»
11.33: Kœwu adœke Mareya sœ tœ ɨkɨ yé Ayuda á endje na lima dœ she awa bale yo ndje dœ ɨkɨ, lɔsu Yisu su dœ oyo yé uvuru ye i gara lœnœ.
11.34: Á Yisu kœyu adœke: «'E shi she kpœta a?» Endje kœgi fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, na gamœ dœ́ œ wu.»
11.36: Ayudanœ kœpa lima adœke: «'E wu, ɓata á tshe yi lima ndœ Lazaro!»
11.37: Anga azu kœpa adœke: «Œshe á tshe kɔrɔ ala ayibula, mbœrœ gaɗe á tshe mbœrœ adœke kuzu za Lazaro nene na a?» Yisu she Lazaro lœ kuzu
11.38: Lɔsu Yisu kpa su lima dœ oyo, yé tshe na lima ga pa udu. Tœnœ kœdœ lima kudu badja á endje vwɨrɨ egerœ badja ga tœ amanœ.
11.39: Yisu kœpa adœke: «'E vwɨrɨ egerœ badjanœ asœke.» Yeka á Marta á tshe kœdœ yingɔ kuzunœ kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, tshe fu ye mbœrœ tshe mbœrœ lœ koto olo vana.»
11.40: Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Mœ papa fœ ɓœ adœke: Œdœ ɓœ kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ, ɓœ wu bala mokɔ nœ Ndjaba nene a?»
11.41: Endje kœvwɨrɨ egerœ badjanœ. Á Yisu kœmesho ga lafo á kœpa adœke: «Aba, mœ sœ kœza mershe fœ ɓœ mbœrœ á ɓœ dji mœ.
11.42: Mœ wu má sœ nœ adœke ɓœ sœ kolœ kœdji mœ zœ. Kashe mœ pa o'o mbœrœ ukpulu azu á endje sœ ɨndɨrɨ mœ asœke adœke endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ adœke œɓœ dá vwa mœ.»
11.43: Manda kœpa o'onœ asœ, Yisu pa dœ avwara adœke: «Lazaro, wuta ga ushu!»
11.44: Yé uzu á tshe tshu má lima ye kœwuta dœ uwu lœba á endje vwele dœ ada ye, dœ kane ye, œdœ ndje pe ndœma lœba á endje vwele dœ tshatshu ye. Yisu kœpa fœ azu adœke: «'E vwara uwu lœba tœ ye, œ katœ ye tɨ tshe gu.» Agbozu Ayuda vwarandœ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.1-5; Mar 14.1-2; Luk 22.1-2)
11.45: Kolœ ugurutœ Ayuda á endje na lima ga ndœ Mareya yé á wu œrœ á Yisu mbœrœ lima asœmœ, ɨlɨ endje wuta lima dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu.
11.46: Kashe anga endje ugurunœ, na lima kœgbɔtœ endje dœ Afarisayi á pa lima ndœ œrœ á Yisu mbœrœ fœ endje.
11.47: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ Afarisayi ngbɔ lima tœ endje ɓa lœ anda kœwa ngbanga nœ azu nœ Ndjaba á pa adœke: «A mbœrœ kotoo? Yakoshe asœke sœ kœmbœrœ ambárá afá waa ye kea?
11.48: Œdœ a kœkatœ ye tɨ kœmbœrœ ataa, azu kɔ œ sœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye, yé azu Roma œ na kœndɨ œyerœ osho nœ azœ œdœ pe ogo nœ azœ ye!»
11.49: Anga bale ugurutœ endje á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ lima Kayifa, tshe kœdœ lima egerœ nganga Ndjaba dœ ungunœ asœmœ. Tshe kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E zaza ada o'onœ asœ nene
11.50: yé 'e wuwu ndje sœ nœ nene adœke œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ mbœrœ 'e adœke uzu bale tshu lœ kumu azu para yekane á ogo nœ azœ kœndɨndɨ djigi nene.»
11.51: O'onœ toto lima lœ Kayifa dœ tœ ye nene, kashe ɓata œshe kœdœ lima egerœ nganga Ndjaba dœ ungunœ asœmœ, Ndjaba za o'o ga lœ ama ye kœgbara lima adœke œ li adœke Yisu tshu mbœrœ azu ogo.
11.52: Œ sœsœ kolœ mbœrœ azu ogo nene, kashe œ sœ ndje mbœrœ agbolo nœ Ndjaba á endje ndjɔtshelœtœ endje djezœ adœke endje ngbɔɓatœ endje œ wuta bale.
11.53: Pe dœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, agbozu Ikrizianœ gbɔ lima gbetshelœ nœ kœwo Yisu.
11.54: Ádánœ á Yisu kpa sœsœ lima kœna œdœ kœwuta ngbɨ ga ugurutœ Ayudanœ nene dœke. Kashe tshe gi lima tœ ye ndoo ga lœ kpagagasho, œ sœ ɓa lakpɨ bale á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Efrayime, yeka á sœ ɓa zœ dœ ayambarœ nœ ye.
11.55: Andaa angbo nœ Pake ndo kœte lima tœnœ, azu ndjoro ɔ lima ga lœ Yerusaleme utshu angbo mbœrœ kœdjutɔ kolœ endje á kœza avwala fœ Ndjaba.
11.56: Endje sœ lima kœpara Yisu, yé ɓata endje sœ lima ɓa lœ Tepelo, endje sœ lima kœyutœ endje ugurutœ endje adœke: «'E gbe kotoo? Œrrr á tshe na ndœ angbonœ asœke nene a!»
11.57: Yeka á agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba œdœ Afarisayi kœza o'o fœ azu adœke: «Œdœ uzu bale kœwu lima sœ osho á Yisu sœ tœnœ, tshe yi lima sœ nœ yeka á endje kœtepa ye.»

12.1: Olo mindu dœ amanœ bale utshu angbo Pake, Yisu na lima ga lœ Betani, tshalakpɨ á tshe she lima Lazaro lœ kuzu tœnœ.
12.2: Ɓa zœ, endje fa kœzɨrœ fœ Yisu, yé Marta dá kuru lima tshelœ kœzɨrœnœ á endje sœ lima kœzɨ tœnœ awa bale dœ Lazaro.
12.3: Mareya za ungu yombo á endje mbœrœ dœ adja narde á amanœ gbɔ dœ panœ ga lœ anga. Tshe za lima anganœ, œ su yombonœ ga pa ada Yisu yé œ turu dœ sukumu ye. Tshafu yombonœ za lima tshasœnda djigi.
12.4: Anga yambarœ nœ Yisu bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Yudasi Isikariote, œshe á tshe va ɔtɔ Yisu, pa adœke:
12.5: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á ka má yombonœ œ gbɔ denari kama votɔ dœ́ kurutshelœnœ tœ aayi oyo nene a?»
12.6: Yudasi papa lima o'onœ mbœrœ á tshe gbe dœ aayi oyo nene, kashe mbœrœ á tshe kœdœ ayi angba. Kashe ɓata tshe kœdœ lima ayi kœgbɔndœ ngbade ngendja, tshe sœ lima kœzɨ angba ngendja á endje sœ kœko tœnœ.
12.7: Yisu kœpa adœke: «'E toto oyo fœ she nene. Tshe mbœrœ œtœnœ mbœrœ kœgbe dœ olo á endje za bala dœ mœ ga lœ koto.
12.8: 'E sœ awa bale dœ aayi oyo ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ kashe œmœ, mœ sœsœpe dœ 'e ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ nene.»
12.9: Ayuda ndjoro dji lima adœke Yisu sœ lœ Betani. Endje sœsœ lima kœna ga zœ kolœ mbœrœ Yisu bale nene, kashe endje na lima ndje mbœrœ kœwu Lazaro á Yisu shé lima she lœ kuzu.
12.10: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjabanœ wa lima o'o adœke œne wo ndje Lazaro ye,
12.11: mbœrœ Ayuda ndjoro ka lima tœ endje tɨ, yé œ sœ lima dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu lœ kumu ye. Yisu li ga lœ Yerusaleme (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 21.1-11; Mar 11.1-11; Luk 19.28-40)
12.12: Osho kɔrɔ pa nœ, Ayuda ndjoro á endje na lima ndœ angbo Pakenœ dji adœke Yisu œ na lima ga lœ Yerusaleme.
12.13: Endje de kako ngima yé œ wuta para tshatshu ye. Endje sœ lima kœta rawa adœke: «Mokɔ fœ Ndjaba! Kaka Ndjaba to kane ye ga pa tsheneke á tshe sœ kœna dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu, gbozugo Israyele!»
12.14: Yisu wu ovoro ane yé œ na œ ɔ ga pa ye ɓata á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke:
12.15: «Azu tshelœ ongbo Siyona, awa zaza 'e nene! 'E wu, gbozu nœ 'e dá na asœke, tshe ɔ ga pa ovoro ane.»
12.16: Ayambarœ nœ Yisu wuwu damba lima sœ œneke á sœ kœro tœnœ asœmœ nene. Œrrr manda kœɔ she lima ga lafo ga lœ mokɔ nœ ye yekane á œndœnœ te lima lœ endje adœke endje sú lima o'onœ tœ upu nœ ye, yé endje mbœrœ ga tœ ye kolœ adja œneke á endje sú.
12.17: Azu kɔ á endje sœ lima dœ Yisu lɔkɔ á tshe she lima Lazaro yé á e she adœke tshe wuta ga ushu, endje sœ lima kœpandœ o'o tœ œneke á endje wu.
12.18: Mbœrœ tœnœ dá azu ndjoro sœ lima kœna para tshatshu Yisu; gbambanœ nene, endje dji lima ndœ ambárá afá á tshe mbœrœ.
12.19: Yeka Afarisayi kœpa ugurutœ endje adœke: «'E sœ kœwu tœnœ, 'e kpa li kœmbœrœ œrœ bale nene mbœrœ azu kɔ yɔrɔ kolœ manda ye.» Mokɔ œdœ kurushi
12.20: Ɔlɔ angbo li yé anga angbɨ azu ro ndje lima ga lœ Yerusaleme mbœrœ kœdonga Ndjaba.
12.21: Endje na ga ndœ Filipo, uzu tshalakpɨ Betesayida lœ ogo Galilayi, á kœpa lima fœ she adœke: «Gbozu 'a gbe kœwu Yisu.»
12.22: Filipo kœna kœpa fœ Andere á endje na dœ she kœpandœ nœ fœ Yisu.
12.23: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Ngɔngɔ asœ, ada ɔlɔ li adœke Gbolo nœ uzu gbɔ mokɔ nœ ye.
12.24: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke œdœ ele ble kœlili ga lœ ɔshɔ á gba nene, œ sœpe kolœ tœnœ bale. Kashe œ kœli ga lœ ɔshɔ á kœgba, œ ko yekane á zu elenœ ndjoro.
12.25: Uzu á tshe kœyindœ soro ye, tshe sœpe dœ tœnœ nene; kashe tsheneke á tshe kœvwaratœ ye kœtɔpe tœnœ pa tshapashɔnœ asœke, tshe gbɔndœ nœ waa dœ waa.
12.26: Œdœ uzu kœyindœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ mœ, œ li adœke tshe ro manda mœ yé osho á mœ sœ tœnœ dá ayi akwa nœ mœ œ sœ ndje tœnœ. Œdœ uzu kœsœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ mœ, Aba œ donga she.»
12.27: Ngɔngɔ asœ, lɔsu mœ sœ ga lafo yé o'o gaɗe dá mœ kœpa a? Mœ pa adœke: «Aba, she mœ tœ ada ɔlɔnœ asœke a? Kashe œ sœ mbœrœ ada ɔlɔnœ asœke dá mœ na.
12.28: Aba, mbœrœ adœke azu donga ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ.» Yé anga tshama wu ɓa lafo adœke: «Mœ mbœrœ, yé mœ kpa mbœrœ adœke azu donga ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ.»
12.29: Ukpulu azu á endje lœ lima tœ œsœnœ á dji o'onœ asœke pa adœke: «Yavuru dá sɔ asœmœ.» Anga endje pa ndje adœke: «Anga aandjelu dá pa o'o fœ Yisu.»
12.30: Yisu gi adœke: «Tshamanœ á kɨ asœmœ, kɨkɨ mbœrœ mœ nene kashe œ kɨ mbœrœ 'e.»
12.31: Ngɔngɔ asœ dá Ndjaba œ wa ngbanga nœ tshapashɔ asœke, yé ngɔngɔ asœ tshe vwi gbozu tshapashɔnœ ga ushu.
12.32: Yé œmœ, ɔlɔ á endje kœtɨ mœ ga lafo pa ɔshɔ, mœ gbota bala azu para kɔkɔ ga ndœ mœ.
12.33: Tshe pa lima o'o asœ mbœrœ kœyisœ mara kuzu á tshe tshu dœ tœnœ.
12.34: Ukpulu azunœ kœgi fœ she adœke: «A dɨ ala mbeti awa akwa adœke, Kristu œ sœ dœ soro waa dœ waa. Ka kotoo á ɓœ pa adœke endje ɓi Gbolo nœ uzu ga pa kurushi á za she tɔ ga lafo a? Gbolo nœ uzunœ asœmœ kœdœ œɗe?»
12.35: Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Ɨngbɨsho sœ damba ugurutœ 'e manda olo teasho. 'E na ana ɓata á 'e sœ dœ ɨngbɨsho mbœrœ adœke ubu osho kœndondondoro 'e nene. Gbambanœ nene, uzu á tshe sœ kœna lœ ubu osho, wuwusœ osho á tshe sœ kœna ga tœnœ nene.
12.36: Ɓata 'e sœ dœ ɨngbɨsho, 'e sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ɨngbɨsho á 'e kœwuta agbolo nœ ɨngbɨsho. Manda kœpa o'onœ asœke, Yisu gitœ ye ugurutœ azu ndjoronœ yé œ zatœ ye yiwa tœnœ tœ endje.» Ɔgbɔ lɔsu nœ Ayuda
12.37: Ayuda wu lima ambárá afá ndjoro á Yisu mbœrœ gbaa, kashe endje sœsœ lima dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye nene,
12.38: liaka o'o á ayi kœgbara o'o Isaya pa lima adœke: «Gbozu Ndjaba, œɗe dá yindœ o'o á 'a pa lima? Yé Gbozu Ndjaba má lima gbɔgbɔ nœ ye fœ uzu œɗe e?»
12.39: Isaya kpa pandœ ádá á azu vwara lima tœ endje tœ kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ:
12.40: «Tshe mbœrœ adœke ala endje bu, mbœrœ á endje kœwuwu osho nene, tshe za ndje œrœ tshu ga pa kœwusœrœ nœ endje, mbœrœ endje kœwusœ œrœ nene, yeka endje kœfatœ endje ga ndœ ye nene, adœke tshe she endje.»
12.41: Isaya gbara lima o'onœ asœ mbœrœ á tshe wu lima mokɔ nœ Yisu yeka á pa lima o'o tœ upu nœ ye.
12.42: Andaa anga agbozu yuda ndjoro sœ lima dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu. Kashe kolœ mbœrœ awa Afarisayi, endje lili lima kœma tœnœ ngbɨ nene adœke endje gɔrɔ endje lœ Sinagoga.
12.43: Endje yi lima ndœ nœ adœke azu donga œne kœropa œneke á Ndjaba œ donga dœ œne ye. Kœwa ngbanga lœ awa o'o Yisu
12.44: Yisu pa ngbɨ adœke: «Uzu á tshe sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ, tshe sœsœ kolœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ nene; tshe sœ dœ tœnœ ga ndœ tsheneke á tshe vwa mœ.
12.45: Yé uzu á tshe sœ kœwu mœ, sœ ndje kœwu tsheneke á tshe vwa mœ.
12.46: Œmœ, mœ kœdœ ɨngbɨsho. Mœ na ga pa tshapashɔ adœke uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ sœ lœ ubu osho nene.
12.47: Œdœ uzu kœsœ kœdji o'o ama mœ á kœgbɔgbɔndœ nœ nene, œ dœ́dœ́ mœ dá wa ngbanga pa ye nene; gbambanœ nene, mœ nana mbœrœ kœwa ngbanga pa tshapashɔ nene kashe mœ na ndœ kœshe tshapashɔ.
12.48: Uzu á tshe kœvwaratœ ye tœ mœ á kœsœ kœdji o'o ama mœ nene, tshe gbɔ ayi kœwa ngbanga pa ye: O'o á mœ pa œ wa ngbanga pa ye bala tœ ndɔngɔlɔ olo.
12.49: Mœ papa o'o tœ mœ dœ tœ mœ nene, kashe Aba á tshe vwa mœ dá za o'o fœ mœ dœ tœ ye adœke mœ pa yé œ mɨndœ nœ.
12.50: Yé mœ wusœ nœ adœke awa oo nœ ye kœdœ soro á ka nene. Œneke á mœ sœ kœpandœ nœ, mœ sœ kœpa tœnœ ɓata Aba pa fœ mœ.»

13.1: Œ sœpe lima olo bale tœ angbo Pake. Yisu wu lima sœ nœ adœke olo kœkatœ tshapashɔnœ tɨ á kœgu ga ndœ Aba œne li ye. Tshe yi lima ndœ ayambarœ nœ ye á endje sœ pa ɔshɔ, yé œ yi ndje ndœ endje œrrr ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ.
13.2: Yisu sœ lima kœzɨrœ awa bale dœ ayambarœ nœ ye. Andaa Satana za gbetshelœ ga lɔsu Yudasi Isikariote, gbolo nœ Shimu adœke tshe ka Yisu.
13.3: Yisu wu lima sœ nœ adœke Aba za tshagbozu nœ tshapa œrœ kɔ fœ œne. Œne to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba yé œne sœ kœgu ga ndœ Ndjaba.
13.4: Yisu áafo ɨndɨrɨ ndaba kœzɨrœ, œ verœ lœba œnœ tshapanœ tœ ye, œ za anga akpa lœba œ i ga lœ ye.
13.5: Manda nœ, tshe su ungu ga lœ saane, œ tetœ kœdjutɔ ada ayambarœ nœ ye, á sœ kœturu dœ lœbanœ á tshe i ga lœ ye.
13.6: Kœwuta ga tœ Shimu Petro, tshe kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu œɓœ dá djutɔ ada mœ a?»
13.7: Yisu kœgi adœke: «Ngɔngɔ asœ, ɓœ wuwusœ œrœ á mœ sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ asœke nene kashe ɓœ wu bala sœ nœ manda nœ.»
13.8: Petro kœpa fœ she adœke: «Œ̃œ̃ nene, ɓœ djutɔ ada mœ bale nene.» Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Œdœ mœ kœdjudjutɔ ada zœ nene, ɓœ gbɔ œrœ bale ɓa ndœ mœ nene.»
13.9: Á Petro kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, œ kœsœ adja ataa, djudjutɔ kolœ ada mœ nene, djutɔ ndje kane mœ œdœ pe kumu mœ.»
13.10: Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Uzu á tshe kœdjutɔ kote ye, œ li adœke tshe djutɔ kolœ ada ye, gbambanœ nene, tshe sœ djigi yerœ. Yé e'e, 'e sœ yerœ kashe œ dœ́dœ́ e'e kɔ dá sœ yerœ nene.»
13.11: Tshe wu lima sœ tsheneke á tshe ka she dœ ɔtshɔnœ yekane á pa adœke: «'E dœ́dœ́ e'e kɔ dá sœ yerœ nene.»
13.12: Manda kœdjutɔ ada endje, tshe kpa verœ lœba tshapanœ ga tœ ye, œ kwa ga pa ndaba kœzɨrœ, á pa adœke: «'E wusœ ádá œrœ á mœ mbœrœ fœ 'e asœke ye a?
13.13: 'E sœ kœ'e mœ Ayi kœyisœrœ, 'e e ndje mœ Gbozu. 'E sœ kœ'e mœ tako mbœrœ œmœ kœdœ ayi kœyisœrœ, œmœ kœdœ ndje Gbozu.
13.14: Ɓata œmœ á mœ dœ́ ayi kœyisœrœ, á dœ Gbozu, mœ djutɔ ada 'e, œ li adœke e'e ndje, 'e djutɔ ada 'e ugurutœ 'e dœ anga 'e.
13.15: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ mœ kœna œrrr ga tœ kœdjutɔ ada 'e, œmœ á mœ dœ́ Ayi kœyisœrœ œdœ ndje Gbozu, e'e ndje 'e djutɔ ada 'e ugurutœ 'e dœ anga 'e.
13.16: Mœ pa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, ayi akwa roro gbozu tshapa ye nene, yé ayi avwa roropa ayi kœvwa she nene.
13.17: Œdœ 'e kœwusœ nœ ataa, 'e sœ dœ yanga œdœ 'e kœza o'onœ asœke ga tœ akwa.
13.18: Mœ sœsœ kœpa o'o fœ 'e kɔkɔ nene yé mœ wusœ endjeneke á mœ ke endje. Œ li adœke o'o á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba mbœrœtœ endje: “Uzunœ á 'a zɨ lima kœzɨrœ awa bale dœ she, œshe dá wuta uzu kœka mœ.”
13.19: Mœ sœ kœpa o'o fœ 'e ngɔngɔ asœke utshunœ adœke o'onœ wuta, yeka á 'e kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ adœke “mœ sœ zœ.”
13.20: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke uzu á tshe za osho kœsœ fœ tsheneke á mœ vwa she, za ndje osho kœsœ fœ mœ. Yé uzu á tshe za osho kœsœ fœ mœ, tshe za osho kœsœ fœ tsheneke á tshe vwa mœ.» Yisu gbara adœke Yudasi œ ka œne (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.20-25; Mar 14.17-21; Luk 22.21-23)
13.21: Manda kœpa o'onœ asœ, lɔsu Yisu sœ ga lafo yé tshe pa 'oara adœke: «Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, anga uzu bale ugurutœ 'e œ ka mœ.»
13.22: Ayambarœ kœte lima tœ kœmesho ugurutœ endje yé á sœ lima kœyutœ endje tœ kœwusœ uzu á tshe pa o'o tœ ye asœmœ.
13.23: Anga yambarœ bale, tsheneke á Yisu yi lima ndœ ye, sœ lima kpœndɨrɨ Yisu.
13.24: Shimu Petro mbœrœ ala ye fœ she adœke tshe yu Yisu tœ uzunœ á tshe sœ kœpa o'onœ tœ ye.
13.25: Á yambarœnœ asœmœ kœgitœ ye ga lakoro Yisu á kœyu she adœke: «Gbozu, uzunœ á ɓœ patœ ye asœmœ kœdœ œɗe e?»
13.26: Yisu gi adœke: «Uzu á mœ kœyi ndɨndɨ mapa ga la ungu kœzɨrœ á kœza fœ she dá œshe dœmœ.» Atamœ, Yisu kœza ndɨndɨ mapanœ á kœza fœ Yudasi Isikariote á tshe kœdœ gbolo nœ shimu.
13.27: Lɔkɔ á Yudasi za ndɨndɨ mapanœ tshakane Yisu, Satana kœli ga lœ Yudasi. Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Œneke á ɓœ yindœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ, mbœrœ katsha.»
13.28: Uzu bale ugurutœ endje á endje sœ lima pa ndaba kœzɨrœ á tshe wu lima sœ ádá o'onœ á tshe pa fœ she gugu nene.
13.29: Ɓata ngbade kœgbɔndœ ngendja sœ lima ɓa tshakane Yudasi, anga endje gbe lima adœke Yisu pa fœ she adœke tshe yɔ œrœ á endje sœ dœ ogonœ mbœrœ angbo too ndje adœke tshe to anga œrœ fœ aayi oyo.
13.30: Yudasi zɨ ndɨndɨ mapa asœmœ, yé trale œ wuta ga ushu. Osho bu lima ye. O'o tœ upu nœ tafo awa o'o
13.31: Manda kœwuta Yudasi ga ushu, Yisu kœpa adœke: «Ngɔngɔ asœke, mokɔ nœ Gbolo nœ uzu matœ ye, yé mokɔ nœ Ndjaba ma ndje tœ ye lœ awa nœ Gbolo nœ uzu.
13.32: Ndjaba œ ma mokɔ nœ Gbolo nœ uzu dœ tœ ye, yé œndœnœ œ dɨ nene á tshe mbœrœ œtœnœ.
13.33: Agbolo nœ mœ, mœ sœpe dœ 'e kolœ manda olo teasho. 'E para mœ yé ɓata á mœ pa fœ Ayuda: Osho á mœ na ga tœnœ, 'e li kœna ɓa zœ nene. Œtœnœ dá mœ sœ ndje kpa kœpa ngɔngɔ asœ fœ 'e asœke.
13.34: Mœ sœ kœza tafo awa o'o fœ 'e: 'e yindœtœ 'e ugurutœ 'e. Œ li adœke 'e yindœtœ 'e ugurutœ 'e ɓata á mœ yindœ 'e.
13.35: Atamœ, azu kɔ œ wusœ nœ adœke e'e kœdœ ayambarœ nœ mœ lœ awa nœ kœyindœsho á 'e sœ dœ tœnœ ugurutœ 'e.» Yisu mɨndœ nœ adœke Petro œ 'ea œne (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.31-35; Mar 14.27-31; Luk 22.31-34)
13.36: Shimu Petro yu she adœke: «Gbozu, ɓœ na ga ta a?» Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Osho á mœ sœ kœna ga tœnœ, ɓœ li kœna ga tœnœ ngɔngɔ asœke nene, kashe ɓœ na bala mangba mœ manda nœ.»
13.37: Petro kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, mbœrœ gaɗe á mœ li kœna mangba zœ ngɔngɔ asœke nene a? Gbambanœ nene, mœ gumatœ mœ mbœrœ kœzatœ mœ fœ kuzu tœ upu nœ zœ.»
13.38: Yisu kœgi adœke: «Adja ɓœ gumatœ zœ mbœrœ kœzatœ zœ fœ kuzu mbœrœ mœ ye a? Mœ sœ kœpa fœ ɓœ dœ adjapu adœke, utshunœ adœke kɔngato kɨ, ɓœ 'ea mœ awa votɔ.»

14.1: Yisu kpa pa fœ endje adœke: «Lɔsu 'e tɔtɔ nene. 'E sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Ndjaba, yé œ sœ ndje dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ.
14.2: Ɓa lœ anda nœ Aba mœ, osho kœsœ sœ ndjoro. Œ kœdœ́dœ́ má adjapu nene, mœ pa má ndœ nœ fœ 'e nene. Kashe mœ sœ kœna ɓa zœ kœguma osho á 'e kœsœ bala tœnœ.
14.3: Yé manda kœna mœ ndœ kœguma oshonœ fœ 'e, mœ kwa bala tœ mœ ndœ kœko 'e adœke osho á mœ sœ tœnœ; 'e sœ ndje bala tœnœ.
14.4: 'E wusœ awa á sœ kœna ga tœ osho á mœ sœ kœna ga tœnœ ye.»
14.5: Toma kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, 'a wuwusœ osho á ɓœ sœ kœna ga tœnœ bale nene. Ataa 'a wu má sœ nœ kotoo?»
14.6: Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Œmœ kœdœ awa, œmœ kœdœ adja o'o, œmœ kœdœ ndje soro. Uzu bale lili kœwuta ɓa ndœ Aba, œdœ tshe kœwuwuta ɓa ndœ mœ nene.
14.7: Œdœ 'e kœwu má sœ mœ, 'e wu má ndje sœ Aba mœ ye. Ngɔngɔ asœke, 'e wusœ ye, yé 'e wu ndje she ye.»
14.8: Á Filipo kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, yisœ Aba fœ 'a yé 'a kpa gbe dœ anga œrœ nene.»
14.9: Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Filipo, ɓalima a sœ dœ 'e œrrr asœke, ɓœ wuwusœ mœ nene a? Uzu á tshe wu mœ, wu ndje Aba. Mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ pa adœke: “Yisœ Aba fœ 'a?”
14.10: Ɓœ yiyindœ nœ adœke mœ sœ lœ Aba yé Aba sœ lœ mœ nene a? O'o á mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e toto lœ mœ dœ tœ mœ nene. Kashe Aba á tshe sœ lœ mœ dá sœ kœmbœrœ adja akwa nœ ye.
14.11: 'E yindœ o'o ama mœ: Aba sœ lœ mœ yé mœ sœ lœ Aba. Œdœ 'e kœyiyindœ o'o ama mœ nene, 'e yindœ nœ kolœ mbœrœ akwanœ asœke.
14.12: Mœ sœ kœpa dœ adjapu fœ 'e adœke: Uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ, tshe mbœrœ ndje akwa á mœ sœ tœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ. Tshe mbœrœ bala ndje ogboro akwa kœropa œneke, mbœrœ mœ sœ kœgu ga ndœ Aba.
14.13: Yé œrœ kɔ á 'e eshondœ nœ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ, mœ mbœrœ bala œtœnœ dœ mara adœke mokɔ nœ Aba matœ ye lœ Gbolo.
14.14: Œdœ 'e kœ'eshondœ œrœ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ, mœ mbœrœ bala œtœnœ.» Aba œ vwa Ɨshirɨ
14.15: Œdœ 'e kœyindœ mœ, 'e mbœrœtœ 'e liaka awa o'o nœ mœ,
14.16: œmœ, mœ kɨ fœ Aba adœke tshe vwa anga ayi kœtɨ kane manda mœ fœ 'e, á tshe kœsœ dœ 'e awa bale waa dœ waa.
14.17: Œshe kœdœ Ɨshirɨ nœ adja o'o, tsheneke á tshapashɔ œ li kœza osho kœsœ fœ she nene; gbambanœ nene, tshe sœsœ kœwu she yé œ wu ndje sœ ye nene. Kashe e'e, 'e wusœ ye yé mbœrœ tshe sœ awa bale dœ 'e yé tshe sœ lœ 'e.
14.18: Mœ ka bala tœ 'e tɨ tœ ayasuru nene, kashe mœ sœ kœkwatœ mœ ndœ 'e.
14.19: Manda olo teasho, tshapashɔ œ kpa wu mœ nene. Kashe e'e, 'e wu bala mœ mbœrœ á mœ sœ dœ soro yé 'e sœ ndje bala dœ soro.
14.20: Dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, 'e wu bala sœ nœ adœke mœ sœ lœ Aba, 'e sœ lœ mœ yé mœ sœ lœ 'e.
14.21: «Uzu á tshe sœ kœdji awa o'o nœ mœ á sœ kœza ga tœ akwa, sœ kœyindœ mœ. Aba mœ œ yindœ uzu á tshe sœ kœyindœ mœ. Œmœ, mœ yi bala ndœ ye yé mœ ma bala tœ mœ fœ she.»
14.22: Yuda (œ dœ́dœ́ Yuda Isikariote nene) kœyu she adœke: «Gbozu, mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ matœ zœ kolœ fœ 'a kashe fœ tshapashɔ nene a?»
14.23: Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Œdœ uzu kœyindœ mœ, tshe lɨ bala sœ o'o ama mœ. Aba mœ œ yindœ ye yé œmœ dœ pe Aba 'a na ga ndœ ye, œ guma osho kœsœ nœ 'a ɓa ndœ ye.
14.24: Uzu á tshe kœyiyindœ mœ nene, tshe lɨsœ o'o ama mœ nene. O'o á 'e sœ kœdji mœ kœpa tœnœ toto lœ mœ nene kashe œ to ɓa ndœ Aba á tshe vwa mœ.
14.25: Mœ pa o'o asœ fœ 'e damba á mœ sœpe lima awa bale dœ 'e
14.26: Kashe Ayi kœtɨ kane 'e á tshe dœ́ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ á Aba œ vwa bala she dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ, tshe yi bala sœ œrœ kɔ yé œ kpa pa bala ndœ œneke kɔ á mœ pa fœ 'e.
14.27: «Mœ sœ kœkatœ kœsœ gee fœ 'e, œtœnœ kœdœ kœsœ gee nœ mœ á mœ sœ kœza fœ 'e. Mœ zaza kœsœ geenœ fœ 'e liaka œneke á tshapashɔ œ za nene. Adja lɔsu 'e tɔtɔ nene yé awa mbœmbœrœ ndje 'e nene.
14.28: 'E dji mœ lima kœpa fœ 'e adœke: “Mœ ro da ye, yé mœ kpa kwatœ mœ ga ndœ 'e.” Œdœ 'e kœyi má ndœ mœ, 'e sœ má dœ yanga kœwu adœke mœ sœ kœna ga ndœ Aba, gbambanœ nene Aba gerœ kœropa mœ.
14.29: Mœ pandœ o'onœ asœ fœ 'e ngɔngɔ asœke, utshunœ adœke œrœnœ wuta; mbœrœ lɔkɔ á kœwuta yekane á 'e kœyindœ nœ.
14.30: Kœto kpesheke, mœ kpa pa tshama mœ dœ 'e nene, gbambanœ nene, gbozu tshapashɔ asœ sœ kœna tœnœ. Tshe dœ́dœ́ gbozu tshapa mœ nene.
14.31: Kashe tshe na mbœrœ á tshapashɔ kœwusœ nœ adœke mœ yindœ Aba yé mœ sœ kœmbœrœ kolœ œneke á Aba za fœ mœ adœke mœ mbœrœ. 'E aafo dœ́ a gitœ azœ kpœke ye.»

15.1: «Œmœ kœdœ adja ɔyɔ vinu yé Aba mœ kœdœ ayi kœmbœrœ akwa kɨndɨ vinunœ.
15.2: Ganea kɔ á tɔ ga tœ mœ á kœle nene, tshe de ye. Yé ganea á kœle, tshe gbɔndœ nœ adœke œ kpa le tɔpanœ kpuru.
15.3: Kœyisœrœ nœ á mœ yisœ nœ fœ 'e asœke guma 'e.
15.4: 'E zatœ 'e ga tœ mœ ɓata á mœ zatœ mœ ga tœ 'e. Ɓata ganea á kœsœsœ tœ ɔyɔ nene, œ zu elenœ nene; awa bale ndje 'e zu nene œdœ 'e kœzazatœ 'e ga tœ mœ nene.
15.5: «Œmœ kœdœ ɔyɔ vinu yé e'e kœdœ ganeanœ. Œdœ uzu kœsœ lœ mœ á mœ sœ lœ ye, tshe zu leyɔ tɔ pa nœ kpuru; gbambanœ nene, 'e li kœmbœrœ œrœ bale kpi tœ mœ nene.
15.6: Uzu á tshe kœsœsœ lœ mœ nene, Aba mœ œ za she vwi'i ɓata ganea asœmœ yé tshe ɔrɔ ye. Ɔɔrɔ ganea, endje zoma, œ ko va ga tœ owo yé œ ju.
15.7: Œdœ 'e kœsœ lœ mœ, á o'o mœ kœsœ lœ 'e, 'e eshondœ œrœ á 'e gbe dœ tœnœ yé 'e gbɔ.
15.8: Œrœ á ma mokɔ nœ Aba mœ kœdœ adœke 'e zu leyɔ tɔ pa nœ kpuru yé 'e dœ ayambarœ nœ mœ.
15.9: «Ɓata Aba yindœ mœ, œmœ ndje mœ yindœ 'e; 'e sœ lœ kœyindœsho nœ mœ.
15.10: Œdœ 'e kœlɨsœ awa o'o nœ mœ, 'e sœ lœ kœyindœsho nœ mœ, ɓata á mœ lɨsœ awa o'o nœ Aba mœ á sœ lœ kœyindœsho nœ ye.
15.11: «Mœ pandœ œneke fœ 'e adœke 'e sœ dœ yanga ɓata mœ, yé lɔsu 'e kœsu pete dœ tœnœ.
15.12: Awa o'o nœ mœ dœke: 'E yindœtœ 'e ugurutœ 'e ɓata á mœ yindœ 'e.
15.13: Egerœ kœyindœsho á uzu li kœma kœdœ kœzatœ ye fœ kuzu mbœrœ anganœ.
15.14: 'E dœ anga mœ, œdœ 'e kœsœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á mœ pandœ nœ fœ 'e adœke 'e mbœrœ.
15.15: Mœ kpa e 'e aayi akwa nene, mbœrœ aayi akwa wuwusœ œrœ á ayengɔ ye œ mbœrœ nene. E'e kœdœ anga mœ; gbambanœ nene, œneke kɔ á mœ dji ɓa ndœ Aba mœ, mœ pandœ nœ fœ 'e adœke 'e wusœ nœ.
15.16: Œ dœ́dœ́ 'e dá ke mœ nene, œmœ dá ke 'e á ko 'e ga tœ akwa adœke 'e na, œ zu ɔtshɔ leyɔ yé œndœ akwanœ dɨ. Atamœ, Aba œ to fœ 'e œneke kɔ á 'e eshondœ nœ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ ɓa ndœ ye.
15.17: Œneke á mœ sœ kœ'eshondœ nœ ga ndœ 'e kœdœ adœke, 'e yindœtœ 'e ugurutœ 'e.» Tshapashɔ yiangba Yisu dœ ayambarœ nœ ye
15.18: «Œdœ tshapashɔ kœyiangba 'e, 'e wusœ nœ adœke tshe yiangba mœ utshunœ.
15.19: Œdœ 'e kœdœ má lima azu tshapashɔ, tshapashɔ œ yi má ndœ 'e. Kashe 'e dœ́dœ́ azu tshapashɔ nene mbœrœ á mœ ke 'e á ko 'e ga ɨndɨrɨnœ, ádá á tshe sœ kœyiangba 'e dœmœ.
15.20: 'E gbe dœ o'o á mœ pa lima fœ 'e adœke: “Ayi akwa roropa gbozu nœ ye nene.” Œdœ endje kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ mœ, endje mbœrœ ndje œrœ kanga fœ 'e ndje awa bale. Œdœ endje kœlɨsœ o'o ama mœ, endje lɨ ndje sœ œnœ 'e ye.
15.21: Yé kpœ lœ kumu ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ, endje mbœrœ œrœ asœke kɔ ga tœ 'e, mbœrœ á endje wuwusœ uzu á tshe vwa mœ nene.
15.22: Œdœ mœ kœnana má lima nene, á mœ kœpapa má ndje lima o'o fœ endje nene, endje mbœrœ má ekperœ nene. Kashe ngɔngɔ asœ endje kpa gugu dœ o'o kœpa tœ upu ekperœ nœ endje nene.
15.23: Uzu á tshe kœyiangba mœ, yi ndje angba Aba mœ.
15.24: Œdœ mœ kœmbœmbœrœ lima ugurutœ endje akwa má anga angbɨ uzu œ mbœrœ nene, endje mbœrœ má ekperœ nene. Kashe ngɔngɔ asœke ɓata á endje wu œtœnœ ye, œ sœpe kœyiangba mœ dœ Aba mœ.
15.25: Kashe œneke wuta yeka á o'o á endje sú lima ala awa akwa nœ endje kœmbœrœtœ ye. Endje su lima adœke: “Endje yiangba mœ gbambanœ.”
15.26: «Uzu neke á tshe na ndœ kœtɨ kane 'e, œ na zœ: Œshe kœdœ Ɨshirɨ nœ adja o'o á tshe to ɓa ndœ Aba. Mœ vwa bala she fœ 'e lœ awa nœ Aba yé tshe pa bala o'o tœ upu nœ mœ.
15.27: E'e ndje, 'e pa o'o tœ upu nœ mœ mbœrœ á 'e sœ lima dœ mœ awa bale pe tœ ali kœtetœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ mœ.

16.1: «Mœ pa o'onœ asœ kɔ fœ 'e adœke 'e kakatœ kœyindœrœ nœ 'e tɨ nene.
16.2: Endje gɔrɔ 'e lœ anda Sinagoga. Ga pa nœ, ɔlɔ œ tɔ dœ anga osho, azu á endje wo 'e œ gbe adœke œne sœ ndje kœdonga Ndjaba.
16.3: Endje mbœrœ ataa mbœrœ endje wuwusœ Aba œdœ ndje mœ nene.
16.4: Kashe mœ pa tœnœ fœ 'e adœke bala olo nœ endje kœli yekane á œndœnœ œ te lœ 'e adœke mœ turu lima tœ o'o asœke fœ 'e ye.» Akwa nœ Ɨshirɨ «Mœ papa lima o'o fœ 'e utshunœ nene mbœrœ á mœ sœ lima awa bale dœ 'e.
16.5: Kashe ngɔngɔ asœke, mœ sœ kœgu ga ndœ tsheneke á tshe vwa mœ. Yé uzu bale ugurutœ 'e sœsœ kœyu mœ nene adœke: “Ɓœ gu gata a?”
16.6: Kashe lɔsu 'e su dœ oyo mbœrœ á mœ pa fœ 'e atamœ.
16.7: Yé œ li adœke mœ pa adja o'o fœ 'e: Œ ga waa mbœrœ 'e adœke mœ gu da ye, mbœrœ œdœ mœ kœgugu nene, tsheneke á li adœke tshe na kœtɨ kane 'e, œ na nene. Œdœ mœ kœgu da ye yekane á mœ vwa she fœ 'e.
16.8: Yé lɔkɔ á tshe kœna, tshe ma djingili nœ tshapashɔ fœ she tœ upu nœ ekperœ, upu nœ kœsœ ndjii œdœ pe kœwa ngbanga.
16.9: Tœ upu nœ ekperœ, mbœrœ á endje sœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ nene;
16.10: tœ upu nœ kœsœ ndjii, mbœrœ á mœ sœ kœgu ga ndœ Aba yé 'e kpa wu mœ nene;
16.11: tœ upu nœ kœwa ngbanga, mbœrœ á Ndjaba wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ gbozu tshapashɔnœ asœke œ ka ye.
16.12: «Mœ sœ dœ anga o'o ndjoro tœ kœpa fœ 'e, kashe 'e li kœdji tshelœ katanœ damba ngɔngɔ asœke nene.
16.13: Lɔkɔ á Ɨshirɨ nœ adja o'o œ na, tshe za awa fœ 'e adœke 'e wusœ adja o'o para kɔkɔ. Tshe pa bala o'o tœ upu nœ ye dœ tœ ye nene kashe o'o neke á tshe dji, yé œ mɨ ndje ndœ œrœ neke kɔ á wuta manda nœ.
16.14: Tshe yi bala sœ mokɔ nœ mœ; gbambanœ nene, tshe mɨ bala ndœ œneke á tshe gbɔ ɓa ndœ mœ fœ 'e.
16.15: Œrœ kɔ á Aba sœ dœ tœnœ kœdœ œnœ mœ, ádánœ á mœ pa adœke tshe mɨ bala ndœ œneke á tshe gbɔ ɓa ndœ mœ fœ 'e. Oyo nœ 'e œ wuta bala yanga
16.16: «Manda olo teasho, 'e kpa wu mœ nene, yeka manda nœ á 'e kpa wu mœ»
16.17: Yé anga ayambarœ nœ ye yutœ endje ugurutœ endje adœke: «Œneta dá kɨ lœ ama ye ataa: “Manda aya olo, 'e kpa wu mœ nene, yeka teasho manda nœ á 'e kpa wu mœ”, too ndje: “Mœ gu ga ndœ Aba.”
16.18: Ádá olo teashonœ á tshe sœ kœpa tœnœ kœdœ gaɗe e? 'A wuwusœ o'o á tshe yindœ kœpa tœnœ nene!»
16.19: Yisu wu lima sœ nœ adœke endje yi lima ndœ kœyu œne yé á pa fœ endje adœke: «'E sœ kœyutœ 'e ugurutœ 'e tœ ádá o'o á mœ pa: “Manda aya olo, 'e kpa wu mœ nene, yeka teasho manda nœ á 'e kpa wu mœ.”
16.20: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke 'e kɨ, 'e ta rawa kashe tshapashɔ œ sœ dœ yanga. 'E sœ dœ oyo kashe oyo nœ 'e œ fatœ endje tœ yanga.
16.21: Lɔkɔ á yashe nguzu œ zu, tshe wu oyo mbœrœ olo kuzu she li ye. Manda kœwuta gbolo, tshe kpa gbe dœ oyo á tshe wu nene, tshe sœ kolœ dœ yanga mbœrœ uzu á tshe zu she ga pa tshapashɔ.
16.22: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa dá e'e ndje ngɔngɔ asœ, 'e sœ dœ oyo kashe mœ kpa wu 'e yé lɔsu 'e œ su dœ yanga neke á uzu bale œ za tœ lɔsu 'e nene.
16.23: «Yé dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, 'e kpa yu mœ dœ upu bale nene. Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, œdœ 'e kœ'eshondœ anga œrœ ɓa ndœ Aba dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ, tshe to bala tœnœ fœ 'e.
16.24: Œrrr kpesheke 'e yɔyɔ damba ndœ œrœ bale dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ nene. 'E yɔndœ nœ yé 'e gbɔ bala yeka á lɔsu 'e kœsu dœ yanga.» Yisu ropa tshapashɔ
16.25: «Mœ pandœ œneke kɔ fœ 'e lœ ndœma toro. Ɔlɔnœ kœtɔ, mœ kpa pa o'o fœ 'e ataa nene, kashe mœ mɨndœ o'o ngbɨ tœ upu nœ Aba.
16.26: Lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, 'e eshondœ œrœ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ andaa mœ pa fœ 'e adœke mœ za avwala fœ Aba tœ upu nœ 'e nene.
16.27: Gbambanœ nene, Aba yindœ 'e dœ tœ ye mbœrœ á 'e yindœ mœ, á sœ dœ kœyindœrœ adœke mœ to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba.
16.28: Mœ to ɓa ndœ Aba yé á na ga pa ɔshɔ. Ngɔngɔ asœ mœ katœ tshapashɔ tɨ œ sœ kœgu ga ndœ Aba.»
16.29: Ayambarœ nœ ye kœpa fœ she adœke: «Wu ngɔngɔ asœke ɓœ sœ kœsɔ ala o'onœ ngbɨ, œ ka ndje tœ kœpa o'o lœ ndœma toro ye.
16.30: Ngɔngɔ asœke 'a wusœ nœ adœke ɓœ wusœ œrœ kɔ, yé ádá adœke uzu yu ɓœ gugu nene. Mbœrœ tœnœ dá 'a yindœ nœ adœke ɓœ to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba.»
16.31: Yisu kœgi fœ endje adœke: «'E yindœ nœ ngɔngɔ asœke a?
16.32: 'E wu adœke ɔlɔnœ yindœ kœtɔ tœnœ yé œ tɔ ye á 'e ndjɔtshelœtœ 'e, uzu dœ uzu dœ awa nœ ye á katœ mœ tɨ dœ kutɨ mœ. Kashe mœ sœsœ dœ kutɨ mœ nene, mbœrœ Aba sœ dœ mœ awa bale.
16.33: Mœ pa o'onœ asœke fœ 'e adœke 'e sœ dœ kœsœ gee lœ mœ. 'E wu oyo pa tshapashɔnœ asœ kashe 'e shi gbɨ! Mœ ropa tshapashɔ dœ gbɔgbɔ ye.»

17.1: Manda kœpa o'onœ asœ, Yisu meosho ga lafo œ pa adœke: «Aba, ɔlɔnœ tɔ ye. Yisœ mokɔ nœ Gbolo nœ zœ adœke Gbolo nœ zœ yi ndje œsœ œnœ zœ.
17.2: Yé mbœrœ tshagbozu á ɓœ za fœ she ga pa azu kɔ, tshe za soro neke á ka nene fœ azu kɔ á ɓœ ko endje fœ she.
17.3: Andaa soro á ka nene, œtœnœ kœdœ adœke endje wusœ zœ á ɓœ dœ́ adja Ndjaba tshebale, œ wu ndje sœ Yisu Kristu á ɓœ vwa she.
17.4: Mœ yisœ mokɔ nœ zœ fœ azu pa ɔshɔnœ asœke, mœ mbœrœ akwa kɔ á ɓœ za fœ mœ adœke mœ mbœrœ.
17.5: Yé Ngɔngɔ asœke, Aba, gi mœ ga lœ mokɔ á mœ sœ lima lœ nœ utshunœ adœke tshalafo dœ pe tshaatɨ sœ zœ.
17.6: Mœ má ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ fœ azu á ɓœ ke endje pa tshapashɔ á ko endje fœ mœ. Endje kœdœ lima azu nœ zœ, á ɓœ ko endje fœ mœ yé endje dji o'o ama zœ.
17.7: Endje wusœ nœ ngɔngɔ asœke adœke, œneke kɔ á ɓœ ko fœ mœ to ɓa ndœ zœ,
17.8: adœke o'o á mœ pa fœ endje kœdœ o'o á ɓœ to fœ mœ. Endje dji œtœnœ, œ wu adja sœ nœ adœke mœ to ɓa ndœ zœ, yé endje yindœ nœ adœke œɓœ dá vwa mœ.
17.9: «Mœ sœ kœza avwala mbœrœ endje, mœ sœsœ kœza avwala mbœrœ azu tshapashɔ nene, kashe mbœrœ endjeneke á ɓœ ko endje fœ mœ. Endje kœdœ azu nœ zœ.
17.10: Yé œneke kɔ á mœ sœ dœ tœnœ kœdœ œnœ zœ ɓata œneke kɔ á dœ́ œnœ zœ kœdœ œnœ mœ. Mokɔ nœ mœ matœ ye lœ awa nœ endje.
17.11: Mœ kpa sœsœpe pa tshapashɔ nene, kashe endje sœpe pa tshapashɔnœ asœke, andaa mœ sœ kœgu ga ndœ zœ. Œyerœ Aba, gbɔndœ endje lœ ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ á ɓœ za fœ mœ adœke endje wuta uzu bale ɓata œɓœ dœ mœ a sœ uzu bale.
17.12: Lɔkɔ á mœ sœ lima dœ endje, mœ sœ lima kœgbɔndœ endje lœ ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ á ɓœ za fœ mœ. Mœ gbɔ lima ndœ endje yé anga bale djidjingili awa nene kolœ tsheneke á li lima adœke tshe djingili awa yekane á œneke á endje sú ala Buku nœ zœ kœmbœrœtœ endje.
17.13: «Ngɔngɔ asœke, mœ sœ kœgu ga ndœ zœ. Mœ sœ kœpa o'onœ asœ damba mœ sœpe pa ɔshɔ adœke endje sú dœ yanga ɓata á mœ sú dœ tœnœ.
17.14: Mœ yi lima sœ o'o ama zœ fœ endje, yé azu tshapashɔ yiangba endje mbœrœ endje dœ́dœ́ azu tshapashɔ nene ɓata œmœ, mœ dœ́dœ́ uzu tshapashɔ nene.
17.15: Mœ sœsœ kœyu ɓœ adœke ɓœ gi endje pa tshapashɔ nene kashe ɓœ gbɔndœ endje tœ ekperœ.
17.16: Endje dœ́dœ́ azu tshapashɔnœ asœke nene ɓata mœ dœ́dœ́ uzu tshapashɔ nene.
17.17: Mbœrœ adœke lœ awa nœ adja o'o, endje te ayerœ azu. O'o ama zœ kœdœ adja o'o.
17.18: Ɓata á ɓœ vwa mœ ga pa tshapashɔ, awa bale mœ vwa endje ga pa tshapashɔ.
17.19: Mœ sœ kœza soro mœ mbœrœ endje adœke endje te adja azu nœ zœ lœ awa nœ adja o'o.
17.20: «Mœ sœsœ kœza avwala kolœ mbœrœ ayambarœ nœ mœ nene, mœ za ndje avwala mbœrœ azu kɔ á endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ mœ lœ awa o'o ama endje.
17.21: Kaka adœke endje para kɔkɔ endje sœ uzu bale ɓata œbœ Aba á ɓœ sœ lœ mœ, á mœ sœ lœ zœ; endje ndje, endje sœ lœ azœ yeka á tshapashɔ kœwusœ nœ adœke œɓœ dá vwa mœ.
17.22: Yé œmœ, mœ za mokɔ á ɓœ za fœ mœ fœ endje adœke endje sœ uzu bale ɓata á a sœ dœ ɓœ uzu bale,
17.23: œmœ lœ endje ɓata œɓœ lœ mœ, adœke endje wuta adja bale yekane á azu tshapashɔ kœwusœ nœ adœke œɓœ dá vwa mœ, yé ɓœ yindœ endje ɓata á ɓœ yindœ mœ.
17.24: «Aba, ɓœ dá ko endje fœ mœ. Mœ yindœ nœ adœke osho á mœ sœ tœnœ, endjeneke á ɓœ ko endje fœ mœ sœ ndje tœnœ awa bale dœ mœ, adœke endje wu mokɔ á ɓœ za fœ mœ. Gbambanœ nene, ɓœ yi lima ndœ mœ utshu adœke ɓœ mbœrœ tshapashɔ.
17.25: Aba á ɓœ sœ ndjii, tshapashɔ wuwusœ zœ nene kashe mœ wusœ zœ yé endjeneke á endje sœ asœke, endje wusœ nœ adœke œɓœ dá vwa mœ.
17.26: Mœ yisœ ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ fœ endje yé mœ kpa yisœ nœ adœke kœyindœsho nœ zœ ga ndœ mœ sœ lœ endje yé œmœ dœ tœ mœ lœ endje.»

18.1: Manda o'onœ asœke, Yisu ro awa bale dœ ayambarœ nœ ye ɓa kele yangangu Sedroni. Anga aya kɨndɨ sœ lima ɓa zœ á tshe li ga lœnœ dœ ayambarœ nœ ye.
18.2: Yudasi á tshe ka she wu lima sœ oshonœ; gbambanœ nene, Yisu sœ lima kœngbɔtœ ye kpala kpala dœ ayambarœ nœ ye ɓa zœ.
18.3: Yudasi te utshu ukpulu aturugu, dœ aayi kœgbɔndœ anda Tepelo á agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba œdœ Afarisayi vwa endje. Endje wuta ɓa lœ aya kɨndɨnœ dœ owo tadja, dœ miinda œdœ pe œrœ kœnga dœ koshe.
18.4: Yé Yisu á tshe wu lima sœ œrœ kɔ á mbœrœ ga tœ ye, na á yu endje adœke: «'E sœ kœpara ɗe e?»
18.5: Endje gi fœ she adœke: «Yisu, uzu Nazarete.» Á Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Œmœ dœke.» Andaa, Yudasi á tshe ka she sœ ndje lima ugurutœ azunœ zœ.
18.6: Lɔkɔ á Yisu pa fœ endje adœke «Œmœ dœke», endje gitœ endje kɨtrɨkɨtrɨ ga mangbanœ yé œ yo ga atɨ.
18.7: Yisu kpa kœyu endje adœke: «'E sœ kœpara ɗe e?» Endje kœgi adœke: «Yisu, uzu Nazarete.»
18.8: Á Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Mœ pa fœ 'e adœke, œmœ dœke. Œdœ 'e kœsœ tœ kœpara mœ, 'e katœ endjeneke tɨ dœ endje gu.»
18.9: Œ sœ ataa yeka á o'o á tshe pa lima kœmbœrœtœ ye. Tshe pa lima adœke: «Endjeneke á ɓœ ko endje fœ mœ, anga bale djidjingili awa nene.»
18.10: Ataa, Shimu Petro á tshe sœ lima dœ ɨngɨrɨ yakamba, gbota lœ ɔkɔnœ á wa utu ayi akwa nœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba ndja tœnœ. Œ dœ lima utu ga pa kuni nœ ayi akwa á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Malkusu.
18.11: Kashe yisu pa fœ Petro adœke: «Gi ɨngɨrɨ yakamba nœ zœ ga lœ ɔkɔnœ. Ɓœ gbe adœke mœ vwaratœ mœ tœ kœndjo yashi kanganœ á Aba za fœ mœ ye a?» Endje gu dœ Yisu ɓa utshu Ana (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.57-58; Mar 14.53-54; Luk 22.54)
18.12: Ukpulu aturugunœ dœ gbozu tshapa endje œdœ pe aayi kœgbɔndœ anda Tepelo á Ayuda vwa endje na œ za Yisu, œ i she ga tœnœ.
18.13: Endje gu dœ she utshunœ ɓa ndœ Ana. Tshe kœdœ lima aba mbeya Kayifa á tshe dœ lima egerœ nganga Ndjaba lœ ungunœ asœmœ.
18.14: Œshe dœ́ Kayifa dá pa lima fœ Ayuda adœke: «Œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke uzu bale tshu lœ kumu azu kɔ.» Petro 'ea Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.69-70; Mar 14.66-68; Luk 22.55-57)
18.15: Shimu Petro dœ anga yambarœ bale na lima manda Yisu. Ɓata egerœ nganga Ndjaba wu lima sœ anga yambarœnœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, tshe li awa bale dœ Yisu ga lœ gbagba anda nœ egerœ nganga Ndjabanœ.
18.16: Kashe Petro sœpe lima œnœ ye ɓa pa gbagba ndo dœ manda nœ. Yé yambarœnœ á egerœ nganga Ndjaba wu lima sœ ye asœmœ kœwuta, á kœyu yashe kœgbɔndœ manda gbagbanœ, á to Petro li ga lœnœ.
18.17: Yashe akwanœ á tshe sœ lima kœgbɔndœ manda gbagba kœyu Petro adœke: «Œɓœ ndje, œdœ ɓœ kœdœ anga yambarœ nœ yakoshe asœke nene a?» Petro kœgi adœke: «Œ dœ́dœ́ mœ nene!»
18.18: Aayi akwa dœ pe aayi kœgbɔndœ anda Tepelo ngbɔ lima owo mbœrœ ɨzɨ, yé á sœ lima kœya kote endje ɨndɨrɨnœ. Petro sœ lima awa bale dœ endje á ka ndje ɨndɨrɨ owonœ. Egerœ nganga Ndjaba yu Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.59-66; Mar 14.54-64; Luk 22.66-71)
18.19: Egerœ nganga Ndjaba tetœ kœyu Yisu tœ ayambarœ nœ ye œdœ pe œrœnœ á tshe yi lima sœ nœ.
18.20: Á Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Mœ pa o'o ngbɨ fœ azu tshapashɔ. Mœ yi lima sœ œrœ ɓa lœ Sinagoga dœ pe ɓa lœ Tepelo ɓa tœ osho á Ayuda kɔ sœ kœngbɔɓatœ endje. Mœ papa anga o'o wutœnœ œ wu nene.
18.21: Mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ yu mœ a? Yu azu á endje dji mœ mbœrœ endje wusœ o'o á mœ pa dœ ɔtshɔnœ.»
18.22: Kœdji Yisu ataa, anga ayi kœgbɔndœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba kœda ala ye á kœpa fœ she adœke: «Mara kœgi dœ o'o fœ gbozu nganga Ndjaba dœke a?»
18.23: Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Œdœ mœ kœpa tœ ekpenœ, ma fœ mœ adœke mœ pa ekpe o'o. Á mœ kœpa ɔtshɔ o'o, mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ da mœ a?»
18.24: Á Ana kœvwa Yisu dœ uwu á endje i dœ she tœ ye ga ndœ Kayifa egerœ nganga Ndjaba. Petro kpa 'ea Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 26.71-75; Mar 14.69-72; Luk 22.58-62)
18.25: Lœ nœ kɔ asœmœ, Petro sœ kolœ ɓa lœ gbagba á sœ kœya kote ye. Endje kœpa fœ she adœke: «Adja ɓœ dœ́dœ́ anga yambarœ nœ yakoshe asœke nene a?» Petro kœ'eatœ ye adœke: «Œ dœ́dœ́ mœ nene!»
18.26: Anga ayi akwa nœ egerœ nganga Ndjabanœ, á tshe dœ́ ayo nœ uzu á Petro wa lima utu ye, kœpa fœ she adœke: «Œ dœ́dœ́ ɓœ dá mœ wu kpœke 'e dœ she ɓa lœ kɨndɨ nene a?»
18.27: Petro kpa kœ'eatœ ye, yé trale kɔngato kœkɨ. Yisu ɓa utshu Pilato (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 27.1-2,11-14; Mar 15.1-5; Luk 23.1-5)
18.28: Manda nœ, endje to Yisu ɓa ndœ Kayifa á ro dœ she ɓa lœ egerœ anda olo nœ gbozugo Roma. Kashe dœ amazɨ tuu, agbozu yuda á endje na lima dœ she lili ga sœnda nene kparawa kœli ga lœ angwa yekane á kœzɨ rœgo Pake.
18.29: Pilato kœwuta ga ndœ endje á kœyu endje adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e na kœtɔ meza pa yakoshe asœke a?»
18.30: Endje gi adœke: «Œdœ tshe kœmbœmbœrœ má ekperœ nene, ádá kœna má dœ she fœ ɓœ kœdœ gaɗe e?»
18.31: Pilato kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E za she œ wa o'o dœ tœ 'e ga tœ ye liaka awa akwa nœ 'e.» Ayudanœ kœpa adœke: «Endje zaza awa fœ 'a adœke 'a wo uzu nene.»
18.32: Œneke wuta mbœrœ kœma o'o á Yisu pa lima tœ kœyisœ mara kuzu á tshe tshu bala dœ tœnœ.
18.33: Pilato li ga sœnda, á e Yisu, yé á yu she adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ gbozugo nœ Ayuda a?»
18.34: Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ pa ataa dœ tœ zœ too anga azu dá pa fœ ɓœ atamœ tœ upu nœ mœ a?»
18.35: Pilato kœgi: «Œmœ kœdœ uzu Yuda a? Adja azu ogo nœ zœ dœ agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dá za ɓœ fœ mœ, œrœ gaɗe dá ɓœ mbœrœ a?»
18.36: Yisu kœgi adœke: «Ogo gbozu nœ mœ dœ́dœ́ œnœ tshapashɔnœ asœke nene. Œ kœdœ má œnœ tshapashɔ asœke, aayi kœte manda mœ œ nga má koshe tshangba mœ adœke endje za mœ fœ ayuda nene. Kashe Ogo gbozu nœ mœ, lœ ngɔngɔ asœke dœ́dœ́ œnœ tshakpœke nene.»
18.37: Pilato kœyu she adœke: «Ɓœ dœ gbozugo a?» Yisu kœgi adœke: «Œɓœ dá pa adœke œmœ kœdœ gbozugo. Endje zu mœ yé mœ na ga pa ɔshɔ mbœrœ kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ adja o'o. Uzu kɔ á tshe na manda adja o'o, tshe dji o'o á mœ pa.»
18.38: Á Pilato kœyu she adœke: «Adja o'o kœdœ gaɗe e?» Endje wa ngbanga kuzu ga tœ Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 27.15-31; Mar 15.6-20; Luk 23.13-25) Pa o'onœ asœke, Pilato kœwuta á kœgbɔ Ayuda ɓa ushu, á pa fœ endje adœke: «Tœ œmœ nœ mœ, mœ gbɔgbɔ anga ekperœ bale á li ndœ kœwa ngbanga ga tœ ye nene.
18.39: Ka ɓata ungu dœ ungu, œ li adœke mœ vwara anga uzu bale dœ lɔkɔ Pake, 'e yindœ nœ adœke mœ vwara gbozugo nœ Ayuda a?»
18.40: Yé endje kœtetœ kœta rawa adœke: «Œ dœ́dœ́ tshenekemœ nene, kashe Barabase!» Andaa Barabase kœdœ lima ayi kœmbœrœ ngbɨndɨrœ.

19.1: Á Pilato kœza awa adœke endje za Yisu yé œ sɔ she dœ ndjapa.
19.2: Aturugu djo lima kpoto dœ ishi, œ za ga tœ kumu ye, yé œ verœ yɔgbɔdɔ odoro lœba ga tœ ye.
19.3: Endje gi lima tœ endje ndoo dœ she yé œ pa lima adœke: «Abala, gbozugo nœ Ayuda!» Yé œ tetœ kœda tshatshu ye.
19.4: Pilato kpa kœli ga sœnda á kœpa fœ Ayuda adœke: «'E dji mœ ka! Mœ sœ kœna kœto she wuta tœnœ fœ 'e. Kashe 'e wusœ nœ adœke mœ gbɔgbɔ anga ekperœ bale lœ ye tœ kœwa ngbanga ga tœ ye nene.»
19.5: Yisu wuta lima ga ushu. Tshe verœ lima kpoto dœ ishi tœnœ œdœ pe egerœ odoro lœba. Yeka á Pilato pa adœke: «Yakoshenœ dœke!»
19.6: Lɔkɔ á agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba dœ aayi kœgbɔndœ anda Tepelo wu lima she, endje te lima tœ kœta rawa adœke: «Wo she ɓa pa kurushi! Wo she ɓa pa kurushi!» Á Pilato kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E za she dœ tœ 'e œ wo she pa kurushinœ. Kashe œmœ, mœ gbɔgbɔ anga œrœ bale lœ ye tœ kœwa ngbanga ga tœ ye nene.»
19.7: Ayuda kœgi fœ she adœke: «'A sœ dœ awa akwa bale, yé awa akwanœ pa adœke tshe li dœ kuzu; gbambanœ nene, tshe pa adœke œne kœdœ Gbolo nœ ndjaba.»
19.8: Lɔkɔ á Pilato dji o'onœ atamœ, awa li tœ ye kpakpakpa.
19.9: Tshe kœli ga sœnda, á kœyu Yisu adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ uzu ɓata a?» Kashe Yisu ɨɨ ama ye bale dœ o'o fœ she nene.
19.10: Yé Pilato kœpa fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ yiyindœ kœgi o'o fœ mœ nene a? Ɓœ wuwusœ nœ nene adœke mœ sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ tœ kœza awa fœ ɓœ, ɓœ gu ɓata á mœ sœ ndje dœ gbɔgbɔ tœ kœwo ɓœ pa kurushi nene a?»
19.11: Kashe Yisu gi adœke: «Ɓœ sœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ bale pa mœ nene, kolœ œneke á Ndjaba za fœ ɓœ. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, uzu á tshe ka mœ fœ ɓœ mbœrœ egerœ ekperœ.»
19.12: Kœto kpœtœmœ, Pilato para lima awa ndœ kœvwara she kashe Ayuda te lima tœ kœta rawa dœ ɔgbɔ adœke: «Œdœ ɓœ kœvwara she dá ɓœ dœ́dœ́ yanga Sezare nene. Gbambanœ nene, uzu kɔ á tshe pa adœke œne kœdœ gbozugo, sœ kœyiangba Sezare.»
19.13: Pilato kœdji ataa á kœto Yisu wuta tœnœ, á tshe kœsœ ga atɨ ɓa tœ osho kœwa ngbanga á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ «osho kœsœ á endje guma dœ badja ga lafo.» – Dœ o'o ama ogo nœ Ayuda kœdœ «Gabata».
19.14: Œ sœpe lima olo bale utshu angbo pake ndoo dœ kakpi ɔlɔ Pilato kœpa fœ Ayuda adœke: «Gbozugo nœ 'e dœke!»
19.15: Kashe endje lœ kolœ kœta rawa adœke: «Wo she ye! Wo she ye! Wo she pa kurushi!» Pilato kœpa adœke: «Mœ wo gbozugo nœ 'e ɓa pa kurushi a?» Agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba kœpa adœke: «'A sœsœ dœ anga gbozugo nene, kolœ Sezare tshebale.»
19.16: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Pilato kœvwara Yisu fœ endje adœke endje wo she ɓa pa kurushi. Yisu ɓa pa kurushi (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 27.32-44; Mar 15.21-32; Luk 23.26-43) Endje kœza Yisu.
19.17: Tshe za kurushi nœ ye dœ tœ ye, œ wuta kœro ga tœ osho á endje ta ɨ'ɨrɨnœ adœke «osho gbayashi kɔrɔ», á endje e dœ o'o ama ogo Ayuda adœke «Gologota.»
19.18: Ɓa zœ dá endje kuru lima Yisu ga pa kurushi awa bale dœ aayi angba bisha; bale ga pa kuni, bale ga pa gele yé Yisu sœ lima kpœgurutœ endje.
19.19: Pilato za lima awa adœke endje sú anga mbeti œ ɓi ga pa kurushinœ. Mbetinœ pa adœke: «Yisu uzu Nazarete, gbozugo nœ Ayuda.»
19.20: Ayuda ndjoro dɨ lima mbetinœ mbœrœ osho á endje ɓi lima Yisu ɓa pa kurushi tœnœ sœ lima ndoo dœ tshelœ ongbo. Ga pa nœ dœmœ, endje kpa su lima mbetinœ dœ o'o ama ogo nœ Ayuda, dœ o'o ama ogo nœ azu Roma ndje dœ o'o ama ogo Agreke.
19.21: Agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba nœ Ayudanœ pa lima fœ Pilato adœke: «Susu adœke “gbozugo nœ Ayuda nene”, kashe adœke “uzunœ asœke pa adœke œne kœdœ lima gbozugo nœ Ayuda.”»
19.22: Pilato kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Œneke á mœ su, mœ su ye.»
19.23: Manda kœɓi Yisu ga pa kurushinœ, aturugu ko lœba nœ ye, œ kurutshelœ nœ vana yé uzu dœ uzu gbɔ œsœ œnœ ye. Œ sœpe lima kolœ egerœ ɨngɨrɨ lœba nœ ye á endje guguma kœsu tœnœ nene asœmœ, œtœnœ kœdœ akpa lœba bale á endje sú ɓa tœ ɨgɨ ye œrrr ga atɨ.
19.24: Aturugu pa lima ugurutœ endje adœke: «A susuru tshelœ œneke nene. A ta wuka á kœwusœ uzu á tshe za lœba œneke.» Œneke wuta lima adœke ataa mbœrœ o'o á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba kœmbœrœtœ ye. Endje su lima adœke: «Endje kurutshelœ lœba nœ mœ tœ endje, yé endje ta wuka pa egerœ ɨngɨrɨ lœba nœ mœ.» 'E wu œrœ á aturugu mbœrœ lima.
19.25: Anga ayashe ka lima ndoo dœ kurushinœ. Ayashe asœmœ kœdœ lima Mareya ayi Yisu, dœ yingɔ ayinœ dœ Mareya, awo Kolopase œdœ ndje Mareya uzu Magadala.
19.26: Yisu kœwu ayinœ, á kœwu ndje ndoo dœ she yambarœ á tshe yi lima ndœ ye. Yisu kœpa fœ ayinœ adœke: «Yashe, wu gbolo nœ zœ.»
19.27: Á kpa kœpa ndje fœ yambarœnœ adœke: «Wu ayi zœ.» Pe dœ ada ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, yambarœnœ kœza Mareya ga ndœ ye. Kuzu Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 27.45-56; Mar 15.33-41; Luk 23.44-49)
19.28: Manda nœ, ɓata á Yisu wu lima sœ nœ adœke akwa nœ œne ka kɔ ye, adœke o'o á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba kœmbœrœtœ ye, tshe pa adœke: «Ogo ungu sœ kœmi mœ.»
19.29: Anga yashi sœ lima kpœtœmœ, á su dœ ikpi vinu. Aturugu yi ndɔhɔrɔ ga la ikpi vinunœ, á vwele ga tœ ganea ɔyɔ Izope, á yi ga tœ ama Yisu.
19.30: Lɔkɔ á Yisu ndjo ikpi ipinœ asœmœ, tshe pa adœke: «Akwa nœ mœ ka kɔ ye.» Tshe tara kumu ye ga atɨ yé œ tshu ye. Anga turugu su djokoro Yisu dœ udu
19.31: Andaa, ɓata œ dœ lima biko mindu utshu lɔkɔ sabata - Sabatanœ asœmœ kœdœ lima egerœ lɔkɔ sabata, agbozu yuda yiyi lima ndœ nœ adœke oko endje sœpe pa kurushi nene. Endje na lima kœyu Pilato adœke œne na œ kavwa tshelœ ada endje yé œ gbota endje ga atɨ.
19.32: Á aturugu kœna, á kœkavwa tshelœ ada ali uzunœ ye, œ kpa na œ kavwa œnœ anga bishanœ ye, á endje ɓi lima endje ga pa kurushi awa bale dœ Yisu.
19.33: Yé kœwuta endje ndoo dœ Yisu atake, endje wu adœke tshe tshu ɓamama ye. Mbœrœ tœnœ dá endje kakavwa lima tshelœ ada ye nene.
19.34: Kashe anga turugu bale su djokoro Yisu dœ udu yé ngbewo indji dœ ungu wuta.
19.35: Uzu tsheneke á tshe wu lima dœ ala ye pa lima o'o tœ upunœ, yé o'o á tshe pa kœdœ adja o'o. Uzunœ asœmœ wusœ nœ adœke œne pa o'o á dœ́ adja o'o adœke e'e ndje, 'e yindœ nœ.
19.36: Œ wuta lima atamœ adœke o'o á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba kœmbœrœtœ ye. Endje su lima adœke: «Endje kavwa bala tshelœ anga ngbabi ye bale nene.»
19.37: Endje su ndje lima anga o'o ala Buku adœke: «Endje wu bala uzunœ á endje sú she.» Kœshi Yisu (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 27.57-61; Mar 15.42-47; Luk 23.50-56)
19.38: Manda nœ kɔ, Yozefu uzu Arimateyo, á tshe dœ́ anga yambarœ nœ Yisu lœ ubunœ, na lima kœyu Pilato adœke œne za oko Yisu. Pilato za lima awa fœ she yé tshe na lima œ za oko Yisu.
19.39: Nikodeme á tshe na lima ga ndœ Yisu dœ abutshɔ, na ndje dœ yombo á endje mbœrœ dœ mire á ngbɔɓa dœ ɔyɔ alowe á wuta litere zazu bale dœ ndjokpa.
19.40: Endje za oko Yisu, œ vwele dœ a'eara lœba á endje yi ga la kada yombo liaka akwa Ayuda œ mbœrœ utshu kœshi akuzu nœ endje.
19.41: Anga kɨndɨ tshamadungba sœ lima ndoo dœ osho á endje kuru lima dœ Yisu ga pa kurushi, yé anga tafo udu bale á endje dji lima lœ badja, á damba endje shishi uzu ga lœnœ nene sœ lima lœnœ.
19.42: Ɓata á dœ lima olo ndoo dœ lɔkɔ sabata, yé kœwu adœke kudunœ sœ lima ndoo kpœtœmœ, endje shi lima Yisu ga lœnœ.

20.1: Ɔlɔ yenga pe dœ amazɨ á osho sœpe kœde damba howaa, Mareya uzu Magadala na ga pa udu. Tshe wu adœke azu ɨvwɨ badja á endje vwɨrɨ lima ga tœ ama kudunœ.
20.2: Tshe kpagu dœ ɔrɔ ga ndœ Shimu Petro dœ yambarœnœ á Yisu yi lima ndœ ye á kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Endje za Gbozu lœ koto yé a wuwusœ osho á endje za she tœnœ nene.»
20.3: Á Apetro dœ yambarœnœ asœmœ wuta lima kœna ga pa udunœ.
20.4: Endje te lima tœ ɔrɔ bibisha kpa tœnœ awa bale, kashe anga yambarœnœ kpa kœropa Petro yé œ wuta utshunœ ga pa udunœ.
20.5: Tshe ti ga lœ udunœ yé œ wu ndœma lœba lœnœ kashe tshe lili lima ga lœ udunœ nene.
20.6: Petro wuta œnœ ye manda ye, œ li ga lœ udunœ, œ wu ndje ndœma lœbanœ asœmœ atɨ ɓa zœ,
20.7: ndje dœ pe lœba á endje za lima tshu ga pa kumu ye. Lœbanœ sœsœ lima tœ œsœnœ bale dœ a'eara ndœma lœbanœ nene. Kashe œ sœ lima kpi ga tœ anga angbɨ osho.
20.8: Trale, anga yambarœnœ á tshe wuta má utshunœ kœli ga lœ udunœ, œ wu yekane á yindœ nœ.
20.9: Œrrr ga tœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, ayambarœ wuwu lima damba sœ ádá o'o á endje sú adœke Ndjaba œ she bala Yisu lœ akuzu nene.
20.10: Manda nœ, ayambarœnœ bibisha fatœ endje kœgu ga ndœ endje. Yisu matœ ye fœ Mareya uzu Magadala (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 28.9-10; Mar 16.9-11)
20.11: Mareya ka lima ɓa ushu ndoo dœ tshapadunœ á sœ lima tœ ɨkɨ. Tshe sœ lima tœ ɨkɨ, œ sœ ndje kœti ga lœ udunœ.
20.12: Á tshe kœwu aandjelu bisha á endje verœ imbi lœba. Endje lœ ga atɨ ɓa tœ osho á endje za lima oko Yisu ga tœnœ; anga bale ɓa tœ osho á endje fa kumu ye ga tœnœ yé anga ɓa tœ œsœ ada ye.
20.13: Aandjelunœ kœyu Mareya adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ kɨ a, yashe?» Tshe kœgi fœ endje adœke: «Endje za oko Gbozu nœ mœ yé mœ wuwusœ osho á endje za she tœnœ nene.»
20.14: Tshe kœfatœ ye manda kœgi o'onœ, œ wu Yisu á tshe ka lima kpœtœmœ kashe tshe wuwu lima sœ nœ adœke Yisu dœmœ nene.
20.15: Yisu kœyu she: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ kɨ a, yashe? Œɗe dá ɓœ sœ kœpara she a? Mareya gbe adœke ayi kœguma tshelœ kɨndɨ tshamadungbanœ dœmœ yeka á pa fœ she adœke: Œdœ ɓœ dá za oko ye, yisœ oshonœ á ɓœ za she ga tœnœ dœ́ mœ na œ za she.»
20.16: Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Mareya!» Tshe i gbandjuru á pa fœ she adœke: «Rabuni» - Œ yindœ kœpa dœ o'o ama ogo Ayuda adœke «Ayi kœyisœrœ».
20.17: Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gogoro mœ nene mbœrœ mœ ɔɔ damba ga ndœ Aba mœ nene.» Kashe, gu œ pandœ nœ fœ aaya, mœ sœ kœgu ga ndœ Aba mœ á tshe kœdœ Aba 'e, ga ndœ Ndjaba nœ mœ á tshe kœdœ Ndjaba nœ 'e.
20.18: Mareya uzu Magadala kœgu á kœpandœ nœ fœ ayambarœ adœke: «Mœ wu Gbozu, yé 'e dji œneke á tshe pa fœ mœ.» Yisu matœ ye fœ ayambarœ nœ ye (Wu ɓa tœ Mat 28.16-20; Mar 16.14-18; Luk 24.36-49)
20.19: Kolœ dœ adɨla yenganœ asœmœ, ayambarœ ngbɔɓa lima tœ endje ɓa sœnda. Endje tshu lima manda kperœ ga tœnœ kparawa Ayuda. Yisu na lima œ ka ɓa ugurutœ endje á pa fœ endje adœke: «Kœsœ gee sœ dœ e'e.»
20.20: Manda kœpa fœ endje ataa, tshe kœma tshakane ye œdœ pe djokoro ye fœ endje. Lɔsu ayambarœ su dœ yanga mbœrœ kœwu Gbozu.
20.21: Yé Yisu kpa kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Kœsœ gee sœ dœ e'e! Ɓata Aba vwa mœ, œmœ ndje mœ sœ kœvwa 'e.»
20.22: Manda kœpa o'onœ asœke, tshe uru ɨzɨ ga pa endje, á pa adœke: «'E gbɔ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ.
20.23: Azu neke á 'e djerœ bala ndœ ekperœ nœ endje, Ndjaba œ djerœndœ nœ. Yé endjeneke á 'e vwaratœ 'e tœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ endje, Ndjaba œ vwara ndje tœ ye tœ kœdjerœndœ nœ.» Yisu matœ ye fœ Toma
20.24: Andaa lɔkɔ á Yisu má lima tœ ye fœ ayambarœ ɓa sœnda, Toma, anga andjokpa dœ bishanœ á endje e she Didime gugu lima nene.
20.25: Anga udu anganœ pa lima fœ she adœke: «'A wu Gbozu!» Kashe tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «Œdœ mœ kœwuwu tshangba uku sete tshakane ye nene, œdœ mœ kœyiyi yɔkɔne mœ ga lœ kudu setenœ nene, yé œdœ mœ kœyiyi kane mœ ga lœ djokoro ye nene, mœ yi ndœ nœ nene.»
20.26: Andaa olo mindu dœ votɔ manda nœ, ayambarœ kpa ngbɔɓa lima tœ endje ɓa sœnda, œ tshu manda kperœ ga tœnœ yé Toma sœ lima ugurutœ endje. Yisu na lima œ ka ɓa ugurutœ endje á pa adœke: «Kœsœ gee sœ dœ 'e!»
20.27: Manda nœ tshe pa fœ Toma adœke: «Yi yɔkɔne zœ kpœke dœ́ œ wu tshakane mœ. Yi kane zœ œ nduru ga lœ djokoro mœ. Katœ sharapu, œ te uzu nœ kœyindœrœ.»
20.28: Toma kœgi fœ she adœke: «Gbozu nœ mœ œdœ Ndjaba nœ mœ.»
20.29: Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Ɓœ yindœ nœ mbœrœ á ɓœ wu mœ a? Yanga nœ azu neke á endje wuwu nene, kashe endje yindœ nœ.» Ádá kœsu buku nœ Yowane
20.30: Yisu mbœrœ lima anga angbɨ ambárá afá ndjoro dœ ala ayambarœ nœ ye, kashe endje súsú kɔ ga la bukunœ asœke nene.
20.31: Kashe œneke á endje sú ga la bukunœ asœke sœ mbœrœ á 'e kœyindœ nœ adœke Yisu kœdœ Kristu, Gbolo nœ Ndjaba. Œdœ 'e kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye, 'e gbɔ soro dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye.

21.1: Manda nœ, Yisu kpa matœ ye fœ ayambarœ nœ ye ɓa tœ mangu egerœ ungu adanga Tiberiade. Tshe ma lima tœ ye fœ endje dœ mara atake:
21.2: Shimu Petro, Toma á endje e ndje she Didime, Natanayele uzu tshalakpɨ Kanana ɓa lœ ogo Galilayi, agbolo nœ Zebedayi, œdœ pe anga angbɨ ayambarœ bisha sœ lima kpœtœ œsœnœ bale.
21.3: Shimu Petro kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Mœ sœ kœtara ndœ kœvwɨ gbanda.» Yé endje kœpa fœ she adœke: «'A ro dœ ɓœ.» Endje ro lima œ ɔ ga lœ egerœ agba kashe dœ butshɔnœ asœmœ, endje gbɔgbɔ œrœ bale nene.
21.4: Lɔkɔ á osho tetœ kœkɔrɔ tœnœ, Yisu ka lima ga tœ mangu kashe ayambarœnœ wuwu lima sœ nœ adœke œshe dœmœ nene.
21.5: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Agbolo, 'e gbɔgbɔ anga ageatshalangu teasho nene a?» Endje kœgi fœ she adœke: «Œrœ bale nene.»
21.6: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E vwi gbandanœ ga pa kuni yé 'e œ gbɔ endje ye.» Endje kœvwi gbandanœ, yé ageatshalangu do lima pa nœ dœ mara adœke endje lili lima kœgbota tœnœ ga ushu nene.
21.7: Yambarœ á Yisu yi lima ndœ ye kœpa fœ Petro adœke: «Gbozu dœmœ!» Lɔkɔ á tshe dji adœke Gbozu dœmœ, tshe kœverœ lœba ga tœ ye; gbambanœ nene, tshe sœ lima kpendro, á tshe kœte lima ga la ngu.
21.8: Udu ayambarœnœ kœgu dœ egerœ agbanœ dœ kœgbota gbandanœ pete dœ ageatshalangu: endje sœsœ lima lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ tœ ama osho nene, ga pa œrœ nœ́ metere kama bale (100).
21.9: Lɔkɔ á endje wuta ga tœ mangu, endje wu lima jiwo á endje ko ageatshalangu dœ pe mapa ga pa nœ.
21.10: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E na dœ ageatshalangunœ á 'e wuta kœgbɔ endje asœke gamœ.»
21.11: Shimu Petro kœɔ ga lœ egerœ agba á kœgbota gbandanœ ga atɨ dœ agboro ageatshalangu lœ nœ kama dœ zazu bisha dœ ndjokpa dœ votɔ (153). Agea ngba lima waa kashe tshelœ gbanda susuru lima nene.
21.12: Yisu kœpa fœ endje adœke: «'E na œ zɨ œrœ.» Anga uzu bale ugurutœ endje á tshe ɨ lima ama ye tœ kœyu she adœke: «Dá œɓœ kœdœ ɗe e?» gugu nene. Endje wu lima sœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke Gbozu dœmœ.
21.13: Yé Yisu na, œ za mapa á kurutshelœ nœ tœ endje, á mbœrœ ndje awa bale dœ ageatshalangunœ.
21.14: Asœ kœdœ lima awa votɔ kœmatœ Yisu fœ ayambarœ nœ ye kœto tœ lɔkɔnœ á Ndjaba she lima she lœ kuzu. Yisu œdœ Petro
21.15: Manda kœzɨ œrœ, Yisu kœyu Shimu Petro adœke: «Shimu, gbolo nœ Yowane, ɓœ yindœ mœ kœropa endjeneke kɔ a?» Yé tshe kœgi adœke: «Œ̃, Gbozu, ɓœ wusœ nœ adœke mœ yindœ zœ.» Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gbɔndœ apata nœ mœ.»
21.16: Tœ bishanœ, Yisu kpa yu she adœke: «Shimu, gbolo nœ Yowane, ɓœ yindœ mœ?» Petro gi adœke: «Œ̃, Gbozu, ɓœ wusœ nœ adœke mœ yindœ zœ ye.» Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Sœ uzu nœ kœgbɔndœ apata nœ mœ.»
21.17: Tœ votɔnœ, Yisu yu she adœke: «Shimu, gbolo nœ Yowane, ɓœ yindœ mœ?» Oyo kœza Petro kœwu adœke Yisu kpa yu she tœ votɔnœ adœke: «Ɓœ yindœ mœ?» Yé tshe kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gbozu, œɓœ á ɓœ wusœ œrœ kɔ, ɓœ wusœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke mœ yindœ zœ ye.» Á Yisu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Gbɔndœ apata nœ mœ.
21.18: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ ɓœ dœ adjapu adœke ɔlɔ á ɓœ sœpe lima aya gbolo, ɓœ du lima uwu tshapa lœba nœ zœ dœ tœ zœ, œ na lima tœ osho á ɓœ yi lima ndœ nœ. Kashe ɔlɔ á ɓœ kœwuta yagbozu, ɓœ ko kane zœ ga lafo yé anga uzu kpi dá ɨ uwu ga pa lœba fœ ɓœ, yé á to ɓœ na tœnœ ɓa tœ osho á ɓœ yiyindœ nœ nene.»
21.19: Yisu pa lima ataa mbœrœ kœma mara á Petro œ yisœ mokɔ nœ Ndjaba lœ kuzu ye. Manda kœpa o'onœ asœke, Yisu pa fœ she adœke: «Na manda mœ.»
21.20: Petro kœfatœ ye, á kœwu yambarœ á Yisu yi lima ndœ ye, tsheneke á dœ lɔkɔ á endje sœ lima kœzɨ œrœ á tshe dɨ lima tœ ye ga lakoro Yisu yekane á yu she adœke: «Gbozu, œɗe dá ka bala ɓœ a?»
21.21: Lɔkɔ á Petro wu lima she, tshe pa fœ Yisu adœke: «Ka œshe a Gbozu, œrœ gaɗe dá mbœrœ fœ she a?»
21.22: Yisu kœgi fœ she adœke: «Œ kœsœ adœke œndœ ye dɨ œrrr ga tœ kpa kœkwa mœ, œnœ zœ lœ nœ kœdœ gaɗe? Œɓœ, na manda mœ.»
21.23: Kœto pa o'onœ asœke dá o'o kɨ gooo ugurutœ alaya adœke yambarœnœ asœmœ œ tshu nene. Andaa Yisu papa lima fœ she nene adœke: tshe tshu nene. Kashe tshe pa adœke: «Œdœ mœ kœyindœ nœ adœke œndœ ye dɨ œrrr ga tœ kpa kœkwa mœ, œnœ zœ lœ nœ kœdœ gaɗe e?»
21.24: Adja yambarœnœ asœmœ dœ tœ ye dá pandœ o'onœ asœke, á su ga la mbeti yé 'a wusœ nœ adœke œneke á tshe pa kœdœ adja o'o. Ndɔngɔlɔ o'o
21.25: Yisu mbœrœ lima anga angbɨ œrœ ndjoro á kœsœ má adœke endje sú kɔ bale dœ bale, mœ gbe adœke, osho œ li mbœrœ kœko bukunœ ga tœnœ pa ɔshɔ asœke nene.

1.1: Gbozu Teofile, ɓa la ali mbeti á mœ su fœ ɓœ, mœ pandœ œrœ kɔ á Yisu mbœrœ lima œdœ pe ndje œneke kɔ á tshe yi lima sœ nœ kœto ɓa tœ adanœ
1.2: œrrr ga tœ olo kœɔ she lima ga lafo. Utshu kœɔ she, tshe za o'o fœ aayi avwa nœ ye dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ.
1.3: Tshe ma lima tœ ye fœ endje manda kuzu á tshe tshu tœ kœma fœ endje adœke tshe sœ dœ soro. Tshe ma lima tœ ye fœ endje yé œ tetœ kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba manda olo zazu bisha.
1.4: Anga lɔkɔ bale á tshe sœ lima kœzɨ œrœ dœ endje, tshe za o'o fœ endje adœke: «'E gigi damba tœ 'e lœ Yerusaleme nene kashe 'e kate œneke á Aba pa lima ndœ nœ adœke œne za fœ 'e ɓata á 'e dji lima lœ ama mœ.
1.5: Gbambanœ nene, Yowane za lima batisimu nœ ungu, kashe lœ ondonœ asœke, Ndjaba œ za batisimu nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ fœ 'e.» Yisu ɔ ga lafo
1.6: Aayi avwanœ á endje ngbɔɓa lima tœ endje, yu Yisu adœke: «Gbozu, kolœ ngɔngɔnœ asœke dá ɓœ gi tshagbozu nœ ogo Israyele a?»
1.7: Tshe kœpa fœ endje adœke: «O'o nœ 'e gugu mbœrœ kœwusœ ada ɔlɔnœ too olonœ á Aba za lœ tshagbozu nœ ye nene.
1.8: Kashe Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ œ jerœ ga pa 'e, yé 'e gbɔ gbɔgbɔ mbœrœ kœna kœmɨndœ o'o nœ mœ lœ Yerusaleme, lœ ogo Yuda œdœ lœ Samariya djigi œrrr vesho ga tœ osho kɔ pa ɔshɔ.»
1.9: Manda kœgi o'onœ ataa, tshe ɔ ngarrr dœ ala endje ga lafo yé œ yiwa lœ ondoro tœ ala endje.
1.10: Ɓata á endje sœpe lima kœmesho ɨrɨrrr ga lafo, anga azu bisha dœ imbi lœba á endje ka lima ndoo dœ endje
1.11: kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Azu Galilayi, mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœpe kœmesho ga lafo a? Yisunœ á tshe ɔ dœ ala 'e asœmœ, tshe kwa ndje bala tœ ye ɓata á 'e wu she kœɔ tœnœ ga lafo asœmœ.» Matiase za akwa manda Yudasi
1.12: Manda nœ, aayi avwanœ to ɓa pa kaga ɔyɔ Olive yé œ jerœ ga lœ Yerusaleme; kaganœ sœ lima ga pa œrœ nœ́ Kelometere bale tœ Yerusaleme.
1.13: Lɔkɔ á endje wuta, endje li ga lœ gbɔshɔ á endje lœ lima kœlo lœ nœ ɓa lafo. Œ dœ lima Petro, Yowane, Jake dœ Andere; Filipo dœ Toma; Bartelemi dœ Matie; Jake gbolo nœ Alefe, Shimu uzu kœ'e osho ndœ lipanda œdœ pe Yudasi gbolo nœ Jake.
1.14: Endje kɔ, endje sœ lima dœ gbetshelœ bale, yé œ ngbɔɓatœ endje mbœrœ kœkɨ fœ Ndjaba ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ awa bale dœ anga ayashe ɓata Mareya á tshe zu Yisu œdœ pe ndje aaya Yisu.
1.15: Lœ anga olonœ asœmœ bale, Petro áalafo ɓa ugurutœ ayindœ Yisu kama bale dœ zazu bale á endje ngbɔɓa lima tœ endje, yé œ pa ngbɨ adœke:
1.16: «Aaya, œ li adœke o'o á Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ pa lima ndœ nœ ala Buku nœ Ndjaba, lœ ama gbozu Davidi tœ upu nœ Yudasi á tshe to lima azu na tœnœ ndœ kœza Yisu, mbœrœtœ endje.
1.17: Andaa Yudasi sœ lima awa bale dœ 'a yé tshe sœ lima ndje dœ akwa nœ ye.
1.18: Uzunœ asœmœ yɔ lima kɨndɨ dœ ngendja á endje ko lima fœ she manda ekperœ nœ ye. Tshe te lima dœ kumu ye, uvu ye de wuruu yé sheta ye yaranga ga atɨ.
1.19: Azu lœ Yerusaleme kɔ wusœ o'o asœke. Ádánœ á endje e ɨ'ɨrɨ kɨndɨnœ dœ o'o ama ogo endje adœke: Hakeldama, œ yindœ kœpa adœke “ɔshɔ indji”.
1.20: Yé endje sú ala mbeti nœ Itshi adœke: “Tshelœ gbagba nœ ye œ fa gusu yé uzu bale œ sœ lœ nœ nene.” Yé ga pa nœ dœmœ: “Anga angbɨ uzu œ za akwa nœ ye.”
1.21: A sœ dœ anga azu á endje na lima tœ awa dœ 'a dœ lɔkɔ á Gbozu Yisu sœ lima pa 'a,
1.22: kœto kpœpa batisimu nœ Yowane œrrr ga tœ olo kœɔ she ga lafo. Œ li adœke anga uzu bale ugurutœ endje, te timu awa bale dœ 'a ndœ kœmɨndœ kœshe nœ ye ugurutœ akuzu.»
1.23: Endje yisœ azu bisha: Yozefu á endje e she Barsabase á endje donga ndje she dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Yustushe œdœ pe Matiase.
1.24: Yé manda nœ endje za avwala nœ endje para kɔkɔ adœke: «Œɓœ, Gbozu á ɓœ wusœ lɔsu uzu kɔ. Yisœ uzu tsheneke á ɓœ ke she ugurutœ azu bisha asœke
1.25: adœke tshe mbœrœ akwa nœ aayi avwa lœ kudu Yudasi á tshe katœ nœ tɨ, á na ga tœ osho á li dœ she asœmœ.»
1.26: Endje ta wuka mbœrœ kœgbɔ uzu bale yé wukanœ te ga pa Matiase. Ádánœ á tshe li ga ugurutœ aayi avwanœ ndjokpa dœ bale dœmœ.

2.1: Lɔkɔ á olo angbo Patekɔte li, ayindœ Yisu ngbɔɓatœ endje para kɔkɔ ga tœnœ.
2.2: Trale, ɨngɨrɨ to ɓa lafo ɓata egerœ yugu yé œ su tshelœ anda á endje sœ lima tœnœ djigi.
2.3: Endje wu œrœ á wuta ga ndœ endje ɓata owo, œ kurutshelœtœ endje á sœ ga pa kumu uzu dœ uzu.
2.4: Endje para kɔkɔ gbɔ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ yé œ tetœ kœpa angbɨ o'o ama ogo ɓata á Ɨshirɨ to fœ endje.
2.5: Anga Ayuda nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu sœ ndje lima lœ Yerusaleme, endje to lima djelœ ogo kɔ pa ɔshɔ.
2.6: Ɨngɨrɨ yugunœ za lima osho djigi, yé ukpulu azu ngbɔɓatœ endje œ sœ kœkɨtœ œsœnœ, mbœrœ uzu dœ uzu sœ lima kœdji o'o dœ adja o'o ama ogo ye.
2.7: Endje kɨtœ œsœnœ, œ sœ dœ yanga yé á pa adœke: «Azunœ asœ para kɔkɔ á endje pa o'o asœ, dœ́dœ́ azu Galilayi nene a?
2.8: Œ mbœrœ koto á uzu dœ uzu lœ ugurutœ azœ sœ kœdji endje dœ o'o ama ogo ye a?
2.9: Ugurutœ azœ, a sœ dœ Aparte, Amede dœ Elame, azu ogo Mezopotami, azu ogo Yuda dœ kapadose, azu ogo Ponte dœ Azi,
2.10: azu ogo Friji dœ Pafili, azu ogo Ezipito dœ azu tshakala ogo Sirene ɓa lœ Libi; anga endje kœdœ endjeneke á endje to lœ Roma,
2.11: adja Ayudanœ œdœ azu neke á endje wuta aayi kœdonga Ndjaba nœ Ayuda asœmœ; azu ogo Krete dœ endje nœ Arabi. Kashe azœ para kɔkɔ, a dji endje kœpa o'o dœ ama ogo azœ, kœgbara ogboro œrœ á Ndjaba mbœrœ.»
2.12: Endje kɔkɔ, endje kɨ lima tœ œsœnœ, yé œ yutœ endje adœke: «Œ yindœ kœpa adœke gaɗe dœ mœ a?»
2.13: Kashe anga azu sœ lima kœmɔ endje adœke: «Ipi dá mbœrœ endje asœmœ.» Kœyisœrœ nœ Petro
2.14: Yé Petro kœza o'o ugurutœ aayi avwa ndjokpa dœ bale á endje sœ lima tœ œsœnœ, á kœpa dœ ɔgbɔ adœke: «E'e dœ Ayuda œdœ pe 'e dœ azu para kɔkɔ á 'e sœ lœ Yerusaleme kpœke, 'e wusœ œneke á sœ kœrotœ nœ, 'e dara utu 'e yé œ dji mœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ.
2.15: Wala, azunœ asœke ndjondjo ipi ɓata á 'e sœ kœgbe tœnœ asœmœ nene: mbœrœ a sœ damba kolœ dœ ada ɔlɔ mindu dœ vana gbambanœ.
2.16: Kashe œneke á sœ kœmatœ endje ngɔngɔ asœke kœdœ o'o á ayi kœgbara o'o Jowele pa lima. Tshe gbara lima adœke:
2.17: “Ndjaba pa adœke: Lɔkɔ kœka tshapashɔ, mœ vwa Ɨshirɨ nœ mœ ga pa azu kɔ, agbolo yakoshe œdœ pe ayawuru nœ 'e œ te aayi kœgbara o'o, alanga nœ 'e œ wu bala œrœ lœ ulu, ayagbozu nœ 'e œ wu ndje bala œrœ lœ ulu.
2.18: Adjapu, ɔlɔnœ asœmœ mœ vwa Ɨshirɨ nœ mœ ga pa aayi akwa nœ mœ dœ ayakoshe œdœ pe ayashe, yé endje te bala aayi kœgbara o'o.
2.19: Mœ mbœrœ bala ogboro œrœ ɓa lafo, yé œ ma ambara afá ɓa pa ɔshɔ ɓa ke: indji œ tu, owo œ tshi yé ngawo œ da.
2.20: Ɔlɔ œ fa butshɔ, yé yapu œ sœ ɓata indji, utshunœ adœke olo kœna Gbozu li, egerœ olo œdœ olo nœ mokɔ.
2.21: Yé uzu kɔ á tshe kɨ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu, tshe she.”
2.22: «Azu tshelœ Israyele, 'e dji o'o mœ: Yisu, uzu tshœlœ Nazarete kœdœ lima uzu á Ndjaba ma gbɔgbɔ nœ ye fœ 'e lœ ye dœ awa nœ kœmbœrœ afá, ogboro œrœ œdœ kœma ambárá œrœ ɓa ugurutœ 'e ɓata á 'e wusœ nœ dœ tœ'e.
2.23: Uzunœ asœmœ, 'e za lima she ga tshaabrœ azu á endje wuwusœ Ndjaba nene, yekane á endje wo she á kuru she ga pa kurushi lindœ agbe nœ Ndjaba á tshe guma.
2.24: Kashe Ndjaba she she, yé œ gbota she lœ kanga nœ kuzu mbœrœ œ lili adœke kuzu ropa ye dœ gbɔgbɔ nene.
2.25: Davidi pa lima o'o tœ upu nœ ye adœke: “Ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ mœ sœ kœwu Gbozu utshu mœ, mbœrœ á tshe sœ ga tœ kuni mœ adja awa œ za mœ bale nene.
2.26: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, lɔsu mœ su dœ yanga yé ama mœ œ ɓi ndje itshi dœ yanga. Ga pa nœ kɔ, undu mœ œ yatœ ye lœ kœsœ gee mbœrœ á mœ za lɔsu mœ ga tœ zœ.
2.27: Gbambanœ nene, Gbozu, ɓœ katœ mœ tɨ lœ ogo nœ akuzu nene, ɓœ yi ndje ndœ nœ adœke œmœ dœ́ œyerœ uzu nœ zœ mœ fu lœ koto akuzu nene.
2.28: Ɓœ yi lima sœ awa soro fœ mœ, lɔsu mœ œ su dœ yanga mbœrœ kœsœ awa bale dœ ɓœ.”
2.29: «Aaya, œ li adœke mœ pa o'ara fœ 'e tœ upu nœ ata azœ dœ Davidi: tshe tshu lima, endje shi she yé tshapa udu ye sœpe damba œrrr kpesheke ndœ azœ.
2.30: Kashe œshe kœdœ lima ayi kœgbara o'o, yé tshe wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba dara lima ama ye adœke anga gbolo tshelœ ye œ te gbozu manda ye.
2.31: Davidi wu lima sœ œrœ á yindœ kœwuta bala tœnœ, yé tshe gbara lima o'o kœshe nœ Masiya. Tœnœ dá tshe pa lima adœke: “Tshe sœsœpe lima lœ ogo nœ akuzu nene, yé tshe fufu lima nene.”
2.32: Adja Ndjaba she Yisu lœ akuzu. A'a para kɔkɔ kœdœ atimu nœ o'onœ.
2.33: Ndjaba za she ɓa tœ kuni ye, œ to Ɔtshɔ Ɨ'ɨrɨ á tshe pa lima tœ ye fœ she á tshe kurutshelœ nœ tœ 'a ɓata á 'e sœ kœwu tœnœ á sœ kœdji tœnœ.
2.34: Davidi ɔɔ ga lafo nene gbaa, kashe tshe pa adœke: “Gbozu Ndjaba pa fœ Gbozu nœ mœ: sœ ga atɨ ga tœ kuni mœ,
2.35: œrrr ga tœ lɔkɔ á mœ fa azu á endje yiangba zœ, ga tshada zœ ɓata mbata.”
2.36: «Azu Israyele, 'e wusœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke: Yisu á 'e kuru she lima ga pa kurushi asœmœ, Ndjaba mbœrœ adœke tshe fa Gbozu, yé œ fa Kristu .» Ali kœfatshalɔsu azu
2.37: Lɔkɔ á azu dji o'onœ asœmœ ataa, lɔsu endje ka endje, yé endje yu Petro œdœ pe anga udu aayi avwa adœke: «Aaya, 'a mbœrœ gaɗe?»
2.38: Petro gi fœ endje adœke: «'E fatshalɔsu 'e: uzu dœ uzu gbɔ batisimu dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu Kristu yeka á Ndjaba kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ 'e. Yé Ndjaba œ to Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ fœ 'e.
2.39: Gbambanœ nene, o'o nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ á Ndjaba pa lima tœnœ, œ sœ mbœrœ e'e dœ agbolo nœ 'e, œdœ ndje pe azu á endje sœ lœ ɨngɨrɨnœ, endjeneke á Gbozu Ndjaba nœ azœ œ 'e bala endje.»
2.40: Petro kpa pa o'o ndjoro fœ endje. Tshe pa ala o'o kɔ adœke endje yindœ œneke á œne pa, yé œ gbota gbetshelœ nœ endje dœ kœpa adœke: « 'E yindœ soro á Ndjaba za fœ 'e mbœrœ á kœgitœ 'e ugurutœ azu osho asœ á ɔtshɔ endje gaga nene!»
2.41: Endje neke á endje yi lima ndœ o'o nœ ye, endje gbɔ batisimu. Yé dœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, azu ga pa œrœ nœ́ kutu votɔ te lima ga ndœ ukpulu ayindœ Yisu. Ali kœngbɔɓatœ ayindœ Yisu
2.42: Endje zatœ endje djigi ga tœ kœyisœrœ nœ aayi avwa yé œ sœ kœngbɔɓatœ endje lœ yazu, œ sœ kœkurutshelœ mapa tœ endje dœ pe kœkɨ fœ Ndjaba kpœtœ œsœnœ awa bale.
2.43: Awa li lima tœ endje kpa kpa kpa ye: Aayi avwa mbœrœ ogboro œrœ yé œ má ndje ambáránœ.
2.44: Ayindœ Yisu para kɔkɔ sœ lima kpœtœ œsœnœ bale yé œ ngboɓa œrœ nœ endje kɔ ga tœ nœ bale.
2.45: Endje ka lima kɨndɨ nœ endje ndje dœ œrœ nœ endje á kurutshelœ ngendjanœ dœ mara adœke uzu dœ uzu gbɔ liaka ogo nœ ye.
2.46: Endje sœ lima kœngbɔɓatœ endje ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ ɓa lœ Tepelo, yé œ sœ lima kœzɨ œrœ kpœtœ œsœnœ bale ɓa lœ anda nœ endje. Endje sœ lima kœzɨ œrœ dœ yanga œdœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu.
2.47: Endje sœ lima kœdonga Ndjaba, yé azu kɔ yi lima ndœ endje waa. Ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ, Gbozu sœ kœyi endjeneke á endje gbɔ kœshe ga ugurutœ azu Ikrizia.

3.1: Anga kɨdala bale dœ ada ɔlɔ votɔ, Apetro dœ Yowane ro lima kœdonga Ndjaba ɓa lœ Tepelo.
3.2: Anga yakoshe bale á ada ye tshu tshakudu ye pe lœ gbolo ye sœ lima kœsœ ndoo dœ manda gbagba Tepelo á endje e «Ɔtshɔ Manda». Endje sœ lima kœna dœ she ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ ga zœ mbœrœ á tshe kœyɔndœ œrœ tshakane azu á endje sœ kœli ga lœ Tepelonœ.
3.3: Lɔkɔ á tshe wu Petro œdœ Yowane kœli ga lœ Tepelonœ, tshe yɔndœ œrœ tœ endje.
3.4: Yé Apetro dœ Yowane tondœ ye, œ pa fœ she adœke: «Tondœ 'a.»
3.5: Uzunœ tondœ endje dœ gbetshelœ adœke endje to œrœ fœ œne zœ.
3.6: Á Petro kœpa fœ she adœke: «Mœ gugu dœ ngendja bale nene, kashe œneke á mœ sœ dœ tœnœ, mœ to fœ ɓœ: dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu Kristu, uzu Nazarete, áalafo œ na ana!»
3.7: Petro za kuni ye, œ tɨ she ga lafo. Trale, ada ye dœ tshelœ porongato ada ye yɔrɔ tshelœ tœ endje;
3.8: yé gbɨkɨvwɨgbɨ, tshe áalafo œ tetœ ana. Tshe li awa bale dœ aayi avwa ga lœ Tepelonœ, œ ka, œ i kpitikpiti dœ pe kœdonga Ndjaba.
3.9: Azu para kɔkɔ sœ lima kœwu she kœna ana œdœ pe kœdonga Ndjaba.
3.10: Azu tra she tuu, œ pa adœke: «Œ dœ́dœ́ œshe dá sœ kœsœ lima ɓa pa ɔtshɔ manda Tepelo yekane á sœ kœyɔndœ œrœ nene a!» Uvuru endje kpa lima lœ nœ tœ kœwu œrœ á mbœrœtœ endje lima fœ uzunœ á ada ye tshu asœmœ. O'o nœ Petro
3.11: Ɓata á uzu sœmœ yiyi lima ndœ kœgitœ ye tœ Apetro dœ Yowane nene, azu para do ga lafo œ sœ kœkpa ga ndœ endje ngbɔlɔɔ tshakudu mbarasane á endje e ɨ'ɨrɨnœ adœke mbarasane nœ Salomo.
3.12: Petro kœwu endje á kœpa adœke: «Azu Israyele, mbœrœ gaɗe á uvuru 'e œ kpa lœ nœ tœ kœshenœ asœke a? Mbœrœ gaɗe dá 'e sœ kœtondœ 'a ɓata gbɔgbɔ nœ 'a dœ tœ 'a too manda Ndjaba á tshe sœ dœ 'a dá mbœrœ adœke á uzunœ asœke na ana a?
3.13: 'E wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba nœ Abrayamo, Ndjaba nœ Izaka œdœ Yakobo, Ndjaba nœ aata azœ, œshe dá ma mokɔ nœ ayi akwa nœ ye dœ Yisu. E'e dá ka lima she adœke endje wo she; yé ɔlɔ á Pilato yi lima ndœ kœkatœ ye tɨ, 'e vwara lima tœ 'e ye.
3.14: 'E vwaratœ 'e tœ uzu á tshe sœ yerœ, á sœ ndjii, yeka á yu lima Pilato adœke tshe za anga ayi kœwo azu fœ 'e.
3.15: 'E wo lima Gbozu nœ soro, kashe Ndjaba she she ugurutœ akuzu yé 'a kœdœ atimunœ.
3.16: Ngɔngɔ asœ 'e wu yakoshe asœke. 'E wusœ ye dœ ɔtshɔnœ: ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu dá she she mbœrœ 'a sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye. Mbœrœ gbɔgbɔ nœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye dá tshe wuta dœ ɔtshɔ ɔkɔ ɓata á 'e wu utshu 'e para kɔkɔ asœke.
3.17: «Kashe aaya, mœ wusœ nœ adœke e'e dœ agbozu nœ 'e, 'e mbœrœ lima atamœ mbœrœ á 'e wuwusœ adja o'o nene.
3.18: Kashe Ndjaba mbœrœ ndœma ye á tshe pa lima tœnœ lœ ama aayi kœgbara o'o. Tshe pa lima adœke Masiya á tshe na, tshe wu oyo waa.
3.19: Mbœrœ tœnœ atamœ, aaya, 'e fatshalɔsu 'e dœ́ œ kwa ga ndœ Ndjaba. Œdœ 'e kœmbœrœ ataa, tshe mbœrœ adœke ekperœ nœ 'e yiwa ye.
3.20: Atamœ ndje, Gbozu Ndjaba œ mbœrœ adœke 'e gbɔ ɔtshɔ olo nœ kœyatœ 'e, yé tshe vwa Masiya á tshe ke lima she utshunœ katshatsha mbœrœ 'e asœmœ, fœ 'e. Œshe kœdœ Yisu.
