3.21: Kashe ngɔngɔ asœke, Yisu Kristu œ sœ ɓa lafo œrrr ga tœ lɔkɔ á œrœ kɔ œ gumatœ ye liaka œneke á Ndjaba pa lima ndœ nœ lœ ama ayerœ aayi kœgbara o'o nœ ye.
3.22: Moyize pa lima adœke: “Gbozu Ndjaba œ vwa bala ayi kœgbara o'o bale ɓata mœ, tshe dœ anga aya 'e. 'E dji bala œneke kɔ á tshe pa fœ 'e.
3.23: Azu á endje tshapu kœdji she, endje sœ ugurutœ azu nœ Ndjaba nene yé endje tshu.”
3.24: Yé aayi kœgbara o'o kɔ, kœto kpœpa Samwele œrrr ga tœ azu á endje sœ angba ye, uzu dœ uzu gbara lima o'o tœ upu nœ lɔkɔnœ asœke.
3.25: E'e kœdœ agbolo nœ ayi kœgbara o'o, 'e kœdœ ndje agbolo ayo á Ndjaba guma lima dœ aata azœ lɔkɔ á tshe pa lima fœ Abrayamo adœke: “Lœ awa nœ aata zœ, mœ to kane mœ ga pa azu kɔ pa ɔshɔ.”
3.26: Mbœrœ 'e dá Ndjaba vwa ayi akwa nœ ye utshunœ. Tshe vwa she adœke tshe to kane ye ga pa 'e, yé uzu dœ uzu katœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ.»

4.1: Lɔkɔ á Apetro dœ Yowane sœpe kœpu o'o, agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba, gbozu tshapa aayi kœgbɔndœ Tepelo œdœ Asadukayi, yi lima kumu endje.
4.2: Endje sœ lima dœ ókó tɔpanœ kpuru kœwu adœke aayi avwa sœmœ bisha sœ kœyisœ œrœ yé œ sœ kœpandœ nœ adœke ɓata á Yisu shé lœ kuzu, azu á endje tshu lima, endje she ndje lœ kuzu.
4.3: Endje tepa endje, œ ko endje va ga lœ kánga œrrr ga tœ kœkɔrɔ osho mbœrœ ɔlɔ dɨ lima ye.
4.4: Lœ ugurutœ azu á endje dji lima Ɔtshɔ O'o, azu ndjoro sœ lima dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu, yé ayindœ Yisunœ wuta azu ga pa œrœ nœ́ kutu mindu (5.000) dœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ.
4.5: Osho kɔrɔ pa nœ yeka á agbozu tshapa Ayuda, agbozu Ikrizia, aayi kœyisœ awa akwanœ á endje sœ lœ Yerusaleme, ngbɔɓa lima tœ endje.
4.6: Ana á tshe dœ́ egerœ nganga Ndjaba, dœ Kayifa, dœ Yowane, dœ Alekezandre œdœ pe azu kɔ lœ bɨngɨ nœ agboro anganga Ndjaba dá ngbɔɓa lima tœ endje ɓa zœ.
4.7: Endje to Apetro dœ Yowane ro tœnœ ga utshu endje, yé endje yu endje adœke: «'E mbœrœ œrœnœ asœke dœ gbɔgbɔ ndje pe dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ɗe e?»
4.8: Yé Petro á tshe sœ lima dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Agbozu tshapa azu ogo œdœ agbozu,
4.9: 'a mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ fœ uzu á ada ye tshu yekane á endje sœ kœyu 'a kpesheke adœke 'a pandœ mara œrœ á 'a mbœrœ á uzunœ asœ she.
4.10: Ataa œ li adœke e'e kɔkɔ œdœ azu Israyele, 'e wusœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke uzunœ á tshe ka utshu 'e asœke, tshe she mbœrœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu Kristu, uzu Nazarete á 'e kuru lima she ga pa kurushi yeka á Ndjaba she she lœ akuzu.
4.11: Œshe kœdœ badja á e'e dœ aayi kœmɔ anda za lima vwi'i, tshe fa badja á anda œ shi mbœrœ tœnœ.
4.12: Azu œ gbɔ kœshe kolœ ɓa ndœ ye. Gbambanœ nene, pa ɔshɔnœ asœke, anga angbɨ ɨ'ɨrɨ á Ndjaba za adœke azu gbɔ kœshe lœ awanœ, gugu nene.»
4.13: Kœwu adœke Apetro dœ Yowane ka kolœ mbɨmbɨmbɨ ga pa o'o nœ endje, aayi kœwa ngbanga i lima gbandjuru mbœrœ endje kœdœ amba azu á endje wuwusœ œrœ nene. Kashe endje wu ndje lima sœ nœ adœke endje kœdœ azu á endje sœ lima awa bale dœ Yisu.
4.14: Kashe ɓata á endje sœ lima kœtondœ uzunœ á tshe she, á tshe ka lima utshu endje, awa kœgi o'o tœ endje gugu lima nene.
4.15: Á endje kœza awa fœ Apetro dœ Yowane kœwuta damba ga shu yé endje kœtetœ kœyutœ endje ugurutœ endje:
4.16: «A mbœrœ gaɗe tœ azunœ asœke a? Mbœrœ azu para kɔkɔ lœ Yerusaleme wusœ nœ ngbɨ adœke, endje dá mbœrœ afá asœ, yé a shara nene.
4.17: Kashe œ li adœke a mbœrœ kɔ adœke o'onœ tete lœ utu azu para kɔkɔ nene. A za uvuru endje adœke endje kpa papa o'o bale dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ uzu nœ endje asœmœ nene.»
4.18: Manda nœ, endje 'e endje, œ pakata endje kœpa o'o œdœ pe kœyisœ œrœ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu.
4.19: Kashe Apetro dœ Yowane gi fœ endje adœke: «Œrœ gaɗe dá sœ ndjii utshu Ndjaba a? 'A dji 'e too 'a dji Ndjaba? 'E wa ngbanganœ dœ tœ 'e kane.
4.20: Yé tœ a'a nœ 'a, 'a vu ama 'a tœ œrœ á 'a wu dœ ala 'a yé á dji dœ utu 'a nene.»
4.21: Kœdji o'onœ ataa, aayi kœwa ngbanganœ gbagbara endje œrrr œ katœ endje tɨ. Endje gbɔgbɔ lima awa ndœ kœwa ngbanga ga tœ ɔkɔ endje nene gbambanœ nene, azu para kɔkɔ sœ lima kœdonga Ndjaba mbœrœ œrœnœ á wuta.
4.22: Yakoshenœ á endje she she lœ awa nœ afá asœmœ, sœ lima dœ ungu kœropa zazu bisha. Ayindœ Yisu sœ kœdonga Ndjaba
4.23: Apetro dœ Yowane gu ga ndœ anga endje lɔkɔ á aayi kœwa ngbanganœ mɨ lima kane endje tœ endje, œ pandœ neke kɔ á agboro anganga Ndjaba dœ agbɔ Ayuda pa fœ endje.
4.24: Manda kœdji o'onœ, aka endje para kɔkɔ awa bale, endje za avwala fœ Ndjaba dœ o'onœ atake: «Gbozu Ndjaba, œɓœ dá mbœrœ tshalafo, dœ ɔshɔ, dœ ungu œdœ pe œneke kɔ á sœ lœnœ,
4.25: œɓœ dá za o'onœ asœke lœ awa nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ ga lœ ama ata 'a dœ Davidi á tshe kœdœ ayi akwa nœ zœ: “Mbœrœ gaɗe á ogo kɔ sœ kœturu tœnœ, yé mbœrœ gaɗe á azu sœ kœvwarandœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kashe œ gugu dœ ádá nene?
4.26: Agbozu tshapa ɔshɔ gumatœ endje, yé agbozu kuma akwa ngbɔtœ endje mbœrœ kœnga koshe ga tœ Gbozu Ndjaba œdœ pe ga tœ Masiya nœ ye.”
4.27: Gbamba nœ nene, œtœnœ kœdœ adjapu adœke Aerode dœ Pose Pilato ngbɔɓatœ endje dœ angbɨ azu œdœ pe azu ogo Israyele ɓa lœ ongbonœ asœke mbœrœ kœnga koshe ga tœ Yisu, œyerœ ayi akwa nœ zœ á tshe dœ Masiya nœ zœ.
4.28: Dœ tœnœ ataa, endje mbœrœ liaka gbetshelœ nœ zœ kɔ á ɓœ za lima dœ gbɔgbɔ œdœ œneke kɔ á ɓœ yi lima ndje ndœ nœ dœ tœ zœ.
4.29: Yé ngɔngɔ asœke Gbozu, tondœ mara á endje ndanga 'a asœke yé œ to uvuru fœ aayi akwa nœ zœ dœ́ endje mɨndœ o'o ama zœ dœ gbɔgbɔ kɔ.
4.30: To kane zœ ga pa kumu azu kɔ mbœrœ adœke kœshe azu, ambárá œrœ dœ pe afá, mbœrœtœ endje dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu á tshe dœ œyerœ ayi akwa nœ zœ.»
4.31: Manda kœza avwala nœ endje, osho á endje sœ lima tœnœ turu yé endje para kɔkɔ, endje gbɔ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ œ tetœ kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o dœ gbɔgbɔ. Ayindœ Yisu ngbɔɓa œrœ nœ endje ga tœ œsœnœ
4.32: Ukpulu azu á endje fa lima ayindœ Yisu, sœ lima dœ lɔsu œdœ pe dœ gbetshelœ bale. Anga uzu bale pa pa lima adœke œrœ nœ œne sœ pa undu œne dœ tœ œne nene, kashe endje sœ kœngbɔɓa lima kɔ ga tœ œsœnœ bale.
4.33: Aayi avwa nœ Yisu sœ lima kœmɨndœ o'o kœshe nœ Gbozu Yisu ugurutœ akuzu dœ gbɔgbɔ, yé Ndjaba sœ lima kœza ɔtshɔ lɔsu ye ga pa endje kɔ.
4.34: Uzu bale dœ́dœ́ lima ayi oyo ugurutœ endje nene. Gbambanœ nene, endjeneke á endje sœ lima dœ kɨndɨ too dœ anda, endje ka lima œ na dœ ngendjanœ,
4.35: yé œ ko fœ aayi avwa. Lœ kœkurutshelœ nœ, uzu dœ uzu sœ lima kœgbɔ lindœ œneke á li dœ she.
4.36: Anga uzu bale lœ mara nœ Alevi sœ ndje lima ugurutœ endje. Ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Yozefu á endje zu she lakpɨ Shipre. Aayi avwa e ndje lima she Barnabase, œ yindœ kœpa adœke «uzu kœto gbɔgbɔ».
4.37: Tshe sœ ndje lima dœ kɨndɨ nœ ye, yé œ ka, œ na dœ ngendjanœ yeka á ko fœ aayi avwa.

5.1: Anga uzu bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Anania, dji lima tœ ye dœ awonœ yé œ ka kɨndɨ nœ endje.
5.2: Manda nœ, endje sœ lima dœ egerœ lɔsu dœ awonœ, yé œ gumasœ tshakala ngendjanœ mbœrœ endje yeka á na dœ udunœ fœ aayi avwa.
5.3: Kashe Petro pa adœke: «Anania, mbœrœ gaɗe á Satana li ga lɔsu zœ ata a? Ɓœ fara Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ, yé œ gbɔtœ tshakala ngendja kɨndɨ.
5.4: Ɓœ ka má tœ kœka kɨndɨnœ ye nene a? Too ɓœ kœka, mbœrœ gaɗe ɓœ mbœrœ má œrœ á ɓœ yindœ nœ dœ ngendjanœ nene a? Gbetshelœnœ asœmœ li ga lɔsu zœ koto o? Œ dœ́dœ́ azu dá ɓœ fara endje nene, kashe Ndjaba dá ɓœ fara she asœmœ.»
5.5: Lɔkɔ á tshe dji o'onœ asœmœ ataa, tshe nɔ vwɨ œ te, œ tshu ye. Awa za azu á endje dji lima o'onœ.
5.6: Agbolo modo vwele lima she dœ lœba, yé œ na œ shi she ye.
5.7: Manda ada ɔlɔ votɔ, awonœ wuwusœ œneke á mbœrœtœ endje nene, yé œ li tɔndu tɔndu ga sœnda ga zœ.
5.8: Petro kœyu she adœke: «Pandœ nœ fœ mœ kane, pa ngendja kɨndɨnœ á 'e ka dœ mœ a?» Tshe kœyindœ nœ adœke: «Adjapu, pa ngendjanœ dœ mœ!»
5.9: Yé Petro kpa yu she adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ djitœ zœ dœ akɔ zœ á fara Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ nœ Gbozu Ndjaba a? Dji kane, azu á endje to tœ kœshi akɔ zœ, endje ka ɓa lœ manda ɓa zœ. Œɓœ ndje awa bale, endje shi ndje ɓœ.»
5.10: Pe kpœlœ ma ye atake, tshe te ga tœ ada Petro œ tshu ye. Lɔkɔ á agbolo modo li lima, endje wu adœke tshe tshu ye, yé œ za lima she á na á shi ndje she ndoo dœ akɔnœ.
5.11: Egerœ awa li lima tœ azu Ikrizia œdœ pe azu á endje dji lima ndœ o'onœ asœmœ. Afá nœ aayi avwa
5.12: Aayi avwa sœ lima kœmbœrœ afá ndjoro, yé œ sœ lima kœma ambáránœ ɓa ugurutœ azu. Ayindœ Yisu sœ lima kœngbɔtœ endje kɔ ɓa tshakudu mbarasane nœ Salomo dœ gbetshelœ bale.
5.13: Uzu á tshe gugu dœ kœyindœrœ nene œ li kœli ga ndœ endje nene, andaa azu sœ lima kœpandœ ɔtshɔrœ nœ ayindœ Yisu.
5.14: Ayakoshe dœ pe ayashe ndjoro sœ lima kœfatshalɔsu endje ga ndœ Gbozu, yé œ sœ lima ga ugurutœ ayindœ Yisu asœmœ.
5.15: Endje sœ lima kœwuta dœ aayi koɓa ga tœ ala awa, yé œ sœ lima kœko endje ga pa kelekpa œdœ ga pa kondja mbœrœ adœke Petro kœsœ kœro tœnœ, á ɨshirɨ ye kœna ga pa anga endje ugurutœ endje.
5.16: Anga ukpulu azu ogo á sœ mashenga dœ Yerusaleme na ndje lima dœ aayi koɓa œdœ pe azu á ekpe ɨshirɨ sœ pa endje, yé endje she lima para kɔkɔ. Œrœ kanga á aayi avwa wu
5.17: Dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, egerœ nganga Ndjaba œdœ endjeneke kɔ á endje sœ ɨndɨrɨ ye, œ yindœ kœpa adœke azu tshelœ ngbɔtœ nœ Asadukayi, endje sœ lima dœ ókó.
5.18: Endje ko aayi avwa, yé œ vwi endje ga lœ kánga.
5.19: Kashe dœ butshɔ, andjelu nœ Gbozu kɔrɔ manda kánga yé œ ko endje ga shu, á pa fœ endje adœke:
5.20: «'E na œ sœ ɓa lœ Tepelo. Yé ɓa zœ, 'e pandœ o'o upu nœ tafo soro fœ azu.»
5.21: Manda kœdji o'onœ, endje ro pe dœ amazɨ tuu ga lœ Tepelo, yé œ tetœ kœyisœ œrœ ɓa zœ. Egerœ nganga Ndjaba yikumu ye, œshe œdœ azu á endje sœ ɨndɨrɨ ye. Endje e lima osho ndœ angbɔtœ nœ endje dœ agboro azu kœwa ngbanga, yé œ vwa azu adœke endje e aayi avwa á endje sœ ɓa lœ kánga.
5.22: Kashe lɔkɔ á aayi akwa wuta lima ɓa lœ kánga ɓa zœ, endje gbɔgbɔ lima endje nene. Endje gu yé œ pa adœke:
5.23: «'A wu manda kánganœ, endje tshu dœ ɔtshɔnœ yé aayi kœgbɔndœ manda nœ ka ga pa nœ. Kashe lɔkɔ á 'a kɔrɔ atake, a wuwu uzu bale ɓa lœ nœ ɓa zœ nene.»
5.24: Kœdji o'onœ ataa, gbozu nœ aayi kœgbɔndœ Tepelo œdœ pe agboro anganga Ndjaba i gbɔndjuru tœ upunœ, yé œ tetœ kœyutœ endje tœ neke á mbœrœtœ endje asœmœ.
5.25: Kashe anga uzu na lima œ pandœ nœ fœ endje adœke: «'E wu, azu á 'e ko lima endje ga lœ kánga asœmœ, endje ka ɓa lœ Tepelo yé œ sœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ azu.»
5.26: Yé gbozu tshapa aayi kœgbɔndœ Tepelo na dœ aturugu nœ ye, œ to aayi avwa lœ zɨtɨnœ kparawa adœke azu kœveve œne dœ badja nene.
5.27: Endje na dœ endje ga lœ osho kœwa ngbanga, yé egerœ nganga Ndjaba te lima tœ kœwa ngbanga ga pa endje.
5.28: Tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «'A kɔ 'e lima dœ ɔgbɔ tœ kœyisœ œrœ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ uzu asœmœ ye. 'E wu, 'e mbœrœ œrrr kœyisœrœ nœ 'e za tshelœ ongbo Yerusaleme djigi. Atamœ, 'e yindœ kœmɨndœ nœ adœke a'a dá wo yakoshenœ asœke a?»
5.29: Kashe Apetro dœ anga udu aayi avwa gi adœke: «Œ li adœke a mbœrœtœ azœ lindœ o'o ama Ndjaba, kashe œ dœ́dœ́ lindœ œnœ azu nene.
5.30: Ndjaba nœ aata azœ she Yisu á e'e, 'e wo lima she á za she ga pa kurushi ugurutœ akuzu.
5.31: Tshe za she ga pa kuni ye, œ fa she tœ Gbozu œdœ ayi kœshe azu mbœrœ adœke azu Israyele fatshalɔsu endje yekane á Ndjaba kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ endje.
5.32: Yé tshe vwa 'a ndœ kœmɨndœ o'onœ asœke, a'a œdœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ á Ndjaba za fœ azu neke á endje sœ kœmbœrœtœ endje liaka o'o ama ye.»
5.33: Kœdji o'onœ ataa, aayi kœwa ngbanga sœ dœ ókó tɔ pa nœ kpuru, yé œ yindœ kœwo aayi avwa.
5.34: Kashe anga Farisayi bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Gamaliyele, œshe kœdœ egerœ ayi kœyisœ awa akwa á azu kɔ yindœ ye, sœ lima kpœtœmœ zœ. Tshe áalafo ɓa ugurutœ aayi kœwa ngbanga asœmœ, yé á pa adœke endje ko damba aayi avwa ga shu kane.
5.35: Manda nœ, tshe pa ngbɨ adœke: «Azu tshelœ Israyele, 'e gbetshelœ 'e tœ œneke á 'e yindœ kœmbœrœ fœ azu asœke kane.
5.36: Œndœnœ dɨdɨ damba nene, Teyudase má kpœke tœ ye ɓata uzu á œsœ ye lɨ, yé azu ga pa œrœ nœ́ kama vana te mangba ye. Endje wo she yé endjeneke kɔ á endje te lima mangba ye, endje kurutshelœtœ endje dœ ɔrɔ yé anga œrœ bale kpa gugu manda endje nene.
5.37: «Manda ye, dœ lɔkɔ kœdɨ azu, Yudasi uzu tshelœ Galilayi kpa wuta, yé azu ndjoro te mangba ye. Kashe œshe ndje tshe tshu lima, yé endjeneke kɔ á endje te lima mangba ye kpa kuru ndje tshelœtœ endje.
5.38: Ngɔngɔ asœke, mœ pa fœ 'e adœke 'e kpa gbegbe dœ azunœ asœke nene; 'e katœ endje dœ́ endje ro. Mbœrœ œdœ gbetshelœ too akwa nœ endje kœto ɓa ndœ azu, œ yiwa dœ tœ endje zœ.
5.39: Œdœ œ kœto ɓa ndœ Ndjaba, 'e li kœwo tœnœ nene. 'E mbœmbœrœ adœke 'e gbɔ o'o dœ Ndjaba nene!» Aayi kœwa ngbanga para kɔkɔ yindœ o'o Gamaliyele ngbɨɨ.
5.40: Yé œ kpa e aayi avwa, œ sɔ endje dœ ndjapa. Manda kœmɨ upu fœ endje adœke endje kpa tata ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu nene, endje katœ endje tɨ.
5.41: Aayi avwa gitœ endje utshu aayi kœwa ngbanga yé lɔsu endje sú dœ yanga, mbœrœ á endje wu oyo mangba ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu.
5.42: Ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ, œdœ ɓa lœ Tepelo too ɓa sœnda, endje sœ kolœ kœyisœ œrœ nœ endje dœ pe kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'onœ adœke Yisu kœdœ Masiya.

6.1: Dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, ayindœ Yisu wuta lima ndjoro. Ayudanœ á endje zu endje lima lœ angbɨ ogo, á endje sœ kœpa o'o ama Greke tetœ kœpulœma endje tœ upu nœ anga endje á endje zu endje ɓa lœ ogo Israyele. Gbambanœ nene, endje pa lima adœke ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ á endje sœ kœkurutshelœ œrœ, endje sœsœ kœgbe dœ ayashe koya á endje to lœ angbɨ ogo dœ ɔtshɔnœ nene.
6.2: Aayi avwa ndjokpa dœ bisha ngbɔɓa ayindœ Yisu kɔ ga tœ œsœnœ, yé œ pa adœke: «Œ lili adœke 'a katœ kœyisœ o'o ama Ndjaba tɨ yé œ gbe kolœ dœ akwa nœ kœzɨrœ nene.
6.3: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, aaya, 'e ke azu mindu dœ bisha (7) ugurutœ 'e á ɔtshɔ endje ga, endjeneke á endje sú dœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ œdœ pe kœwusœtœ yeka á a kœza akwanœ asœmœ fœ endje.
6.4: Tœ a'a nœ 'a, 'a sœpe kœza avwala œdœ kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o.»
6.5: Ayindœ Yisu para kɔkɔ yindœ o'onœ asœmœ ngbɨɨ fœ endje. Endje ke Etiene, uzu nœ kœyindœrœ œdœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ, Filipo, Prokɔre, Nikanɔre, Timo, Paremenase œdœ pe Nikola á tshe kœdœ uzu á tshe yindœ Ndjaba nœ Ayuda ɓa lœ ongbo Atiɔshe.
6.6: Endje ma endje fœ aayi avwa yeka á endje za avwala, yé á to kane endje ga pa endje.
6.7: O'o ama Ndjaba sœ lima kœza osho kɔ, yé ayindœ Yisu kpa ngba tɔpanœ kpuru lœ Yerusaleme. Anganga Ndjaba ndjoro fa lima lɔsu endje, œ yindœ o'o nœ Yisu. Kœtepa Etiene
6.8: Ɔtshɔ lɔsu œdœ pe gbɔgbɔ nœ Ndjaba su lima Etiene kperœ, tshe fa lima œrœ yé œ má ambáránœ lœ ugurutœ azu.
6.9: Kashe dœ lɔkɔ asœmœ, azu tshelœ Sinagoga á endje e endje «akanga á endje za awa fœ endje», endje kœdœ anga azu ogo Sirene, dœ anga azu ogo Alekezandri, dœ anga azu tshelœ Silisi œdœ pe endje nœ Azi tetœ kœgbugburu tshelœ o'o dœ Etiene.
6.10: Kashe ɓata á tshe sœ lima kœpa o'o lœ kœwusœtœ á Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ to fœ she, awa adœke endje shara she gugu lima nene.
6.11: Endje fara lima azu dœ kowo mbœrœ á endje kœpa adœke: «'A dji she kœpa ekpe o'o ga tœ Moyize œdœ pe ga tœ Ndjaba!»
6.12: Endje bɨlɨ azu, agbɔ Ayuda œdœ aayi kœyisœ awa akwa. Yé endje na ndoo dœ Etiene œ bopa ye, á to she rotœnœ ga lœ angbɔtœ kœwa ngbanga.
6.13: Endje na dœ ekpe atimu ɓa zœ, yé á endje pa adœke: «Uzunœ á tshe sœ asœke kakatœ kœpa o'o tœ œyerœ Tepelo nœ zœ œdœ pe tœ awa akwa nœ Moyize nene.
6.14: 'A dji she kœpa adœke, Yisu, uzu tshelœ Nazaretenœ asœmœ œ ndɨ tshelœ Tepelo asœke, yé œ yapa ndje mara kœsœ nœ aata azœ á Moyize ka lima tœ nœ fœ azœ.»
6.15: Endjeneke kɔ á endje sœ lima tœ œsœ angbɔtœ kœwa ngbanganœ, endje to lima ndœ Etiene, yé œ wu tshatshu ye ɓata œnœ andjelu.

7.1: Egerœ nganga Ndjaba yu Etiene adœke: «Œneke á endje pa dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ kœdœ adja o'o a?»
7.2: Etiene gi adœke: «Alaya mœ œdœ pe alaba mœ, 'e dji mœ kane. Ndjaba nœ mokɔ wuta lima ga tœ ata azœ dœ Abrayamo lɔkɔ á tshe sœ lima ɓa lakpɨ Mezopotami, utshunœ adœke tshe gu kœmbœrœ ogo Harane.
7.3: Tshe pa lima fœ she adœke: “Katœ ogo zœ œdœ pe bɨngɨ nœ zœ tɨ, yé œ gu ndœ ogo á mœ yisœ nœ fœ ɓœ.”
7.4: Yé Abrayamo katœ ogo nœ ye ɓa lakpɨ Kalade tɨ, œ ro kœmbœrœ ogo ɓa lakpɨ Harane. Aba Abrayamo tshu ɓa zœ yé manda kuzu ye, Ndjaba gi lima Abrayamo ga lœ ogo á 'e sœ lœ nœ ngɔngɔ asœke.
7.5: Kashe Ndjaba fafa lima Abrayamo tœ ayengɔ ɔshɔnœ bale nene, á œdœ ndje osho nœ kœto ada ye ga tœnœ nene. Kashe tshe pa lima ndœ nœ fœ she adœke œne za bala ogonœ asœke fœ she dœ aatanœ, andaa œshe dœ́ Abrayamo gugu lima damba dœ gbolo nene.
7.6: Yé Ndjaba kpa pa lima fœ she atake: “Aata zœ œ mbœrœ bala angbɨ ogo. Endje te bala akanga ɓa zœ, yé œ wu oyo manda ungu kama vana.
7.7: Kashe œmœ Ndjaba, mœ pa adœke mœ wa bala ngbanga ga tœ ogo á endje te akanga lœ nœ. Manda nœ, endje wuta ɓa zœ yé œ gu ndœ kœza avwala fœ mœ kpœtœ oshonœ asœke.”
7.8: «Ndjaba lu madu dœ Abrayamo yé ambáránœ kœdœ kœwa gaza ayakoshe. Mbœrœ tœnœ dá Abrayamo wa gbolo nœ ye dœ Izaka tœ gaza ɔlɔ á tshe mbœrœ olo mindu dœ votɔ manda kœzu she. Awa bale Izaka wa lima gbolo nœ ye dœ Yakobo yé Yakobo wa ndje agbolo yakoshe nœ ye ndjokpa dœ bisha, á endje dœ́ aata azœ tœ gaza.»
7.9: «Aata azœ mbœrœ lima uku ga tœ Yozefu yé œ ka lima she mbœrœ kœte kanga ɓa lœ Ezipito, kashe Ndjaba sœ lima dœ she awa bale.
7.10: Tshe gi she lœ oyo nœ ye kɔ, œ to kœwusœtœ fœ she yé á mbœrœ adœke tshe wuta ɔtshɔ uzu utshu Farawo, gbozugo Ezipito. Farawo za she tœ ayi kœtondœ ogo Ezipito œdœ pe œrœ tshasœnda nœ ye kɔ.
7.11: A sœ atake, egerœ ogo za Ezipito œdœ pe ogo Kanana djigi. Oyo ro lima sœ nœ yé awa kœgbɔ kœzɨrœ gugu lima tœ aata azœ nene.
7.12: Lɔkɔ á Yakobo dji lima adœke kœzɨrœ sœ ɓa lœ Ezipito, tshe vwa aata azœ utshunœ.
7.13: Tœ bisha kœro endje ga zœ, Yozefu pandœtœ ye fœ aayanœ, yé œ pandœ mara nœ ye fœ Farawo.
7.14: Manda nœ, Yozefu vwa osho adœke endje para abanœ dœ Yakobo œdœ pe ayonœ kɔ na tœnœ. Endje sœ lima kɔ azu zazu votɔ dœ ndjokpa dœ mindu.
7.15: Yakobo na ga lœ Ezipito, yé œ tshu ɓa zœ œdœ ndje pe aata azœ.
7.16: Endje ko lima oko endje ro tœnœ ɓa lœ Sikeme yeka á shi endje ɓa lœ udu á Abrayamo yɔ lima tshakane agbolo nœ Amore.
7.17: «Ɓata á olo kœmbœrœ œrœ má Ndjaba pa lima tœnœ fœ Abrayamo ndo ye, aata azœ zu lima azu yé œ kpa wuta ndjoro lœ ogo Ezipito,
7.18: yekane á anga tafo gbozugo á tshe wuwu lima sœ o'o tœ upu nœ Yozefu nene, za akwa kœgbɔndœ ogo Ezipito.
7.19: Gbozugonœ sœ lima kœfara azu nœ azœ, tshe ma lima ekpe ɔtshɔ ye fœ aata azœ œrrr ga tœ kœpa fœ endje adœke endje ko aaya agbolo nœ endje á endje sœpe kœɔ ɔngɔ va e mbœrœ adœke endje tshu ye.»
7.20: Dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ dá endje zu lima Moyize. Tshe kœdœ lima ɔtshɔ gbolo tœ ala Ndjaba. Tshe mbœrœ lima yapu votɔ ɓa lœ anda nœ abanœ.
7.21: Yé manda nœ, endje katœ ye tɨ, yawuru nœ Farawo za she œ gbɔndœ ye lima ɓata adja gbolo nœ ye.
7.22: Endje yi lima sœ œrœ tshelœ Ezipito kɔ fœ she, yé tshe sœ lima dœ gbɔgbɔ lœ o'o œdœ pe lœ akwa nœ ye.
7.23: «Lɔkɔ á tshe wuta lima ga tœ ungu zazu bisha, tshe gbɔ gbetshelœ kœro ɓa ugurutœ aayanœ, azu tshelœ Israyele.
7.24: Tshe wu lima uzu Ezipito kœɓi anga uzu Israyele bale. Mbœrœ kœnga pa ayanœ asœmœ œdœ pe kœtɔ geda tshangba ye, tshe ɓi uzu Ezipitonœ yerœwa fœ kuzu.
7.25: Tshe gbe lima adœke aaya œne wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba œ she endje lœ awa nœ œne. Andaa endje wuwu lima sœ nœ nene.
7.26: Olo bale manda nœ, Moyize kɔ tshelœ azu Israyele bisha á endje sœ tœ koshe, yé œ ngbɔɓa endje ga tœnœ dœ o'o atake: “Anga mœ, e'e kœdœ aayazu! Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e ɓitœ 'e a?”
7.27: Kashe tsheneke á tshe sœ kœɓi yanganœ gɔrɔ Moyize dœ o'o take: “Uzu ɗe dá za ɓœ tœ gbozu œdœ ayi kœwa ngbanga pa 'a?
7.28: Ɓœ yindœ kœwo mœ ɓata á ɓœ wo libi uzu Ezipito a?”
7.29: Kœdji o'onœ asœmœ ata, Moyize kpa œ zatœ ye yiwa tœnœ ɓa lœ ogo nœ Amadiane. Tshe zu lima agbolo bisha ɓa zœ.»
7.30: «Manda ungu zazu bisha, andjelu wuta ga tœ ye ɓala laɓa owo, ɓa lœ a'eara ɔyɔ á sœ ɓa lœ kpagagasho kaga Sinayi.
7.31: Moyize i gbɔndjuru lɔkɔ á tshe wu œrœnœ asœmœ. Œne gitœ œne ndoo á kœtondœ nœ kane, tshe dji tshama Gbozu Ndjaba kœpa adœke:
7.32: “Œmœ kœdœ Ndjaba nœ aaba zœ, Ndjaba nœ Abrayamo, nœ Izaka dœ pe Yakobo.” Awa litœ Moyize kpa kpa kpa ye; awa adœke tshe tondœ oshonœ gugu tœ ye nene.
7.33: Á Gbozu Ndjaba kœpa fœ she adœke: “Gi ada zœ lœ œrada mbœrœ osho á ɓœ ka ga tœnœ kœdœ œyerœ osho.
7.34: Adjapu, mœ wu oyo á azu nœ mœ sœ kœwu tœnœ ɓa lœ ogo Ezipito, œ dji ndœ ɨkɨ endje; mbœrœ tœnœ ataa dá mœ jerœ kœshe endje. Na zœ, mœ yindœ kœvwa ɓœ ngɔngɔ asœke ɓa lœ Ezipito.”
7.35: «Tshetœ Moyize á azu Israyele gɔrɔ lima she á pa fœ she adœke: “Œɗe dá za ɓœ tœ gbozu œdœ ayi kœwa ngbanga a?” Œshe dá Ndjaba vwa she ɓata gbozu, ɓata ayi kœshe azu lœ awa nœ andjelu á tshe wuta ga ndœ ye ɓa lœ a'eara ɔyɔ.
7.36: Œshe dá ko endje wuta tœ nœ ga shu lœ ogo Ezipito. Tshe fa œrœ yé œ má ambáránœ lœ ogo Ezipito, ɓa tœ egerœ ungu Fala œdœ ɓa lœ kpagagasho manda ungu zazu bisha.
7.37: Moyize dá kpa pa fœ azu Israyele adœke: “Ndjaba œ to bala ayi kœgbara o'o bale ɓata mœ fœ 'e lœ ugurutœ aaya 'e.”
7.38: Œshe dá ka lima lœ ugurutœ aata azœ dœ pe andjelu á tshe pa lima o'o fœ she ɓa pa kaga Sinayi. Moyize dá sœ lima kœgbɔ o'o nœ soro ɓa ndœ Ndjaba mbœrœ kœyisœ nœ fœ azœ.
7.39: «Kashe aata azœ yiyi lima ndœ kœdji she nene; endje vwaratœ endje tœ ye yé œ yi lima ndœ kœkwatœ endje ga lœ ogo Ezipito.
7.40: Endje pa lima fœ Aro adœke: “Mbœrœ anga andjaba fœ 'a adœke endje gbɔndœ 'a, mbœrœ Moyize má á tshe ko azœ wuta tœnœ ga shu lœ ogo Ezipitonœ asœmœ, 'a wuwusœ œrœ á wuta ga tœ ye nene.”
7.41: Endje mbœrœ lima ɨshirɨ aya ngombe dœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ œ sœ kœto okoro ga tœnœ, yé œ mbœrœ angbo dœ yanga mbœrœ œneke á endje mbœrœ lima dœ tœ endje.
7.42: Tœ kœgi œrœ tshangbanœ fœ endje, Ndjaba dɔ tshapa ye gbɔ endje yé œ katœ endje adœke endje donga angerepe ɓa lafo, ɓata á endje sú ɓa la mbeti nœ ayi kœgbara o'o adœke: “Azu Israyele, œmœ dá 'e to lima agea œdœ pe tokóró fœ mœ manda ungu zazu bisha ɓa lœ kpagagasho a?
7.43: Œ̃ œ̃ nene. 'E za gbanda tande nœ ndjaba Moloke, œdœ ɨshirɨ nœ ndjaba angerepe nœ e'e dœ Refane, ɨshirɨnœ á 'e mbœrœ dœ tœ 'e á sœ kœdonga tœnœ asœmœ. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ gɔrɔ 'e lœ ogo nœ 'e dœ́ œ vwa 'e waa ɓa kele Babilone.”
7.44: «Aata azœ sœ lima dœ gbanda tande á sœ kœma adœke Ndjaba sœ dœ azœ awa bale ɓa lœ kpagagasho. Ndjaba pa lima fœ Moyize adœke tshe mɔ anda tandenœ ɓata œneke á tshe wu lima.
7.45: Aata azœ gbɔ gbanda tande ɓa ndœ aba endje, yé œ te œnœ endje. Lɔkɔ á Yosuwa sœ lima kœgbɔndœ endje, endje li dœ tœnœ djelœ ogo neke á endje gbɔtœnœ lœ koshe, ogo á Ndjaba gɔrɔ azu lœnœ utshu endje. Gbanda tandenœ sœ kpœtœmœ œrrr ga tœ lɔkɔ á Davidi wuta lima gbozugonœ.
7.46: Davidi gbɔ ɔtshɔrœ ɓa ndœ Ndjaba, yé œ yu osho adœke œne mɔ anda fœ Ndjaba nœ Yakobo.
7.47: Kashe Salomo dá mɔ lima andanœ fœ she.
7.48: «Andaa Ndjaba á tshe ropa œrœ kɔ sœsœ lœ anda á azu mbœrœ dœ kane endje nene. Ɓata á Ndjaba pa lœ awa nœ aayi kœgbara o'o adœke:
7.49: “Tshalafo kœdœ osho tshagbozu nœ mœ, yé ɔshɔ kœdœ osho kœto ada mœ ga tœnœ. Anda gaɗe dá 'e mɔ fœ mœ a? Yé osho gaɗe dá mœ kœyatœ mœ tœnœ a?
7.50: Œ dœ́dœ́ kane mœ dá mbœrœ œrœnœ asœmœ kɔ nene a?”
7.51: «Etiene kpa pa fœ azu kœwa ngbanga adœke: “Azu gbɔkumu, lɔsu 'e œdœ utu 'e be pa 'e tœ upu nœ Ndjaba, 'e sœ kœvwaratœ 'e ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ tœ Ɔtshɔ ɨshirɨ. 'E sœ adja awa bale ɓata aata 'e.
7.52: Aayi kœgbara o'o neketa dá aata 'e ndandanga she nene a? Endje wo lima endjeneke á endje sœ kœpandœ kœna uzu á tshe sœ ndjii. Yé ngɔngɔ nœ asœke, tshetœ ye dá 'e va ɔtɔ ye yé á wo she.
7.53: 'E dji awa akwa nœ Ndjaba á aandjelu pandœ nœ fœ 'e, yé œ tshapu kœza ga tœ akwa ye.”» Kuzu Etiene
7.54: Lɔkɔ á aayi kœwangbanga dji o'onœ asœmœ ataa, tshatshu endje fa agba ɔkɔ, yé endje zɨ tshelœ daji endje gbagbara gbagbara dœ ókó ga tœ Etiene.
7.55: Kashe ɓata á Etiene su lima dœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ, tshe tondœ tshalafo, œ wu mokɔ nœ Ndjaba œdœ Yisu á tshe ka ga tœ kuni ye.
7.56: Tshe pa adœke: «'E wu, mœ tondœ tshalafo ngbɨ yé Gbolo nœ uzu ka ga tœ kuni Ndjaba.»
7.57: Kœdji o'onœ ata, endje ve ɔgbɔ rawa yé œ be utu endje ga tœnœ. Manda nœ, endje tshu kɔ ga pa ye.
7.58: Endje gbota she lœ ongbo ga shu yeka á tetœ kœve lima she dœ badja. Atimunœ ka lima tœ lœba nœ endje ga tœ ada anga gbolo yakoshe bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Sawulo.
7.59: Lɔkɔ á endje sœ lima kœve Etiene dœ badja, tshe sœ lima kœza avwala adœke: «Gbozu Yisu, za ɨshirɨ mœ.»
7.60: Manda nœ, tshe te dœ matshukuda ye, yé œ ve ɔgbɔ rawa adœke: «Gbozu, gbegbe dœ ekperœ nœ endje nene.» Manda kœpu o'o asœmœ, tshe tshu ye.

8.1: Sawulo sœ lima ugurutœ azu á endje yindœ nœ adœke endje wo Etiene ye. Ali kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ Ikrizia Dœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, Ikrizia tshelœ Yerusaleme te lima tœ kœwu ɔgbɔ œrœ kanga. Kolœ aayi avwa dá lœpe lima lœ Yerusaleme kashe ayindœ Yisu para kɔkɔ kuru lima tshelœtœ endje lœ ogo Yuda œdœ pe lœ Samariya.
8.2: Azu nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu shi lima Etiene manda kœkɨ she dœ oyo kɔ.
8.3: Andaa Sawulo sœ lima kœpa avwara kœndɨ Ikrizia. Tshe sœ lima kœli anda bale dœ bale yekane á gbota ayindœ Yisu, ayakoshe, ayashe yé á gu kœko endje va ga lœ kánga.
8.4: Endjeneke á endje ndjɔ lima tshelœtœ endje, tetœ kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o djelœ ogo djezœ kɔ. Filipo yisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o ɓa lœ Samariya
8.5: Filipo na œnœ ye ɓa lœ anga ongbo bale lœ Samariya, œ sœ kœyisœ œrœ dœ upu nœ Kristu ɓa zœ.
8.6: Ukpulu azu kɔ yindœ o'o ama Filipo mbœrœ á endje sœ lima kœdji she, á sœ ndje kœwu afá á tshe sœ lima kœmbœrœ tœnœ.
8.7: Ekpe ɨshirɨ ndjoro sœ lima kœwuta lœ aayi koɓa dœ kœve ɔgbɔ rawa. Azu ndjoro á ada endje tshu œdœ pe agbakɨndɨ she ndje lima ye.
8.8: Yé egerœ yanga sœ lima lœ ongbonœ asœmœ.
8.9: Anga uzu má ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Shimu, á tshe sœ ndje utshunœ lœ ongbo sœmœ, sœ lima kœfa œrœ tsharawo yé azu tshelœ Samariya kɨ lima tœ œsœnœ waa. Tshe zatœ ye lima ɓata egerœ uzu.
8.10: Azu para kɔkɔ, kœto tœ aaya agbolo œrrr ga tœ agbozu, dji lima she tɔpanœ kpuru. Endje pa lima adœke: «Yakoshenœ asœke sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ndjaba, á endje e tœnœ egerœ gbɔgbɔ.»
8.11: Endje zatœ endje lima ga tœ ye mbœrœ kœfa œrœ tsharawo nœ ye á sœ kœza uvuru endje lœ nœ.
8.12: Kashe lɔkɔ á endje dji lima Ɔtshɔ O'o á Filipo yisœ nœ tœ upu tshagbozu nœ Ndjaba œdœ pe ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu Kristu, ayakoshe œdœ ayashe gbɔ lima batisimu.
8.13: Shimu yindœ nœ dœ tœ ye, yé œ gbɔ batisimu. Manda nœ, tshe te mangba Filipo. Tshe sœ lima kœwu ogboro ambárá œdœ pe afá á Filipo sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ, œ kɨ tœ œsœnœ dœ yanga.
8.14: Aayi avwa á endje sœ lima ɓa lœ Yerusaleme dji adœke, azu tshelœ Samariya yindœ Ɔtshɔ O'o, yé œ vwa Apetro dœ Yowane fœ endje.
8.15: Lɔkɔ á endje wuta ɓa zœ, endje 'e tshalafo mbœrœ azu Samariya adœke endje gbɔ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ,
8.16: mbœrœ Ɨshirɨ jejerœ lima damba ga pa uzu bale ugurutœ endje nene; endje gbɔ lima kolœ batisimu dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu Yisu.
8.17: Apetro dœ Yowane to kane endje ga pa endje, yé azu Samariya gbɔ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ.
8.18: Kashe lɔkɔ á Shimu wu adœke aayi avwa to kane endje ga pa endje yeka á endje gbɔ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ, tshe yindœ kœto ngendja fœ endje.
8.19: Œ pa fœ endje adœke: «'E to ndje gbɔgbɔnœ asœke fœ mœ, mbœrœ œdœ mœ kœto kane mœ ga pa anga azu, endje gbɔ ndje Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ.»
8.20: Petro kœgi fœ she adœke: «Kaka Ndjaba mbœrœ adœke ɓœ yiwa awa bale dœ ngendja nœ zœ, mbœrœ á ɓœ gbe adœke endje yɔ œrœ á Ndjaba œ to fœ azu gbambanœ dœ ngendja.
8.21: Ɓœ lili kœsœ dœ 'a awa bale lœ akwanœ asœke nene, ɓœ gbɔ ndje anga œrœ bale lœ nœ nene, mbœrœ á lɔsu zœ sœsœ ndjii ɓa utshu Ndjaba nene.
8.22: Fa tshalɔsu zœ yé œ donga Gbozu á œ kœli yekane á tshe djerœndœ ekpe gbetshelœ á li ga lɔsu zœ.
8.23: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ wu adœke ɓœ sœ dœ egerœ lɔsu, yé ɓœ fa kanga nœ ngbɨndɨrœ.»
8.24: Shimu gi adœke: «Adja e'e kœdonga Gbozu mbœrœ mœ, kparawa adœke œneke á 'e pa kœwuwuta ga tœ mœ nene.»
8.25: Manda kœgbara o'o ndje dœ kœyisœ o'o ama Gbozu, Apetro dœ Yowane kwatœ endje lima ga lœ Yerusaleme. Kœgu endje tœ ala awa, endje yi lima sœ Ɔtshɔ O'o lakpɨ ndjoro lœ ogo Samariya. Filipo pandœ Yisu fœ uzu Etiopi
8.26: Ɔlɔ bale, andjelu nœ Gbozu pa fœ Filipo adœke: «Aafo œ na yorrr dœ awa á ro ga lœ Sudi, tœ awa á jerœ kœto lœ Yerusaleme kœna ga tœ Gaza. Tœnœ kœdœ awa á azu kpa sœsœ kœna tœnœ nene.»
8.27: Ngbewo, Filipo áalafo dœ kœro she. Kœna she yorrr tœ awanœ asœmœ, tshe wu anga uzu tshelœ ogo Etiopi bale, á tshe dœ́ egerœ ayi akwa nœ Kandase, gbozu yashe ogo Etiopi. Uzunœ asœmœ kœdœ ndje lima ayi kœgbɔndœ ngendja œdœ ukpulu œrœ nœ gbozu yashenœ yekane á ro lima ga lœ Yerusaleme mbœrœ kœdonga Ndjaba,
8.28: yé á sœ kœgu tœnœ ga ndœ ye. Tshe sœ lima ga lœ share nœ ye œ sœ kœdɨ mbeti á ayi kœgbara o'o Isaya su.
8.29: Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ kœpa fœ Filipo adœke: «Gitœ zœ ga utshunœ œ togba dœ sharenœ asœmœ.»
8.30: Filipo na dœ ɔrɔ, œ dji uzu ogo Etiopinœ á tshe sœ kœdɨ mbeti á ayi kœgbara o'o Isaya su dœ avwara ga lafo. Á tshe kœyu she adœke: «Adja ɓœ wusœ ádá œneke á ɓœ dɨ asœke ye a?»
8.31: Uzunœ gi fœ she adœke: «Œdœ uzu kœyisœ ádánœ ngbɨ fœ mœ nene, mœ wu má sœ nœ koto o?» Yé tshe e Filipo adœke tshe ɔ œ sœ ga ɨndɨrɨ œne.
8.32: Œneke á endje sú lima ɓa la mbetinœ á tshe sœ kœdɨ lima tœnœ dœke: «Tshe sœ ɓata pata á endje na dœ she ga tœ osho kœwo apata, tshe sœ ɓata aya pata á tshe kɨkɨ utshu ayi kœlɨ usu kote ye nene, tshe ɨɨ lima ama ye bale nene.
8.33: Endje za tshula fœ she, yé œ wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga pa ye. Œɗe dá pa bala o'o mbœrœ agbolo tshangba ye a? Gbambanœ nene, endje wa tshelœ olo ye pa ɔshɔ.»
8.34: Uzu ogo Etiopi sœmœ yu Filipo adœke: «Wu oyo mœ kane, œɗe dá ayi kœgbara o'o patœ ye ataa? Tshe patœ ye dœ tœ ye too tshe patœ anga angbɨ uzu?»
8.35: Filipo kœto kpœpa œneke á endje sú ɓa la mbeti asœmœ yeka á yisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Yisu fœ she.
8.36: Endje ngbɔtœ awa ana nœ endje œ na œrrr, œ wuta ga tœ anga ungu á sœ ɓa ɨndɨrɨ awa, yé uzu Etiopi kœyu adœke: «Wu ungu asœke, œrœ gaɗe dá pakata mœ ndœ kœgbɔ batisimu a?» [
8.37: Filipo kœpa fœ she adœke: «Œdœ ɓœ kœyindœ nœ dœ lɔsu zœ bale, mœ za batisimu fœ ɓœ ye.» Yé uzu sœmœ kœgi fœ she adœke: «Mœ yindœ nœ adœke Yisu Kristu kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba.»]
8.38: Tshe kœpa fœ ayi kœkpa dœ share adœke endje ka kpœke. Afilipo kœjerœ dœ she ga la ngu yé Filipo kœza lima batisimu fœ she.
8.39: Lɔkɔ á endje wuta langunœ, Ɨshirɨ nœ Gbozu za Filipo yé uzu Etiopi kpa wuwu she nene. Kashe tshe te lima tœ awa kœgu she dœ yanga.
8.40: Filipo wuta ɓa lakpɨ Azote, yé tshe ro kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o na tœnœ lœ ongbo bale dœ bale djezœ œrrr vesho ga lakpɨ Sezaré.

9.1: Dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, Sawulo sœ kolœ dœ gbetshelœ nœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ azu Ikrizia œdœ pe kœpara awa nœ kœyiangwa endje. Tshe na ga ndœ egerœ nganga Ndjabanœ,
9.2: œ yɔndœ mbeti á za awa fœ she kœli djelœ Sinagoga á sœ lakpɨ Damaseke. Œdœ tshe kœwuta ɓa zœ á gbɔ azu, ayakoshe too ayashe má endje sœ kœza awa Yisu, tshe i endje dœ djingiri yé œ gu dœ endje ga lœ Yerusaleme.
9.3: Lɔkɔ á tshe te lima tœ awa yé á wuta lima ndoo dœ Damaseke, ɨshirɨ owo to ngbai ɓa lafo œ jerœ ga pa ye zakpɨ.
9.4: Tshe te ga tœ ɔshɔ, œ dji tshama uzu kœpa adœke: «Sawulo, Sawulo, mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ mbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ mœ ataa?»
9.5: Tshe yu adœke: «Gbozu, œɓœ kœdœ ɗe?» Yé tshamanœ kœgi adœke: «Œmœ kœdœ Yisu, œmœ á ɓœ mbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ mœ.
9.6: Kashe aalafo œ li ga lœ ongbo, yé ɓa zœ dá endje pandœ œneke á li adœke ɓœ mbœrœ, fœ ɓœ.»
9.7: Azu á endje na tœ ala awa dœ Sawulo ka lima, œ sœ kokoko; endje dji lima tshama uzu kashe endje wuwu lima she nene.
9.8: Sawulo áalafo lœ ɔshɔ, kashe ataa tshe kɔrɔ ala ye gbaa, tshe wuwu lima osho bale nene. Anganœ á tshe na lima tœ ala awanœ dœ endje dá za ama kane ye yeka á gbota she duru duru rotœnœ ga lakpɨ Damaseke.
9.9: Tshe mbœrœ lima olo votɔ lœ bula; tshe zɨzɨ lima œrœ yé œ ndjo ndje ungu nene.
9.10: Anga yindœ Yisu bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Anania sœ lima ɓa lœ Damaseke. Gbozu e she lœ ulu adœke: «Anania!» Tshe gi fœ she adœke: «Mœ sœ kea, Gbozu!»
9.11: Gbozu kpa pa adœke: «Na dœ ala awa má endje e tœnœ awa Ndjii, œ yu osho ɓa lœ anda nœ Yudasi tœ anga yakoshe tshalakpɨ Tarse bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ wu Sawulo. Tshe sœ kœza avwala ɓa zœ,
9.12: yé lœ ulu, tshe wu anga yakoshe bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Anania kœli yé á to kane ye ga pa ye adœke tshe kpa wu osho.»
9.13: Anania gi adœke: «Gbozu, mœ dji azu ndjoro kœpa o'o tœ yakoshenœ asœke œdœ kœpandœ ngbɨndɨrœ kɔ á tshe mbœrœ fœ azu kœyindœ zœ ɓa lœ Yerusaleme.
9.14: Yé ngɔngɔ asœ, tshe wuta ɓa ke dœ mbeti á tshe gbɔ ɓa ndœ agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba mbœrœ kœi endjeneke kɔ á endje e ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ lœ ama endje, dœ djingiri.»
9.15: Kashe Gbozu pa fœ she adœke: «Na zœ, gbambanœ nene, mœ ke yakoshenœ asœmœ tœ uzu akwa nœ mœ, yé kpœpa ye dá ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ œ to lœ ogo nœ angbɨ azu, ɓa utshu agbozugo œdœ pe ndje ɓa utshu azu Israyele.
9.16: Œmœ dœ tœ mœ, mœ yisœ mara á li dœ she kœwu œrœ kanga mbœrœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ.»
9.17: Anania ro œ li ga lœ anda, œ to kane ye ga pa Sawulo yé œ pa adœke: «Aya mœ, Sawulo! Gbozu dá vwa mœ. Yisu á tshe wuta lima ga tœ zœ tœ ala awa á ɓœ na lima tœnœ, œshe dá vwa mœ adœke ɓœ kpa tondœ osho yé œ gbɔ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ.»
9.18: Pe kpœtœ œsœnœ, œrœ ɓata djepe yo lœ ala ye dœ́ Sawulo. Tshe tetœ kœwu osho, œ áalafo yé œ gbɔ batisimu.
9.19: Manda nœ, tshe zɨ œrœ yeka á uvuru gu ga lœ nœ. Sawulo yisœ o'o ama Ndjaba ɓa lakpɨ Damaseke Tshe mbœrœ lima olo teasho dœ ayambarœ nœ Yisu á endje sœ lima lœ Damaseke.
9.20: Œndœ ye dɨdɨ lima nene á tshe tetœ kœpandœ nœ lœ Sinagoga adœke, Yisu kœdœ Gbolo nœ Ndjaba.
9.21: Endjeneke kɔ á endje sœ lima kœdji she, endje katœ ama endje tɨ ɔsɔ yé œ pa adœke: «Œ dœ́dœ́ yakoshe asœ dá sœ lima kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ azu á endje yindœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu ɓa lœ Yerusaleme nene a? Tshe nana lima ndœ kœi endje dœ djingiri, yé á kœgu dœ endje fœ agbozu tshapa anganga Ndjaba nene a?»
9.22: Kashe gbɔgbɔ kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Sawulo gerœ lima dœ pa nœ: ɓata á tshe sœ lima kœma ngbɨ adœke Yisu kœdœ Masiya, Ayuda á endje mbœrœ lima ogo lakpɨ Damaseke kpa gugu lima dœ o'o ndœ kœgi fœ she nene.
9.23: Œndœnœ dɨ manda nœ œrrr atake, Ayuda vwarandœ upu kœwo she.
9.24: Kashe Sawulo wusœ kœvwarandœ upu nœ endje asœmœ ye. Endje sœ kœgbɔndœ egerœ manda ongbonœ butshɔ dœ ɔlɔ mbœrœ á endje kœwo she.
9.25: Dœ anga butshɔ bale, ayambarœ nœ ye za she ga lœ kingi, œ gi she dœ uwu yorrr ga atɨ dja gakele gbagba. Sawulo ɓa lœ Yerusaleme
9.26: Sawulo wuta ɓa lœ Yerusaleme œ yindœ kœli ga ugurutœ ayindœ Yisu, kashe endje kpa lima awa ye kɔ mbœrœ endje yiyi lima ndœ nœ katsha nene adœke tshe te yindœ Yisu.
9.27: Yé Barnabase za she po tœ ye, œ gi she fœ aayi avwa. Tshe pandœ mara á Sawulo wu Gbozu tœ ala awa œdœ mara á Gbozu pa lima o'o fœ she. Tshe kpa pa ndje fœ endje mara á tshe sœ lima kœyisœ œrœ ngbɨ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu ɓa lœ Damaseke.
9.28: Pe ndœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, Sawulo te ga ndœ endje yé endje tetœ kœyisœ œrœ ngbɨ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu lœ Yerusaleme.
9.29: Tshe pa lima o'o fœ Ayuda á endje sœ kœpa o'o ama Greke yé endje sœ lima kœgbugburu tshelœ o'o dœ endje. Kashe endje sœ lima kœpara awa ndœ kœwo she.
9.30: Aayanœ lœ Yisu dji o'onœ ataa, œ to she ro tœnœ ga lœ Sezaré yeka á gbɔ awa kœgi she ga lœ Tarse.
9.31: Azu Ikrizia sœ lima gee lœ ogo Yuda djigi, lœ ogo Galilayi œdœ pe ndje lœ Samariya. Endje sœ lima kœkpa awa Gbozu, yé Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ za lima gbɔgbɔ fœ endje adœke kœyindœrœ nœ endje gerœ. Ene she lœ koɓa nœ ye ɓa lakpɨ Lida
9.32: Petro á tshe sœ lima kœro dje lœ ogonœ asœmœ kɔ, na dœ anga ɔlɔ bale ɓa ndœ ayindœ Yisu á endje sœ lima ɓa lœ Lida.
9.33: Tshe gbɔ anga yakoshe á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Ene á tshe lo ga atɨ dœ koɓa mangba ungu mindu dœ votɔ, gbambanœ nene, ada ye tshu lima tshakudu ye.
9.34: Petro pa fœ she adœke: «Ene, Yisu Kristu she ɓœ ye. Aalafo œ guma gbarœ olo zœ!» Yé katsha Ene áalafo.
9.35: Azu kɔ lakpɨ Lida œdœ pe endje nœ akpala osho Sarone wu she ataa, œ fatshalɔsu endje ga ndœ Gbozu. Tabita she lœ kuzu
9.36: Anga yashe bale sœ lima ɓa lœ Yope, œshe lima kœdœ yindœ Yisu; endje e she lima Tabita. Endje fa tshelœ ɨ'ɨrɨnœ lima dœ o'o ama Greke «Dorkase», œ yindœ kœpa adœke «mbele». Tshe sœ lima kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ waa, yé œ sœ kœto œrœ fœ aayi oyo.
9.37: Dœ olonœ asœmœ, tshe gbɔ koɓa yé œ tshu. Manda kœdjutɔ she, endje za she ga lœ gbɔshɔ ɓa lafo.
9.38: Ɓata á tshalakpɨ Lida sœ ndoo dœ Yope, ayindœ Yisu dji lima ndœ nœ adœke Petro sœ lœ Lida, œ vwa azu bisha dœ o'o fœ she adœke: «Vava ada zœ nene, na ga ndœ 'a katsha ga mœ kane.»
9.39: Petro na ga ndœ endje katsha. Lɔkɔ á tshe wuta ɓa zœ, endje 'ɔ dœ she ɓa lœ gbɔshɔ á sœ ɓa lafo, yé ayashe koya para kɔkɔ ka ga utshu ye dœ ngola lœ ala endje. Endje yisœ lœba okoro œdœ pe yɔgbɔdɔ lœba á Dorkase sœ lima kœmbœrœ tœnœ lɔkɔ á tshe sœ dœ soro.
9.40: Petro gɔrɔ azu ga shu para kɔkɔ œ gote dœ matshukuda ye, yé œ kɨ fœ Ndjaba. Manda nœ, tshe fatœ ye yorrr ga tœ oko uzunœ, œ pa adœke: «Tabita, áalafo.» Tshe kɔrɔ ala ye œ tondœ Petro, œ yɔrɔtshelœtœ ye yé œ sœ ga atɨ dœ budu ye.
9.41: Petro bopa kane ye œ tɨ she ga lafo, yé œ e ayindœ Yisu œdœ pe ayashe koya yeka á ma she dœ soro fœ endje.
9.42: Endje dji o'onœ lœ ongbo Yope djigi, yé azu ndjoro fatshalɔsu endje ga ndœ Gbozu.
9.43: Petro lo olo ndjoro ɓa lakpɨ Yope ɓa ndœ Shimu á tshe dœ ayi kœguma ɔkɔ agea.

10.1: Anga yakoshe bale ɓa lœ Sezaré, ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Korneye; œshe kœdœ gbozu tshapa ukpulu aturugu lœ Roma á endje e tœnœ «ukpulu aturugu tshelœ Itali».
10.2: Tshe sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Ndjaba, œ sœ kœkpa awa ye awa bale ndje dœ azu tshasœnda nœ ye. Dœ tœnœ ataa, tshe sœ lima kœto œrœ fœ Ayuda á endje sœ lima dœ oyo, yé œ sœ ndje kœkɨ lima fœ Ndjaba ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ.
10.3: Anga ɔlɔ bale, dœ ada ɔlɔ votɔ manda kakpi ɔlɔ, tshe wu andjelu nœ Ndjaba lœ ulu kœli ga ndœ ye, yé andjelunœ e she adœke: «Korneye!»
10.4: Korneye tondœ ye dœ awa, yé œ gi fœ she adœke: «O'o gaɗe, Gbozu?» Andjelu pa fœ she adœke: «Ndjaba dji avwala nœ zœ œdœ pe ɔtshɔrœ á ɓœ sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ fœ aayi oyo yé tshe djedjerœndœ zœ nene.
10.5: Ngɔngɔ asœke, vwa azu ɓa lakpɨ Yope kœ'e Shimu á anga ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Petro gu tœnœ ga mœ.
10.6: Tshe sœ kœlo ɓa ndœ anga ayi akwa kœguma ɔkɔ agea á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Shimu; á anda nœ ye sœ ɓa tœ ama egerœ ungu.»
10.7: Lɔkɔ má andjelu á tshe pa o'o fœ she yiwa, Korneye e anga aayi akwa nœ ye bisha œdœ pe anga turugu nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu á tshe sœ tshakudu ye katshatsha.
10.8: Tshe yisœ œrœ kɔ á mbœrœtœ ye fœ endje, yé œ vwa endje ɓa lakpɨ Yope.
10.9: Osho kɔrɔ pa nœ, endje sœpe tœ awa kœro tœnœ œ wuta ndoo dœ Yope, Petro ɔ ga tœ akpala osho ɓa pa kumu anda mbœrœ kœza avwala fœ Ndjaba. Ɔlɔ wuta lima ga pa œrœ nœ́ kakpi ɔlɔ.
10.10: Kashe tshe sœ lima dœ ogo, yé œ yindœ kœzɨ œrœ. Lɔkɔ á endje sœ lima kœfa kœzɨrœ fœ she, tshe wu œrœ lœ ulu.
10.11: Tshe wu tshalafo kɔrɔ yé anga œrœ ɓata egerœ lœba tshapa meza á endje du uwu ga tœ amanœ vavana kɔ sœ kœjerœ ga atɨ.
10.12: Yé agea kɔ á ada endje sœ vana, endjeneke á endje sœ kœ'ɔrɔ dœ lavu endje tœ ɔshɔ œdœ pe endjeneke á endje sœ kœru ɓa lafo, sœ lima ɓa lœ nœ.
10.13: Tshe dji tshama uzu kœpa fœ she adœke: «Petro! Áafo, œ wo ageanœ asœ yé œ zɨ endje.»
10.14: Petro gi fœ she adœke: «Bale nene, Gbozu. Mbœrœ lœ soro mœ, mœ zɨzɨ œrœ uburu too ekperœ nene.»
10.15: Tshe kpa dji tshama uzu kœpa fœ she tœ bishanœ adœke: «Œneke á Ndjaba mbœrœ yerœ, œ lili dœ ɓœ kœpa adœke œtœnœ kœdœ œrœ uburu nene.»
10.16: Tshamanœ wu awa votɔ yé katsha manda nœ, œrœnœ ɔ ga lafo.
10.17: Petro sœ kœyutœ ye tœ ádá œrœ á tshe wu lœ ulu atake, tshokombele azu á Korneye vwa endje á endje sœ kœyu osho djezœ djezœ tœ anda nœ Shimu, kœyi kumu endje ga pa egerœ manda gbagba.
10.18: Endje e osho yé, œ yu adœke: «Shimu á anga ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Petro sœ kœlo kpœke a?»
10.19: Petro sœpe lima kolœ kœgbe tshelœ ye tœ œrœ á tshe wu lœ ulu asœmœ, kashe Ɨshirɨ pa fœ she adœke: «Wu, azu votɔ á endje sœ kœpara ɓœ asœke.
10.20: Aafo œ Jerœ yé œ gu tœ awanœ bale dœ endje. Awa zaza ɓœ nene mbœrœ œmœ dá vwa endje.»
10.21: Petro jerœ ga ndœ endje, œ pa fœ endje adœke: «Œmœ dœke. Uzunœ á 'e sœ kœpara she kœdœ œmœ. 'E na ndœ gaɗe?»
10.22: Endje gi fœ she adœke: «Gbozu tshapa ukpulu aturugu á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Korneye dá vwa 'a. Œshe kœdœ ɔtshɔ uzu á tshe sœ kœkpawa Ndjaba, yé Ayuda para kɔkɔ yindœ ye waa. Anga andjelu nœ Ndjaba bale dá pandœ nœ fœ she lœ ulu adœke tshe 'e ɓœ ɓa lœ anda nœ ye á kœdji œneke á ɓœ pa fœ she.»
10.23: Petro pa adœke endje li gasœnda, yé œ yisœ osho olo fœ endje. Osho kɔrɔ pa nœ bale, tshe gu tœ awanœ dœ endje. Anga ayindœ Yisu lakpɨ Yope gu tœ awanœ dœ endje.
10.24: Yé tœ bisha olo manda nœ, tshe wuta ga lœ Sezaré. Dá asœmœ ɓa ndœ Korneye, tshe e ayo nœ ye œdœ pe anganœ á tshe yindœtœ ye dœ endje waa, yeka á endje sœ lima kœkate endje.
10.25: Lɔkɔ á Petro yi kumu ye, Korneye na para tshatshu ye œ gote ga tœ ada ye mbœrœ kœma ɔtshɔ lɔsu ga ndœ ye.
10.26: Petro pa fœ she dœ kœtɨ she ga lafo adœke: «Aalafo, œmœ ndje kœdœ amba uzu gbambanœ.»
10.27: Manda nœ, tshe sœ kœpu o'o dœ Korneye li tœnœ ga sœnda, tshe wu azu ndjoro á endje ngbɔtœ endje ɓa zœ.
10.28: Tshe pa ngbɨ fœ endje adœke: «Ɓata á 'e wusœ nœ, œ sœ dœ ekpenœ adœke Ayuda yindœ angbɨ uzu too kœsœ dœ she tœ œsœnœ bale. Kashe Ndjaba má fœ mœ adœke, mœ papa fœ uzu bale adœke œshe kœdœ ayi uburu too adœke Ndjaba vwaratœ ye tœ ye nene.
10.29: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa dá mœ vwavwaratœ mœ kœna ga mœ lɔkɔ á ɓœ vwa osho ndœ mœ nene. Kashe ngɔngɔ asœke, mœ yindœ kœwusœ ádá á ɓœ 'e mœ ga mœ.»
10.30: Korneye kœgi fœ she adœke: «Mœ sœ lima kœza avwala fœ Ndjaba ɓa sœnda nœ mœ, œ mbœrœ lima olo votɔ dœ ada ɔlɔ votɔ manda kakpi ɔlɔ. Mœ sœ atake, anga uzu bale á tshe verœ imbi lœba uruuu ka ga utshu mœ,
10.31: yé œ pa fœ mœ adœke: “Korneye, Ndjaba dji avwala nœ zœ yé œ djedjerœndœ œrœ á ɓœ to lima fœ aayi oyo nene.
10.32: Vwa anga uzu ɓa lœ Yope kœ'e Shimu á anga ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Petro kœgu ɓa ke. Tshe sœ kœlo ɓa sœnda nœ Shimu, ayi kœguma ɔkɔ agea á anda nœ ye sœ ɓa tœ mangu egerœ ungu.”
10.33: Mœ vwa uzu ndœ kœpara ɓœ, yé ɓœ yindœ kœna tœnœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Ngɔngɔ asœke, a'a kɔ 'a ka ga utshu Ndjaba mbœrœ kœdji œneke á Gbozu za awa fœ ɓœ adœke ɓœ pandœ nœ fœ 'a.» O'o nœ Petro
10.34: Yé Petro za o'o œ pa adœke: «Mœ wu adja sœ nœ ngɔngɔ asœ adœke Ndjaba keke azu mbœrœ tshatshu endje nene.
10.35: Yé lœ ogo kɔ, uzu á tshe sœ kœkpawa Ndjaba yé á sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœ ndjii, Ndjaba œ yindœ ye.
10.36: Tshe vwa o'o fœ azu tshelœ Israyele, Ɔtshɔ O'o kœsœ gee lœ awa nœ Yisu Kristu á tshe dœ Gbozu nœ azu kɔ.
10.37: «'E wusœ œneke á wuta lima utshunœ ɓa lœ Galilayi, lœ ogo Yuda djigi dœ lɔkɔ á Yowane sœ lima kœyisœ œrœ, á sœ ndje kœza batisimu fœ azu.
10.38: 'E wusœ mara á Ndjaba to gbɔgbɔ nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ fœ Yisu á tshe dœ uzu Nazarete. Tshe na djetœ osho kɔ dœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ, tshe she endjeneke para á endje dœ lima akanga nœ djaboro, mbœrœ Ndjaba sœ lima awa bale dœ she.
10.39: «Yé a'a, 'a kœdœ atimu nœ œrœ kɔ á tshe mbœrœ ɓa lœ ogo nœ Ayuda œdœ ɓa lœ Yerusaleme. Endje wo she œ kuru she ga pa kurushi.
10.40: Kashe Ndjaba she she ugurutœ akuzu manda olo votɔ, yé œ to uvuru fœ she adœke tshe kpa matœ ye.
10.41: Œ dœ́dœ́ mbœrœ azu djigi nene, kashe fœ 'a á Ndjaba ke 'a katshatsha utshunœ ɓata atimu. 'A zɨ œrœ œ ndjo œrœ awa bale dœ she manda kœshe she ugurutœ akuzu.
10.42: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, tshe pa fœ 'a adœke 'a yisœ nœ fœ azu yé œ ma ndœlanœ fœ endje adœke, œshe dá Ndjaba za she ndœ kœwa ngbanga pa asoro œdœ akuzu.
10.43: Aayi kœgbara o'o kɔ pa lima tœ ye adœke uzu kɔ á tshe sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu, lœ gbɔgbɔ nœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye dœ́ Yisu dá Ndjaba œ djerœndœ ekperœ nœ ye.» Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ jerœ ga pa angbɨ azu
10.44: Lɔkɔ á Petro sœpe lima kœpu o'o, Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ jerœ ga pa endjeneke kɔ á endje dji lima o'o ye.
10.45: Ayindœ Yisu á endje kœdœ Ayuda á endje na lima tœ awanœ dœ Petro ka lima tœ ama endje tɨ ɔsɔ kœwu adœke: Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ á Ndjaba vwa, jerœ ndje lima ga pa angbɨ azu.
10.46: Yé endje sœ lima kœdji angbɨ azunœ kœdonga Ndjaba ndje kœpa o'o ama ogo á endje sœsœ lima kœdji tœnœ nene. Petro kpa kœpa adœke:
10.47: «Ɓata á azu asœke gbɔ ndje Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ ɓata azœ, œɗe dá kpa kɔ endje tœ kœgbɔ batisimu dœ ungu a?»
10.48: Tshe za o'o adœke endje za batisimu fœ endje dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu Kristu. Manda nœ, angbɨ azunœ yu she adœke œne yatœ œne dœ she manda olo teasho kane.

11.1: Aayi avwa œdœ ayindœ Yisu á endje sœ lima ɓa lœ Yuda dji adœke angbɨ azu yi ndje ndœ o'o ama Ndjaba.
11.2: Lɔkɔ á Petro ɔ ga lœ Yerusaleme, anga ayindœ Yisu á endje dœ́ Ayuda, tetœ kœgbugburu tshelœ o'o dœ she
11.3: adœke: «Ɓœ li ga ndœ angbɨ azu yé œ zɨ œrœ dœ endje!»
11.4: Yé Petro pandœ œneke kɔ á ro, kœto ɓa tœ adanœ bale dœ bale fœ endje adœke:
11.5: «Lɔkɔ á mœ sœ lima kœkɨ fœ Ndjaba ɓa lakpɨ Yope, mœ wu œrœ lœ ulu: anga œrœ bale ɓata egerœ lœba tshapa meza á endje du uwu ga tœ amanœ vavana kɔ. Œrœnœ asœmœ to ɓa lafo, œ jerœ ga atɨ ndɔɔ ndoo dœ mœ.
11.6: Mœ to lima ndœ nœ yima yé œ wu agea gusu á ada endje sœ vana, endjeneke á endje ɔrɔ dœ lavu endje œdœ pe endjeneke á endje ru ɓa lafo.
11.7: Manda nœ, mœ dji tshama uzu kœpa fœ mœ adœke: “Petro! Aalafo, œ wo agea asœke yé œ zɨ endje.”
11.8: Yé mœ pa adœke: “Bale nene, Gbozu. Gbambanœ nene, lœ soro mœ, mœ zɨzɨ œrœ uburu too ekperœ nene.”
11.9: «Tœ bishanœ, tshama uzu to ɓa lafo adœke: “Œneke á Ndjaba mbœrœ yerœ, œ lili dœ ɓœ kœpa adœke œtœnœ kœdœ uburu nene.”
11.10: Œrœnœ wu ata awa votɔ, yé œ ɔ ga lafo.
11.11: Yé tshokombele, azu tshelœ Sezaré votɔ yi kumu endje ɓa tœ anda á 'a sœ tœnœ. Endje na ndœ kœpara mœ.
11.12: Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ pa fœ mœ adœke mœ gu katsha tœ awanœ dœ endje. Ayakoshenœ mindu dœ bale á mœ to endje rotœnœ ga mœ asœke, 'a na tœ awanœ dœ endje œrrr ɓa lœ Sezaré yé œ li dœ endje kɔ ga lœ anda nœ yakoshenœ asœmœ á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Korneye.
11.13: Tshe pandœ mara á andjelu wuta ga tœ ye ɓa sœnda yé á pa fœ she adœke: “Vwa anga uzu ɓa lœ Yope kœ'e Shimu á anga ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Petro, tshe gu ɓa ke.
11.14: Tshe pandœ o'o á za kœshe fœ ɓœ dœ azu tshasœnda nœ zœ kɔ.”
11.15: «Lɔkɔ á mœ sœ kœpa o'o, Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ jerœ ga pa endje ɓata á jerœ lima utshunœ ga pa azœ.
11.16: Mœ gbe tshelœ mœ ndœ o'o á Gbozu pa lima adœke: “Yowane za lima batisimu nœ ungu, kashe e'e, 'e gbɔ batisimu lœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ.”
11.17: Œdœ Ndjaba kœto ɔtshɔrœ fœ azunœ asœke ɓata á tshe to fœ azœ á ayindœ o'o Gbozu Yisu Kristu, œmœ kœdœ œɗe yeka á kɔ Ndjaba tœ kœmbœrœ œrœ a?»
11.18: Manda kœdji o'onœ asœmœ, endje sœ koko yé œ za mokɔ fœ Ndjaba dœ kœpa adœke: «Adjapu, Ndjaba to ndje awa kœfatshalɔsu œdœ pe awa kœgbɔ soro fœ angbɨ azu.» Ali Ikrizia lœ Atiɔshe
11.19: Œrœ kanga á mbœrœtœ endje lima dœ lɔndɔ á endje wo lima Etiene, mbœrœ adœke ayindœ Yisu ndjɔ lima tshelœtœ endje ngbangbangba djezœ. Anga endje ro lima ga lœ Fenisi, ga lœ Shipre œdœ ga lœ Atiɔshe; kashe endje sœ lima kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Ndjaba kolœ fœ Ayuda.
11.20: Andaa, anga endje ugurutœ endje á endje kœdœ azu tshelœ Shipre œdœ Sirene, endje na ɓa lœ Atiɔshe yé œ yi ndje sœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Gbozu Yisu fœ Agreke.
11.21: Gbɔgbɔ nœ Gbozu sœ lima dœ endje awa bale dœ mara adœke azu ndjoro fatœ endje ga ndœ Gbozu yé œ wuta ayindœ Yisu.
11.22: Azu Ikrizia lœ Yerusaleme dji o'onœ, yé œ vwa Barnabase ɓa lœ Atiɔshe.
11.23: Lɔkɔ á Barnabase yi kumu ye á wu mara ɔtshɔrœ á Ndjaba mbœrœ fœ ayindœ Yisunœ asœmœ, tshe sœ dœ yanga yé œ pa fœ endje kɔ adœke endje za lɔsu endje djigi fœ Gbozu.
11.24: Barnabase kœdœ ɔtshɔ uzu, tshe sœ dœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ œdœ pe kœyindœrœ waa. Ukpulu azu ndjoro te lima azu nœ Gbozu.
11.25: Manda nœ, Barnabase na kœpara Sawulo ɓa lœ Tarse.
11.26: Tshe gbɔ she ɓa zœ œ gu dœ she ga lœ Atiɔshe. Endje bibisha, endje mbœrœ lima ungu bale ɓa lœ Ikrizianœ asœmœ yé œ yisœ œrœ fœ azu ndjoro. Ɓa lœ Atiɔshe dá endje e ɨ'ɨrɨ «Akristu» tœ alinœ ga tœ ayindœ Yisu. Œrœ á má kœtorœ lœ ugurutœ azu
11.27: Dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ, anga aayi kœgbara o'o to ɓa lœ Yerusaleme œ sœ kœna ga lœ Atiɔshe.
11.28: Anga bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Agabuse, á Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ sœ kœma œrœ fœ she, mɨndœ nœ adœke egerœ ogo œ za tshapashɔ djigi lœ ondonœ zœ. Manda nœ, œ mbœrœtœ endje lima dœ lɔndɔ á Klode dœ lima gbozugo Roma.
11.29: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, ayindœ Yisu wa o'o adœke œne vwa œrœ fœ anga œne á endje sœ ɓa lœ Yuda. Uzu dœ uzu œ to liaka gbɔgbɔ nœ ye.
11.30: Endje mbœrœ lindœ œneke á endje wa, yé œ vwa œrœ á endje gbɔ, lœ awa nœ Abarnabase dœ Sawulo fœ agbozu lœ ogo Yuda.

12.1: Dœ lɔndɔnœ asœmœ, gbozugo Erode sœ lima kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ anga azu Ikrizia.
12.2: Tshe mbœrœ adœke endje wo Jake, aya Yowane, dœ ugu kamba.
12.3: Yé lɔkɔ á tshe wu adœke œrœ má œne mbœrœ za yanga fœ Ayuda waa, tshe kpa pa adœke, endje za Petro. Œ sœ lima dœ lɔkɔ angbo nœ mapa á susuku nene.
12.4: Tshe bopa ye œ vwi she ga lœ kánga, yé œ pa fœ ukpulu aturugu vana á ngbɔɓa aturugu vana vana, mbœrœ kœgbɔndœ ye. Tshe sœ kœgbe lima adœke manda angbo Pake yeka á œne kœdji she ɓa utshu azu para kɔkɔ.
12.5: Endje gbɔ lima ndœ Petro ɓa lœ kánga, kashe azu Ikrizia kaka lima tœ kœza avwala dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye fœ Ndjaba nene.
12.6: Erode yi lima ndœ kœwa ngbanga nœ ye tœ ala azu para kɔkɔ. Dœ butshɔnœ asœmœ, Petro lo ɓa ugurutœ aturugu bisha, endje i she vwagbagba dœ djingiri bisha yé aayi kœgbɔndœ manda ka ɓa utshu manda kánganœ.
12.7: Kashe tshokombele, andjelu nœ Gbozu yikumu ye, yé ɨshirɨ owo za osho djigi. Andjelu turutœ ye œ jo she, á pa fœ she adœke: «Aalafo katsha!» Djingirinœ kœzu tœ kane Petro.
12.8: Yé andjelu kpa pa fœ she adœke: «I uwu tshapa lœba nœ zœ, œ soro uwu œrada nœ zœ.» Petro mbœrœtœ ye lindœ o'o ye. Andjelu kpa pa adœke: «Verœ yɔgbɔdɔ lœba nœ zœ yé œ te manda mœ.»
12.9: Petro wuta lœ kánga œ te manda andjelu. Tshe gbe œnœ ye adœke œneke á andjelu mbœrœ asœmœ dœ́dœ́ adja œrœ nene, kashe œne wu œrœ lœ ulu.
12.10: Endje ro ali azu kœgbɔndœ manda, manda nœ endje ro bisha endje yé œ wuta ga tœ manda yarakowo á wuta kpuru ga lœ ongbo: mandanœ kɔrɔ dœ tœ ye utshu endje. Lɔkɔ á endje wuta ga shu, endje ro tshatœ ama gbɔlɔ, yé tɨtɨvwɨrɨ andjelu kœyiwa ye.
12.11: Uvuru Petro kœkwa ga lœ nœ, á tshe kœpa adœke: «Ngɔngɔ asœke, mœ wu adœke œ dœ́ adjapu: Gbozu vwa andjelu nœ ye á tshe vwara mœ tshakane Erode dœ pe lœma ekperœ á Ayuda guma ndœ mœ.»
12.12: Manda kœgbe tshelœ ye tœ œneke á mbœrœ fœ she, tshe gu ga lœ anda nœ Mareya, ayi Yowane á anga ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Marke. Azu ndjoro sœ lima kœdonga Ndjaba ɓa zœ.
12.13: Lɔkɔ á tshe nge manda, anga yawuru akwa bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Rode, na mbœrœ kœkɔrɔ tœnœ.
12.14: Tshe dji tshama Petro œ sœ dœ yanga, œ tshapu kœkɔrɔ manda, yé œ kpa dœ ɔrɔ mbœrœ kœpandœ nœ adœke, Petro ka ɓa pa manda ɓa shu.
12.15: Endje pa fœ she adœke: «Iyi sœ lœ kumu zœ a!» Kashe tshe pa fœ endje adœke, œneke á œne sœ kœpa fœ endje kœdœ adjapu. Á endje kœpa adœke: «Asœmœ kœdœ andjelu á tshe sœ kœgbɔndœ Petro dœmœ.» 16
12.16: Petro sœpe kolœ kœnge manda. Lɔkɔ á endje kɔrɔ manda, endje wu she yé œ i gbɔndjuru.
12.17: Tshe mbœrœ kane ye fœ endje adœke endje sœ koko, yé œ pandœ mara á Gbozu za she ga shu lœ kánga fœ endje. Tshe kpa pa adœke: «'E na œ pandœ nœ fœ Jake œdœ pe fœ anga ayindœ Yisu.» Manda nœ, tshe wuta yé œ na ga tœ angbɨ osho.
12.18: Osho kɔrɔ, aturugu yakatœ endje ngbangbangba. Endje tetœ kœyutœ endje lœtœ endje adœke Petro fatœ ye tœ ɗe!
12.19: Erode vwa azu kœpara Petro œrrr toroboka, endje gbɔ gbɔ she nene. Tshe yu aayi kœgbɔndœ manda kánganœ, yé á pa adœke endje wo endje ye. Manda nœ, Erode to ɓa lœ ogo Yuda œ na ga lœ Sezaré, yé œ mbœrœ olo teasho ɓa zœ. Kuzu gbozu Erode
12.20: Erode sœ lima dœ geda dœ azu ogo Tire œdœ azu ogo Sidona. Azu ogonœ bibisha asœke yindœ kœwuta ga utshu ye. Endje u Blastuse á tshe dœ uzu tshapa ayi akwa nœ Erode, œ dji o'o tshelœ ye. Endje na kœyu Erode adœke tshe mbœrœ adœke œne sœ gee. Gbambanœ nene, ogo nœ endje gbɔ œrœ kœto ɓa lœ œnœ ye dœ gbozugo.
12.21: Dœ lɔkɔnœ á endje guma tœ kœgbɔtœ endje, Erode verœ lœba tshagbozu nœ ye, œ sœ ga pa ngande gbozu nœ ye, yé œ tetœ kœpu o'o ɓa utshu azu kɔ.
12.22: Azu tetœ kœta rawa adœke: «Asœ kœdœ tshama ndjaba, œ dœ́dœ́ œnœ uzu nene!»
12.23: Kashe, pe tœ œsœnœ, andjelu nœ Gbozu ɓi Erode mbœrœ á tshe tshapu kœdonga Ndjaba tɨ, yé á sœ kœlɨsœtœ ye adœke œne kœdœ Ndjaba. Angɔzu zɨ she lœ ɔkɔnœ yé tshe tshu.
12.24: O'o ama Ndjaba ka aka osho kɔ, yé azu á endje yindœ nœ wuta lima ndjoro.
12.25: Lɔkɔ á akwa nœ Abarnabase dœ Sawulo ka lima lœ Yerusaleme, endje za lima Yowane á anga ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Marke potœ endje á gu dœ she.

13.1: Aayi kœgbara o'o œdœ aayi kœyisœrœ sœ lima ɓa lœ Ikrizia nœ Atiɔshe. Œ dœ lima Barnabase, Shimeyo á anga ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Ubu Uzu œdœ pe Lukiyuse uzu tshelœ Sirene, dœ Sawulo œ ga ndœ Manaene yanga Erode á tshe sœ lima kœna tœ awanœ dœ she pe dœ tshagbolo ye.
13.2: Anga ɔlɔ bale á endje sœ lima kœdonga Gbozu yé á sœ kœyotshelœma endje, Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ pa adœke: «'E ko Abarnabase dœ Sawulo ga ɨndɨrɨnœ mbœrœ adœke endje mbœrœ œrœ œneke á mœ e endje ndœ nœ.»
13.3: Yé manda kœyotshelœma endje dœ pe kœdonga Ndjaba, endje to kane endje ga pa endje yé œ za awa fœ endje. Asawulo dœ Barnabase ɓa lakpɨ Shipre
13.4: Ɓata á Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ vwa Barnabase dœ Sawulo, endje na ɓa lakpɨ Selœsi, œ ɔ egerœ agba ɓa zœ yeka á ro ga lœ Shipre.
13.5: Lɔkɔ á endje wuta ga lœ Salamine, endje tetœ kœmɨndœ o'o ama Ndjaba ɓa lœ Sinagoga nœ Ayuda. Yowane á anga ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Marke sœ ndje lima kpœtœmœ mbœrœ kœtɨ kane endje.
13.6: Manda kœzu tshiki para œrrr kœwuta ɓa lœ Pafose, endje gbɔ anga ayi kœpandœ ulu bale á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Bare Yisu; œshe kœdœ Yuda á tshe zatœ ye ɓata ayi kœgbara o'o.
13.7: Tshe sœ lima ɓa ndœ gbozu Sereyuse Pawuluse á tshe kœdœ ayi kœwusœrœ, á tshe e Barnabase dœ Sawulo mbœrœ tshe sœ lima dœ ogo kœdji o'o ama Ndjaba.
13.8: Kashe ayi kœpandœ ulu Elimase (ɨ'ɨrɨ Bare Yisu dœ Greke dœmœ) yiyi lima ndœ o'o ama endje nene, yé œ para awa kœndɨ tshelœ gbetshelœ nœ gbozu asœmœ adœke tshe sœsœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu nene.
13.9: Yé Sawulo á anga ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Polo á Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ su she kperœ, za ala ye kukuku ga tœ ye,
13.10: yé œ pa adœke: «Œɓœ, afara œdœ pe ekperœ su ɓœ kperœ. Œɓœ kœdœ gbolo nœ djaboro, uzu á tshe yiyindœ djakata o'o nene. Ɓœ katœ kœndɨ awa nœ Gbozu á sœ ndjii nene a?
13.11: Ngɔngɔ asœke, kane Ndjaba sœ pa zœ. Ɓœ fa ayibula, yé ɓœ wu ɔlɔ nene œrrr ga tœ olo á tshe yindœ nœ.» Pe kpœtœ œsœnœ, tshelœ ala ye wu shuu yé osho bu kporokoto tœ ye. Tshe fatœ ye djikɨrɨli djikɨrɨli kœpara uzu adœke tshe za ama kane œne.
13.12: Lɔkɔ á gbozugo wu œneke á mbœrœtœ endje, tshe te yindœ Yisu; gbambanœ nene, o'o ama Gbozu za lima uvuru ye lœnœ. Polo pa o'o ɓa lakpɨ Atiɔshe nœ ogo Pisidi
13.13: Polo dœ anganœ á tshe na tœ awa dœ endje ɔ lima ga lœ egerœ agba ɓa lœ Pafose, œ ro ga lœ Perje ɓa lœ Pafili. Yé Yowane katœ endje, œ kwatœ ye ga lœ Yerusaleme.
13.14: Endje katœ tshalakpɨ Perje tɨ, yé œ wuta ɓa lœ Atiɔshe nœ ogo Pisidi. Lɔkɔ sabata, endje li ga lœ Sinagoga yé œ sœ lima ga atɨ.
13.15: Manda kœdɨ buku á ngbɔɓa awa akwa nœ Moyize dœ œnœ aayi kœgbara o'o, agbozu tshelœ Sinagoga pa fœ endje adœke: «Aaya, 'e kœsœ dœ anga o'o á sœ kœto gbɔgbɔ fœ uzu, 'e pa!»
13.16: Polo áalafo œ mbœrœ kane ye, yé œ pa adœke: «Azu tshelœ Israyele œdœ pe e'e dœ angbɨ azu á 'e sœ kœkpa awa Ndjaba, 'e dji mœ kane.
13.17: Ndjaba nœ azu Israyele ke aata 'a. Tshe mbœrœ adœke endje ngba lɔkɔ á endje sœ lima ɓa lœ Ezipito. Manda nœ, tshe ko endje lima ga shu dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ ye.
13.18: Tshe gbɔndœ endje lima ɓa lœ kpagagasho manda ungu zazu bisha.
13.19: Manda nœ, tshe wo lima ogo mindu dœ bisha lœ ogo Kanana yé œ kurutshelœ nœ tœ azu nœ ye.
13.20: Œtœnœ kɔ mbœrœ lima ga pa œrœ nœ́ ungu kama vana dœ zazu bisha dœ ndjokpa (450). «Manda nœ, tshe ko aayi kœwa ngbanga fœ endje œrrr ga tœ ayi kœgbara o'o Samwele.
13.21: Endje yu osho tœ gbozugo yé Ndjaba za Sawulo, gbolo nœ Kise á tshe kœdœ uzu lœ mara nœ Bendjame, fœ endje. Tshe sœ pa endje manda ungu zazu bisha.
13.22: Manda kœza Sawulo ga shu tœ akwa, Ndjaba za Davidi tœ gbozugo. Tshe ma o'o nœ ye ngbɨ adœke: “Mœ gbɔ Davidi, gbolo nœ Yese, uzu á lɔsu mœ yindœ ye. Tshe mbœrœ œneke kɔ á mœ gbe dœ tœnœ.”
13.23: Ɓa lœ aatanœ dá Ndjaba za Yisu tœ ayi kœshe azu Israyele ɓata á tshe pa lima tœnœ.
13.24: Utshu kœna lima Yisu, Yowane pandœ nœ lima fœ azu Israyele adœke endje fatshalɔsu endje, yé œ gbɔ batisimu.
13.25: Yé lɔkɔ á Yowane mbœrœ lima akwa nœ ye á ka ye, tshe sœ lima kœpa adœke: “'E gbe adœke œmœ kœdœ eɗe e? Œ dœ́dœ́ mœ kœdœ tsheneke á 'e kate she nene! Kashe anga uzu á tshe na manda mœ, mœ li kœzu uwu œrada nœ ye nene.”
13.26: «E'e dœ aaya mœ, aata Abrayamo ndje dœ angbɨ azu á 'e sœ kœkpa awa Ndjaba asœke, endje vwa Ɔtshɔ O'onœ asœke á pandœ kœshe fœ azœ.
13.27: Azu Yerusaleme œdœ pe agbozu tshapa endje wuwusœ Yisu nene, endje wuwu ndje sœ ádá o'o má aayi kœgbara o'o su á endje sœ kœdɨ tœnœ ɔlɔ sabata bale dœ bale nene. Kashe endje wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga pa Yisu liaka o'onœ asœmœ.
13.28: Ataa endje para lima awa kœwo she œrrr toro ye, endje kapa Pilato adœke tshe wo she.
13.29: Lɔkɔ á endje mbœrœ lima œneke kɔ á Buku nœ Ndjaba pandœ nœ tœ upu nœ ye, endje za lima she pa kurushi ga atɨ, yé œ shi lima she ɓa lœ anga udu bale.
13.30: Kashe Ndjaba she lima she lœ akuzu ye.
13.31: Tshe wuta lima lœ olo ndjoro ga tœ endjeneke á endje na lima dœ she awa bale kœto ɓa lakpɨ Galilayi œrrr ga lœ Yerusaleme, endje á endje kœdœ atimu ngɔngɔ asœke ɓa utshu azu ogo Israyele.
13.32: «A'a ndje, 'a sœ kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'onœ asœke fœ 'e, œrœ á Ndjaba pa lima tœ nœ fœ aata 'a adœke œne mbœrœ,
13.33: tshe mbœrœ fœ azœ má a dœ agbolo nœ endje, lɔkɔ á tshe she lima Yisu lœ akuzu ɓata á endje sú ɓala bisha mbeti nœ Ɨtshi adœke: “Œɓœ kœdœ gbolo nœ mœ, kœto kpesheke, œmœ dá zu ɓœ.”
13.34: Ndjaba pa lima adœke œne shé she lœ akuzu, yé tshe gba nene. Tshe pa lima ngbɨ adœke: “Mœ to kane nœ mœ dœ adja œyerœ kœto kane ga pa 'e, ɓata á mœ pa lima ndœ kœto fœ Davidi.”
13.35: Mbœrœ tœnœ dá Davidi pa ndje ala anga mbeti adœke: “Ɓœ katœ œyerœ uzu nœ zœ adœke tshe gba nene.”
13.36: Lɔkɔ á Davidi sœpe lima dœ soro, tshe mbœrœ lima œneke á Ndjaba yisœ nœ. Manda nœ, tshe tshu lima, endje shi she ndoo dœ aatanœ yé ɔkɔ ye gba.
13.37: Kashe tsheneke á Ndjaba shé she, gbagba lima nene.
13.38: Aaya mœ, 'e wusœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke mangba Yisu dá endje pandœ o'o kœdjerœndœ ekperœ fœ 'e á awa akwa nœ Moyize lili lima ndœ kœvwara 'e lœnœ nene.
13.39: Uzu kɔ á tshe sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye, tshe wuta uzu ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba.
13.40: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'e sœ dœ gbɔdjela mbœrœ á o'o neke á aayi kœgbara o'o su kœwuwuta ga tœ 'e nene:
13.41: “'E wu kane! E'e dœ adjipudji, 'e katœ ama 'e tɨ ɔsɔ yé œ ndjɔtshelœtœ 'e! Gbambanœ nene, mœ yindœ kœmbœrœ anga œrœ bale lœ soro 'e, œrœ neke á 'e yindœ nœ nene, œdœ uzu kœpandœ nœ fœ 'e.”»
13.42: Lɔkɔ á Polo dœ Barnabase sœ lima kœwuta tœnœ, endje tetœ kœkɨ fœ endje adœke endje kwa dœ ɔlɔ sabata manda nœ œ kpa yisœ o'onœ asœmœ.
13.43: Manda angbɔtœnœ, Ayuda œdœ pe angbɨ azu á endje sœ kœkpa awa Ndjaba te manda Polo dœ Barnabase. Lœ o'o á endje sœ kœpa tœnœ, Polo dœ Barnabase pa fœ endje adœke: «'E zatœ 'e djigi ga tœ ɔtshɔrœ nœ Ndjaba.» Polo dœ Barnabase na ga ndœ angbɨ azu
13.44: Lɔkɔ sabata manda nœ, œ sœ ɓata azu kɔ lœ ongbo ngbɔtœ endje lima mbœrœ kœdji o'o ama Gbozu.
13.45: Kœwu ukpulu azunœ ataa, Ayuda mbœrœ uku yé œ tetœ kœgu Polo dœ kœyiangba o'o ye.
13.46: Polo dœ Barnabase mɨndœ nœ dœ awanœ adœke: «Œ li má lima adœke endje yisœ Ɔtshɔ O'onœ asœke utshunœ fœ 'e! Ɓata á 'e vwaratœ 'e tœnœ, yé á wa ngbanga dœ tœ 'e adœke 'e lili kœgbɔ soro nœ wa dœ wa nene asœmœ, 'a fatœ 'a ngɔngɔ asœ ga ndœ angbɨ azu.
13.47: Awa akwanœ á Gbozu pa tœnœ fœ 'a dœke: “Mœ za ɓœ ɓata ɔlɔ kœtshi pa angbɨ azu lœ ogo kɔ, mbœrœ adœke ɓœ yisœ o'o nœ kœshe œrrr tɔ ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔ osho.”»
13.48: Kœdji o'onœ asœmœ ataa, angbɨ azu tetœ kœdonga Gbozu dœ yanga. Endjeneke á endje sœ lima mbœrœ soro nœ wa dœ wa, endje te lima ayindœ Yisu.
13.49: O'o ama Gbozu za lima tshelœ ogonœ djigi.
13.50: Kashe Ayuda bɨlɨ ayashe á œsœ endje lɨ, á endje sœ kœdonga Ndjaba œdœ pe agbozu tshapa ongbo. Endje mbœrœ œrœ kanga ga tœ Polo dœ Barnabase, yé œ gɔrɔ endje lœ ogo nœ endje ye.
13.51: Polo œdœ Barnabase gɔrɔ trusha tshada endje fœ endje, yé œ ro ga lœ Ikoniyume.
13.52: Dá asœmœ ayindœ Yisu ɓa lakpɨ Atiɔshe sœ lima dœ yanga waa, yé œ su dœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ.

14.1: Polo œdœ Barnabase na ɓa lakpɨ Ikoniyume œ li ndje ga lœ Sinagoga nœ Ayuda œ pa o'o yé Ayudanœ dœ pe Agreke ndjoro te lima ayindœ Yisu.
14.2: Kashe Ayuda neke á endje yiyi lima ndœ nœ nene, to gbetshelœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ ga tœ ayindœ Yisu fœ angbɨ azu.
14.3: Andaa Polo œdœ Barnabase mbœrœ lima olo ndjoro ɓa lœ Ikoniyume. Endje pa lima o'o dœ awa nene lœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje ga ndœ Gbozu. Kœwu tœnœ ataa, Gbozu ma adœke o'onœ á endje sœ kœpa tœnœ tœ upu ɔtshɔrœ nœ ye kœdœ adja o'o, á tshe to gbɔgbɔ nœ kœfa œrœ dœ kœma ambáránœ fœ endje.
14.4: Azu tshelœ ongbo kurutshelœtœ endje: anga endje yindœ Ayuda yé anga endje yindœ aayi avwa.
14.5: Angbɨ azu, Ayuda dœ pe agbozu tshapa endje vwara lima ndœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga ga tœ Polo dœ Barnabase œdœ kœve endje dœ badja.
14.6: Endje wusœ o'onœ yé œ kpa gu tœnœ dœ awa ongbo Listre œdœ Derbe lœ ogo Likawoni œdœ pe ndje ogo para ɨndɨrɨnœ.
14.7: Endje sœ lima kœpa ndje ndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o ɓa zœ. Polo œdœ Barnabase ɓa lakpɨ Listre
14.8: Anga yakoshe bale á ada ye tshu, sœ lima ɓa lakpɨ Listre. Ɓata á endje zu lima she tœ ayi vwɨrɨtɨ, tshe nana lima ana bale nene.
14.9: Anga ɔlɔ bale á tshe sœ kœdji o'o á Polo sœ kœpa tœnœ, Polo za ala ye kukuku ga tœ ye, yé œ wu adœke tshe sœ dœ kœyindœrœ mbœrœ kœshe tœnœ.
14.10: Polo pa dœ ɔgbɔ fœ she adœke: «Aalafo œ ka ndjii dœ ada zœ!» Yakoshenœ i ga lafo yé œ tetœ kœna lima ana.
14.11: Kœwu œneke á Polo mbœrœ asœmœ, azu ndjoro oma kekeke œ pa dœ o'o ama ogo Likawoni adœke: «Andjaba fatœ endje tœ azu yé á jerœ ga ndœ azœ asœke.»
14.12: Endje e Barnabase «Zewuse», yé œ e Polo «Ermese» mbœrœ œshe dá sœ lima kœmɨndœ o'o .
14.13: Nganga ndjaba lœ anda nœ Zewuse á sœ ɓa ushu nœ ongbo, na dœ akɔ angombe á endje guma endje dœ flere. Œshe œdœ azu ndjoro, endje yi lima ndœ kœsho endje tœ tokóró fœ Polo dœ Barnabase.
14.14: Dœ lɔndɔ á endje dji ataa, endje súru lima tshelœ lœba tœ endje yé œ gbɔgbɔtœ endje dœ ana gutœnœ ga lœ ukpulu azu. Endje pa dœ ɔgbɔ adœke:
14.15: «Uu aaya, mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e mbœrœ ataa? A'a kœdœ ndje azu ɓata 'e! 'A sœ kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o fœ 'e adœke 'e katœ œrœ á ádánœ gugu nene, mbœrœ kœfatœ 'e ga ndœ Ndjaba á tshe sœ dœ soro yé á mbœrœ tshalafo, dœ ɔshɔ, dœ egerœ kota œdœ pe œneke kɔ á sœ lœnœ.
14.16: Lɔkɔ nœ aata azœ, tshe ka lima tœ azu ogo para kœza awa nœ endje dœ tœ endje.
14.17: Kashe atamœ gbaa, tshe kakatœ kœma adœke œne sœ zœ lœ awa nœ ɔtshɔrœ nœ ye fœ endje nene. Ɔtshɔrœnœ asœmœ dœke: tshe vwa yavuru fœ 'e mbœrœ kœmɔ ɔshɔ tshelœ kɨndɨ nœ 'e adœke 'e gbɔ kœzɨrœ á li, yé lɔsu 'e sœ dœ yanga.»
14.18: Ataa ukpulu azunœ dji lima o'o nœ aayi avwa gbaa, endje sœ lima dœ sharapu utshu kœkatœ kœza tokórónœ fœ endje.
14.19: Anga Ayuda á endje to ɓa lœ Atiɔshe œdœ ɓa lœ Ikoniyume, te ga ndœ ukpulu azu asœmœ. Endje ve lima Polo dœ badja, yé œ gbe adœke tshe tshu ye yeka á gbota she lœ ongbo ga shu.
14.20: Kashe lɔkɔ á ayindœ Yisu ngbɔtœ endje ga ɨndɨrɨ ye, tshe áalafo yé œ kwatœ ye ga lœ ongbonœ. Osho kɔrɔ pa nœ, endje ro dœ Barnabase ga lœ Derbe. Polo dœ Barnabase fatœ endje kœgu ga lœ Atiɔshe nœ Siri
14.21: Endje pandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o lœ ongbo Derbe yé œ gbɔ ayindœ Yisu ndjoro. Manda nœ, endje kpa kwatœ endje tɔ lœ Listre, lœ Ikoniyume œdœ pe tɔ lœ Atiɔshe.
14.22: Endje sœ lima kœto gbɔgbɔ ga tœ lɔsu ayindœ Yisu yé œ pa fœ endje adœke endje shi gbɨ lœ kœyindœrœ. Endje pa adœke: «Œ li adœke a wu oyo waa yeka á kœli ga lœ tshagbozu nœ Ndjaba.»
14.23: Lœ Ikrizia bale dœ bale, endje ke agbozu Ikrizia fœ endje, œ donga Ndjaba dœ kœyotshelœma endje, yé œ katœ endje tɨ fœ Gbozu á endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye.
14.24: Endje ro tɔ lœ Pisidi, yé á na ga lœ Pafili.
14.25: Endje pandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o ɓa tœ Perje, manda nœ á ro ga lœ Atali.
14.26: Endje ɔ ga lœ egerœ agba ɓa zœ yé á gu ga lœ Atiɔshe nœ Siri, tshalakpɨ á endje ko lima endje ga tshakane Gbozu adœke endje gbɔ ɔtshɔrœ nœ Ndjaba mbœrœ akwa á endje totœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ.
14.27: Lɔkɔ á endje wuta lima ga lœ Atiɔshe, endje ngbɔɓa azu Ikrizia yé œ pandœ œneke kɔ á Ndjaba mbœrœ lima fœ endje dœ pe mara á tshe kɔrɔ awa kœyindœrœ fœ angbɨ azu.
14.28: Yé endje lo olo ndjoro tœ œsœnœ bale dœ ayindœ Yisu.

15.1: Anga ayakoshe to ɓa lœ Yuda, œ tetœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ aayazu lœ Yisu adœke: «Œdœ 'e kœvwaratœ 'e tœ kœwa gaza ɓata awa akwa nœ Moyize pandœ nœ, 'e gbɔ kœshe nene.»
15.2: Polo œdœ Barnabase vwaratœ endje tœ kœyisœ œrœ nœ ayakoshenœ asœmœ, œ gbugburu tshelœ o'o dœ endje tœ upunœ. Manda nœ, endje wa adœke Polo œdœ Barnabase, ndje dœ anga aayazu lœ Yisu ɔ ga lœ Yerusaleme ndœ kœgbɔtœ endje dœ aayi avwa œdœ agbɔ Azu Ikrizia mbœrœ kœyɔrɔ o'onœ asœmœ.
15.3: Azu Ikrizia lœ Atiɔshe to œrœ á li mbœrœ ananœ fœ endje. Kœro endje tɔ lœ Fenisi dœ Samariya, endje sœ kœpandœ mara á angbɨ azu fa lɔsu endje yé œ za yanga waa fœ aayazu lœ Yisu para. Angbɔtœ ɓa lœ Yerusaleme
15.4: Ɔlɔ á endje wuta ga lœ Yerusaleme, azu Ikrizia, aayi avwa dœ pe agbozu Ikrizia za osho kœsœ fœ endje yé endje pandœ œrœ kɔ á Ndjaba mbœrœ lœ awa nœ endje fœ endje.
15.5: Kashe anga ayindœ Yisu á endje to lœ Afarisayi za o'o œ pa adœke: «Œ li adœke angbɨ azu á endje wuta ayindœ Yisu wa gaza, œ lɨ ndje sœ awa akwa nœ Moyize.»
15.6: Aayi avwa œdœ agbozu Ikrizia ngbɔɓatœ endje mbœrœ kœgbe o'o tœ upunœ asœmœ.
15.7: Manda kœgbugburu tshelœ o'o œrrr, Petro áalafo yé œ pa adœke: «Aaya, 'e wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba ke lima mœ ugurutœ 'e katshatsha ndœ kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o fœ angbɨ azu adœke endje dji, œ yindœ nœ.
15.8: Yé Ndjaba á tshe wusœ lɔsu azu para kɔkɔ, za Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ fœ endje tœ kœma adœke œne yi ndje ndœ endje awa bale ɓata á tshe mbœrœ ndje fœ azœ.
15.9: Tshe yiyi ko ndœ azœ yé œ vwaratœ ye tœ endje nene; gbambanœ nene, lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje ga ndœ Yisu, tshe djutɔ ekperœ nœ endje.
15.10: Ngɔngɔ asœ, mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœ kœshokɔ o'o dœ Ndjaba a? 'E yindœ kœza egerœ gbarœ á azœ dœ aata azœ, a zaza lima nene ga pa kumu ayindœ Yisu a?
15.11: Kashe a wusœ nœ adœke, a she kolœ mangba ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Gbozu Yisu, yé endje ndje awa bale.»
15.12: Manda nœ, azu lœ kokoko ndœ kœdji Polo œdœ Barnabase, á endje sœ kœmɨndœ œrœ á sœ kœma mara œrœ á Ndjaba mbœrœ lœ awa nœ endje ugurutœ angbɨ azunœ asœmœ.
15.13: Lɔkɔ á endje pa o'o nœ endje á ka, Jake áalafo œ pa adœke: «Aaya, 'e dji mœ kane.
15.14: Shimu wuta kœmɨndœ nœ fœ azœ mara á Ndjaba gbe ɓalima katshatsha á ke anga azu ugurutœ angbɨ azu adœke endje dœ azu nœ œne.
15.15: Œrœ á Ndjaba mbœrœ li dœ o'o ama aayi kœgbara o'o. Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba pa adœke:
15.16: “Manda nœ kɔ, mœ kpa kwatœ mœ ndœ kpa kœmɔ anda nœ Davidi á te. Agbanœ á sœ atɨ, mœ kpa mɔ tshandœnœ, yé mœ kpa za ga lafo.
15.17: Kœto kpœtœmœ, udu azu œ para awa Gbozu, œdœ pe angbɨ azu kɔ á mœ ke endje. Œmœ Gbozu dá pa o'onœ asœke, mœ sœ kœguma o'o nœ mœ
15.19: Jake kpa kœpa adœke: «Mœ gbe œnœ mœ adœke œ lili adœke a mbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ azu á endje fatshalɔsu endje fœ Yisu nene.
15.20: Kashe a su kolœ mbeti fœ endje adœke, endje zɨzɨ agea á to ɓa pa ndaba nœ andjaba nene, endje zɨzɨ songba agea á tshe tshu á indji ye tutu nene, endje zɨzɨ indji nene yé adja endje mbœmbœrœ angba budu nene.
15.21: Mbœrœ katshatsha ɓalima, endje yisœ awa akwa nœ Moyize dje lakpɨ kɔ mbœrœ á endje sœ kœdɨ tœnœ lɔkɔ sabata bale dœ bale lœ anda ngbɔtœ.» Mbeti fœ ayindœ Yisu lakpɨ Atiɔshe
15.22: Ataa aayi avwa, dœ agbozu Ikrizia œdœ pe azu Ikrizia para kɔkɔ wu dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke, endje ke anga azu ugurutœ œne dœ́ vwa endje ɓa lœ Atiɔshe awa bale dœ Polo œdœ Barnabase. Yekane á endje ke Yuda á anga ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Barsabase œdœ pe Sila. Endje bibisha kœdœ azu á endje sœ lima kœlɨsœ endje ugurutœ ayindœ Yisu.
15.23: Mbeti á endje sú ga tshakane endje pa adœke: «Aaya 'a dœ angbɨ azu á 'e sœ lœ Atiɔshe, lœ Siri, œdœ ndje lœ Silisi: aayi avwa, dœ agbozu Ikrizia œdœ azu Ikrizia para kɔkɔ za abala fœ 'e.
15.24: A dji adœke anga azu á endje to ɓa ndœ 'a ɓa ke, á na ga ndœ 'e kœdjingili tshelœ kumu 'e, endje ndɨ gbetshelœ nœ 'e kashe œ dœ́dœ́ 'a dá vwa endje nene.
15.25: Ádánœ á 'a wa kɔ dœ lɔsu 'a bale adœke 'a ke anga azu dœ́ vwa endje fœ 'e. Endje ro tœ awanœ dœ aaya 'a á 'a yindœ endje waa, Polo œdœ Barnabase
15.26: á endje za soro endje djigi mbœrœ akwa nœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu.
15.27: 'A vwa Yuda dœ Sila adœke endje kpa pandœ œneke kɔ á 'a su ala mbetinœ asœke fœ 'e dœ ama endje.
15.28: Gbambanœ nene, Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ dœ pe a'a wa adœke, 'a kpa za egerœ gbarœ ga pa kumu 'e nene. Kashe œrœ á li dœ 'e kœmbœrœ tœnœ dœke:
15.29: adja 'e zɨzɨ agea á to ɓa pa ndaba nœ andjaba nene, 'e zɨzɨ indji nene, 'e zɨzɨ songba agea á tshe tshu á indji tutu nene, 'e mbœmbœrœ angbabudu nene. Œdœ 'e kœlɨsœ œrœnœ asœke kɔ, dá 'e mbœrœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ waa. 'E sœpe dœ ɔtshɔnœ.»
15.30: Endje za awa fœ endje yé endje ro ga lœ Atiɔshe. Lɔkɔ kœwuta endje ɓa zœ, endje ngbɔɓa ayindœ Yisu, œ za mbetinœ fœ endje.
15.31: Manda kœdɨ mbetinœ, ayindœ Yisu sœ lima dœ yanga waa mbœrœ mbetinœ guma gbetshelœ nœ endje.
15.32: Yuda dœ Sila á endje dœ lima aayi kœgbara o'o, endje mɨ upu fœ endje adœke endje shi gbɨ yé œ gbɔndœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje.
15.33: Endje mbœrœ lima olo teasho kpœtœmœ. Manda nœ, ayindœ Yisu za awa fœ endje adœke endje gu dœ kœsœ gee ga ndœ azu á endje vwa lima endje. [
15.34: Kashe Sila wa lima kœsœpe œnœ ye kpœtœmœ.]
15.35: Polo œdœ Barnabase sœ lima œnœ endje ɓa lœ Atiɔshe. Ɓa zœ, endje sœ kœyisœ œrœ œdœ pe kœmɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Gbozu awa bale dœ anga azu ndjoro. Polo œdœ Sila kurutshelœtœ endje
15.36: Olo teasho manda nœ, Polo pa fœ Barnabase adœke: «A kwatœ azœ lakpɨ bale dœ bale á a yi lima sœ o'o ama Gbozu tœnœ dœ́ œ wu mara á aaya azœ sœ dœ tœnœ.»
15.37: Barnabase yi lima ndœ kœkwa dœ Yowane á anga ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Marke.
15.38: Kashe Polo gbe adœke kœkwa dœ she œ li nene, mbœrœ tshe ka lima tœ endje tɨ ɓa lœ Pafili, œ vwara lima tœ ye kœna dœ endje lœ ma akwa nœ Ndjaba.
15.39: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, endje djidji lima tœ endje nene, yé endje kurutshelœtœ endje. Barnabase za Marke po tœ ye, œ za egerœ agba œ ro ga lœ Shipre,
15.40: kashe Polo ke Sila ndœ kœro dœ she. Manda nœ, ayindœ Yisu ko endje ga tshakane Ndjaba adœke ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Gbozu gbɔndœ endje.
15.41: Endje ro lima tɔ lœ Siri œdœ Silisi, œ yisœ œrœ fœ azu Ikrizia adœke endje gbɔndœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje.

16.1: Polo li ndje ga lœ Derbe dœ pe Listre. Ɓa zœ anga yindœ Yisu á ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Timote, gbolo yakoshe nœ anga uyu Yuda á tshe yindœ Yisu, abanœ dœ́dœ́ Yuda nene.
16.2: Ɔtshɔ ye ga lima waa ugurutœ aayanœ lœ Listre dœ pe Ikoniyume.
16.3: Polo gbe lima kœgu dœ she awa bale. Kœwu adœke Ayuda lœ ndjoro tœ oshonœ ɓa zœ, tshe za she, œ wa she tœ gaza lindœ awa akwa nœ Ayudanœ, mbœrœ Ayuda kɔ á endje sœ lima dœ endje tœ œsœnœ wu lima sœ nœ adœke abanœ dœ́dœ́ Yuda nene.
16.4: Lœ ongbo á endje ro lima tœnœ, Polo dœ Sila sœ lima kœmɨndœ o'o á aayi avwa nœ Yisu dœ agbozu lœ Yerusaleme wa, á endje sœ kœpa fœ endje adœke endje mbœrœ tœ endje lindœ nœ.
16.5: Azu Ikrizia sœ lima kœru lɔsu endje lœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje, ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ anga azu sœ lima kœli ga ndœ endje yé endje te lima kœngba tœnœ. Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ vwa Polo ga lœ Masedwane
16.6: Polo œdœ Sila na lœ Friji œdœ pe lœ Galate; gbambanœ nene, Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ pakata lima endje kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o ɓa lœ Azi.
16.7: Kœwuta endje ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔ ogo Misi, endje gbe kœro ga lœ Bitini yeka á Ɨshirɨ nœ Yisu pakata endje.
16.8: Endje ro tɔ lœ Misi yé œ jerœ ga lœ Trowase.
16.9: Anga butshɔ bale, Polo kœwu œrœ lœ ulu: anga yakoshe Masedwane bale na ga ndœ ye, œ ka kœdɨ tshelœma ye fœ she adœke: «Fa djaga lœ Masedwane, mbœrœ kœtɨ kane 'a ga lafo!»
16.10: Manda kœwu œrœ lœ ulu nœ Polo asœmœ, trale 'a para awa kœro ga lœ Masedwane, mbœrœ 'a wu lima sœ nœ adœke Ndjaba sœ kœ e 'a kœna kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o ɓa zœ. Kœfatshalɔsu Lidi ɓa lœ Filipo
16.11: 'A ɔ ga lœ egerœ agba lœ Trowase, 'a za awa ndjii ndœ Samotrase mbœrœ á osho kœkɔrɔ á 'a kœwuta ga lœ Neyapolise.
16.12: Yé ɓa zœ 'a na ga lœ Filipo, egerœ ongbo lœ ogo Masedwane, azu á endje sœ lœ nœ sœ tshakudu tshagbozu nœ ogo Roma. Œndœ 'a dɨ lima teasho lœ ongbonœ asœmœ.
16.13: Dœ lɔkɔ sabata, 'a wuta lœ ongbonœ kœna ga lakpɨ ogo neke á sœ ndoo dœ ama ungu, tœnœ kœdœ lima œsœ osho nœ kœdonga Ndjaba, yeka á 'a sœ ga atɨ, á pa o'o dœ ayashe á endje ngbɔtœ endje kpœtœmœ.
16.14: Anga bale ugurutœ endje, ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Lidi, œshe kœdœ lima yashe lœ ongbo Tiyatire á tshe sœ kœka odoro lœba yé á wu lima sœ kœdonga Ndjaba. Tshe dji 'a yé Ndjaba kɔrɔ gbetshelœ nœ ye adœke tshe yindœ o'o kɔ á Polo pa.
16.15: Manda kœgbɔ batisimu, œshe dœ azu sœnda nœ ye para, tshe pa fœ 'a adœke: «Œdœ 'e kœwusœ nœ adœke, œmœ kœdœ uzu á mœ yindœ Ndjaba ye, 'e na œ lo ɓa ndœ mœ.» Yé tshe tovworogbo 'a kœyindœ nœ. Polo œdœ Sila lœ kánga
16.16: Ɔlɔ bale á 'a sœ lima kœna ndœ kœ e Ndjaba, anga yashe kanga bale á tshe sœ lima dœ ekpe ɨshirɨ nœ kœgbara o'o sœ ugurutœ 'a. Ayengɔ ye sœ lima kœgbɔ œrœ waa manda akwa nœ ye.
16.17: Tshe te manda 'a dœ Polo, yé œ sœ kœpa dœ ɔgbɔ adœke: «Ayakoshenœ asœ kœdœ aayi akwa nœ Ndjaba á tshe ropa œrœ kɔ; endje sœ kœyisœ awa kœgbɔ kœshe fœ 'e.»
16.18: Yé tshe mbœrœ ataa manda olo ndjoro. Polo mɔ dœ she, á kœfatœ ye yé á kœpa fœ ɨshirɨnœ adœke: «Dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Yisu Kristu, mœ pa fœ ɓœ adœke: wuta lœ yashe asœke!» Trale ɨshirɨ wuta lœ ye yé.
16.19: Ɓata aayengɔ yashe kanga asœmœ wu adœke œne kpa gbɔ œrœ lœ awa nœ ye nene, endje tepa Polo œdœ Sila œ gbota endje na tœnœ fœ agbozu kœwa ngbanga œrrr ɓa la wutu ga utshu azu kɔ.
16.20: Endje ko endje na tœnœ fœ agbozunœ asœmœ yé œ pa adœke: «Ayakoshenœ asœ kœdœ Ayuda, endje ndɨ tshalakpɨ nœ azœ kpa ye.
16.21: Endje sœ kœpara awa ndœ kœyisœ angbɨ mara kœsœ neke á azœ dœ́ azu Roma á lili adœke a mbœrœ nene.»
16.22: Yé œ ɨvwɨ azu kekeke ga tœ Polo œdœ Sila. Agbozu kœwa ngbanga kœza o'o adœke endje sɔ lœba tœ endje dœ́ œ ɓi endje dœ ndjapa.
16.23: Manda kœɓi endje dœ ndjaba, endje ko endje va ga lœ kánga, yé œ pa fœ ayi kœgbɔndœ manda kánga adœke ala ye gbɔ dœ endje.
16.24: Ayi kœgbɔndœ manda kánga dji ataa, œ ko endje li tœnœ waa ɓa ndœ kumu gbɔshɔ kánga yé œ soro ada endje dœ djingiri.
16.25: Dœ butshɔ, Polo œdœ Sila tetœ kœza avwala fœ Ndjaba dœ pe kœdonga she dœ itshi yé anga aayi kánga dji endje.
16.26: Kolœ ngbangi atake, ɔshɔ turu dœ ɔgbɔ, muru anda turu, Trale manda kɔrɔ wuu, yé tshelœ djingiri sɔ tœ aayi kánga para.
16.27: Ayi kœgbɔndœ manda kánga kœjo, œ kœwu adœke manda kánga kɔrɔ wuu á kœgbe adœke aayi kánga kpa para kɔkɔ ye. Tshe kœgbota ugu yakamba nœ ye á yindœ kœwotœ ye.
16.28: Á Polo kœra she dœ ɔgbɔ adœke: «Wowotœ zœ nene, 'a lœ para kɔkɔ zœ!»
16.29: Ayi kœgbɔndœ manda kánga kœ'e osho ndœ owo, kœgbɔgbɔtœ ye li tœnœ dœ awa, á kœgote ga tœ ada Polo dœ Sila.
16.30: Manda nœ, tshe kœto Polo œdœ Sila wuta tœnœ ga shu, á kœpa fœ endje adœke: «Agbozu, œrœ gaɗe dá mœ kœmbœrœ yeka á kœshe a?»
16.31: Polo œdœ Sila kœgi fœ she adœke: «Sœ dœ kœyindœrœ adœke Yisu kœdœ Gbozu yekane á tshe kœshe ɓœ awa bale dœ azu tshasœnda nœ zœ.»
16.32: Endje kœpandœ o'o ama Gbozu fœ she, dœ azu kɔ á endje sœ lima sœnda nœ ye.
16.33: Kolœ dœ abutshɔnœ asœmœ, ayi kœgbɔndœ manda kánga na dœ endje na tœnœ œ djutɔ uku tœ endje yé pe kpœtœmœ tshe gbɔ batisimu awa bale dœ azu tshasœnda nœ ye kɔ.
16.34: Tshe to Polo dœ Sila gu tœnœ ga sœnda nœ ye, œ to kœzɨrœ fœ endje, yé tshe sœ lima dœ yanga awa bale dœ azu tshasœnda nœ ye kɔ, mbœrœ endje yi lima ndœ Ndjaba.
16.35: Osho kɔrɔ pa nœ, agbozu kœwa ngbanga vwa aturugu fœ ayi kœgbɔndœ manda kánga adœke: «Tshe za awa fœ azu asœmœ!»
16.36: Á tshe kœpa fœ Polo adœke: «Agbozu kœwa ngbanga vwa osho fœ mœ adœke mœ za awa fœ 'e. Ngɔngɔ asœke, 'e li kœwuta tœnœ, yé œ gu dœ kœsœ gee.»
16.37: Kashe Polo pa fœ aturugu adœke: «Endje yuyu lima 'a nene, œ ɓi 'a tœ ala azu kɔ, andaa a'a kœdœ adja azu Roma. Endje ko 'a va ga lœ kánga, yé endje yindœ kœko 'a ngɔngɔ asœ ga shu lœ ubunœ. Œ mbœrœtœ endje atamœ nene. Ɔtshɔ nœ kœdœ adœke endje na ga mœ dœ tœ endje œ ko 'a ga shu!»
16.38: Aturugunœ gu œ pandœ nœ fœ agbozu kœwa ngbanganœ, yé awa za endje mbœrœ kœdji adœke endje kœdœ ndje azu Roma.
16.39: Endje na kœkɨ fœ Polo dœ Sila adœke endje wu oyo œne. Manda nœ, endje za awa fœ endje kœwuta lœ kánga yé œ pa fœ endje adœke endje wuta lœ ongbo ye.
16.40: Manda kœwuta endje lœ kánganœ, endje na ga lœ Lidi. Ɓa zœ, endje gbɔ ayindœ Yisu œ pa fœ endje adœke endje shi gbɨ lœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje, yé manda nœ endje ro da ye.

17.1: Endje ro tɔ lœ Afipolisi dœ Apoloni yeka á wuta ga lœ Tesalonike, ɓa zœ Ayuda sœ lima dœ Sinagoga.
17.2: Ɓata á tshe mbœrœ ɓa lima katshatsha, Polo li ga lœ Sinagoganœ. Manda lɔkɔ sabata votɔ, tshe sœ lima kœpu o'o pa Buku nœ Ndjaba awa bale dœ azu á endje sœ kpœtœmœ.
17.3: Tshe sœ lima kœyisœ nœ fœ endje ngbɨ adœke, œ li adœke Masiya wu oyo, œ tshu, œ she ugurutœ akuzu. Tshe pa fœ endje adœke: «Yisunœ á mœ mɨndœ ye fœ 'e asœke kœdœ Masiyanœ.»
17.4: Anga Ayuda ugurutœ endje yindœ o'o á Polo pa, yé œ te ga ndœ Polo dœ Sila. Awa bale ndje dœ angbɨ azu Agrekenœ ndjoro á endje donga Ndjaba œdœ pe ndje ayashe ndjoro á azu sœ kœlɨsœ endje, te ga ndœ Polo dœ Sila.
17.5: Kashe anga Ayudanœ mbœrœ úkú. Endje rɔ anga ekpe azu á endje na tœ ala awa kpɔɔ, œ zɨ tshelœ o'o dœ endje yé œ ndɨ kœsœ gee lakpɨ ogo. Endje na ɓa sœnda nœ Jasone kœpara Polo dœ Sila á kœko endje wuta tœnœ ga utshu azu tshalakpɨnœ.
17.6: Ɓata á endje gbɔgbɔ Polo dœ Sila nene, endje za Jasone awa bale dœ anga ayindœ Yisu, œ gbota endje gu tœnœ ga utshu aayi kœwa ngbanga tshalakpɨnœ asœmœ, yé œ pa adœke: «Azu á endje djingili tshelœ kumu azu pa ɔshɔ djigi, endje dá wuta ngɔngɔ asœ ɓa ke asœke.
17.7: Jasone za osho kœsœ fœ endje ɓa sœnda nœ ye yé endje kɔ, endje mbœmbœrœ œrœ á awa akwa nœ gbozugo Roma yindœ nœ nene; endje pa adœke anga angbɨ gbozu kpi sœ zœ, yé ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ Yisu.»
17.8: O'o ama endje za ókó fœ azu para kɔkɔ, œ za ndje ókó fœ agbozu tshelœ ongbonœ,
17.9: yé endje dɨ lima ngendja fœ Jasone œdœ anga ayindœ Yisunœ yekane á endje za awa fœ endje adœke endje gu. Polo œdœ Sila ɓa lœ Bere
17.10: Pe dœ lɔkɔnœ asœmœ dœ abutshɔ, ayindœ Yisu gi Polo œdœ Sila ga tœ awa á endje ro ga lœ Bere. Endje wuta ɓa zœ yé œ na ga lœ Sinagoga nœ Ayuda.
17.11: Ayuda nœ Bere sœ lima dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu kœropa endjeneke lœ Tesalonike, endje yindœ Ɔtshɔ O'o dœ lɔsu endje djigi, yé ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ, endje sœ lima kœdɨ Mbeti nœ Ndjaba, mbœrœ kœwu œdœ ádá o'onœ á Polo œdœ Sila pa asœmœ kœdœ adjapu.
17.12: Anga azu ndjoro ugurutœ endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu, yé ugurutœ azu Greke, ayashe ndjoro á azu œ lɨsœ endje dœ pe ayakoshe.
17.13: Kashe, ɔlɔ á Ayuda lœ Tesalonike dji adœke Polo sœ kpa kœmɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o lœ Bere, endje wuta ɓa zœ yé œ tetœ kœndɨ tshelœ gbetshelœ nœ azu ndjoro.
17.14: Yé pe kpœtœmœ, ayindœ Yisu gi Polo na tœnœ ga tœ ama egerœ ungu kashe Asila dœ Timote lœpe lima œnœ endje kpœtœmœ lœ Bere.
17.15: Azu á endje za lima Polo kpatœnœ œrrr ɓa lœ Atene, endje gu dœ o'o adœke Sila dœ Timote ro katsha manda œne. Polo ɓa lœ Atene
17.16: Ɔlɔ á Polo sœ lima kœkate Asila dœ Timote lœ Atene, tshe sœ dœ oyo tœ lɔsu ye mbœrœ kœwu adœke ongbonœ sœ lima dœ andjaba waa lœnœ.
17.17: Tshe sœ lima kœpa o'o pa o'o ama Ndjaba dœ Ayuda œdœ angbɨ azu á endje sœ kœdonga Ndjaba lœ Sinagoga œdœ pe ndje azu neke á tshe li kœgbɔtœ ye dœ endje ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ ala wutunœ asœmœ.
17.18: Anga azu kœwusœrœ á endje sœ kœyisœ gbetshelœ nœ Aepikure ndje dœ astoyise tetœ kœpa o'o dœ she. Anga endje sœ lima kœpa adœke: «O'o gaɗe dá kulupunœ asœ œ pa ata a?» Anga endje á endje dji she kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ Yisu œdœ pe tœ o'o kœshe nœ ye lœ kuzu pa adœke: «Œ sœ ɓata tshe kœdœ ayi kœyisœ o'o ama andjaba tshelœ anga angbɨ ogo.»
17.19: Yé endje za she, œ ro dœ she ga tœ osho kœwa ngbanga tœnœ á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Areopaje yé œ yu she adœke: «'A li kœwusœ tafo kœyisœrœ nœ zœ á ɓœ sœ kœyisœ nœ asœ nene a?
17.20: Gbambanœ nene, asœ kɔ kœdœ tafo œrœ yé ɓœ sœ kœpa o'o á sœ kœko uvuru 'a lœnœ, yé 'a yindœ kœwusœ ádánœ.»
17.21: Mbœrœ azu kɔ lœ ogo Atene œdœ pe agene á endje sœ ɓa zœ, sœ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ kolœ mbœrœ kœdji too mbœrœ kœpatœ œsœ tafo œrœnœ á wuta asœ.
17.22: Yé Polo ka kpœguru Areopaje, œ pa adœke: «E'e dœ azu lœ Atene, mœ wu adœke e'e kœdœ azu á 'e sœ kœzatœ 'e waa ga tœ andjaba nœ 'e.
17.23: Ɔlɔ á mœ sœ kœna lœ ongbo nœ 'e, mœ sœ kœwu œrœ á 'e gɨ á ko tɔ ɓata andjaba nœ 'e œdœ pe ndaba á 'e mbœrœ á su mbeti ga tœ nœ adœke: “Fœ anga ndjaba á 'a wuwusœ ye nene.” Andaa mœ na kœpandœ Ndjaba á 'e sœ kœdonga she, ataa 'e wuwusœ ye nene.
17.24: Ndjabanœ asœke kœdœ tsheneke á tshe mbœrœ tshapa ɔshɔ asœ dœ œrœ kɔ pa nœ, œshe kœdœ Gbozu nœ tshalafo dœ tsha atɨ. Tshe sœsœ lœ anda á azu mbœrœ dœ kane endje nene.
17.25: Tshe sœsœ dœ gbetshelœ adœke azu gbe dœ œne ɓata tshe sœ dœ ogo anga œrœ nene, kashe œshe dá sœ kœto soro fœ azu kɔ, dœ ɨzɨ á azu œ wu asœmœ œdœ pe udu œrœ kɔ.
17.26: «Kœto tœ uzu bale, tshe mbœrœ azu kɔ adœke endje sœ pa ɔshɔnœ asœke. Kashe utshu kœmbœrœ endje, tshe dɨ olo kœsœ nœ endje yé œ wa mapaka ogo kɔ á li adœke endje sœ tœnœ.
