5.20: Awa akwa wuta lima yé ekperœ wuta lima ndjoro, kashe tœ osho á ekperœ wuta ndjoro, ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba kpa gerœ kœropa nœ.
5.21: Yé ɓata ekperœ sœ lima dœ gbɔgbɔ ndœ kœwo azu, awa bale ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ tœ kœshe azu adœke œ to azœ na tœnœ ndœ soro á ka nene lœ awa nœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu.

6.1: Atamœ, a kpa pa koto o? A lœpe kolœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ yekane á Ndjaba kœma ɔtshɔ lɔsu waa ga ndœ azœ a?
6.2: Bale nene. Lœ kumu ekperœ, a sœ lima ɓata akuzu, yé kotoo yeka a kpa sœpe kœmbœrœ ekperœ a?
6.3: Yé a wusœ nœ adœke a gbɔ batisimu kœma adœke a ngbɔɓatœ azœ awa bale lœ kuzu nœ Yisu Kristu.
6.4: Batisimu nœ azœ má adœke, a tshu yé endje shi azœ awa bale dœ she, adœke ɓata gbɔgbɔ mokɔ nœ Aba dá she Kristu lœ akuzu, azœ ndje a wuta dœ tafo soro.
6.5: Gbambanœ nene, ɓata á a ngbɔɓatœ azœ bale, á kuzu nœ azœ li dœ œnœ ye, a ngboɓa bala ndje tœ azœ dœ she dœ Kristu lœ kœshe lœ akuzu nœ ye.
6.6: A wusœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke, Ndjaba wo ongboro uzu nœ azœ awa bale dœ Kristu pa Kurushi adœke ɔkɔ nœ ekperœ ndɨ yekane a kpa kœdœ́dœ́ akanga nœ ekperœ nene.
6.7: Gbambanœ nene, uzu kœtshu, tshe kpa dœ́dœ́ kanga nœ ekperœ nene.
6.8: Kashe œdœ a kœtshu awa bale dœ Kristu, a sœ dœ kœyindœrœ adœke a sœ ndje bala dœ soro awa bale dœ she.
6.9: Mbœrœ a wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba she Kristu lœ akuzu, tshe kpa tshu bale nene yé kuzu kpa sœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ pa ye nene.
6.10: Gbambanœ nene, tshe tshu lima awa bale ngbewo mbœrœ ekperœ œ ka, yé tshe kpa tshu nene. Ngɔngɔ asœke, tshe sœ dœ soro mbœrœ Ndjaba.
6.11: E'e ndje awa bale, 'e wutœ 'e adœke 'e tshu ndje tœ upu nœ ekperœ yé ngɔngɔ asœke 'e sœ dœ soro mbœrœ Ndjaba lœ awa nœ Yisu Kristu.
6.12: Kaka adœke ekperœ kpa sœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ bale pa ɔkɔ 'e á tshu nene. Adja 'e kpa mbœmbœrœ ogo kœza awa ekpe gbetshelœ nœ ɔkɔ nene.
6.13: Adja 'e kpa koko œrœ kote 'e ga tœ akwa nœ ekperœ ɓata œrœ kœmbœrœ dœ ekperœ nene. Kashe 'e zatœ 'e fœ Ndjaba ɓata azu á endje to lœ kuzu á kwa ga lœ soro, 'e kotœ 'e djigi ga tœ akwa nœ ye ɓata œrœ mbœrœ akwa á sœ ndjii.
6.14: Gbambanœ nene, ekperœ kpa li tœ kœsœ tœ gbozu pa 'e nene mbœrœ 'e kpa sœsœ tshakudu awa akwa nene, kashe 'e sœ tshakudu ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba. A mbœrœ œrœ á sœ ndjii
6.15: Ataa, a kpa pa koto o? A mbœrœ ekperœ mbœrœ a sœsœ tshakudu awa akwa nene, kashe a sœ tshakudu ɔtshɔ lɔsu a? Bale nene.
6.16: 'E wusœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke œdœ 'e kœzatœ 'e tœ akanga nœ uzu bale ndœ kœdji she, 'e wuta akanga nœ uzunœ á 'e sœ kœdji she. Œdœ ekperœ, œ to uzu ga lœ kuzu; œdœ kœdji o'o, œ to uzu na tœnœ ga tœ awa nœ œrœ á sœ ndjii.
6.17: A gi mershe fœ Ndjaba mbœrœ lima utshunœ, 'e kœdœ akanga nœ ekperœ, kashe ngɔngɔ asœke 'e dji kœyisœrœ á endje yisœ nœ fœ 'e yé 'e yindœ nœ dœ lɔsu 'e bale.
6.18: 'E kpa dœ́dœ́ akanga nœ ekperœ nene, kashe 'e wuta akanga nœ œrœ á sœ ndjii.
6.19: Mara kœpa o'o nœ mœ sœ mbœrœ kœza awa fœ 'e kœdji tshelœ kata o'o á mœ sœ kœpa tœnœ. Utshunœ lima, 'e zatœ 'e djigi ndœ kœmbœrœ œrœ tshula œdœ pe ekperœ á fa lima 'e tœ azu kœyiangba Ndjaba. Awa bale œ li adœke 'e zatœ 'e ngɔngɔ asœke ɓata akanga nœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœ ndjii á sœ kœmbœrœ adœke azu wuta yerœ.
6.20: Ɔlɔ á 'e dœ lima akanga nœ ekperœ, œrœ bale á tovworogbo 'e lima ndœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœ ndjii gugu nene.
6.21: Leyɔ gaɗe dá 'e ko lima lœnœ a? Kpœsheke tshula tshangbanœ zaza 'e nene a? Œrœ tshangba nœ kœdœ kuzu.
6.22: Kashe ngɔngɔ asœke 'e kpa dœ́dœ́ akanga nœ ekperœ nene, 'e wuta akanga nœ Ndjaba. Atamœ 'e zu leyɔ á sœ kœmbœrœ adœke 'e wuta yerœ, gbambanœ nene, œrœ tshangba nœ kœdœ soro á ka nene.
6.23: Gbambanœ nene, œrœ tshangba ekperœ kœdœ kuzu, kashe œrœ á Ndjaba œ to gbambanœ kœdœ soro á ka nene lœ awa nœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu.

7.1: Aaya, e'e á 'e wusœ awa akwa, 'e wusœ nœ adœke awa akwa sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ pa azœ dœ azu kolœ dœ ɔlɔ á a sœ dœ soro.
7.2: Ɓata tœ awo uzu, awa akwa pa adœke œdœ yakoshe kœtshutshu nene, yashenœ lili kœpara anga angbɨ yakoshe nene. Œ kœsœ adœke yakoshe tshu yeka á yashe totœ œ wuta tshakudu awa akwa asœmœ.
7.3: Œ kœsœ adœke yakoshe sœpe dœ soro á tshe katœ ye tɨ á kpa para anga angbɨ yakoshe, endje pa adœke tshe mbœrœ angba budu. Kashe akɔnœ kœtshu dá tshe wuta tshakudu awa akwanœ. Á tshe kœpara anga angbɨ yakoshe, endje pa adœke tshe mbœrœ angba dœ yakoshenœ asœmœ nene.
7.4: Aaya, œ sœ ndje awa bale mbœrœ 'e. Ɓata á Kristu tshu lima, 'e tshu awa bale dœ she yé awa akwa kpa sœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ pa 'e nene. Ngɔngɔ asœke, 'e ngbɔɓatœ 'e dœ Kristu á Ndjaba shé she lœ akuzu asœmœ. Atamœ œ li adœke a zu leyɔ fœ Ndjaba.
7.5: Mbœrœ lɔkɔ á a sœpe lima lœ ɔkɔ, ekpe gbetshelœ lœ awa nœ awa akwa sœ lima kœmbœrœ akwa lœ undu azœ djigi adœke a zu leyɔ fœ kuzu.
7.6: Kashe ngɔngɔ asœke, a kpa dœ́dœ́ akanga nœ awa akwa nene, a wuta ɓata azu á endje tshu ɓalima tœ upu nœ awa akwa. Ataa, a kpa mbœmbœrœ akwa fœ Ndjaba dœ kœro manda ongboro mbeti nene, kashe a mbœrœ akwa fœ Ndjaba dœ tafo awa kwa nœ Ɨshirɨ. Akwa nœ awa akwa.
7.7: Atamœ a kpa pa koto o? Awa akwa kœdœ ekperœ a? Œ sœ ataa bale nene. Kashe awa akwa dá yisœ ekperœ fœ mœ. Ataa, mœ wu má ndje lima œsœ egerœ lɔsu nene œdœ awa akwa kœpa fœ mœ nene adœke: «Sœsœ dœ egerœ lɔsu nene.»
7.8: Yé mbœrœ awa akwa, ekperœ za awa fœ mœ kœza lɔsu mœ ga tœ tshelœ aka egerœ lɔsu kɔ lœ awa nœ awa o'o. Gbambanœ nene, œdœ awa akwa kœgugu nene, ekperœ tshu ye.
7.9: Utshunœ lima adœke awa akwa wuta, mœ sœ lima dœ soro. Yé ɔlɔ á awa o'o na, ekperœ gbɔ soro,
7.10: yeka á e kuzu ga pa mœ. Ataa, awa akwa á li má lima adœke œ za soro fœ mœ, œ kpa e kuzu ga pa mœ.
7.11: Gbambanœ nene, ekperœ gbɔ awa kœfara mœ lœ awa nœ awa o'o yé, lœ awa nœ ye, œ za kuzu ga pa mœ.
7.12: Atamœ, awa akwa sœ yerœ yé awa o'o sœ yerœ, ndjii œdœ pe dœ ɔtshɔnœ.
7.13: Ataa ɔtshɔrœ li kœwo uzu a? Œ sœ ataa bale nene. Kashe ekperœ dá wo mœ, œtœnœ dá matœ ye ngbɨɨ. Tshe za œrœ á sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ á fa tœ kuzu. Œ yindœ kœpa adœke, ekperœ sœ kœmatœ ye tœ egerœnœ kœropanœ dœ tœ ye. Uzu kœdœ kanga nœ ekperœ
7.14: A wusœ nœ adœke awa akwa kœdœ ɨshirɨ kashe œmœ kœdœ uzu nœ ɔkɔ, endje ka mœ ɓata kanga nœ ekperœ.
7.15: Mœ wuwusœ ádá œrœ á mœ sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ nene. Œrœ á mœ gbe kœmbœrœ tœnœ, mœ sœsœ kœmbœrœ œtœnœ nene yé œneke á mœ sœ kœyiangba nœ, mœ sœ kœmbœrœ œtœnœ.
7.16: Andaa œdœ œneke á mœ yiyindœ nœ nene, mœ kœsœ kœmbœrœ œtœnœ, mœ sœ awa bale dœ awa akwa yé mœ yindœ nœ adœke awa akwa sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ.
7.17: Œ dœ́dœ́ mœ dá sœ kœmbœrœ ataa nene, kashe ekperœ á sœ lœ mœ.
7.18: Gbambanœ nene, mœ wusœ nœ adœke lœ mœ – mœ yindœ kœpa adœke lœ ɔkɔ mœ – ɔtshɔrœ sœsœ lœ mœ nene: kœgbe kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ sœ zœ kashe kœza ga tœ akwa gugu nene,
7.19: mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ á mœ gbe dœ tœnœ, mœ sœsœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ nene, yé ekperœ á mœ gbegbe dœ tœnœ nene, mœ sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ.
7.20: Andaa, œdœ mœ kœsœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á mœ gbegbe dœ tœnœ nene, œ dœ́dœ́ mœ dá sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ nene, kashe ekperœ á sœ lœ mœ.
7.21: Mœ sœ kœgbɔ awa akwa asœke: œmœ á mœ sœ kœyindœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ, mœ sœ kolœ dœ gbɔgbɔ ndœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ.
7.22: Gbambanœ nene, ɓa tœ lɔsu mœ, mœ sœ dœ yanga awa akwa nœ Ndjaba,
7.23: kashe ɓa lœ undu mœ, mœ sœ kœwu angbɨ awa akwa á sœ kœnga koshe dœ awa akwa neke á kœwusœrœ nœ mœ yindœ nœ yé œ i mœ ɓata kanga nœ ekperœ á sœ lœ mœ.
7.24: Œmœ kœdœ adja ayi oyo! Œɗe dá vwara mœ lœ ɔkɔ á sœ kœvwi mœ ga lœ kuzu asœke a?
7.25: A gi mershe fœ Ndjaba lœ awa nœ Yisu Kristu, Gbozu nœ azœ! Ataa, mœ sœ kanga nœ awa akwa nœ Ndjaba lœ awa kœwusœrœ nœ mœ, kashe ɓata uzu, mœ kœdœ kanga nœ awa akwa nœ ekperœ.

8.1: Ataa, ngɔngɔ asœke Ndjaba kpa wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ azu á endje ngbɔɓatœ endje dœ Yisu Kristu nene.
8.2: Gbambanœ nene, awa akwa nœ Ɨshirɨ á za soro lœ Yisu Kristu, vwara ɓœ lœ awa akwa nœ ekperœ œdœ pe œnœ kuzu.
8.3: Awa akwa lili kœvwara uzu lœ ekperœ nene, mbœrœ awa akwa nœ ɔkɔ sœ kœmbœrœ adœke œ sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ nene. Kashe Ndjaba dá mbœrœ œtœnœ. Ndjaba vwa adja Gbolo nœ ye kœna ga pa ɔshɔ ɓata azœ dœ azu kœmbœrœ ekperœ, yé tshe wo gbɔgbɔ nœ ekperœ lœ ɔkɔ.
8.4: Tshe mbœrœ adœke a wuta azu nœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœ ndjii ɓata œneke á awa akwa yindœ nœ. Gbambanœ nene, a kpa sœsœpe dœ ogo kœmbœrœ œrœ nœ ɔkɔ nene kashe a za awa á Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ yisœ nœ fœ azœ.
8.5: Gbambanœ nene, azu á ɔkɔ kœdœ gbozu ga pa endje, endje sœ kœpara œrœ á ɔkɔ endje sœ dœ ogonœ. Kashe endjeneke á Ɨshirɨ kœdœ Gbozu pa endje, endje para œrœ á Ɨshirɨ yindœ nœ.
8.6: Uzu á tshe sœ kœpara œrœ á ɔkɔ ye sœ dœ ogonœ, sœ kœpara awa kuzu. Kashe tsheneke á tshe sœ kœpara œrœ á Ɨshirɨ yindœ nœ, za awa soro œdœ pe awa kœsœ gee.
8.7: Gbambanœ nene, endjeneke á endje sœ kœpara awa œrœ á ɔkɔ endje sœ dœ ogonœ, kœdœ ayingba Ndjaba. Endje sœsœ kœmbœrœtœ endje lindœ awa akwa nœ Ndjaba nene yé endje sœsœ ndje dœ gbɔgbɔ kœro manda nœ nene.
8.8: Azu neke á endje para œrœ á ɔkɔ endje sœ dœ ogonœ, endje ga tœ ala Ndjaba nene.
8.9: Kashe e'e, 'e kpa nana manda œrœ á ɔkɔ sœ dœ ogonœ nene, kashe 'e para awa Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba mbœrœ á tshe sœ lœ 'e. Uzu á Ɨshirɨ nœ Kristu sœsœ lœ ye nene, tshe dœ́dœ́ uzu nœ Kristu nene.
8.10: Œdœ Kristu kœsœ lœ 'e, ɔkɔ 'e tshu tœ upu nœ ekperœ, kashe Ɨshirɨ kœdœ soro 'e adœke 'e wuta ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba.
8.11: Yé œdœ Ɨshirɨ nœ tsheneke á tshe she Yisu lœ akuzu kœsœ lœ 'e, tsheneke á tshe she Yisu lœ akuzu œ za bala ndje soro fœ ɔkɔ 'e á tshu lœ awa nœ Ɨshirɨ á tshe sœ lœ 'e.
8.12: Atamœ aaya, a sœ dœ kuɗa pa azœ. Kashe œ dœ́dœ́ kuɗa nœ kœpara awa ndœ kœna manda ogo nœ ɔkɔ azœ nene.
8.13: Gbambanœ nene, œ kœsœ adœke 'e na manda ogo nœ ɔkɔ 'e, 'e tshu. Kashe œ kœsœ adœke 'e wo ogo nœ ɔkɔ 'e dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ɨshirɨ, 'e she.
8.14: Mbœrœ azu neke á Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba sœ kœyisœ awa fœ endje, kœdœ agbolo nœ Ndjaba.
8.15: Yé Ɨshirɨnœ á Ndjaba za she fœ 'e asœmœ, mbœmbœrœ adœke 'e dœ akanga yé 'e sœ dœ awa nene; kashe tshe mbœrœ adœke 'e te agbolo nœ Ndjaba yé tshe za awa fœ azœ ndœ kœ'e Ndjaba adœke: «Aba!»
8.16: Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba sœ kœpa dœ tœ ye lœ gbetshelœ nœ azœ adœke azœ kœdœ agbolo nœ Ndjaba.
8.17: Yé ɓata agbolo nœ Ndjaba, a gbɔ ndje œrœ manda Ndjaba. A gbɔ awa bale dœ Kristu; gbambanœ nene, œ kœsœ adœke a wu oyo awa bale dœ Kristu, a sœ ndje bala dœ she awa bale lœ mokɔ nœ ye. Mokɔ á agbolo nœ Ndjaba œ wu
8.18: Mœ wusœ nœ adœke mokɔ nœ Ndjaba á agbolo nœ ye œ wu bala ropa oyonœ á a sœ kœwu tœnœ ngɔngɔ asœke ye.
8.19: Œrœ kɔ á Ndjaba mbœrœ sœ kœkate dœ lɔsu ga lafo adœke œne wu ɔlɔnœ á tshe ma mokɔ nœ agbolo nœ ye.
8.20: Gbambanœ nene, œrœnœ kɔ œ yo ga tshakudu tshagbozu nœ gbɔgbɔ á ádánœ gugu nene, œ sœsœ mbœrœ á œrœnœ yindœ nœ nene kashe mbœrœ á Ndjaba yindœ nœ ataa. Kashe œrœnœ ko lɔsu endje ga tœ Ndjaba.
8.21: Œ yindœ kœpa adœke œrœ á ndjaba mbœrœ sœ kœkate kœwuta ɔlɔ bale tshakudu gbɔgbɔ kœndɨrœ á sœ kœtepa œrœnœ tœ akanga, yé œ gbɔ kœvwara osho œdœ mokɔ nœ agbolo nœ ye.
8.22: A wusœ nœ adœke œrœ kɔ á Ndjaba mbœrœ sœ ngɔngɔ asœke kœwu oyo mara á yashe œ wu dœ lɔkɔ kœzu gbolo.
8.23: Œ dœ́dœ́ kolœ œrœ á Ndjaba mbœrœ nene. Œ dœ ndje azœ á a gbɔ Ɨshirɨ ɓata ali tshakala kœtorœ nœ Ndjaba, a sœ ndje kœwu oyo tœ lɔsu azœ kœkate adœke Ndjaba fa azœ tœ agbolo nœ ye yé œ vwara azœ djigi.
8.24: Gbambanœ nene, a she lima kolœ lœ awa nœ kœza lɔsu azœ ga ndœ Ndjaba, Kashe a kœsœ kœwu œrœ á a za lɔsu azœ ga pa nœ, œ kpa dœ́dœ́ kœza lɔsu ga pa œrœ nene. Uzu ɗe dá za lɔsu ye ga tœ œrœ á tshe wu a?
8.25: Kashe œ kœsœ adœke a za lɔsu azœ ga tœ œrœ á a wuwu damba nene, œ li adœke a kate dœ kœru lɔsu.
8.26: Ga pa nœ dœmœ, Ɨshirɨ œ tɨ kane azœ lœ kœmɔ nœ azœ mbœrœ a wuwusœtœ azœ tœ kœza avwala fœ Ndjaba ɓata á li nene. Kashe Ɨshirɨ dœ tœ ye œ za avwala mbœrœ azœ fœ Ndjaba dœ mara á uzu œ li kœza œtœnœ nene.
8.27: Yé Ndjaba á tshe wusœ lɔsu azœ dœ azu kɔ, tshe wusœ œneke á Ɨshirɨ yindœ kœyu she tœnœ ye. Gbambanœ nene, Ɨshirɨ sœ kœza avwala nœ ye mbœrœ ayerœ azu liaka gbetshelœ nœ Ndjaba.
8.28: A wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba mbœrœ adœke œrœ kɔ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ mbœrœ azu á endje yindœ ye, á tshe e endje liaka œneke á tshe guma lima utshunœ.
8.29: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba ke endje utshunœ, á wa adœke endje li dœ ɨshirɨ Gbolo nœ ye á tshe kœdœ eya nœ aaya ndjoro.
8.30: Azunœ á Ndjaba wa o'o mbœrœ endje utshunœ asœmœ, tshe e ndje endje; endjeneke á tshe e endje, tshe mbœrœ adœke endje wuta ndjii yé endjeneke á tshe mbœrœ adœke endje wuta ndjii, tshe mbœrœ adœke endje sœ lœ mokɔ nœ ye. Kœyindœsho nœ Ndjaba
8.31: Ataa, a kpa pa koto o? Œdœ Ndjaba kœsœ mbœrœ azœ, œɗe dá yiangba azœ a?
8.32: Ndjaba vwavwara lima tœ ye tœ kœza Gbolo nœ ye tshebale fœ azœ nene, kashe tshe za lima she mbœrœ azœ para kɔkɔ. Ɓata á tshe za Gbolo nœ ye tshebale fœ azœ, œrœ gaɗe dá tshe kpa duru azœ tœnœ a?
8.33: Œɗe dá tɔ meza pa azu á Ndjaba ke endje a? Uzu bale nene. Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba mbœrœ adœke endje wuta ndjii.
8.34: Œɗe dá wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga pa endje a? Uzu bale nene! Gbambanœ nene, Yisu Kristu tshu œ she lœ kuzu yé œ sœ ga tœ kuni Ndjaba; á sœ kœza avwala tœ upu nœ azœ.
8.35: Œɗe dá li kœkurutshelœ azœ dœ kœyindœsho nœ Kristu a? Œdœ œrœ kanga, œdœ awa, œdœ kœwu œrœ kanga, œdœ ogo, œdœ oyo œrœ tshapashɔ, œdœ œrœ á yindœ kœndɨ soro œdœ pe ugu kamba a? Œrœ bale nene!
8.36: Gbambanœ nene, endje sú adœke: «Ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ endje para awa nœ kœwo 'a lœ kumu zœ; endje wu 'a ɓata apata á endje na kœwo endje.»
8.37: Kashe lœ œrœnœ kɔ asœke, a wuta kœropa nœ kolœ dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ndjaba á tshe yi ndœ azœ.
8.38: Gbambanœ nene, mœ wu adja sœ nœ adœke: œdœ kuzu œdœ ndje soro, œdœ aandjelu œdœ ndje ekpe ɨshirɨ, œdœ kpesheke œdœ ɓa mbatsha, œdœ gbɔgbɔ,
8.39: œdœ gbɔgbɔ ɓa lafo, œdœ ndje ɓa budu ɔshɔ, œdœ anga œrœ á Ndjaba mbœrœ, œrœ bale nene œ li kœkurutshelœ azœ dœ kœyindœsho nœ Ndjaba, á matœ ye lœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu gugu nene.

9.1: Œneke á mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e kœdœ adja o'o. Gbambanœ nene, mœ kœdœ uzu nœ Kristu; mœ sœsœ kœpa wala nene, gbetshelœ nœ mœ sœ kœpa tœ upu nœ mœ lœ awa nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ.
9.2: Lɔsu mœ su dœ egerœ oyo yé œ sœ kœka mœ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ.
9.3: Mœ sœ má kœyindœ nœ adœke Ndjaba darandœ mœ yé œ kurutshelœ mœ dœ Kristu lœ kumu aaya mœ dœ Ayuda á endje zu mœ dœ endje lœ mara bale.
9.4: Endje kœdœ azu Israyele, á Ndjaba ke lima endje adœke endje dœ agbolo nœ œne á yi lima sœ mokɔ nœ ye fœ endje. Tshe guma lima ayo dœ endje, œ za lima awa akwa nœ ye fœ endje yé œ yi lima sœ mara á endje li kœdonga dœ she fœ endje. Tshe pa lima tœ œrœ fœ endje.
9.5: Endje kœdœ aata azœ. Kristu wuta uzu yé endje zu she lœ mara nœ endje. Tshe ropa œrœ kɔ. Œshe kœdœ Ndjaba á endje donga she waa dœ waa. Ame!
9.6: Andaa, o'o á Ndjaba katœ nœ lima fœ endje sœsœ gbambanœ nene. Kashe œ dœ́dœ́ azu Israyele para kɔkɔ dá dœ azu Israyele nene.
9.7: Ugurutœ aata Abrayamo kɔ, anga endje dœ́dœ́ agbolo nœ ye nene. Mbœrœ tœnœ dá Ndjaba pa liya adœke: «Agbolo á mœ pa tœ endje fœ ɓœ, endje to lœ Izaka.»
9.8: Œ má adœke: œ dœ́dœ́ agbolo nœ ɔkɔ dá dœ agbolo nœ Ndjaba nene. Kashe kotœ agbolo á Abrayamo zu lima endje liaka o'o á Ndjaba pa tœnœ dá dœ adja agbolo nœ ye.
9.9: Ndjaba ka lima tœ o'o fœ Abrayamo adœke: «Ngbugu manda nœ, mœ kwa bala tœ mœ ga ndœ zœ kolœ dœ olonœ asœke, yé awo zœ dœ Sara œ zu gbolo yakoshe.»
9.10: Œ dœ́dœ́ kolœ asœmœ nene, kashe Rebeka gbɔ ndje lima nguzu ameya á aba endje bale kœdœ ata azœ dœ Izaka.
9.11: -12 Andaa, utshu kœzu endje, damba endje wuwu lima sœ tshelœ kata ekperœ dœ ɔtshɔrœ nene, Ndjaba pa lima fœ Rebeka adœke: «Ɔgbɔ gbolonœ œ dœ kanga nœ ɨngɨnœ.» Tshe pa lima atamœ mbœrœ kœma adœke œne ke liaka gbetshelœ nœ œne. Tshe para kolœ endjeneke á tshe e endje, tshe wuwu akwa nœ endje nene.
9.13: Endje su ɓala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Mœ yindœ Yakobo yé mœ yiangba Esawu.»
9.14: Ataa a kpa pa koto o? Ndjaba sœsœ ndjii nene a? Bale nene!
9.15: Ndjaba pa lima fœ Moyize adœke: «Mœ wu oyo uzu á mœ yindœ kœwu oyo ye, yé mœ má ɔtshɔ lɔsu ga tœ uzu á mœ yindœ kœma ɔtshɔ lɔsu ga tœ ye.»
9.16: Œ yindœ kœpa adœke ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba sœsœ mbœrœ œneke á azu yindœ nœ too ndje mbœrœ gbɔgbɔ nœ azu nene, kashe œ sœ kolœ mbœrœ á tshe wu oyo uzu dœ tœ ye.
9.17: Endje su lima adœke Ndjaba pa fœ gbozugo Ezipito adœke: «Mœ za ɓœ tɔ ɓata gbozu mbœrœ kœma gbɔgbɔ nœ mœ á azu tshapashɔ djigi kœwu mokɔ nœ mœ.»
9.18: Œtœnœ ataa dá Ndjaba kœyindœ nœ yekane á tshe wu oyo uzu; yé tshe kœyi ndje ndœ nœ, tshe mbœrœ adœke uzu sœ dœ gbɔkumu. Ókó œdœ lɔsu kœwu oyo nœ Ndjaba
9.19: Anganœ uzu œ yu mœ adœke: «Œ kœsœ ataa, œ mbœrœ kotoo á Ndjaba œ gbagbara azœ dœ azu a? Ka œɗe dá li kœvwaratœ ye tœ œrœ á tshe yindœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ a?»
9.20: Kashe ɓœ kœdœ œɗe yekane á vwaratœ zœ tœ upu nœ Ndjaba a? Œɗe dá wu ɓalima lɔsú kœyu uzu á tshe mbœrœ she adœke: «Mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ mbœrœ mœ atake a?»
9.21: Ayi kœmbœrœ lɔsú lili kœmbœrœ œneke á tshe yindœ nœ dœ óto nœ ye nene a? Tshe li kœa ótó: œ mbœrœ anganœ dœ ɔgbɔ lɔsú yé œ mbœrœ ndje anganœ dœ amba lɔsú. Œ sœsœ ataa nene a?
9.22: A wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba yi lima ndœ kœma ókó nœ ye œdœ pe gbɔgbɔ nœ ye. Kashe tshe sœ lima dœ ugu lɔsu mbœrœ azu á li lima adœke endje gbɔ djofele, á endje li lima dœ kuzu.
9.23: Tshe mbœrœ ataa, mbœrœ kœyisœ egerœ mokɔ nœ ye ga ndœ azu á tshe wu oyo endje yé á ke endje lima utshunœ á guma endje kœli ga lœ mokɔ nœ ye.
9.24: Azœ kœdœ azunœ á tshe e endje asœmœ, azœ á tshe e azœ ko ugurutœ Ayuda nene kashe ugurutœ angbɨ azu ndje.
9.25: Tœnœ kœdœ o'o ama Ndjaba á Oze su lima adœke: «Azu ogo á endje dœ́dœ́ azu nœ mœ nene, mœ e endje bala azu nœ mœ; yé angbɨ azu á mœ yiyi lima ndœ endje nene, mœ yindœ endje waa.
9.26: Ɓa tœ osho á endje pa lima fœ endje adœke: “'E dœ́dœ́ azu nœ mœ nene”, ɓa zœ asœmœ, endje e endje agbolo nœ Ndjaba nœ soro.»
9.27: Isaya gbara ndje lima atake tœ upu nœ azu Israyele: «Œdœ azu Israyele kœngba ndje ɓata mindu tshatœ ama kota gbaa, kolœ udu endje teasho dá she.
9.28: Gbambanœ nene, œneke á Ndjaba pa tœnœ, tshe mbœrœ adœke œ mbœrœtœ endje djigi œdœ gbara pa ɔshɔ.»
9.29: Kolœ Isaya kpa pa ndje lima utshunœ adœke: «Œdœ Gbozu nœ gbɔgbɔ kɔ kœkaka lima tœ anga aata azœ tɨ fœ azœ nene, dá a wuta má ndje ɓata azu ongbo Sodomo, a liili má ɓata azu ongbo Gomora.» Azu Israyele œdœ kœshe lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ
9.30: Atamœ a kpa pa kotoo? A pa adœke: azu neke á endje dœ́dœ́ Ayuda nene yé á papara awa adœke œne wuta ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba nene, Ndjaba mbœrœ adœke endje wuta ndjii tœ ala œne mbœrœ kœyindœrœ.
9.31: Andaa, azu Israyele para lima awa adœke œne wuta ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba lœ awa nœ kœmbœrœtœ endje liaka awa akwa kashe endje wuwuta lima ndjii nene.
9.32: Mbœrœ gaɗe e? Ádánœ kœdœ adœke endje gbegbe lima kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ nene kashe endje za lima lɔsu endje ga pa akwa nœ endje. Endje za ada endje tɔ badja á sœ kœko endje vesho.
9.33: Endje su ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «'E dji, mœ za badja tɔ ɓa lakpɨ Siyona, œtœnœ kœdœ badja á azu œ ko ada endje tɔ tœnœ á ko endje vesho. Kashe uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye, tshe gbɔ tshula nene.»

10.1: Aaya, œrœ á mœ yindœ nœ dœ lɔsu mœ bale, yé á sœ kœza avwala nœ mœ fœ Ndjaba tœnœ kœdœ adœke tshe she Ayuda.
10.2: Gbambanœ nene, mœ wusœ nœ adœke endje sœ dœ egerœ ogo kœmbœrœ akwa nœ Ndjaba kashe endje wuwusœ awa kœmbœrœ tœnœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ nene.
10.3: Endje wuwusœ mara á Ndjaba mbœrœ adœke uzu wuta ndjii tœ ala ye nene. Endje para kœwuta ndjii dœ awa nœ endje dœ tœ endje. Mbœrœ tœnœ atamœ, endje zazatœ endje fœ Ndjaba yeka á tshe kœmbœrœ adœke endje wuta ndjii nene.
10.4: Gbambanœ nene, Kristu mbœrœ œneke kɔ á li má adœke awa akwa mbœrœ yekane á endjeneke kɔ á endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye kœwuta ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba. Uzu kɔ á tshe sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu, tshe she
10.5: 'E dji o'o á Moyize sú tœ upu nœ kœsœ ndjii á to lœ awa akwa: uzu kœro manda awa akwa, œ sœ dœ soro lœ awa nœ awa akwa.
10.6: Kashe tœ kœwuta ndjii dœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ, tshe pa lima adœke: «Yuyutœ zœ nene adœke: œɗe dá ɔ ga lafo a?» Œ sœ ɓata kœza Yisu jerœ tœnœ ga atɨ.
10.7: 'E yuyu ndje tœ 'e nene adœke: «Œɗe dá jerœ ga lœ ogo nœ akuzu a?» Œ sœ ɓata 'e kpa yindœ kœmbœrœ adœke Yisu kpa she lœ akuzu.
10.8: Kashe Moyize pa lima kotoo? Tshe pa lima atake: «O'o ama Ndjaba sœ ndoo dœ ɓœ, œ sœ lœ ama zœ; œ sœ ndje tœ lɔsu zœ.» O'onœ asœmœ kœdœ o'o nœ kœyindœrœ á a sœ kœmɨndœ nœ.
10.9: Œdœ ɓœ kœpa dœ ama zœ adœke Yisu kœdœ Gbozu, á yindœ nœ dœ lɔsu zœ adœke Ndjaba she she lœ akuzu ye, ɓœ she bala ye.
10.10: Mbœrœ kœyindœ nœ dœ lɔsu zœ dá Ndjaba œ mbœrœ adœke ɓœ sœ ndjii, yé ɓœ kœpandœ nœ dœ ama zœ dá Ndjaba œ she ɓœ.
10.11: Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ɓala Bukunœ adœke: «Uzu kɔ á tshe sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu, tshe gbɔ tshula nene.»
10.12: Ádánœ á Ayuda dœ angbɨ azu sœsœ kpi nene. Gbozu nœ endje kœdœ Yisu Kristu á tshe to ɔtshɔrœ nœ ye fœ azu para kɔkɔ á endje e ɨ'ɨrɨ ye.
10.13: Mbœrœ á endje sú ɓala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Uzu kɔ á tshe e ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu, tshe she.»
10.14: Kashe endje e ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kotoo œdœ endje kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye nene a? Yé endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye kotoo œdœ endje kœdjidji damba o'o nœ ye nene a? Endje dji o'o nœ ye kotoo œdœ a kœmɨmɨndœ nœ nene a?
10.15: Endje mɨndœ o'onœ kotoo œdœ endje kœvwavwa azu nene a? Endje su ɓala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Yanga waa kœwu azu á endje na dœ Ɔtshɔ O'o fœ azu.»
10.16: Kashe azu para kɔkɔ dá yindœ Ɔtshɔ O'onœ nene. Isaya pa lima tœ upunœ adœke: «Gbozu, œɗe dá yindœ o'onœ á 'a sœ kœmɨndœ nœ a?»
10.17: Ataa, kœyindœrœ to lœ kœmɨndœ o'o ama Ndjaba yé kœmɨndœ o'o ama Ndjaba kœdœ kœmɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Kristu.
10.18: Mœ sœ kœyu adœke: ataa azu Israyele djidji lima o'onœ asœke nene a? Adjapu, endje dji lima kɔ. Mbœrœ Buku nœ Ndjaba pa adœke: «Endje dji tshama endje na tœnœ pa ɔshɔ djigi, yé o'o ama endje œ na rotœnœ tœ osho kɔ pa ɔshɔnœ asœke.»
10.19: Mœ sœ kpa kœyu adœke: Ataa azu Israyele djidji lima dœ ɔtshɔnœ nene a? Ndjaba pa lima ndœ nœ lœ ama Moyize adœke: «Mœ mbœrœ adœke 'e sœ dœ úkú ga tœ azu á endje dœ́dœ́ azu nœ mœ nene. Mœ mbœrœ adœke 'e sœ dœ ókó ga tœ angbɨ azu á endje gugu dœ kœwusœrœ nene.»
10.20: Isaya kpa na œrrr kœpa adœke: «Azu á endje sœsœ lima kœpara mœ nene, gbɔ mœ, mœ matœ mœ fœ azu neke á endje sœsœ lima kœyu mœ tœ œrœ nene.»
10.21: Yé mbœrœ azu Israyele, tshe pa lima adœke: «Ɔlɔ kɔ, mœ yi lima kane mœ mbœrœ kœ'e endje kashe endje djidji lima o'o ama mœ nene. Endje kœdœ aayi gbɔkumu œdœ adjipudji.»

11.1: Mœ sœ kœyutœ mœ adœke: Adja Ndjaba vwaratœ ye tœ azu nœ ye ye a? Bale nene! Gbambanœ nene, œmœ ndje kœdœ uzu Israyele, ata Abrayamo lœ mara nœ Abendjame.
11.2: Ndjaba vwavwaratœ ye tœ azu nœ ye á tshe ke lima endje katshatsha nene. 'E wuwusœ o'o á Eliya pa lima ala Buku nœ Ndjaba ɔlɔ á tshe sœ kœkɨ oyo tœ upu nœ azu Israyele fœ Ndjaba nene a?
11.3: Tshe kɨ lima adœke: «Gbozu, endje wo aayi kœgbara o'o nœ zœ, œ kavwa wopa nœ zœ. Mœ sœpe dœ kutɨ mœ tshebale yé endje kpa sœ kœpara awa ndœ kœwo mœ.»
11.4: Kashe Ndjaba gi lima o'o gaɗe fœ she a? Tshe gi lima fœ she adœke: «Mœ gumasœ azu kutu mindu dœ bisha á endje kukuku ga utshu ndjaba Bala nene.»
11.5: Awa bale ndje ngɔngɔ asœke, anga udu azu á Ndjaba ke endje liaka ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye sœpe zœ.
11.6: Tshe keke lima endje mbœrœ akwa nœ endje nene, kashe kolœ mbœrœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye. Ete nene, ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba kpa dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nene.
11.7: Atamœ a kpa pa kotoo? Azu Israyele gbɔgbɔ œrœ á endje sœ lima kœpara tœnœ nene, kolœ endjeneke á Ndjaba ke endje dá gbɔ. Anga endje wuta lima dœ gbɔkumu,
11.8: ɓata á endje sú ala Bukunœ adœke: «Ndjaba mbœrœ adœke kœwusœrœ nœ endje papara awa kœwusœ ádá o'o nene. Tshe pakata ala endje kœwu œrœ œdœ utu endje kœdji o'o œrrr ngɔngɔ asœke.»
11.9: Davidi pa ndje adœke: «Kaka kœzɨrœ nœ endje fa úkú œdœ gbanda, œ kɔrɔ awa kœyo endje dœ́ endje gbɔ œneke á li dœ endje,
11.10: Kaka adœke endje kpa wuwu œrœ nene œrrr ala endje bu, mbœrœ adja adœke ovoro endje lu ga tœnœ.»
11.11: Mœ kpa sœ kœyutœ mœ adœke: «Lɔkɔ á Ayuda ko lima ada endje tɔsho, endje yo lima waa ye a?» Bale nene. Kashe ekperœ nœ endje kɔrɔ awa fœ angbɨ azu adœke endje gbɔ kœshe, á kœvwa Ayuda kœmbœrœ úkú.
11.12: Andaa, œdœ ekperœ nœ Ayuda kœza kœgbɔrœ fœ tshapashɔ, á kœyo endje kœza kœgbɔrœ fœ angbɨ azu, ataa ɔtshɔrœ kpa ropa nœ ɔlɔ á endje kpa kwatœ endje kɔ ga pa awa kœshe. Angbɨ azu œ she
11.13: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ e'e dœ́ azu á 'e dœ́dœ́ Ayuda nene: œmœ kœdœ ayi avwa á Ndjaba ke mœ mbœrœ angbɨ azu yé mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ sœ dœ yanga mbœrœ akwa á mœ mbœrœ asœke waa.
11.14: Mœ gbe kœmbœrœ ataa adœke aaya mœ wuta dœ úkú yeka anga endje kœshe.
11.15: Gbambanœ nene, ɔlɔ á Ndjaba vwara lima tœ ye tœ Ayuda, tshe guma lima tshaguru tœ ye dœ tshapashɔ. Atamœ ɔlɔ á tshe kpa kœguma tshagurutœ ye dœ endje, œ sœ ɓata uzu to lœ kuzu á kwa ga lœ soro nene a?
11.16: Œdœ uzu kœza ali kumu œrœ kɨndɨ nœ ye fœ Ndjaba, udu œrœnœ kɔ kœdœ œnœ Ndjaba. Œdœ uzu kœza ndje eshe ɔyɔ fœ Ndjaba, ganeanœ ndje kœdœ œnœ ye.
11.17: Azu Israyele sœ ɓata ɔyɔ olive á Ndjaba de anga ganeanœ tœnœ yé tœ œsœ ganeanœ asœmœ, tshe za ɓœ tɔrɔ ga zœ œɓœ dœ́ angbɨ uzu ɓata ganea olive tshelœ gusu. Ɓœ sœ ndje kœgbɔ kœzɨrœ á sœ kœto lœ eshe ɔyɔ olive á sœ kœɔ tœnœ.
11.18: Ádánœ á lili adœke ɓœ sœ dœ egerœ kumu nene utshu ganea á endje de. Kotoo á ɓœ tɨ kanga zœ a? Œ dœ́dœ́ ɓœ dá sœ kœza eshe ɔyɔ nene kashe eshe ɔyɔ dá sœ kœza ɓœ.
11.19: Anganœ ɓœ sœ kœpa ndje adœke: «Endje de lima ganea ɔyɔ asœke yeka á mœ kœgbɔ osho kœsœ tœnœ.»
11.20: Adjapu. Endje de ganeanœ asœmœ mbœrœ á endje gugu lima dœ kœyindœrœ nene yeka á ɓœ gbɔ osho tshangbanœ mbœrœ kœyindœrœ. Kashe dudu okoro zœ nene, yé ala zœ gbɔ kane.
11.21: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ Ndjaba kœde Ayuda á endje kœdœ adja ganea ɔyɔ, ala zœ gbɔ anganœ tshe de ndje ɓœ awa bale.
11.22: 'E wu mara á Ndjaba sœ kœma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye œdœ kœza djofele nœ ye kane: tshe za djofele fœ azu á endje yo yé œ má ɔtshɔ lɔsu ga ndœ zœ. Mbœrœ adœke œndœ zœ dɨ lœ ɔtshɔ lɔsunœ asœmœ ete nene, endje de ndje ɓœ ye.
11.23: Kashe lɔkɔ á Ayuda kpa kœfatshalɔsu endje, endje kwa ga tœ osho á endje sœ lima tœnœ utshunœ. Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ kœgi endje ga tœ ɔyɔ ga manda œsœ endje.
11.24: Œɓœ dœ́ angbɨ uzu, ɓœ kœdœ ganea tshelœ gusu á ndjaba de ɓœ á za ɓœ tɔrɔ ga tœ ɔyɔ á ɓœ sœsœ lima tœnœ nene. Kashe Ayuda, endje kœdœ adja ganea ɔyɔ olivenœ, Ndjaba li kpa kœgi endje ga manda endje tɔrɔ ga tœ ɔyɔ á endje sœ lima tœnœ. Ndjaba œ she Ayuda
11.25: Aaya, mœ yindœ nœ adœke, 'e wusœ o'o nœ Ndjaba á zatœ ye yiwa tœnœ asœke, á 'e kœzazatœ 'e nene adœke 'e kœdœ aayi kœwusœtœ. O'onœ asœke dœke: anga tshakala azu Israyele œ wuta kœdji tshelœ kata o'o asœ nene œrrr adœke angbɨ azu djigi wuta ga tœ kœshe.
11.26: Yé manda nœ dá Azu Israyele kɔ œ she ɓata á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Ayi kœvwara azu œ to ɓa lakpɨ Siyona, tshe gi ekperœ tœ aata Yakobo.
11.27: 'E wu ayo á mœ mbœrœ bala dœ endje, lɔkɔ á mœ ɨ ekperœ nœ endje.»
11.28: Ayuda vwara lima tœ endje tœ Ɔtshɔ O'o yé œ wuta lima ayingba Ndjaba yekane á kɔrɔ awa fœ 'e. Kashe Ndjaba sœ kœyindœ endje waa dœ waa mbœrœ á tshe ke lima aata endje.
11.29: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba kœza œrœ fœ uzu tshe kpa za tshakane ye nene. Tshe kœ'e uzu, tshe kpa fatshelœ ama ye nene.
11.30: Utshunœ lima 'e sœsœ kœdji Ndjaba nene yé ngɔngɔ asœke Ndjaba wu oyo 'e mbœrœ Ayuda vwaratœ endje tœ kœdji she.
11.31: Awa bale ngɔngɔ asœke endje vwaratœ endje tœ kœdji o'o adœke Ndjaba kœwu oyo 'e, á manda nœ yekane á tshe kœwu ndje oyo endje.
11.32: Gbambanœ nene Ndjaba mbœrœ lima adœke azu para kɔkɔ vwara lima tœ endje tœ kœdji o'o ama œne. Tshe mbœrœ lima atamœ adœke œne ma lɔsu kœwu oyo endje para kɔkɔ.
11.33: Adja Ndjaba gerœ waa. Œsœ kœwusœtœ nœ ye dœ pe kœwusœrœ nœ ye gerœ ndje waa. Uzu bale á tshe wusœ ada kœwa o'o nœ ye gugu, uzu bale á tshe wu ndje sœ œrœ á tshe yindœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ gugu nene.
11.34: Buku nœ Ndjaba pa adœke: «Œɗe dá wusœ gbetshelœ nœ Ndjaba? Œɗe dá li tœ kœmɨ upu fœ she a?
11.35: Œɗe dá to œrœ tœ alinœ fœ she, yekane á tshe kœgi tshangbanœ fœ she a?»
11.36: Gbambanœ nene, œrœ kɔ to ɓa ndœ ye, œrœ kɔ sœ dœ soro lœ awa nœ ye yé œrœ kɔ sœ mbœrœ she. Kaka mokɔ nœ Ndjaba sœ waa dœ waa. Ame!

12.1: Aaya, ɓata á Ndjaba má ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye fœ azœ, mœ yindœ nœ adœke 'e zatœ 'e fœ she ɓata tokóró nœ soro, á endje gi ga ɨndɨrɨnœ yé á sœ kœza yanga fœ she. Asœke kœdœ adja mara kœdonga Ndjaba á li dœ 'e kœdonga dœ she.
12.2: 'E mbœmbœrœtœ 'e ɓata azu tshapashɔnœ asœke nene kashe 'e za awa fœ Ndjaba kœto tafo kœwusœrœ fœ 'e yeka á 'e kœwusœ œneke á Ndjaba yindœ nœ, œneke á sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, œneke á za yanga fœ she, œneke á li.
12.3: Yé mbœrœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba ga ndœ mœ, mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke 'e zazatœ 'e ga lafo kœro mara á 'e sœ dœ tœnœ nene. Kashe 'e sœ dœ gbetshelœ neke á li, adœke uzu dœ uzu wutœ ye liaka kœyindœrœ á Ndjaba to fœ she.
12.4: Gbambanœ nene, undu azœ sœ bale kashe œrœ kotenœ ngba waa. Akwa á œrœ kote undu azœ bale dœ bale œ mbœrœ sœsœ awa bale nene.
12.5: Awa bale a ngba waa, kashe a wuta undu uzu bale lœ kœngbɔtœ azœ bale dœ Kristu yé uzu dœ uzu kœdœ œrœ kote undunœ.
12.6: Uzu dœ uzu sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ kœmbœrœ dœ akwa kpikpi dœ mara á Ndjaba to fœ she lœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye. Œ kœsœ adœke Ndjaba to gbɔgbɔ nœ kœgbara dœ o'o fœ uzu, œ li adœke tshe gbara lindœ kœyindœrœ.
12.7: Uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ kœtɨ kane anganœ, kaka adœke tshe tɨ kane anganœ. Yé uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ kœyisœ œrœ, kaka tshe yisœ œrœ.
12.8: Uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ kœto gbɔgbɔ fœ anganœ, kaka tshe to gbɔgbɔ fœ anganœ. Uzu á tshe kœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ kœto œrœ, kaka tshe to dœ lɔsu ye bale. Uzu á tshe kœsœ tœ gbozu tshapa anganœ, kaka tshe zatœ ye djigi ndœ nœ. Uzu a tshe kœsœ dœ gbɔgbɔ ndœ kœwu oyo azu, kaka tshe mbœrœ dœ yanga.
12.9: Œ li adœke 'e yindœ anga 'e dœ adja kœyindœsho. 'E kpa awa ekperœ yé œ zatœ 'e djigi ndœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ.
12.10: 'E yindœtœ 'e ugurutœ 'e ɓata aaya azu: 'e lɨsœtœ 'e ugurutœ 'e.
12.11: 'E mbœrœ akwa dœ gbɔgbɔ yé 'e mbœmbœrœ ɔdɔ nene. 'E mbœrœ akwa fœ Gbozu dœ lɔsu 'e bale.
12.12: 'E sœ dœ yanga lœ kœko lɔsu nœ 'e ga tœ Ndjaba. 'E sœ dœ ugu lɔsu lœ oyo yé œ sœ dœ kœru lɔsu lœ avwala.
12.13: 'E tɨ kane ayerœ azu nœ Ndjaba á endje sœ lœ oyo yé œ za osho kœsœ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ fœ agene.
12.14: 'E pa ɔtshɔ o'o ga tœ azu á endje sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ 'e. 'E to kane 'e ga pa endje kashe 'e dadarandœ endje nene.
12.15: 'E sœ dœ yanga awa bale dœ azu á endje sœ dœ yanga, œ kɨ awa bale dœ azu á endje sœ dœ ɨkɨ.
12.16: 'E sœ dœ gbetshelœ bale ugurutœ 'e. 'E kpa awa kœsœ dœ egerœ kumu kashe 'e zatœ 'e ga atɨ. Adja 'e gbegbe nene adœke 'e kœdœ azu nœ kœwusœtœ.
12.17: Œdœ uzu kœmbœrœ ekperœ fœ 'e, 'e gigi ekperœ fœ she nene kashe 'e para awa kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ utshu azu para kɔkɔ.
12.18: 'E mbœrœ œneke kɔ á li dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ 'e adœke tshagurutœ 'e sœ dœ kœsœ gee.
12.19: Aaya á mœ yindœ 'e, œdœ azu kœmbœrœ ekperœ fœ 'e, 'e gigi ekperœ dœ tœ 'e nene. Kashe 'e za awa adœke ókó nœ Ndjaba kœmbœrœ akwa. Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Œmœ dá gi tshangba ekperœ, œmœ ndje dá gi kuɗa tshangba ekperœ kɔ», Ndjaba dá pa ataa.
12.20: Yé ga pa nœ, endje kpa su ndje adœke: «Œdœ yingba zœ kœsœ dœ ogo, to kœzɨrœ fœ she; œdœ tshe kœsœ dœ ogo ungu, su ungu fœ she; gbambanœ nene, œdœ ɓœ kœsœ kœmbœrœ atamœ, ɓœ sœ kœva jiwo ga pa kumu ye.»
12.21: Zaza awa fœ ekperœ adœke œ ropa zœ nene kashe ropa ekperœ lœ awa nœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ.

13.1: Œ li adœke uzu kɔ zatœ ye ga tshakudu agbozu nœ Lita mbœrœ akwa tshagbozu kɔ to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba; yé agbozu á a sœ dœ endje, Ndjaba dá ko endje.
13.2: Atamœ uzu kɔ á tshe kœvwaratœ ye tœ kœzatœ ye ga tshakudu agbozu nœ Lita, tshe vwaratœ ye tœ kœmbœrœtœ ye liaka œneke á Ndjaba guma yé Ndjaba œ wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ ye.
13.3: Gbambanœ nene, azu á endje sœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ, endje kpa awa agbozu nœ Lita nene kashe azu neke á endje mbœrœ ekperœ dá kpa awa endje. Œdœ uzu kœyindœ nœ adœke awa agbozu nœ Lita mbœrœ œne nene, œ li adœke tshe mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ yekane á endje kœlɨsœ ye.
13.4: Gbambanœ nene, agbozu nœ lita kœdœ aayi akwa nœ Ndjaba mbœrœ kœyisœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ fœ azu. Œdœ ɓœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ, œ li adœke awa endje mbœrœ ɓœ, mbœrœ endje gbɔgbɔ akwanœ gbambanœ nene. Lœ kœza djofele fœ azu, endje sœ tœ akwa nœ Ndjaba adœke œne ma ókó nœ ye ga ndœ azu á endje sœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ.
13.5: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, œ li adœke a zatœ azœ ga tshakudu agbozu nœ Lita. 'E kpakpa kolœ awa ókó nœ Ndjaba nene kashe 'e zatœ 'e ga tshakudu agbozu nœ Lita mbœrœ á a wusœ nœ adœke œ li dœ azœ kœmbœrœ atamœ.
13.6: Œtœnœ kœdœ ndje ádánœ á li dœ 'e adœke 'e yɔ lapo. Ndjaba ko aayi akwa nœ kœko ngendja lapo adœke endje zatœ endje ga tœ akwanœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ.
13.7: Yé 'e gi kuɗa nœ uzu kɔ fœ she. 'E yɔ lapo á li adœke 'e yɔ, 'e yɔ takeshe á li adœke 'e yɔ, œ kpa awa azu neke á li dœ 'e kœkpa awa endje yé œ lɨsœ endjeneke á li dœ 'e kœlɨsœ endje. Kœyindœtœ azœ
13.8: 'E sœsœ dœ kuɗa nœ uzu bale pa 'e nene. 'E sœ kolœ dœ kuɗa á li dœ 'e kœsœ dœ tœnœ adœke: 'e yindœtœ 'e. Uzu á tshe sœ kœyindœ anganœ sœ kœmbœrœtœ ye liaka awa akwa djigi.
13.9: Gbambanœ nene, awa o'o pa adœke: «Papara awo yanga zœ nene, wowo uzu nene, zɨzɨ angba nene; zaza lɔsu zœ ga pa œrœ nœ́ yanga zœ nene.» Awa akwanœ asœke œdœ pe udu awa akwa para kɔkɔ li ga lœ awa akwa bale á pa adœke: «Yindœ yanga zœ ɓata á ɓœ yindœtœ zœ dœ tœ zœ.»
13.10: Uzu á tshe kœyindœ yanganœ, tshe mbœrœ ekperœ fœ she nene, ádánœ á uzu á tshe sœ kœyindœ yanganœ tshe sœ kœmbœrœtœ ye liaka awa akwa djigi.
13.11: Ɓata 'e wusœ lɔndɔ á a sœ dœ tœnœ, lɔkɔ kœjo 'e lœ olo wuta ye. Kpœsheke kœshe na ndo dœ azœ kœto tœ ɔlɔ á a yi lima ndœ œrœ.
13.12: Œndœ butshɔ dɨ yé osho ndo kœkɔrɔ tœnœ ye. A katœ akwa nœ ubu osho yé a ko œrœ kœnga dœ koshe nœ ɨngbɨsho.
13.13: Œ li adœke akwa tshelœ azœ dœ akwa nœ ɨngbɨsho, a katœ egerœ lɔsu, dœ kœndjo ipi tɔpanœ kpuru, dœ angba budu, dœ œrœ tshula, dœ œbœrœ œdœ úkú.
13.14: Kashe 'a matœ azœ ɓata azu nœ Yisu Kristu, yé 'e papara kœmbœrœ œneke á ogo nœ ɔkɔ 'e œ vwa 'e ndœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ nene.

14.1: 'E za osho kœsœ fœ uzu á kœyindœrœ nœ ye sœ teasho, kashe 'e wawa ngbanga pa gbetshelœ nœ ye nene.
14.2: Anga uzu sœ dœ kœyindœrœ adœke œne li kœzɨ œrœ kɔ, andaa anga á kœyindœrœ sœ teasho, sœ kœzɨ kolœ dɔngɔ.
14.3: Atamœ uzu á tshe sœ kœzɨ œrœ tshetshene tsheneke á tshe zɨzɨ nene, yé tsheneke á tshe zɨzɨ nene wawa o'o ga tœ tsheneke á tshe sœ kœzɨ tœnœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba za osho kœsœ fœ she ndje.
14.4: Œɓœ kœdœ ɗe á kœwa ngbanga pa ayi akwa á tshe dœ́dœ́ tshenœ zœ nene a? Œdœ tshe kœmbœrœ akwa nœ ye dœ ɔtshɔnœ œdœ tshe mbœmbœrœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ nene, œ dœ́ o'o nœ ayengɔ ye. Tshe shi gbɨ; gbambanœ nene, Gbozu sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ kœtɨ kane ye.
14.5: Tœ upu nœ anga bale, olo sœ kpikpikpi, andaa tœ anga olo kɔ liili. Kaka uzu dœ uzu wusœ nœ ɓa lɔsu ye dœ tœ ye adœke œneke á œne gbe kœdœ adjapu.
14.6: Uzu á tshe kœgbe adœke anga olo bale ropa udu olo kɔ, sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ mbœrœ kœlɨsœ Gbozu; uzu á tshe sœ kœzɨ œrœ kɔ, sœ ndje kœmbœrœ tœnœ mbœrœ kœlɨsœ Gbozu; gbambanœ nene, tshe sœ kœza mershe fœ Ndjaba mbœrœ kœzɨrœ nœ ye. Tsheneke á tshe zɨzɨ œrœ nene sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ mbœrœ kœlɨsœ Gbozu yé œ sœ ndje kœza mershe fœ Ndjaba.
14.7: Uzu bale ugurutœ azœ á tshe sœ dœ soro mbœrœ tœ ye dœ tœ ye gugu nene yé uzu bale á tshe tshu mbœrœ tœ ye dœ tœ ye gugu nene.
14.8: Œdœ a kœsœ dœ soro, a sœ dœ tœnœ mbœrœ Gbozu, yé œdœ á kœtshu, a tshu mbœrœ Gbozu. Atamœ œdœ a kœsœ dœ soro, œdœ á kœtshu, a kœdœ azu nœ Gbozu.
14.9: Gbambanœ nene, Kristu tshu yé Ndjaba she she lœ akuzu adœke tshe dœ Gbozu nœ akuzu œdœ asoro.
14.10: Kashe œɓœ, mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ wa ngbanga pa aya zœ a? Yé œɓœ, mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ tshene aya zœ a? A ka bala utshu Ndjaba adœke tshe wa ngbanga pa azœ.
14.11: Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ala Buku nœ ndjaba adœke: Œmœ Gbozu nœ soro, mœ pa adœke: azu kɔ œ gote ga utshu mœ, yé uzu dœ uzu œ pa dœ ama ye adœke œmœ kœdœ Ndjaba.
14.12: Atamœ uzu dœ uzu ugurutœ azœ œ pa o'o utshu Ndjaba tœ upu nœ ye dœ tœ ye.
14.13: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, a kate kœwa ngbanga ugurutœ azœ dœ anga azœ. Kashe uzu dœ uzu wa ngbanga ɓa tœ lɔsu ye adœke, œne mbœrœ œrœ á mbœrœ adœke aya œne zaza ada ye tɔsho too tshe tete ga lœ ekperœ nene.
14.14: Lœ Gbozu Yisu, mœ wusœ nœ adœke anga rœgo á dœ uburu dœ tœ ye gugu nene. Rœgo sœ kœfa uburu mbœrœ uzu á tshe gbe adœke œtœnœ kœdœ uburu.
14.15: Œ kœsœ adœke ɓœ sœ kœzɨ rœgo á sœ kœza oyo fœ aya zœ, œ yindœ kœpa adœke ɓœ mbœmbœrœtœ zœ liaka kœyindœsho nene. Mbœmbœrœ adœke, rœgo ama zœ ndɨ yanga zœ á Kristu tshu tœ upu nœ ye.
14.16: Kaka adœke, œrœ á 'e wu tœ ɔtshɔnœ tœ ala 'e, zaza awa fœ anga azu kœpa ekpe o'o tœnœ nene.
14.17: Gbambanœ nene, Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba wuwu kœzɨrœ too kœndjorœ nene, kashe œ wu kœsœ ndjii, kœsœ gee œdœ pe yanga lœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ.
14.18: Uzu á tshe sœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ Kristu dœ mara atake, sœ kœza yanga fœ Ndjaba yé azu œ lɨsœ ye.
14.19: Atamœ a para awa kœmbœrœ œrœ á yi kœsœ gee ga ugurutœ azœ yé á li kœmbœrœ adœke a gerœ awa bale lœ kœyindœrœ.
14.20: Adja a ndɨndɨ akwa nœ Ndjaba mbœrœ o'o nœ kœzɨrœ nene. A li kœzɨrœ kɔ kashe œ sœ tœ ekpenœ tœ kœzɨ anga œrœ á vwa uzu ga lœ ekperœ.
14.21: Œ ga waa adœke ɓœ vwaratœ zœ tœ kœzɨ agea, kœndjo ipi, kœvwaratœ zœ tœ œrœ kɔ á mbœrœ adœke aya zœ te ga lœ ekperœ.
14.22: Œneke á ɓœ gbe adœke œ dœ ekperœ too ɔtshɔrœ, œ wu kolœ œɓœ dœ Ndjaba nœ zœ. Yanga nœ uzu á gbetshelœ nœ ye sœsœ kœwa ngbanga ga tœ ye nene.
14.23: Kashe uzu á tshe zɨ œrœ á tshe sœ dœ sharapu tœnœ, Ndjaba œ wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga pa ye. Gbambanœ nene, tshe mbœrœ œrœ á sœsœ ga pa kœyindœrœ nœ ye nene. Yé œrœ kɔ á sœsœ ga pa kœyindœrœ nene kœdœ ekperœ.

15.1: Azœ á sœ dœ egerœ kœyindœrœ, œ li dœ azœ kœtɨ kane anga azœ á kœyindœrœ nœ endje gegerœ nene yé œ katœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á za yanga ko fœ azœ dœ tœ azœ.
15.2: Kaka uzu dœ uzu ugurutœ azœ para awa ndœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á za yanga fœ mashenga mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ nœ ye. Lœ awanœ ataa, œ tɨ kane ye yé œ mbœrœ adœke kœyindœrœ nœ ye gerœ.
15.3: Gbambanœ nene, Kristu mbœmbœrœ lima kolœ œrœ á za yanga fœ she dœ tœ ye nene. Ɓata endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Kœgu osho á endje gu lima ɓœ, yo ga pa mœ.»
15.4: O'o kɔ á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba, endje sú mbœrœ kœyisœrœ fœ azœ. Gbambanœ nene, œ tɨ kane azœ adœke a sœ dœ ugu lɔsu, dœ kœru lɔsu yé á kœwuta dœ kœko lɔsu azœ ga tœ Ndjaba.
15.5: Kaka Ndjaba á tshe za ugu lɔsu œdœ pe kœto gbɔgbɔ mbœrœ adœke 'e sœ dœ gbetshelœ bale ɓata á Yisu Kristu yisœ nœ fœ azœ.
15.6: Atamœ dœ lɔsu bale œdœ ama bale, 'e donga Ndjaba á tshe dœ́ Aba Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu. 'E yindœtœ 'e
15.7: Atamœ 'e za osho kœsœ ugurutœ 'e dœ anga 'e ɓata á Kristu za osho kœsœ fœ 'e mbœrœ mokɔ nœ Ndjaba.
15.8: Mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e dœ adjapu adœke, Kristu te lima ayi akwa nœ Ayuda liaka o'o á Ndjaba pa lima tœnœ utshunœ fœ aata endje. Tshe ma adœke Ndjaba yayapa o'o ama ye nene.
15.9: Tshe na ndje adœke angbɨ azu donga ndje Ndjaba mbœrœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ɓata á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa mœ donga ɓœ ugurutœ angbɨ azu yé œ ɓi itshi fœ ɓœ.»
15.10: Endje su ndje adœke: «'E dœ angbɨ azu, 'e sœ dœ yanga awa bale dœ azu á Ndjaba ke endje!»
15.11: Endje kpa su ndje lima adœke: «'E dœ angbɨ azu, 'e donga Gbozu, 'e ɓi itshi fœ she, 'e dœ́ azu para kɔkɔ!»
15.12: Isaya pa ndje lima adœke: «Anga ata Yese œ wuta, tshe sœ gbozu tshapa angbɨ azu, endje ko lɔsu endje ga pa ye.»
15.13: Kaka adœke Ndjaba á tshe mbœrœ adœke azu za lɔsu endje ga pa ye, mbœrœ adœke lɔsu 'e su dœ yanga œdœ kœsœ gee, mbœrœ kœyindœrœ nœ 'e ga ndœ ye. Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ za gbɔgbɔ fœ 'e adœke 'e za lɔsu 'e djigi fœ Ndjaba. Polo, ayi akwa nœ Kristu
15.14: Aaya mœ, mœ wusœ nœ adœke 'e dœ azu nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu. 'E wu ndje sœ œrœ kɔ á sœ adœke 'e wusœ nœ, yé 'e li kœmɨ upu ugurutœ 'e dœ tœ 'e.
15.15: Yé mœ su anga o'o ala mbetinœ asœke ngbewo fœ 'e adœke 'e kpa gbe dœ o'o á endje yi lima sœ nœ fœ 'e kane. Mœ su œneke kolœ mbœrœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu á Ndjaba za fœ mœ,
15.16: adœke mœ te ayi akwa nœ Yisu Kristu mbœrœ angbɨ azu. Œshe dá za akwa nœ kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Ndjaba tœ nganga Ndjaba adœke angbɨ azu wuta ɔtshɔ makabo á wuta yerœ lœ awa nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ adœke œ ga tœ ala Ndjaba.
15.17: Lœ kœngbɔtœ mœ dœ Kristu, mœ sœ kœdu okoro mœ tœ akwanœ á mœ sœ kœmbœrœ fœ Ndjaba.
15.18: Atamœ œdœ mœ kœyindœ kœpa o'o tœ anga œrœ, mœ pa kolœ tœ œrœ á Kristu mbœrœ lœ awa nœ mœ adœke angbɨ azu wuta kœdji Ndjaba. Tshe mbœrœ lœ awa nœ o'o œdœ akwa,
15.19: dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ ambárá afá, dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ɨshirɨ. Ataa, kœto lœ Yerusaleme œrrr ga lœ ogo Iliri, mœ mɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Kristu tœ osho kɔ.
15.20: Kashe mœ yi lima ndœ kœmɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'onœ kotœ osho á azu djidji damba ɨ'ɨrɨ Kristu nene. Mœ mbœrœ atamœ mbœrœ á mœ yiyindœ kœsœ ɓata uzu á tshe mɔ anda nœ ye ga pa kiti anda á yanganœ mɔ nene.
15.21: Ataa, mœ gbe dœ œneke á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Azu neke á endje yiyisœ œrœ fœ endje nene tœ upu nœ ye, endje wu she. Endjeneke á endje djidji lima o'o nene tœ upu nœ ye, endje dji.» Polo gbe kœna ga lœ Roma
15.22: Œtœnœ kœdœ œrœ á kundœ mœ awa ndjoro tœ kœna ga ndœ 'e.
15.23: Yé ngɔngɔ asœ akwa nœ mœ lœ ogo ɓa ke ka ye. Yé ungu ndjoro ro, mœ sœ dœ ogo kœna ga ndœ 'e,
15.24: mœ gbe adœke ɔlɔ á mœ za awa kœro ga lœ Espane dá mœ ro tɔ tshandœ 'e yé mœ gbe kœgbɔ kœtɨ kane nœ 'e mbœrœ ananœ asœmœ. Yé œtœnœ manda yanga nœ kœwutœ azœ dœ 'e.
15.25: Kashe ngɔngɔ asœ, mœ sœ kœro damba ga lœ Yerusaleme mbœrœ kœtɨ kane ayerœ azu nœ Ndjaba:
15.26: gbambanœ nene, aaya azœ lœ Masedwane œdœ endjeneke lœ Akayi gbe lima ndœ kœrɔ makabo mbœrœ azu nœ Ndjaba ɓa lœ Yerusaleme á endje sœ lœ oyo.
15.27: Endje dœ tœ endje yi lima ndœ kœmbœrœ ataa. Kashe dœ adjapu, endje sœ dœ kuɗa nœ Ayuda. Gbambanœ nene, akristu Ayuda kuru lima tshelœ ɔtshɔrœ nœ ɨshirɨ nœ endje dœ endjeneke á endje dœ́dœ́ Ayuda nene. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, endje tɨ ndje kane Ayuda dœ œrœ á dœ́dœ́ œnœ ɨshirɨ nene, á endje sœ dœ oyonœ.
15.28: Lɔkɔ á mœ kœko œrœnœ fœ endje dá akwanœ ka ye, yé mœ tara ga lœ Espane dœ kœro tɔ tshandœ 'e.
15.29: Yé mœ wusœ nœ adœke ɔlɔ á mœ wuta ga ndœ 'e, mœ na dœ ɔtshɔrœ nœ Kristu ndjoro fœ 'e.
15.30: Kashe aaya, 'e wu œneke á mœ sœ kœ'eshondœ nœ lœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu œdœ lœ kœyindœsho á Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ œ za adœke 'e nga koshe awa bale dœ mœ tœ kœza avwala fœ Ndjaba tœ upu nœ mœ.
15.31: 'E za avwala adœke Ayuda á endje vwaratœ endje tœ Kristu mbœmbœrœ ekperœ ga tœ mœ nene yé ayindœ Yisu lœ Yerusaleme yindœ kœtɨ kane oshonœ á mœ sœ kœna dœ tœnœ fœ endje dœ ɔtshɔnœ.
15.32: Atamœ œdœ Ndjaba kœyindœ nœ, mœ wuta ɓa ndœ 'e dœ egerœ yanga ndœ kœyatœ mœ teasho ugurutœ 'e.
15.33: Kaka adœke Ndjaba á tshe za kœsœ gee fœ azu sœ dœ 'e para kɔkɔ! Ame.

16.1: Mœ yindœ kœyisœ Foebe á tshe dœ yingɔ azœ lœ kœyindœrœ, á tshe sœ kœmbœrœ akwa lœ Ikrizia ɓa lakpɨ Sakre fœ 'e adœke 'e wusœ ye.
16.2: 'E za osho kœsœ fœ she dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu liaka œneke á ayerœ azu œ mbœrœ. 'E tɨ kane ye lœ œrœ kɔ á tshe sœ dœ ogonœ ɓa ndœ 'e. Gbambanœ nene, tshe tɨ kane azu waa œdœ pe ndje mœ.
16.3: 'E bala Prisika œdœ Akilase á endje dœ anga mœ lœ akwa nœ Yisu Kristu.
16.4: Œ sœpe lima teasho adœke endje tshu mbœrœ kœshe mœ, yé œ dœ́dœ́ kolœ mœ dá za mershe fœ endje nene kashe Ikrizia kɔ lœ tshapashɔ nœ angbɨ azu gi ndje mershe fœ endje.
16.5: 'E za abala nœ mœ fœ Ikrizia á sœ kœngbɔɓatœ ye ɓa lœ anda nœ endje. 'E za ndje abala fœ yanga mœ dœ Epayinete á tshe kœdœ ali uzu kœyindœ Kristu ɓa lœ ogo Azi.
16.6: 'E za abala fœ Mareya á tshe za lima tœ ye tɨ djigi mbœrœ 'e asœmœ.
16.7: 'E za abala fœ Andronikuse œdœ Juniyase á endje kœdœ ayo mœ œdœ anga mœ á a li lima kánga dœ endje awa bale. Endje wuta azu nœ Kristu utshu mœ, yé endje dœ́ aayi avwa á œsœ endje lɨ.
16.8: 'E za abala fœ Apliyatuse á mœ yindœ ye waa lœ Gbozu.
16.9: 'E za abala fœ Urbe á tshe kœdœ yanga azœ lœ ma akwa nœ Kristu, œdœ pe Stakisi á mœ yindœ ye waa.
16.10: 'E za abala fœ Apelese á tshe má lima tœ ye adœke œne yindœ Kristu waa. 'E za abala fœ azu kɔ lœ anda nœ Aristobile.
16.11: 'E za abala fœ Erodiyone, á tshe kœdœ uzu lœ bɨngɨ nœ mœ. 'E za abala fœ azu kɔ lœ anda nœ Narsise á endje sœ lœ Gbozu.
16.12: 'E za abala fœ Trifene œdœ Trifose. Endje kœdœ ayashe á endje zatœ endje ga tœ akwa nœ Gbozu, œdœ Pereside á tshe mbœrœ akwa waa mbœrœ she.
16.13: 'E za abala fœ Rufusi á Gbozu ke she, œ bala pe ayinœ á tshe dœ ndje ayi mœ.
16.14: 'E za abala fœ Asikrite, Flegɔne, Ermese, Patrobase, Ermase œdœ pe aaya á endje sœ awa bale dœ endje.
16.15: 'E za abala fœ Filologe, dœ Juliyuse, Nere dœ yingɔnœ, Olipase œdœ ndje ayerœ azu kɔ á endje sœ awa bale dœ endje.
16.16: 'E za œyerœ abala ugurutœ 'e. Azu Ikrizia nœ Kristu para kɔkɔ vwa abala nœ endje fœ 'e.
16.17: Aaya, mœ pa fœ 'e adœke, ala 'e gbɔ tœ azu á endje œ kurutshelœ azu yé á ndɨ kœyindœrœ nœ anga endje. Endje sœ kœvwaratœ endje tœ kœyisœrœ á endje gbɔ lima utshunœ; 'e kpa awa endje.
16.18: Gbambanœ nene mara azu atamœ, sœsœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ Kristu nene, kashe endje sœ kœgbe kolœ dœ uvu endje. Endje sœ kœndɨ tshelœ ɔkɔrɔ azu á endje wuwusœ œrœ nene dœ o'o nœ wala.
16.19: Azu para kɔkɔ wusœ mara á 'e sœ tœ kœdji Gbozu yé mœ sœ dœ yanga mbœrœ 'e, kashe mœ yindœ nœ adœke 'e sœ dœ kœwusœtœ á kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ, yé œ sœsœ dœ uburu nene á kœkpa awa ekperœ.
16.20: Œ sœpe teasho adœke Ndjaba á tshe za kœsœ gee fœ azu zuru tshelœ Satana ga tshada 'e. Kaka adœke ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu sœ dœ 'e.
16.21: Timote á tshe kœdœ yanga mœ lœ akwa nœ Gbozu dœ Lukiyuse, dœ Jasone, dœ Sosipatrose á endje kɔ kœdœ azu bɨngɨ nœ mœ vwa abala fœ 'e.
16.22: Œmœ Tertiyuse, á mœ su o'o ama Polo fœ 'e asœke, mœ za abala ndje fœ 'e lœ Gbozu.
16.23: Gayushi á mœ lo lœ anda nœ ye œdœ aayi kœyindœrœnœ á endje ngbɔɓatœ endje ɓa ndœ ye bala 'e. Eraste ayi kœgbɔndœ ngendja lakpɨ asœke, dœ aya azœ dœ Kwartuse vwa abala fœ 'e. [
16.24: Kaka adœke ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu sœ dœ 'e kɔ! Ame .] A donga Ndjaba
16.25: A donga Ndjaba mbœrœ á tshe sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ kœmbœrœ adœke a gerœ lœ kœyindœrœ nœ azœ liaka Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Yisu Kristu á mœ mɨ lima ndœ nœ. Ɔtshɔ O'onœ kœdœ avwanœ á Ndjaba za ɓalima yiwa tœnœ katshatsha.
16.26: Kashe ngɔngɔ asœke, œneke á za lima tœ ye yiwa tœnœ, endje va ɔtɔnœ ngbɨ lœ awa nœ mbeti nœ aayi kœgbara o'o liaka o'o ama Ndjaba á tshe sœ waa dœ waa; tshe mbœrœ adœke angbɨ azu para kɔkɔ wusœ nœ á kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye yé œ lɨsœ ye.
16.27: Kaka endje donga Ndjaba á tshe dœ́ Uzu kœwusœtœ tshebale lœ Yisu Kristu waa dœ waa! Ame.

1.1: Œmœ Polo, Ndjaba e mœ lindœ gbetshelœ nœ ye adœke mœ te ayi avwa nœ Yisu Kristu. Œmœ œdœ aya mœ dœ Sostene,
1.2: 'a su mbeti asœke fœ 'e dœ́ azu Ikrizia nœ Ndjaba ɓa lœ Koriti. Ndjaba ke 'e adœke 'e dœ adja azu nœ œne yé 'e wuta ayerœ azu lœ kœngbɔtœ 'e bale dœ Yisu Kristu, 'e dœ azu nœ ye awa bale dœ endjeneke á endje sœ kœlɨsœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu. Œshe kœdœ Gbozu nœ endje œdœ œnœ azœ.
1.3: Kaka Aba azœ dœ Ndjaba œdœ Gbozu Yisu Kristu ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu ga tœ 'e, yé œ za kœsœ gee fœ 'e. Polo gi mershe fœ Ndjaba tœ upu nœ azu Koriti
1.4: Mœ sœ kœgi mershe fœ Ndjaba ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ tœ upu nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu á tshe ma fœ 'e lœ awa nœ Yisu Kristu.
1.5: Gbambanœ nene, lœ kœngbɔtœ 'e dœ Kristu, Ndjaba to kœtorœ kɔ fœ 'e, œnœ o'o œdœ pe œnœ kœwusœrœ nœ Ndjaba.
1.6: Œneke kœdœ kœmarœ tœ upu nœ Yisu Kristu á to gbɔgbɔ ga lœ kœyindœrœ nœ 'e.
1.7: Ataa, e'e á 'e sœ kœkate lɔkɔ á Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu œ kwatœ ye, 'e sœ kœgbɔ kœtorœ nœ Ndjaba.
1.8: Ndjaba œ mbœrœ ndje bala adœke 'e shi gbɨ œrrr ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ adœke, lɔkɔ kœkwa Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu, á endje kœgbagbagbara 'e tœ ekperœ bale nene.
1.9: Ndjaba sœ kœmbœrœtœ ye lindœ œneke á tshe pa, œshe dá e 'e adœke 'e ngbɔtœ 'e awa bale dœ Gbolo nœ œne Yisu Kristu, á tshe dœ Gbozu nœ azœ. Kœkurutshelœtœsho nœ azu lœ Ikrizia
1.10: Kashe alaya, mœ sœ kœkɨ fœ 'e dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu adœke: o'o ama 'e sœ bale, yé 'e kukurutshelœtœ 'e nene. 'E ngbɔtœ 'e ga tœ œsœnœ bale, œ sœ dœ lɔsu bale œdœ ndje pe dœ gbetshelœ bale.
1.11: Gbambanœ nene, aaya mœ, azu tshelœ bɨngɨ nœ Kolowe pandœ nœ fœ mœ adœke 'e kurutshelœtœ 'e ye.
1.12: Œneke á mœ yindœ kœpa tœnœ fœ 'e dœke: lœ ugurutœ 'e, uzu dœ uzu sœ kœpa adœke: «Œmœ, mœ kœdœ uzu nœ Polo»; anga: «Œmœ kœdœ uzu nœ Apolo»; anga kpa sœ kœpa adœke: «Œmœ kœdœ uzu nœ Petro»; yeka á anga pa adœke: «Œmœ kœdœ uzu nœ Kristu.»
1.13: 'E sœ kœgbe adœke endje lii kœkurutshelœ Kristu ye a? Polo dá tshu lima pa kurushi mbœrœ 'e a? Yé ataa, endje za batisimu fœ 'e dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Polo a?
1.14: Mœ gi mershe fœ Ndjaba mbœrœ á mœ zaza batisimu fœ uzu bale ugurutœ 'e nene, kashe mœ za kolœnœ fœ Krispuse dœ Gayushi.
1.15: Ataa, uzu bale lili kœpa adœke endje za batisimu fœ 'e dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ mœ nene.
1.16: Ha! Œ sœ adjapu adœke mœ za ndje batisimu fœ azu tshelœ bɨngɨ nœ Esetefanase, kashe mœ kpa wuwusœ anga uzu á mœ za fœ she nene.
1.17: Gbambanœ nene, Yisu Kristu vwavwa lima mœ ndœ kœza batisimu fœ azu nene, kashe tshe vwa mœ mbœrœ kœmɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o. Mœ yiyisœ nœ dœ kœwusœtœ nœ azu nene, mbœrœ á gbɔgbɔ kuzu nœ Kristu pa kurushi kœsœsœ gbambanœ tœ ala azu nene. Yisu Kristu, gbɔgbɔ œdœ kœwusœtœ nœ Ndjaba
1.18: Ɓa tœ azu á endje sœ lœ djingili, kœpandœ kuzu Yisu pa kurushi kœdœ agba o'o, kashe ɓa tœ azœ á a sœ kœshe mbœrœ tœnœ, tœnœ kœdœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ndjaba.
1.19: Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ɓala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Mœ ndɨtshelœ kœwusœtœ nœ azu á endje wusœtœ endje, yé œ fa kœwusœrœ nœ azu á endje wusœ œrœ, gbambanœ.»
1.20: Azu á endje wusœtœ endje sœ kpœta a? Agbangba kœwusœ awa akwa sœ kpœta a? Azu nœ tshakpesheke á endje wusœ kœtondœ ádá o'o sœ kpœta a? Ndjaba mama adœke kœwusœtœ nœ azu tshapashɔ kœdœ agba o'o nene a?
1.21: Yé ataa, azu tshapashɔ dœ kœwusœtœ nœ endje kɔ, lili lima kœwusœ Ndjaba lœ kœwusœtœ nœ ye nene. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa á Ndjaba wa o'o adœke œne she azu á endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ tœ upu nœ kuzu Yisu pa kurushi lœ awa nœ kœyisœrœ á sœ ɓata agba œrœ asœmœ.
1.22: Ayuda sœ kœyu osho tœ ambárá, yé Agreke sœ œnœ endje kœpara kœwusœtœ.
1.23: Kashe tœ a'a nœ 'a, 'a sœ kœmɨndœ O'o kuzu Masiya pa kurushi. Œtœnœ kœdœ O'o á sœ kœɓi tshelœ ada Ayuda, yé á dœ agba o'o ɓa tœ ala angbɨ azu.
1.24: Kashe tœ endjeneke á Ndjaba e endje, Ayuda too Agreke, Masiya kœdœ gbɔgbɔ œdœ kœwusœtœ nœ Ndjaba.
1.25: Gbambanœ nene, agba o'o nœ Ndjaba rosœ kœwusœtœ nœ azu ye, yé kœmɔ nœ Ndjaba ro ndje gbɔgbɔ nœ azu ye.
1.26: Alaya mœ, 'e gbe dœ mara á 'e sœ lima dœ tœnœ lɔkɔ á Ndjaba e 'e kane: azu nœ kœwusœtœ tœ ala azu ngbangba ugurutœ 'e nene, azu á endje sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ waa ngbangba nene, endjeneke á endje sœ lœ ɔtshɔ bɨngɨ ngbangba ndje nene.
1.27: Kashe œneke á dœ agba o'o ɓa pa tshapashɔ, Ndjaba ke mbœrœ kœza tshula fœ endjeneke á endje sœ dœ kœwusœtœ, tshe ke ɔmɔ œrœ mbœrœ kœza tshula fœ œneke á sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ.
1.28: Œneke á sœ ɓa pa tshapashɔ, á gugu dœ ádá bale nene yé á azu yiyi ndje ndœ nœ nene, Ndjaba ke mbœrœ kœndɨ œneke á azu sœ kœgbe adœke œ sœ dœ ádá waa,
1.29: mbœrœ adœke anga uzu bale pa ɔshɔ asœke lili kœdu okoro ye ɓa utshu Ndjaba nene.
1.30: Lœ awa nœ Ndjaba dá 'e ngbɔɓatœ 'e ga tœnœ dœ Yisu Kristu á tshe dœ́ kœwusœtœ nœ azœ á to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba, yé tshe sœ kœmbœrœ adœke á sœ ndjii, á sœ yerœ dœ pe kœwuta lœ ekperœ.
1.31: Dœ tœnœ ataa, endje sú ɓala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Œdœ uzu kœyindœ kœdu okoro, tshe du okoro ye tœ œneke á Gbozu mbœrœ.»

2.1: Aaya mœ, lɔkɔ á mœ na lima ɓa ndœ 'e ndœ kœyisœ O'o ama Ndjaba á zatœ ye yiwatœnœ fœ 'e, mœ mamatœ mœ adœke mœ wusœ kœpa o'o too mœ wusœ œrœ waa ye nene.
2.2: Gbambanœ nene, mœ wa o'o adœke adja mœ gbegbe kœwusœ anga angbɨ œrœ nene, kashe kolœ dœ Yisu Kristu, œshe á endje kuru she ga pa kurushi.
2.3: Ádá nœ ataa, mœ ka ga utshu 'e dœ kœmɔ œdœ pe dœ kœgugu dœ awa.
2.4: Mœ sœsœ lima kœyisœ œrœ dœ kœwusœtœ nœ azu tshapashɔ nene, kashe mœ sœ lima kœyisœ nœ dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ, á sœ kœma fœ azu adœke tœnœ kœdœ adjapu.
2.5: Ataa, kœyindœrœ nœ 'e sœsœ ga pa kœwusœtœ nœ azu nene, kashe œ sœ ga pa gbɔgbɔ nœ Ndjaba. Kœwusœtœ nœ Ndjaba
2.6: Andaa, 'a sœ kœyisœ kœwusœtœ fœ ayindœ Kristu á endje dœ agbozu lœ ɨshirɨ, kashe 'a yiyisœ œrœ dœ kœwusœtœ nœ azu tshapashɔ œdœ dœ kœwusœtœ nœ agbozugo tshapashɔ á sœ mbœrœ kœndɨ tœ nœ nene.
2.7: 'A sœ kœyisœ kœwusœtœ nœ Ndjaba á zatœ ye yiwa tœnœ tœ azu, kœwusœtœ neke á lili adœke azu wusœ ádánœ nene, á Ndjaba guma lima utshunœ adœke tshe mbœrœ tshapashɔ, yé á sœ mbœrœ mokɔ nœ azœ.
2.8: Anga uzu bale lœ agbozugo tshapashɔnœ asœke sœsœ dœ kœwusœtœnœ asœmœ nene. Œdœ endje kœsœ má dœ tœnœ, dá endje kuru Gbozu nœ mokɔ ga pa kurushi nene.
2.9: Kashe ɓata á endje sú ɓala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Œneke á uzu bale wuwu yé á dji dœ utu ye nene, œneke á uzu bale sœsœ dœ gbetshelœnœ nene, Ndjaba guma mbœrœ endjeneke á endje yindœ ye.»
2.10: Andaa, azœ dá Ndjaba ma œrœnœ asœmœ fœ azœ lœ awa nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ asœmœ. Gbambanœ nene, Ɨshirɨ wusœ kœtondœ œrœ kɔ dœ ádánœ, ataa œdœ gbetshelœ nœ Ndjaba.
2.11: Œɗe ugurutœ azu dá wusœ gbetshelœ nœ uzu, á kœdœ́dœ́ ɨshirɨ á sœ lœ ye nene a? Awa bale ndje, gbetshelœ nœ Ndjaba, uzu bale wuwusœ nœ nene, kolœ Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba dœ tœ ye dá wusœ nœ.
2.12: Tœ upu nœ azœ, a gbɔgbɔ ɨshirɨ ɓa ndœ azu tshapashɔ asœ nene, kashe a gbɔ Ɨshirɨ á to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba yeka á kœwusœ kœtorœ á Ndjaba to dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu ye fœ azœ.
2.13: Yé 'a sœsœ kœyisœ œrœ dœ kœwusœtœ nœ azu tshapashɔ nene, kashe 'a sœ kœyisœ nœ dœ Ɨshirɨ á Ndjaba to fœ 'a. Œtœnœ ataa á 'a sœ kœyisœ adjapu tœ upu nœ Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba fœ azu á endje lœ dœ tœnœ lœ endje.
2.14: Uzu á tshe sœ kolœ kœgbe dœ kœwusœrœ nœ ye dœ tœ ye, yiyindœ o'o neke á to ɓa ndœ Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba nene. Tshe sœ kœdji ɓata agba o'o lœ utu ye, yé tshe lili kœwusœ ádánœ nene, mbœrœ uzu œ wusœ ádánœ kolœ œdœ tshe kœsœ dœ Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba.
2.15: Uzu á tshe sœ dœ Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba, tshe sœ kœwa ngbanga kɔ ga tœ undu ye, kashe uzu bale œ wa ngbanga ga tœ ye nene.
2.16: Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ɓala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Uzu ɗe dá wusœ gbetshelœ nœ Gbozu a? Uzu ɗe dá li kœmɨ upu fœ she a?» Kashe tœ azœ, a lii kœwusœ ádánœ mbœrœ á a sœ dœ gbetshelœ nœ Kristu.

3.1: Tœ upu nœ mœ, aaya mœ, lɔkɔ á mœ sœ lima awa bale dœ 'e, mœ papa o'o fœ 'e ɓata á mœ pa fœ azu á endje sœ dœ Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba nene, kashe mœ pa o'o fœ 'e kolœ ɓata fœ azu nœ tshapashɔ, ɓata fœ aaya agbolo lœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Kristu.
3.2: Ungu ɔngɔ dá mœ to fœ 'e, kashe œ dœ́dœ́ adja kœzɨrœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, 'e li má kœru lɔsu 'e tœnœ nene. Ataa ngɔngɔnœ asœke, 'e li má ndje nene,
3.3: mbœrœ 'e sœpe kœmbœrœtœ 'e ɓata mara œrœ nœ azu nœ tshapashɔ. 'E sœ kœmbœrœ úkú œdœ kœbœrœtœ 'e ugurutœ 'e. Atamœ sœmœ 'e dœ́dœ́ azu nœ tshapashɔ asœke yé œ sœ kœmbœrœ mara œrœ nœ azu kɔ nene a?
3.4: Dœ lɔkɔ á anga yanga 'e bale kœpa ngbɨ adœke: «Œmœ kœdœ uzu nœ Polo», yé anga kpa pa adœke: «Œmœ kœdœ uzu nœ Apolo», 'e mbœmbœrœtœ 'e ɓata azu nœ tshapashɔ kɔ nene dœ mœ a?
3.5: Apolo kœdœ ɗe? Yé á Polo kœdœ ndje ɗe? Endje kɔ kœdœ aayi akwa nœ Ndjaba á endje gi 'e ga lœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Kristu. Kashe lœ ugurutœ endje, uzu dœ uzu sœ dœ mara kœmbœrœ akwa nœ ye á Gbozu to fœ she.
3.6: Œmœ, mœ lu ngwarœ yé Apolo dá su ungu ga panœ. Kashe Ndjaba dá mbœrœ adœke ngwarœnœ gboro.
3.7: Ataa, œdœ ayi kœlu ngwarœ œdœ ayi kœsu ungu ga panœ, endje gugu dœ ádá bale nene. Kashe kolœ Ndjaba dá sœ dœ ádá, œshe á tshe mbœrœ adœke ngwarœnœ gboro asœmœ.
3.8: Tsheneke á tshe lu ngwarœ dœ tsheneke á tshe su ungu ga panœ, endje sœ awa bale yé uzu dœ uzu œ gbɔ œrœ tshangba akwa nœ ye kœli dœ mara akwa nœ ye dœ tœ ye.
3.9: Gbambanœ nene, a'a, 'a sœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ Ndjaba awa bale, yé e'e kœdœ kɨndɨ nœ Ndjaba. E'e ndje kœdœ anda nœ Ndjaba.
3.10: Mœ mbœrœ akwa ɓata ɔtshɔ ayi kœmɔ anda, œ tɔ kiti anda lindœ kœtorœ á Ndjaba to fœ mœ, yé anga uzu dá mɔ udunœ ga panœ. Kashe ala uzu dœ uzu gbɔ tœ mara á tshe sœ kœmɔ dœ andanœ.
3.11: Gbambanœ nene, kiti andanœ sœ zœ, œtœnœ kœdœ Yisu Kristu. Uzu bale kpa lili kœmɔ anga angbɨ kiti anda nene.
3.12: Ataa anga endje kœmɔ udu andanœ ga pa kitinœ dœ ɔrœ, dœ kowo, dœ badja á amanœ gbɔ waa, dœ ɔyɔ, dœ muru too dœ ebe gbaa,
3.13: akwa nœ uzu dœ uzu œ matœ ye ngbɨ ɔlɔ kœwa ngbanga. Gbambanœ nene, dœ ɔlɔnœ asœmœ, owo œ tshi yé akwa nœ uzu dœ uzu œ matœ ye ngbɨ.
3.14: Tsheneke á akwa nœ ye kœjuju nene, tshe gbɔ œrœ tshangbanœ ye.
3.15: Tsheneke á akwa nœ ye kœju, tshe gbɔ œrœ tshangbanœ bale nene, œshe kutu ye tshe she ye, kashe œ sœ ɓata tshe ro tɔ la owo.
3.16: 'E wusœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke e'e kœdœ Tepelo nœ Ndjaba, yé Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba sœ lœ 'e.
3.17: Œdœ uzu kœndɨ tshelœ Tepelo nœ Ndjaba, Ndjaba œ ndɨ ndje tshelœ ye. Gbambanœ nene, Tepelo nœ Ndjaba sœ yerœ, yé e'e dá dœ Tepelonœ asœmœ.
3.18: Uzu bale fafaratœ ye nene. Œdœ anga uzu ugurutœ 'e bale kœsœ kœgbe adœke œne sœ dœ kœwusœtœ waa dœ mara nœ tshapashɔ asœ, iyi za she mbœrœ adœke tshe sœ adja dœ kœwusœtœ.
3.19: Gbambanœ nene, kœwusœtœ dœ mara nœ tshapashɔ asœke kœdœ agba o'o tœ ala Ndjaba. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, endje sú ɓala buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Ndjaba sœ kœgbɔ aayi kœwusœtœ lœ afara nœ endje dœ tœ endje.»
3.20: Buku nœ kpa sœ kœpa adœke: «Gbozu wusœ gbetshelœ nœ ayi kœwusœtœ ye, tshe wusœ nœ adœke œ gugu dœ ádá bale nene.»
3.21: Ataa, uzu bale dudu okoro ye ga pa azu nene, mbœrœ œrœ kɔ kœdœ œnœ 'e:
3.22: Œdœ Polo, œdœ Apolo too Petro, œdœ tshapashɔ, œdœ soro, œdœ kuzu, œdœ œrœ á sœ ngɔngɔ asœke, œdœ œrœ á sœ bala mbatsha, kɔkɔ kœdœ œnœ 'e.
3.23: Kashe e'e nœ 'e kœdœ azu nœ Kristu, yé Kristu kœdœ uzu nœ Ndjaba.

4.1: Ataa, œ li adœke 'e wu 'a ɓata aayi akwa nœ Kristu œdœ ɓata endje á endje sœ mbœrœ kœgbɔndœ adja o'o nœ Ndjaba á zatœ ye yiwa tœnœ.
4.2: Andaa, œrœ kɔ á endje sœ kœyɔndœ nœ ɓa ndœ aayi kœgbɔndœrœ, kœdœ kœmbœrœtœ osho lindœ nœ.
4.3: Tœ œmœ, œdœ e'e too anga azu kœwa ngbanga pa mœ, œ mbœrœ œrœ tœ mœ nene. Gapa nœ, mœ wa ngbanga nœ mœ dœ tœ mœ nene.
4.4: Dœ adjapu, gbetshelœ nœ mœ sœsœ kœgbagbara mœ tœ œrœ bale nene, kashe œ dœ́dœ́ œtœnœ dá sœ kœma adœke mœ sœ ndjii nene. Tsheneke á tshe wa ngbanga nœ mœ kœdœ Gbozu.
4.5: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'e wawa ngbanga ga pa uzu utshu nœ lɔkɔ kœwa ngbanga nene. 'E kate adœke Gbozu na yeka. Œshe dá ma œneke kɔ á zatœ endje yiwa tœnœ œdœ gbetshelœ á sœ ɓa lɔsu azu ngbɨ ga ushu. Dœ tœnœ ataa, uzu dœ uzu œ gbɔ kœdonga osho nœ Ndjaba á kwatœ endje ga ndœ ye.
4.6: Alaya mœ, mœ pa o'onœ asœmœ tœ upu nœ mœ œdœ tœ upu nœ Apolo mbœrœ adœke œ yisœ œrœ fœ 'e. Mœ yindœ nœ adœke lœ awa nœ kœmarœ nœ 'a, 'e wusœ ádá awa o'onœ asœ: «Œ li adœke 'e ka kpœpa mapaka neke á endje sú», yé 'e dudu okoro 'e kolœ pa uzu bale nene, yé œ yiangba anga nene.
4.7: Gbambanœ nene, ɓœ ropa uzu ɗe? Œ dœ́dœ́ Ndjaba dá to œrœ á ɓœ sœ dœ tœnœ fœ ɓœ nene a? Yé á kœdœ Ndjaba dá to fœ ɓœ, mbœrœ gaɗe á ɓœ sœ kœdu okoro zœ ɓata ɓœ gbɔgbɔ ɓa ndœ ye nene a?
4.8: E'e, 'e gbɔ œnœ 'e œrœ kɔ á 'e gbe dœ tœnœ ye! 'E te œnœ 'e aayi kœgbɔrœ ye! Ataa 'a dœ́dœ́ agbozugo nene, 'e te œnœ 'e agbozugo ye! Adjapu dœ mœ a? 'A yindœ nœ adœke 'e dœ adja agbozugo mbœrœ á ɨ'ɨrɨ 'a kœto ndje dœ 'e awa bale.
4.9: Gbambanœ nene, mœ sœ kœgbe adœke Ndjaba ko 'a dœ aayi avwa tɔ ɓa tœ ndɔngɔlɔ azu kɔ: 'a sœ ɓata azu á endje wa agbɔ ngbanga nœ kuzu ga tœ endje, endje fa 'a tœ œrœ mɔlɔ nœ tshapashɔ, ɓa tœ ala aandjelu œdœ ɓa tœ ala azu kɔ.
4.10: Anga azu sœ kœwu 'a tœ aayi iyi mangba Kristu, kashe e'e, 'e sœ kœzatœ 'e ɓata aayi kœwusœtœ lœ kœngbɔtœ 'e bale dœ Kristu. Anga azu sœ kœwu adœke 'a mɔɔmɔ, kashe e'e, 'e sœ kœzatœ 'e tœ aayi gbɔgbɔ. Endje sœ kœlɨsœ 'e, kashe œ sœ kœwu 'a tœ ayi odo.
4.11: Lœ ada ɔlɔnœ asœ, 'a sœ kœwu oyo dœ ogo kœzɨrœ œdœ dœ ogo ungu, 'a gugu dœ lœba nene, endje sœ kœɓi 'a, 'a na yame yame djezœ;
4.12: 'a sœ kœwu djofele dœ akwa dœ kane 'a yeka á gbɔ kœzɨrœ. Œdœ endje kœgu 'a, 'a sœ kœgi ɔtshɔ o'o. Lɔkɔ á endje kœsœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ 'a, 'a sœ kœru lɔsu 'a.
4.13: Lɔkɔ á endje kœsœ kœpa ekpe o'o nœ 'a, 'a sœ kœgi o'o dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu. Ngɔngɔ asœke, endje kpa wu 'a ɓata tshapandikɔ nœ tshapashɔ, ɓata uyu œrœ nœ tshapashɔ.
4.14: Mœ sœsœ kœsu mbeti asœmœ mbœrœ kœza tshula fœ 'e nene, kashe mœ su mbœrœ kœgbota tshelœ utu 'e ɓata agbolo nœ mœ á mœ yindœ endje waa.
4.15: Gbambanœ nene, ataa œdœ 'e kœsœ dœ aayi kœyisœ o'o nœ Kristu kutu ndjokpa gbaa, 'e sœ kolœ dœ aba tshebabale. Œmœ dá zu 'e lœ Yisu Kristu lœ awa nœ kœyisœ Ɔtshɔ O'o fœ 'e.
4.16: Mœ sœ kœkɨ fœ 'e adœke 'e mbœrœtœ 'e lindœ mara kœmbœrœtœ nœ mœ.
4.17: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa dá mœ vwa Timote fœ 'e, gbolo nœ mœ á mœ yindœ ye waa yé á tshe sœ kœzatœ ye fœ Gbozu. Tshe kpa yi bala sœ awa akwa nœ soro nœ mœ ga ndœ Kristu fœ 'e ɓata á mœ sœ kœyisœ nœ tœ osho kɔ œdœ pe djelœ Ikrizia kɔ.
4.18: Andaa, anga azu ugurutœ 'e gbe adœke mœ na nene, yé mbœrœ tœnœ ataa á endje sœ kœdu okoro endje.
4.19: Kashe œdœ Gbozu kœyindœ nœ, mœ na lœ ondonœ asœke kœwu 'e zœ. Dœ tœnœ ataa, mœ para adœke mœ tondœ kolœ o'o nœ aayi kœdu okoro endje asœmœ nene, kashe mœ para ndje awa kœwu mara akwa á endje sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ.
4.20: Gbambanœ nene, Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba dœ́dœ́ o'o nœ tshelœ ama nene, kashe tœnœ kœdœ kœmbœrœ akwa dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ndjaba.
4.21: Œrœ gaɗe dá 'e gbe dœ tœnœ a? 'E yindœ nœ adœke mœ na ga ndœ 'e dœ ndjapa too dœ ɔmɔ lɔsu a?

5.1: Azu sœ kœpa tœ osho kɔ adœke anga o'o bale tœ upu nœ angba budu, angba budu neke á endje lili kœgbɔ tœnœ ɓa ndœ angbɨ azu nene: anga yanga 'e bale sœ kœlo dœ awo abanœ.
5.2: Yé 'e sœ kœdu okoro 'e tɔpanœ kpuru! Œ li má adœke 'e sœ dœ oyo tœ lɔsu 'e yé œ gɔrɔ má ayi kœmbœrœ œrœnœ asœmœ ugurutœ 'e.
5.3: Tœ œmœ nœ mœ, mœ gugu ugurutœ 'e dœ undu mœ nene kashe mœ sœ dœ 'e ngɔngɔnœ asœke bale lœ ɨshirɨ, yé mœ wa ngbanga nœ uzu á tshe mbœrœ mara œrœnœ asœmœ ɓata mœ sœ má lima tœ œsœnœ zœ:
5.4: lɔndɔ á 'e kœngbɔtœ 'e ga tœnœ yé á mœ sœ ugurutœ 'e lœ ɨshirɨ, 'e wa ngbanganœ asœmœ lœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu,
5.5: dœ mara adœke 'e za uzu ataa fœ Satana mbœrœ adœke undu ye ndɨ, yeka á ɨshirɨ ye kœshe dœ lɔkɔ á Gbozu œ wa dœ ngbanga.
5.6: Ádá nœ kœdu okoro 'e gugu nene. 'E wuwusœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke ɔyɔ kœsuku mapa kœsœ teasho, œ suku kœdjanga mapa djigi nene a?
5.7: 'E gitœ 'e lœ ongboro ɔyɔ kœsuku mapa yé œ te tafo mapa, mbœrœ ɔyɔ kœsuku mapa gugu lœ 'e nene. Gbambanœ nene, Kristu á tshe dœ Aya pata Pake nœ azœ, endje za lima she tœ tokóró.
5.8: Ataa, a mbœmbœrœ angbo nœ azœ dœ mapa á suku dœ ongboro ɔyɔ kœsuku mapa too dœ ɔyɔ kœsuku mapa nœ ngbɨndɨrœ nene, kashe a mbœrœ tœnœ dœ mapa neke á gugu dœ ɔyɔ kœsuku mapa lœnœ nene, œneke á sœ yerœ œdœ lœ adjapu.
5.9: Ɓala mbeti á mœ su utshunœ, mœ su o'o fœ 'e adœke 'e sœsœ tœ œsœnœ bale dœ azu á endje sœ kœmbœrœ angba budu nene.
5.10: Mœ gbegbe lima ga pa azu kɔ pa ɔshɔ á endje sœ kœmbœrœ angba budu, á endje sœ dœ tshalɔsu, á endje dœ aayi angba too aayi kœdonga andjaba nene. Œ kœsœ má ataa, œ li má adœke 'e gi tœ 'e pa tshapashɔ asœke ye.
5.11: Mœ su ga la mbetinœ fœ 'e adœke 'e ngbɔngbɔtœ 'e dœ uzu á tshe za ɨ'ɨrɨ Kristu ga pa ye, yé á dœ ayi angba budu, aayi tshalɔsu, aayi kœdonga andjaba, aayi kœpa o'o nœ wala, amœndjondjo too aayi angba nene. Œ lili adœke 'e zɨ œrœ tœ œsœnœ dœ mara uzu ataa nene.
5.12: Yé upu nœ mœ kœdœ adœke mœ wa ngbanga nœ azu á endje sœ ɓa ushu a? Œ̃ œ̃ nene. Kashe, œ dœ́dœ́ azu nœ Kristu dá 'e li má kœwa ngbanga nœ endje nene a?
5.13: Ndjaba dá wa bala ngbanga nœ azu tshashu. 'E gɔrɔ hawo uzu ugurutœ 'e ye.

6.1: Lɔkɔ á 'e kœsœ dœ o'o ugurutœ 'e, mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e sœ kœgbe kœna kœtɔ meza ɓa ndœ ayingba Ndjaba adœke endje wa ngbanganœ, yé á tshapu kœna ga ndœ ayerœ azu a?
6.2: E wuwusœ nœ adœke azu á endje sœ yerœ œ wa bala ngbanga nœ azu tshapashɔ asœke nene a? Yé á kœsœ adœke 'e wa ngbanga nœ azu tshapashɔ, 'e li kœwa ngbanga nœ o'o á sœ dœ ádá teasho nene a?
6.3: 'E wuwusœ nœ adœke a wa bala ngbanga nœ aandjelu nene a, yeka á kœdœ tœ o'o nœ soro asœ a?
6.4: Andaa, lɔkɔ á 'e kœsœ dœ mara ngbanga ataa, 'e sœ kœpandœ nœ fœ angbɨ azu á endje gugu lœ Ikrizia nene adœke endje wa o'onœ a?
6.5: Mœ sœ kœpa tœnœ mbœrœ kœza tshula fœ 'e. Ataa, anga uzu kœwusœrœ á tshe li kœwa ngbanga ugurutœ aayazu gugu ugurutœ 'e nene a?
6.6: Kashe, œ li adja adœke anga yazu bale pa ngbanga dœ ayanœ ɓa utshu ayingba Ndjaba ye a?
6.7: Œ sœ adjapu adœke kœpa ngbanga ugurutœ 'e sœ kœma adœke 'e yo ye. Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e wuwusœ kœru lɔsu 'e tœ œrœ á sœsœ ndjii nene, tœ œsœnœ adœke 'e pa ngbanga dœ aaya 'e a? Mbœrœ gaɗe á 'e kakatœ nœ adœke endje ko œrœ tœ 'e nene a?
6.8: Kashe e'e dá sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœsœ ndjii nene, yé á sœ kœko œrœ tœ anga azu. 'E sœ kœmbœrœ ataa ga tœ aaya 'e!
6.9: 'E wuwusœ nœ adœke azu á endje sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ á sœsœ ndjii nene œ gbɔ bala Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba nene a? Uzu fafara 'e nene! Œdœ aayi angba budu, œdœ aayi kœdonga andjaba, œdœ aayi kœpara awo azu, œdœ ayakoshe á endje sœ ɓata ayashe, œdœ ayakoshe too ayashe á endje sœ kœlo dœ anga endje,
6.10: œdœ aayi angba, œdœ aayi tshalɔsu, œdœ amœndjondjo, œdœ aayi kœpa o'o nœ wala, œdœ agbangba kœzɨ angba, uzu bale œ gbɔ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba nene.
6.11: 'E wu mara á anga anga 'e sœ lima dœ tœnœ ugurutœ 'e dœ mœ. Kashe Ndjaba nœ azœ djutɔ 'e, tshe fa 'e tœ ayerœ azu, tshe fa 'e tœ azu ndjii lœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu Yisu Kristu œdœ pe lœ awa Ɨshirɨ nœ ye. Kœdonga Gbozu dœ undu zœ
6.12: Anga azu ugurutœ 'e sœ kœpa adœke: «Endje papakata mœ tœ œrœ bale nene», kashe œ dœ́dœ́ œrœ kɔ dá sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ nene. Mœ li má kœpa adœke: «Endje papakata mœ tœ œrœ bale nene», kashe mœ yiyindœ nœ adœke mœ te kanga nœ œrœ bale nene.
6.13: 'E sœ kœpa adœke: «Rœgo sœ mbœrœ uvu, yé uvu sœ mbœrœ rœgo.» Œ sœ adjapu, kashe Ndjaba œ ndɨ tshelœ nœ kɔ bibisha ye. Kashe undu uzu sœsœ mbœrœ angba budu nene. Undu uzu sœ mbœrœ Gbozu, yé Gbozu sœ mbœrœ undu uzu.
6.14: Andaa Ndjaba á tshe she Gbozu lœ akuzu, tshe she ndje azœ bala lœ akuzu dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ ye.
6.15: 'E wuwusœ nœ adœke undu 'e kœdœ œrœ kotœ undu Yisu Kristu nene a? Mœ lii kœza œrœ kotœ undu Yisu bale adœke mœ fa tœ œrœ kotœ undu gugatɨ ye a? Adja mœ mbœrœ ataa bale nene!
6.16: 'E wuwu ndje sœ nœ adœke uzu á tshe kœngbɔtœ ye bale dœ gugatɨ, endje wuta dœ she undu bale nene a? Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ɓala buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Endje bibisha œ wuta uzu bale.»
6.17: Kashe uzu á tshe ngbɔtœ ye bale dœ Gbozu, endje ngbɔtœ endje dœ she bale lœ ɨshirɨ.
6.18: 'E kpa awa angba budu. Anga ekperœ kɔ á uzu œ mbœrœ, sœ ɓa ushu tœ undu ye. Kashe ayi angba budu sœ kœndɨ undu ye dœ tœ ye.
6.19: 'E wuwusœ nœ adœke undu 'e kœdœ Tepelo nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ dá sœ lœ 'e asœmœ nene a? Œ dœ́dœ́ Ndjaba dá to fœ 'e nene a? Yé e'e kœdœ ayengɔ undu 'e a?
6.20: Ndjaba yɔɔyɔ 'e œ yɔ. Ataa, œ li adœke 'e donga she dœ undu 'e.

7.1: Ngɔngɔ asœke, mœ yindœ kœgi o'o tœ upu á 'e yu lima mœ dœ tœnœ la mbeti nœ 'e adœke: «Œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke yakoshe lolo dœ yashe nene.»
7.2: Andaa, ndœ kœkatœ kœmbœrœ œrœ tshula kɔ, œ li dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke yakoshe bale dœ bale sœ dœ awonœ, yé yashe ndje bale dœ bale sœ dœ akɔnœ.
7.3: Œ li adœke yakoshe mbœrœ akwa tsha yakoshe nœ ye ga tœ awonœ, yé yashe ndje awa bale, tshe mbœrœ akwa tsha yashe nœ ye ga tœ akɔnœ.
7.4: Yashe lili kœmbœrœ œneke á tshe yindœ nœ ga tœ undu ye dœ tœ ye nene, undu ye sœ mbœrœ akɔnœ. Awa bale ndje, yakoshe lili kœmbœrœ œneke á tshe yindœ nœ ga tœ undu ye dœ tœ ye nene, undu ye sœ mbœrœ awonœ.
7.5: 'E kukurutshelœtœ 'e pa gbarœ olo nene, kolœnœ adœke 'e kœdjitœ 'e awa bale ndœ olo teasho mbœrœ kœza avwala yekane. Kashe manda nœ, 'e kwatœ 'e ga pa gbarœ olo 'e. Ete nene, 'e li kœru lɔsu 'e nene yé œ za awa fœ Satana adœke tshe wu lɔsu 'e.
7.6: O'onœ á mœ sœ kœpa fœ 'e asœmœ, œ dœ́dœ́ adœke mœ sœ kœshosho 'e nene, kashe tœnœ kœdœ œrœ á 'e gbe dœ tœnœ á mœ li kœyindœ nœ.
7.7: Mœ yi má ndœ nœ adœke uzu kɔ sœ tœ angara ɓata mœ; kashe Ndjaba sœ kœto kœtorœ fœ uzu dœ uzu kpi tœ œnœ yanga, œneke asœ fœ anga, œneke ɓa 'e fœ angbɨ anga.
7.8: Ataa, mœ sœ kœpa fœ aangara œdœ pe fœ ayashe koya adœke: œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke endje sœpe ataa, ɓata mœ.
7.9: Kashe œdœ endje kœlili kœru lɔsu endje nene, endje totœ endje. Gbambanœ nene, œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ kœro panœ kœtotœ endje tœ œsœnœ adœke undu ndɨ dœ ogo nœ ɔkɔ.
7.10: Tœ upu nœ endjeneke á endje totœ endje ye, mœ za awa o'o á toto ɓa ndœ mœ nene kashe á to ɓa ndœ Gbozu, fœ endje adœke: œ lili adœke yashe kurutshelœtœ ye dœ akɔnœ nene.
7.11: Œdœ tshe kœkurutshelœtœ ye dœ akɔnœ, œ li adœke tshe kpa i anga yakoshe nene, too œ li adœke tshe kpa djitœ ye dœ akɔnœ. Yé œ lili ndje adœke yakoshe gɔrɔ awonœ nene.
7.12: Tœ upu nœ anga endje, œmœ dœ tœ mœ dá sœ kœpa tœnœ kashe œ dœ́dœ́ Gbozu nene, adœke: œdœ yakoshe bale á tshe dœ yindœ Ndjaba kœto yashe á tshe dœ́dœ́ yindœ Ndjaba nene, yé á yashenœ yindœ kœsœ dœ she, tshe gɔgɔrɔ she nene.
7.13: Yé œdœ anga yashe bale á tshe dœ yindœ Ndjaba kœi ndje yakoshe á tshe dœ́dœ́ yindœ Ndjaba nene yé á yakoshenœ yindœ kœsœ dœ she, tshe vwavwaratœ ye tœ ye nene.
7.14: Gbambanœ nene, yakoshe á tshe dœ́dœ́ yindœ Ndjaba nene, tshe wuta ndoo dœ Ndjaba mbœrœ awonœ á tshe dœ yindœ Ndjaba. Awa ndje bale dœ yashe á tshe dœ́dœ́ yindœ Ndjaba nene, tshe wuta ndje ndoo dœ Ndjaba mbœrœ akɔnœ á tshe dœ yindœ Ndjaba. Œ kœsœsœ má atamœ nene, agbolo nœ 'e œ sœ má yerœ nene andaa endje sœ yerœ.
7.15: Kashe œdœ tsheneke á tshe dœ́dœ́ yindœ Ndjaba nene kœyindœ kœkurutshelœtœ ye dœ yindœ Ndjaba á endje totœ endje dœ she, endje katœ ye tshe wuta kolœnœ. Dœ mara o'o ataa, ayindœ Ndjaba á endje totœ endje, œdœ yakoshe too yashe, uzu kaka pa endje nene, mbœrœ Ndjaba e 'e adœke 'e sœ gee lœ soro 'e.
7.16: Yé œɓœ dœ yashe, dœ mara gaɗe dá ɓœ she akɔ zœ a? Too œɓœ ndje dœ yakoshe, dœ mara gaɗe dá ɓœ she awo zœ a? Kœsœpe lœ mara á Ndjaba e ɓœ
7.17: Andaa, œ li adœke uzu dœ uzu mbœrœtœ ye lindœ kœtorœ á Gbozu to fœ she, yé á tshe sœ lœnœ lɔkɔ á Ndjaba e lima she. Œneke á mœ sœ kœpandœ nœ lœ Ikrizia kɔ dœmœ.
7.18: Œdœ endje kœwa lima anga uzu bale tœ gaza dœ lɔkɔ á Ndjaba e she, tshe papara awa kœmbœrœ adœke œ yiwa nene. Yé œdœ tsheneke á endje kœwawa lima she tœ gaza utshunœ adœke Ndjaba e she nene, œ lili adœke endje wa she nene.
7.19: Kœwa gaza too kœwawa gaza nene, œ gugu dœ ádá bale nene, kolœnœ adœke 'e mbœrœtœ 'e lindœ awa o'o nœ Ndjaba.
7.20: Œ li adœke uzu dœ uzu sœ kolœ lœ mara á tshe sœ lima dœ tœnœ lɔkɔ á Ndjaba e she.
7.21: Œɓœ kœdœ lima kanga lɔkɔ á Ndjaba e ɓœ a? Tɔtɔ lɔsu zœ nene. Kashe œdœ awa kœsœ zœ adœke ɓœ wuta lœ kanga, mbœrœtœ zœ lindœ nœ.
7.22: Gbambanœ nene, kanga á Gbozu e she kœdœ uzu á tshe kpa dœ́dœ́ kanga nene yé tshe te uzu nœ Gbozu. Awa bale ndje dœ uzu á tshe dœ́dœ́ kanga nene yé á Ndjaba e lima she, œshe kœdœ kanga nœ Kristu.
7.23: Ndjaba yɔ lima 'e lœ kanga ye; 'e tete akanga nœ azu nene.
7.24: Aaya mœ, œ li adœke uzu dœ uzu sœpe tœ ala Ndjaba kolœ ɓata á tshe sœ lima utshunœ lɔkɔ á tshe e she. Aangara œdœ pe ayashe koya
7.25: Tœ upu nœ aangara, Gbozu kakatœ awa o'o tɨ fœ mœ nene, kashe mœ sœ kœza gbetshelœ nœ mœ ɓata uzu á tshe zatœ ye ndjii, mbœrœ Gbozu ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ga ndœ mœ.
7.26: Mbœrœ oyo nœ ngɔngɔ asœke, œneke á mœ sœ kœgbe tœnœ dœke: œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke uzu dœ uzu sœ kolœnœ ɓata á tshe sœ asœmœ.
7.27: Œdœ ɓœ kœto yashe ye, papara adœke ɓœ kurutshelœtœ zœ dœ she nene. Œdœ ɓœ kœtoto yashe nene, papara ndje adœke ɓœ to yashe nene.
7.28: Kashe œdœ ɓœ kœto yashe, ɓœ mbœmbœrœ ekperœ nene. Yé œdœ ovoro yawuru kœi yakoshe, tshe mbœmbœrœ ndje ekperœ nene. Kashe endje á endje totœ endje asœmœ, endje gbɔ kœndanga osho lœ soro nœ endje œnœ ɔkɔ, yé œmœ, mœ yi má ndœ kœgbɔndœ 'e mbœrœ tœnœ.
7.29: Aaya mœ, o'o á mœ yindœ kœpa fœ 'e dœke: a kpa sœsœpe dœ olo ndjoro nene. Kœto ngɔngɔnœ asœke, œ li adœke endjeneke á endje to ayashe, endje sœ ɓata endje gugu dœ ayashe nene;
7.30: endjeneke á endje sœ tœ ɨkɨ, endje sœ ɓata endje sœsœ tœ ɨkɨ nene; endjeneke á endje sœ dœ yanga, endje sœ ɓata endje gugu dœ yanga nene; endjeneke á endje sœ kœyɔ œrœ, endje sœ ɓata endje gugu dœ tœnœ nene.
7.31: Œ li adœke azu á endje sœ kœshe mbœrœ œrœ nœ tshapashɔ asœke, sœ ɓata endje sheshe mbœrœ tœnœ nene. Gbambanœ nene, tshapashɔnœ ɓata á sœ asœ, œndœnœ œ dɨ nene.
7.32: Mœ yiyindœ nœ adœke 'e sœ dœ gbetshelœ nene. Tsheneke á tshe toto yashe nene, tshe sœ kœzatœ ye ga tœ akwa nœ Gbozu: Tshe sœ kœpara adœke œne mbœrœ œrœ á sœ kœza yanga fœ Gbozu.
7.33: Kashe tsheneke á tshe to yashe ye, tshe sœ kœgbe kolœ dœ œrœ nœ tshapashɔ asœke: tshe sœ kœpara adœke œne mbœrœ œrœ á sœ kœza yanga fœ awo œne.
7.34: Yé dœ tœnœ ataa, lɔsu ye sœ ga pa œrœ bisha. Œ sœ ndje awa bale ataa mbœrœ yashe too ovoro yawuru á tshe i i yakoshe nene, yé á sœ kœgbe kolœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ Gbozu mbœrœ á kœsœ yerœ lœ undu ye œdœ lœ ɨshirɨ. Kashe yashe á tshe i yakoshe, tshe sœ kœgbe dœ œrœ nœ tshapashɔ asœke yé œ sœ kœpara adœke œne mbœrœ œrœ á sœ kœza yanga fœ akɔ œne.
7.35: Mœ pa o'onœ asœmœ mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ á sœ mbœrœ 'e, kashe mœ sœsœ kœkapa 'e nene. Mœ yindœ nœ adœke 'e mbœrœ œneke á li adœke 'e sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, yé œ zatœ 'e djigi fœ Gbozu.
7.36: Œdœ anga ovoro yakoshe kœyindœ kœto yashe, yé á endje kpa wa adœke œne totœ œne nene, endje mbœrœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Á ovoro yakoshenœ kœwu adœke œne sœ dœ ogo awo œne tɔpanœ kpuru, yé á wu ndje adœke œne kœtoto she nene dá œne mbœrœ ekperœ, œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke endje totœ endje ɓata á endje gbe dœ tœnœ. Asœmœ dœ́dœ́ ekperœ nene.
7.37: Kashe œdœ ovoro yakoshenœ kœdjidji azu á endje sœ kœshosho she nene, yé á wa dœ tœ ye ɓa lɔsu ye adœke œne to koje nœ œne nene, œdœ tshe kœli kœru lɔsu ye tœ ogo ɔkɔ, tshe mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ.
7.38: Ataa, tsheneke á tshe kœto koje nœ ye, tshe mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ. Kashe tsheneke á tshe kœvwaratœ ye kœto koje nœ ye, œshe asœmœ kpa mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ kœrosœnœ.
7.39: Yashe á tshe dœ awo uzu, sœ tœ œsœnœ dœ ɔkɔnœ lɔkɔ á tshe sœpe dœ soro. Kashe œdœ akɔnœ kœtshu ye, tshe li kœi angbɨ yakoshe á tshe yindœ ye. Œ li ndje adœke yakoshenœ dœ yindœ Kristu.
7.40: Andaa, tœ mœ, mœ gbe adœke tshe sœ dœ yanga kœrosœ nœ œdœ tshe kœsœ kolœ ataa. Yé œmœ ndje, mœ wusœ nœ adœke Ɨshirɨ nœ Ndjaba sœ dœ mœ awa bale.

8.1: Tœ upu nœ songba agea á endje to dœ tokóró fœ andjaba, œ sœ adjapu adœke azœ kɔ, a sœ dœ kœwusœrœ lœ nœ ɓata á 'e sœ kœpa tœnœ. Kœwusœrœ sœ kœza egerœ kumu fœ uzu, kashe kœyindœsho sœ kœto gbɔgbɔ ga ugurutœ azu.
8.2: Œdœ uzu kœsœ kœgbe adœke œne wusœ œrœ waa, asœmœ sœ kœma adœke tshe wuwu damba sœ œrœ ɓata á li má adœke tshe wusœ nœ nene.
8.3: Kashe tsheneke á tshe yindœ Ndjaba, Ndjaba wu ndje sœ ye yé.
8.4: Ataa, a li kœzɨ songba agea á endje za tœ tokóró fœ andjaba ye a? A wusœ nœ adœke andjaba kœdœ œrœ gbambanœ pa tshapashɔ, yé anga andjaba gugu nene, kolœ Ndjaba tshebabale.
8.5: Gbambanœ nene, ataa œdœ anga azu kœgbe adœke andjaba sœ ɓa lafo too ɓa pa ɔshɔ, œ sœ adjapu adœke andjaba œdœ agbozu sœ ndjoro,
8.6: a wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba sœ kolœ tshebabale. Œshe kœdœ Aba azœ á tshe mbœrœ œrœ kɔ, yé a sœ kœshe mbœrœ she. A sœ dœ Gbozu nœ azœ tshebabale Yisu Kristu. Lœ awa nœ ye dá Ndjaba mbœrœ œrœ kɔ, yé a sœ dœ soro mbœrœ she.
8.7: Kashe ayindœ Kristu kɔ wuwusœ adjapunœ asœ nene. Anga endje sœpe dœ gbetshelœ nœ andjabanœ asœmœ lœ kumu endje dœ mara adœke œdœ endje kœzɨ songba agea á endje to tœ tokóró fœ andjaba, endje sœ kœgbe adœke endje to fœ adja Ndjaba, yé endje mɔ lœ gbetshelœ nœ endje. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, endje gbe adœke œne kœdœ aayi uburu.
8.8: Andaa, œ dœ́dœ́ rœgo dá gi azœ ndoo dœ Ndjaba nene. Œdœ a kœvwaratœ azœ kœzɨ tœnœ, a sœ ga manda nœ nene. Yé œdœ a kœzɨ ndje gbaa na, a gbɔ œrœ bale nene.
8.9: Kashe, 'e sœ dœ gbɔdjela adœke mara á 'e sœ kœmbœrœ dœ œrœ kɔ asœmœ, yiyi endjeneke á endje mɔɔmɔ lœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje ga lœ ekperœ nene.
8.10: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ uzu á tshe mɔɔmɔ lœ kœwusœrœ nœ ye asœmœ kœwu ɓœ á ɓœ sœ dœ kœwusœrœ, yé á ɓœ li ga lœ Tepelo nœ andjaba, tshe gbɔ gbɔgbɔ nœ kœzɨ songba agea á endje to dœ tokóró fœ andjabanœ asœmœ nene a?
8.11: Yé mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, kœwusœrœ nœ zœ œ ndɨ uzu á tshe mɔɔmɔ asœmœ. Kashe wusœ nœ adœke œshe kœdœ aya zœ á Kristu tshu mbœrœ she!
8.12: Œdœ 'e kœmbœrœ mara ekperœ ataa ga tœ aaya 'e yé á ndɨ gbetshelœ nœ uzu á tshe mɔɔmɔ, dá 'e mbœrœ ekperœ fœ Kristu dœ tœ ye.
8.13: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, œdœ kœzɨrœ kœsœ kœyi aya mœ ga lœ ekperœ, mœ kpa zɨ songba agea bale nene, mbœrœ á kœyiyi aya mœ ga lœ djingili nene.

9.1: Œmœ kœdœ kanga a? Mœ dœ́dœ́ ayi avwa nene a? Mœ wuwu Yisu á tshe dœ́ Gbozu nœ azœ nene a? 'E dœ́dœ́ azu ndœla akwa nœ mœ lœ Gbozu nene a?
9.2: Œdœ mbœrœ anga azu mœ kœdœ́dœ́ ayi avwa nene, kashe mbœrœ 'e nœ 'e, œmœ kœdœ ayi avwa. Gbambanœ nene, e'e kœdœ œrœ á sœ kœma tshambele akwa nœ mœ ɓata ayi avwa lœ Gbozu.
9.3: O'o á mœ sœ kœgi fœ azu á endje sœ kœpatœ mœ dœke:
9.4: 'A lili má kœyɔndœ kœzɨrœ too kœndjorœ ɓa ndœ 'e nene a?
9.5: 'A lili má kœna dœ anga yashe á tshe dœ yindœ Kristu ɓata anga aayi avwa, aaya Gbozu œdœ pe Petro sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ nene a?
9.6: Kolœ mœ kutu mœ œdœ Barnabase dá li ndœ kœmbœrœ akwa yeka á kœzɨ œrœ a?
9.7: Œɗe lœ akwa turugu dá mbœrœ akwa dœ ngendja nœ ye dœ tœ ye a? Œɗe dá lu ɔyɔ vinu, yé á zɨzɨ elenœ nene a? Too uzu ɗe dá sœ kœgbɔndœ angombe yé á ndjondjo ungu ɔngɔ endje nene a?
9.8: Tœnœ kœdœ kolœ o'o nœ azu dá mœ pa asœmœ, too awa akwa sœsœ kœpa awa bale ataa nene a?
9.9: Gbambanœ nene, endje sú ɓala buku nœ awa akwa nœ Moyize adœke: «Ɓœ i ama ngombe ga tœnœ nene lɔkɔ á ɓœ kœsœ kœmbœrœ she dœ akwa ble.» Ndjaba sœ kœkɨtœ œsœ angombe a?
9.10: Œ dœ́dœ́ azœ dá tshe sœ kœpa o'onœ tœ azœ nene a? Adjapu, endje sú o'onœ asœmœ mbœrœ azœ. Gbambanœ nene, uzu á tshe djo kɨndɨ dœ pe tsheneke á tshe ɓi indji ngwarœ, uzu dœ uzu sœ kœmbœrœ dœ gbetshelœ nœ kœgbɔ œsœ œnœ ye.
9.11: Œdœ 'a kœyi lima sœ o'o ama Ndjaba fœ 'e, œ sœ má dœ ekpenœ waa ye adœke 'a yɔndœ œrœ tœ 'e a?
9.12: Œdœ anga azu kœsœ kœyɔndœ œrœ tœ 'e, mbœrœ gaɗe á a'a nene a? Andaa, 'a yɔyɔ lima ndœ œrœ nene. Kashe 'a gbɔndœtœ 'a mbœrœ á 'a kœzaza œrœ ku lœ awa Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Kristu nene.
9.13: 'E wuwusœ nœ adœke azu neke á endje sœ kœmbœrœ akwa ɓa lœ anda nœ Ndjaba sœ kœgbɔ kœzɨrœ kpœtœmœ nene a? Yé endjeneke á endje sœ kœto tokóró ɓa pa ndaba, sœsœ ndje kœgbɔ œsœ œnœ endje kœzɨrœ kpœpa ndabanœ nene a?
9.14: Awa bale, Gbozu za awa tœ upu nœ endjeneke á endje sœ kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o adœke endje sœ ndje dœ soro mbœrœ tœnœ.
9.15: Kashe œmœ, mœ zaza awa o'onœ asœmœ bale ga tœ akwa nene, yé mœ susu mbetinœ asœmœ mbœrœ kœyɔndœ œrœ nene. Mœ yi má ndœ kœtshu tœnœ, tœ œsœnœ adœke endje gbɔtœ upu nœ egerœ kumunœ asœ tœ mœ.
9.16: Dœ adjapu, kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o dœ́dœ́ œrœ nœ egerœ kumu ɓa ndœ mœ nene, kashe tœnœ kœdœ œrœ á li adœke mœ mbœrœ. Mœ sœ dœ oyo tœ lɔsu mœ œdœ mœ kœpapandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nene.
9.17: Œdœ mœ dœ tœ mœ dá wa lima adœke mœ mbœrœ akwanœ asœmœ, mœ yi má lima ndœ nœ adœke endje ko ngendja tshangbanœ fœ mœ ye. Kashe ɓata á endje za mœ dœ ɔgbɔ ga tœnœ, mœ mbœrœ kolœ akwa á Gbozu za fœ mœ.
9.18: Ataa, ngendja tshangba akwa nœ mœ kœdœ ga ɗe? Tœnœ kœdœ kœpandœ Ɔtshɔ O'o gbambanœ á mœ sœ kœpandœ nœ, kashe mœ zaza awa o'o á Ɔtshɔ O'onœ asœmœ za fœ mœ ga tœ akwa nene.
9.19: Mœ dœ́dœ́ kanga nœ uzu bale nene. Andaa, mœ zatœ mœ tœ kanga nœ azu para mbœrœ kœgbɔ azu ndjoro fœ Yisu.
9.20: Mœ sœ lima kœsœ ugurutœ Ayuda ɓata Yuda mbœrœ kœgbɔ Ayuda. Ataa mœ sœsœ tshakudu awa akwa nœ Moyize nene gbaa, mœ sœ kœmbœrœtœ mœ ɓata azu á endje sœ tshakudunœ mbœrœ kœgbɔ endjeneke á endje sœ tshakudu awa akwa.
9.21: Awa bale ndje, lɔkɔ á mœ kœsœ dœ endjeneke á endje sœsœ tshakudu awa akwa nene, mœ sœ kœmbœrœtœ mœ ɓata endje, kashe mœ sœsœ kœgbe dœ awa akwanœ asœmœ nene mbœrœ kœgbɔ endje. Œ yiyindœ kœpa adœke mœ wuwusœ awa akwa nœ Ndjaba nene, gbambanœ nene, mœ zatœ mœ ga tshakudu awa akwa nœ Kristu.
9.22: Mœ sœ ugurutœ azu á endje mɔɔmɔ lœ kœyindœrœ ɓata œmœ ndje mœ mɔɔmɔ mbœrœ kœgbɔ endje. Mœ zatœ mœ djigi fœ endje para mbœrœ kœshe angata endje dœ mara kɔ.
9.23: Yé œneke asœmœ kɔ, mœ sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ mbœrœ Ɔtshɔ O'o yeka á kœgbɔ œrœ á to lœ awa nœ Ɔtshɔ O'onœ asœmœ.
9.24: 'E wuwusœ nœ adœke aayi kœkpa ɔrɔ kœkpa ɔrɔ nœ endje œrrr, kolœ anga bale dá gbɔ œrœ tshangbanœ nene a? 'E kpa ɔrɔnœ dœ mara adœke 'e wuta utshunœ.
9.25: Aayi mɔlɔ kɔ sœ kœpa avwara ndœ kœgbɔ kpoto tshagbozu á ndɨ bala ye, kashe œnœ azœ kœdœ kpoto tshagbozu á ndɨ bala bale nene.
9.26: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, œmœ, mœ sœ kœkpa ɔrɔ dœ mara ataa: mœ sœsœ kœkpa ɔrɔ nœ ayibula nene; yé mœ sœ kœdu koshe atake: mœ dudu koshe lœ angbalanœ nene.
9.27: Kashe mœ sœ kœmbœrœ ɔgbɔrœ ga tœ undu mœ, yé œ sœ kœgbɔndœ nœ dœ ɔgbɔ kparawa adœke manda kœmɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o fœ anga azu, á Ndjaba kœvwaratœ ye tœ mœ nene.

10.1: Alaya, mœ yiyindœ nœ adœke œndœ œrœ á wuta lima ga tœ alata azœ lɔndɔ nœ Moyize djedjerœ 'e nene: ondoro gbɔ lima ndœ alata azœ para, endje para kɔkɔ zu lima tɔ la egerœ ungu.
10.2: Endje para gbɔ lima batisimu lœ kœngbɔtœ endje bale dœ Moyize ɓa lœ ondoro dœ pe la egerœ ungu.
10.3: Endje para sœ lima kœzɨ ala œrœ bale nœ ɨshirɨ.
10.4: Endje para sœ lima kœndjo ungu bale nœ ɨshirɨ. Gbambanœ nene, ungu á endje sœ lima kœndjo tœnœ to lœ badja nœ ɨshirɨ á sœ kœna dœ endje awa bale. Badjanœ asœmœ kœdœ lima Kristu.
