4.9: Tœ upu nœ kœyindœsho lœ yazu, ádá nœ kœsu mbeti mbœrœ o'onœ fœ 'e gugu nene. Gbambanœ nene, e'e dœ tœ 'e, 'e wusœ nœ adœke Ndjaba pa adœke 'e yindœtœ 'e dœ anga 'e.
4.10: Yé kœyindœshonœ asœmœ dá 'e sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ ga ndœ alaya para lœ Masedwane djigi. Kashe alaya, 'a sœ kœto gbɔgbɔ fœ 'e adœke 'e kpa mbœrœ dœ kœrosœ nœ.
4.11: 'E sœ dœ agbe nœ kœsœ dœ kœsœ gee, uzu dœ uzu za lɔsu ye ga pa o'o nœ ye dœ tœ ye yé œ mbœrœ akwa dœ adja kane ye ɓata á 'a pa lima tœnœ fœ 'e,
4.12: mbœrœ adœke mara kœmbœrœtœ 'e sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ utshu azu á endje gugu dœ kœyindœrœ nene yé 'e dœ kongba lœ kumu uzu bale nene. Kœkwa Gbozu
4.13: Alaya, 'a yindœ nœ adœke 'e wusœ adja o'o tœ upu nœ endjeneke á endje tshu mbœrœ á 'e kœsœsœ dœ oyo ɓata anga azu á endje koko lɔsu endje ga pa Ndjaba nene.
4.14: Gbambanœ nene, ɓata á a yindœ nœ adœke Yisu tshu yé œ she lœ akuzu, a yi ndje ndœ nœ adœke lœ awa nœ Yisu, Ndjaba œ she endjeneke á endje tshu lœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye adœke endje sœ dœ she awa bale.
4.15: Œneke á 'a sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e lindœ kœyisœrœ nœ Gbozu dœke: azœ á a sœpe dœ soro œrrr ga tœ kœkwa bala Gbozu, a ro utshu azu á endje tshu nene.
4.16: Gbambanœ nene, a dji egerœ tshama, dœ tshama gbozu tshapa aandjelu dœ pe ɨkɨ ngbake nœ Ndjaba. Ataa, Gbozu dœ tœ ye œ to ɓa lafo œ jerœ yé endjeneke á endje tshu lœ Kristu, œ she utshunœ.
4.17: Manda nœ, azœ á a sœpe bala dœ soro, Ndjaba œ ko azœ ɔ tœnœ dœ endje lœ ondoro ndœ kœgbɔtœ azœ dœ Gbozu ɓa lœ yugu, yé atamœ; a sœ dœ Gbozu kpœtœ œsœnœ waa dœ waa.
4.18: Ataa, 'e to gbɔgbɔ ugurutœ 'e dœ anga 'e dœ o'onœ asœke.

5.1: Alaya, ádá nœ kœsu mbeti fœ 'e tœ upu nœ ada ɔlɔ ndje dœ lɔkɔ á œrœnœ asœmœ œ mbœrœtœ endje gugu nene.
5.2: Gbambanœ nene, e'e dœ tœ 'e, 'e wusœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke, olo kœkwa Gbozu œ sœ ngbangi ɓata ayi angba á tshe na dœ abutshɔ.
5.3: Lɔkɔ á azu œ pa adœke: «'A sœ dœ kœsœ gee, upu gugu nene», yeka á ngbangi egerœ oyo œ te ga pa endje. Œ sœ ɓata oyo á yashe nguzu œ wu dœ lɔkɔ kœzu gbolo yé uzu kœkpa lœ amanœ œ gu nene.
5.4: Kashe e'e, alaya, 'e sœsœ lœ ubu osho adœke olonœ asœmœ wuta ga tœ 'e ngbangi ɓata ayi angba nene.
5.5: Gbambanœ nene, e'e para kœdœ agbolo nœ ɨngbɨsho, agbolo nœ ɔlɔ. A dœ́dœ́ agbolo nœ butshɔ too nœ ubu osho nene.
5.6: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, a lolo ɓata anga azu nene; kashe a sœ dœ gbɔdjela yé œ dœ agbozu tshapa undu azœ.
5.7: Gbambanœ nene, azu á endje lo olo, endje lo dœ butshɔ; yé ayi kœndjorœ waa, ndjo dœ butshɔ á mbœrœ endje.
5.8: Kashe azœ á dœ́ agbolo nœ ɔlɔ, œ li adœke a dœ agbozu tshapa undu azœ. A za kœyindœrœ œdœ kœyindœsho ɓata lœba okoro, awa bale dœ kpoto á dœ́ kœko lɔsu azœ ga pa Yisu yekane a kœgbɔ kœshe.
5.9: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba keke azœ ndœ kœwu oyo tshakudu ókó nœ ye nene, kashe tshe ke azœ adœke a gbɔ kœshe lœ awa nœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu.
5.10: Tshe tshu mbœrœ azœ adœke a sœ awa bale dœ she, œdœ a sœ dœ soro œdœ a tshu.
5.11: Ataa, 'e tɨ kane 'e lœ tœ 'e yé œ to gbɔgbɔ ugurutœ 'e dœ anga 'e ɓata á 'e sœ ɓalima kœmbœrœ tœnœ. Ndɔngɔlɔ kœmɨ upu dœ pe abala
5.12: Alaya, 'a sœ kœpa fœ 'e adœke 'e lɨsœ endjeneke á endje sœ kœmbœrœ akwa ugurutœ 'e, endjeneke á Gbozu ko endje tɔ ga utshu 'e ndœ kœyisœ awa œdœ kœmɨ upu fœ 'e.
5.13: 'E lɨsœ endje waa yé œ sœ dœ kœyindœsho ga ndœ endje mbœrœ akwa á endje sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ. 'E sœ dœ kœsœ gee ugurutœ 'e.
5.14: Alaya, 'a kɨ ga tœ 'e adœke: 'e mɨ upu fœ azu djingili , 'e to gbɔgbɔ fœ endjeneke á endje sœ kœkwa ga manda nœ, 'e tɨ kane endjeneke á endje mɔmɔ yé œ sœ dœ ugu lɔsu ga ndœ azu para.
5.15: Ala 'e gbɔ adœke uzu bale gigi ekperœ manda ekperœ nene, kashe 'e para awa ndœ kœmbœrœ kolœ ɔtshɔrœ ugurutœ 'e œdœ ga ndœ azu para.
5.18: 'e za mershe fœ Ndjaba lœ áká œrœ kɔ. Œtœnœ kœdœ œneke á Ndjaba yindœ nœ adœke 'e mbœrœ lœ ngbɔtœ nœ 'e dœ Yisu Kristu.
5.19: 'E papakata Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ ye nene,
5.20: 'e vwavwaratœ 'e tœ o'o nœ aayi kœgbara o'o nene.
5.21: Kashe 'e tondœ œrœ kɔ kpœrœ kpœrœ yé œ gbɔndœ œneke á sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ.
5.23: Kaka Ndjaba nœ kœsœ gee fa 'e tœ ayerœ azu djigi. Kaka tshe gbɔ adja ndœ ɨshirɨ 'e, dœ uvuru 'e œdœ pe ɔkɔ 'e mbœrœ adœke á endje kœgbagbara 'e tœnœ nene lɔkɔ á Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu œ kwa.
5.24: Ndjaba á tshe e 'e asœmœ œ mbœrœ zœ; gbambanœ nene, tshe sœ kœmbœrœtœ ye lindœ œneke á tshe pa.
5.26: 'E za œyerœ abala fœ aaya para.
5.27: Mœ kɨ fœ 'e dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu adœke: 'e dɨ mbeti nœ asœ fœ aaya para.
5.28: Kaka adœke Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu má ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ga ndœ 'e.

1.1: Œmœ Polo, Silase œdœ pe Timote, 'a vwa abala asœke fœ 'e dœ́ ayindœ Yisu lœ Ikrizia ɓa lœ Tesalonike.
1.2: Kaka Aba azœ dœ Ndjaba œdœ Gbozu Yisu Kristu má ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ endje ga ndœ 'e yé œ za kœsœ gee fœ 'e. Ndjaba œ wa bala ngbanga ɔlɔ á Yisu œ kwa
1.3: Alaya, œ li adœke 'a za mershe fœ Ndjaba ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ tœ upu nœ 'e, yé œ sœ adja ndjii adœke 'a sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ ataa. Gbambanœ nene, kœyindœrœ nœ 'e sœ kœgerœ tœnœ, yé kœyindœsho á 'e sœ dœ tœnœ ga ndœ anga 'e sœ ndje kœgerœ tœnœ waa.
1.4: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'a sœ kœdu okoro 'a pa 'e ugurutœ azu lœ Ikrizia ndjoro nœ Ndjaba, mbœrœ kœshi gbɨ nœ 'e lœ kœyindœrœ nœ 'e lœ œrœ kanga œdœ oyo kɔ á na ga ndœ 'e á 'e ru lɔsu tœnœ.
1.5: Œrœnœ asœmœ kɔ sœ kœma ngbɨ adœke kœwa ngbanga á Ndjaba œ wa, œ dœ adja kœwa ngbanga. Gbambanœ nene, œrœ kanga dœ oyo á 'e gbɔ, guma 'e adœke 'e li dœ Ogo gbozu nœ Ndjaba.
1.6: Adja upu, Ndjaba sœ ndjii, tshe gi oyo ga pa azu á endje sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ kanga fœ 'e,
1.7: yé tshe mbœrœ adœke, e'e dœ azu á 'e wu œrœ kanganœ asœmœ, 'e yatœ 'e awa bale dœ 'a lɔkɔ á Gbozu Yisu œ kwa bala dœ gbɔgbɔ kœto ɓa lafo dœ aandjelu nœ ye.
1.8: Tshe na bala lœ laɓa owo, ndœ kœza ɔgbɔ djofele fœ endjeneke á endje wuwusœ Ndjaba nene, á vwaratœ endje tœ Ɔtshɔ O'o nœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu.
1.9: Ɔgbɔ djofele á endje wu bala dœke: oyo nœ waa dœ waa, endje sœ zara tœ ala Gbozu yé endje wu gbɔgbɔ nœ mokɔ nœ ye nene.
1.10: Lɔkɔ á tshe kwa bala dœ olonœ asœmœ adœke ayerœ azu nœ ye za mokɔ fœ she œdœ adœke azu á endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye lɨsœ ye. 'E sœ ndje ugurutœ endje mbœrœ á 'e yindœ Ɔtshɔ O'o á 'a mɨndœ nœ fœ 'e.
1.11: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, 'a sœ kœza avwala ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ tœ upu nœ 'e adœke Ndjaba guma 'e, 'e li dœ kœke osho á tshe ke 'e. 'A sœ kœkɨ fœ Ndjaba adœke lœ gbɔgbɔ nœ ye, 'e mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ kɔ á 'e gbe tœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ yé tshe kpa mbœrœ adœke 'e za kœyindœrœ nœ 'e ga tœ akwa.
1.12: Ataa, azu œ donga ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu mbœrœ 'e, yé endje donga ndje e'e mbœrœ she. Œ mbœrœtœ ye ataa liaka ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba nœ azœ œdœ Gbozu Yisu Kristu.

2.1: Alaya, tœ upu nœ kœkwa bala Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu dœ pe kœngbɔtœ azœ ɨndɨrɨ ye, 'a sœ kœkɨ ga tœ 'e adœke: aaya
2.2: œdœ azu kœpa fœ 'e adœke olo kœkwa Yisu li ye, kaka gbetshelœ nœ 'e sœ zɨtɨ yé 'e yiyindœ nœ nene. Œdœ ndje uzu kœgbara o'o dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Ndjaba, œdœ endje kœpa ndje fœ 'e adœke a'a dá su ga la mbeti gbaa, adja 'e zaza lɔsu 'e ga lafo nene.
2.3: Kaka uzu bale bɨbɨlɨ 'e dœ anga angbɨ mara nene. Gbambanœ nene, utshunœ adœke olonœ li, azu œ vwaratœ endje tœ Ndjaba yé ekpe Uzu œ matœ ye. Œshe kœdœ uzu á Ndjaba œ wo she.
2.4: Uzunœ asœmœ œ vwaratœ ye tœ œneke kɔ á azu sœ kœdonga tœnœ yé á sœ kœza ɓata ndjaba. Tshe yiangba œrœnœ asœmœ kɔ, œ na œ sœ ɓa lœ Tepelo nœ Ndjaba, yé œ mɨndœ nœ adœke œne kœdœ Ndjaba.
2.5: 'E gbegbe shema dœ o'o á mœ sœ lima kœpa fœ 'e lɔkɔ á mœ sœ lima damba ugurutœ 'e nene a?
2.6: Yé ngɔngɔ asœ, 'e wusœ œrœ á sœ kœpakata she ye, dœ mara adœke tshe matœ ye yé. Ataa, tshe matœ ye kolœ dœ lɔkɔ á Ndjaba guma.
2.7: Gbambanœ nene, gbɔgbɔ nœ uzunœ asœmœ tetœ kœmbœrœ akwa yaa ugurutœ azu ye. Kashe akwanœ asœmœ œ wuta ngbɨ nene œrrr adœke uzu á tshe pakata Ekpe Uzunœ kɔrɔ awa fœ she yekane.
2.8: Yé Ekpe Uzu œ matœ ye, Gbozu Yisu œ uru ɨzɨ ga tœ ye adœke tshe tshu yé œ ndɨ tshelœ ye lœ awa nœ ɨshirɨ nœ kœkwa she.
2.9: Tœ upu nœ kœna Ekpe Uzunœ, kœnanœ œ sœ lœ awa akwa nœ Satana, œ matœ ye lœ awa nœ tshelœ áká akwa nœ gbɔgbɔ, dœ afá œdœ œrœ kœbɨlɨ dœ azu,
2.10: œdœ lœ awa nœ mara tshelœ áká kœbɨlɨ osho kɔ á sœsœ ndjii nene mbœrœ azu á endje sœ lœ ala awa nœ kuzu. Gbambanœ nene, endje vwaratœ endje tœ adja o'o nœ Ndjaba á li má adœke œ she endje.
2.11: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, Ndjaba vwa gbɔgbɔ nœ djingili á sœ kœmbœrœ adœke endje yindœ o'o nœ wala.
2.12: Ataa, azu kɔ á endje sœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ mbœrœ adja 'o nene, kashe á sœ dœ yanga kœmbœrœ ekperœ, endje wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ endje. Kœshi gbɨ lœ kœyindœrœ
2.13: Tœ a'a nœ 'a, alaya, œ li adœke 'a za kolœ mershe fœ Ndjaba ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ mbœrœ 'e á Gbozu yindœ 'e. Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba ke 'e ɓalima katshatsha utshunœ adœke 'e gbɔ kœshe, yé 'e wuta ayerœ azu lœ awa nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ œdœ ndje kœyindœrœ lœ adja o'o.
2.14: Mbœrœ tœnœ dá tshe e 'e kœgbɔ œtœnœ lœ awa nœ Ɔtshɔ O'o á 'a mɨndœ nœ fœ 'e. Tshe yindœ nœ adœke 'e gbɔ mokɔ awa bale dœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu.
2.15: Yé ataa, alaya, 'e shi gbɨ yé œ gbɔndœ kœyisœrœ á 'a yisœ nœ fœ 'e œdœ dœ ama 'a œdœ ala mbeti á 'a su.
2.16: Kaka Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu dœ tœ ye œdœ Aba azœ dœ Ndjaba á tshe yindœ azœ, tshe mbœrœ adœke lœ awa nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye, tshe to gbɔgbɔ waa dœ waa fœ azœ yé œ mbœrœ adœke a ko lɔsu azœ ga pa ɔtshɔrœ á wuta ɓa mbatsha.
2.17: Kaka endje to gbɔgbɔ fœ azœ adœke 'a sœ kœmbœrœ kolœ ɔtshɔrœ œdœ kœpa ndje kolœ ɔtshɔ o'o.

3.1: Ɓa tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ kɔ, alaya, 'e za avwala mbœrœ 'a, yeka á o'o ama Gbozu nœ azœ kœna ga utshunœ dœ mara adœke azu donga œtœnœ ɓata á sœ ndje ɓa ndœ 'e.
3.2: 'E za ndje avwala fœ Ndjaba adœke tshe vwara 'a lœma ekpe azu dœ ahawo azu. Gbambanœ nene, œ dœ́dœ́ azu kɔ dá sœ dœ kœyindœrœ nene.
3.3: Gbozu sœ kœmbœrœ œrœ nœ ye lindœ o'o ama ye. Tshe to gbɔgbɔ fœ 'e yé œ gbɔndœ 'e tshakane Ekpe Uzu.
3.4: 'A sœ kœza lɔsu 'a ga ndœ Gbozu tœ upu nœ 'e: o'o á 'a za fœ 'e, 'e sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ zœ yé 'e te lœma kœmbœrœ tœnœ ye.
3.5: Kaka Gbozu guma lɔsu 'e adœke 'e sœ dœ kœyindœsho ga ndœ Ndjaba œdœ ga ndœ kœshi gbɨ nœ Kristu. Œ li adœke uzu mbœrœ akwa
3.6: Alaya, 'a sœ kœmɨndœ nœ fœ 'e dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu Yisu Kristu adœke: 'e gitœ 'e zara tœ aaya kɔ á endje sœ lœ ɔdɔ, á sœsœ kœmbœrœtœ endje liaka o'o á 'a yi lima sœnœ fœ endje nene.
3.7: E'e, 'e wusœ mara á li adœke 'e mbœrœtœ 'e liaka 'a ye. Gbambanœ nene, 'a sœsœ lima ugurutœ 'e lœ ɔdɔ nene.
3.8: 'A kakate lima kœzɨrœ nœ uzu bale nene, kashe lœ kœvwi ɨlɨ œdœ kœmɔ, butshɔ dœ ɔlɔ, 'a mbœrœ lima akwa kparawa adœke 'a wuwuta kongba pa kumu anga uzu bale ugurutœ 'e nene.
3.9: Adja 'a li má lima kœ'esho ndœ œrœ tshakane 'e, kashe 'a mbœmbœrœ ataa nene. Gbambanœ nene, 'a yi lima ndœ nœ adœke 'e yamba œrœ á 'a sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ.
3.10: Yé lɔkɔ á 'a sœ lima ugurutœ 'e, 'a pa lima fœ 'e adœke: «Œdœ uzu kœyiyindœ kœmbœrœ akwa nene, tshe zɨzɨ ndje œrœ nene.»
3.11: Andaa, 'a sœ kœdji adœke, ayi ɔdɔ sœ ugurutœ 'e, œ sœ gbambanœ á sœ kolœ kœli ga lœ o'o nœ azu.
3.12: Mbœrœ azunœ asœmœ, 'a sœ kœza o'o dœ ɔgbɔ dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Gbozu Yisu Kristu fœ endje adœke: endje mbœrœ akwa dœ lɔsu zɨtɨ yekane á kœzɨ rœgo manda kane endje dœ tœ endje.
3.13: Mbœrœ 'e, alaya, 'e mɔmɔ dœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ nene.
3.14: Œdœ uzu kœzaza œneke á 'a pa ga la mbetinœ asœ ga tœ akwa nene, 'e sœ dœ gbɔdjela ga tœ ye yé 'e kpa awa kœsœ awa bale dœ she adœke ala ye kœtshu she.
3.15: 'E yiyiangba ye œyi nene, kashe 'e yɔrɔ she ɓata á uzu œ yɔrɔ ayanœ. Ndɔngɔlɔ o'o
3.16: Kaka Gbozu nœ kœsœ gee to kœsœ gee dœ tœ ye fœ 'e butshɔ dœ ɔlɔ œdœ lœ mara kɔ. Kaka Gbozu sœ dœ 'e para kɔkɔ.
3.17: Œmœ Polo dá sú abala fœ 'e dœ kane mœ. Mœ sœ kœza kane mœ ga la mbeti kɔ atake: œtœnœ kœdœ œndœ kane mœ.
3.18: Kaka Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ga ndœ 'e para kɔkɔ.

1.1: Œmœ Polo, mœ kœdœ ayi avwa nœ Yisu Kristu á ayi kœshe azœ dœ Ndjaba œdœ Yisu Kristu á a ko lɔsu azœ ga pa ye, za akwanœ asœ fœ mœ.
1.2: Mœ sœ kœsu mbetinœ asœ fœ ɓœ dœ́ Timote, adja gbolo nœ mœ lœ kœyindœrœ: Kaka adœke Aba azœ dœ Ndjaba œdœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu, kœwu oyo ekperœ œdœ kœsœ gee nœ endje ga ndœ zœ. Aayi kœyisœrœ nœ anga angbɨ o'o
1.3: Sœpe lœ ongbo Efeze, ɓata á mœ za lima o'o fœ ɓœ ɔlɔ á mœ yi lima ndœ kœro ga lœ ogo Masedwane. Œ li adœke ɓœ pa o'o dœ ɔgbɔ fœ anga azu á endje sœ kœyisœ anga angbɨ o'o kpi, adœke endje katœ nœ tɨ.
1.4: Pandœ nœ fœ endje adœke endje katœ kœdji ekpe ndœma toro, dœ kœdɨ uwu ɨ'ɨrɨ aata ndjoro. Mbœrœ, œ sœ kœmbœrœ adœke azu le lœma endje yé œ katœ kœmesho ga tœ gbetshelœ nœ Ndjaba á a wusœ nœ lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ.
1.5: O'o á mœ za tɨ asœ sœ mbœrœ adœke kœyindœsho gerœ, œneke á to tœ œyerœ lɔsu, tœ ɔtshɔ gbetshelœ œdœ tœ adja kœyindœrœ.
1.6: Mbœrœ anga azu katœ œrœnœ asœ tɨ, œ djingili awa, á tetœ kœpa o'o á œsœnœ lɨlɨ nene.
1.7: Endje sœ kœzatœ endje adœke œne kœdœ ayi kœyisœ awa akwa, kashe endje wuwusœ neke kɔ á endje sœ kœyisœ nœ dœ gbɔgbɔ nene. Adja akwa nœ awa akwa
1.8: A wusœ nœ adœke awa akwa sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ lœ mara á a mbœrœtœ azœ lindœ nœ.
1.9: Œ li adœke a wusœ neke dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke: Awa akwa sœsœ mbœrœ azu á endje sœ ndjii nene, kashe œ sœ mbœrœ aayi sharapu dœ aayi gbɔkumu, aayi kœvwaratœ endje tœ Ndjaba dœ aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ, aayi kœtshapu kœdji Ndjaba dœ kœtsha ndje upu kœlɨsœ œyerœ œrœ, aayi kœwo aaba endje dœ aayi endje, œdœ aayi kœwo azu,
1.10: aayi kœpara awo azu dœ pe aayi kœpara akɔ azu, aayi kœlo dœ ayakoshe anga endje, aayi kœko azu yɔ œrœ, aayi wala, aayi kœdra œrœ wala, œdœ pe endjeneke kɔ á endje vwaratœ endje tœ ɔtshɔ kœyisœrœ.
1.11: Wu œneke á li dœ Ɔtshɔ O'o á to ɓa ndœ Ndjaba á tshe sœ lœ mokɔ dœ yanga. Œshe dá za fœ mœ adœke mœ yisœ nœ. Polo donga Gbozu Yisu mbœrœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye
1.12: Mœ gi mershe fœ Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu á tshe to gbɔgbɔ fœ mœ ndœ kœmbœrœ dœ akwanœ asœke. Tshe wu lima sœ nœ adœke mœ mbœrœ akwanœ dœ lɔsu mœ bale yekane á ke mœ ndœ akwa nœ ye.
1.13: Ataa mœ kœpa lima ekpe o'o ga tœ ɔkɔ ye, á mbœrœ lima œrœ kanga fœ she, á mbœrœ lima œrœ dœ gbɔkote ga tœ ye, kashe tshe wu oyo mœ mbœrœ œneke á mœ wuwu lima sœ œrœ á li dœ mœ adœke mœ mbœrœ nene yé mœ gugu lima ndje dœ kœyindœrœ nene.
1.14: Ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Gbozu nœ azœ sœ ga ndœ mœ tɔpanœ kpuru. Tshe mbœrœ adœke mœ sœ dœ kœyindœrœ œdœ pe kœyindœsho á to lœ kœngbɔtœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu.
1.15: Wu adja o'onœ á li dœ azu para kɔkɔ kœyindœ nœ dœ lɔsu bale: Kristu Yisu na ga pashɔ mbœrœ kœshe azu á endje mbœrœ ekperœ. Œmœ, mœ kœdœ uzu á ekperœ nœ mœ ropanœ ugurutœ azu kœmbœrœ ekperœnœ asœmœ.
1.16: Kashe Ndjaba wu oyo mœ, œ yindœ nœ adœke Yisu Kristu ma ugu lɔsu nœ ye lœ awa nœ mœ dœ́ uzu á ekperœ nœ mœ ropa œnœ azu kɔ, ɓata kœyisœrœ mbœrœ azu neke á endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ, á gbɔ soro neke á ka nene.
1.17: Kaka Gbozu á tshe sœ sheko, Ndjaba á tshe tshu nene, á uzu wuwu she nene yé á tshe sœ tshebabale, sœ dœ kœlɨsœtœ œdœ mokɔ waa dœ waa. Ame! Kœnga ɔtshɔ koshe
1.18: Timote gbolo nœ mœ, mœ za o'onœ asœke fœ ɓœ lindœ œneke á endje gbara lima tœ upu nœ zœ. O'onœ asœmœ za gbɔgbɔ fœ ɓœ yekane á ɓœ kœnga ɔtshɔ koshe.
1.19: Gbɔndœ kœyindœrœ œdœ ɔtshɔ gbetshelœ. Anga azu vwaratœ endje tœ kœna manda gbetshelœ nœ endje yé œ ndɨ kœyindœrœ nœ endje ga ndœ Yisu.
1.20: Aimini dœ Alekezandre sœ ugurutœ azunœ asœmœ. Mœ ko endje tɨ ga tshakane Satana mbœrœ á endje kœwusœ nœ adœke œ lili dœ endje kœgu œsœ́ Ndjaba nene.

2.1: Mœ sœ kœza o'o utshunœ kɔ adœke ayindœ Yisu yɔndœ œrœ ga ndœ Ndjaba, œ za avwala nœ endje fœ she yé œ kɨ ga tœ ye dœ́ œ za ndje mershe fœ she mbœrœ azu para kɔkɔ.
2.2: Œ li adœke endje za avwala fœ Ndjaba tœ upu nœ agbozu nœ Lita œdœ agbozu tshapa akwa kɔ adœke kœsœ nœ azœ sœ lœ kœsœ gee yeka a kœkpa awa Ndjaba lœ kœzatœ azœ dœ mara á li fœ she.
2.3: Wu œrœ á sœ tœ ɔtshɔnœ, á za yanga fœ Ayi kœshe azœ dœ Ndjaba,
2.4: á tshe yindœ nœ adœke azu para gbɔ kœshe yé œ li kœwusœ adjapu. Œtœnœ dœmœ.
2.5: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba sœ tshebale yé ayi kœguma tshagurutœ ye dœ azu ndje bale. Uzunœ kœdœ Yisu Kristu,
2.6: á tshe zatœ ye fœ kuzu mbœrœ kœshe azu kɔ lœ kanga. Tshe mbœrœ dœ lɔkɔnœ á li tœ kœma adœke Ndjaba yindœ kœshe azu para kɔkɔ.
2.7: Mbœrœ tœnœ dá Ndjaba ke mœ adœke mœ dœ uzu kœpandœ ama œne, ayi avwa nœ œne. Mœ wuta ayi kœyisœrœ fœ angbɨ azu adœke endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu, œdœ kœyi ndje sœ adja o'o. Mœ sœ kœpa adja o'o, mœ papa wala nene. Ayakoshe dœ ayashe lœ ngbɔtœ nœ Ikrizia
2.8: Mœ yindœ nœ adœke tœ osho kɔ á ayakoshe œ za avwala nœ endje fœ Ndjaba, endje sœ lɔsu endje ngbɨ lɔkɔ á endje sœ kœtɨ kane endje ga lafo. Endje katœ ókó yé œ lele lœ ama endje nene.
2.9: Mœ yi ndje ndœ nœ adœke ayashe verœ lœba nœ endje dœ mara á li, á sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ kashe dœ egerœ kumu nene yé œ mbœrœ kumu endje dœ mara á sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ. Endje katœ kœguma kumu endje dœ œrœ nœ ɔrœ, dœ ɔgbɔ akidji œdœ pe ndje kœverœ lœba á amanœ ropa nœ ye.
2.10: Kashe endje guma ɔkɔ endje dœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ ɓata mara á li dœ ayashe á endje sœ kœpa adœke œne sœ kœkpa awa Ndjaba.
2.11: Dœ lɔkɔ kœyambarœ, œ li adœke yashe sœ koko yé œ zatœ ye ga atɨ.
2.12: Mœ zaza awa fœ yashe adœke tshe yisœ œrœ, ndje adœke tshe dœ gbozu ga pa yakoshe nene. Kashe œ li adœke tshe sœ koko.
2.13: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba mbœrœ lima Adamo utshunœ yekane á mbœrœ Eva manda nœ.
2.14: Yé œ dœ́dœ́ Adamo dá Satana bɨlɨ lima she utshunœ nene, kashe yashe dá tshe bɨlɨ lima she yekane á tshe li lima ga lœ ekperœ.
2.15: Kashe œdœ yashe kœgbɔndœ kœyindœrœ œdœ kœyindœsho, á kœsœ yerœ yé á sœ ndjii tœ ala Ndjaba, adja Ndjaba œ she she lœ kœzu agbolo nœ ye.

3.1: Wu adja o'onœ á li dœ azu para kɔkɔ: Œdœ uzu kœpara awa kœte gbozu tshapa Ikrizia, dá tshe yindœ ɔtshɔ akwa.
3.2: Œ li adœke gbozu tshapa Ikrizia dœ uzu á endje gbagbagbara she nene. Tshe dœ ɔkɔ yashe bale, gbozu pa undu ye dœ tœ ye, uzu nœ ɔtshɔ gbetshelœ, uzu á œsœ́ ye lɨ, uzu nœ kœza osho kœsœ fœ agene œdœ uzu á tshe li kœyisœ œrœ,
3.3: tshe dœ́dœ́ kanga nœ ipi nene, ayi kœyi awa ga lœ azu nene, kashe tshe dœ uzu á tshe sœ lɔsu ye zɨtɨ, tshe dœ́dœ́ ayi œbœrœ too ayi egerœ lɔsu ga pa ngendja nene.
3.4: Œ li adœke tshe wusœ kœgbɔndœ azu tshelœ bɨngɨ nœ ye dœ tœ ye yé œ yisœ œrœ fœ agbolo nœ ye adœke endje dji upu dœ lɔsu endje bale.
3.5: Uzu neke á tshe wuwusœtœ ye tœ kœgbɔndœ azu tshelœ bɨngɨ nœ ye nene, tshe gbɔndœ azu tshelœ Ikrizia nœ Ndjaba kotoo?
3.6: Uzunœ dœ́dœ́ uzu á tshe fatshalɔsu ye ngɔngɔ nene, ete nene tshe tetœ kœdu okoro ye yé Ndjaba œ wa agbɔ ngbanga ga tœ ye ɓata á tshe wa lima ga tœ Satana.
3.7: Œ li adœke azu á endje gugu lœ Ikrizia nene pa ɔtshɔ o'o tœ mara ɔtshɔ ye, mbœrœ á tshe kœgbɔgbɔ tshula nene yé á tshe kœtete lœ gbanda nœ djaboro nene. Aayi akwa tshelœ Ikrizia
3.8: Œ li ndje adœke aayi akwa tshelœ Ikrizia dœ azu á œsœ́ endje lɨ, á endje sœ ndjii lœ o'o endje. Œ lili adœke endje dœ akanga nœ ipi nene œdœ ndje azu nœ kœgbɔ ngendja lœ ekpe awa nene.
3.9: Œ li adœke endje sœ dœ ɔtshɔ gbetshelœ lœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ o'o á Ndjaba mɨndœ nœ.
3.10: Œ li adœke endje tondœ endje utshunœ, manda nœ œdœ endje kœwuwu ekperœ lœ endje nene yeka á endje kœmbœrœ akwa nœ aayi akwa Ikrizianœ.
3.11: Awo endje awa bale ndje, endje dœ ayashe á œsœ́ endje lɨ, á endje dœ́dœ́ aayi parœ nene, agbozu tshapa undu endje dœ tœ endje, yé endje zatœ endje lindœ nœ lœ œrœ kɔ.
3.12: Œ li adœke ayi akwa lœ Ikrizia dœ ɔkɔ yashe bale yé œ wusœ kœgbɔndœ agbolo nœ ye dœ pe azu bɨngɨ nœ ye para kɔkɔ.
3.13: Gbambanœ nene, ayi akwa lœ Ikrizia á tshe sœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ ye dœ ɔtshɔnœ, azu œ lɨsœ endje yé endje pa o'o dœ awa nene lœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu Kristu. Egerœ œrœ á zatœ ye yiwa tœnœ
3.14: Mœ sœ kœsu mbetinœ fœ ɓœ dœ gbetshelœ adœke mœ yi kumu mœ ga ndœ zœ lœ ondonœ asœke.
3.15: Ataa œndœ mœ kœsœpe kœdɨ tœnœ damba, mœ su mbetinœ asœke fœ ɓœ adœke ɓœ wusœ mara nœ á li dœ uzu kœgbɔndœtœ ye dœ tœ ye ugurutœ azu bɨngɨ nœ Ndjaba. Bɨngɨnœ asœmœ kœdœ Ikrizia nœ Ndjaba nœ soro, á sœ ɓata sharagunda dœ pe œrœ á sœ kœgbɔndœ adja o'o.
3.16: Adjapu, o'onœ á a yindœ nœ, á za lima tœ ye yiwa tœnœ, sœ dœ egerœnœ. Œtœnœ dœke: Kristu na œ matœ ye lœ ɔkɔ uzu, Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ pandœ nœ adœke œshe kœdœ uzu á tshe sœ ndjii, yé aandjelu wu lima she ye, endje mɨndœ ye fœ angbɨ azu, azu ndjoro yindœ ye pa ɔshɔ, Ndjaba za she ga lœ mokɔ ɓa lafo.

4.1: Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ sœ kœpa ngbɨ adœke: Dœ lɔkɔ kœka tshapashɔ bala, anga azu œ katœ awa kœyindœrœ nœ endje tɨ, œ te manda ɨshirɨ nœ afara dœ pe kœyisœrœ nœ adjabro.
4.2: Ekpe azu dœ pe aayi kœpa wala œ fara endje dœ o'o ama endje. Afara nœ aayi walanœ ndɨ gbetshelœ nœ endje.
4.3: Endje sœ kœpakata azu tœ kœtotœ endje, œ sœ kœpakata azu tœ kœzɨ anga kœzɨrœ. Andaa Ndjaba dá mbœrœ kœzɨrœ. Ayindœ Yisu á endje wusœ adja o'o lindœ kœzɨ tœnœ yé œ za mershe fœ she.
4.4: Mbœrœ œrœ kɔ á Ndjaba mbœrœ sœ tœ ɔtshɔnœ, œneke á endje pakata nœ gugu nene œdœ a kœsœ kœzɨ tœnœ lœ kœgi mershe fœ Ndjaba.
4.5: Gbambanœ nene, o'o ama Ndjaba œdœ avwala sœ kœmbœrœ adœke œrœnœ asœmœ sœ yerœ. Mara kœdœ ɔtshɔ ayi akwa nœ Yisu Kristu
4.6: Œdœ ɓœ kœyisœ o'o asœ kɔ fœ aaya œdœ aayingɔ, ɓœ te bala ɔtshɔ ayi akwa nœ Yisu Kristu. Asœke œ ma adœke ɓœ te manda o'o nœ kœyindœrœ œdœ pe ɔtshɔrœ á endje yisœ nœ fœ ɓœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ.
4.7: Kashe œ li adœke ɓœ vwaratœ zœ tœ kœdji ekpe ndœma toro nœ ayawaza á sœ kpi tœ kœyindœrœ. Kashe zatœ zœ djigi fœ Ndjaba.
4.8: Kœkpa ɔrɔ á uzu sœ kœkpa tœnœ adœke tshelœ ɔkɔ œne sœ hara, œ sœ yara tœ ɔtshɔnœ; kashe kœzatœ osho djigi fœ Ndjaba dá ropa œrœ kɔ. Gbambanœ nene, uzu á tshe zatœ ye djigi fœ Ndjaba, tshe gbɔ soro nœ kpesheke dœ œnœ tshambatsha.
4.9: Wu adja o'onœ á li dœ azu para kɔkɔ kœyindœ nœ dœ lɔsu bale.
4.10: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ a kœsœ kœwu oyo yé á sœ kœnga koshe, œ sœ mbœrœ a za lɔsu azœ djigi ga tœ Ndjaba nœ soro, á tshe dœ Ayi kœshe azu para kɔkɔ, kashe ayindœ Yisu kœropa nœ.
4.11: Wu œneke á li adœke ɓœ mɨndœ nœ, yé œ yisœ nœ. Timote, andiyi nœ ayindœ Yisu
4.12: Uzu bale yiyiangba zœ mbœrœ á ɓœ dœ gbolo modo nene, kashe ma ɔtshɔ ɔtshɔ zœ ga ndœ ayindœ Yisu, lœ o'o zœ, lœ kœsœ ɓœ, lœ kœyindœsho nœ zœ, lœ kœyindœrœ nœ zœ œdœ lœ kœsœ yerœ nœ zœ.
4.13: Kœka œrrr ga tœ kœkwa mœ, zatœ zœ ko ga tœ kœdɨ Buku nœ Ndjaba, kœmɨ upu ndœ nœ œdœ kœyisœ nœ.
4.14: Kakatœ kœza gbɔgbɔ nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ á sœ lœ zœ ga tœ akwa nene. Tœ nœ kœdœ gbɔgbɔ á ɓœ gbɔ lima lɔkɔ kœgbara o'o tœ upu nœ zœ, á agbozu Ikrizia to lima kane endje ga pa zœ.
4.15: Gbe dœ kœmbœrœ œrœnœ asœke dœ ɔtshɔnœ yé zatœ zœ kɔ ndœ nœ mbœrœ azu kɔ kœwusœ mara á ɓœ sœ kœgerœ tœnœ lœ Yisu.
4.16: Gbɔndœtœ zœ dœ tœ zœ œdœ ndje dœ kœyisœrœ nœ zœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ kane yé œ ru lɔsu zœ lœ œrœ kɔ. Mbœrœ lœ awa nœ kœmbœrœ atamœ dá ɓœ shetœ zœ dœ tœ zœ œdœ ndje azu á endje sœ kœdji ɓœ.

5.1: Mɨmɨ upu dœ ɔgbɔ o'o fœ yagbozu nene, kashe mɨ upu fœ she ɓata aba zœ. Mɨ upu fœ amodo ɓata aaya zœ,
5.2: fœ ayawaza ɓata aayi zœ, fœ ayawuru ɓata ayingɔ zœ, lœ kœsœ yerœ nœ zœ. Ayashe koya
5.3: Lɨ œsœ ayashe koya, endjeneke á endje dœ́ adja ayashe koya.
5.4: Kashe yashe koya neke á tshe sœ dœ agbolo too dœ aatanœ, œ li adœke endje za kœyindœrœ nœ endje ga tœ akwa ga ndœ azu tshelœ adja bɨngɨ nœ endje yé œ mbœrœ œneke á li adœke endje mbœrœ fœ aayi kœzu endje too fœ aata endje. Gbambanœ nene, asœmœ dá sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ utshu Ndjaba.
5.5: Yashe koya neke á tshe dœ adja yashe koya, á tshe gugu dœ uzu kœgbɔndœ ye nene, tshe za lɔsu ga tœ Ndjaba. Tshe eshondœ œrœ ɓa ndœ ye, œ kɨ fœ she butshɔ dœ ɔlɔ.
5.6: Kashe ayashe koya á endje kœsœ kolœ dœ yanga œrœ tshapashɔ, ataa endje sœ dœ soro gbaa, endje tshu lœ ɨshirɨ endje ye.
5.7: Wu œneke á li adœke ɓœ mɨndœ nœ, mbœrœ á endje kœmbœrœtœ endje adœke azu kœgbagbara endje nene.
5.8: Œdœ uzu kœwuwusœ kœgbɔndœ bɨngɨ nœ ye nene, adja azu neke á endje sœ sœnda nœ ye, dá tshe vwaratœ ye tœ kœyindœrœ yé tshe kœdœ ekpe uzu kœropa uzu á tshe yiyindœ Ndjaba nene.
5.9: Yashe á endje sú ɨ'ɨrɨ ye gala mbeti nœ ayashe koya, kœdœ yashe á tshe sœ dœ ungu kœto kpœpa zazu votɔ, á i lima kolœ yakoshe bale.
5.10: Œ li adœke azu wusœ ye dœ ɔtshɔ akwa nœ ye: tshe dœ yashe neke á tshe gbɔ lima ndœ agbolo, á tshe sœ kœza osho kœsœ fœ azu, á tshe sœ kœdjutɔ ada ayindœ Yisu yé á sœ kœgbe dœ azu á endje sœ lœ oyo. Tshe dœ ndje yashe á tshe li tœ kœmbœrœ tshelœ aka ɔtshɔrœ kɔ.
5.11: Kashe susu ɨ'ɨrɨ avoro ayashe koya nene, mbœrœ lɔkɔ á endje kœsœ dœ ogo nœ ɔkɔ, endje vwaratœ endje tœ Kristu yé œ kpa yindœ kœi ayakoshe.
5.12: Ataa, Ndjaba œ wa ɔgbɔ ngbanga ga tœ endje mbœrœ á endje ndɨ tshelœ ali o'o á endje wa lima.
5.13: Gapa nœ, ɓata endje sœsœ dœ akwa bale kœmbœrœ tœnœ nene, endje sœ kœna ana yoo yoo djelœ manda azu, kœpu lœma endje, kœli ga lœ o'o á dœ́dœ́ œnœ endje nene dœ kœpa o'o neke á gaga nene.
5.14: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ yindœ nœ adœke avoro ayashe koya kpa i ayakoshe, œ zu agbolo, œ gbɔndœ tshasœnda nœ endje, mbœrœ ayingba azœ kœgbɔgbɔ awa kœpatœ osho nene.
5.15: Gbambanœ nene, ɨlɨ anga endje djingili awa yé œ te manda Satana.
5.16: Œdœ anga yashe á tshe yindœ Yisu kœsœ dœ ayingɔnœ á endje dœ ayashe koya, œ li adœke tshe to œrœ fœ endje; tshe kakatœ endje tɨ tœ Ikrizia nene, mbœrœ adœke Ikrizia kœgbe dœ endjeneke á endje dœ adja ayashe koya. Agbozu Ikrizia
5.17: Agbozu Ikrizia neke á endje lœ kœko ala endje tœ ayindœ Yisu dœ ɔtshɔnœ, endje li adja kœgbɔ kœlɨsœtœ awa bisha, mbœrœ endje sœ kœzatœ endje ga tœ akwa nœ o'o ama Ndjaba yé œ sœ kœyisœ nœ.
5.18: Mbeti nœ Ndjaba pa adœke: «Œdœ 'e kœsœ kœwa ngwarœ dœ ngombe lœ kɨndɨ, i i ama ye ga tœnœ nene, yé œ li adœke ayi akwa gbɔ œrœ tshangba akwa nœ ye.»
5.19: Tœ kœwa ngbanga pa gbozu Ikrizia, œ li adœke atimu bisha too votɔ yindœ o'onœ yekane á ɓœ kœwa ngbanganœ. Ete nene, œ li dœ ɓœ kœvwaratœ zœ tœ mezanœ á endje tɔ pa ye asœmœ ye.
5.20: Azu á endje sœ kœmbœrœ ekperœ, za ala endje tœ ala azu kɔ, á kœza ndje awa fœ anga udu azu kœmbœrœ ndje ekperœ.
5.21: Mœ sœ kœyu ɓœ dœ ɔgbɔ ɓa utshu Ndjaba, ɓa utshu Yisu Kristu œdœ pe ɓa utshu aandjelu nœ Ndjaba adœke, ɓœ mbœrœtœ zœ lindœ œrœnœ asœke kɔ, dœ anga angbɨ gbetshelœ á sœ utshunœ nene, yé œ yindœ azu kɔ awa bale.
5.22: Toto kane zœ katsha ga pa uzu á tshe yindœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ Ndjaba nene. Lili ndje ga lœ ekperœ nœ azu nene. Gbɔndœtœ zœ adœke ɓœ sœ yerœ.
5.23: Ndjondjo kolœ ungu nene. Kashe ndjo ndje vinu teasho mbœrœ koɓa tshelœ nœ zœ, mbœrœ á ɓœ sœ ndje kœte kpɔɔkpɔɔ dœ koɓa.
5.24: Anga azu lœ zœ á ekperœ nœ endje sœ ngbɨ utshu kœwa ngbanga pa endje kashe ɓa ndœ anga endje, a wusœ ekperœ nœ endje kolœ manda kœwa ngbanga pa endje.
5.25: Awa bale ndje, ɔtshɔ akwa sœ kœmatœ endje ngbɨ kashe á lili kœmatœ endje nene, œ za ndje tœ endje yiwa tœnœ nene.

6.1: Azu neke kɔ á endje dœ́ akanga, œ li adœke endje lɨsœ ayengɔ endje lœ œrœ kɔ, mbœrœ adœke azu kœgugusœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Ndjaba œdœ kœyisœrœ nœ azœ nene.
6.2: Akanga má agbozu tshapa endje kœdœ ayindœ Yisu, endje vwavwaratœ endje kœlɨsœ ayengɔ endje mbœrœ adœke endje kœdœ alaya endje nene. Kashe, endje kpa mbœrœ ɔtshɔ akwa fœ endje kœropa nœ, mbœrœ ayengɔ endje á endje sœ kœtɨ kane endje dœ akwa galafo, endje kœdœ ayindœ Yisu á endje kɔ, endje yindœtœ endje. Ɔtshɔ kœzatœ osho fœ Ndjaba Wu o'o á li adœke ɓœ yisœ nœ, œ za o'o mbœrœ tœnœ.
6.3: Œdœ anga uzu kœna dœ angbɨ kœyisœrœ, á kœsœsœ liaka o'o nœ adja o'o nœ Gbozu nœ azœ Yisu Kristu nene, too dœ kœyisœrœ nœ azu á li dœ kœyindœrœ nœ azœ nene,
6.4: uzu nœ asœmœ kœdœ uzu á kœzatœ osho bu ala ye. Tshe kœdœ uzu á tshe wuwusœ œrœ nene, ayi koɓa nœ sharapu á tshe sœ kœpara awa ndœ kœgbugburu tshelœ o'o gbambanœ. Œrœnœ kɔ asœmœ sœ kœza awa fœ úkú, kœbœrœtœ azu pa o'o, kœgu osho, ekpe gbetshelœ,
6.5: kœbœrœtœ azu pa o'o á ádánœ gugu nene ugurutœ azu á kœwusœrœ nœ endje fu. Endje kpa sœsœ kœwu adja o'o nene yé œ gbe adœke kœzatœ uzu fœ Ndjaba kœdœ kœte ayi kœgbɔ ukpulu œrœ.
6.6: Œ dœ́ adjapu adœke kœzatœ uzu fœ Ndjaba kœdœ kœte ayi kœgbɔ ukpulu œrœ kashe œ li adœke uzu za lɔsu ye ga pa œneke á tshe sœ dœ tœnœ.
6.7: Mbœrœ a na lima tshakane azœ gbambanœ ga pashɔ, awa bale a gu ndje tshakane azœ gbambanœ.
6.8: Yé œdœ a kœsœ dœ kœzɨrœ, œdœ a kœsœ dœ lœba kœverœ ga tœ azœ, œ li dœ azœ kolœnœ ataa.
6.9: Kashe azu neke á endje yindœ kœgbɔ ukpulu œrœ, endje li ga lœ afara. Endje yo ga lœ ama úkú mbœrœ ogo ɨndɨ nœ endje dœ ekperœ, á ndɨ azu yé á mbœrœ adœke azu djingili awa.
6.10: Gbambanœ nene, ekperœ kɔ to lœ kœsœ dœ egerœ lɔsu ngendja. Anga ɨlɨ azu para awanœ, œ gitœ endje zara lœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje. Endje shokɔ o'o ga tœ ɔkɔ endje dœ tœ endje. Ɔtshɔ akwa nœ kœyindœrœ
6.11: Kashe œɓœ, uzu nœ Ndjaba, kpa awa œrœnœ kɔ asœke. Para awa tœ kœsœ ndjii, kœzatœ zœ fœ Ndjaba, kœsœ dœ kœyindœrœ, kœsœ dœ kœyindœsho, ugu lɔsu œdœ pe kœsœ dœ lɔsu zɨtɨ.
6.12: Nga ɔtshɔ koshe tœ upu nœ kœyindœrœ, tepa soro á ka nene dœ ɔgbɔ, á Ndjaba e ɓœ ndœ nœ yé á ɓœ pa lima o'o kœyindœrœ utshu azu ndjoro.
6.13: Atamœ, mœ sœ kœza o'o fœ ɓœ utshu Ndjaba á tshe za soro fœ œrœ kɔ, dœ Yisu Kristu á tshe pa lima ɔtshɔ o'o ngbɨ tœ upu nœ kœyindœrœ lɔkɔ á Pose Pilato sœ lima kœwa ngbanga pa ye, mœ za o'o fœ ɓœ adœke:
6.14: gbɔndœ awa akwa á ɓœ gbɔ, sœ yerœ adœke azu gbagbagbara ɓœ nene œrrr ga tœ lɔkɔ kœkwa Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu,
6.15: á Ndjaba œ ma dœ lɔkɔ á tshe guma. Ndjaba kœdœ Gbozu nœ gbɔgbɔ kɔ, Gbozu nœ yanga kɔ, Gbozugo nœ agbozugo œdœ Gbozu nœ agbozu,
6.16: kolœ œshe á tshe wuwu kuzu nene, tshe sœ lœ ɔlɔ á uzu bale œ li kœwuta ɓa zœ nene. Uzu bale á tshe wu lia she gugu nene yé uzu á tshe li kœwu ndje she gugu nene. Kaka mokɔ œdœ gbɔgbɔ á ka nene sœ fœ she! Ame. Kœmɨ upu fœ ayi kœgbɔ ukpulu œrœ
6.17: Mɨ upu fœ ayi kœgbɔ ukpulu œrœ ɓa pa ɔshɔ adœke endje dudu okoro endje nene yé œ zaza lɔsu endje djigi ga pa œrœ á œndœnœ œ dɨ nene, kashe endje za lɔsu endje ga pa Ndjaba, á tshe sœ kœto œrœ fœ azu adœke endje sœ dœ yanga mbœrœ tœnœ.
6.18: Za o'o fœ endje adœke endje mbœrœ ɔtshɔ akwa, endje te ayi ukpulu œrœ lœ ɔtshɔ akwa yé œ sœ hara hara tœ kœkurutshelœ œrœ nœ endje dœ anga azu.
6.19: Atamœ, endje gbɔ ɔtshɔrœ á œndœnœ œ dɨ mbœrœ endje dœ tœ endje bala mbatsha, mbœrœ kœtepa adja soro. Ndɔngɔlɔ abala
6.20: Uu Timote, gbɔndœ kœyisœrœ á endje yi lima sœ nœ fœ ɓœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ kane. Kpa awa kœpa o'o ngbɨlɨ ngbɨlɨ á sœ kœyiangba Ndjaba œdœ o'o á azu gbe adœke œtœnœ kœdœ adja kœwusœrœ, kashe œ dœ́dœ́ tœnœ nene.
6.21: Anga azu gbe lima adœke œne sœ dœ mara kœwusœrœ atamœ, œ gitœ endje zara lœ kœyindœrœ nœ endje. Kaka ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba sœ dœ 'e.

1.1: Œmœ Polo, œmœ kœdœ ayi avwa nœ Yisu Kristu á Ndjaba ke mœ, á vwa mœ kœpa fœ azu tœ upu nœ soro á tshe pa lima ndœ nœ lœ awa nœ Yisu Kristu.
1.2: Mœ sœ kœsu mbetinœ fœ ɓœ Timote á ɓœ dœ́ gbolo nœ mœ á mœ yindœ zœ waa. Kaka ɔtshɔ lɔsu dœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœ œdœ pe kœsœ gee nœ Ndjaba Aba dœ Yisu Kristu Gbozu nœ azœ, sœ dœ ɓœ. Polo mɨ upu fœ Timote
1.3: Mœ sœ kœgi mershe fœ Ndjaba kœgbe dœ mara á aata mœ donga lima she, yé mœ kpa donga ndje she dœ gbetshelœ á sœ yerœ. Butshɔ dœ ɔlɔ á mœ sœ kœza avwala nœ mœ fœ she, mœ kakatœ kœgbe dœ ɓœ nene.
1.4: Mœ kœgbe dœ ngola zœ á tu lima, ngbewo mœ kpa sœ dœ ogo nœ kœwu ɓœ yeka á lɔsu mœ kœsœ dœ yanga.
1.5: Mœ sœ ndje kœgbe dœ mara adja kœyindœrœ nœ zœ. Œneke á sœ lima lœ ata zœ dœ Loyisi dœ pe ayi zœ dœ Enise, endje dá sœ lima dœ kœyindœrœnœ asœmœ utshu zœ. Mœ yindœ nœ adœke tœnœ dá sœ ndje adja lœ zœ.
1.6: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ za o'o fœ ɓœ adœke ɓœ mbœrœ adœke, gbɔgbɔ á Ndjaba za fœ ɓœ ndœ kœmbœrœ dœ akwa pe dœ lɔkɔ á mœ to lima kane mœ ga pa zœ asœmœ, kpa djedjerowa nene.
1.7: Gbambanœ nene, œ dœ́dœ́ Ɨshirɨ nœ awa dá Ndjaba za fœ azœ nene kashe tshe za Ɨshirɨ á tshe mbœrœ adœke a sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ, dœ kœyindœsho œdœ ndje kœdœ agbozu ga pa undu azœ.
1.8: Sœsœ dœ tshula tœ kœpandœ o'o tœ upu nœ Gbozu nœ azœ nene, sœsœ ndje dœ tshula tœ mœ dœ́ ayi kánga tœ upu nœ ye nene. Kashe dœ awa nœ gbɔgbɔ á Ndjaba za fœ ɓœ, œ li adœke ɓœ wu oyo awa bale dœ mœ ndœ kœgbara Ɔtshɔ O'onœ.
1.9: Tshe she azœ yeka á e azœ adœke á dœ azu nœ ye. Œ dœ́dœ́ mbœrœ akwa nœ azœ nene, kashe liaka œneke á tshe guma katshatsha œdœ ndje ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye. Tshe ma lima ɔtshɔ lɔsunœ fœ azœ lœ ngbɔtœ nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu utshu kœmbœrœ tshapashɔ.
1.10: Ndjaba ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ngbɨ lœ awa nœ kœna Ayi kœshe azœ dœ Yisu Kristu ga pa ɔshɔ. Œshe dá wo gbɔgbɔ nœ kuzu, á gbara o'o nœ soro á ka nene lœ awa nœ Ɔtshɔ O'o.
1.11: Mbœrœ tœnœ dá Ndjaba ke mœ adœke mœ dœ uzu kœpandœ ama œne, ayi avwa nœ œne œdœ ayi kœyisœrœ.
1.12: Mbœrœ tœnœ dá mœ sœ kœwu oyonœ kɔ asœke. Kashe mœ sœsœ dœ tshula nene mbœrœ mœ wusœ tsheneke á mœ za lɔsu mœ ga pa ye. Mœ wusœ nœ adœke tshe sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ kœgbɔndœ œneke á tshe to fœ mœ œrrr ga tœ lɔkɔ kœwa ngbanga pa azu.
1.13: Na kolœ manda adja o'o á mœ yisœ nœ fœ ɓœ, yé ka ngbɨrɨ lœ kœyindœrœ dœ pe kœyindœsho á a gbɔ lœ ngbɔtœ nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu.
1.14: Dœ awa nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ á tshe sœ lœ azœ, gbɔndœ Ɔtshɔ O'onœ á endje yi lima sœ nœ fœ ɓœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ kane.
1.15: Ɓata á ɓœ wusœ nœ, azu kɔ á endje sœ lœ Azi katœ mœ tɨ para kɔkɔ. Fijele ndje dœ Ermojene lœ ndje ugurutœ endje.
1.16: Kaka Gbozu wu oyo azu lœ bɨngɨ nœ Onezifore, mbœrœ tshe sœ kœu mœ ga tœnœ waa yé tshe sœsœ dœ tshula mbœrœ á mœ sœ lœ kánga nene.
1.17: Gbambanœ nene, kolœ kœyi kuma ye ga lœ Roma, tshe para mœ œrrr yé, œ gbɔ mœ.
1.18: Kaka Gbozu Ndjaba wu oyo ye dœ lɔkɔ kœwa ngbanga pa azu. Œɓœ dœ tœ zœ ndje ɓœ wusœ œneke kɔ á tshe mbœrœ lima fœ mœ ɓa lœ ongbo Efeze ye.

2.1: Kashe œɓœ, gbolo nœ mœ, kaka ɔtshɔrœ á Yisu Kristu to fœ ɓœ, za gbɔgbɔ fœ ɓœ.
2.2: Œrœ á ɓœ dji mœ kœmɨndœ nœ utshu azu ndjoro, yisœ nœ fœ azu á endje li adœke endje yi ndje sœ nœ fœ anga azu.
2.3: Wu ndje œsœ́ œnœ zœ oyonœ mbœrœ Yisu Kristu ɓata ɔtshɔ turugu.
2.4: Uzu á tshe mbœrœ akwa turugu, tshe kpa li ga lœ o'o nœ azu á endje dœ́dœ́ aturugu nene, kashe tshe para kolœ awa nœ kœza yanga fœ gbozu nœ ye.
2.5: Awa bale ɓa ndœ ayi kœkpa ɔrɔ, uzu á tshe wuta utshunœ kœdœ uzu neke á tshe mbœrœtœ ye liaka awa akwa nœ ɔrɔ.
2.6: Ayi kœdjo kɨndɨ neke á tshe shi kɔ'dɔɔ lœma akwa kɨndɨ nœ ye, œshe dá dœ uzu utshunœ kœzɨ ngwarœnœ.
2.7: Dji o'o á mœ pa asœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ: Gbozu dœ tœ ye dá to kœwusœrœ nœ kœdji tshelœ katanœ kɔ fœ ɓœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ.
2.8: Gbe dœ Yisu Kristu á tshe to lœ aata Davidi, á tshe she lœ akuzu. Œneke á Ɔtshɔ O'onœ pa tœnœ á mœ sœ kœpandœ nœ.
2.9: Mœ sœ kœwu oyo lœ kumunœ, yé mbœrœ tœnœ dá endje i mœ dœ djingiri ɓata uzu kœmbœrœ ngbɨndɨrœ, kashe endje li kœi o'o ama Ndjaba nene!
2.10: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ sœ kœru lɔsu mœ lœ œrœ kɔ mbœrœ azu á Ndjaba ke endje adœke endje gbɔ kœshe á Yisu Kristu to yé endje li ga lœ mokɔ nœ waa dœ waa.
2.11: O'onœ asœke kœdœ adjapu: Œdœ a kœtshu dœ she, a sœ dœ soro awa bale dœ she.
2.12: Œdœ á kœshi gbɨ, a wuta agbozu awa bale dœ she. Œdœ a kœvwaratœ azœ tœ ye, tshe vwara ndje tœ ye tœ azœ.
2.13: Œdœ a kœzazatœ azœ lindœ o'o ama ye nene, tshe zatœ ye lindœ nœ, mbœrœ tshe li kœvwaratœ ye tœ undu ye dœ tœ ye nene. Ayi akwa á ɔtshɔ ye ga tœ Ndjaba
2.14: Pa fœ azu, endje gbe dœ o'onœ asœke. Kpa pa fœ endje utshu Ndjaba adœke endje zazatœ endje ga tœ kœgbugburu tshelœ o'o gbambanœ á ádánœ gugu nene yé œ sœ kolœ kœndɨ azu á endje sœ kœdji tœnœ.
2.15: Mbœrœ kɔ adœke ɓœ wuta uzu á tshe li tœ ala Ndjaba yé, yisœ adja o'o ɓata ayi akwa neke á tshe li kœgbɔ tshula lœma akwa nœ ye nene.
2.16: Kpa awa kœpa o'o ngbɨlɨ ngbɨlɨ á sœ kœyiangba Ndjaba, mbœrœ azu kœpa o'onœ asœmœ vwaratœ endje tœ Ndjaba.
2.17: Kœyisœrœ nœ endje sœ ɓata uku á dele katshakatsha. Mœ gbe dœ Imini œdœ Filete ugurutœ azu asœmœ.
2.18: Endje katœ adja o'o yé œ sœ kœpa wala fœ azu adœke kœshe lœ akuzu nœ azu mbœrœ ɓalima tœ endje ye. Ataa, endje sœ kœndɨ tshelœ kœyindœrœ nœ anga azu.
2.19: Kashe kiti anda neke á Ndjaba tɔ, œ ka ngbɨrɨ. Gapa nœ dœmœ, endje sú ala Mbeti adœke: «Gbozu wusœ endje nœ ye», yé: «Uzu kɔ á tshe pa adœke œne kœdœ uzu nœ Gbozu, œ li adœke tshe vwaratœ ye tœ ekperœ.»
2.20: Ɓa lœ egerœ anda, œ dœ́dœ́ kolœ gbarœ á endje mbœrœ dœ ɔrœ œdœ ngendja dá sœ lœnœ nene. Anga gbara á endje mbœrœ dœ ɔyɔ œdœ ɔshɔ œ sœ ndje zœ. Anga gbarœ sœ mbœrœ angbo kpi yekane anganœ sœ mbœrœ akwa kɔ.
2.21: Œdœ uzu kœvwaratœ ye tœ ekperœ kɔ, uzunœ wuta ɓata gbarœ á sœ ga angbo di, á li tœ ala ayengɔnœ yé á li ndje ndœ kœmbœrœ dœ ɔtshɔ akwa kɔ. Ayi akwa nœ Gbozu
2.22: Kpa awa ogo œrœ tshagbolo, para awa kœsœ ndjii, kœyindœrœ, kœyindœsho, kœsœ gee dœ azu má endje sœ dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu, á sœ kœza avwala fœ Gbozu.
2.23: Vwaratœ zœ tœ kœgbugburu tshelœ o'o nœ gbambanœ mbœrœ œ sœ kœgbota azu ga lœ œbœrœ waa.
2.24: Mbœrœ ayi akwa nœ Gbozu lili kœbœrœtœ ye dœ azu nene, kashe œ li dœ she kœsœ dœ lɔsu ye zɨtɨ ga ndœ azu para kɔkɔ. Tshe wusœ kœyisœ œrœ, œ wu ndje sœ kœru lɔsu ye.
2.25: Azu á endje sœ kœshara o'o lœ ama ye, œ li dœ she kœpara awa nœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ endje dœ lɔsu zɨtɨ. Anganœ, Ndjaba œ mbœrœ adœke endje fatshalɔsu endje yé œ wusœ adja o'o.
2.26: Yé endje kpa gbɔ gbetshelœ á sœ ndjii, œ wuta lœ gbanda nœ djaboro á tshe te lima pa endje adœke endje mbœrœ kolœ gbetshelœ nœ œne.

3.1: Wusœ nœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke, osho sœ tœ ɔgbɔnœ mbœrœ tœ kœka tshapashɔ.
3.2: Gbambanœ nene, azu œ dœ aayi otoro, aayi egerœ lɔsu ga pa ngendja, aayi kœdonga tœ endje, aayi egerœ kumu, aayi kœgu œsœ Ndjaba, azu á endje lɨsœ aayi kœzu endje nene, azu á endje wusœ kœgi mershe nene yé œ kpa ndje awa Ndjaba nene.
3.3: Ala endje œ ɔrɔ yé endje wu oyo uzu bale nene, œ dœ aayi kœpa ngbɨndɨ o'o ga tœ azu, aayi djipudji, aayi kœmbœrœ ɔgbɔrœ ga tœ azu, ayingba ɔtshɔrœ.
3.4: Aayi kœva ɔtɔ anga endje, aayi ókó, aayibula lœ egerœ kumu nœ endje, aayi kœyindœ tshapashɔ kœropa Ndjaba.
3.5: Endje matœ endje ɓata aayi kœkpa awa Ndjaba kashe endje wuwusœ gbɔgbɔ nœ ye nene. Kpa awa mara azu ataa.
3.6: Anga azu ugurutœ endje œ li gasœnda, œ gbota ayashe á endje mɔɔmɔ, yé œ bɨlɨ endje adœke endje yindœ o'o nœ œne. Ayashenœ asœmœ mbœrœ ekperœ waa, gbetshelœ nœ endje sœ dœ ogo kœmbœrœ ekperœ kɔ.
3.7: Endje sœ kœyamba œrœ waa kashe endje lili kœwusœ adja o'o nene.
3.8: Aayi kœyisœrœ nœ walanœ asœmœ vwaratœ endje tœ adja o'o ɓata Ayane dœ Yambele vwara lima tœ endje tœ o'o ama Moyize. Endje kœdœ azu á kœwusœrœ nœ endje fu, á ádá kœyindœrœ nœ endje gugu nene,
3.9: kashe endje na ga utshunœ nene mbœrœ azu kɔ œ wusœ nœ adœke, endje ndɨ lœ gbetshelœ nœ endje awa bale ɓata endje wu lima sœ ɨndɨ Ayane dœ Yambele. Na manda œrœ á ɓœ yamba
3.10: Kashe œɓœ, ɓœ dji mœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ lœ kœyisœrœ nœ mœ, ɓœ wusœ ɔtshɔ mœ, dœ œrœ á mœ gbe kœmbœrœ tœnœ, dœ kœyindœrœ nœ mœ, dœ ugu lɔsu nœ mœ, dœ kœyindœsho nœ mœ, dœ kœshi gbɨ nœ mœ lœ awa akwa,
3.11: ɓœ wusœ œrœ kanga œdœ oyo má mœ wu ɓa lœ Atiɔshe, ɓa lœ Ikoniyume, œdœ pe ɓa lœ Listre, œrœ kanga gaɗe dá mœ wuwu nene a! Kashe, Gbozu she mœ lœ nœ kɔ.
3.12: Adjapu, azu kɔ á endje yindœ kœna manda Yisu Kristu, á yindœ kœzatœ endje djigi fœ Ndjaba, endje wu kanga.
3.13: Kashe akpe azu dœ pe aayi kœbɨlɨ osho, endje li vwerema ga lœ ekperœ, endje bɨlɨ anga azu yé œ bɨlɨtœ endje dœ tœ endje.
3.14: Kashe ɓœ, sœ kolœ kœna manda œrœ á ɓœ yamba á yindœ nœ dœ lɔsu zœ bale asœmœ. Ɓœ wusœ uzunœ á tshe yisœ nœ fœ ɓœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ.
3.15: Ɓœ wusœ œyerœ Buku nœ Ndjaba pe dœ gbolo zœ, œ li tœ kœto kœwusœtœ á na dœ ɓœ œrrr ga lœ kœshe lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Yisu Kristu.
3.16: Œneke kɔ á endje sú ala Buku nœ Ndjaba asœmœ, endje sú lœ awa nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ. Bukunœ asœmœ li tœ kœyisœrœ, kœma ekperœ ngbɨ, kœyɔrɔ uzu œdœ kœmbœrœ adœke uzu wuta tœ ɔtshɔnœ tœ ala Ndjaba,
3.17: yeka á uzu nœ Ndjaba kœgumatœ ye dœ ɔtshɔnœ, á kœli tœ kœmbœrœ kolœ ɔtshɔ akwa.

4.1: Mœ sœ kœpa ngbɨ fœ ɓœ, utshu Ndjaba, dœ pe utshu Yisu Kristu á tshe kwa bala tœ ye ndœ kœwa ngbanga nœ asoro dœ akuzu, lœ gbetshelœ nœ kpa kœkwa she œdœ ndje kœsœ Gbozu pa œrœ kɔ.
4.2: Mɨndœ o'o ama Ndjaba, mbœrœ ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ yé kaka tœnœ nene. Azu dji too endje dji nene, sœpe kœyisœ nœ. Yɔrɔ endje, za ala endje yé œ mɨ upu fœ endje. Mbœrœ œneke kɔ dœ ugu lɔsu lœ awa nœ kœyisœrœ nœ zœ.
4.3: Gbambanœ nene, dœ anga lɔkɔ bale, endje li tœ kœru lɔsu endje ndœ kœdji kœyisœrœ nœ adja o'o nene, mbœrœ gbetshelœ nœ endje sœ kolœ kœna manda ogo undu endje dœ tœ endje. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, endje œ ko aayi kœyisœrœ ndjoro, endjeneke á o'o ama endje sœ kolœ kœga tœ endje.
4.4: Endje be utu endje ga tœnœ tœ kœdji adja o'o, yé œ fatœ endje kolœ ndœ kœdji ndœma toro.
4.5: Kashe ɓœ, œ li adœke ɓœ dœ gbozu tshapa undu zœ dœ tœ zœ lœ œrœ kɔ. Sœ dœ kœru lɔsu lœ kœwu oyo, mɨndœ Ɔtshɔ O'o fœ azu yé œ mbœrœ akwa á Ndjaba za fœ ɓœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ djigi kane.
4.6: Mbœrœ mœ, ɔlɔ kuzu mœ ndo ye. Mœ za soro mœ ɓata tokóró fœ Ndjaba.
4.7: Mœ nga ɔtshɔ koshe. Mœ wuta ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔ ɔrɔ nœ mœ, mœ sœ kolœ kœgbɔndœ kœyindœrœ.
4.8: Ngɔngɔ asœke, œrœ tshangba ɔtshɔ akwanœ á mœ mbœrœ sœ kœkatœ mœ zœ. Gbozu á tshe kœdœ ayi kœwa adja ngbanga dá za fœ mœ dœ lɔkɔ kœwa ngbanganœ asœmœ. Tshe za œrœ tshangba ɔtshɔ akwanœ kolœ fœ mœ dœ kutɨ mœ nene, kashe tshe za ndje fœ endjeneke kɔ á endje sœ kœkate kœkwa she. Ndɔngɔlɔ kœza o'o
4.9: Mbœrœ kɔ adœke ɓœ na kœgbɔtœ zœ dœ mœ katsha.
4.10: Gbambanœ nene, Demasi katœ mœ tɨ ye, mbœrœ á tshe yindœ œrœ tshapashɔ nœ asœke. Tshe ro ga lœ Tesalonike, Kresene ro ga lœ Galate yé Tito ro œne ye ga lœ Dalamati.
4.11: Kolœ Lukasi dá sœpe dœ mœ kpœke. Œ kœsœ adœke ɓœ na gamœ asœke, za Marke potœ zœ mbœrœ á sthe kœtɨ kane mœ lœ akwa nœ Ndjaba.
4.12: Mœ vwa Tishike ga lœ Efeze.
4.13: Kœna ɓœ, za lœba ɨzɨ á mœ katœnœ ɓa lœ Trowase ɓa ndœ Karposi, œ na dœ tœnœ fœ mœ. Ko ndje bukunœ na tœnœ fœ mœ, kœropanœ kɔ, œneke á endje mbœrœ dœ ɔkɔ agea .
4.14: Alekezandre, ayi ndawonœ, mbœrœ ekperœ fœ mœ waa. Gbozu œ gi tshangba œneke á tshe mbœrœ fœ mœ kœ li dœ ekperœ nœ ye asœmœ zœ.
4.15: Œɓœ ndje, tɨtœ zœ tœ ye mbœrœ á tshe vwaratœ ye tœ œrœnœ kɔ á a yi lima sœ nœ.
4.16: Ali kœka mœ ga utshu ayi kœwa ngbanga, uzu bale nana manda mœ nene, endje katœ mœ tɨ kɔ. Kaka Ndjaba gbegbe dœ ekperœ nœ endje nene.
4.17: Kashe Gbozu sœ lima dœ mœ awa bale. Œshe dá to gbɔgbɔ nœ ye fœ mœ yeka á mœ mɨndœ o'o nœ ye ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔ nœ. Endje neke kɔ á endje dœ́dœ́ Ayuda nene, dji yé Ndjaba she mœ lœ ama bamara.
4.18: Gbozu œ she mœ lœ oyo kɔ, œ mbœrœ adœke mœ li ga lœ ogo tshagbozu nœ ye ɓa lafo. Kaka adœke azu za mokɔ fœ she ngbugu dœ ngbugu. Ame! Ndɔngɔlɔ abala
4.19: Za abala nœ mœ fœ Prisile dœ Akilase œdœ pe ndje azu lœ bɨngɨ nœ Onezifore.
4.20: Eraste sœpe ɓa lœ Koriti yé mœ ka ndje tœ Trofime ɓa lœ Mile mbœrœ á tshe sœ lima dœ koɓa.
4.21: Mbœrœ kɔ adœke ɓœ wuta ɓa ke utshu nœ yapu nœ ɨzɨ. Ebule, dœ Pudese, dœ Linuse, dœ Klodia, ndje dœ pe ayindœ Yisu kɔ bala ɓœ.
4.22: Kaka Gbozu sœ dœ ɓœ. Kaka ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba sœ dœ 'e para kɔkɔ.

1.1: Œmœ Polo, œmœ kœdœ ayi akwa nœ Ndjaba œdœ ayi avwa nœ Yisu Kristu á tshe e mœ mbœrœ kœyisœ œrœ fœ azu á Ndjaba ke endje, adœke endje sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ ye yé œ wusœ adjapu lœ kœzatœ endje fœ she.
1.2: Mœ sœ kœmbœrœ akwa mbœrœ endje wusœ nœ adœke, œne gbɔ soro neke á ka nene, á Ndjaba pa lima ndœ nœ katshatsha utshu nœ kœmbœrœ tshapashɔnœ asœ, adœke œne za lima fœ endje. Tshe kœdœ Ndjaba á tshe fafa tshelœ ama ye nene.
1.3: Tshe za o'o ama ye ga tœ awa akwa liaka olo á tshe guma. Ayi kœshe azœ dœ Ndjaba dá za o'o ama ye fœ mœ yeka á vwa mœ adœke mœ mɨndœ nœ.
1.4: Mœ sœ kœsu mbetinœ asœ fœ ɓœ dœ́ Tito, adja gbolo nœ mœ lœ kœyindœrœ á a sœ dœ tœnœ ga ndœ Yisu Kristu. Kaka Ndjaba Aba œdœ Yisu Kristu ayi kœshe azœ, ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ endje ga ndœ zœ œ za kœsœ gee nœ endje fœ ɓœ. Kœke agbozu Ikrizia
1.5: Œdœ mœ kœkatœ zœ ɓa lœ Kelete, œ sœ mbœrœ ɓœ guma œneke á sœpe adœke ɓœ guma, yé œ ke agbozu Ikrizia lakpɨ bale dœ bale liaka awa akwa á mœ pandœ nœ fœ ɓœ.
1.6: Œ li adœke ɔtshɔ gbozu sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ adœke azu lele lœ endje mbœrœ she nene, tshe sœ dœ yashe tshebale, agbolo nœ ye dœ ayindœ Yisu mbœrœ azu kœpapa o'o tœ endje adœke ɔtshɔ endje gaga nene too endje kœdœ aayi sharapu nene.
1.7: Gbambanœ nene, endje ke gbozu tshelœ Ikrizia adœke tshe ko ala ye tœ œrœ nœ Ndjaba, ádánœ á li adœke azu lele lœ endje mbœrœ she nene dœmœ. Tshe dœ́dœ́ uzu kœzatœ ye nene, uzu ókó nene, uzu kœza ama ye tɨ lœ ipi nene, uzu nœ koshe hawo hawo nene, uzu á tshe sœ kœgbɔ ngendja dœ ekpe awa nene.
1.8: Kashe tshe dœ uzu kœza osho kœsœ fœ azu sœnda nœ ye, á tshe yindœ ɔtshɔrœ. Tshe dœ uzu nœ ɔtshɔ gbetshelœ á tshe sœ ndjii á sœ ndje yerœ, yé tshe wu ndje sœ kœgbɔndœtœ ye.
1.9: Œ li dœ she kœzatœ ye kolœ ga tœ o'o á endje yisœ nœ fœ she. Atamœ tshe li tœ kœmɨ upu fœ anga azu lœ adjapu yé œ sɔ akpa aayi kœyisœrœ dœ wala. Aayi kœyisœrœ dœ wala
1.10: Gbambanœ nene, azu ndjoro, kœropa nœ kɔ ɨlɨ endje ugurutœ Ayuda á endje te ayindœ Yisu, endje sœsœ kœmbœrœtœ endje liaka kœyisœrœnœ nene, endje sœ kœpa o'o ngbɨlɨ ngbɨlɨ yé endje sœ kœfara azu.
1.11: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, œ li adœke ɓœ mbœrœ adœke endje ngbɔɓa ama endje ga tœnœ. Endje sœ kœndɨ gbetshelœ nœ azu kɔ lœ bɨngɨ, lœ awa nœ kœyisœ œrœ á lili adœke endje yisœ nœ nene, endje yisœ nœ mbœrœ kœgbɔ ngendja.
1.12: Anga uzu nœ endje bale lœ Kelete á endje wu she ɓata ayi kœgbara o'o, pa lima adœke: «Azu Kelete kœdœ aayi wala, endje kœdœ akatshagea, aayi ɔdɔ yé endje yi kolœ ndœ kœzɨrœ.»
1.13: O'o kɔ á tshe pa kœdœ adjapu. Ádánœ á li dœ ɓœ kœza ala endje adœke endje sœ dœ adja kœyindœrœ,
1.14: endje katœ kœdji ndœmatoro nœ Ayuda, endje ka ndje tœ kœmbœrœtœ endje liaka awa akwa á azu á endje vwaratœ endje tœ adja kœyisœrœ guma.
1.15: Œrœ kɔ á azu nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu œ mbœrœ dœ akwa sœ yerœ, kashe azu uburu á endje gugu dœ kœyindœrœ nene, endje wu œrœ kɔ tœ œrœ uburu, mbœrœ kœwusœrœ nœ endje œdœ pe gbetshelœ nœ endje sú dœ ekperœ.
1.16: Endje sœ kœpa adœke œne wusœ Ndjaba kashe akwa tshelœ endje sœ kœma adœke endje wuwusœ ye nene. Endje yiangba endje mbœrœ ekpe akwa tshelœ endje, endje kœdœ aayi gbɔkumu yé endje lili kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔ œrœ bale nene.

2.1: Kashe ɓœ, yisœ o'o neke á li dœ adja kœyisœrœ.
2.2: Pa fœ agbɔ ayakoshe adœke endje dœ agbozu tshapa undu endje, azu á endje lɨsœ endje á endje sœ dœ ɔtshɔ gbetshelœ. Lœ œrœ kɔ, endje matœ endje tœ azu á endje ka ngbɨrɨ lœ kœyindœrœ, azu nœ kœyindœsho, azu nœ kœru lɔsu.
2.3: Awa bale fœ agbɔ ayashe. Œ li adœke endje mbœrœ tœ endje ɓata ayerœ azu, endje papatœ azu nene, yé endje fafatœ endje tœ akanga nœ ipi nene. Endje yisœ ɔtshɔrœ,
2.4: endje yisœ mara á li dœ avoro ayashe kœyindœ akɔ endje dœ agbolo nœ endje,
2.5: avoro ayashenœ sœ dœ ɔtshɔ gbetshelœ yé œ mbœmbœrœ angba budu nene. Endje mbœrœ akwa tshasœnda nœ endje dœ ɔtshɔnœ, endje dœ ɔtshɔ ayashe, œ lɨsœ akɔ endje adœke endje kœgugusœ o'o ama Ndjaba nene. Kœyisœrœ fœ adjagbala
2.6: Mɨ upu ndje fœ adjagbala adœke endje sœ dœ ɔtshɔ gbetshelœ
2.7: lœ œrœ kɔ. Œ li ndje dœ ɓœ dœ tœ zœ kœma ambárá ɔtshɔ akwa fœ endje lœ soro zœ dœ mara adœke, adja kœyisœrœ nœ zœ sœ ndjii yé œsœnœ lɨ.
2.8: Za kolœ adja o'o á li ga tœ akwa yeka azu kœshara upu mbœrœ akwa nœ azœ yé á kœfafatshelœ nœ nene. Ataa, endje gbɔ tshula yé œ gbɔ awa kœpa ekpe o'o nœ azœ nene. Kœyisœrœ fœ akanga
2.9: Mɨ upu fœ akanga adœke endje lɨsœ agbozu tshapa endje lœ œrœ kɔ, endje mbœrœ œrœ á za yanga fœ endje. Adja endje gbugbugburu tshelœ o'o dœ agbozu tshapa endje nene.
2.10: Endje zɨzɨangba œrœ nœ endje nene, endje zatœ endje mbœrœ akwa dœ lɔsu bale yé œ kakatœ anga tshakala akwa tɨ teasho nene yeka azu kœlɨsœ o'onœ á a sœ kœyisœ nœ tœ upu nœ Ndjaba á tshe she azœ. Azu nœ Yisu Kristu
2.11: Ndjaba ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye á li kœshe azu para kɔkɔ.
2.12: Ɔtshɔ lɔsunœ yisœ œrœ adœke, a katœ kœvwaratœ azœ tœ Ndjaba œdœ kœna manda ogo œrœ tshapashɔnœ asœke yeka a kœgbɔndœtœ azœ, á kœte azu kœlɨsœ Ndjaba, azu á endje sœ ndjii tœ ala ye.
2.13: A sœ kœmbœrœ atamœ, kœvu olo yanganœ á sœ kœkate azœ dœ lɔkɔ á a wu mokɔ nœ Yisu Kristu, á tshe kœdœ Ndjaba œdœ Ayi kœshe azœ.
2.14: Tshe zatœ ye fœ kuzu tœ œsœ́ azœ mbœrœ kœshe azœ lœ ekperœ kɔ. Tshe djutɔ azœ adœke a te azu nœ ye, azu á endje sœ kœpa avwara ndœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔ akwa.
2.15: Œ li dœ ɓœ kœmɨndœ upunœ asœ kɔ fœ azu. Yisœ awa akwa fœ endje yé œ za ala endje dœ gbɔgbɔ á Ndjaba za fœ ɓœ. Kaka adœke uzu bale dɨdɨ ɓœ nene.

3.1: Kpa mɨndœ nœ fœ azu nœ Ndjaba adœke endje lɨsœ agbozu tshapa akwa kɔ nœ Lita. Endje dji o'o ama endje yé œ yindœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔ akwa.
3.2: Endje gugu œsœ uzu bale nene, endje para kœsœ gee dœ azu yé œ dœ aayi kœmbœrœ ayo, œ sœ dœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu ga ndœ azu kɔ.
3.3: Gbambanœ nene, azœ kɔ a djingili lima awa yé œ dœ́ lima azu nœ ekpe gbetshelœ, a dœ́ lima aayi sharapu, aayi ɨndɨ, akanga nœ ogo ekperœ kɔ. A sœ lima hawo hawo yé œ sœ dœ úkú, endje yi lima angba azœ mbœrœ ekpe ɔtshɔ azœ yé a sœ ndje lima kœyiangba anga azœ.
3.4: Kashe, Ndjaba ayi kœshe azœ má fœ azœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye dœ pe kœyindœsho nœ ye.
3.5: Tshe sheshe azœ mbœrœ akwa nœ azœ á sœ ndjii nene, kashe œshe dœ tœ ye dá wu oyo azœ. Tshe she azœ dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ, á djutɔ azœ lœ ekperœ yé á a wuta atafo azu yeka a gbɔ tafo mara nœ kœmbœrœtœ azœ.
3.6: Ndjaba vwa Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨnœ tonge tonge ga pa azœ dœ awa nœ Yisu Kristu Ayi kœshe azœ,
3.7: tshe mbœrœ adœke a wuta ndjii tœ ala ye lœ awa nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye, dœ́ œ gbɔ soro á ka nene á a sœ kœvu tœnœ.
3.8: O'onœ asœ kœdœ adjapu yé mœ yindœ nœ adœke ɓœ ka ga pa kœyisœrœ nœ adœke azu á endje yindœ Ndjaba wotœ endje ndœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ. Wu œrœ œneke á sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ, á li dœ azu kœmbœrœ tœnœ.
3.9: Kashe ɓœ kpa awa kœgbugburu tshelœ o'o á ádánœ gugu nene, kœgbugburutshelœ o'o tœ upu nœ kœdɨ ɨ'ɨrɨ aata, œbœrœ œdœ kœnga koshe pa awa akwa, vwaratœ zœ tœ œrœnœ asœmœ. Œ sœ gbambanœ yé ádánœ gugu nene.
3.10: Tsheneke á tshe para awa kœkurutshelœ ayindœ Yisu, za ala ye awa bale too awa bisha. Á tshe kœdjidji ɓœ nene, katœ ye tɨ.
3.11: Wusœ nœ adœke, uzu ataa sœ lœ djingili, tshe kœdœ ayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ yé tshe sœ kœwa ngbanga ga tœ ye dœ tœ ye. Ndangba kœmɨ upu
3.12: Ɔlɔ á mœ kœvwa Artemase too Tishike fœ ɓœ, pa avwara kœna kœgbɔ mœ ɓa lœ Nikopolise. Ɓa zœ, dá œndœ mœ œ dɨ mbœrœ yapu nœ ɨzɨ.
3.13: Mbœrœ kɔ tœ kœgi Zenase á tshe kœdœ avoka œdœ pe Apolo ga tœ awa ana nœ endje. Mbœrœ œneke kɔ á li fœ endje.
3.14: Mbœrœ adœke aaya azœ dœ ayindœ Yisu zatœ endje ndœ ɔtshɔ akwa dœ lɔsu endje bale, mbœrœ kœtɨ kane anga azu á endje sœ lœ oyo. Ataa, mara ɔtshɔ endje œ sœ gbambanœ nene.
3.15: Azu para á endje sœ dœ mœ ɓa ke vwa abala fœ ɓœ. Za ndje abala fœ anga azœ dœ ayindœ Yisu. Kaka Ndjaba yisœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ga ndœ 'e para kɔkɔ.

1.1: Œmœ Polo, á endje za mœ vwi ga lœ kánga mbœrœ akwa nœ Yisu Kristu, dá sœ kœsu mbetinœ asœke œdœ aya azœ dœ Timote. 'A su mbetinœ fœ ɓœ Filemɔ, yanga 'a lœ ama akwa.
1.2: Dœ yingɔ 'a dœ Apia, dœ Arkipe yanga 'a lœ koshe œdœ ndje fœ anga ayindœ Yisu á endje ngbɔtœ endje ɓa sœnda nœ zœ.
1.3: Kaka Aba azœ dœ Ndjaba, dœ Gbozu Yisu Kristu yisœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ endje ga ndœ 'e yé œ za kœsœ gee nœ endje fœ 'e. Kœyindœrœ œdœ pe kœyindœsho nœ Filemɔ
1.4: Ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ mœ sœ kœgbe dœ ɓœ lœ kœza avwala nœ mœ fœ Ndjaba, yé œ sœ kœgi ndje mershe waa fœ she tœ upu nœ zœ;
1.5: gbambanœ nene, mœ dji azu kœpa o'o mbœrœ kœyindœsho nœ zœ ga ndœ ayerœ azu nœ Ndjaba para kɔkɔ œdœ pe ndje kœyindœrœ nœ zœ ga ndœ Gbozu Yisu.
1.6: Mœ sœ kœyu Ndjaba adœke kœyindœrœ á ngbɔɓa azœ dœ ɓœ ga tœnœ ma akwa, yeka á ɓœ kœwusœ ɔtshɔrœ kɔ á a gbɔ lœ kœngbɔtœ azœ bale dœ Kristu dœ ɔtshɔnœ.
1.7: Aya, yanga nœ mœ dopa nœ kolœ mbœrœ kœyindœsho nœ zœ ga ndœ anga ayindœ Yisu yé mœ ru lɔsu mœ mbœrœ tœnœ. Gbambanœ nene, ɓœ mbœrœ adœke lɔsu ayerœ azu nœ Ndjaba zɨ tɨɨ. Polo yu Filemɔ tœ Onezime
1.8: Mbœrœ tœnœ ndje ataa, Kristu za awa fœ mœ kœpa fœ ɓœ, œneke kɔ á li adœke ɓœ mbœrœ,
1.9: kashe mœ sœ kœ'eshondœ nœ adœke ɓœ mbœrœ kolœ lœ kœyindœsho nœ zœ. Mœ yindœ kœyu ɓœ tœ œrœ bale, œmœ dœ́ yagbozu Polo, á mœ sœ ngɔngɔ asœke lœ kánga mbœrœ Yisu Kristu,
1.10: mœ yu ɓœ tœ upu nœ Onezime, á tshe wuta gbolo nœ mœ á mœ zu she lœ kánga ɓa ke.
1.11: Utshunœ lima, tshe sœsœ lima kœmbœrœ œrœ bale fœ ɓœ nene, kashe ngɔngɔ asœke, tshe li kœmbœrœ œrœ fœ azœ dœ ɓœ.
1.12: Mœ gi she fœ ɓœ, œshe á tshe sœ ɓata tshakala kote mœ.
1.13: Œ li má dœ mœ kœgbɔndœ ye ɓa ɨndɨrɨ mœ ɓa ke á tshe kœmbœrœ akwa fœ mœ tœ́ œsœ́ zœ lœ kánga á mœ li lœ kumu Ɔtshɔ O'o.
1.14: Kashe mœ gbegbe kœmbœrœ ataa utshu kœdji gbetshelœ nœ zœ nene. Mœ sœsœ kœtovworogbo ɓœ kœmbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ fœ mœ dœ ɔgbɔ nene, kashe œ li dœ ɓœ kœmbœrœ œneke á lɔsu zœ yindœ nœ dœ tœ zœ.
1.15: Anganœ endje kurutshelœ 'e dœ Onezime ndœ olo teasho adœke ɓœ kpa kœkwatœ zœ ga ndœ ye waa dœ waa.
1.16: Ngɔngɔ asœke, tshe kpa dœ́dœ́ kolœ kanga nene, tshe ropa kanga ye. Tshe wuta aya azœ á mœ yindœ ye tɔpanœ kpuru. Mœ yindœ ye waa kashe œɓœ, ɓœ kpa yindœ ye tɔpanœ kpuru œdœ ɓata uzu œdœ ɓata yindœ Kristu.
1.17: Œdœ ɓœ kœwusœ nœ adœke œmœ kœdœ adja yanga zœ, za osho kœsœ fœ she ɓata á li dœ ɓœ kœza má fœ mœ.
1.18: Œdœ tshe kœmbœrœ lima ekperœ fœ ɓœ, œdœ kuɗa nœ zœ kœsœ ndje lima lœ kumu ye, za djigi ga pa mœ.
1.19: O'o asœke adja mœ dœ́ Polo dá su: œmœ mœ gi kuɗa tshaangba ye para kɔkɔ fœ ɓœ. Kashe œɓœ ndje, ɓœ gbe dœ kuɗa nœ mœ á sœ pa zœ kane: kuɗanœ asœmœ kœdœ soro zœ.
1.20: Atamœ aya, mœ yu ɓœ adœke ɓœ mbœrœ ɔtshɔrœ fœ mœ adœke lɔsu mœ zɨ tɨɨ mbœrœ a sœ bale lœ ɨ'ɨrɨ Kristu.
1.21: Mœ sú mbetinœ asœke fœ ɓœ dœ lɔsu adœke ɓœ mbœrœ œneke á mœ eshondœ nœ ga tœ zœ yé mœ wusœ nœ adœke ɓœ kpa mbœrœ kœropa œneke á mœ gbe dœ tœnœ.
1.22: Ga pa nœ, œ li adœke ɓœ guma osho olo fœ mœ mbœrœ mœ wu adœke Ndjaba œ dji avwala nœ 'e yé œ kɔrɔ awa fœ mœ ndœ kœna ga ndœ 'e zœ. Abala nœ azu fœ Filemɔ
1.23: Epafraze á 'a sœ dœ she lœ kánga mbœrœ Yisu Kristu, vwa abala fœ ɓœ.
1.24: Aanga mœ lœ ama akwa: Marke, Aristarke, Demasi œdœ pe Lukasi á 'a sœ tœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ Ndjaba awa bale dœ endje asœmœ, para kɔkɔ endje vwa abala fœ ɓœ.
1.25: Kaka adœke Gbozu nœ azœ dœ Yisu Kristu ma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ga ndœ 'e.

1.1: Utshunœ lima, Ndjaba pa o'o fœ aata azœ, tshe pa o'o lœ awa nœ aayi kœgbara o'o; tshe pa o'o fœ endje kpalakpala œdœ pe lœ tshelœ aka mara ndjoro,
1.2: yé ngɔngɔ tœ ndɔngɔlɔ oshonœ asœke á a sœ lœ nœ, tshe pa o'o fœ azœ lœ awa nœ Gbolo á tshe za she kœsœ tœ ayengɔ œrœ kɔ, lœ awa nœ ye ndje dá tshe mbœrœ tshapashɔ.
1.3: Gbolo kœdœ kœtshi nœ mokɔ nœ ye, tshe kœdœ adja angwa ye. O'o ama ye sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ yé œtœnœ dá mbœrœ adœke œrœ tshapashɔ para kɔkɔ sœ zœ. Mangba kœdjutɔ ekperœ nœ azu, tshe sœ ga pa kuni Ndjaba á tshe sœ dœ gbɔgbɔ kœropa nœ kɔ ɓa lafo. Gbolo nœ Ndjaba ropa aandjelu
1.4: Gbolo ropa aandjelu ye. Dœ tœnœ ataa á Ndjaba za ɨ'ɨrɨ kpi á rosœ œnœ endje fœ she.
1.5: Atamœ, Ndjaba papa fœ anga andjelu nœ ye bale nene adœke: «Ɓœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ mœ, yé kœto kpesheke, œmœ kœdœ Aba zœ.» Yé tshe papa ndje o'o tœ upu nœ anga andjelu bale nene adœke: «Mœ dœ bala Abanœ, yé tshe dœ bala Gbolo nœ mœ.»
1.6: Kashe dœ lɔndɔ á Ndjaba vwa lima eya Gbolo nœ ye ga pa tshapashɔ, tshe pa adœke: «Œ li adœke aandjelu nœ Ndjaba kɔ gote ga tshatshu ye.»
1.7: Tshe kpa pa o'o tœ upu nœ aandjelu adœke: «Mœ mbœrœ adœke aandjelu nœ mœ sœ ɓata ɨshirɨ, yé mœ mbœrœ adœke aayi akwa nœ ye sœ ɓata laɓa owo.»
1.8: Kashe tœ upu nœ Gbolo, tshe pa adœke: «Uu Ndjaba, ngande tshagbozu nœ zœ sœ waa dœ waa. Ɓœ sœ kœmbœrœ akwa tshagbozu nœ zœ dœ mara á sœ ndjii.
1.9: Ɓœ sœ kœyindœ œrœ á sœ ndjii, yé ɓœ sœ kœyiangba ekperœ, mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, uu Ndjaba, Ndjaba nœ zœ dá ke ɓœ adœke ɓœ sœ dœ yanga, yé tshe ma adœke œne yindœ zœ kœropa anga zœ.»
1.10: Tshe kpa pa ndje adœke: «Gbozu, œɓœ dá mbœrœ ɔshɔ pe tœ alinœ utshunœ, tshalafo kœdœ tshangba akwa ndœ kane zœ.
1.11: Œrœnœ asœke kɔ œ yiwa bala ye, kashe œɓœ, ɓœ sœpe zœ. Tshalafo œdœ tshaatɨ œ wuta ɓata ongboro lœba;
1.12: ɓœ vwele œtœnœ bala ga tœnœ ɓata á endje vwele yɔgbɔdɔ lœba, yé endje yapa œtœnœ ɓata lœba. Kashe œɓœ, ɓœ sœ kolœ ɓata á ɓœ sœ asœmœ yé ndɔngɔlɔ zœ œ sœ tœnœ nene.»
1.13: Ndjaba papa fœ anga andjelu nœ ye bale nene adœke: «Na œ sœ ga pa kuni mœ, mœ ko ayingba zœ ga tshakudu ada zœ.»
1.14: Aandjelu kœdœ aɗe e? Endje para kɔkɔ kœdœ ɨshirɨ á sœ kœmbœrœ akwa fœ Ndjaba: Tshe sœ kœvwa endje adœke endje tɨ kane azu á endje li kœgbɔ kœshe.

2.1: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, œ li adœke a shi gbɨ lœ o'o á a dji œdœ a kœyindœ nœ adœke a djingili awa nene.
2.2: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ o'o á aandjelu pa lima ndœ nœ kœmatœ ye adœke œtœnœ kœdœ adja o'o, yé œdœ azu á endje ndɨ lima tshelœnœ, œdœ azu á endje vwara lima tœ endje tœ kœlɨsœ o'onœ asœmœ kœgbɔ lima djofele á li dœ endje,
2.3: azœ dœ tœ azœ a kpa lœ manœ kotoo œdœ a kœsœ kœmbœrœtœ mara kœshe ataa? Gbozu dá yi lima sœ œrœ tœ upu nœ utshunœ, manda nœ á azu á endje dji lima she ma kɨkɨlɨnœ fœ azœ.
2.4: Ndjaba to ndje gbɔgbɔ nœ ye ga lœ kœmarœ nœ endje lœ awa nœ ambárá ndjoro, ogboro œrœ dœ tshelœ áká afá kɔ, œ ga ndœ lœ awa nœ kœto œrœ nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ fœ azu lindœ œneke á lɔsu ye yindœ nœ. Yisu kœdœ ayi kœza kœshe fœ azu
2.5: Gbambanœ nene, Ndjaba zaza tshapashɔ nœ tshambatsha á a sœ kœpa tœnœ, fœ aandjelu nene.
2.6: Andaa, anga uzu bale su o'o ala Buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Uzu kœdœ ɗe yeka á ɓœ kœsœ kœgbe dœ she a? Too gbolo nœ uzu kœdœ ɗe á ɓœ kœko ala zœ ga pa ye a?
2.7: Ɓœ za she teasho ga tshakudu aandjelu, ɓœ za mokɔ œdœ kœlɨsœtœ fœ she.
2.8: Ɓœ ko œrœ kɔ ga tshada ye.» Ɓata á Ndjaba za she tœ gbozu tshapa œrœ kɔ, anga œrœ bale á tshapu kœsœ ga tshakudu ye gugu nene. Andaa, a wuwu damba nene adœke Ndjaba ko œrœ para ga tshakudu ye.
2.9: Kashe œrœ á a sœ kœwu tœnœ dœke: Yisu á Ndjaba za lima she teasho ga tshakudu aandjelu, gbɔ mokɔ œdœ pe kœlɨsœtœ lœ kumu kœwu œrœ kanga nœ kuzu á tshe tshu. Ataa lœ awa nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba, tshe tshu kuzu tœ upu nœ azu kɔ.
2.10: Gbambanœ nene, œ li adœke Ndjaba á tshe mbœrœ œrœ kɔ, á sœ kœmbœrœ adœke œrœnœ sœ zœ asœmœ, za Yisu tœ uzu á tshe li lœ awa nœ kœwu oyo mbœrœ adœke agbolo ndjoro kœwu mokɔ nœ ye. Gbambanœ nene, Yisu kœdœ uzu á tshe sœ kœyisœ awa kœshe fœ endje.
2.11: Andaa Yisu á tshe sœ kœmbœrœ adœke azu wuta yerœ lœ ekperœ nœ endje dœ pe endjeneke á endje wuta yerœ, endje sœ dœ Aba bale. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa dá Yisu sœsœ dœ tshula kœ'e endje adœke aaya œne nene.
2.12: Yé tshe pa adœke: «Uu Ndjaba, mœ pa bala o'o tœ upu nœ ɨ'ɨrɨ zœ fœ aaya mœ, yé mœ ɓi itshi kœdonga dœ ɓœ ugurutœ ukpulu azu lœ angbɔtœ.»
2.13: Tshe kpa pa adœke: «Mœ za bala lɔsu mœ djigi fœ Ndjaba.» Yé ga pa nœ: «Wu mœ, œmœ œdœ agbolo á Ndjaba ko endje fœ mœ dœke.»
2.14: Ataa, ɓata á agbolo kœdœ azu á endje sœ dœ songba œdœ dœ indji, Yisu wuta ndje awa bale ɓata endje, tshe mbœrœ œrœ kɔ nœ mara nœ endje dœ azu. Lœ awa kuzu nœ ye, tshe ropa djaboro á tshe sœ lima dœ gbɔgbɔ nœ kuzu,
2.15: œdœ dœ œnœ kœvwara azu á awa kuzu fa lima endje tœ akanga lœ soro endje djigi.
2.16: Gbambanœ nene, tshe nana mbœrœ kœtɨ kane aandjelu nene, kashe tshe na mbœrœ aata Abrayamo.
2.17: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, œ li lima adœke tshe wuta awa bale ɓata aayanœ lœ áká œrœ kɔ yeka á kœte egerœ nganga Ndjaba nœ lɔsu kœwu oyo, á tshe sœ ndjii utshu Ndjaba mbœrœ kœdjerœndœ ekperœ nœ azu.
2.18: Gbambanœ nene, ɓata á tshe wu lima oyo dœ tœ ye lœ kœwu lɔsu nœ Satana, tshe li ndje kœtɨ kane endjeneke á Satana sœ kœwu lɔsu endje ye.

3.1: Atamœ, aaya mœ, e'e kœdœ ayerœ azu nœ Ndjaba á tshe e 'e ndœ kœmbœrœ ogo nœ ye ɓa lafo, 'e meosho ga tœ Yisu á tshe dœ ayi avwa œdœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba nœ kœyindœrœ á a sœ kœmɨndœ nœ.
3.2: Œ dœ adjapu adœke tshe sœ lima ndjii utshu Ndjaba á tshe ke she ndœ akwa ɓata á Moyize sœ ndje lima ndjii lœ anda nœ Ndjaba djigi.
3.3: Endje donga ayi kœmɔ anda kœropa anda dœ tœ ye. Gbambanœ nene, mokɔ nœ Yisu ropa œnœ Moyize.
3.4: Anda bale dœ bale kɔ sœ dœ uzu á tshe mɔ, yé uzu á tshe mɔ kɔ kœdœ Ndjaba.
3.5: Andaa, Moyize za lima tœ ye kœmbœrœ akwa dœ lɔsu ye bale lœ anda nœ Ndjaba djigi ɓata ayi akwa mbœrœ kœma œneke á li má adœke Ndjaba pa.
3.6: Kashe Kristu zatœ ye kœmbœrœ akwa dœ lɔsu ye bale ɓata Gbolo, yé Ndjaba za she ga tœ kumu akwa lœ anda nœ ye. Anda nœ ye kœdœ azœ œdœ a kœsœpe kolœ kœyindœ nœ yé á sœ kœko lɔsu azœ ga tœ œrœ á a sœ kœkate kœgbɔ tœnœ dœ yanga. Azu nœ Ndjaba œ yatœ endje
3.7: Mbœrœ tœnœ dá Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ pa adœke: «Kpesheke, œdœ 'e kœsœ kœdji tshama ye,
3.8: 'e sœsœ dœ ɔgbɔ lɔsu nene ɓata lɔndɔ á 'e oma lima dœ Ndjaba, dœ olo á 'e wu lima lɔsu ye ɓa lœ kpagagasho.
3.9: Ɓa zœ, alaba 'e kœwu lima lɔsu mœ dœ kœpara awa kœyu tshelœ mœ, yé endje wu lima akwa ndœ kane mœ
3.10: manda ungu zazu bisha (40). Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, mœ sœ dœ ókó ga tœ azu nœ oshonœ asœmœ yé á mœ pa adœke: “Gbetshelœ nœ endje sœ kœndɨ waa dœ waa, azunœ asœmœ wuwu lima sœ awa mœ nene.”
3.11: Gbambanœ nene, mœ dara ama mœ lœ ókó nœ mœ adœke: A wu bala zœ, œdœ endje œ li bala kœyatœ endje ɓa ndœ mœ!»
3.12: Alaya mœ, 'e sœ dœ gbɔdjela. Kaka adœke uzu bale ugurutœ 'e sœsœ dœ ekpe lɔsu dœ pe sharapu neke á vwa she kœfa tshangba ye fœ Ndjaba nœ soro nene.
3.13: Kashe 'e to gbɔgbɔ ugurutœ 'e dœ anga 'e ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ ɓata á endje sú ala Buku adœke œndœ «tshakpesheke» sœpe kœdɨ tœnœ, mbœrœ adœke ekperœ bɨbɨlɨ uzu bale ugurutœ 'e, á tshe kœwuta dœ ɔgbɔ lɔsu nene.
3.14: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ a kœsœpe kœshi gbɨ œrrr ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔ soro azœ lœ kœyindœrœ ɓata á a gbɔ lima tœ alinœ, a wuta aayi kœmbœrœ akwa awa bale dœ Kristu.
3.15: Endje su ɓala buku nœ Ndjaba adœke: «Kpesheke, œdœ 'e kœsœ kœdji tshama ye, 'e sœsœ dœ ɔgbɔ lɔsu ɓata dœ lɔkɔ á 'e oma lima dœ Ndjaba nene.»
3.16: Azu aɗe dá dji lima tshama ye, yé á oma dœ she a? Œ dœ́dœ́ lima azu kɔ á Moyize ko endje wuta tœnœ ga ushu lœ ogo Ezipito nene a?
3.17: Yé aɗe dá Ndjaba sœ lima dœ ókó ga tœ endje manda ungu zazu bisha a? Œ dœ́dœ́ ga tœ azu á endje mbœrœ lima ekperœ yekane á tshu ɓa lœ kpagagasho nene a?
3.18: Yé aɗe dá Ndjaba dara lima ama ye adœke endje li kœyatœ endje ɓa ndœ œne nene a? Œ dœ́dœ́ mbœrœ azu á endje oma lima asœmœ nene a?
3.19: Yé a wu adœke endje lili lima kœli ga zœ nene mangba ɔgbɔ lɔsu nœ endje.

4.1: Ndjaba pa lima ndœ nœ fœ azœ adœke a li bala kœyatœ azœ ɓa tœ osho á œne guma fœ azœ. Ataa, ala azœ gbɔ adœke anga uzu bale ugurutœ azœ tshatshapu kœli ga zœ nene.
4.2: Gbambanœ nene, a gbɔ Ɔtshɔ O'o ɓata á azunœ asœmœ gbɔ ndje lima. Kashe o'o á endje dji lima mbœmbœrœ œrœ bale tœ endje nene, mbœrœ aayi kœdji tœnœ dji lima tako kashe endje yiyi lima ndœ nœ nene.
4.3: Yé azœ á a sœ dœ kœyindœrœ, a li bala kœyatœ azœ ɓa tœ osho á Ndjaba pa lima o'o tœ upunœ adœke: «Mœ dara ama mœ lœ ókó nœ mœ: Endje li bala kœyatœ endje ɓa tœ osho kœyatœsho nœ mœ nene!» Ndjaba pa atamœ, kashe osho kœyatœshonœ asœmœ, tshe guma lima kœto tœ ali kœmbœrœ tshapashɔ.
4.4: Gbambanœ nene, endje sú tœ upu nœ olo mindu dœ bisha (7) adœke: «Yé Ndjaba ya lima tœ ye dœ olo mindu dœ bisha manda kœka akwa nœ ye kɔ.»
4.5: Yé endje kpa su o'onœ asœmœ adœke: «Endje li kœyatœ endje ɓa tœ osho nœ mœ nene.»
4.6: Dœ tœnœ ataa, azu á endje dœ lima azu utshunœ kœdji Ɔtshɔ O'o, endje lili lima kœyatœ endje ɓa tœ oshonœ asœmœ nene, mbœrœ endje vwara lima tœ endje kœlɨsœ Ndjaba ye, andaa anga azu li kœli tœnœ ye.
4.7: Ndjaba kpa za anga olo kœli ga zœ, á tshe e ɨ'ɨrɨnœ «kpesheke». Olo ndjoro manda nœ, tshe pa lima o'o waa lœ awa nœ Davidi lœ ada mbeti á endje pa tœnœ utshunœ adœke: «Kpesheke, œdœ 'e kœdji tshama ye, 'e sœsœ dœ ɔgbɔ lɔsu nene.»
4.8: Yé œdœ Yosuwa kœto lima azu li tœnœ ɓa tœ osho nœ kœyatœsho, Ndjaba œ kpa pa má o'o tœ anga angbɨ olo bala nene.
4.9: Ataa, olo kœyatœsho nœ lɔkɔ sabata sœ mbœrœ azu nœ Ndjaba.
4.10: Gbambanœ nene, uzu á tshe li ga lœ kœyatœsho nœ ye, sœ ndje kœyatœ ye manda akwa á tshe mbœrœ ɓata á Ndjaba ya ndje lima tœ ye manda œnœ ye.
4.11: A pa avwaratœ azœ kœli ga lœ kœyatœshonœ asœmœ, adœke adja mara ɔgbɔ lɔsunœ asœke kœmbœmbœrœ adœke uzu bale te nene.
4.12: Gbambanœ nene, o'o ama Ndjaba sœ dœ soro œdœ dœ gbɔgbɔ, yé amanœ ki kœropa ɨngɨrɨ yakamba á amanœ sœ bisha. Œ sœ kœli œrrr ga tœ kœkurutshelœ uvuru dœ ɨshirɨ, tshelœ kpoto ngbabi dœ vwala. Œ sœ kœwa ngbanga ugurutœ gbetshelœ œdœ o'o á sœ ɓa lɔsu uzu.
4.13: Anga œrœ bale á Ndjaba mbœrœ á zatœ ye yiwatœ nœ tœ ala ye gugu nene. Œrœ kɔ sœ kpendro, ngbɨ tœ ala ye, yé fœ she dá a li kœpa o'o tœ upu nœ œrœnœ kɔ á a mbœrœ. Yisu kœdœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba nœ azœ
4.14: A sœ dœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba á œsœ ye lɨ, œshe kœdœ Yisu, Gbolo nœ Ndjaba. Tshe ro tɔ lœ tshalafo œ gu ga ndœ Ndjaba. Atamœ, a shi gbɨ lœ kœyindœrœ nœ azœ.
4.15: Gbambanœ nene, egerœ nganga Ndjaba nœ azœ awa bale dœ azœ lœ kœmɔ nœ azœ sœ zœ. Satana wu lima lɔsu ye lœ œrœ kɔ ɓata á tshe sœ kœmbœrœ dœ azœ, kashe tshe mbœmbœrœ ekperœ bale nene.
4.16: Ataa, a na dœ lɔsu azœ djigi ga tœ ngande tshagbozu nœ ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ Ndjaba mbœrœ á tshe kœwu oyo azœ yekane á kœma ɔtshɔ lɔsu nœ ye ga ndœ azœ mbœrœ kœtɨ kane azœ dœ lɔkɔnœ á tshe yindœ nœ.

5.1: Egerœ nganga Ndjaba kɔ, endje ke she ugurutœ azu mbœrœ kœmbœrœ akwa tshagurutœ azu dœ Ndjaba tœ upu nœ endje. Akwa nœ ye kœdœ kœko kœtorœ œdœ tokóró mbœrœ ekperœ.
5.2: Tshe li kœsœ dœ ɔmɔ lɔsu ga ndœ azu á endje wuwusœ œrœ nene yé á sœ lœ djingili. Gbambanœ nene, œshe ndje dœ tœ ye kœdœ uzu á tshe sœ dœ kœmɔ.
5.3: Yé mbœrœ kœmɔnœ, œ li adœke tshe to tokóró mbœrœ ekperœ nœ azu œdœ ndje mbœrœ œnœ ye dœ tœ ye.
5.4: Uzu bale lili kœketœ ye dœ tœ ye adœke œne dœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba nene. Kashe Ndjaba dá e uzu ndœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ, ɓata á tshe e lima Aro.
5.5: Œtœnœ ataa dá Kristu zaza kœlɨsœtœ nœ kœwuta egerœ nganga Ndjaba ga tœ ye dœ tœ ye nene; kashe tshe gbɔ ɓa ndœ tsheneke á tshe pa fœ she adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ Gbolo nœ mœ kpesheke, œmœ kœdœ Aba zœ.»
5.6: Yé ɓa tœ anga oshonœ, tshe pa adœke: «Œɓœ kœdœ nganga Ndjaba waa dœ waa ɓa lœ mara nœ Melekisedeke.»
5.7: Lœ soro ye ɓa pa ɔshɔ, tshe sœ lima kœza avwala dœ ɔgbɔ rawa œdœ dœ ngola fœ tsheneke á tshe li lima kœshe she lœ akuzu, yé Ndjaba yi lima ndœ nœ mbœrœ á tshe lɨ lima œsœ ye dœ kœzatœ ye ga atɨ fœ she.
5.8: Ataa œshe kœdœ lima Gbolo nœ Ndjaba gbaa, tshe wusœ kœlɨsœ Ndjaba lœ awa nœ œrœ kanga nœ ye kɔ á tshe wu.
5.9: Yé manda nœ á Ndjaba fa she lima tœ uzu á tshe li, tshe wuta lima ayi kœza kœshe nœ waa dœ waa fœ azu á endje sœ kœlɨsœ o'o ama ye.
5.10: Ndjaba ma she ngbɨ tœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba lœ mara nœ Melekisedeke. Kœgbota tshelœ utu tœ upu nœ kœkatœ kœyindœrœ
5.11: 'A sœ dœ o'o ndjoro kœpa tœ upu nœ asœ, kashe kœpandœ ádánœ gbɔ waa mbœrœ 'e kpa sœsœ kœdji tshelœkata o'o katsha katsha nene.
5.12: 'E dœ má ɓalima aayi kœyisœrœ katshatsha ye. Kashe 'e kpa gbe adœke endje yisœ ali o'o nœ o'o ama Ndjaba fœ 'e. 'E sœpe damba kœgbe dœ kœa ɔngɔ, tœ œsœnœ adœke 'e zɨ ɔgbɔ rœgo.
5.13: Uzu kɔ á tshe sœpe kœa ɔngɔ, tshe lili kœmirœtshelœ ye pa upu nœ œrœ á sœ ndjii nene, mbœrœ œshe kœdœ awaya.
5.14: Kashe ɔgbɔ kœzɨrœ sœ mbœrœ agbozu á lœ awa nœ œrœ kɔ á endje mbœrœ, li kœkurutshelœ ekperœ dœ ɔtshɔrœ.

6.1: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, a fatœ azœ ndœ kœyisœrœ nœ agbozu yé œ katœ kœyisœrœ nœ agbolo ga manda azœ tœ upu nœ Kristu. A kpa kwakwatœ azœ ndœ œrœ á endje guma utshunœ nene: kœfatshalɔsu tœ œrœ á sœ kœyi osho ga lœ kuzu nœ ɨshirɨ yé œ sœ dœ kœyindœrœ ga ndœ Ndjaba,
6.2: kœyisœrœ tœ upu nœ batisimu, tœ upu nœ kœto kane ga pa azu, tœ upu nœ kœshe lœ akuzu œdœ pe tœ upu nœ kœwa ngbanga nœ waa dœ waa.
6.3: 'E wu œrœ á li dœ azœ adœke a mbœrœ bala œdœ Ndjaba kœyindœ nœ, dœ mœ.
6.4: Gbambanœ nene, azu á endje wu ɨngbɨsho nœ Ndjaba, endje á endje wusœ kœtorœ nœ tshalafo á Ndjaba to fœ endje, endje á endje te azu nœ Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ,
6.5: endje á endje dji o'o ama Ndjaba dœ ɔtshɔnœ œdœ gbɔgbɔ nœ tshapashɔ á na ɓa mbatsha
6.6: yekane á kpa yo, œ li nene adœke endje kpa fatshalɔsu endje. Andaa endje kpa sœ kœkuru Gbolo nœ Ndjaba ga pa kurushi mbœrœ kœfatshalɔsu nœ endje yé œ sœ kœgu she tœ ala azu.
6.7: Œdœ ɔshɔ kœsœ kœndjoro ungu yavuru ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ yé á ɔkɔ ngwarœ nœ azu á endje lu kœsœ kœga tœnœ, œ yindœ kœpa adœke Ndjaba to kane ye ga pa ɔshɔnœ ye.
6.8: Kashe œdœ œ kœsœ kœzu ishi œdœ gusu á sœ dœ ishi, œ sœ dœ ádá bale nene. Œ sœ ndoo adœke Ndjaba darandœ nœ yé œ sho.
6.9: Tœ 'e dœ aaya 'a á 'a yindœ 'e waa, 'a yindœ nœ lœ o'o á 'a sœ kœpa tœnœ adœke, 'e sœ kœza ɔtshɔ awa á sœ kœto 'e na tœnœ ndœ kœshe.
6.10: Yé Ndjaba sœ ndjii, tshe lili kœdjerœndœ akwa œdœ kœyindœsho á 'e ma ga tœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye lœ awa nœ kœmbœrœ akwa á 'e mbœrœ lima fœ ayerœ azu œrrr ga tœ ngɔngɔ asœke nene.
6.11: Kashe ogo nœ 'a sœ adœke uzu dœ uzu zatœ ye djigi ndœ kœmbœrœ atamœ œrrr ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ yekane á kœgbɔ œneke á tshe za lɔsu ye ga pa nœ.
6.12: 'E mɔmɔ nene, kashe 'e za mara kœmbœrœ œrœ nœ azu á endje gbɔ œrœ á Ndjaba pa tœnœ lœ awa nœ kœyindœrœ œdœ kœru lɔsu nœ endje ga ndœ ye. Œrœ á Ndjaba pa tœnœ
6.13: Lɔndɔ á Ndjaba pa lima tœ œrœ fœ Abrayamo, tshe dara lima ama ye dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye dœ tœ ye; gbambanœ nene, anga uzu á tshe ropa ye adœke tshe dara ama ye dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ ye gugu nene.
6.14: Yé tshe pa adœke: «Adjapu, mœ to kane mœ ga pa zœ waa, yé mœ mbœrœ adœke aata zœ ngba kœropanœ.»
6.15: Abrayamo sœ lima kœvu dœ ugu lɔsu yé tshe gbɔ lima œneke á Ndjaba pa lima tœnœ fœ she ye.
6.16: Azu dara ama endje dœ ɨ'ɨrɨ uzu á tshe ropa endje, yé œ sœ kœmbœrœ adœke sharapu sœ ugurutœ endje pa o'o á endje dara ama endje lœ kumunœ nene.
6.17: Andaa, Ndjaba yindœ kœma fœ azu á endje gbɔ bala œrœnœ á tshe pa lima tœnœ fœ Abrayamo adœke, sharapu œ sœ tœ upunœ nene. Tshe dara ama ye ndœ kœma adœke, o'o á œne pa dœ lɔsu œne bale asœmœ, œne kpa yapa nene.
6.18: Atamœ, Ndjaba mbœrœ œrœ bisha neke á tshe lili kœyapa tœnœ nene œdœ ndje kœpa wala tœ upunœ nene, mbœrœ kœto gbɔgbɔ á rosœ nœ fœ azœ. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, a sœ dœ ugu lɔsu, azœ á a sœ kœkate kœgbɔ œrœnœ á a ko lɔsu azœ ga panœ asœmœ.
6.19: Œrœnœ á a ko lɔsu azœ ga pa nœ mbœrœ adœke a shi mbœrœ tœnœ. Soro azœ shi mbœrœ tœnœ ɓata egerœ agba œ shi mbœrœ longo. Œrœnœ asœmœ li kpuru djagakele rido,
6.20: á Yisu li ɓa zœ utshunœ mbœrœ azœ, yé œ te egerœ nganga Ndjaba waa dœ waa ɓata Melekisedeke.

7.1: Melekisedeke kœdœ lima gbozugo Saleme œdœ nganga Ndjaba nœ Ndjaba á tshe ropa œrœ kɔ. Melekisedeke na para tshatshu Abrayamo dœ lɔkɔ á tshe sœ lima kœgu tœnœ manda kœnga koshe dœ agbozugo, yé œ to kane ye ga pa ye.
7.2: Œshe dá Abrayamo ko lima œrœ bale lœ ndjokpanœ á tshe gbɔ, fœ she. Utshunœ kɔ, ádá ɨ'ɨrɨ ye kœdœ «gbozugo nœ o'o á sœ ndjii», yé ga pa nœ, œshe kœdœ gbozugo Saleme á yindœ kœpa adœke «gbozugo nœ kœsœ gee».
7.3: Endje wuwusœ abanœ dœ ayinœ nene, endje wuwusœ o'o tœ upu nœ uwu aalatanœ œdœ olo kœzu she nene, endje wuwu ndje sœ ndɔngɔlɔ soro ye nene; kashe tshe sœ ɓata Gbolo nœ Ndjaba: tshe dœ́ nganga Ndjaba nœ waa dœ waa.
7.4: 'E wu mara á tshe dœ egerœ uzu, œshe á ata azœ dœ Abrayamo ko œrœ bale lœ ndjokpa á tshe gbɔ lœ koshenœ fœ she.
7.5: Andaa, kœli dœ awa akwa, aata Levi á endje dœ lima anganga Ndjaba dá lima kœ'eshondœ œrœ bale lœ ndjokpa nœ azu Israyele, œ yindœ kœpa adœke aaya endje á endje kœdœ aata Abrayamo.
7.6: Melekisedeke sœsœ lima lœ uwu aata Levi nene, kashe Abrayamo to lima œrœ bale lœ ndjokpa fœ she. Gapa nœ, tshe to kane ye ga pa Abrayamo á Ndjaba pa lima tœ œrœ fœ she.
7.7: Andaa dœ sharapu nene, egerœ uzu dá to kane ye ga pa aya uzu asœmœ.
7.8: Yé endjeneke á endje sœ kœgbɔ œrœ bale lœ ndjokpa kœdœ azu á endje tshuutshu, kashe tœ upu nœ Melekisedeke, endje pa adœke œshe kœdœ uzu á tshe sœ dœ soro.
7.9: Tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ kɔ, œneke yindœ kœpa adœke, lɔkɔ á Abrayamo ko bale lœ ndjokpa asœmœ, œ yindœ kœpa adœke Levi á tshe sœ lima kœgbɔ œrœ bale lœ ndjokpa ko ndje œnœ ye yé.
7.10: Gbambanœ nene, ataa endje zuzu lima Levi nene gbaa, œ sœ ɓata tshe sœ lima ɓa lœ atanœ dœ Abrayamo zœ lɔkɔ á Melekisedeke na lima para tshatshu ye.
7.11: Awa akwa pa adœke anganga Ndjaba œ wuta lœ uwu aata Levi. Andaa œdœ anganga Ndjaba lœ uwu aata Levi kœmbœrœ lima akwa á li, ádá nœ kœgbɔ má anga angbɨ anganga Ndjaba ɓa lœ uwu aata Melekisedeke gugu nene tœ œsœnœ adœke endje ke endje ɓa lœ uwu aata Aro.
7.12: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ endje kœyapa uwu kœmbœrœ akwa nœ anganga Ndjaba, œ li adja adœke endje yapa awa akwa.
7.13: Yé Gbozu nœ azœ á a pa o'o tœ upu nœ ye asœke, tshe sœ lœ anga angbɨ mara á anga uzu bale lœnœ mbœmbœrœ akwa nganga Ndjaba ɓa pa ndaba nene.
7.14: Azu kɔ wusœ nœ adœke tshe to lœ mara nœ Yuda, á Moyize papa lima o'o bale ala mbeti nœ ye tœ upu nœ anganga Ndjaba nene. Anga nganga Ndjaba ɓata Melekisedeke
7.15: Yé œneke á sœ kœma œtœnœ ngbɨ kœdœ adœke: Anga nganga Ndjaba á tshe wuta, tshe sœ ɓata Melekisedeke.
7.16: Tshe wuwuta nganga Ndjaba lindœ awa akwa tœ upu nœ aata uzu nene, kashe tshe wuta nganga Ndjaba lœ awa nœ gbɔgbɔ nœ soro á ndɔngɔlɔnœ gugu nene.
7.17: Yé buku nœ Ndjaba má adœke: «Ɓœ kœdœ nganga Ndjaba nœ waa dœ waa ɓata Melekisedeke.»
7.18: Ataa, endje ka lima tœ ongboro awa akwa mbœrœ á gbɔgbɔnœ œdœ ádánœ gugu lima nene.
7.19: Gbambanœ nene, awa akwa mbœmbœrœ adœke uzu dœ uzu á tshe li nene. Kashe anga ɔtshɔrœ kœropa nœ á a za lɔsu azœ ga pa nœ mbœrœtœ ye fœ azœ, yé lœ awanœ, a li kœgitœ azœ ndoo dœ Ndjaba.
7.20: Yé œ mbœrœtœ endje dœ kœdarama nœ Ndjaba. Anga azu tete anganga Ndjaba lœ awa nœ kœdarama nene.
7.21: Kashe mbœrœ she, tshe wuta lima nganga Ndjaba lœ awa nœ kœdarama lɔkɔ má Ndjaba pa tœ upu nœ ye adœke: «Gbozu dara ama ye yé tshe yapa bala o'o ama ye nene: “ɓœ kœdœ nganga Ndjaba nœ waa dœ waa.”»
7.22: Mbœrœ tœnœ dá tafo ayo á Yisu wuta ayi kœgi sharapu ugurutœ Ndjaba dœ azœ, sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ kœropa ongboronœ.
7.23: Ga panœ, anganga Ndjaba ngba lima waa mbœrœ endje sœ lima kœtshu tœnœ, endje lili lima kœmbœrœ akwa nœ endje waa dœ waa nene.
7.24: Kashe Yisu sœ dœ soro nœ waa dœ waa yé akwa nganga Ndjaba nœ ye œ ka nene.
7.25: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, tshe li kœshe dœ mara nœ waa dœ waa endjeneke á endje na lœ awa nœ ye ga ndœ Ndjaba; gbambanœ nene, tshe sœ dœ soro á ka nene ndœ kœza avwala nœ ye fœ Ndjaba tœ upu nœ endje.
7.26: Ataa, Yisu kœdœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba á tshe li má dœ azœ. Tshe sœ yerœ, tshe gugu dœ o'o nœ uzu nene, tshe mbœmbœrœ ekperœ nene. Ndjaba za she kpi tœ aayi kœmbœrœ ekperœ yé œ za she ga pa œrœ kɔ.
7.27: Tshe sœsœ ɓata anga angbɨ agboro anganga Ndjaba nene: tshe gbegbe kœza tokóró ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ utshunœ mbœrœ ekperœ nœ ye dœ tœ ye, yé manda nœ, mbœrœ œnœ azu ogo nene. Tshe za tokóró kolœ awa tshebabale lɔkɔ á tshe za lima tœ ye dœ tœ ye tœ tokóró.
7.28: Andaa, awa akwa sœ kœko azu á endje mɔɔmɔ tœ agboro anganga Ndjaba; kashe o'o nœ kœdarama nœ Ndjaba á na manda awa akwa, za Gbolo á tshe guma œrœ ga tœ ndɔngɔlɔnœ djigi, tœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba mbœrœ waa dœ waa.

8.1: Andaa, gilida o'o nœ azœ á a yindœ kœpa tœnœ kœdœ mara egerœ nganga Ndjaba á a sœ dœ she, œshe á tshe sœ ga atɨ ga tœ kuni ngande tshagbozu nœ Ndjaba ɓa lafo,
8.2: ɓata ayi akwa nœ adja œyerœ osho œdœ œnœ adja gbanda tande á Gbozu mɔ, kashe œ dœ́dœ́ uzu dá mɔ nene.
8.3: Endje za egerœ nganga Ndjaba kɔ ga tœ akwa mbœrœ kœto kœtorœ œdœ tokóró. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, œ sœ dœ ádá waa ye adœke tshe sœ dœ œrœ kœto tœnœ.
8.4: Œdœ Kristu kœsœ lima ɓa pa ɔshɔ, tshe dœ má nganga Ndjaba nene. Gbambanœ nene, anga anganga Ndjaba á endje sœ kœko kœtorœ lindœ awa akwa, sœ zœ.
8.5: Kashe endje sœ kœdonga Ndjaba ga tœ ɨshirɨ œrœ, ga tœ desherœ á sœ kœma adjapu nœ tshalafo. Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa dá Ndjaba za lima o'o fœ Moyize utshu nœ kœmɔ gbanda tande. Tshe pa fœ she adœke: «Wu, mbœrœ kɔ lindœ mara á mœ yi lima sœ nœ fœ ɓœ ɓa pa kaga.»
8.6: Adjapu, tshe sœ kœmbœrœ akwa á ropanœ kɔ, mbœrœ œshe kœdœ uzu ɓa uguru ɔtshɔ ayo á ka ga pa ɔtshɔrœ á Ndjaba pa lima tœ nœ.
8.7: Œdœ endje kœgbagbagbara o'o tœ upu nœ ayo neke lima utshunœ nene, ádá nœ kœyapa tœnœ dœ bishanœ œ gu má nene.
8.8: Kashe tœnœ kœdœ kœgbagbara osho dá Ndjaba sœ kœgbagbara dœ azu nœ ye lɔkɔ á tshe sœ kœpa adœke: «Gbozu pa adœke, dœ olo á na manda nœ, á mœ lu tafo ayo ugurutœ mœ dœ azu Israyele œdœ dœ azu ogo Yuda,
8.9: œ sœsœ ɓata ayo á sœ lima ugurutœ mœ dœ aata endje lɔkɔ á mœ ko endje dœ kane mœ mbœrœ kœko endje ga ushu lœ ogo Ezipito nene. Mbœrœ endje dœ tœ endje, endje mbœmbœrœtœ endje lima lindœ ayo nœ mœ nene. Gbozu pa adœke: œmœ ndje, mœ katœ endje tɨ ye.
8.10: Gbambanœ nene, wu ayo á mœ lu bala dœ azu Israyele manda olonœ asœmœ dœke: ndœ kœza awa akwa nœ mœ, Mœ su bala awa akwa nœ mœ ga lœ gbetshelœ nœ endje œdœ ga lɔsu endje. Mœ te bala Ndjaba nœ endje, yé endje te bala azu nœ mœ.
8.11: Uzu bale ugurutœ endje œ yisœ œrœ nene fœ yanganœ too fœ ayanœ adœke tshe wusœ mœ, mbœrœ endje para,œ wu bala sœ mœ ye, kœto kpœtœ aaya azu œrrr ga tœ agboro azu.
8.12: Gbambanœ nene, mœ djerœ bala ndœ ekperœ nœ endje, yé mœ kpa kwatœ mœ kœtondœ nœ bale nene.»
8.13: Dœ kœpandœ tafo ayo, Ndjaba fa œneke utshunœ tœ ongboronœ. Andaa, œneke á fa ongboro œrœ yé á gbɔ ye, sœ ndoo kœyiwa tœnœ.

9.1: Ali ayo sœ lima dœ mara nœ kœdonga dœ Ndjaba œdœ pe Tepelo nœ ɔshɔ.
9.2: Yé gbanda tande sœ lima kpœtœmœ, ali tshakalanœ sœ tœ osho á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Œyerœ osho, á miinda dœ ndaba œdœ pe mapa á endje sœ kœto fœ Ndjaba sœ lœ nœ.
9.3: Manda nœ, ɓa ngba bisha ridonœ, gbanda tande á ɨ'ɨrɨnœ kœdœ Œyerœ osho kœropanœ,
9.4: á sœ dœ ndaba á sœ dœ ɔrœ, á endje zo yombo pa nœ œdœ sanduku nœ ayo á endje dja kotenœ dœ ɔrœ sœ kpœtœmœ. Œrœ á sœ lœnœ dœke: lɔsú á endje mbœrœ dœ ɔrœ á mane sœ lima lœnœ, tshɔngbɔlɔ nœ Aro á ndɔkɔnœ wuta lima tœnœ œdœ pe ndaba nœ ayo.
9.5: Ɓa pa sandukunœ, endje ko lima œrœ bisha ɓa zœ, œrœnœ sœ lima kœma akeluba, á yindœ kœpa adœke Ndjaba dœ tœ ye sœ lima ɓa zœ zœ. Andjelunœ saka tshelœ ombo endje ga panœ ga tœ osho á endje sœ lima kœto tokóró mbœrœ adœke Ndjaba djerœndœ ekperœ nœ azu. Kashe awa kœli ga lœ kœpandœ ádánœ bale dœ bale gugu nene.
9.6: Endje guma lima œrœnœ kɔ dœ mara ataa, anganga Ndjaba sœ lima kœli ɔlɔ dœ ɔlɔ ga lœ ali tshakala gbanda tande mbœrœ kœmbœrœ akwa nœ endje.
9.7: Kashe ɓa lœ bisha tshakala gbanda tandenœ, egerœ nganga Ndjaba sœ kœli ga zœ kolœ awa bale lœ ungu bale. Tshe sœ kœli dœ indji agea kœto dœ makabo fœ Ndjaba mbœrœ ekperœ nœ ye dœ tœ ye œdœ mbœrœ œnœ azu.
9.8: Ɔtshɔ Ɨshirɨ yindœ kœma adœke awa nœ kœli ga tœ œyerœ osho mamatœ ye damba nene, mbœrœ gbanda tande neke utshunœ sœpe zœ.
9.9: Tœnœ dá sœ kœma ambárá nœ ngɔngɔ asœ. Œ dœ́dœ́ makabo œdœ tokóró á endje sœ kœto fœ Ndjaba dá sœ kœguma lɔsu uzu adœke tshe li kœdonga Ndjaba nene.
9.10: Œ sœ mbœrœ kœzɨrœ, kœndjorœ dœ pe kœdjutɔ kotœ uzu lindœ mara o'o nœ alata. Tœnœ kœdœ mara œrœ á azu sœ kœmbœrœ tœnœ œrrr ga tœ adœke endje yapa œrœ para.
9.11: Kashe Yisu na tœ egerœ nganga Ndjaba nœ ɔtshɔrœ á sœ kœna tœnœ. Tshe li tɔ lœ gbanda tande á sœ tœ egerœnœ yé á li, œ dœ́dœ́ ndje uzu dá mbœrœ nene, œ yindœ kœpa adœke, á dœ́dœ́ œnœ tshapashɔnœ asœ nene.
9.12: Œ dœ́dœ́ lœ awa nœ indji akɔ ayaburu œdœ avoro angombe nene, kashe lœ awa nœ indji ye dœ tœ ye dá tshe li kolœ awa tshebabale ga tœ œyerœ osho yé á vwara azœ lœ ekperœ nœ azœ waa dœ waa.
9.13: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ indji akɔ ayaburu dœ akɔ ngombe œdœ pe vorowo ovoro ngombe á endje dja ga tœ azu á endje mbœrœ ekperœ kœsœ kœmbœrœ adœke ɔkɔ endje wuta yerœ,
9.14: ataa, indji Kristu, á lœ awa nœ ɨshirɨ nœ waa dœ waa, á tshe zatœ ye dœ tœ ye tœ makabo fœ Ndjaba ɓata uzu á tshe mbœmbœrœ ekperœ nene kashe á tshu, rosœ nœ ye. Indji ye œ djutɔ bala lɔsu azœ lœ ekperœ nœ kuzu adœke a mbœrœ akwa fœ Ndjaba nœ soro.
9.15: Wu mbœrœ tœnœ ataa á Kristu dœ uzu ɓa uguru tafo ayo dœ ongboro ayo. Ɓata á kuzu ye wuta mbœrœ kœyɔ azu lœ kanga nœ ekperœ á mbœrœ lima tœ endje lœ ongboro ayo, endjeneke á Ndjaba e endje li ndœ kœgbɔ œrœ tshangba nœ waa dœ waa á tshe pa lima tœnœ.
9.16: Gbambanœ nene, œdœ mbeti kœko œrœ tshangba uzu kœwuta, œ sœ dœ ádá waa ye œdœ ayi kœsu mbetinœ kœtshu ye kane.
9.17: Mbeti kœko œrœ tshangba uzu sœ dœ ádá œdœ uzunœ kœtshu; kashe œdœ tshe kœsœ dœ soro, ádánœ gugu nene.
9.18: Mbœrœ tœnœ ataa, tœ kœtetœ kœmbœrœ ayo neke lima utshunœ, indji tu lima yeka.
9.19: Lɔkɔ á Moyize pandœ awa o'o liaka awa akwa fœ azu para, tshe za indji ovoro ngombe dœ œnœ akɔ ayaburu á djanga dœ ungu, á za aya ganea ɔyɔ á i usu agea ga tœnœ yé á yi ga la nœ, yeka á vwi ga tœ buku dœ tœ ye dœ pe ga tœ azu para.
9.20: Tshe pa adœke: «Asœ kœdœ indji nœ ayo á Ndjaba za awa tœnœ mbœrœ 'e.»
9.21: Manda nœ, tshe vwi ndje indjinœ ga tœ gbanda tande dœ pe gbarœ para á endje donga Ndjaba dœ tœnœ.
9.22: Lindœ awa akwa, indji dá sœ kœmbœrœ adœke œrœ kɔ wuta yerœ, yé lœ awa nœ indji dá Ndjaba œ djerœndœ ekperœ. Tokóró nœ Kristu gi ekperœ pa azu
9.23: Ataa, œdœ ɨshirɨ œrœ á sœ ɓa lafo kœsœ yerœ lœ awa nœ mara kœdonga oshonœ asœmœ, œ li adœke adja o'o nœ tshalafo dœ tœ endje sœ ndje lœ awa nœ tokóró neke á sœ dœ ɔtshɔnœ kœropa nœ.
9.24: Gbambanœ nene, œ dœ́dœ́ ɓa tœ œyerœ osho á uzu mbœrœ dœ kane, á azu tondœ nœ yeka á mbœrœ, dá Kristu li ga lœnœ nene, kashe adja ɓa lafo. Ɓa zœ dá tshe sœ kœmatœ ye ngɔngɔnœ asœ ɓa utshu Ndjaba mbœrœ azœ.
9.25: Yé œ dœ́dœ́ manda kœzatœ ye tœ tokóró awa ndjoro ɓata á egerœ nganga Ndjaba á tshe sœ kœli ungu bale dœ bale ga lœ œyerœ osho dœ angbɨ indji nene.
